authors_text: Jiqian Dong,Sikai Chen,Paul Young Joun Ha,Yujie Li,Samuel Labi
title: A DRL-based Multiagent Cooperative Control Framework for CAV Networks: a Graphic Convolution Q Network
title_zh: 基于 DRL 的 CAV 网络多智能体协作控制框架：图形卷积 Q 网络
abstract: Connected Autonomous Vehicle (CAV) Network can be defined as a collection of CAVs operating at different locations on a multilane corridor, which provides a platform to facilitate the dissemination of operational information as well as control instructions. Cooperation is crucial in CAV operating systems since it can greatly enhance operation in terms of safety and mobility, and high-level cooperation between CAVs can be expected by jointly plan and control within CAV network. However, due to the highly dynamic and combinatory nature such as dynamic number of agents (CAVs) and exponentially growing joint action space in a multiagent driving task, achieving cooperative control is NP hard and cannot be governed by any simple rule-based methods. In addition, existing literature contains abundant information on autonomous driving's sensing technology and control logic but relatively little guidance on how to fuse the information acquired from collaborative sensing and build decision processor on top of fused information. In this paper, a novel Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) based approach combining Graphic Convolution Neural Network (GCN) and Deep Q Network (DQN), namely Graphic Convolution Q network (GCQ) is proposed as the information fusion module and decision processor. The proposed model can aggregate the information acquired from collaborative sensing and output safe and cooperative lane changing decisions for multiple CAVs so that individual intention can be satisfied even under a highly dynamic and partially observed mixed traffic. The proposed algorithm can be deployed on centralized control infrastructures such as road-side units (RSU) or cloud platforms to improve the CAV operation.
summary: Connected Autonomous Vehicle (CAV) Network can be defined as a collection of CAVs operating at different locations on a multilane corridor, which provides a platform to facilitate the dissemination of operational information as well as control instructions. The proposed model can aggregate the information acquired from collaborative sensing and output safe and cooperative lane changing decisions for multiple CAVs so that individual intention can be satisfied even under a highly dynamic and partially observed mixed traffic. The proposed algorithm can be deployed on centralized control infrastructures such as road-side units (RSU) or cloud platforms to improve the CAV operation.
abstract_zh: 联网自动驾驶汽车 (CAV) 网络可以定义为在多车道走廊上不同位置运行的 CAV 的集合，它提供了一个平台来促进操作信息和控制指令的传播。合作对于CAV操作系统至关重要，因为它可以极大地增强操作的安全性和机动性，并且通过CAV网络内的联合规划和控制可以实现CAV之间的高水平合作。然而，由于多智能体驾驶任务中智能体的动态数量（CAV）和呈指数增长的联合动作空间等高度动态和组合的性质，实现协作控制是NP困难的，并且不能通过任何简单的基于规则的方法来控制。此外，现有文献包含大量关于自动驾驶传感技术和控制逻辑的信息，但关于如何融合从协作感知中获取的信息并在融合信息之上构建决策处理器的指导相对较少。本文提出了一种结合图卷积神经网络（GCN）和深度 Q 网络（DQN）的基于深度强化学习（DRL）的新方法，即图卷积 Q 网络（GCQ）作为信息融合模块和决策处理器。所提出的模型可以聚合从协作感知中获取的信息，并为多个 CAV 输出安全且协作的变道决策，以便即使在高度动态和部分观察到的混合交通下也可以满足个体意图。所提出的算法可以部署在路边单元（RSU）或云平台等集中控制基础设施上，以改善 CAV 操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的多智能体协作控制框架，结合图卷积神经网络（GCN）和深度Q网络（DQN），用于解决联网自动驾驶车辆（CAV）网络中的协作控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在自动驾驶感知技术和控制逻辑方面较为丰富，但缺乏如何融合协作感知信息并构建决策处理器的指导，而CAV网络的动态性和组合性使得传统方法难以有效实现安全协作控制。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为图卷积Q网络（GCQ）的新型算法，结合GCN进行信息融合和DQN进行决策处理，通过聚合协作感知信息，输出多CAV的安全协作变道决策。
AI.result: 该算法能够在高度动态和部分可观测的混合交通环境中满足个体车辆意图，适用于路侧单元（RSU）或云平台等集中式控制基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的GCQ框架为CAV网络的协作控制提供了有效解决方案，通过信息融合与决策处理提升了安全性和流动性。

title: Top-DB-Net: Top DropBlock for Activation Enhancement in Person Re-Identification
title_zh: Top-DB-Net：用于人员重新识别激活增强的 Top DropBlock
comment: Accepted on 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
comments: Accepted on 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR2020)
abstract: Person Re-Identification is a challenging task that aims to retrieve all instances of a query image across a system of non-overlapping cameras. Due to the various extreme changes of view, it is common that local regions that could be used to match people are suppressed, which leads to a scenario where approaches have to evaluate the similarity of images based on less informative regions. In this work, we introduce the Top-DB-Net, a method based on Top DropBlock that pushes the network to learn to focus on the scene foreground, with special emphasis on the most task-relevant regions and, at the same time, encodes low informative regions to provide high discriminability. The Top-DB-Net is composed of three streams: (i) a global stream encodes rich image information from a backbone, (ii) the Top DropBlock stream encourages the backbone to encode low informative regions with high discriminative features, and (iii) a regularization stream helps to deal with the noise created by the dropping process of the second stream, when testing the first two streams are used. Vast experiments on three challenging datasets show the capabilities of our approach against state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative results demonstrate that our method exhibits better activation maps focusing on reliable parts of the input images.
summary: Person Re-Identification is a challenging task that aims to retrieve all instances of a query image across a system of non-overlapping cameras. Due to the various extreme changes of view, it is common that local regions that could be used to match people are suppressed, which leads to a scenario where approaches have to evaluate the similarity of images based on less informative regions. In this work, we introduce the Top-DB-Net, a method based on Top DropBlock that pushes the network to learn to focus on the scene foreground, with special emphasis on the most task-relevant regions and, at the same time, encodes low informative regions to provide high discriminability. The Top-DB-Net is composed of three streams: (i) a global stream encodes rich image information from a backbone, (ii) the Top DropBlock stream encourages the backbone to encode low informative regions with high discriminative features, and (iii) a regularization stream helps to deal with the noise created by the dropping process of the second stream, when testing the first two streams are used. Vast experiments on three challenging datasets show the capabilities of our approach against state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative results demonstrate that our method exhibits better activation maps focusing on reliable parts of the input images.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在跨非重叠相机系统检索查询图像的所有实例。由于视图的各种极端变化，通常可以用来匹配人物的局部区域被抑制，这导致方法必须基于信息较少的区域来评估图像的相似性。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Top-DB-Net，这是一种基于 Top DropBlock 的方法，它推动网络学习关注场景前景，特别强调与任务最相关的区域，同时对低信息区域进行编码以提供高辨别力。 Top-DB-Net 由三个流组成：(i) 全局流对来自主干的丰富图像信息进行编码，(ii) Top DropBlock 流鼓励主干对具有高判别性特征的低信息区域进行编码，(iii) 正则化流有助于处理在测试使用前两个流时第二个流的丢弃过程产生的噪声。对三个具有挑战性的数据集进行的大量实验显示了我们的方法相对于最先进方法的能力。定性结果表明，我们的方法表现出更好的激活图，重点关注输入图像的可靠部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Top-DB-Net方法，通过Top DropBlock机制增强行人重识别任务中关键区域的激活特征。
AI.motivation: 行人重识别因视角变化易导致关键区域信息被抑制，现有方法难以有效利用低信息区域特征。
AI.method: 设计包含全局特征流、Top DropBlock增强流和正则化流的三流网络，通过动态抑制低信息区域并强化关键区域激活。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，定性分析显示激活图更聚焦于可靠人体部位。
AI.conclusion: Top-DB-Net通过差异化区域处理机制有效提升了行人重识别的特征判别能力。

authors_text: Md Mosharaf Hossain,Antonios Anastasopoulos,Eduardo Blanco,Alexis Palmer
title: It's not a Non-Issue: Negation as a Source of Error in Machine Translation
title_zh: 这不是一个问题：否定是机器翻译中的错误来源
comment: Accepted at the Findings of EMNLP2020
comments: Accepted at the Findings of EMNLP2020
abstract: As machine translation (MT) systems progress at a rapid pace, questions of their adequacy linger. In this study we focus on negation, a universal, core property of human language that significantly affects the semantics of an utterance. We investigate whether translating negation is an issue for modern MT systems using 17 translation directions as test bed. Through thorough analysis, we find that indeed the presence of negation can significantly impact downstream quality, in some cases resulting in quality reductions of more than 60%. We also provide a linguistically motivated analysis that directly explains the majority of our findings. We release our annotations and code to replicate our analysis here: https://github.com/mosharafhossain/negation-mt.
summary: As machine translation (MT) systems progress at a rapid pace, questions of their adequacy linger. In this study we focus on negation, a universal, core property of human language that significantly affects the semantics of an utterance. We investigate whether translating negation is an issue for modern MT systems using 17 translation directions as test bed. Through thorough analysis, we find that indeed the presence of negation can significantly impact downstream quality, in some cases resulting in quality reductions of more than 60%. We also provide a linguistically motivated analysis that directly explains the majority of our findings. We release our annotations and code to replicate our analysis here: https://github.com/mosharafhossain/negation-mt.
abstract_zh: 随着机器翻译 (MT) 系统的快速发展，其充分性的问题仍然存在。在这项研究中，我们关注否定，这是人类语言的普遍核心属性，它显着影响话语的语义。我们使用 17 个翻译方向作为测试平台，研究翻译否定是否是现代 MT 系统的一个问题。通过深入分析，我们发现否定的存在确实会显着影响下游质量，在某些情况下导致质量下降超过 60%。我们还提供了以语言为动机的分析，直接解释了我们的大部分发现。我们在这里发布注释和代码来复制我们的分析：https://github.com/mosharafhossain/negation-mt。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨现代机器翻译系统在处理否定语义时的表现问题，分析其对翻译质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器翻译技术快速发展，但否定作为人类语言的核心语义特征，可能因翻译错误导致严重质量下降，这一问题尚未被充分重视。
AI.method: 通过17种语言翻译方向的实验测试，结合语言学分析方法，评估否定结构对翻译质量的影响程度。
AI.result: 实验发现否定语义的存在可能导致翻译质量下降超60%，语言学分析揭示了这一现象的主要原因。
AI.conclusion: 否定处理是影响机器翻译质量的关键因素，需进一步优化模型对否定结构的识别与翻译能力。

search_text: It's not a Non-Issue: Negation as a Source of Error in Machine Translation 这不是一个问题：否定是机器翻译中的错误来源 As machine translation (MT) systems progress at a rapid pace, questions of their adequacy linger. In this study we focus on negation, a universal, core property of human language that significantly affects the semantics of an utterance. We investigate whether translating negation is an issue for modern MT systems using 17 translation directions as test bed. Through thorough analysis, we find that indeed the presence of negation can significantly impact downstream quality, in some cases resulting in quality reductions of more than 60%. We also provide a linguistically motivated analysis that directly explains the majority of our findings. We release our annotations and code to replicate our analysis here: https://github.com/mosharafhossain/negation-mt. 随着机器翻译 (MT) 系统的快速发展，其充分性的问题仍然存在。在这项研究中，我们关注否定，这是人类语言的普遍核心属性，它显着影响话语的语义。我们使用 17 个翻译方向作为测试平台，研究翻译否定是否是现代 MT 系统的一个问题。通过深入分析，我们发现否定的存在确实会显着影响下游质量，在某些情况下导致质量下降超过 60%。我们还提供了以语言为动机的分析，直接解释了我们的大部分发现。我们在这里发布注释和代码来复制我们的分析：https://github.com/mosharafhossain/negation-mt。 本研究探讨现代机器翻译系统在处理否定语义时的表现问题，分析其对翻译质量的影响。 Md Mosharaf Hossain,Antonios Anastasopoulos,Eduardo Blanco,Alexis Palmer cs.CL,cs.AI

title: TUTOR: Training Neural Networks Using Decision Rules as Model Priors
title_zh: 导师：使用决策规则作为模型先验训练神经网络
abstract: The human brain has the ability to carry out new tasks with limited experience. It utilizes prior learning experiences to adapt the solution strategy to new domains. On the other hand, deep neural networks (DNNs) generally need large amounts of data and computational resources for training. However, this requirement is not met in many settings. To address these challenges, we propose the TUTOR DNN synthesis framework. TUTOR targets tabular datasets. It synthesizes accurate DNN models with limited available data and reduced memory/computational requirements. It consists of three sequential steps. The first step involves generation, verification, and labeling of synthetic data. The synthetic data generation module targets both the categorical and continuous features. TUTOR generates the synthetic data from the same probability distribution as the real data. It then verifies the integrity of the generated synthetic data using a semantic integrity classifier module. It labels the synthetic data based on a set of rules extracted from the real dataset. Next, TUTOR uses two training schemes that combine synthetic and training data to learn the parameters of the DNN model. These two schemes focus on two different ways in which synthetic data can be used to derive a prior on the model parameters and, hence, provide a better DNN initialization for training with real data. In the third step, TUTOR employs a grow-and-prune synthesis paradigm to learn both the weights and the architecture of the DNN to reduce model size while ensuring its accuracy. We evaluate the performance of TUTOR on nine datasets of various sizes. We show that in comparison to fully connected DNNs, TUTOR, on an average, reduces the need for data by 5.9x, improves accuracy by 3.4%, and reduces the number of parameters (fFLOPs) by 4.7x (4.3x). Thus, TUTOR enables a less data-hungry, more accurate, and more compact DNN synthesis.
summary: The human brain has the ability to carry out new tasks with limited experience. It utilizes prior learning experiences to adapt the solution strategy to new domains. On the other hand, deep neural networks (DNNs) generally need large amounts of data and computational resources for training. However, this requirement is not met in many settings. To address these challenges, we propose the TUTOR DNN synthesis framework. TUTOR targets tabular datasets. It synthesizes accurate DNN models with limited available data and reduced memory/computational requirements. It consists of three sequential steps. The first step involves generation, verification, and labeling of synthetic data. The synthetic data generation module targets both the categorical and continuous features. TUTOR generates the synthetic data from the same probability distribution as the real data. It then verifies the integrity of the generated synthetic data using a semantic integrity classifier module. It labels the synthetic data based on a set of rules extracted from the real dataset. Next, TUTOR uses two training schemes that combine synthetic and training data to learn the parameters of the DNN model. These two schemes focus on two different ways in which synthetic data can be used to derive a prior on the model parameters and, hence, provide a better DNN initialization for training with real data. In the third step, TUTOR employs a grow-and-prune synthesis paradigm to learn both the weights and the architecture of the DNN to reduce model size while ensuring its accuracy. We evaluate the performance of TUTOR on nine datasets of various sizes. We show that in comparison to fully connected DNNs, TUTOR, on an average, reduces the need for data by 5.9x, improves accuracy by 3.4%, and reduces the number of parameters (fFLOPs) by 4.7x (4.3x). Thus, TUTOR enables a less data-hungry, more accurate, and more compact DNN synthesis.
abstract_zh: 人脑有能力以有限的经验执行新任务。它利用先前的学习经验使解决方案策略适应新领域。另一方面，深度神经网络（DNN）通常需要大量数据和计算资源进行训练。然而，在许多设置中，这一要求并未得到满足。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 TUTOR DNN 综合框架。 TUTOR 针对表格数据集。它利用有限的可用数据合成了准确的 DNN 模型，并降低了内存/计算要求。它由三个连续的步骤组成。第一步涉及合成数据的生成、验证和标记。合成数据生成模块针对分类特征和连续特征。 TUTOR 根据与真实数据相同的概率分布生成合成数据。然后，它使用语义完整性分类器模块验证生成的合成数据的完整性。它根据从真实数据集中提取的一组规则来标记合成数据。接下来，TUTOR 使用两种结合合成数据和训练数据的训练方案来学习 DNN 模型的参数。这两种方案侧重于两种不同的方式，使用合成数据来推导模型参数的先验，从而为使用真实数据进行训练提供更好的 DNN 初始化。第三步，TUTOR 采用增长和修剪综合范例来学习 DNN 的权重和架构，以减少模型大小，同时确保其准确性。我们在九个不同大小的数据集上评估 TUTOR 的性能。我们表明，与完全连接的 DNN 相比，TUTOR 平均将数据需求减少了 5.9 倍，将准确性提高了 3.4%，并将参数数量 (fFLOP) 减少了 4.7 倍 (4.3 倍)。因此，TUTOR 可以实现数据需求更少、更准确、更紧凑的 DNN 合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TUTOR框架，通过利用决策规则作为模型先验，以减少数据需求和计算资源，合成准确且紧凑的深度神经网络模型。
AI.motivation: 人类大脑能通过有限经验完成新任务，而深度神经网络（DNN）通常需要大量数据和计算资源，这在许多场景中难以满足。因此需探索更高效的数据利用方法。
AI.method: TUTOR分为三步：1）生成符合真实数据分布的合成数据并进行语义完整性验证与规则标注；2）结合合成数据与真实数据的两种训练方案，优化模型参数初始化；3）采用生长-修剪范式同步学习模型权重与架构，压缩模型规模。
AI.result: 在九个数据集上验证，TUTOR平均减少数据需求5.9倍，提升准确率3.4%，参数量（fFLOPs）减少4.7倍（4.3倍）。
AI.conclusion: TUTOR通过决策规则先验与合成数据策略，实现了数据需求更低、精度更高、模型更紧凑的DNN合成方法。

title: Towards Expressive Graph Representation
title_zh: 走向富有表现力的图形表示
abstract: Graph Neural Network (GNN) aggregates the neighborhood of each node into the node embedding and shows its powerful capability for graph representation learning. However, most existing GNN variants aggregate the neighborhood information in a fixed non-injective fashion, which may map different graphs or nodes to the same embedding, reducing the model expressiveness. We present a theoretical framework to design a continuous injective set function for neighborhood aggregation in GNN. Using the framework, we propose expressive GNN that aggregates the neighborhood of each node with a continuous injective set function, so that a GNN layer maps similar nodes with similar neighborhoods to similar embeddings, different nodes to different embeddings and the equivalent nodes or isomorphic graphs to the same embeddings. Moreover, the proposed expressive GNN can naturally learn expressive representations for graphs with continuous node attributes. We validate the proposed expressive GNN (ExpGNN) for graph classification on multiple benchmark datasets including simple graphs and attributed graphs. The experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art performances on most of the benchmarks.
summary: Graph Neural Network (GNN) aggregates the neighborhood of each node into the node embedding and shows its powerful capability for graph representation learning. However, most existing GNN variants aggregate the neighborhood information in a fixed non-injective fashion, which may map different graphs or nodes to the same embedding, reducing the model expressiveness. We present a theoretical framework to design a continuous injective set function for neighborhood aggregation in GNN. Using the framework, we propose expressive GNN that aggregates the neighborhood of each node with a continuous injective set function, so that a GNN layer maps similar nodes with similar neighborhoods to similar embeddings, different nodes to different embeddings and the equivalent nodes or isomorphic graphs to the same embeddings. Moreover, the proposed expressive GNN can naturally learn expressive representations for graphs with continuous node attributes. We validate the proposed expressive GNN (ExpGNN) for graph classification on multiple benchmark datasets including simple graphs and attributed graphs. The experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art performances on most of the benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）将每个节点的邻域聚合成节点嵌入，并显示了其强大的图表示学习能力。然而，大多数现有的 GNN 变体以固定的非内射方式聚合邻域信息，这可能会将不同的图或节点映射到相同的嵌入，从而降低模型的表达能力。我们提出了一个理论框架来设计 GNN 中邻域聚合的连续单射集函数。使用该框架，我们提出了表达性 GNN，它用连续单射集函数聚合每个节点的邻域，以便 GNN 层将具有相似邻域的相似节点映射到相似的嵌入，将不同的节点映射到不同的嵌入，将等效节点或同构图映射到相同的嵌入。此外，所提出的表达 GNN 可以自然地学习具有连续节点属性的图的表达表示。我们在多个基准数据集（包括简单图和属性图）上验证了所提出的用于图分类的表达 GNN（ExpGNN）。实验结果表明，我们的模型在大多数基准测试中都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ExpGNN的图神经网络，通过设计连续注入式集合函数提升图表示的表达能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN的邻域聚合方式固定且非注入，导致不同图或节点可能映射到相同嵌入，降低模型表达性。
AI.method: 构建连续注入式集合函数理论框架，设计ExpGNN使相似节点生成相似嵌入、不同节点生成不同嵌入，并支持连续节点属性学习。
AI.result: 在多个图分类基准数据集（含简单图与属性图）上验证，ExpGNN在多数任务中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 理论框架有效提升GNN表达能力，实验证明ExpGNN在图表示学习中具有优越性。

search_text: Towards Expressive Graph Representation 走向富有表现力的图形表示 Graph Neural Network (GNN) aggregates the neighborhood of each node into the node embedding and shows its powerful capability for graph representation learning. However, most existing GNN variants aggregate the neighborhood information in a fixed non-injective fashion, which may map different graphs or nodes to the same embedding, reducing the model expressiveness. We present a theoretical framework to design a continuous injective set function for neighborhood aggregation in GNN. Using the framework, we propose expressive GNN that aggregates the neighborhood of each node with a continuous injective set function, so that a GNN layer maps similar nodes with similar neighborhoods to similar embeddings, different nodes to different embeddings and the equivalent nodes or isomorphic graphs to the same embeddings. Moreover, the proposed expressive GNN can naturally learn expressive representations for graphs with continuous node attributes. We validate the proposed expressive GNN (ExpGNN) for graph classification on multiple benchmark datasets including simple graphs and attributed graphs. The experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art performances on most of the benchmarks. 图神经网络（GNN）将每个节点的邻域聚合成节点嵌入，并显示了其强大的图表示学习能力。然而，大多数现有的 GNN 变体以固定的非内射方式聚合邻域信息，这可能会将不同的图或节点映射到相同的嵌入，从而降低模型的表达能力。我们提出了一个理论框架来设计 GNN 中邻域聚合的连续单射集函数。使用该框架，我们提出了表达性 GNN，它用连续单射集函数聚合每个节点的邻域，以便 GNN 层将具有相似邻域的相似节点映射到相似的嵌入，将不同的节点映射到不同的嵌入，将等效节点或同构图映射到相同的嵌入。此外，所提出的表达 GNN 可以自然地学习具有连续节点属性的图的表达表示。我们在多个基准数据集（包括简单图和属性图）上验证了所提出的用于图分类的表达 GNN（ExpGNN）。实验结果表明，我们的模型在大多数基准测试中都实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种名为ExpGNN的图神经网络，通过设计连续注入式集合函数提升图表示的表达能力。 Chengsheng Mao,Liang Yao,Yuan Luo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IT

title: Factorizable Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 可分解图卷积网络
abstract: Graphs have been widely adopted to denote structural connections between entities. The relations are in many cases heterogeneous, but entangled together and denoted merely as a single edge between a pair of nodes. For example, in a social network graph, users in different latent relationships like friends and colleagues, are usually connected via a bare edge that conceals such intrinsic connections. In this paper, we introduce a novel graph convolutional network (GCN), termed as factorizable graph convolutional network(FactorGCN), that explicitly disentangles such intertwined relations encoded in a graph. FactorGCN takes a simple graph as input, and disentangles it into several factorized graphs, each of which represents a latent and disentangled relation among nodes. The features of the nodes are then aggregated separately in each factorized latent space to produce disentangled features, which further leads to better performances for downstream tasks. We evaluate the proposed FactorGCN both qualitatively and quantitatively on the synthetic and real-world datasets, and demonstrate that it yields truly encouraging results in terms of both disentangling and feature aggregation. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/ihollywhy/FactorGCN.PyTorch.

The relations are in many cases heterogeneous, but entangled together and denoted merely as a single edge between a pair of nodes. For example, in a social network graph, users in different latent relationships like friends and colleagues, are usually connected via a bare edge that conceals such intrinsic connections. In this paper, we introduce a novel graph convolutional network (GCN), termed as factorizable graph convolutional network(FactorGCN), that explicitly disentangles such intertwined relations encoded in a graph. FactorGCN takes a simple graph as input, and disentangles it into several factorized graphs, each of which represents a latent and disentangled relation among nodes. The features of the nodes are then aggregated separately in each factorized latent space to produce disentangled features, which further leads to better performances for downstream tasks. We evaluate the proposed FactorGCN both qualitatively and quantitatively on the synthetic and real-world datasets, and demonstrate that it yields truly encouraging results in terms of both disentangling and feature aggregation. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/ihollywhy/FactorGCN.PyTorch.
abstract_zh: 图已被广泛采用来表示实体之间的结构连接。在许多情况下，这些关系是异构的，但纠缠在一起并仅表示为一对节点之间的单边。例如，在社交网络图中，处于不同潜在关系（例如朋友和同事）的用户通常通过隐藏这种内在联系的裸露边缘进行连接。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的图卷积网络（GCN），称为可分解图卷积网络（FactorGCN），它明确地解开了图中编码的这种相互交织的关系。 FactorGCN 将一个简单的图作为输入，并将其分解为多个分解图，每个图代表节点之间潜在的、分解的关系。然后，节点的特征在每个因式分解的潜在空间中单独聚合，以产生解缠结的特征，这进一步为下游任务带来更好的性能。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集上对提出的 FactorGCN 进行了定性和定量评估，并证明它在解缠结和特征聚合方面产生了真正令人鼓舞的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/ihollywhy/FactorGCN.PyTorch 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的图卷积网络（FactorGCN），用于显式地分离图中节点间的异构关系。
AI.motivation: 现有的图卷积网络无法显式区分图中节点间的异构关系，这些关系通常被表示为单一的边，导致信息丢失和性能下降。
AI.method: FactorGCN将输入的简单图分解为多个因子图，每个因子图表示一种潜在的、分离的关系，并在每个因子图中独立地聚合节点特征。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，FactorGCN在分离关系和特征聚合方面表现出色，取得了令人鼓舞的结果。
AI.conclusion: FactorGCN通过显式分离图中的异构关系，提升了图卷积网络的性能，为后续任务提供了更好的特征表示。

title: Achilles Heels for AGI/ASI via Decision Theoretic Adversaries
title_zh: 通过决策理论对手解决 AGI/ASI 的致命弱点
comment: Contact info for author at stephencasper.com
comments: Contact info for author at stephencasper.com
abstract: As progress in AI continues to advance, it is important to know how advanced systems will make choices and in what ways they may fail. Machines can already outsmart humans in some domains, and understanding how to safely build ones which may have capabilities at or above the human level is of particular concern. One might suspect that artificially generally intelligent (AGI) and artificially superintelligent (ASI) will be systems that humans cannot reliably outsmart. As a challenge to this assumption, this paper presents the Achilles Heel hypothesis which states that even a potentially superintelligent system may nonetheless have stable decision-theoretic delusions which cause them to make irrational decisions in adversarial settings. In a survey of key dilemmas and paradoxes from the decision theory literature, a number of these potential Achilles Heels are discussed in context of this hypothesis. Several novel contributions are made toward understanding the ways in which these weaknesses might be implanted into a system.
summary: As progress in AI continues to advance, it is important to know how advanced systems will make choices and in what ways they may fail. Machines can already outsmart humans in some domains, and understanding how to safely build ones which may have capabilities at or above the human level is of particular concern. One might suspect that artificially generally intelligent (AGI) and artificially superintelligent (ASI) will be systems that humans cannot reliably outsmart. As a challenge to this assumption, this paper presents the Achilles Heel hypothesis which states that even a potentially superintelligent system may nonetheless have stable decision-theoretic delusions which cause them to make irrational decisions in adversarial settings. In a survey of key dilemmas and paradoxes from the decision theory literature, a number of these potential Achilles Heels are discussed in context of this hypothesis. Several novel contributions are made toward understanding the ways in which these weaknesses might be implanted into a system.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能不断进步，了解先进系统将如何做出选择以及它们可能会以何种方式失败非常重要。机器在某些领域已经可以超越人类，并且了解如何安全地构建具有等于或高于人类水平的能力的机器尤其值得关注。人们可能会怀疑通用人工智能（AGI）和超级人工智能（ASI）将是人类无法可靠地超越的系统。作为对这一假设的挑战，本文提出了阿喀琉斯之踵假说，该假说指出，即使是潜在的超级智能系统也可能具有稳定的决策理论妄想，导致它们在对抗性环境中做出非理性决策。在对决策理论文献中的关键困境和悖论的调查中，在该假设的背景下讨论了许多潜在的致命弱点。为了理解将这些弱点植入系统的方式，人们做出了一些新颖的贡献。

AI.tldr: 探讨AGI/ASI系统可能存在的决策理论弱点，并提出‘阿喀琉斯之踵’假设，分析其在对抗场景中的非理性决策风险。
AI.motivation: 随着AI能力提升，需识别AGI/ASI的潜在决策缺陷，以确保其安全性，挑战‘超级智能不可被欺骗’的假设。
AI.method: 通过分析决策理论中的经典困境和悖论，结合‘阿喀琉斯之踵’假设，探讨AGI/ASI可能存在的稳定决策缺陷。
AI.result: 识别出AGI/ASI可能存在的稳定决策缺陷（阿喀琉斯之踵），并提出如何植入这些弱点的潜在途径。
AI.conclusion: 超级智能系统可能因决策理论缺陷而出现非理性决策，需在设计中考虑此类风险，以确保安全。

As a challenge to this assumption, this paper presents the Achilles Heel hypothesis which states that even a potentially superintelligent system may nonetheless have stable decision-theoretic delusions which cause them to make irrational decisions in adversarial settings. In a survey of key dilemmas and paradoxes from the decision theory literature, a number of these potential Achilles Heels are discussed in context of this hypothesis. Several novel contributions are made toward understanding the ways in which these weaknesses might be implanted into a system. 随着人工智能不断进步，了解先进系统将如何做出选择以及它们可能会以何种方式失败非常重要。机器在某些领域已经可以超越人类，并且了解如何安全地构建具有等于或高于人类水平的能力的机器尤其值得关注。人们可能会怀疑通用人工智能（AGI）和超级人工智能（ASI）将是人类无法可靠地超越的系统。作为对这一假设的挑战，本文提出了阿喀琉斯之踵假说，该假说指出，即使是潜在的超级智能系统也可能具有稳定的决策理论妄想，导致它们在对抗性环境中做出非理性决策。在对决策理论文献中的关键困境和悖论的调查中，在该假设的背景下讨论了许多潜在的致命弱点。为了理解将这些弱点植入系统的方式，人们做出了一些新颖的贡献。 探讨AGI/ASI系统可能存在的决策理论弱点，并提出‘阿喀琉斯之踵’假设，分析其在对抗场景中的非理性决策风险。 Stephen Casper cs.AI

authors_text: Mingzhe Li,Xiuying Chen,Shen Gao,Zhangming Chan,Dongyan Zhao,Rui Yan
title: VMSMO: Learning to Generate Multimodal Summary for Video-based News Articles
title_zh: VMSMO：学习为基于视频的新闻文章生成多模态摘要
comment: Accepted by The 2020 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2020)
comments: Accepted by The 2020 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2020)
abstract: A popular multimedia news format nowadays is providing users with a lively video and a corresponding news article, which is employed by influential news media including CNN, BBC, and social media including Twitter and Weibo. In such a case, automatically choosing a proper cover frame of the video and generating an appropriate textual summary of the article can help editors save time, and readers make the decision more effectively. Hence, in this paper, we propose the task of Video-based Multimodal Summarization with Multimodal Output (VMSMO) to tackle such a problem. The main challenge in this task is to jointly model the temporal dependency of video with semantic meaning of article. To this end, we propose a Dual-Interaction-based Multimodal Summarizer (DIMS), consisting of a dual interaction module and multimodal generator. In the dual interaction module, we propose a conditional self-attention mechanism that captures local semantic information within video and a global-attention mechanism that handles the semantic relationship between news text and video from a high level. Extensive experiments conducted on a large-scale real-world VMSMO dataset show that DIMS achieves the state-of-the-art performance in terms of both automatic metrics and human evaluations.

In such a case, automatically choosing a proper cover frame of the video and generating an appropriate textual summary of the article can help editors save time, and readers make the decision more effectively. Hence, in this paper, we propose the task of Video-based Multimodal Summarization with Multimodal Output (VMSMO) to tackle such a problem. The main challenge in this task is to jointly model the temporal dependency of video with semantic meaning of article. To this end, we propose a Dual-Interaction-based Multimodal Summarizer (DIMS), consisting of a dual interaction module and multimodal generator. In the dual interaction module, we propose a conditional self-attention mechanism that captures local semantic information within video and a global-attention mechanism that handles the semantic relationship between news text and video from a high level. Extensive experiments conducted on a large-scale real-world VMSMO dataset show that DIMS achieves the state-of-the-art performance in terms of both automatic metrics and human evaluations.
abstract_zh: 时下流行的多媒体新闻形式是为用户提供生动的视频和相应的新闻文章，被CNN、BBC等有影响力的新闻媒体以及Twitter、微博等社交媒体所采用。在这种情况下，自动选择合适的视频封面框架并生成合适的文章文本摘要可以帮助编辑节省时间，让读者更有效地做出决定。因此，在本文中，我们提出了具有多模态输出的基于视频的多模态摘要（VMSMO）的任务来解决这个问题。该任务的主要挑战是对视频的时间依赖性与文章的语义进行联合建模。为此，我们提出了一种基于双交互的多模态摘要器（DIMS），由双交互模块和多模态生成器组成。在双重交互模块中，我们提出了一种捕获视频中局部语义信息的条件自注意力机制和一种从高层次处理新闻文本和视频之间语义关系的全局注意力机制。在大规模现实世界 VMSMO 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，DIMS 在自动指标和人工评估方面都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VMSMO任务，旨在为视频新闻文章生成多模态摘要，包括选择封面帧和生成文本摘要。
AI.motivation: 通过自动化生成封面帧和文本摘要，帮助编辑节省时间并提升读者决策效率。
AI.method: 设计双交互多模态摘要器（DIMS），包含条件自注意力机制（处理视频局部语义）和全局注意力机制（建模文本与视频的高层语义关系）。
AI.result: 在大规模真实数据集上，DIMS在自动指标和人工评估中均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: DIMS通过联合建模视频时序依赖与文本语义，有效解决了多模态摘要生成问题。

title: RNN Training along Locally Optimal Trajectories via Frank-Wolfe Algorithm
title_zh: 通过 Frank-Wolfe 算法沿着局部最优轨迹进行 RNN 训练
abstract: We propose a novel and efficient training method for RNNs by iteratively seeking a local minima on the loss surface within a small region, and leverage this directional vector for the update, in an outer-loop. We propose to utilize the Frank-Wolfe (FW) algorithm in this context. Although, FW implicitly involves normalized gradients, which can lead to a slow convergence rate, we develop a novel RNN training method that, surprisingly, even with the additional cost, the overall training cost is empirically observed to be lower than back-propagation. Our method leads to a new Frank-Wolfe method, that is in essence an SGD algorithm with a restart scheme. We prove that under certain conditions our algorithm has a sublinear convergence rate of $O(1/ε)$ for $ε$ error. We then conduct empirical experiments on several benchmark datasets including those that exhibit long-term dependencies, and show significant performance improvement. We also experiment with deep RNN architectures and show efficient training performance. Finally, we demonstrate that our training method is robust to noisy data.
summary: We propose a novel and efficient training method for RNNs by iteratively seeking a local minima on the loss surface within a small region, and leverage this directional vector for the update, in an outer-loop. We propose to utilize the Frank-Wolfe (FW) algorithm in this context. Although, FW implicitly involves normalized gradients, which can lead to a slow convergence rate, we develop a novel RNN training method that, surprisingly, even with the additional cost, the overall training cost is empirically observed to be lower than back-propagation. Our method leads to a new Frank-Wolfe method, that is in essence an SGD algorithm with a restart scheme. We prove that under certain conditions our algorithm has a sublinear convergence rate of $O(1/ε)$ for $ε$ error. We then conduct empirical experiments on several benchmark datasets including those that exhibit long-term dependencies, and show significant performance improvement. We also experiment with deep RNN architectures and show efficient training performance. Finally, we demonstrate that our training method is robust to noisy data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖且高效的 RNN 训练方法，通过迭代地寻找小区域内损失表面上的局部最小值，并在外循环中利用该方向向量进行更新。我们建议在这种情况下使用 Frank-Wolfe (FW) 算法。尽管 FW 隐含地涉及归一化梯度，这可能导致收敛速度缓慢，但我们开发了一种新颖的 RNN 训练方法，令人惊讶的是，即使有额外的成本，根据经验观察到总体训练成本仍低于反向传播。我们的方法产生了一种新的 Frank-Wolfe 方法，它本质上是一种具有重启方案的 SGD 算法。我们证明，在某些条件下，我们的算法对于 $ε$ 误差具有 $O(1/ε)$ 的次线性收敛速度。然后，我们对几个基准数据集（包括那些表现出长期依赖性的数据集）进行实证实验，并显示出显着的性能改进。我们还尝试了深度 RNN 架构并展示了高效的训练性能。最后，我们证明我们的训练方法对噪声数据具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Frank-Wolfe算法的新型RNN训练方法，通过局部最优轨迹迭代更新参数以提高训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN训练方法（如反向传播）存在收敛速度慢或训练成本高的问题，而Frank-Wolfe算法的归一化梯度特性可能带来新的优化视角。
AI.method: 结合Frank-Wolfe算法与局部最小值搜索，在外层循环中利用方向向量更新参数，最终转化为带重启机制的SGD算法。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集（含长期依赖任务）和深度RNN架构上均实现性能提升，且对噪声数据具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法理论上保证次线性收敛率，实验验证其有效性，为RNN训练提供了新的优化思路。

authors_text: Zhiyang Lu,Jun Li,Zheng Li,Hongjian He,Jun Shi
title: Reconstruction of Quantitative Susceptibility Maps from Phase of Susceptibility Weighted Imaging with Cross-Connected $Ψ$-Net
title_zh: 使用交叉连接 $Ψ$-Net 从磁化率加权成像阶段重建定量磁化率图
abstract: Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping (QSM) is a new phase-based technique for quantifying magnetic susceptibility. The existing QSM reconstruction methods generally require complicated pre-processing on high-quality phase data. In this work, we propose to explore a new value of the high-pass filtered phase data generated in susceptibility weighted imaging (SWI), and develop an end-to-end Cross-connected $Ψ$-Net (C$Ψ$-Net) to reconstruct QSM directly from these phase data in SWI without additional pre-processing. C$Ψ$-Net adds an intermediate branch in the classical U-Net to form a $Ψ$-like structure. The specially designed dilated interaction block is embedded in each level of this branch to enlarge the receptive fields for capturing more susceptibility information from a wider spatial range of phase images. Moreover, the crossed connections are utilized between branches to implement a multi-resolution feature fusion scheme, which helps C$Ψ$-Net capture rich contextual information for accurate reconstruction. The experimental results on a human dataset show that C$Ψ$-Net achieves superior performance in our task over other QSM reconstruction algorithms.
summary: Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping (QSM) is a new phase-based technique for quantifying magnetic susceptibility. The existing QSM reconstruction methods generally require complicated pre-processing on high-quality phase data. In this work, we propose to explore a new value of the high-pass filtered phase data generated in susceptibility weighted imaging (SWI), and develop an end-to-end Cross-connected $Ψ$-Net (C$Ψ$-Net) to reconstruct QSM directly from these phase data in SWI without additional pre-processing. C$Ψ$-Net adds an intermediate branch in the classical U-Net to form a $Ψ$-like structure. The specially designed dilated interaction block is embedded in each level of this branch to enlarge the receptive fields for capturing more susceptibility information from a wider spatial range of phase images. Moreover, the crossed connections are utilized between branches to implement a multi-resolution feature fusion scheme, which helps C$Ψ$-Net capture rich contextual information for accurate reconstruction. The experimental results on a human dataset show that C$Ψ$-Net achieves superior performance in our task over other QSM reconstruction algorithms.
abstract_zh: 定量磁化率绘图 (QSM) 是一种用于量化磁化率的新的基于相位的技术。现有的QSM重构方法通常需要对高质量相位数据进行复杂的预处理。在这项工作中，我们建议探索磁化率加权成像（SWI）中生成的高通滤波相位数据的新价值，并开发端到端交叉连接$Ψ$-Net（C$Ψ$-Net），以直接从SWI中的这些相位数据重建QSM，而无需额外的预处理。 C$Ψ$-Net 在经典 U-Net 中添加了一个中间分支，形成类似 $Ψ$ 的结构。特别设计的扩张交互块嵌入在该分支的每一级中，以扩大感受野，从而从更广泛的相位图像空间范围中捕获更多磁化率信息。此外，利用分支之间的交叉连接来实现多分辨率特征融合方案，这有助于C$Ψ$-Net捕获丰富的上下文信息以进行准确的重建。人类数据集上的实验结果表明，与其他 QSM 重建算法相比，C$Ψ$-Net 在我们的任务中取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的端到端网络C$Ψ$-Net，用于直接从SWI相位数据重建定量磁化率图（QSM），无需额外预处理。
AI.motivation: 现有的QSM重建方法通常需要复杂的预处理步骤，而本文旨在探索SWI生成的高通滤波相位数据的新价值，以简化QSM重建过程。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种名为C$Ψ$-Net的网络结构，该结构在经典U-Net中添加了一个中间分支，形成$Ψ$-形结构，并嵌入了特殊的扩张交互块以扩大感受野，同时利用跨分支连接实现多分辨率特征融合。
AI.result: 在人类数据集上的实验结果表明，C$Ψ$-Net在QSM重建任务中优于其他算法。
AI.conclusion: C$Ψ$-Net通过引入中间分支和跨分支连接，能够更准确地捕捉相位图像中的磁化率信息，从而实现高效的QSM重建。

search_text: Reconstruction of Quantitative Susceptibility Maps from Phase of Susceptibility Weighted Imaging with Cross-Connected $Ψ$-Net 使用交叉连接 $Ψ$-Net 从磁化率加权成像阶段重建定量磁化率图 Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping (QSM) is a new phase-based technique for quantifying magnetic susceptibility. The existing QSM reconstruction methods generally require complicated pre-processing on high-quality phase data. In this work, we propose to explore a new value of the high-pass filtered phase data generated in susceptibility weighted imaging (SWI), and develop an end-to-end Cross-connected $Ψ$-Net (C$Ψ$-Net) to reconstruct QSM directly from these phase data in SWI without additional pre-processing. C$Ψ$-Net adds an intermediate branch in the classical U-Net to form a $Ψ$-like structure. The specially designed dilated interaction block is embedded in each level of this branch to enlarge the receptive fields for capturing more susceptibility information from a wider spatial range of phase images. Moreover, the crossed connections are utilized between branches to implement a multi-resolution feature fusion scheme, which helps C$Ψ$-Net capture rich contextual information for accurate reconstruction. The experimental results on a human dataset show that C$Ψ$-Net achieves superior performance in our task over other QSM reconstruction algorithms. 定量磁化率绘图 (QSM) 是一种用于量化磁化率的新的基于相位的技术。现有的QSM重构方法通常需要对高质量相位数据进行复杂的预处理。在这项工作中，我们建议探索磁化率加权成像（SWI）中生成的高通滤波相位数据的新价值，并开发端到端交叉连接$Ψ$-Net（C$Ψ$-Net），以直接从SWI中的这些相位数据重建QSM，而无需额外的预处理。 C$Ψ$-Net 在经典 U-Net 中添加了一个中间分支，形成类似 $Ψ$ 的结构。特别设计的扩张交互块嵌入在该分支的每一级中，以扩大感受野，从而从更广泛的相位图像空间范围中捕获更多磁化率信息。此外，利用分支之间的交叉连接来实现多分辨率特征融合方案，这有助于C$Ψ$-Net捕获丰富的上下文信息以进行准确的重建。人类数据集上的实验结果表明，与其他 QSM 重建算法相比，C$Ψ$-Net 在我们的任务中取得了优异的性能。 本文提出了一种新的端到端网络C$Ψ$-Net，用于直接从SWI相位数据重建定量磁化率图（QSM），无需额外预处理。 Zhiyang Lu,Jun Li,Zheng Li,Hongjian He,Jun Shi eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph

title: Exploiting Local Optimality in Metaheuristic Search
title_zh: 在元启发式搜索中利用局部最优性
abstract: A variety of strategies have been proposed for overcoming local optimality in metaheuristic search. This paper examines characteristics of moves that can be exploited to make good decisions about steps that lead away from a local optimum and then lead toward a new local optimum. We introduce strategies to identify and take advantage of useful features of solution history with an adaptive memory metaheuristic, to provide rules for selecting moves that offer promise for discovering improved local optima. Our approach uses a new type of adaptive memory based on a construction called exponential extrapolation. The memory operates by means of threshold inequalities that ensure selected moves will not lead to a specified number of most recently encountered local optima. Associated thresholds are embodied in choice rule strategies that further exploit the exponential extrapolation concept. Together these produce a threshold based Alternating Ascent (AA) algorithm that opens a variety of research possibilities for exploration.
summary: A variety of strategies have been proposed for overcoming local optimality in metaheuristic search. This paper examines characteristics of moves that can be exploited to make good decisions about steps that lead away from a local optimum and then lead toward a new local optimum. We introduce strategies to identify and take advantage of useful features of solution history with an adaptive memory metaheuristic, to provide rules for selecting moves that offer promise for discovering improved local optima. Our approach uses a new type of adaptive memory based on a construction called exponential extrapolation. The memory operates by means of threshold inequalities that ensure selected moves will not lead to a specified number of most recently encountered local optima. Associated thresholds are embodied in choice rule strategies that further exploit the exponential extrapolation concept. Together these produce a threshold based Alternating Ascent (AA) algorithm that opens a variety of research possibilities for exploration.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了多种策略来克服元启发式搜索中的局部最优性。本文研究了可用于对远离局部最优然后导致新的局部最优的步骤做出良好决策的移动特征。我们引入了通过自适应记忆元启发法来识别和利用解决方案历史的有用特征的策略，以提供选择移动的规则，从而为发现改进的局部最优提供了希望。我们的方法使用一种基于指数外推结构的新型自适应记忆。内存通过阈值不等式进行操作，确保所选的移动不会导致指定数量的最近遇到的局部最优。相关阈值体现在进一步利用指数外推概念的选择规则策略中。这些共同产生了基于阈值的交替上升 (AA) 算法，为探索开辟了各种研究可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过利用移动特征和自适应记忆策略，解决元启发式搜索中的局部最优问题，以找到更优的解。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在克服局部最优时存在不足，需有效策略利用历史特征以改进搜索效率。
AI.method: 提出基于指数外推的自适应记忆方法，结合阈值不等式和选择规则策略，形成基于阈值的交替上升算法。
AI.result: 开发出基于阈值的交替上升算法，为探索提供了多种研究可能性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用解的历史特征和阈值机制，有效改进元启发式搜索的性能，为未来研究提供新方向。

title: A Progressive Conditional Generative Adversarial Network for Generating Dense and Colored 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 用于生成密集和彩色 3D 点云的渐进式条件生成对抗网络
comment: To be published in the 2020 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV)
comments: To be published in the 2020 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV)
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel conditional generative adversarial network that creates dense 3D point clouds, with color, for assorted classes of objects in an unsupervised manner. To overcome the difficulty of capturing intricate details at high resolutions, we propose a point transformer that progressively grows the network through the use of graph convolutions. The network is composed of a leaf output layer and an initial set of branches. Every training iteration evolves a point vector into a point cloud of increasing resolution. After a fixed number of iterations, the number of branches is increased by replicating the last branch. Experimental results show that our network is capable of learning and mimicking a 3D data distribution, and produces colored point clouds with fine details at multiple resolutions.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel conditional generative adversarial network that creates dense 3D point clouds, with color, for assorted classes of objects in an unsupervised manner. To overcome the difficulty of capturing intricate details at high resolutions, we propose a point transformer that progressively grows the network through the use of graph convolutions. The network is composed of a leaf output layer and an initial set of branches. Every training iteration evolves a point vector into a point cloud of increasing resolution. After a fixed number of iterations, the number of branches is increased by replicating the last branch. Experimental results show that our network is capable of learning and mimicking a 3D data distribution, and produces colored point clouds with fine details at multiple resolutions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的条件生成对抗网络，它以无监督的方式为各种类别的对象创建带有颜色的密集 3D 点云。为了克服以高分辨率捕获复杂细节的困难，我们提出了一种点变换器，它通过使用图卷积逐步增长网络。该网络由叶输出层和初始分支集组成。每次训练迭代都会将点向量演变成分辨率不断增加的点云。经过固定次数的迭代后，通过复制最后一个分支来增加分支数量。实验结果表明，我们的网络能够学习和模仿 3D 数据分布，并在多种分辨率下生成具有精细细节的彩色点云。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式条件生成对抗网络，用于无监督生成多种物体类别的密集且带颜色的3D点云。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在高分辨率下难以捕捉3D点云的复杂细节，且缺乏对多类别物体的无监督生成能力。
AI.method: 设计点变压器结构，通过图卷积逐步扩展网络，包含叶输出层与分支结构，迭代提升点云分辨率并动态复制分支以增加网络容量。
AI.result: 实验表明网络能学习3D数据分布，在多个分辨率下生成具有精细细节的彩色点云，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该渐进式架构有效解决了高分辨率细节生成难题，为无监督3D点云生成提供了新思路。

The network is composed of a leaf output layer and an initial set of branches. Every training iteration evolves a point vector into a point cloud of increasing resolution. After a fixed number of iterations, the number of branches is increased by replicating the last branch. Experimental results show that our network is capable of learning and mimicking a 3D data distribution, and produces colored point clouds with fine details at multiple resolutions. 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的条件生成对抗网络，它以无监督的方式为各种类别的对象创建带有颜色的密集 3D 点云。为了克服以高分辨率捕获复杂细节的困难，我们提出了一种点变换器，它通过使用图卷积逐步增长网络。该网络由叶输出层和初始分支集组成。每次训练迭代都会将点向量演变成分辨率不断增加的点云。经过固定次数的迭代后，通过复制最后一个分支来增加分支数量。实验结果表明，我们的网络能够学习和模仿 3D 数据分布，并在多种分辨率下生成具有精细细节的彩色点云。 本文提出一种渐进式条件生成对抗网络，用于无监督生成多种物体类别的密集且带颜色的3D点云。 Mohammad Samiul Arshad,William J. Beksi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Cheng-Zhi Anna Huang,Hendrik Vincent Koops,Ed Newton-Rex,Monica Dinculescu,Carrie J. Cai
title: AI Song Contest: Human-AI Co-Creation in Songwriting
title_zh: 人工智能歌曲大赛：人类与人工智能共同创作歌曲
abstract: Machine learning is challenging the way we make music. Although research in deep generative models has dramatically improved the capability and fluency of music models, recent work has shown that it can be challenging for humans to partner with this new class of algorithms. In this paper, we present findings on what 13 musician/developer teams, a total of 61 users, needed when co-creating a song with AI, the challenges they faced, and how they leveraged and repurposed existing characteristics of AI to overcome some of these challenges. Many teams adopted modular approaches, such as independently running multiple smaller models that align with the musical building blocks of a song, before re-combining their results. As ML models are not easily steerable, teams also generated massive numbers of samples and curated them post-hoc, or used a range of strategies to direct the generation, or algorithmically ranked the samples. Ultimately, teams not only had to manage the "flare and focus" aspects of the creative process, but also juggle them with a parallel process of exploring and curating multiple ML models and outputs. These findings reflect a need to design machine learning-powered music interfaces that are more decomposable, steerable, interpretable, and adaptive, which in return will enable artists to more effectively explore how AI can extend their personal expression.
summary: Machine learning is challenging the way we make music. Although research in deep generative models has dramatically improved the capability and fluency of music models, recent work has shown that it can be challenging for humans to partner with this new class of algorithms. In this paper, we present findings on what 13 musician/developer teams, a total of 61 users, needed when co-creating a song with AI, the challenges they faced, and how they leveraged and repurposed existing characteristics of AI to overcome some of these challenges. Many teams adopted modular approaches, such as independently running multiple smaller models that align with the musical building blocks of a song, before re-combining their results. As ML models are not easily steerable, teams also generated massive numbers of samples and curated them post-hoc, or used a range of strategies to direct the generation, or algorithmically ranked the samples. Ultimately, teams not only had to manage the "flare and focus" aspects of the creative process, but also juggle them with a parallel process of exploring and curating multiple ML models and outputs. These findings reflect a need to design machine learning-powered music interfaces that are more decomposable, steerable, interpretable, and adaptive, which in return will enable artists to more effectively explore how AI can extend their personal expression.
abstract_zh: 机器学习正在挑战我们制作音乐的方式。尽管深度生成模型的研究极大地提高了音乐模型的能力和流畅性，但最近的研究表明，人类与此类新型算法合作可能具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 13 个音乐家/开发者团队（总共 61 位用户）在与 AI 共同创作歌曲时需要什么、他们面临的挑战以及他们如何利用和重新利用 AI 的现有特征来克服其中一些挑战的调查结果。许多团队采用了模块化方法，例如独立运行多个与歌曲的音乐构建块保持一致的较小模型，然后重新组合结果。由于机器学习模型不易操纵，团队还生成大量样本并事后整理它们，或使用一系列策略来指导生成，或通过算法对样本进行排序。最终，团队不仅必须管理创意过程的“耀斑和焦点”方面，还要兼顾探索和策划多个机器学习模型和输出的并行过程。这些发现反映了设计由机器学习驱动的音乐界面的需要，这些界面更具可分解性、可操纵性、可解释性和适应性，从而使艺术家能够更有效地探索人工智能如何扩展他们的个人表达。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了人类与AI在歌曲创作中的协作过程，分析了13个音乐人/开发者团队在使用AI进行歌曲共创时的需求、挑战及应对策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度生成模型在音乐创作中取得进展，但人类与AI协作仍面临挑战，需探索更有效的共创方法与工具设计。
AI.method: 通过案例研究13支团队（共61人），分析其采用的模块化模型、样本生成与筛选策略，以及如何调整AI输出以克服协作障碍。
AI.result: 团队普遍采用多模型组合、样本后处理及算法排序等方法，发现需平衡创作焦点与AI探索过程，现有接口缺乏可解释性与可控性。
AI.conclusion: 未来需设计更模块化、可操控、可解释的AI音乐接口，以支持艺术家通过AI扩展个人表达。

title: A BERT-based Distractor Generation Scheme with Multi-tasking and Negative Answer Training Strategies
title_zh: 一种基于 BERT 的多任务和否定答案训练策略的干扰子生成方案
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the following two limitations for the existing distractor generation (DG) methods. First, the quality of the existing DG methods are still far from practical use. There is still room for DG quality improvement. Second, the existing DG designs are mainly for single distractor generation. However, for practical MCQ preparation, multiple distractors are desired. Aiming at these goals, in this paper, we present a new distractor generation scheme with multi-tasking and negative answer training strategies for effectively generating \textit{multiple} distractors. The experimental results show that (1) our model advances the state-of-the-art result from 28.65 to 39.81 (BLEU 1 score) and (2) the generated multiple distractors are diverse and show strong distracting power for multiple choice question.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the following two limitations for the existing distractor generation (DG) methods. First, the quality of the existing DG methods are still far from practical use. There is still room for DG quality improvement. Second, the existing DG designs are mainly for single distractor generation. However, for practical MCQ preparation, multiple distractors are desired. Aiming at these goals, in this paper, we present a new distractor generation scheme with multi-tasking and negative answer training strategies for effectively generating \textit{multiple} distractors. The experimental results show that (1) our model advances the state-of-the-art result from 28.65 to 39.81 (BLEU 1 score) and (2) the generated multiple distractors are diverse and show strong distracting power for multiple choice question.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了现有干扰子生成（DG）方法的以下两个局限性。首先，现有DG方法的质量距离实际应用还很远。 DG质量仍有提升空间。其次，现有的DG设计主要针对单干扰器发电。然而，对于实际的 MCQ 准备，需要多个干扰项。针对这些目标，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的干扰项生成方案，该方案具有多任务和否定答案训练策略，可有效生成 \textit{multiple} 干扰项。实验结果表明：（1）我们的模型将最先进的结果从 28.65 提高到 39.81（BLEU 1 分数）；（2）生成的多个干扰项是多种多样的，并且对多项选择题显示出强大的干扰力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BERT的多任务和负样本训练策略的多干扰项生成方案，用于提升多项选择题的干扰项生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有干扰项生成方法质量不足且仅支持单干扰项生成，难以满足实际多干扰项需求。
AI.method: 结合多任务学习与负样本训练策略，利用BERT模型生成多个高质量且具有迷惑性的干扰项。
AI.result: 模型在BLEU-1指标上将SOTA结果从28.65提升至39.81，生成的多干扰项具有强干扰性和多样性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案有效解决了多干扰项生成的质量与多样性问题，可提升多项选择题的实用性。

authors_text: Kyrollos Yanny,Nick Antipa,William Liberti,Sam Dehaeck,Kristina Monakhova,Fanglin Linda Liu,Konlin Shen,Ren Ng,Laura Waller
title: Miniscope3D: optimized single-shot miniature 3D fluorescence microscopy
title_zh: Miniscope3D：优化的单次微型 3D 荧光显微镜
comment: Published with Nature Springer in Light: Science and Applications
comments: Published with Nature Springer in Light: Science and Applications
abstract: Miniature fluorescence microscopes are a standard tool in systems biology. However, widefield miniature microscopes capture only 2D information, and modifications that enable 3D capabilities increase the size and weight and have poor resolution outside a narrow depth range. Here, we achieve the 3D capability by replacing the tube lens of a conventional 2D Miniscope with an optimized multifocal phase mask at the objective's aperture stop. Placing the phase mask at the aperture stop significantly reduces the size of the device, and varying the focal lengths enables a uniform resolution across a wide depth range. The phase mask encodes the 3D fluorescence intensity into a single 2D measurement, and the 3D volume is recovered by solving a sparsity-constrained inverse problem. We provide methods for designing and fabricating the phase mask and an efficient forward model that accounts for the field-varying aberrations in miniature objectives. We demonstrate a prototype that is 17 mm tall and weighs 2.5 grams, achieving 2.76 $μ$m lateral, and 15 $μ$m axial resolution across most of the 900x700x390 $μm^3$ volume at 40 volumes per second. The performance is validated experimentally on resolution targets, dynamic biological samples, and mouse brain tissue. Compared with existing miniature single-shot volume-capture implementations, our system is smaller and lighter and achieves a more than 2x better lateral and axial resolution throughout a 10x larger usable depth range. Our microscope design provides single-shot 3D imaging for applications where a compact platform matters, such as volumetric neural imaging in freely moving animals and 3D motion studies of dynamic samples in incubators and lab-on-a-chip devices.
summary: Miniature fluorescence microscopes are a standard tool in systems biology. However, widefield miniature microscopes capture only 2D information, and modifications that enable 3D capabilities increase the size and weight and have poor resolution outside a narrow depth range. Here, we achieve the 3D capability by replacing the tube lens of a conventional 2D Miniscope with an optimized multifocal phase mask at the objective's aperture stop. Placing the phase mask at the aperture stop significantly reduces the size of the device, and varying the focal lengths enables a uniform resolution across a wide depth range. The phase mask encodes the 3D fluorescence intensity into a single 2D measurement, and the 3D volume is recovered by solving a sparsity-constrained inverse problem. We provide methods for designing and fabricating the phase mask and an efficient forward model that accounts for the field-varying aberrations in miniature objectives. We demonstrate a prototype that is 17 mm tall and weighs 2.5 grams, achieving 2.76 $μ$m lateral, and 15 $μ$m axial resolution across most of the 900x700x390 $μm^3$ volume at 40 volumes per second. The performance is validated experimentally on resolution targets, dynamic biological samples, and mouse brain tissue. Compared with existing miniature single-shot volume-capture implementations, our system is smaller and lighter and achieves a more than 2x better lateral and axial resolution throughout a 10x larger usable depth range. Our microscope design provides single-shot 3D imaging for applications where a compact platform matters, such as volumetric neural imaging in freely moving animals and 3D motion studies of dynamic samples in incubators and lab-on-a-chip devices.
abstract_zh: 微型荧光显微镜是系统生物学的标准工具。然而，宽视场微型显微镜仅捕获 2D 信息，而启用 3D 功能的修改会增加尺寸和重量，并且在狭窄深度范围之外的分辨率较差。在这里，我们通过在物镜孔径光阑处用优化的多焦点相位掩模替换传统 2D 微型显微镜的管透镜来实现 3D 功能。将相位掩模板放置在孔径光阑处可以显着减小器件的尺寸，并且改变焦距可以在较宽的深度范围内实现均匀的分辨率。相位掩模将 3D 荧光强度编码为单个 2D 测量结果，并通过解决稀疏约束逆问题来恢复 3D 体积。我们提供设计和制造相位掩模的方法以及考虑微型物镜中场变像差的有效正演模型。我们展示了一个高 17 毫米、重 2.5 克的原型，以每秒 40 个体积的速度在 900x700x390 $μm^3$ 体积的大部分区域实现 2.76 $μ$m 横向分辨率和 15 $μ$m 轴向分辨率。该性能在分辨率目标、动态生物样本和小鼠脑组织上进行了实验验证。与现有的微型单次体积捕获实现相比，我们的系统更小、更轻，并且在 10 倍大的可用深度范围内实现了 2 倍以上的横向和轴向分辨率。我们的显微镜设计为紧凑平台至关重要的应用提供单次 3D 成像，例如自由移动动物的体积神经成像以及培养箱和芯片实验室设备中动态样本的 3D 运动研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Miniscope3D的优化单次拍摄微型3D荧光显微镜，通过改进光学设计实现紧凑型3D成像。
AI.motivation: 传统微型荧光显微镜仅能获取2D信息，而现有3D改进方案存在体积大、分辨率差等问题，亟需更紧凑高效的3D成像技术。
AI.method: 采用多焦点相位掩模替代传统管镜，结合稀疏约束逆问题求解，通过优化相位掩模设计和场相关像差模型实现3D信息解码。
AI.result: 原型机尺寸17mm×2.5g，实现2.76μm横向和15μm轴向分辨率，覆盖900×700×390μm³体积，帧率40vps，性能优于现有方案。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为自由运动动物的神经成像及动态样本3D研究提供了更小型化、高分辨率的解决方案。

search_text: Miniscope3D: optimized single-shot miniature 3D fluorescence microscopy Miniscope3D：优化的单次微型 3D 荧光显微镜 Miniature fluorescence microscopes are a standard tool in systems biology. However, widefield miniature microscopes capture only 2D information, and modifications that enable 3D capabilities increase the size and weight and have poor resolution outside a narrow depth range. Here, we achieve the 3D capability by replacing the tube lens of a conventional 2D Miniscope with an optimized multifocal phase mask at the objective's aperture stop. Placing the phase mask at the aperture stop significantly reduces the size of the device, and varying the focal lengths enables a uniform resolution across a wide depth range. The phase mask encodes the 3D fluorescence intensity into a single 2D measurement, and the 3D volume is recovered by solving a sparsity-constrained inverse problem. We provide methods for designing and fabricating the phase mask and an efficient forward model that accounts for the field-varying aberrations in miniature objectives. We demonstrate a prototype that is 17 mm tall and weighs 2.5 grams, achieving 2.76 $μ$m lateral, and 15 $μ$m axial resolution across most of the 900x700x390 $μm^3$ volume at 40 volumes per second. The performance is validated experimentally on resolution targets, dynamic biological samples, and mouse brain tissue. Compared with existing miniature single-shot volume-capture implementations, our system is smaller and lighter and achieves a more than 2x better lateral and axial resolution throughout a 10x larger usable depth range. Our microscope design provides single-shot 3D imaging for applications where a compact platform matters, such as volumetric neural imaging in freely moving animals and 3D motion studies of dynamic samples in incubators and lab-on-a-chip devices. 微型荧光显微镜是系统生物学的标准工具。然而，宽视场微型显微镜仅捕获 2D 信息，而启用 3D 功能的修改会增加尺寸和重量，并且在狭窄深度范围之外的分辨率较差。在这里，我们通过在物镜孔径光阑处用优化的多焦点相位掩模替换传统 2D 微型显微镜的管透镜来实现 3D 功能。将相位掩模板放置在孔径光阑处可以显着减小器件的尺寸，并且改变焦距可以在较宽的深度范围内实现均匀的分辨率。相位掩模将 3D 荧光强度编码为单个 2D 测量结果，并通过解决稀疏约束逆问题来恢复 3D 体积。我们提供设计和制造相位掩模的方法以及考虑微型物镜中场变像差的有效正演模型。我们展示了一个高 17 毫米、重 2.5 克的原型，以每秒 40 个体积的速度在 900x700x390 $μm^3$ 体积的大部分区域实现 2.76 $μ$m 横向分辨率和 15 $μ$m 轴向分辨率。该性能在分辨率目标、动态生物样本和小鼠脑组织上进行了实验验证。与现有的微型单次体积捕获实现相比，我们的系统更小、更轻，并且在 10 倍大的可用深度范围内实现了 2 倍以上的横向和轴向分辨率。我们的显微镜设计为紧凑平台至关重要的应用提供单次 3D 成像，例如自由移动动物的体积神经成像以及培养箱和芯片实验室设备中动态样本的 3D 运动研究。 本文提出了一种名为Miniscope3D的优化单次拍摄微型3D荧光显微镜，通过改进光学设计实现紧凑型3D成像。 Kyrollos Yanny,Nick Antipa,William Liberti,Sam Dehaeck,Kristina Monakhova,Fanglin Linda Liu,Konlin Shen,Ren Ng,Laura Waller eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.optics

authors_text: Qinxin Wang,Hao Tan,Sheng Shen,Michael W. Mahoney,Zhewei Yao
title: MAF: Multimodal Alignment Framework for Weakly-Supervised Phrase Grounding
title_zh: MAF：弱监督短语基础的多模态对齐框架
abstract: Phrase localization is a task that studies the mapping from textual phrases to regions of an image. Given difficulties in annotating phrase-to-object datasets at scale, we develop a Multimodal Alignment Framework (MAF) to leverage more widely-available caption-image datasets, which can then be used as a form of weak supervision. We first present algorithms to model phrase-object relevance by leveraging fine-grained visual representations and visually-aware language representations. By adopting a contrastive objective, our method uses information in caption-image pairs to boost the performance in weakly-supervised scenarios. Experiments conducted on the widely-adopted Flickr30k dataset show a significant improvement over existing weakly-supervised methods. With the help of the visually-aware language representations, we can also improve the previous best unsupervised result by 5.56%. We conduct ablation studies to show that both our novel model and our weakly-supervised strategies significantly contribute to our strong results.
summary: Phrase localization is a task that studies the mapping from textual phrases to regions of an image. Given difficulties in annotating phrase-to-object datasets at scale, we develop a Multimodal Alignment Framework (MAF) to leverage more widely-available caption-image datasets, which can then be used as a form of weak supervision. We first present algorithms to model phrase-object relevance by leveraging fine-grained visual representations and visually-aware language representations. By adopting a contrastive objective, our method uses information in caption-image pairs to boost the performance in weakly-supervised scenarios. Experiments conducted on the widely-adopted Flickr30k dataset show a significant improvement over existing weakly-supervised methods. With the help of the visually-aware language representations, we can also improve the previous best unsupervised result by 5.56%. We conduct ablation studies to show that both our novel model and our weakly-supervised strategies significantly contribute to our strong results.
abstract_zh: 短语定位是一项研究从文本短语到图像区域的映射的任务。鉴于大规模注释短语到对象数据集的困难，我们开发了一个多模态对齐框架（MAF）来利用更广泛可用的标题图像数据集，然后可以将其用作弱监督的一种形式。我们首先提出通过利用细粒度视觉表示和视觉感知语言表示来建模短语-对象相关性的算法。通过采用对比目标，我们的方法使用标题-图像对中的信息来提高弱监督场景中的性能。在广泛采用的 Flickr30k 数据集上进行的实验表明，它比现有的弱监督方法有了显着的改进。借助视觉感知语言表示，我们还可以将之前的最佳无监督结果提高 5.56%。我们进行的消融研究表明，我们的新颖模型和弱监督策略都对我们的强劲结果做出了重大贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态对齐框架MAF，用于弱监督短语定位任务，通过利用广泛可用的图像字幕数据集提升性能。
AI.motivation: 短语到物体的数据集标注困难，而现有字幕-图像数据集更易获取，因此需开发弱监督方法以减少对精细标注的依赖。
AI.method: 通过细粒度视觉表示和视觉感知语言表示建模短语-物体相关性，并采用对比目标利用字幕-图像对提升弱监督效果。
AI.result: 在Flickr30k数据集上显著优于现有弱监督方法，将最佳无监督结果提升5.56%；消融实验证实模型与策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MAF框架有效结合弱监督策略与多模态对齐，为短语定位任务提供了高效且性能优越的解决方案。

title: A range characterization of the single-quadrant ADRT
title_zh: 单象限 ADRT 的范围表征
abstract: This work characterizes the range of the single-quadrant approximate discrete Radon transform (ADRT) of square images. The characterization follows from a set of linear constraints on the codomain. We show that for data satisfying these constraints, the exact and fast inversion formula [Rim, Appl. Math. Lett. 102 106159, 2020] yields a square image in a stable manner. The range characterization is obtained by first showing that the ADRT is a bijection between images supported on infinite half-strips, then identifying the linear subspaces that stay finitely supported under the inversion formula.
summary: This work characterizes the range of the single-quadrant approximate discrete Radon transform (ADRT) of square images. The characterization follows from a set of linear constraints on the codomain. We show that for data satisfying these constraints, the exact and fast inversion formula [Rim, Appl. Math. Lett. 102 106159, 2020] yields a square image in a stable manner. The range characterization is obtained by first showing that the ADRT is a bijection between images supported on infinite half-strips, then identifying the linear subspaces that stay finitely supported under the inversion formula.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了方形图像的单象限近似离散氡变换（ADRT）的范围。该表征遵循对共域的一组线性约束。我们证明，对于满足这些约束的数据，精确且快速的反演公式[Rim，Appl。数学。莱特。 102 106159, 2020] 以稳定的方式产生方形图像。首先证明 ADRT 是无限半带上支持的图像之间的双射，然后识别在反演公式下保持有限支持的线性子空间，从而获得范围表征。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单象限近似离散Radon变换（ADRT）对平方图像的范围特征。
AI.motivation: 了解ADRT的范围特征有助于提高图像重建的稳定性和准确性，特别是在满足特定约束条件的情况下。
AI.method: 通过在余域上设置一组线性约束条件，本文展示了ADRT在无限半带图像上的双射性，并确定了在逆变换下仍保持有限支持的线性子空间。
AI.result: 本文证明了在满足特定线性约束条件下，精确且快速的逆变换公式可以稳定地重建平方图像，并获得了ADRT的范围特征。
AI.conclusion: ADRT的范围特征可以通过线性约束和双射性分析来描述，这为图像重建提供了理论支持。

tldr: 本文研究了单象限近似离散Radon变换（ADRT）对平方图像的范围特征。
motivation: 了解ADRT的范围特征有助于提高图像重建的稳定性和准确性，特别是在满足特定约束条件的情况下。
method: 通过在余域上设置一组线性约束条件，本文展示了ADRT在无限半带图像上的双射性，并确定了在逆变换下仍保持有限支持的线性子空间。
result: 本文证明了在满足特定线性约束条件下，精确且快速的逆变换公式可以稳定地重建平方图像，并获得了ADRT的范围特征。
conclusion: ADRT的范围特征可以通过线性约束和双射性分析来描述，这为图像重建提供了理论支持。
search_text: A range characterization of the single-quadrant ADRT 单象限 ADRT 的范围表征 This work characterizes the range of the single-quadrant approximate discrete Radon transform (ADRT) of square images. The characterization follows from a set of linear constraints on the codomain. We show that for data satisfying these constraints, the exact and fast inversion formula [Rim, Appl. Math. Lett. 102 106159, 2020] yields a square image in a stable manner. The range characterization is obtained by first showing that the ADRT is a bijection between images supported on infinite half-strips, then identifying the linear subspaces that stay finitely supported under the inversion formula. 这项工作描述了方形图像的单象限近似离散氡变换（ADRT）的范围。该表征遵循对共域的一组线性约束。我们证明，对于满足这些约束的数据，精确且快速的反演公式[Rim，Appl。数学。莱特。 102 106159, 2020] 以稳定的方式产生方形图像。首先证明 ADRT 是无限半带上支持的图像之间的双射，然后识别在反演公式下保持有限支持的线性子空间，从而获得范围表征。 本文研究了单象限近似离散Radon变换（ADRT）对平方图像的范围特征。 Weilin Li,Kui Ren,Donsub Rim math.NA,cs.CV

authors_text: Henrique Ferrolho,Vladimir Ivan,Wolfgang Merkt,Ioannis Havoutis,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: Inverse Dynamics vs. Forward Dynamics in Direct Transcription Formulations for Trajectory Optimization
title_zh: 用于轨迹优化的直接转录制剂中的反向动力学与正向动力学
comment: Accepted to the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Xi'an, China. Supplementary video available in https://youtu.be/pV4s7hzUgjc. Related code in https://github.com/JuliaRobotics/TORA.jl
comments: Accepted to the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Xi'an, China. Supplementary video available in https://youtu.be/pV4s7hzUgjc. Related code in https://github.com/JuliaRobotics/TORA.jl
abstract: Benchmarks of state-of-the-art rigid-body dynamics libraries report better performance solving the inverse dynamics problem than the forward alternative. Those benchmarks encouraged us to question whether that computational advantage would translate to direct transcription, where calculating rigid-body dynamics and their derivatives accounts for a significant share of computation time. In this work, we implement an optimization framework where both approaches for enforcing the system dynamics are available. We evaluate the performance of each approach for systems of varying complexity, for domains with rigid contacts. Our tests reveal that formulations using inverse dynamics converge faster, require less iterations, and are more robust to coarse problem discretization. These results indicate that inverse dynamics should be preferred to enforce the nonlinear system dynamics in simultaneous methods, such as direct transcription.
summary: Benchmarks of state-of-the-art rigid-body dynamics libraries report better performance solving the inverse dynamics problem than the forward alternative. Those benchmarks encouraged us to question whether that computational advantage would translate to direct transcription, where calculating rigid-body dynamics and their derivatives accounts for a significant share of computation time. In this work, we implement an optimization framework where both approaches for enforcing the system dynamics are available. We evaluate the performance of each approach for systems of varying complexity, for domains with rigid contacts. Our tests reveal that formulations using inverse dynamics converge faster, require less iterations, and are more robust to coarse problem discretization. These results indicate that inverse dynamics should be preferred to enforce the nonlinear system dynamics in simultaneous methods, such as direct transcription.
abstract_zh: 最先进的刚体动力学库的基准报告显示，解决逆动力学问题比正向替代方案具有更好的性能。这些基准鼓励我们质疑这种计算优势是否会转化为直接转录，其中计算刚体动力学及其导数占据了计算时间的很大一部分。在这项工作中，我们实现了一个优化框架，其中两种强制系统动态的方法都可用。我们针对不同复杂度的系统和具有刚性接触的领域，评估每种方法的性能。我们的测试表明，使用逆动力学的公式收敛速度更快，需要的迭代次数更少，并且对粗略问题离散化更稳健。这些结果表明，应首选逆动力学来增强联立方法（例如直接转录）中的非线性系统动力学。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了逆动力学与正动力学在直接转录方法中轨迹优化的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有动力学库显示逆动力学计算效率更高，但不确定该优势是否适用于直接转录方法中动力学计算占比高的场景。
AI.method: 实现支持两种动力学约束的优化框架，针对不同复杂度系统及刚体接触场景进行性能测试。
AI.result: 逆动力学方法收敛速度更快、迭代次数更少且对粗离散化更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 在同时优化方法中应优先采用逆动力学来约束非线性系统动力学。

title: A Knowledge-Driven Approach to Classifying Object and Attribute Coreferences in Opinion Mining
title_zh: 意见挖掘中对象和属性共指分类的知识驱动方法
abstract: Classifying and resolving coreferences of objects (e.g., product names) and attributes (e.g., product aspects) in opinionated reviews is crucial for improving the opinion mining performance. However, the task is challenging as one often needs to consider domain-specific knowledge (e.g., iPad is a tablet and has aspect resolution) to identify coreferences in opinionated reviews. Also, compiling a handcrafted and curated domain-specific knowledge base for each domain is very time consuming and arduous. This paper proposes an approach to automatically mine and leverage domain-specific knowledge for classifying objects and attribute coreferences. The approach extracts domain-specific knowledge from unlabeled review data and trains a knowledgeaware neural coreference classification model to leverage (useful) domain knowledge together with general commonsense knowledge for the task. Experimental evaluation on realworld datasets involving five domains (product types) shows the effectiveness of the approach.
summary: Classifying and resolving coreferences of objects (e.g., product names) and attributes (e.g., product aspects) in opinionated reviews is crucial for improving the opinion mining performance. However, the task is challenging as one often needs to consider domain-specific knowledge (e.g., iPad is a tablet and has aspect resolution) to identify coreferences in opinionated reviews. Also, compiling a handcrafted and curated domain-specific knowledge base for each domain is very time consuming and arduous. This paper proposes an approach to automatically mine and leverage domain-specific knowledge for classifying objects and attribute coreferences. The approach extracts domain-specific knowledge from unlabeled review data and trains a knowledgeaware neural coreference classification model to leverage (useful) domain knowledge together with general commonsense knowledge for the task. Experimental evaluation on realworld datasets involving five domains (product types) shows the effectiveness of the approach.
abstract_zh: 对观点评论中的对象（例如产品名称）和属性（例如产品方面）的共指进行分类和解决对于提高观点挖掘性能至关重要。然而，这项任务具有挑战性，因为人们经常需要考虑特定领域的知识（例如，iPad 是一款平板电脑，具有方面分辨率）来识别固执己见的评论中的共指。此外，为每个领域编写手工和策划的特定领域知识库非常耗时且艰巨。本文提出了一种自动挖掘和利用特定领域知识来对对象和属性共指进行分类的方法。该方法从未标记的评论数据中提取特定领域的知识，并训练知识感知神经共指分类模型，以利用（有用的）领域知识和一般常识知识来完成任务。对涉及五个领域（产品类型）的现实数据集的实验评估表明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域知识的方法，用于在观点挖掘中分类对象和属性的共指关系。
AI.motivation: 手动构建领域特定知识库耗时且困难，而现有方法难以有效利用领域知识解决观点文本中的共指问题。
AI.method: 从未标记的评论数据中自动挖掘领域知识，并训练融合领域知识与常识知识的神经网络模型进行共指分类。
AI.result: 在五个真实领域数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效提升对象和属性共指分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 自动挖掘领域知识并结合神经网络模型可有效解决观点挖掘中的共指分类挑战。

title: Medical Image Harmonization Using Deep Learning Based Canonical Mapping: Toward Robust and Generalizable Learning in Imaging
title_zh: 使用基于深度学习的规范映射来协调医学图像：迈向稳健且可推广的成像学习
abstract: Conventional and deep learning-based methods have shown great potential in the medical imaging domain, as means for deriving diagnostic, prognostic, and predictive biomarkers, and by contributing to precision medicine. However, these methods have yet to see widespread clinical adoption, in part due to limited generalization performance across various imaging devices, acquisition protocols, and patient populations. In this work, we propose a new paradigm in which data from a diverse range of acquisition conditions are "harmonized" to a common reference domain, where accurate model learning and prediction can take place. By learning an unsupervised image to image canonical mapping from diverse datasets to a reference domain using generative deep learning models, we aim to reduce confounding data variation while preserving semantic information, thereby rendering the learning task easier in the reference domain. We test this approach on two example problems, namely MRI-based brain age prediction and classification of schizophrenia, leveraging pooled cohorts of neuroimaging MRI data spanning 9 sites and 9701 subjects. Our results indicate a substantial improvement in these tasks in out-of-sample data, even when training is restricted to a single site.
summary: Conventional and deep learning-based methods have shown great potential in the medical imaging domain, as means for deriving diagnostic, prognostic, and predictive biomarkers, and by contributing to precision medicine. However, these methods have yet to see widespread clinical adoption, in part due to limited generalization performance across various imaging devices, acquisition protocols, and patient populations. In this work, we propose a new paradigm in which data from a diverse range of acquisition conditions are "harmonized" to a common reference domain, where accurate model learning and prediction can take place. By learning an unsupervised image to image canonical mapping from diverse datasets to a reference domain using generative deep learning models, we aim to reduce confounding data variation while preserving semantic information, thereby rendering the learning task easier in the reference domain. We test this approach on two example problems, namely MRI-based brain age prediction and classification of schizophrenia, leveraging pooled cohorts of neuroimaging MRI data spanning 9 sites and 9701 subjects. Our results indicate a substantial improvement in these tasks in out-of-sample data, even when training is restricted to a single site.
abstract_zh: 传统和基于深度学习的方法在医学成像领域显示出巨大的潜力，作为获取诊断、预后和预测生物标志物的手段，并有助于精准医疗。然而，这些方法尚未得到广泛的临床采用，部分原因是各种成像设备、采集协议和患者群体的泛化性能有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的范例，其中来自不同采集条件的数据被“协调”到一个共同的参考域，在这个参考域中可以进行准确的模型学习和预测。通过使用生成深度学习模型学习从不同数据集到参考域的无监督图像到图像规范映射，我们的目标是在保留语义信息的同时减少混杂数据变化，从而使参考域中的学习任务变得更容易。我们利用跨越 9 个地点和 9701 名受试者的神经影像 MRI 数据池，在两个示例问题上测试了这种方法，即基于 MRI 的大脑年龄预测和精神分裂症分类。我们的结果表明，即使训练仅限于单个站点，样本外数据中的这些任务也有显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的医学图像调和方法，通过将多源医学影像数据映射到统一参考域，提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像分析方法因设备差异、采集协议和人群多样性导致泛化能力不足，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 利用生成式深度学习模型学习无监督的图像规范映射，将不同条件下的影像数据转换至统一参考域，减少数据变异并保留语义信息。
AI.result: 在跨9个站点、9701名受试者的MRI数据上，脑年龄预测和精神分裂症分类任务的泛化性能显著提升，单站点训练模型在跨站点测试中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 图像调和方法有效缓解了医学影像分析的域偏移问题，为构建鲁棒且通用的医学AI模型提供了新范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的医学图像调和方法，通过将多源医学影像数据映射到统一参考域，提升模型的泛化能力。

search_text: Medical Image Harmonization Using Deep Learning Based Canonical Mapping: Toward Robust and Generalizable Learning in Imaging 使用基于深度学习的规范映射来协调医学图像：迈向稳健且可推广的成像学习 Conventional and deep learning-based methods have shown great potential in the medical imaging domain, as means for deriving diagnostic, prognostic, and predictive biomarkers, and by contributing to precision medicine. However, these methods have yet to see widespread clinical adoption, in part due to limited generalization performance across various imaging devices, acquisition protocols, and patient populations. In this work, we propose a new paradigm in which data from a diverse range of acquisition conditions are "harmonized" to a common reference domain, where accurate model learning and prediction can take place. By learning an unsupervised image to image canonical mapping from diverse datasets to a reference domain using generative deep learning models, we aim to reduce confounding data variation while preserving semantic information, thereby rendering the learning task easier in the reference domain. We test this approach on two example problems, namely MRI-based brain age prediction and classification of schizophrenia, leveraging pooled cohorts of neuroimaging MRI data spanning 9 sites and 9701 subjects. Our results indicate a substantial improvement in these tasks in out-of-sample data, even when training is restricted to a single site. 传统和基于深度学习的方法在医学成像领域显示出巨大的潜力，作为获取诊断、预后和预测生物标志物的手段，并有助于精准医疗。然而，这些方法尚未得到广泛的临床采用，部分原因是各种成像设备、采集协议和患者群体的泛化性能有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的范例，其中来自不同采集条件的数据被“协调”到一个共同的参考域，在这个参考域中可以进行准确的模型学习和预测。通过使用生成深度学习模型学习从不同数据集到参考域的无监督图像到图像规范映射，我们的目标是在保留语义信息的同时减少混杂数据变化，从而使参考域中的学习任务变得更容易。我们利用跨越 9 个地点和 9701 名受试者的神经影像 MRI 数据池，在两个示例问题上测试了这种方法，即基于 MRI 的大脑年龄预测和精神分裂症分类。我们的结果表明，即使训练仅限于单个站点，样本外数据中的这些任务也有显着改善。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的医学图像调和方法，通过将多源医学影像数据映射到统一参考域，提升模型的泛化能力。 Vishnu M.
