Johnson,Jurgen Fripp,Nikolaos Koutsouleris,Theodore D. Satterthwaite,Daniel H. Wolf,Raquel E. Gur,Ruben C. Gur,John C. Morris,Marilyn S. Albert,Hans J. Grabe,Susan M. Resnick,R. Nick Bryan,David A. Wolk,Haochang Shou, et al. (2 additional authors not shown) eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Local Connectivity in Centroid Clustering
title_zh: 质心聚类中的本地连接
comment: In 24th International Database Engineering & Applications Symposium (IDEAS 2020), August 12--14, 2020, Seoul, Republic of Korea
comments: In 24th International Database Engineering & Applications Symposium (IDEAS 2020), August 12--14, 2020, Seoul, Republic of Korea
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental task in unsupervised learning, one that targets to group a dataset into clusters of similar objects. There has been recent interest in embedding normative considerations around fairness within clustering formulations. In this paper, we propose 'local connectivity' as a crucial factor in assessing membership desert in centroid clustering. We use local connectivity to refer to the support offered by the local neighborhood of an object towards supporting its membership to the cluster in question. We motivate the need to consider local connectivity of objects in cluster assignment, and provide ways to quantify local connectivity in a given clustering. We then exploit concepts from density-based clustering and devise LOFKM, a clustering method that seeks to deepen local connectivity in clustering outputs, while staying within the framework of centroid clustering. Through an empirical evaluation over real-world datasets, we illustrate that LOFKM achieves notable improvements in local connectivity at reasonable costs to clustering quality, illustrating the effectiveness of the method.
summary: Clustering is a fundamental task in unsupervised learning, one that targets to group a dataset into clusters of similar objects. There has been recent interest in embedding normative considerations around fairness within clustering formulations. In this paper, we propose 'local connectivity' as a crucial factor in assessing membership desert in centroid clustering. We use local connectivity to refer to the support offered by the local neighborhood of an object towards supporting its membership to the cluster in question. We motivate the need to consider local connectivity of objects in cluster assignment, and provide ways to quantify local connectivity in a given clustering. We then exploit concepts from density-based clustering and devise LOFKM, a clustering method that seeks to deepen local connectivity in clustering outputs, while staying within the framework of centroid clustering. Through an empirical evaluation over real-world datasets, we illustrate that LOFKM achieves notable improvements in local connectivity at reasonable costs to clustering quality, illustrating the effectiveness of the method.
abstract_zh: 聚类是无监督学习中的一项基本任务，其目标是将数据集分组为相似对象的聚类。最近人们对在聚类公式中嵌入围绕公平性的规范性考虑产生了兴趣。在本文中，我们提出“局部连通性”作为评估质心聚类中成员沙漠的关键因素。我们使用本地连接来指代对象的本地邻居提供的支持，以支持其在相关集群中的成员身份。我们激发了在聚类分配中考虑对象的局部连接性的需要，并提供了量化给定聚类中的局部连接性的方法。然后，我们利用基于密度的聚类的概念并设计 LOFKM，这是一种聚类方法，旨在加深聚类输出中的局部连接性，同时保持在质心聚类的框架内。通过对现实世界数据集的实证评估，我们表明 LOFKM 以合理的聚类质量成本实现了局部连接性的显着改进，说明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LOFKM的聚类方法，通过引入局部连通性概念来改进质心聚类中的成员归属问题。
AI.motivation: 传统质心聚类可能忽略数据点局部邻域对其所属簇的支持程度，导致成员归属不合理。本文旨在通过考虑局部连通性提升聚类公平性与准确性。
AI.method: 结合密度聚类思想，提出LOFKM算法，在质心聚类框架下优化局部连通性，量化数据点局部邻域对其簇归属的支持强度。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，LOFKM在提升局部连通性的同时，仅以可接受的代价略微影响聚类质量。
AI.conclusion: 局部连通性是评估质心聚类成员归属的重要指标，LOFKM方法有效平衡了连通性优化与聚类质量的关系。

authors_text: Hari Sowrirajan,Jingbo Yang,Andrew Y. Ng,Pranav Rajpurkar
title: MoCo-CXR: MoCo Pretraining Improves Representation and Transferability of Chest X-ray Models
title_zh: MoCo-CXR：MoCo 预训练提高了胸部 X 射线模型的表征和可转移性
comment: Accepted at Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) Conference 2021
comments: Accepted at Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) Conference 2021
abstract: Contrastive learning is a form of self-supervision that can leverage unlabeled data to produce pretrained models. While contrastive learning has demonstrated promising results on natural image classification tasks, its application to medical imaging tasks like chest X-ray interpretation has been limited. In this work, we propose MoCo-CXR, which is an adaptation of the contrastive learning method Momentum Contrast (MoCo), to produce models with better representations and initializations for the detection of pathologies in chest X-rays. In detecting pleural effusion, we find that linear models trained on MoCo-CXR-pretrained representations outperform those without MoCo-CXR-pretrained representations, indicating that MoCo-CXR-pretrained representations are of higher-quality. End-to-end fine-tuning experiments reveal that a model initialized via MoCo-CXR-pretraining outperforms its non-MoCo-CXR-pretrained counterpart. We find that MoCo-CXR-pretraining provides the most benefit with limited labeled training data. Finally, we demonstrate similar results on a target Tuberculosis dataset unseen during pretraining, indicating that MoCo-CXR-pretraining endows models with representations and transferability that can be applied across chest X-ray datasets and tasks.
summary: Contrastive learning is a form of self-supervision that can leverage unlabeled data to produce pretrained models. While contrastive learning has demonstrated promising results on natural image classification tasks, its application to medical imaging tasks like chest X-ray interpretation has been limited. In this work, we propose MoCo-CXR, which is an adaptation of the contrastive learning method Momentum Contrast (MoCo), to produce models with better representations and initializations for the detection of pathologies in chest X-rays. In detecting pleural effusion, we find that linear models trained on MoCo-CXR-pretrained representations outperform those without MoCo-CXR-pretrained representations, indicating that MoCo-CXR-pretrained representations are of higher-quality. End-to-end fine-tuning experiments reveal that a model initialized via MoCo-CXR-pretraining outperforms its non-MoCo-CXR-pretrained counterpart. We find that MoCo-CXR-pretraining provides the most benefit with limited labeled training data. Finally, we demonstrate similar results on a target Tuberculosis dataset unseen during pretraining, indicating that MoCo-CXR-pretraining endows models with representations and transferability that can be applied across chest X-ray datasets and tasks.
abstract_zh: 对比学习是一种自我监督形式，可以利用未标记的数据来生成预训练模型。虽然对比学习在自然图像分类任务上表现出了有希望的结果，但其在胸部 X 射线判读等医学成像任务中的应用受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MoCo-CXR，它是对比学习方法 Momentum Contrast (MoCo) 的改进，用于生成具有更好表示和初始化的模型，用于检测胸部 X 射线中的病理。在检测胸腔积液时，我们发现在 MoCo-CXR 预训练表示上训练的线性模型优于没有 MoCo-CXR 预训练表示的线性模型，表明 MoCo-CXR 预训练表示具有更高的质量。端到端微调实验表明，通过 MoCo-CXR 预训练初始化的模型优于非 MoCo-CXR 预训练模型。我们发现 MoCo-CXR 预训练在有限的标记训练数据下提供了最大的好处。最后，我们在预训练期间未见过的目标结核病数据集上展示了类似的结果，表明 MoCo-CXR 预训练赋予模型可应用于胸部 X 射线数据集和任务的表示和可转移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoCo-CXR方法，通过对比学习预训练提升胸部X光模型的表示能力和迁移性。
AI.motivation: 对比学习在自然图像分类中表现优异，但其在医学影像如胸部X光中的应用有限，需改进病理检测的模型表示质量。
AI.method: 将Momentum Contrast（MoCo）对比学习方法适配至胸部X光任务，通过预训练生成高质量表示，并在有限标注数据和跨数据集任务中验证效果。
AI.result: MoCo-CXR预训练的线性模型在胸腔积液检测中优于未预训练模型，且在少量标注数据和未见结核病数据集上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: MoCo-CXR预训练显著提升胸部X光模型的表示质量与跨数据集迁移能力，尤其在标注数据有限时效果更突出。

End-to-end fine-tuning experiments reveal that a model initialized via MoCo-CXR-pretraining outperforms its non-MoCo-CXR-pretrained counterpart. We find that MoCo-CXR-pretraining provides the most benefit with limited labeled training data. Finally, we demonstrate similar results on a target Tuberculosis dataset unseen during pretraining, indicating that MoCo-CXR-pretraining endows models with representations and transferability that can be applied across chest X-ray datasets and tasks. 对比学习是一种自我监督形式，可以利用未标记的数据来生成预训练模型。虽然对比学习在自然图像分类任务上表现出了有希望的结果，但其在胸部 X 射线判读等医学成像任务中的应用受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MoCo-CXR，它是对比学习方法 Momentum Contrast (MoCo) 的改进，用于生成具有更好表示和初始化的模型，用于检测胸部 X 射线中的病理。在检测胸腔积液时，我们发现在 MoCo-CXR 预训练表示上训练的线性模型优于没有 MoCo-CXR 预训练表示的线性模型，表明 MoCo-CXR 预训练表示具有更高的质量。端到端微调实验表明，通过 MoCo-CXR 预训练初始化的模型优于非 MoCo-CXR 预训练模型。我们发现 MoCo-CXR 预训练在有限的标记训练数据下提供了最大的好处。最后，我们在预训练期间未见过的目标结核病数据集上展示了类似的结果，表明 MoCo-CXR 预训练赋予模型可应用于胸部 X 射线数据集和任务的表示和可转移性。 本文提出MoCo-CXR方法，通过对比学习预训练提升胸部X光模型的表示能力和迁移性。 Hari Sowrirajan,Jingbo Yang,Andrew Y. Ng,Pranav Rajpurkar cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Identifying Melanoma Images using EfficientNet Ensemble: Winning Solution to the SIIM-ISIC Melanoma Classification Challenge
title_zh: 使用 EfficientNet Ensemble 识别黑色素瘤图像：SIIM-ISIC 黑色素瘤分类挑战的获胜解决方案
abstract: We present our winning solution to the SIIM-ISIC Melanoma Classification Challenge. It is an ensemble of convolutions neural network (CNN) models with different backbones and input sizes, most of which are image-only models while a few of them used image-level and patient-level metadata. The keys to our winning are: (1) stable validation scheme (2) good choice of model target (3) carefully tuned pipeline and (4) ensembling with very diverse models. The winning submission scored 0.9600 AUC on cross validation and 0.9490 AUC on private leaderboard.
summary: We present our winning solution to the SIIM-ISIC Melanoma Classification Challenge. It is an ensemble of convolutions neural network (CNN) models with different backbones and input sizes, most of which are image-only models while a few of them used image-level and patient-level metadata. The keys to our winning are: (1) stable validation scheme (2) good choice of model target (3) carefully tuned pipeline and (4) ensembling with very diverse models. The winning submission scored 0.9600 AUC on cross validation and 0.9490 AUC on private leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了 SIIM-ISIC 黑色素瘤分类挑战赛的获胜解决方案。它是具有不同主干和输入大小的卷积神经网络（CNN）模型的集合，其中大多数是仅图像模型，而其中一些使用图像级和患者级元数据。我们获胜的关键是：（1）稳定的验证方案（2）模型目标的良好选择（3）仔细调整的管道以及（4）与非常多样化的模型进行集成。获胜提交的交叉验证得分为 0.9600 AUC，在私人排行榜上得分为 0.9490 AUC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于EfficientNet集成的黑色素瘤图像识别方法，成功解决了SIIM-ISIC黑色素瘤分类挑战赛问题。
AI.motivation: 为提高黑色素瘤分类的准确性和泛化能力，通过集成多样化模型和元数据提升性能。
AI.method: 采用不同骨干网络和输入尺寸的CNN模型集成，结合图像-only模型与图像/患者元数据，通过稳定验证方案、模型目标选择、流程优化及多样化集成策略实现。
AI.result: 交叉验证AUC达0.9600，私有排行榜AUC为0.9490，获得挑战赛冠军。
AI.conclusion: 模型集成与元数据结合显著提升分类效果，多样化模型策略为医学图像分析提供有效方案。

title: Google Landmark Recognition 2020 Competition Third Place Solution
title_zh: 2020 年 Google 地标识别大赛第三名解决方案
abstract: We present our third place solution to the Google Landmark Recognition 2020 competition. It is an ensemble of global features only Sub-center ArcFace models. We introduce dynamic margins for ArcFace loss, a family of tune-able margin functions of class size, designed to deal with the extreme imbalance in GLDv2 dataset. Progressive finetuning and careful postprocessing are also key to the solution. Our two submissions scored 0.6344 and 0.6289 on private leaderboard, both ranking third place out of 736 teams.
summary: We present our third place solution to the Google Landmark Recognition 2020 competition. It is an ensemble of global features only Sub-center ArcFace models. We introduce dynamic margins for ArcFace loss, a family of tune-able margin functions of class size, designed to deal with the extreme imbalance in GLDv2 dataset. Progressive finetuning and careful postprocessing are also key to the solution. Our two submissions scored 0.6344 and 0.6289 on private leaderboard, both ranking third place out of 736 teams.
abstract_zh: 我们向 2020 年 Google 地标识别竞赛展示了第三名的解决方案。它是仅具有全局特征的子中心 ArcFace 模型的集合。我们引入了 ArcFace 损失的动态边距，这是一系列可调整类大小的边距函数，旨在处理 GLDv2 数据集中的极端不平衡问题。渐进式微调和仔细的后处理也是解决方案的关键。我们的两份提交作品在私人排行榜上的得分分别为 0.6344 和 0.6289，在 736 支队伍中均排名第三。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在Google Landmark Recognition 2020竞赛中获得第三名的解决方案，采用基于全局特征的Sub-center ArcFace模型集成方法。
AI.motivation: 针对GLDv2数据集的极端类别不平衡问题，设计可调节的动态边距函数以优化ArcFace损失，提升模型在长尾分布下的识别性能。
AI.method: 构建多模型集成方案，核心包括：1) 使用动态边距的ArcFace损失函数；2) Sub-center结构增强特征判别性；3) 渐进式微调策略；4) 精细的后处理流程。
AI.result: 两次提交在私有测试集分别取得0.6344和0.6289的分数，位列736支参赛队伍第三名。
AI.conclusion: 动态边距设计与模型集成策略有效缓解了数据不平衡问题，验证了改进的ArcFace框架在大规模地标识别任务中的竞争力。

title: Non-Stationary Stochastic Global Optimization Algorithms
title_zh: 非平稳随机全局优化算法
abstract: Gomez proposes a formal and systematic approach for characterizing stochastic global optimization algorithms. Using it, Gomez formalizes algorithms with a fixed next-population stochastic method, i.e., algorithms defined as stationary Markov processes. These are the cases of standard versions of hill-climbing, parallel hill-climbing, generational genetic, steady-state genetic, and differential evolution algorithms. This paper continues such a systematic formal approach. First, we generalize the sufficient conditions convergence lemma from stationary to non-stationary Markov processes. Second, we develop Markov kernels for some selection schemes. Finally, we formalize both simulated-annealing and evolutionary-strategies using the systematic formal approach.
summary: Gomez proposes a formal and systematic approach for characterizing stochastic global optimization algorithms. Using it, Gomez formalizes algorithms with a fixed next-population stochastic method, i.e., algorithms defined as stationary Markov processes. These are the cases of standard versions of hill-climbing, parallel hill-climbing, generational genetic, steady-state genetic, and differential evolution algorithms. This paper continues such a systematic formal approach. First, we generalize the sufficient conditions convergence lemma from stationary to non-stationary Markov processes. Second, we develop Markov kernels for some selection schemes. Finally, we formalize both simulated-annealing and evolutionary-strategies using the systematic formal approach.
abstract_zh: 戈麦斯提出了一种正式且系统的方法来表征随机全局优化算法。使用它，戈麦斯使用固定的下一代随机方法来形式化算法，即定义为平稳马尔可夫过程的算法。这些是爬山算法、并行爬山算法、世代遗传算法、稳态遗传算法和差分进化算法的标准版本的情况。本文延续了这种系统化的形式方法。首先，我们将充分条件收敛引理从平稳马尔可夫过程推广到非平稳马尔可夫过程。其次，我们为一些选择方案开发马尔可夫核。最后，我们使用系统形式化方法将模拟退火和进化策略形式化。

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了Gomez提出的系统化方法，将随机全局优化算法的收敛性分析从平稳马尔可夫过程推广至非平稳过程，并形式化了模拟退火与进化策略。
AI.motivation: 现有随机优化算法的理论分析多局限于平稳马尔可夫过程，难以覆盖实际中可能具有时变特性的非平稳算法，需建立更普适的理论框架。
AI.method: 通过推广收敛性条件至非平稳马尔可夫过程，构建选择方案的马尔可夫核，并采用系统化方法形式化模拟退火与进化策略算法。
AI.result: 成功建立非平稳过程的收敛性判定条件，开发了相关马尔可夫核模型，并实现了两种经典算法的系统化形式化描述。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为非平稳随机优化算法提供了理论分析工具，推动了算法设计与收敛性研究的系统化发展。

Finally, we formalize both simulated-annealing and evolutionary-strategies using the systematic formal approach. 戈麦斯提出了一种正式且系统的方法来表征随机全局优化算法。使用它，戈麦斯使用固定的下一代随机方法来形式化算法，即定义为平稳马尔可夫过程的算法。这些是爬山算法、并行爬山算法、世代遗传算法、稳态遗传算法和差分进化算法的标准版本的情况。本文延续了这种系统化的形式方法。首先，我们将充分条件收敛引理从平稳马尔可夫过程推广到非平稳马尔可夫过程。其次，我们为一些选择方案开发马尔可夫核。最后，我们使用系统形式化方法将模拟退火和进化策略形式化。 本文扩展了Gomez提出的系统化方法，将随机全局优化算法的收敛性分析从平稳马尔可夫过程推广至非平稳过程，并形式化了模拟退火与进化策略。 Jonatan Gomez,Carlos Rivera math.OC,cs.NE,math.PR

authors_text: Ihor Protsenko,Taras Lehinevych,Dmytro Voitekh,Ihor Kroosh,Nick Hasty,Anthony Johnson
title: Self-attention aggregation network for video face representation and recognition
title_zh: 用于视频人脸表示和识别的自注意力聚合网络
abstract: Models based on self-attention mechanisms have been successful in analyzing temporal data and have been widely used in the natural language domain. We propose a new model architecture for video face representation and recognition based on a self-attention mechanism. Our approach could be used for video with single and multiple identities. To the best of our knowledge, no one has explored the aggregation approaches that consider the video with multiple identities. The proposed approach utilizes existing models to get the face representation for each video frame, e.g., ArcFace and MobileFaceNet, and the aggregation module produces the aggregated face representation vector for video by taking into consideration the order of frames and their quality scores. We demonstrate empirical results on a public dataset for video face recognition called IJB-C to indicate that the self-attention aggregation network (SAAN) outperforms naive average pooling. Moreover, we introduce a new multi-identity video dataset based on the publicly available UMDFaces dataset and collected GIFs from Giphy. We show that SAAN is capable of producing a compact face representation for both single and multiple identities in a video. The dataset and source code will be publicly available.
summary: Models based on self-attention mechanisms have been successful in analyzing temporal data and have been widely used in the natural language domain. We propose a new model architecture for video face representation and recognition based on a self-attention mechanism. Our approach could be used for video with single and multiple identities. To the best of our knowledge, no one has explored the aggregation approaches that consider the video with multiple identities. The proposed approach utilizes existing models to get the face representation for each video frame, e.g., ArcFace and MobileFaceNet, and the aggregation module produces the aggregated face representation vector for video by taking into consideration the order of frames and their quality scores. We demonstrate empirical results on a public dataset for video face recognition called IJB-C to indicate that the self-attention aggregation network (SAAN) outperforms naive average pooling. Moreover, we introduce a new multi-identity video dataset based on the publicly available UMDFaces dataset and collected GIFs from Giphy. We show that SAAN is capable of producing a compact face representation for both single and multiple identities in a video. The dataset and source code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 基于自注意力机制的模型已经成功地分析了时态数据，并在自然语言领域得到了广泛的应用。我们提出了一种基于自注意力机制的视频人脸表示和识别的新模型架构。我们的方法可用于具有单一和多重身份的视频。据我们所知，没有人探索过考虑具有多个身份的视频的聚合方法。所提出的方法利用现有模型来获取每个视频帧的面部表示，例如 ArcFace 和 MobileFaceNet，并且聚合模块通过考虑帧的顺序及其质量分数来生成视频的聚合面部表示向量。我们在称为 IJB-C 的视频人脸识别公共数据集上展示了实证结果，表明自注意力聚合网络 (SAAN) 的性能优于朴素平均池化。此外，我们基于公开可用的 UMDFaces 数据集和从 Giphy 收集的 GIF 引入了一个新的多身份视频数据集。我们证明 SAAN 能够为视频中的单个和多个身份生成紧凑的面部表示。数据集和源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自注意力机制的聚合网络（SAAN），用于视频中的人脸表征与识别，可处理单身份和多身份视频场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未探索多身份视频的聚合策略，而视频人脸识别需考虑帧序和质量差异，需更有效的聚合方法提升性能。
AI.method: 利用ArcFace/MobileFaceNet提取每帧人脸表征，通过自注意力聚合模块结合帧顺序与质量分数生成视频级表征。
AI.result: 在IJB-C数据集上优于简单平均池化；新构建的多身份数据集验证了SAAN对单/多身份视频的表征能力。
AI.conclusion: SAAN能生成紧凑的人脸表征，有效处理复杂视频场景，数据集与代码将公开促进研究。

title: Collision free motion planning on a wedge of circles
title_zh: 楔形圆上的无碰撞运动规划
abstract: We exhibit an algorithm with continuous instructions for two robots moving without collisions on a track shaped as a wedge of three circles. We show that the topological complexity of the configuration space associated with this problem is 3. The topological complexity is a homotopy invariant that can be thought of as the minimum number of continuous instructions required to describe the movement of the robots between any initial configuration to any final one without collisions. The algorithm presented is optimal in the sense that it requires exactly 3 continuous instructions.
summary: We exhibit an algorithm with continuous instructions for two robots moving without collisions on a track shaped as a wedge of three circles. We show that the topological complexity of the configuration space associated with this problem is 3. The topological complexity is a homotopy invariant that can be thought of as the minimum number of continuous instructions required to describe the movement of the robots between any initial configuration to any final one without collisions. The algorithm presented is optimal in the sense that it requires exactly 3 continuous instructions.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了一种具有连续指令的算法，可以让两个机器人在三个圆楔形的轨道上移动而不会发生碰撞。我们证明与该问题相关的配置空间的拓扑复杂度为 3。拓扑复杂度是同伦不变量，可以被认为是描述机器人在任何初始配置到任何最终配置之间无碰撞的运动所需的连续指令的最小数量。所提出的算法是最优的，因为它恰好需要 3 个连续指令。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于两个机器人在三个圆组成的楔形轨道上无碰撞移动的连续指令算法，并确定了该问题配置空间的拓扑复杂度为3。
AI.motivation: 机器人路径规划中需要解决无碰撞移动问题，而拓扑复杂度作为描述连续指令数量的同伦不变量，对优化运动规划算法具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过分析配置空间的拓扑结构，利用同伦不变量理论，设计出需要3条连续指令的最优算法。
AI.result: 证明了该问题的拓扑复杂度为3，并构造了需要恰好3条连续指令的无碰撞运动算法，验证了算法的最优性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为复杂拓扑结构下的多机器人路径规划提供了理论支持，展示了同伦理论在运动规划中的应用价值。

title: Resolution Dependent GAN Interpolation for Controllable Image Synthesis Between Domains
title_zh: 用于域间可控图像合成的分辨率相关 GAN 插值
comment: 2 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to Machine Learning for Creativity and Design NeurIPS 2020 Workshop; Corrected typos
comments: 2 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to Machine Learning for Creativity and Design NeurIPS 2020 Workshop; Corrected typos
abstract: GANs can generate photo-realistic images from the domain of their training data. However, those wanting to use them for creative purposes often want to generate imagery from a truly novel domain, a task which GANs are inherently unable to do. It is also desirable to have a level of control so that there is a degree of artistic direction rather than purely curation of random results. Here we present a method for interpolating between generative models of the StyleGAN architecture in a resolution dependent manner. This allows us to generate images from an entirely novel domain and do this with a degree of control over the nature of the output.
summary: GANs can generate photo-realistic images from the domain of their training data. However, those wanting to use them for creative purposes often want to generate imagery from a truly novel domain, a task which GANs are inherently unable to do. It is also desirable to have a level of control so that there is a degree of artistic direction rather than purely curation of random results. Here we present a method for interpolating between generative models of the StyleGAN architecture in a resolution dependent manner. This allows us to generate images from an entirely novel domain and do this with a degree of control over the nature of the output.
abstract_zh: GAN 可以根据训练数据生成逼真的图像。然而，那些想要将它们用于创造性目的的人通常希望从一个真正新颖的领域生成图像，这是 GAN 本质上无法完成的任务。还希望有一定程度的控制，以便有一定程度的艺术指导，而不是纯粹随机结果的策划。在这里，我们提出了一种以分辨率相关的方式在 StyleGAN 架构的生成模型之间进行插值的方法。这使我们能够从一个全新的领域生成图像，并通过对输出性质的一定程度的控制来实现这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN架构的分辨率依赖生成模型插值方法，实现跨域可控图像合成。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN无法生成全新领域的图像且缺乏输出控制能力，而创作需求需要可控的跨域图像生成。
AI.method: 通过分辨率依赖的StyleGAN模型插值技术，在不同分辨率层级实现跨域图像合成与生成控制。
AI.result: 成功生成全新领域的图像并实现输出特性控制，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了传统GAN的跨域生成与控制难题，为可控图像创作提供了新途径。

Here we present a method for interpolating between generative models of the StyleGAN architecture in a resolution dependent manner. This allows us to generate images from an entirely novel domain and do this with a degree of control over the nature of the output. GAN 可以根据训练数据生成逼真的图像。然而，那些想要将它们用于创造性目的的人通常希望从一个真正新颖的领域生成图像，这是 GAN 本质上无法完成的任务。还希望有一定程度的控制，以便有一定程度的艺术指导，而不是纯粹随机结果的策划。在这里，我们提出了一种以分辨率相关的方式在 StyleGAN 架构的生成模型之间进行插值的方法。这使我们能够从一个全新的领域生成图像，并通过对输出性质的一定程度的控制来实现这一点。 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN架构的分辨率依赖生成模型插值方法，实现跨域可控图像合成。 Justin N. M. Pinkney,Doron Adler cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Revising FUNSD dataset for key-value detection in document images
title_zh: 修改 FUNSD 数据集以进行文档图像中的键值检测
abstract: FUNSD is one of the limited publicly available datasets for information extraction from document im-ages. The information in the FUNSD dataset is defined by text areas of four categories ("key", "value", "header", "other", and "background") and connectivity between areas as key-value relations. In-specting FUNSD, we found several inconsistency in labeling, which impeded its applicability to thekey-value extraction problem. In this report, we described some labeling issues in FUNSD and therevision we made to the dataset. We also reported our implementation of for key-value detection onFUNSD using a UNet model as baseline results and an improved UNet model with Channel-InvariantDeformable Convolution.
summary: FUNSD is one of the limited publicly available datasets for information extraction from document im-ages. The information in the FUNSD dataset is defined by text areas of four categories ("key", "value", "header", "other", and "background") and connectivity between areas as key-value relations. In-specting FUNSD, we found several inconsistency in labeling, which impeded its applicability to thekey-value extraction problem. In this report, we described some labeling issues in FUNSD and therevision we made to the dataset. We also reported our implementation of for key-value detection onFUNSD using a UNet model as baseline results and an improved UNet model with Channel-InvariantDeformable Convolution.
abstract_zh: FUNSD 是用于从文档图像中提取信息的有限公开数据集之一。 FUNSD数据集中的信息由四个类别（“键”、“值”、“标题”、“其他”和“背景”）的文本区域以及区域之间的连接性定义为键值关系。在检查 FUNSD 时，我们发现标签中存在一些不一致之处，这阻碍了其在键值提取问题中的适用性。在本报告中，我们描述了 FUNSD 中的一些标签问题以及我们对数据集所做的修改。我们还报告了我们使用 UNet 模型作为基线结果以及使用 Channel-InvariantDeformable Convolution 改进的 UNet 模型在 FUNSD 上进行键值检测的实现。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在修正FUNSD数据集中的标签不一致问题，并改进键值对检测方法。
AI.motivation: FUNSD数据集存在标签不一致问题，影响其在键值对提取任务中的应用效果。
AI.method: 修正数据集标签并采用UNet模型作为基线，同时引入通道不变可变形卷积改进模型。
AI.result: 修正后的数据集提升了模型性能，改进的UNet在键值检测任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 数据集修正与模型优化有效提升了文档图像中键值对检测的准确性。

title: Interpretable Neural Networks for Panel Data Analysis in Economics
title_zh: 用于经济学面板数据分析的可解释神经网络
abstract: The lack of interpretability and transparency are preventing economists from using advanced tools like neural networks in their empirical research. In this paper, we propose a class of interpretable neural network models that can achieve both high prediction accuracy and interpretability. The model can be written as a simple function of a regularized number of interpretable features, which are outcomes of interpretable functions encoded in the neural network. Researchers can design different forms of interpretable functions based on the nature of their tasks. In particular, we encode a class of interpretable functions named persistent change filters in the neural network to study time series cross-sectional data. We apply the model to predicting individual's monthly employment status using high-dimensional administrative data. We achieve an accuracy of 94.5% in the test set, which is comparable to the best performed conventional machine learning methods. Furthermore, the interpretability of the model allows us to understand the mechanism that underlies the prediction: an individual's employment status is closely related to whether she pays different types of insurances. Our work is a useful step towards overcoming the black-box problem of neural networks, and provide a new tool for economists to study administrative and proprietary big data.
summary: The lack of interpretability and transparency are preventing economists from using advanced tools like neural networks in their empirical research. In this paper, we propose a class of interpretable neural network models that can achieve both high prediction accuracy and interpretability. The model can be written as a simple function of a regularized number of interpretable features, which are outcomes of interpretable functions encoded in the neural network. Researchers can design different forms of interpretable functions based on the nature of their tasks. In particular, we encode a class of interpretable functions named persistent change filters in the neural network to study time series cross-sectional data. We apply the model to predicting individual's monthly employment status using high-dimensional administrative data. We achieve an accuracy of 94.5% in the test set, which is comparable to the best performed conventional machine learning methods. Furthermore, the interpretability of the model allows us to understand the mechanism that underlies the prediction: an individual's employment status is closely related to whether she pays different types of insurances. Our work is a useful step towards overcoming the black-box problem of neural networks, and provide a new tool for economists to study administrative and proprietary big data.
abstract_zh: 可解释性和透明度的缺乏阻碍了经济学家在实证研究中使用神经网络等先进工具。在本文中，我们提出了一类可解释的神经网络模型，可以实现高预测精度和可解释性。该模型可以写成正则化数量的可解释特征的简单函数，这些特征是神经网络中编码的可解释函数的结果。研究人员可以根据任务的性质设计不同形式的可解释函数。特别是，我们在神经网络中编码一类名为持久变化过滤器的可解释函数来研究时间序列横截面数据。我们将该模型应用于使用高维管理数据来预测个人每月的就业状况。我们在测试集中实现了 94.5% 的准确率，与表现最好的传统机器学习方法相当。此外，模型的可解释性使我们能够理解预测背后的机制：个人的就业状况与她是否缴纳不同类型的保险密切相关。我们的工作是克服神经网络黑箱问题的有益一步，并为经济学家研究行政和专有大数据提供了新工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的神经网络模型，用于经济学中的面板数据分析，以解决传统神经网络缺乏可解释性的问题。
AI.motivation: 经济学家因神经网络等先进工具的不可解释性而难以在实证研究中应用，需开发兼顾预测精度与可解释性的模型。
AI.method: 设计可解释的神经网络架构，通过编码可解释函数（如持久变化滤波器）处理时间序列横截面数据，并利用高维行政数据进行预测。
AI.result: 在测试集中达到94.5%的预测准确率，与传统机器学习方法相当，并发现个人就业状态与保险缴纳类型密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效缓解了神经网络的黑箱问题，为经济学家分析行政和专有大数据提供了新工具。

authors_text: Peri Akiva,Matthew Purri,Kristin Dana,Beth Tellman,Tyler Anderson
title: H2O-Net: Self-Supervised Flood Segmentation via Adversarial Domain Adaptation and Label Refinement
title_zh: H2O-Net：通过对抗域适应和标签细化进行自我监督的洪水分割
abstract: Accurate flood detection in near real time via high resolution, high latency satellite imagery is essential to prevent loss of lives by providing quick and actionable information. Instruments and sensors useful for flood detection are only available in low resolution, low latency satellites with region re-visit periods of up to 16 days, making flood alerting systems that use such satellites unreliable. This work presents H2O-Network, a self supervised deep learning method to segment floods from satellites and aerial imagery by bridging domain gap between low and high latency satellite and coarse-to-fine label refinement. H2O-Net learns to synthesize signals highly correlative with water presence as a domain adaptation step for semantic segmentation in high resolution satellite imagery. Our work also proposes a self-supervision mechanism, which does not require any hand annotation, used during training to generate high quality ground truth data. We demonstrate that H2O-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art semantic segmentation methods on satellite imagery by 10% and 12% pixel accuracy and mIoU respectively for the task of flood segmentation. We emphasize the generalizability of our model by transferring model weights trained on satellite imagery to drone imagery, a highly different sensor and domain.
summary: Accurate flood detection in near real time via high resolution, high latency satellite imagery is essential to prevent loss of lives by providing quick and actionable information. Instruments and sensors useful for flood detection are only available in low resolution, low latency satellites with region re-visit periods of up to 16 days, making flood alerting systems that use such satellites unreliable. This work presents H2O-Network, a self supervised deep learning method to segment floods from satellites and aerial imagery by bridging domain gap between low and high latency satellite and coarse-to-fine label refinement. H2O-Net learns to synthesize signals highly correlative with water presence as a domain adaptation step for semantic segmentation in high resolution satellite imagery. Our work also proposes a self-supervision mechanism, which does not require any hand annotation, used during training to generate high quality ground truth data. We demonstrate that H2O-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art semantic segmentation methods on satellite imagery by 10% and 12% pixel accuracy and mIoU respectively for the task of flood segmentation. We emphasize the generalizability of our model by transferring model weights trained on satellite imagery to drone imagery, a highly different sensor and domain.
abstract_zh: 通过高分辨率、高延迟卫星图像进行近乎实时的准确洪水检测对于通过提供快速且可操作的信息来防止生命损失至关重要。用于洪水检测的仪器和传感器仅适用于低分辨率、低延迟卫星，区域重访周期长达 16 天，这使得使用此类卫星的洪水警报系统不可靠。这项工作提出了 H2O-Network，这是一种自监督深度学习方法，通过弥合低延迟和高延迟卫星之间的域差距以及从粗到细的标签细化来分割来自卫星和航空图像的洪水。 H2O-Net 学习合成与水的存在高度相关的信号，作为高分辨率卫星图像中语义分割的域适应步骤。我们的工作还提出了一种自我监督机制，不需要任何手动注释，在训练过程中使用它来生成高质量的地面实况数据。我们证明，在洪水分割任务中，H2O-Net 的像素精度和 mIoU 分别优于卫星图像上最先进的语义分割方法 10% 和 12%。我们通过将在卫星图像上训练的模型权重转移到无人机图像（一种截然不同的传感器和领域）来强调模型的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出H2O-Net，一种通过对抗域适应和标签优化实现洪水分割的自监督深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率卫星图像因延迟高难以实时监测洪水，而低延迟卫星传感器分辨率不足且重访周期长，导致现有洪水预警系统不可靠。
AI.method: H2O-Net通过对抗域适应弥合高低延迟卫星图像的域差距，并采用无需人工标注的自监督机制生成高质量标签数据。
AI.result: 在洪水分割任务中，H2O-Net较现有方法提升10%像素准确率和12%mIoU，且模型权重可迁移至无人机图像等不同领域。
AI.conclusion: H2O-Net为跨传感器和跨域的洪水分割提供了通用且高效的解决方案，显著提升实时监测能力。

motivation: 高分辨率卫星图像因延迟高难以实时监测洪水，而低延迟卫星传感器分辨率不足且重访周期长，导致现有洪水预警系统不可靠。
method: H2O-Net通过对抗域适应弥合高低延迟卫星图像的域差距，并采用无需人工标注的自监督机制生成高质量标签数据。
result: 在洪水分割任务中，H2O-Net较现有方法提升10%像素准确率和12%mIoU，且模型权重可迁移至无人机图像等不同领域。
conclusion: H2O-Net为跨传感器和跨域的洪水分割提供了通用且高效的解决方案，显著提升实时监测能力。
search_text: H2O-Net: Self-Supervised Flood Segmentation via Adversarial Domain Adaptation and Label Refinement H2O-Net：通过对抗域适应和标签细化进行自我监督的洪水分割 Accurate flood detection in near real time via high resolution, high latency satellite imagery is essential to prevent loss of lives by providing quick and actionable information. Instruments and sensors useful for flood detection are only available in low resolution, low latency satellites with region re-visit periods of up to 16 days, making flood alerting systems that use such satellites unreliable. This work presents H2O-Network, a self supervised deep learning method to segment floods from satellites and aerial imagery by bridging domain gap between low and high latency satellite and coarse-to-fine label refinement. H2O-Net learns to synthesize signals highly correlative with water presence as a domain adaptation step for semantic segmentation in high resolution satellite imagery. Our work also proposes a self-supervision mechanism, which does not require any hand annotation, used during training to generate high quality ground truth data. We demonstrate that H2O-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art semantic segmentation methods on satellite imagery by 10% and 12% pixel accuracy and mIoU respectively for the task of flood segmentation. We emphasize the generalizability of our model by transferring model weights trained on satellite imagery to drone imagery, a highly different sensor and domain. 通过高分辨率、高延迟卫星图像进行近乎实时的准确洪水检测对于通过提供快速且可操作的信息来防止生命损失至关重要。用于洪水检测的仪器和传感器仅适用于低分辨率、低延迟卫星，区域重访周期长达 16 天，这使得使用此类卫星的洪水警报系统不可靠。这项工作提出了 H2O-Network，这是一种自监督深度学习方法，通过弥合低延迟和高延迟卫星之间的域差距以及从粗到细的标签细化来分割来自卫星和航空图像的洪水。 H2O-Net 学习合成与水的存在高度相关的信号，作为高分辨率卫星图像中语义分割的域适应步骤。我们的工作还提出了一种自我监督机制，不需要任何手动注释，在训练过程中使用它来生成高质量的地面实况数据。我们证明，在洪水分割任务中，H2O-Net 的像素精度和 mIoU 分别优于卫星图像上最先进的语义分割方法 10% 和 12%。我们通过将在卫星图像上训练的模型权重转移到无人机图像（一种截然不同的传感器和领域）来强调模型的通用性。 本文提出H2O-Net，一种通过对抗域适应和标签优化实现洪水分割的自监督深度学习方法。 Peri Akiva,Matthew Purri,Kristin Dana,Beth Tellman,Tyler Anderson cs.CV,cs.AI

title: PI-Net: Pose Interacting Network for Multi-Person Monocular 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: PI-Net：用于多人单目 3D 姿态估计的姿态交互网络
abstract: Recent literature addressed the monocular 3D pose estimation task very satisfactorily. In these studies, different persons are usually treated as independent pose instances to estimate. However, in many every-day situations, people are interacting, and the pose of an individual depends on the pose of his/her interactees. In this paper, we investigate how to exploit this dependency to enhance current - and possibly future - deep networks for 3D monocular pose estimation. Our pose interacting network, or PI-Net, inputs the initial pose estimates of a variable number of interactees into a recurrent architecture used to refine the pose of the person-of-interest. Evaluating such a method is challenging due to the limited availability of public annotated multi-person 3D human pose datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in the MuPoTS dataset, setting the new state-of-the-art on it. Qualitative results on other multi-person datasets (for which 3D pose ground-truth is not available) showcase the proposed PI-Net. PI-Net is implemented in PyTorch and the code will be made available upon acceptance of the paper.
summary: Recent literature addressed the monocular 3D pose estimation task very satisfactorily. In these studies, different persons are usually treated as independent pose instances to estimate. However, in many every-day situations, people are interacting, and the pose of an individual depends on the pose of his/her interactees. In this paper, we investigate how to exploit this dependency to enhance current - and possibly future - deep networks for 3D monocular pose estimation. Our pose interacting network, or PI-Net, inputs the initial pose estimates of a variable number of interactees into a recurrent architecture used to refine the pose of the person-of-interest. Evaluating such a method is challenging due to the limited availability of public annotated multi-person 3D human pose datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in the MuPoTS dataset, setting the new state-of-the-art on it. Qualitative results on other multi-person datasets (for which 3D pose ground-truth is not available) showcase the proposed PI-Net. PI-Net is implemented in PyTorch and the code will be made available upon acceptance of the paper.
abstract_zh: 最近的文献非常令人满意地解决了单目 3D 姿态估计任务。在这些研究中，不同的人通常被视为独立的姿势实例来进行估计。然而，在许多日常情况下，人们正在互动，个人的姿势取决于他/她的互动对象的姿势。在本文中，我们研究了如何利用这种依赖性来增强当前（以及未来可能）的 3D 单目姿态估计深度网络。我们的姿势交互网络（PI-Net）将可变数量的交互者的初始姿势估计输入到用于细化感兴趣的人的姿势的循环架构中。由于公共注释的多人 3D 人体姿势数据集的可用性有限，评估这种方法具有挑战性。我们在 MuPoTS 数据集中展示了我们方法的有效性，并在其上设置了新的最先进技术。其他多人数据集（无法获得 3D 姿态地面实况）的定性结果展示了所提出的 PI-Net。 PI-Net 在 PyTorch 中实现，代码将在论文被接受后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PI-Net的网络，用于通过利用多人之间的姿态相互依赖关系来改进单目3D姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有的单目3D姿态估计方法通常将不同的人视为独立的实例进行处理，然而在日常场景中，人们常常相互作用，个体的姿态依赖于其互动对象的姿态。
AI.method: 该方法通过引入一个递归架构，将初始姿态估计值作为输入，用于优化目标人物的姿态估计，从而利用互动对象之间的依赖关系。
AI.result: 在MuPoTS数据集上，该方法取得了新的最先进的结果，并在其他多人数据集上展示了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: PI-Net通过考虑多人之间的姿态依赖关系，显著提升了单目3D姿态估计的性能。

authors_text: Yulin Wang,Kangchen Lv,Rui Huang,Shiji Song,Le Yang,Gao Huang
title: Glance and Focus: a Dynamic Approach to Reducing Spatial Redundancy in Image Classification
title_zh: 扫视和聚焦：减少图像分类中空间冗余的动态方法
abstract: The accuracy of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) generally improves when fueled with high resolution images. However, this often comes at a high computational cost and high memory footprint. Inspired by the fact that not all regions in an image are task-relevant, we propose a novel framework that performs efficient image classification by processing a sequence of relatively small inputs, which are strategically selected from the original image with reinforcement learning. Such a dynamic decision process naturally facilitates adaptive inference at test time, i.e., it can be terminated once the model is sufficiently confident about its prediction and thus avoids further redundant computation. Notably, our framework is general and flexible as it is compatible with most of the state-of-the-art light-weighted CNNs (such as MobileNets, EfficientNets and RegNets), which can be conveniently deployed as the backbone feature extractor. Experiments on ImageNet show that our method consistently improves the computational efficiency of a wide variety of deep models. For example, it further reduces the average latency of the highly efficient MobileNet-V3 on an iPhone XS Max by 20% without sacrificing accuracy. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/GFNet-Pytorch.
summary: The accuracy of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) generally improves when fueled with high resolution images. However, this often comes at a high computational cost and high memory footprint. Inspired by the fact that not all regions in an image are task-relevant, we propose a novel framework that performs efficient image classification by processing a sequence of relatively small inputs, which are strategically selected from the original image with reinforcement learning. Such a dynamic decision process naturally facilitates adaptive inference at test time, i.e., it can be terminated once the model is sufficiently confident about its prediction and thus avoids further redundant computation. Notably, our framework is general and flexible as it is compatible with most of the state-of-the-art light-weighted CNNs (such as MobileNets, EfficientNets and RegNets), which can be conveniently deployed as the backbone feature extractor. Experiments on ImageNet show that our method consistently improves the computational efficiency of a wide variety of deep models. For example, it further reduces the average latency of the highly efficient MobileNet-V3 on an iPhone XS Max by 20% without sacrificing accuracy. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/GFNet-Pytorch.
abstract_zh: 当使用高分辨率图像时，深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的准确性通常会提高。然而，这通常会带来较高的计算成本和较高的内存占用。受并非图像中的所有区域都与任务相关这一事实的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，该框架通过处理一系列相对较小的输入来执行有效的图像分类，这些输入是通过强化学习从原始图像中策略性选择的。这种动态决策过程自然有利于测试时的自适应推理，即，一旦模型对其预测有足够的信心，就可以终止它，从而避免进一步的冗余计算。值得注意的是，我们的框架通用且灵活，因为它与大多数最先进的轻量级 CNN（例如 MobileNets、EfficientNets 和 RegNets）兼容，可以方便地部署为骨干特征提取器。 ImageNet 上的实验表明，我们的方法持续提高了各种深度模型的计算效率。例如，它在不牺牲准确性的情况下，进一步将 iPhone XS Max 上高效 MobileNet-V3 的平均延迟降低了 20%。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/blackfeather-wang/GFNet-Pytorch 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态框架，通过强化学习策略选择关键图像区域进行分类，以减少计算冗余并提高图像分类效率。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率图像虽提升CNN准确性，但带来高计算成本和内存消耗。并非所有图像区域对任务相关，需探索更高效的处理方式。
AI.method: 设计基于强化学习的动态决策机制，从原始图像中选择小区域输入序列进行处理，测试时可提前终止推理以避免冗余计算，并兼容多种轻量级CNN架构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法使MobileNet-V3在iPhone XS Max上的平均推理延迟降低20%，同时保持分类精度。
AI.conclusion: 该动态框架有效提升多种深度模型的计算效率，具有通用性且适合实际部署，为高效图像分类提供了新思路。

However, this often comes at a high computational cost and high memory footprint. Experiments on ImageNet show that our method consistently improves the computational efficiency of a wide variety of deep models. For example, it further reduces the average latency of the highly efficient MobileNet-V3 on an iPhone XS Max by 20% without sacrificing accuracy. title: A Defeasible Calculus for Zetetic Agents
title_zh: Zetetic 代理的可废止演算
abstract: The study of defeasible reasoning unites epistemologists with those working in AI, in part, because both are interested in epistemic rationality. While it is traditionally thought to govern the formation and (with)holding of beliefs, epistemic rationality may also apply to the interrogative attitudes associated with our core epistemic practice of inquiry, such as wondering, investigating, and curiosity. Since generally intelligent systems should be capable of rational inquiry, AI researchers have a natural interest in the norms that govern interrogative attitudes. Following its recent coinage, we use the term "zetetic" to refer to the properties and norms associated with the capacity to inquire. In this paper, we argue that zetetic norms can be modeled via defeasible inferences to and from questions---a.k.a erotetic inferences---in a manner similar to the way norms of epistemic rationality are represented by defeasible inference rules. We offer a sequent calculus that accommodates the unique features of "erotetic defeat" and that exhibits the computational properties needed to inform the design of zetetic agents. The calculus presented here is an improved version of the one presented in Millson (2019), extended to cover a new class of defeasible erotetic inferences.

Since generally intelligent systems should be capable of rational inquiry, AI researchers have a natural interest in the norms that govern interrogative attitudes. Following its recent coinage, we use the term "zetetic" to refer to the properties and norms associated with the capacity to inquire. In this paper, we argue that zetetic norms can be modeled via defeasible inferences to and from questions---a.k.a erotetic inferences---in a manner similar to the way norms of epistemic rationality are represented by defeasible inference rules. We offer a sequent calculus that accommodates the unique features of "erotetic defeat" and that exhibits the computational properties needed to inform the design of zetetic agents. The calculus presented here is an improved version of the one presented in Millson (2019), extended to cover a new class of defeasible erotetic inferences.
abstract_zh: 对可废止推理的研究将认识论者与人工智能研究人员联合起来，部分原因是两者都对认识理性感兴趣。虽然传统上认为认知理性控制着信念的形成和持有，但认知理性也可能适用于与我们核心认知实践探究相关的质疑态度，例如想知道、调查和好奇。由于一般智能系统应该能够进行理性探究，人工智能研究人员对控制质疑态度的规范有着天然的兴趣。根据最近的创造，我们使用术语“zetetic”来指代与查询能力相关的属性和规范。在本文中，我们认为，zetetic 规范可以通过与问题之间的可废止推论（又名色情推论）来建模，其方式类似于由可废止推论规则表示认知理性规范的方式。我们提供了一种连续的微积分，它适应了“性欲失败”的独特特征，并展示了设计 zetetic 代理所需的计算特性。这里提出的微积分是米尔森（2019）中提出的微积分的改进版本，扩展到涵盖一类新的可废除的色情推论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可废止演算（defeasible calculus），用于建模具有探究能力（zetetic）的智能体在处理疑问推理（erotetic inferences）时的规范。
AI.motivation: 传统可废止推理框架主要关注信念形成，但智能体需要理性探究能力（如提问、调查），现有理论缺乏对疑问态度（如好奇、探究）的规范建模。
AI.method: 扩展序贯演算（sequent calculus），引入处理‘疑问性抵消’（erotetic defeat）的规则，并改进2019年Millson的框架以涵盖新的可废止疑问推理类型。
AI.result: 构建了支持疑问推理的可废止演算系统，具备所需计算属性，能够处理更广泛的探究场景。
AI.conclusion: 该演算为设计具有理性探究能力的智能体提供了理论基础，未来可进一步研究其在实际系统中的应用。

While it is traditionally thought to govern the formation and (with)holding of beliefs, epistemic rationality may also apply to the interrogative attitudes associated with our core epistemic practice of inquiry, such as wondering, investigating, and curiosity. Since generally intelligent systems should be capable of rational inquiry, AI researchers have a natural interest in the norms that govern interrogative attitudes. Following its recent coinage, we use the term "zetetic" to refer to the properties and norms associated with the capacity to inquire. In this paper, we argue that zetetic norms can be modeled via defeasible inferences to and from questions---a.k.a erotetic inferences---in a manner similar to the way norms of epistemic rationality are represented by defeasible inference rules. We offer a sequent calculus that accommodates the unique features of "erotetic defeat" and that exhibits the computational properties needed to inform the design of zetetic agents. title: Federated Learning via Posterior Averaging: A New Perspective and Practical Algorithms
title_zh: 通过后验平均的联邦学习：新视角和实用算法
abstract: Federated learning is typically approached as an optimization problem, where the goal is to minimize a global loss function by distributing computation across client devices that possess local data and specify different parts of the global objective. We present an alternative perspective and formulate federated learning as a posterior inference problem, where the goal is to infer a global posterior distribution by having client devices each infer the posterior of their local data. While exact inference is often intractable, this perspective provides a principled way to search for global optima in federated settings. Further, starting with the analysis of federated quadratic objectives, we develop a computation- and communication-efficient approximate posterior inference algorithm -- federated posterior averaging (FedPA). Our algorithm uses MCMC for approximate inference of local posteriors on the clients and efficiently communicates their statistics to the server, where the latter uses them to refine a global estimate of the posterior mode. Finally, we show that FedPA generalizes federated averaging (FedAvg), can similarly benefit from adaptive optimizers, and yields state-of-the-art results on four realistic and challenging benchmarks, converging faster, to better optima.
summary: Federated learning is typically approached as an optimization problem, where the goal is to minimize a global loss function by distributing computation across client devices that possess local data and specify different parts of the global objective. We present an alternative perspective and formulate federated learning as a posterior inference problem, where the goal is to infer a global posterior distribution by having client devices each infer the posterior of their local data. While exact inference is often intractable, this perspective provides a principled way to search for global optima in federated settings. Further, starting with the analysis of federated quadratic objectives, we develop a computation- and communication-efficient approximate posterior inference algorithm -- federated posterior averaging (FedPA). Our algorithm uses MCMC for approximate inference of local posteriors on the clients and efficiently communicates their statistics to the server, where the latter uses them to refine a global estimate of the posterior mode. Finally, we show that FedPA generalizes federated averaging (FedAvg), can similarly benefit from adaptive optimizers, and yields state-of-the-art results on four realistic and challenging benchmarks, converging faster, to better optima.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习通常被视为优化问题，其目标是通过在拥有本地数据并指定全局目标不同部分的客户端设备之间分配计算来最小化全局损失函数。我们提出了另一种观点，并将联邦学习表述为后验推理问题，其目标是通过让每个客户端设备推断其本地数据的后验来推断全局后验分布。虽然精确推理通常很棘手，但这种观点提供了一种在联邦环境中搜索全局最优的原则性方法。此外，从联邦二次目标的分析开始，我们开发了一种计算和通信高效的近似后验推理算法——联邦后验平均（FedPA）。我们的算法使用 MCMC 对客户端上的局部后验进行近似推断，并将其统计数据有效地传递给服务器，后者使用它们来细化后验模式的全局估计。最后，我们表明 FedPA 推广了联合平均 (FedAvg)，同样可以从自适应优化器中受益，并在四个现实且具有挑战性的基准上产生最先进的结果，收敛速度更快，达到更好的优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FedPA的联邦学习算法，通过将联邦学习视为后验推断问题，利用后验平均方法改进全局模型优化。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习以优化问题为导向，难以有效捕捉数据分布的不确定性。本文旨在通过贝叶斯推断框架提供更 principled 的全局最优解搜索方法。
AI.method: 开发FedPA算法：客户端使用MCMC近似本地后验分布，服务器聚合统计信息优化全局后验模式，同时兼容自适应优化器。
AI.result: FedPA在四个基准测试中达到最先进效果，收敛速度更快且获得更优解，可推广FedAvg并兼容其优化策略。
AI.conclusion: 通过后验平均视角，FedPA为联邦学习提供了更高效、更鲁棒的贝叶斯方法，提升了模型收敛性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Ziyi Wu,Yueqi Duan,He Wang,Qingnan Fan,Leonidas J. Guibas
title: IF-Defense: 3D Adversarial Point Cloud Defense via Implicit Function based Restoration
title_zh: IF-Defense：通过基于隐式函数的恢复进行 3D 对抗性点云防御
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures. Update several experimental results compared with v2, e.g. cross dataset evaluation and baseline results of adversarial training
comments: 17 pages, 8 figures. Update several experimental results compared with v2, e.g. cross dataset evaluation and baseline results of adversarial training
abstract: Point cloud is an important 3D data representation widely used in many essential applications. Leveraging deep neural networks, recent works have shown great success in processing 3D point clouds. However, those deep neural networks are vulnerable to various 3D adversarial attacks, which can be summarized as two primary types: point perturbation that affects local point distribution, and surface distortion that causes dramatic changes in geometry. In this paper, we simultaneously address both the aforementioned attacks by learning to restore the clean point clouds from the attacked ones. More specifically, we propose an IF-Defense framework to directly optimize the coordinates of input points with geometry-aware and distribution-aware constraints. The former aims to recover the surface of point cloud through implicit function, while the latter encourages evenly-distributed points. Our experimental results show that IF-Defense achieves the state-of-the-art defense performance against existing 3D adversarial attacks on PointNet, PointNet++, DGCNN, PointConv and RS-CNN. For example, compared with previous methods, IF-Defense presents 20.02% improvement in classification accuracy against salient point dropping attack and 16.29% against LG-GAN attack on PointNet. Our code is available at https://github.com/Wuziyi616/IF-Defense.
summary: Point cloud is an important 3D data representation widely used in many essential applications. Leveraging deep neural networks, recent works have shown great success in processing 3D point clouds. However, those deep neural networks are vulnerable to various 3D adversarial attacks, which can be summarized as two primary types: point perturbation that affects local point distribution, and surface distortion that causes dramatic changes in geometry. In this paper, we simultaneously address both the aforementioned attacks by learning to restore the clean point clouds from the attacked ones. More specifically, we propose an IF-Defense framework to directly optimize the coordinates of input points with geometry-aware and distribution-aware constraints. The former aims to recover the surface of point cloud through implicit function, while the latter encourages evenly-distributed points. Our experimental results show that IF-Defense achieves the state-of-the-art defense performance against existing 3D adversarial attacks on PointNet, PointNet++, DGCNN, PointConv and RS-CNN. For example, compared with previous methods, IF-Defense presents 20.02% improvement in classification accuracy against salient point dropping attack and 16.29% against LG-GAN attack on PointNet. Our code is available at https://github.com/Wuziyi616/IF-Defense.
abstract_zh: 点云是一种重要的 3D 数据表示形式，广泛应用于许多重要应用中。利用深度神经网络，最近的工作在处理 3D 点云方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些深度神经网络很容易受到各种 3D 对抗性攻击，这些攻击可以概括为两种主要类型：影响局部点分布的点扰动和导致几何形状发生巨大变化的表面扭曲。在本文中，我们通过学习从受攻击的点云恢复干净的点云来同时解决上述两种攻击。更具体地说，我们提出了一个 IF-Defense 框架，通过几何感知和分布感知约束直接优化输入点的坐标。前者旨在通过隐函数恢复点云表面，而后者则鼓励均匀分布的点。我们的实验结果表明，IF-Defense 针对 PointNet、PointNet++、DGCNN、PointConv 和 RS-CNN 上现有的 3D 对抗攻击实现了最先进的防御性能。例如，与之前的方法相比，IF-Defense 在针对 PointNet 上的显着点丢弃攻击的分类准确度上提高了 20.02%，在针对 LG-GAN 攻击的分类准确率上提高了 16.29%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Wuziyi616/IF-Defense 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IF-Defense框架，通过隐式函数恢复受3D对抗攻击污染的点云数据，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云处理模型易受点扰动和表面扭曲两类对抗攻击，传统防御方法难以同时应对两种攻击且效果有限。
AI.method: 设计IF-Defense框架，结合几何感知隐式函数恢复表面结构与分布感知约束优化点云分布，直接优化输入点坐标。
AI.result: 在PointNet等主流模型上，对抗攻击分类准确率提升20.02%（针对显著点删除攻击）和16.29%（针对LG-GAN攻击），达到SOTA防御效果。
AI.conclusion: IF-Defense通过联合优化几何与分布特性，有效防御多种3D对抗攻击，代码已开源验证实用性。

search_text: IF-Defense: 3D Adversarial Point Cloud Defense via Implicit Function based Restoration IF-Defense：通过基于隐式函数的恢复进行 3D 对抗性点云防御 Point cloud is an important 3D data representation widely used in many essential applications. Leveraging deep neural networks, recent works have shown great success in processing 3D point clouds. However, those deep neural networks are vulnerable to various 3D adversarial attacks, which can be summarized as two primary types: point perturbation that affects local point distribution, and surface distortion that causes dramatic changes in geometry. In this paper, we simultaneously address both the aforementioned attacks by learning to restore the clean point clouds from the attacked ones. More specifically, we propose an IF-Defense framework to directly optimize the coordinates of input points with geometry-aware and distribution-aware constraints. The former aims to recover the surface of point cloud through implicit function, while the latter encourages evenly-distributed points. Our experimental results show that IF-Defense achieves the state-of-the-art defense performance against existing 3D adversarial attacks on PointNet, PointNet++, DGCNN, PointConv and RS-CNN. For example, compared with previous methods, IF-Defense presents 20.02% improvement in classification accuracy against salient point dropping attack and 16.29% against LG-GAN attack on PointNet. Our code is available at https://github.com/Wuziyi616/IF-Defense. 点云是一种重要的 3D 数据表示形式，广泛应用于许多重要应用中。利用深度神经网络，最近的工作在处理 3D 点云方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些深度神经网络很容易受到各种 3D 对抗性攻击，这些攻击可以概括为两种主要类型：影响局部点分布的点扰动和导致几何形状发生巨大变化的表面扭曲。在本文中，我们通过学习从受攻击的点云恢复干净的点云来同时解决上述两种攻击。更具体地说，我们提出了一个 IF-Defense 框架，通过几何感知和分布感知约束直接优化输入点的坐标。前者旨在通过隐函数恢复点云表面，而后者则鼓励均匀分布的点。我们的实验结果表明，IF-Defense 针对 PointNet、PointNet++、DGCNN、PointConv 和 RS-CNN 上现有的 3D 对抗攻击实现了最先进的防御性能。例如，与之前的方法相比，IF-Defense 在针对 PointNet 上的显着点丢弃攻击的分类准确度上提高了 20.02%，在针对 LG-GAN 攻击的分类准确率上提高了 16.29%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Wuziyi616/IF-Defense 获取。 本文提出IF-Defense框架，通过隐式函数恢复受3D对抗攻击污染的点云数据，提升模型鲁棒性。 Ziyi Wu,Yueqi Duan,He Wang,Qingnan Fan,Leonidas J. Guibas cs.CV

title: Boosting Continuous Sign Language Recognition via Cross Modality Augmentation
title_zh: 通过跨模态增强增强连续手语识别
abstract: Continuous sign language recognition (SLR) deals with unaligned video-text pair and uses the word error rate (WER), i.e., edit distance, as the main evaluation metric. Since it is not differentiable, we usually instead optimize the learning model with the connectionist temporal classification (CTC) objective loss, which maximizes the posterior probability over the sequential alignment. Due to the optimization gap, the predicted sentence with the highest decoding probability may not be the best choice under the WER metric. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel architecture with cross modality augmentation. Specifically, we first augment cross-modal data by simulating the calculation procedure of WER, i.e., substitution, deletion and insertion on both text label and its corresponding video. With these real and generated pseudo video-text pairs, we propose multiple loss terms to minimize the cross modality distance between the video and ground truth label, and make the network distinguish the difference between real and pseudo modalities. The proposed framework can be easily extended to other existing CTC based continuous SLR architectures. Extensive experiments on two continuous SLR benchmarks, i.e., RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather and CSL, validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Continuous sign language recognition (SLR) deals with unaligned video-text pair and uses the word error rate (WER), i.e., edit distance, as the main evaluation metric. Since it is not differentiable, we usually instead optimize the learning model with the connectionist temporal classification (CTC) objective loss, which maximizes the posterior probability over the sequential alignment. Due to the optimization gap, the predicted sentence with the highest decoding probability may not be the best choice under the WER metric. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel architecture with cross modality augmentation. Specifically, we first augment cross-modal data by simulating the calculation procedure of WER, i.e., substitution, deletion and insertion on both text label and its corresponding video. With these real and generated pseudo video-text pairs, we propose multiple loss terms to minimize the cross modality distance between the video and ground truth label, and make the network distinguish the difference between real and pseudo modalities. The proposed framework can be easily extended to other existing CTC based continuous SLR architectures. Extensive experiments on two continuous SLR benchmarks, i.e., RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather and CSL, validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 连续手语识别（SLR）处理未对齐的视频文本对，并使用误词率（WER）（即编辑距离）作为主要评估指标。由于它是不可微的，我们通常使用连接主义时间分类（CTC）目标损失来优化学习模型，这最大化了顺序对齐的后验概率。由于优化差距，具有最高解码概率的预测句子可能不是 WER 指标下的最佳选择。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有跨模态增强的新颖架构。具体来说，我们首先通过模拟 WER 的计算过程来增强跨模态数据，即在文本标签及其相应视频上进行替换、删除和插入。利用这些真实的和生成的伪视频文本对，我们提出了多个损失项来最小化视频和地面真实标签之间的交叉模态距离，并使网络区分真实模态和伪模态之间的差异。所提出的框架可以轻松扩展到其他现有的基于 CTC 的连续 SLR 架构。对两个连续 SLR 基准（即 RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather 和 CSL）的大量实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过跨模态增强提升连续手语识别（SLR）性能的新方法，解决传统CTC优化与WER指标间的差距问题。
AI.motivation: 连续手语识别中传统CTC损失与WER指标存在优化差距，导致预测结果可能非最优，需通过跨模态数据增强改进模型对齐能力。
AI.method: 模拟WER计算过程生成伪视频-文本对，设计多损失项最小化跨模态距离，并训练网络区分真实与伪模态数据。
AI.result: 在RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather和CSL数据集上验证，所提方法有效提升连续SLR性能，且可扩展至其他CTC架构。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态增强框架有效缩小CTC优化与WER指标差距，为连续SLR提供新思路并具有良好的扩展性。

authors_text: Chao Ma,Guohua Gu,Xin Miao,Minjie Wan,Weixian Qian,Kan Ren,Qian Chen
title: Infrared target tracking based on proximal robust principal component analysis method
title_zh: 基于近端鲁棒主成分分析方法的红外目标跟踪
abstract: Infrared target tracking plays an important role in both civil and military fields. The main challenges in designing a robust and high-precision tracker for infrared sequences include overlap, occlusion and appearance change. To this end, this paper proposes an infrared target tracker based on proximal robust principal component analysis method. Firstly, the observation matrix is decomposed into a sparse occlusion matrix and a low-rank target matrix, and the constraint optimization is carried out with an approaching proximal norm which is better than L1-norm. To solve this convex optimization problem, Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) is employed to estimate the variables alternately. Finally, the framework of particle filter with model update strategy is exploited to locate the target. Through a series of experiments on real infrared target sequences, the effectiveness and robustness of our algorithm are proved.
summary: Infrared target tracking plays an important role in both civil and military fields. The main challenges in designing a robust and high-precision tracker for infrared sequences include overlap, occlusion and appearance change. To this end, this paper proposes an infrared target tracker based on proximal robust principal component analysis method. Firstly, the observation matrix is decomposed into a sparse occlusion matrix and a low-rank target matrix, and the constraint optimization is carried out with an approaching proximal norm which is better than L1-norm. To solve this convex optimization problem, Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) is employed to estimate the variables alternately. Finally, the framework of particle filter with model update strategy is exploited to locate the target. Through a series of experiments on real infrared target sequences, the effectiveness and robustness of our algorithm are proved.
abstract_zh: 红外目标跟踪在民用和军事领域都发挥着重要作用。设计稳健且高精度的红外序列跟踪器的主要挑战包括重叠、遮挡和外观变化。为此，本文提出一种基于近端鲁棒主成分分析方法的红外目标跟踪器。首先，将观测矩阵分解为稀疏遮挡矩阵和低秩目标矩阵，并用优于L1范数的逼近近端范数进行约束优化。为了解决这个凸优化问题，采用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）来交替估计变量。最后，利用具有模型更新策略的粒子滤波器框架来定位目标。通过对真实红外目标序列的一系列实验，证明了算法的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于近端鲁棒主成分分析方法的红外目标跟踪算法，以解决遮挡、重叠和外观变化等挑战。
AI.motivation: 红外目标跟踪在军事和民用领域至关重要，但现有方法在处理遮挡、目标重叠及外观变化时存在鲁棒性不足的问题。
AI.method: 将观测矩阵分解为稀疏遮挡矩阵和低秩目标矩阵，采用近端范数约束优化，并结合ADMM算法求解，最后通过带模型更新策略的粒子滤波框架定位目标。
AI.result: 在真实红外序列实验中验证了算法的有效性和鲁棒性，能够准确跟踪目标并适应外观变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合鲁棒主成分分析与粒子滤波，显著提升了红外目标跟踪的精度和稳定性。

search_text: Infrared target tracking based on proximal robust principal component analysis method 基于近端鲁棒主成分分析方法的红外目标跟踪 Infrared target tracking plays an important role in both civil and military fields. The main challenges in designing a robust and high-precision tracker for infrared sequences include overlap, occlusion and appearance change. To this end, this paper proposes an infrared target tracker based on proximal robust principal component analysis method. Firstly, the observation matrix is decomposed into a sparse occlusion matrix and a low-rank target matrix, and the constraint optimization is carried out with an approaching proximal norm which is better than L1-norm. To solve this convex optimization problem, Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) is employed to estimate the variables alternately. Finally, the framework of particle filter with model update strategy is exploited to locate the target. Through a series of experiments on real infrared target sequences, the effectiveness and robustness of our algorithm are proved. 红外目标跟踪在民用和军事领域都发挥着重要作用。设计稳健且高精度的红外序列跟踪器的主要挑战包括重叠、遮挡和外观变化。为此，本文提出一种基于近端鲁棒主成分分析方法的红外目标跟踪器。首先，将观测矩阵分解为稀疏遮挡矩阵和低秩目标矩阵，并用优于L1范数的逼近近端范数进行约束优化。为了解决这个凸优化问题，采用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）来交替估计变量。最后，利用具有模型更新策略的粒子滤波器框架来定位目标。通过对真实红外目标序列的一系列实验，证明了算法的有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种基于近端鲁棒主成分分析方法的红外目标跟踪算法，以解决遮挡、重叠和外观变化等挑战。 Chao Ma,Guohua Gu,Xin Miao,Minjie Wan,Weixian Qian,Kan Ren,Qian Chen cs.CV

title: Shape-aware Generative Adversarial Networks for Attribute Transfer
title_zh: 用于属性传输的形状感知生成对抗网络
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been successfully applied to transfer visual attributes in many domains, including that of human face images. This success is partly attributable to the facts that human faces have similar shapes and the positions of eyes, noses, and mouths are fixed among different people. Attribute transfer is more challenging when the source and target domain share different shapes. In this paper, we introduce a shape-aware GAN model that is able to preserve shape when transferring attributes, and propose its application to some real-world domains. Compared to other state-of-art GANs-based image-to-image translation models, the model we propose is able to generate more visually appealing results while maintaining the quality of results from transfer learning.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been successfully applied to transfer visual attributes in many domains, including that of human face images. This success is partly attributable to the facts that human faces have similar shapes and the positions of eyes, noses, and mouths are fixed among different people. Attribute transfer is more challenging when the source and target domain share different shapes. In this paper, we introduce a shape-aware GAN model that is able to preserve shape when transferring attributes, and propose its application to some real-world domains. Compared to other state-of-art GANs-based image-to-image translation models, the model we propose is able to generate more visually appealing results while maintaining the quality of results from transfer learning.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）已成功应用于许多领域的视觉属性传输，包括人脸图像的视觉属性。这一成功的部分原因在于人脸形状相似，而且不同人的眼睛、鼻子和嘴巴的位置是固定的。当源域和目标域共享不同形状时，属性转移更具挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种形状感知 GAN 模型，该模型能够在传输属性时保留形状，并提出其在一些现实世界领域的应用。与其他最先进的基于 GAN 的图像到图像翻译模型相比，我们提出的模型能够生成更具视觉吸引力的结果，同时保持迁移学习结果的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种形状感知的生成对抗网络（Shape-aware GAN），用于在不同形状域之间进行视觉属性迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN在人脸等形状固定的领域表现良好，但面对源域与目标域形状差异较大的场景时，属性迁移效果不佳，需保留目标形状特征。
AI.method: 设计形状感知的生成对抗网络，通过约束生成过程保留目标域形状结构，同时实现属性迁移，并应用于现实场景验证。
AI.result: 相比现有图像翻译模型，在保持形状结构的同时生成更具视觉吸引力的结果，且迁移质量优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 形状感知机制有效解决了跨域属性迁移中的形状失真问题，为复杂场景的视觉属性编辑提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yutai Hou,Yongkui Lai,Yushan Wu,Wanxiang Che,Ting Liu
title: Few-shot Learning for Multi-label Intent Detection
title_zh: 用于多标签意图检测的少样本学习
abstract: In this paper, we study the few-shot multi-label classification for user intent detection. For multi-label intent detection, state-of-the-art work estimates label-instance relevance scores and uses a threshold to select multiple associated intent labels. To determine appropriate thresholds with only a few examples, we first learn universal thresholding experience on data-rich domains, and then adapt the thresholds to certain few-shot domains with a calibration based on nonparametric learning. For better calculation of label-instance relevance score, we introduce label name embedding as anchor points in representation space, which refines representations of different classes to be well-separated from each other. Experiments on two datasets show that the proposed model significantly outperforms strong baselines in both one-shot and five-shot settings.
summary: In this paper, we study the few-shot multi-label classification for user intent detection. For multi-label intent detection, state-of-the-art work estimates label-instance relevance scores and uses a threshold to select multiple associated intent labels. To determine appropriate thresholds with only a few examples, we first learn universal thresholding experience on data-rich domains, and then adapt the thresholds to certain few-shot domains with a calibration based on nonparametric learning. For better calculation of label-instance relevance score, we introduce label name embedding as anchor points in representation space, which refines representations of different classes to be well-separated from each other. Experiments on two datasets show that the proposed model significantly outperforms strong baselines in both one-shot and five-shot settings.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了用于用户意图检测的少样本多标签分类。对于多标签意图检测，最先进的工作估计标签实例相关性分数，并使用阈值来选择多个关联的意图标签。为了仅用几个例子来确定适当的阈值，我们首先学习数据丰富领域的通用阈值经验，然后通过基于非参数学习的校准将阈值调整到某些少样本领域。为了更好地计算标签实例相关性得分，我们引入标签名称嵌入作为表示空间中的锚点，这细化了不同类的表示以使其彼此很好地分离。对两个数据集的实验表明，所提出的模型在单次和五次设置中均显着优于强基线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在少量样本情况下，如何有效进行多标签用户意图检测的少样本学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在少量样本时难以确定合适的阈值，导致多标签意图检测性能下降，需提出自适应阈值与优化标签相关性计算的方法。
AI.method: 通过在数据丰富领域学习通用阈值并结合非参数校准适应少样本领域，同时引入标签名称嵌入作为锚点优化类别表示分离度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在两个数据集的one-shot和five-shot设置中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型有效解决了少样本多标签意图检测中的阈值自适应与表示优化问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Alexander Berndt,Niels Van Duijkeren,Luigi Palmieri,Tamas Keviczky
title: A Feedback Scheme to Reorder a Multi-Agent Execution Schedule by Persistently Optimizing a Switchable Action Dependency Graph
title_zh: 一种通过持续优化可切换动作依赖图来重新排序多代理执行计划的反馈方案
abstract: In this paper we consider multiple Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) navigating a common workspace to fulfill various intralogistics tasks, typically formulated as the Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) problem. To keep plan execution deadlock-free, one approach is to construct an Action Dependency Graph (ADG) which encodes the ordering of AGVs as they proceed along their routes. Using this method, delayed AGVs occasionally require others to wait for them at intersections, thereby affecting the plan execution efficiency. If the workspace is shared by dynamic obstacles such as humans or third party robots, AGVs can experience large delays. A common mitigation approach is to re-solve the MAPF using the current, delayed AGV positions. However, solving the MAPF is time-consuming, making this approach inefficient, especially for large AGV teams. In this work, we present an online method to repeatedly modify a given acyclic ADG to minimize route completion times of each AGV. Our approach persistently maintains an acyclic ADG, necessary for deadlock-free plan execution. We evaluate the approach by considering simulations with random disturbances on the execution and show faster route completion times compared to the baseline ADG-based execution management approach.
summary: In this paper we consider multiple Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) navigating a common workspace to fulfill various intralogistics tasks, typically formulated as the Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) problem. To keep plan execution deadlock-free, one approach is to construct an Action Dependency Graph (ADG) which encodes the ordering of AGVs as they proceed along their routes. Using this method, delayed AGVs occasionally require others to wait for them at intersections, thereby affecting the plan execution efficiency. If the workspace is shared by dynamic obstacles such as humans or third party robots, AGVs can experience large delays. A common mitigation approach is to re-solve the MAPF using the current, delayed AGV positions. However, solving the MAPF is time-consuming, making this approach inefficient, especially for large AGV teams. In this work, we present an online method to repeatedly modify a given acyclic ADG to minimize route completion times of each AGV. Our approach persistently maintains an acyclic ADG, necessary for deadlock-free plan execution. We evaluate the approach by considering simulations with random disturbances on the execution and show faster route completion times compared to the baseline ADG-based execution management approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑多个自动导引车（AGV）在一个公共工作空间中导航来完成各种内部物流任务，通常被表述为多代理路径查找（MAPF）问题。为了保持计划执行无死锁，一种方法是构建一个动作依赖图 (ADG)，该图对 AGV 沿其路线行进时的顺序进行编码。使用这种方法，延迟的AGV有时需要其他人在路口等待，从而影响计划执行效率。如果工作空间由人类或第三方机器人等动态障碍物共享，AGV 可能会遇到很大的延迟。常见的缓解方法是使用当前延迟的 AGV 位置重新求解 MAPF。然而，求解 MAPF 非常耗时，使得这种方法效率低下，尤其是对于大型 AGV 团队。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在线方法来重复修改给定的非循环 ADG，以最大限度地减少每个 AGV 的路线完成时间。我们的方法持续维护非循环 ADG，这是无死锁计划执行所必需的。我们通过考虑对执行进行随机干扰的模拟来评估该方法，并显示与基于 ADG 的基线执行管理方法相比更快的路线完成时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线方法，通过持续优化可切换的动作依赖图（ADG）来重新排序多智能体执行计划，以提高自动导引车（AGV）的路径完成效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于ADG的多AGV调度方法在动态障碍物导致延迟时，需重新求解MAPF问题，效率低下且计算成本高。
AI.method: 设计一种持续维护无环ADG的在线优化方案，通过动态调整动作依赖关系最小化各AGV路径完成时间，无需重新求解全局MAPF。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在随机干扰场景下相比基线ADG方法实现了更短的路径完成时间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过局部动态优化ADG有效提升了多AGV系统的执行效率，为大规模动态环境下的调度提供了可行方案。

search_text: A Feedback Scheme to Reorder a Multi-Agent Execution Schedule by Persistently Optimizing a Switchable Action Dependency Graph 一种通过持续优化可切换动作依赖图来重新排序多代理执行计划的反馈方案 In this paper we consider multiple Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) navigating a common workspace to fulfill various intralogistics tasks, typically formulated as the Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) problem. To keep plan execution deadlock-free, one approach is to construct an Action Dependency Graph (ADG) which encodes the ordering of AGVs as they proceed along their routes. Using this method, delayed AGVs occasionally require others to wait for them at intersections, thereby affecting the plan execution efficiency. If the workspace is shared by dynamic obstacles such as humans or third party robots, AGVs can experience large delays. A common mitigation approach is to re-solve the MAPF using the current, delayed AGV positions. However, solving the MAPF is time-consuming, making this approach inefficient, especially for large AGV teams. In this work, we present an online method to repeatedly modify a given acyclic ADG to minimize route completion times of each AGV. Our approach persistently maintains an acyclic ADG, necessary for deadlock-free plan execution. We evaluate the approach by considering simulations with random disturbances on the execution and show faster route completion times compared to the baseline ADG-based execution management approach. 在本文中，我们考虑多个自动导引车（AGV）在一个公共工作空间中导航来完成各种内部物流任务，通常被表述为多代理路径查找（MAPF）问题。为了保持计划执行无死锁，一种方法是构建一个动作依赖图 (ADG)，该图对 AGV 沿其路线行进时的顺序进行编码。使用这种方法，延迟的AGV有时需要其他人在路口等待，从而影响计划执行效率。如果工作空间由人类或第三方机器人等动态障碍物共享，AGV 可能会遇到很大的延迟。常见的缓解方法是使用当前延迟的 AGV 位置重新求解 MAPF。然而，求解 MAPF 非常耗时，使得这种方法效率低下，尤其是对于大型 AGV 团队。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在线方法来重复修改给定的非循环 ADG，以最大限度地减少每个 AGV 的路线完成时间。我们的方法持续维护非循环 ADG，这是无死锁计划执行所必需的。我们通过考虑对执行进行随机干扰的模拟来评估该方法，并显示与基于 ADG 的基线执行管理方法相比更快的路线完成时间。 本文提出一种在线方法，通过持续优化可切换的动作依赖图（ADG）来重新排序多智能体执行计划，以提高自动导引车（AGV）的路径完成效率。 Alexander Berndt,Niels Van Duijkeren,Luigi Palmieri,Tamas Keviczky cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Jian Liang,Yuren Cao,Shuang Li,Bing Bai,Hao Li,Fei Wang,Kun Bai
title: Domain Agnostic Learning for Unbiased Authentication
title_zh: 用于公正身份验证的领域无关学习
abstract: Authentication is the task of confirming the matching relationship between a data instance and a given identity. Typical examples of authentication problems include face recognition and person re-identification. Data-driven authentication could be affected by undesired biases, i.e., the models are often trained in one domain (e.g., for people wearing spring outfits) while applied in other domains (e.g., they change the clothes to summer outfits). Previous works have made efforts to eliminate domain-difference. They typically assume domain annotations are provided, and all the domains share classes. However, for authentication, there could be a large number of domains shared by different identities/classes, and it is impossible to annotate these domains exhaustively. It could make domain-difference challenging to model and eliminate. In this paper, we propose a domain-agnostic method that eliminates domain-difference without domain labels. We alternately perform latent domain discovery and domain-difference elimination until our model no longer detects domain-difference. In our approach, the latent domains are discovered by learning the heterogeneous predictive relationships between inputs and outputs. Then domain-difference is eliminated in both class-dependent and class-independent spaces to improve robustness of elimination. We further extend our method to a meta-learning framework to pursue more thorough domain-difference elimination. Comprehensive empirical evaluation results are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our proposed method.
summary: Authentication is the task of confirming the matching relationship between a data instance and a given identity. Typical examples of authentication problems include face recognition and person re-identification. Data-driven authentication could be affected by undesired biases, i.e., the models are often trained in one domain (e.g., for people wearing spring outfits) while applied in other domains (e.g., they change the clothes to summer outfits). Previous works have made efforts to eliminate domain-difference. They typically assume domain annotations are provided, and all the domains share classes. However, for authentication, there could be a large number of domains shared by different identities/classes, and it is impossible to annotate these domains exhaustively. It could make domain-difference challenging to model and eliminate. In this paper, we propose a domain-agnostic method that eliminates domain-difference without domain labels. We alternately perform latent domain discovery and domain-difference elimination until our model no longer detects domain-difference. In our approach, the latent domains are discovered by learning the heterogeneous predictive relationships between inputs and outputs. Then domain-difference is eliminated in both class-dependent and class-independent spaces to improve robustness of elimination. We further extend our method to a meta-learning framework to pursue more thorough domain-difference elimination. Comprehensive empirical evaluation results are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 身份验证是确认数据实例与给定身份之间的匹配关系的任务。身份验证问题的典型示例包括人脸识别和人员重新识别。数据驱动的身份验证可能会受到不良偏差的影响，即模型通常在一个领域（例如，对于穿着春季服装的人）进行训练，而应用于其他领域（例如，他们将衣服换成夏季服装）。以前的工作已经努力消除领域差异。他们通常假设提供了域注释，并且所有域共享类。然而，对于身份验证，可能存在由不同身份/类别共享的大量域，并且不可能详尽地注释这些域。它可能会使领域差异难以建模和消除。在本文中，我们提出了一种与领域无关的方法，可以在没有领域标签的情况下消除领域差异。我们交替执行潜在域发现和域差异消除，直到我们的模型不再检测到域差异。在我们的方法中，通过学习输入和输出之间的异构预测关系来发现潜在域。然后在类相关和类无关空间中消除域差异，以提高消除的鲁棒性。我们进一步将我们的方法扩展到元学习框架，以追求更彻底的领域差异消除。提供了综合的实证评估结果来证明我们提出的方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需领域标签的领域无关学习方法，用于解决身份验证任务中的领域偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖领域标注且假设所有领域共享类别，但实际身份验证场景中存在大量无法穷举的领域差异，导致模型鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 通过交替进行潜在领域发现与领域差异消除，利用输入输出间的异构预测关系，在类相关和类无关空间中双重消除领域差异，并扩展至元学习框架。
AI.result: 全面的实验验证了该方法在多个基准数据集上的有效性，优于现有领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的领域无关学习框架能有效消除未标注领域的偏差，显著提升身份验证模型的跨领域适应能力。
