authors_text: Balazs P. Vagvolgyi,Mikhail Khrenov,Jonathan Cope,Anton Deguet,Peter Kazanzides,Sajid Manzoor,Russell H. Taylor,Axel Krieger
title: Telerobotic Operation of Intensive Care Unit Ventilators
title_zh: 重症监护病房呼吸机的远程机器人操作
comment: 22 pages, 9 figures, 1 table; submitted to Frontiers in Robotics; in review
comments: 22 pages, 9 figures, 1 table; submitted to Frontiers in Robotics; in review
abstract: Since the first reports of a novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) in December 2019, over 33 million people have been infected worldwide and approximately 1 million people worldwide have died from the disease caused by this virus, COVID-19. In the US alone, there have been approximately 7 million cases and over 200,000 deaths. This outbreak has placed an enormous strain on healthcare systems and workers. Severe cases require hospital care, and 8.5\% of patients require mechanical ventilation in an intensive care unit (ICU). One major challenge is the necessity for clinical care personnel to don and doff cumbersome personal protective equipment (PPE) in order to enter an ICU unit to make simple adjustments to ventilator settings. Although future ventilators and other ICU equipment may be controllable remotely through computer networks, the enormous installed base of existing ventilators do not have this capability. This paper reports the development of a simple, low cost telerobotic system that permits adjustment of ventilator settings from outside the ICU. The system consists of a small Cartesian robot capable of operating a ventilator touch screen with camera vision control via a wirelessly connected tablet master device located outside the room. Engineering system tests demonstrated that the open-loop mechanical repeatability of the device was 7.5\,mm, and that the average positioning error of the robotic finger under visual servoing control was 5.94\,mm. Successful usability tests in a simulated ICU environment were carried out and are reported. In addition to enabling a significant reduction in PPE consumption, the prototype system has been shown in a preliminary evaluation to significantly reduce the total time required for a respiratory therapist to perform typical setting adjustments on a commercial ventilator, including donning and doffing PPE, from 271 seconds to 109 seconds.
summary: Since the first reports of a novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) in December 2019, over 33 million people have been infected worldwide and approximately 1 million people worldwide have died from the disease caused by this virus, COVID-19. In the US alone, there have been approximately 7 million cases and over 200,000 deaths. This outbreak has placed an enormous strain on healthcare systems and workers. Severe cases require hospital care, and 8.5\% of patients require mechanical ventilation in an intensive care unit (ICU). One major challenge is the necessity for clinical care personnel to don and doff cumbersome personal protective equipment (PPE) in order to enter an ICU unit to make simple adjustments to ventilator settings. Although future ventilators and other ICU equipment may be controllable remotely through computer networks, the enormous installed base of existing ventilators do not have this capability. This paper reports the development of a simple, low cost telerobotic system that permits adjustment of ventilator settings from outside the ICU. The system consists of a small Cartesian robot capable of operating a ventilator touch screen with camera vision control via a wirelessly connected tablet master device located outside the room. Engineering system tests demonstrated that the open-loop mechanical repeatability of the device was 7.5\,mm, and that the average positioning error of the robotic finger under visual servoing control was 5.94\,mm. Successful usability tests in a simulated ICU environment were carried out and are reported. In addition to enabling a significant reduction in PPE consumption, the prototype system has been shown in a preliminary evaluation to significantly reduce the total time required for a respiratory therapist to perform typical setting adjustments on a commercial ventilator, including donning and doffing PPE, from 271 seconds to 109 seconds.
abstract_zh: 自 2019 年 12 月首次报告新型冠状病毒 (SARS-CoV-2) 以来，全球已有超过 3300 万人被感染，全球约有 100 万人死于这种病毒 (COVID-19) 引起的疾病。仅在美国，就有大约 700 万例病例，超过 20 万人死亡。这次疫情给医疗系统和工作人员带来了巨大压力。严重病例需要住院治疗，8.5%的患者需要在重症监护病房（ICU）接受机械通气。一项主要挑战是临床护理人员必须穿戴和脱下笨重的个人防护装备 (PPE)，才能进入 ICU 病房对呼吸机设置进行简单调整。尽管未来的呼吸机和其他 ICU 设备可以通过计算机网络进行远程控制，但现有呼吸机的庞大安装基础不具备此功能。本文报告了一种简单、低成本的远程机器人系统的开发，该系统允许从 ICU 外部调整呼吸机设置。该系统由一个小型笛卡尔机器人组成，能够通过位于房间外的无线连接平板电脑主设备来操作带有摄像头视觉控制的呼吸机触摸屏。工程系统测试表明，该装置开环机械重复精度为7.5mm，视觉伺服控制下机械手指的平均定位误差为5.94mm。在模拟 ICU 环境中进行了成功的可用性测试并进行了报告。除了能够显着减少个人防护装备的消耗之外，初步评估表明，该原型系统可显着减少呼吸治疗师对商用呼吸机进行典型设置调整（包括穿戴和脱下个人防护装备）所需的总时间，从 271 秒缩短到 109 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种低成本的远程机器人系统，用于从ICU外部调整呼吸机设置。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致医护人员需频繁穿戴和脱下防护装备，增加了感染风险并浪费时间，亟需远程操作解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于笛卡尔坐标机器人的系统，通过无线连接的平板电脑和摄像头视觉控制，远程操作呼吸机触摸屏。
AI.result: 系统机械重复定位误差为7.5毫米，视觉伺服控制下平均定位误差5.94毫米；调整呼吸机设置时间从271秒缩短至109秒。
AI.conclusion: 该系统显著减少防护装备消耗和操作时间，提升ICU护理效率与医护人员安全。

ai_content.tldr: 本文开发了一种低成本的远程机器人系统，用于从ICU外部调整呼吸机设置。
ai_content.motivation: 新冠疫情导致医护人员需频繁穿戴和脱下防护装备，增加了感染风险并浪费时间，亟需远程操作解决方案。
ai_content.method: 设计基于笛卡尔坐标机器人的系统，通过无线连接的平板电脑和摄像头视觉控制，远程操作呼吸机触摸屏。
ai_content.result: 系统机械重复定位误差为7.5毫米，视觉伺服控制下平均定位误差5.94毫米；调整呼吸机设置时间从271秒缩短至109秒。
ai_content.conclusion: 该系统显著减少防护装备消耗和操作时间，提升ICU护理效率与医护人员安全。

search_text: Telerobotic Operation of Intensive Care Unit Ventilators 重症监护病房呼吸机的远程机器人操作 Since the first reports of a novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) in December 2019, over 33 million people have been infected worldwide and approximately 1 million people worldwide have died from the disease caused by this virus, COVID-19. In the US alone, there have been approximately 7 million cases and over 200,000 deaths. This outbreak has placed an enormous strain on healthcare systems and workers. Severe cases require hospital care, and 8.5\% of patients require mechanical ventilation in an intensive care unit (ICU). One major challenge is the necessity for clinical care personnel to don and doff cumbersome personal protective equipment (PPE) in order to enter an ICU unit to make simple adjustments to ventilator settings. Although future ventilators and other ICU equipment may be controllable remotely through computer networks, the enormous installed base of existing ventilators do not have this capability. This paper reports the development of a simple, low cost telerobotic system that permits adjustment of ventilator settings from outside the ICU. The system consists of a small Cartesian robot capable of operating a ventilator touch screen with camera vision control via a wirelessly connected tablet master device located outside the room. Engineering system tests demonstrated that the open-loop mechanical repeatability of the device was 7.5\,mm, and that the average positioning error of the robotic finger under visual servoing control was 5.94\,mm. Successful usability tests in a simulated ICU environment were carried out and are reported. In addition to enabling a significant reduction in PPE consumption, the prototype system has been shown in a preliminary evaluation to significantly reduce the total time required for a respiratory therapist to perform typical setting adjustments on a commercial ventilator, including donning and doffing PPE, from 271 seconds to 109 seconds. 自 2019 年 12 月首次报告新型冠状病毒 (SARS-CoV-2) 以来，全球已有超过 3300 万人被感染，全球约有 100 万人死于这种病毒 (COVID-19) 引起的疾病。仅在美国，就有大约 700 万例病例，超过 20 万人死亡。这次疫情给医疗系统和工作人员带来了巨大压力。严重病例需要住院治疗，8.5%的患者需要在重症监护病房（ICU）接受机械通气。一项主要挑战是临床护理人员必须穿戴和脱下笨重的个人防护装备 (PPE)，才能进入 ICU 病房对呼吸机设置进行简单调整。尽管未来的呼吸机和其他 ICU 设备可以通过计算机网络进行远程控制，但现有呼吸机的庞大安装基础不具备此功能。本文报告了一种简单、低成本的远程机器人系统的开发，该系统允许从 ICU 外部调整呼吸机设置。该系统由一个小型笛卡尔机器人组成，能够通过位于房间外的无线连接平板电脑主设备来操作带有摄像头视觉控制的呼吸机触摸屏。工程系统测试表明，该装置开环机械重复精度为7.5mm，视觉伺服控制下机械手指的平均定位误差为5.94mm。在模拟 ICU 环境中进行了成功的可用性测试并进行了报告。除了能够显着减少个人防护装备的消耗之外，初步评估表明，该原型系统可显着减少呼吸治疗师对商用呼吸机进行典型设置调整（包括穿戴和脱下个人防护装备）所需的总时间，从 271 秒缩短到 109 秒。 本文开发了一种低成本的远程机器人系统，用于从ICU外部调整呼吸机设置。 Balazs P. Vagvolgyi,Mikhail Khrenov,Jonathan Cope,Anton Deguet,Peter Kazanzides,Sajid Manzoor,Russell H. Taylor,Axel Krieger cs.RO

title: Data Agnostic RoBERTa-based Natural Language to SQL Query Generation
title_zh: 与数据无关的基于 RoBERTa 的自然语言到 SQL 查询生成
abstract: Relational databases are among the most widely used architectures to store massive amounts of data in the modern world. However, there is a barrier between these databases and the average user. The user often lacks the knowledge of a query language such as SQL required to interact with the database. The NL2SQL task aims at finding deep learning approaches to solve this problem by converting natural language questions into valid SQL queries. Given the sensitive nature of some databases and the growing need for data privacy, we have presented an approach with data privacy at its core. We have passed RoBERTa embeddings and data-agnostic knowledge vectors into LSTM based submodels to predict the final query. Although we have not achieved state of the art results, we have eliminated the need for the table data, right from the training of the model, and have achieved a test set execution accuracy of 76.7%. By eliminating the table data dependency while training we have created a model capable of zero shot learning based on the natural language question and table schema alone.
summary: Relational databases are among the most widely used architectures to store massive amounts of data in the modern world. However, there is a barrier between these databases and the average user. The user often lacks the knowledge of a query language such as SQL required to interact with the database. The NL2SQL task aims at finding deep learning approaches to solve this problem by converting natural language questions into valid SQL queries. Given the sensitive nature of some databases and the growing need for data privacy, we have presented an approach with data privacy at its core. We have passed RoBERTa embeddings and data-agnostic knowledge vectors into LSTM based submodels to predict the final query. Although we have not achieved state of the art results, we have eliminated the need for the table data, right from the training of the model, and have achieved a test set execution accuracy of 76.7%. By eliminating the table data dependency while training we have created a model capable of zero shot learning based on the natural language question and table schema alone.
abstract_zh: 关系数据库是现代世界中使用最广泛的存储大量数据的架构之一。然而，这些数据库与普通用户之间存在着障碍。用户通常缺乏与数据库交互所需的查询语言（例如 SQL）的知识。 NL2SQL 任务旨在通过将自然语言问题转换为有效的 SQL 查询来寻找深度学习方法来解决此问题。鉴于某些数据库的敏感性以及对数据隐私日益增长的需求，我们提出了一种以数据隐私为核心的方法。我们已将 RoBERTa 嵌入和与数据无关的知识向量传递到基于 LSTM 的子模型中以预测最终查询。尽管我们还没有取得最先进的结果，但我们从模型的训练中就消除了对表数据的需求，并实现了 76.7% 的测试集执行精度。通过在训练时消除表数据依赖性，我们创建了一个能够仅基于自然语言问题和表模式进行零样本学习的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RoBERTa的自然语言到SQL查询生成方法，无需依赖具体数据库表数据，通过结合数据无关的知识向量和LSTM模型实现零样本学习。
AI.motivation: 传统NL2SQL方法依赖数据库表数据进行训练，可能泄露敏感信息且限制模型泛化能力。为解决数据隐私问题并提升模型适应性，需开发无需表数据的生成方法。
AI.method: 将RoBERTa嵌入与数据无关的知识向量输入LSTM子模型，利用自然语言问题和表结构进行训练，完全消除对表数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在测试集上实现76.7%的执行准确率，验证了模型在无表数据训练下的有效性，但未达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过零样本学习机制实现了数据隐私保护，为NL2SQL任务提供了新思路，但需进一步优化以提升准确率。

authors_text: Bogdan Grechuk,Alexander N. Gorban,Ivan Y. Tyukin
title: General stochastic separation theorems with optimal bounds
title_zh: 具有最优界限的一般随机分离定理
comment: Numerical examples and illustrations are added, minor corrections extended discussion and the bibliography
comments: Numerical examples and illustrations are added, minor corrections extended discussion and the bibliography
abstract: Phenomenon of stochastic separability was revealed and used in machine learning to correct errors of Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems and analyze AI instabilities. In high-dimensional datasets under broad assumptions each point can be separated from the rest of the set by simple and robust Fisher's discriminant (is Fisher separable). Errors or clusters of errors can be separated from the rest of the data. The ability to correct an AI system also opens up the possibility of an attack on it, and the high dimensionality induces vulnerabilities caused by the same stochastic separability that holds the keys to understanding the fundamentals of robustness and adaptivity in high-dimensional data-driven AI. To manage errors and analyze vulnerabilities, the stochastic separation theorems should evaluate the probability that the dataset will be Fisher separable in given dimensionality and for a given class of distributions. Explicit and optimal estimates of these separation probabilities are required, and this problem is solved in present work. The general stochastic separation theorems with optimal probability estimates are obtained for important classes of distributions: log-concave distribution, their convex combinations and product distributions. The standard i.i.d. assumption was significantly relaxed. These theorems and estimates can be used both for correction of high-dimensional data driven AI systems and for analysis of their vulnerabilities. The third area of application is the emergence of memories in ensembles of neurons, the phenomena of grandmother's cells and sparse coding in the brain, and explanation of unexpected effectiveness of small neural ensembles in high-dimensional brain.
summary: Phenomenon of stochastic separability was revealed and used in machine learning to correct errors of Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems and analyze AI instabilities. In high-dimensional datasets under broad assumptions each point can be separated from the rest of the set by simple and robust Fisher's discriminant (is Fisher separable). Errors or clusters of errors can be separated from the rest of the data. The ability to correct an AI system also opens up the possibility of an attack on it, and the high dimensionality induces vulnerabilities caused by the same stochastic separability that holds the keys to understanding the fundamentals of robustness and adaptivity in high-dimensional data-driven AI. To manage errors and analyze vulnerabilities, the stochastic separation theorems should evaluate the probability that the dataset will be Fisher separable in given dimensionality and for a given class of distributions. Explicit and optimal estimates of these separation probabilities are required, and this problem is solved in present work. The general stochastic separation theorems with optimal probability estimates are obtained for important classes of distributions: log-concave distribution, their convex combinations and product distributions. The standard i.i.d. assumption was significantly relaxed. These theorems and estimates can be used both for correction of high-dimensional data driven AI systems and for analysis of their vulnerabilities. The third area of application is the emergence of memories in ensembles of neurons, the phenomena of grandmother's cells and sparse coding in the brain, and explanation of unexpected effectiveness of small neural ensembles in high-dimensional brain.
abstract_zh: 随机分离现象被揭示并用于机器学习，以纠正人工智能（AI）系统的错误并分析人工智能的不稳定性。在广泛假设下的高维数据集中，每个点都可以通过简单且稳健的费舍尔判别式（费舍尔可分离）与集合的其余部分分开。错误或错误簇可以与其余数据分开。纠正人工智能系统的能力也开启了对其进行攻击的可能性，而高维性会导致由相同的随机可分离性引起的漏洞，而随机可分离性是理解高维数据驱动人工智能的鲁棒性和适应性基础的关键。为了管理错误和分析漏洞，随机分离定理应该评估数据集在给定维度和给定分布类别下费舍尔可分的概率。需要对这些分离概率进行明确和最优的估计，并且这个问题在当前的工作中得到了解决。对于重要的分布类别，可以获得具有最佳概率估计的一般随机分离定理：对数凹分布、它们的凸组合和乘积分布。标准 i.i.d.假设明显放宽。这些定理和估计既可用于纠正高维数据驱动的人工智能系统，也可用于分析其漏洞。第三个应用领域是神经元集合中记忆的出现、祖母细胞的现象和大脑中的稀疏编码，以及对高维大脑中小神经集合的意想不到的有效性的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了通用随机分离定理及其最优概率估计，用于高维数据驱动的AI系统错误纠正与脆弱性分析。
AI.motivation: 高维数据中AI系统的不稳定性与随机分离现象相关，需量化数据集在给定维度和分布下的Fisher可分离概率以修正错误并分析漏洞。
AI.method: 针对对数凹分布、凸组合及乘积分布等重要类，放宽i.i.d.假设，推导分离概率的显式最优估计。
AI.result: 获得关键分布类的最优分离概率估计，应用于AI纠错、脆弱性分析及解释神经元集合记忆机制等跨学科问题。
AI.conclusion: 随机分离定理为高维AI鲁棒性与适应性提供了理论基础，并揭示了其在神经科学中的潜在应用价值。

method: 针对对数凹分布、凸组合及乘积分布等重要类，放宽i.i.d.假设，推导分离概率的显式最优估计。
result: 获得关键分布类的最优分离概率估计，应用于AI纠错、脆弱性分析及解释神经元集合记忆机制等跨学科问题。
conclusion: 随机分离定理为高维AI鲁棒性与适应性提供了理论基础，并揭示了其在神经科学中的潜在应用价值。
search_text: General stochastic separation theorems with optimal bounds 具有最优界限的一般随机分离定理 Phenomenon of stochastic separability was revealed and used in machine learning to correct errors of Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems and analyze AI instabilities. In high-dimensional datasets under broad assumptions each point can be separated from the rest of the set by simple and robust Fisher's discriminant (is Fisher separable). Errors or clusters of errors can be separated from the rest of the data. The ability to correct an AI system also opens up the possibility of an attack on it, and the high dimensionality induces vulnerabilities caused by the same stochastic separability that holds the keys to understanding the fundamentals of robustness and adaptivity in high-dimensional data-driven AI. To manage errors and analyze vulnerabilities, the stochastic separation theorems should evaluate the probability that the dataset will be Fisher separable in given dimensionality and for a given class of distributions. Explicit and optimal estimates of these separation probabilities are required, and this problem is solved in present work. The general stochastic separation theorems with optimal probability estimates are obtained for important classes of distributions: log-concave distribution, their convex combinations and product distributions. The standard i.i.d. assumption was significantly relaxed. These theorems and estimates can be used both for correction of high-dimensional data driven AI systems and for analysis of their vulnerabilities. The third area of application is the emergence of memories in ensembles of neurons, the phenomena of grandmother's cells and sparse coding in the brain, and explanation of unexpected effectiveness of small neural ensembles in high-dimensional brain. 随机分离现象被揭示并用于机器学习，以纠正人工智能（AI）系统的错误并分析人工智能的不稳定性。在广泛假设下的高维数据集中，每个点都可以通过简单且稳健的费舍尔判别式（费舍尔可分离）与集合的其余部分分开。错误或错误簇可以与其余数据分开。纠正人工智能系统的能力也开启了对其进行攻击的可能性，而高维性会导致由相同的随机可分离性引起的漏洞，而随机可分离性是理解高维数据驱动人工智能的鲁棒性和适应性基础的关键。为了管理错误和分析漏洞，随机分离定理应该评估数据集在给定维度和给定分布类别下费舍尔可分的概率。需要对这些分离概率进行明确和最优的估计，并且这个问题在当前的工作中得到了解决。对于重要的分布类别，可以获得具有最佳概率估计的一般随机分离定理：对数凹分布、它们的凸组合和乘积分布。标准 i.i.d.假设明显放宽。这些定理和估计既可用于纠正高维数据驱动的人工智能系统，也可用于分析其漏洞。第三个应用领域是神经元集合中记忆的出现、祖母细胞的现象和大脑中的稀疏编码，以及对高维大脑中小神经集合的意想不到的有效性的解释。 本文提出了通用随机分离定理及其最优概率估计，用于高维数据驱动的AI系统错误纠正与脆弱性分析。 Bogdan Grechuk,Alexander N. Gorban,Ivan Y. Tyukin cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Isaac Ronald Ward,Jack Joyner,Casey Lickfold,Yulan Guo,Mohammed Bennamoun
title: A Practical Tutorial on Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络实用教程
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have recently grown in popularity in the field of artificial intelligence (AI) due to their unique ability to ingest relatively unstructured data types as input data. Although some elements of the GNN architecture are conceptually similar in operation to traditional neural networks (and neural network variants), other elements represent a departure from traditional deep learning techniques. This tutorial exposes the power and novelty of GNNs to AI practitioners by collating and presenting details regarding the motivations, concepts, mathematics, and applications of the most common and performant variants of GNNs. Importantly, we present this tutorial concisely, alongside practical examples, thus providing a practical and accessible tutorial on the topic of GNNs.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have recently grown in popularity in the field of artificial intelligence (AI) due to their unique ability to ingest relatively unstructured data types as input data. Although some elements of the GNN architecture are conceptually similar in operation to traditional neural networks (and neural network variants), other elements represent a departure from traditional deep learning techniques. This tutorial exposes the power and novelty of GNNs to AI practitioners by collating and presenting details regarding the motivations, concepts, mathematics, and applications of the most common and performant variants of GNNs. Importantly, we present this tutorial concisely, alongside practical examples, thus providing a practical and accessible tutorial on the topic of GNNs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）最近在人工智能（AI）领域越来越受欢迎，因为它们具有吸收相对非结构化数据类型作为输入数据的独特能力。尽管 GNN 架构的某些元素在概念上与传统神经网络（和神经网络变体）的操作相似，但其他元素则与传统深度学习技术不同。本教程通过整理和展示有关 GNN 最常见和高性能变体的动机、概念、数学和应用的详细信息，向 AI 从业者展示 GNN 的强大功能和新颖性。重要的是，我们简明扼要地介绍了本教程，并附有实际示例，从而提供了关于 GNN 主题的实用且易于理解的教程。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为AI从业者提供一个实用且易懂的图神经网络（GNNs）教程，涵盖其核心概念、数学原理及应用，并通过实例增强可操作性。
AI.motivation: 由于GNNs在处理非结构化数据方面的独特优势，但其概念与传统深度学习存在差异，故需通过教程帮助AI从业者掌握其核心思想与应用。
AI.method: 通过系统梳理GNNs的理论框架，结合具体应用案例与实践代码，构建模块化教学内容。
AI.result: 使读者能够全面理解GNNs的数学基础与工程实现，掌握主流模型的使用场景与实践技巧。
AI.conclusion: 本教程通过理论与实践结合的方式，有效降低了GNNs的学习门槛，为AI开发者提供了可直接应用的技术指南。

title: An Energy-Efficient High Definition Map Data Distribution Mechanism for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 一种节能的自动驾驶高清地图数据分发机制
abstract: Autonomous Driving is now the promising future of transportation. As one basis for autonomous driving, High Definition Map (HD map) provides high-precision descriptions of the environment, therefore it enables more accurate perception and localization while improving the efficiency of path planning. However, an extremely large amount of map data needs to be transmitted during driving, thus posing great challenge for real-time and safety requirements for autonomous driving. To this end, we first demonstrate how the existing data distribution mechanism can support HD map services. Furthermore, considering the constraints of vehicle power, vehicle speed, base station bandwidth, etc., we propose a HD map data distribution mechanism on top of Vehicle-to-Infrastructure (V2I) data transmission. By this mechanism, the map provision task is allocated to the selected RSU nodes and transmits proportionate HD map data cooperatively. Their works on map data loading aims to provide in-time HD map data service with optimized in-vehicle energy consumption. Finally, we model the selection of RSU nodes into a partial knapsack problem and propose a greedy strategy-based data transmission algorithm. Experimental results confirm that within limited energy consumption, the proposed mechanism can ensure HD map data service by coordinating multiple RSUs with the shortest data transmission time.
summary: Autonomous Driving is now the promising future of transportation. As one basis for autonomous driving, High Definition Map (HD map) provides high-precision descriptions of the environment, therefore it enables more accurate perception and localization while improving the efficiency of path planning. However, an extremely large amount of map data needs to be transmitted during driving, thus posing great challenge for real-time and safety requirements for autonomous driving. To this end, we first demonstrate how the existing data distribution mechanism can support HD map services. Furthermore, considering the constraints of vehicle power, vehicle speed, base station bandwidth, etc., we propose a HD map data distribution mechanism on top of Vehicle-to-Infrastructure (V2I) data transmission. By this mechanism, the map provision task is allocated to the selected RSU nodes and transmits proportionate HD map data cooperatively. Their works on map data loading aims to provide in-time HD map data service with optimized in-vehicle energy consumption. Finally, we model the selection of RSU nodes into a partial knapsack problem and propose a greedy strategy-based data transmission algorithm. Experimental results confirm that within limited energy consumption, the proposed mechanism can ensure HD map data service by coordinating multiple RSUs with the shortest data transmission time.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶现在是交通运输的光明未来。作为自动驾驶的基础之一，高清地图（HD地图）提供了对环境的高精度描述，因此可以实现更准确的感知和定位，同时提高路径规划的效率。然而，行驶过程中需要传输极其大量的地图数据，这对自动驾驶的实时性和安全性要求提出了巨大的挑战。为此，我们首先演示现有的数据分发机制如何支持高精地图服务。此外，考虑到车辆功率、车速、基站带宽等限制，我们提出了一种基于车辆到基础设施（V2I）数据传输的高清地图数据分发机制。通过这种机制，将地图提供任务分配给选定的RSU节点，并协同传输相应的高清地图数据。他们在地图数据加载方面的工作旨在提供及时的高清地图数据服务，并优化车内能耗。最后，我们将RSU节点的选择建模为部分背包问题，并提出一种基于贪婪策略的数据传输算法。实验结果证实，在有限的能耗范围内，该机制可以通过协调多个RSU以最短的数据传输时间来保证高精地图数据服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于车路协同（V2I）的高精度地图数据分布机制，旨在解决自动驾驶中高精度地图（HD map）数据传输的实时性、安全性与能耗优化问题。
AI.motivation: 高精度地图是自动驾驶的关键基础，但其海量数据传输面临实时性、安全性要求与车辆能耗限制的挑战，现有机制难以有效协调多基站资源并优化能耗。
AI.method: 基于V2I通信框架，将地图数据分发任务建模为部分背包问题，设计贪心策略算法选择最优RSU节点组合，并通过协同传输实现能耗与传输时延的平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，在有限能耗条件下，该机制通过多RSU协同可实现最短数据传输时间，确保高精度地图服务的实时性与安全性。
AI.conclusion: 所提机制有效解决了自动驾驶中高精度地图数据分布的能耗与实时性矛盾，为车路协同环境下的地图服务提供了可行优化方案。

authors_text: Xiang An,Xuhan Zhu,Yang Xiao,Lan Wu,Ming Zhang,Yuan Gao,Bin Qin,Debing Zhang,Ying Fu
title: Partial FC: Training 10 Million Identities on a Single Machine
title_zh: 部分FC：在单机上训练1000万个身份
abstract: Face recognition has been an active and vital topic among computer vision community for a long time. Previous researches mainly focus on loss functions used for facial feature extraction network, among which the improvements of softmax-based loss functions greatly promote the performance of face recognition. However, the contradiction between the drastically increasing number of face identities and the shortage of GPU memories is gradually becoming irreconcilable. In this paper, we thoroughly analyze the optimization goal of softmax-based loss functions and the difficulty of training massive identities. We find that the importance of negative classes in softmax function in face representation learning is not as high as we previously thought. The experiment demonstrates no loss of accuracy when training with only 10\% randomly sampled classes for the softmax-based loss functions, compared with training with full classes using state-of-the-art models on mainstream benchmarks. We also implement a very efficient distributed sampling algorithm, taking into account model accuracy and training efficiency, which uses only eight NVIDIA RTX2080Ti to complete classification tasks with tens of millions of identities. The code of this paper has been made available https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition/partial_fc.
summary: Face recognition has been an active and vital topic among computer vision community for a long time. Previous researches mainly focus on loss functions used for facial feature extraction network, among which the improvements of softmax-based loss functions greatly promote the performance of face recognition. However, the contradiction between the drastically increasing number of face identities and the shortage of GPU memories is gradually becoming irreconcilable. In this paper, we thoroughly analyze the optimization goal of softmax-based loss functions and the difficulty of training massive identities. We find that the importance of negative classes in softmax function in face representation learning is not as high as we previously thought. The experiment demonstrates no loss of accuracy when training with only 10\% randomly sampled classes for the softmax-based loss functions, compared with training with full classes using state-of-the-art models on mainstream benchmarks. We also implement a very efficient distributed sampling algorithm, taking into account model accuracy and training efficiency, which uses only eight NVIDIA RTX2080Ti to complete classification tasks with tens of millions of identities. The code of this paper has been made available https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition/partial_fc.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，人脸识别一直是计算机视觉界一个活跃且重要的话题。以往的研究主要集中在用于面部特征提取网络的损失函数，其中基于softmax的损失函数的改进极大地提升了人脸识别的性能。然而，急剧增加的人脸身份数量与GPU内存短缺之间的矛盾正逐渐变得不可调和。在本文中，我们深入分析了基于softmax的损失函数的优化目标以及训练海量身份的难度。我们发现softmax函数中负类在人脸表示学习中的重要性并不像我们之前想象的那么高。该实验表明，与在主流基准上使用最先进的模型进行全类训练相比，仅使用 10% 随机采样类对基于 softmax 的损失函数进行训练时，准确性没有损失。我们还实现了非常高效的分布式采样算法，兼顾模型精度和训练效率，仅使用 8 个 NVIDIA RTX2080Ti 即可完成千万身份的分类任务。本文的代码已提供https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition/partial_fc。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Partial FC的方法，通过在单台机器上训练千万级人脸身份，解决GPU内存不足与身份数量激增的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 传统softmax损失函数在训练大规模人脸身份时面临GPU显存不足的瓶颈，而负样本类别的重要性被过度强调导致资源浪费。
AI.method: 通过随机采样10%的负类别进行训练，结合高效分布式采样算法，在8块NVIDIA RTX2080Ti GPU上完成任务。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中，使用部分负类别训练的模型准确率与全类别训练相当，成功处理了数千万级身份分类任务。
AI.conclusion: Partial FC方法有效降低了显存需求，证明了大规模人脸识别可在单机环境下高效实现，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Exploiting Knowledge Graphs for Facilitating Product/Service Discovery
title_zh: 利用知识图促进产品/服务发现
abstract: Most of the existing techniques to product discovery rely on syntactic approaches, thus ignoring valuable and specific semantic information of the underlying standards during the process. The product data comes from different heterogeneous sources and formats giving rise to the problem of interoperability. Above all, due to the continuously increasing influx of data, the manual labeling is getting costlier. Integrating the descriptions of different products into a single representation requires organizing all the products across vendors in a single taxonomy. Practically relevant and quality product categorization standards are still limited in number; and that too in academic research projects where we can majorly see only prototypes as compared to industry. This work presents a cost-effective solution for e-commerce on the Data Web by employing an unsupervised approach for data classification and exploiting the knowledge graphs for matching. The proposed architecture describes available products in web ontology language OWL and stores them in a triple store. User input specifications for certain products are matched against the available product categories to generate a knowledge graph. This mullti-phased top-down approach to develop and improve existing, if any, tailored product recommendations will be able to connect users with the exact product/service of their choice.
summary: Most of the existing techniques to product discovery rely on syntactic approaches, thus ignoring valuable and specific semantic information of the underlying standards during the process. The product data comes from different heterogeneous sources and formats giving rise to the problem of interoperability. Above all, due to the continuously increasing influx of data, the manual labeling is getting costlier. Integrating the descriptions of different products into a single representation requires organizing all the products across vendors in a single taxonomy. Practically relevant and quality product categorization standards are still limited in number; and that too in academic research projects where we can majorly see only prototypes as compared to industry. This work presents a cost-effective solution for e-commerce on the Data Web by employing an unsupervised approach for data classification and exploiting the knowledge graphs for matching. The proposed architecture describes available products in web ontology language OWL and stores them in a triple store. User input specifications for certain products are matched against the available product categories to generate a knowledge graph. This mullti-phased top-down approach to develop and improve existing, if any, tailored product recommendations will be able to connect users with the exact product/service of their choice.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的产品发现技术都依赖于句法方法，因此在此过程中忽略了底层标准的有价值且特定的语义信息。产品数据来自不同的异构源和格式，导致互操作性问题。最重要的是，由于数据不断增加，手动标记的成本越来越高。将不同产品的描述集成到单个表示中需要将跨供应商的所有产品组织在单个分类中。实用且优质的产品分类标准数量仍然有限；在学术研究项目中也是如此，与工业相比，我们主要只能看到原型。这项工作通过采用无监督的数据分类方法并利用知识图进行匹配，为数据网络上的电子商务提供了一种经济有效的解决方案。所提出的架构以网络本体语言 OWL 描述可用产品并将它们存储在三元组存储中。某些产品的用户输入规范与可用产品类别进行匹配以生成知识图。这种多阶段自上而下的方法来开发和改进现有的（如果有的话）定制产品推荐将能够将用户与他们选择的确切产品/服务联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用知识图谱进行产品/服务发现的解决方案，通过语义信息提升分类和匹配效率。
AI.motivation: 现有产品发现技术依赖语法方法，忽视语义信息，且面临数据异构性、手动标注成本高及分类标准不足等问题。
AI.method: 采用无监督方法构建知识图谱，使用OWL描述产品并存储于三元组存储中，通过用户输入与产品类别匹配生成语义化推荐。
AI.result: 实现了跨供应商的统一产品分类，降低了标注成本，提升了电商平台的推荐精准度。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱驱动的语义方法有效解决了传统技术的局限性，为电商领域提供了可扩展的智能推荐框架。

title: GuCNet: A Guided Clustering-based Network for Improved Classification
title_zh: GuCNet：用于改进分类的基于引导聚类的网络
comment: mber:Accepted in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2020
comments: mber:Accepted in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2020
abstract: We deal with the problem of semantic classification of challenging and highly-cluttered dataset. We present a novel, and yet a very simple classification technique by leveraging the ease of classifiability of any existing well separable dataset for guidance. Since the guide dataset which may or may not have any semantic relationship with the experimental dataset, forms well separable clusters in the feature set, the proposed network tries to embed class-wise features of the challenging dataset to those distinct clusters of the guide set, making them more separable. Depending on the availability, we propose two types of guide sets: one using texture (image) guides and another using prototype vectors representing cluster centers. Experimental results obtained on the challenging benchmark RSSCN, LSUN, and TU-Berlin datasets establish the efficacy of the proposed method as we outperform the existing state-of-the-art techniques by a considerable margin.
summary: We deal with the problem of semantic classification of challenging and highly-cluttered dataset. We present a novel, and yet a very simple classification technique by leveraging the ease of classifiability of any existing well separable dataset for guidance. Since the guide dataset which may or may not have any semantic relationship with the experimental dataset, forms well separable clusters in the feature set, the proposed network tries to embed class-wise features of the challenging dataset to those distinct clusters of the guide set, making them more separable. Depending on the availability, we propose two types of guide sets: one using texture (image) guides and another using prototype vectors representing cluster centers. Experimental results obtained on the challenging benchmark RSSCN, LSUN, and TU-Berlin datasets establish the efficacy of the proposed method as we outperform the existing state-of-the-art techniques by a considerable margin.
abstract_zh: 我们处理具有挑战性和高度混乱的数据集的语义分类问题。我们通过利用任何现有的可良好分离数据集的易于分类性作为指导，提出了一种新颖但非常简单的分类技术。由于指导数据集可能与实验数据集有任何语义关系，也可能没有任何语义关系，在特征集中形成可很好分离的簇，因此所提出的网络尝试将具有挑战性的数据集的类特征嵌入到指导集的那些不同簇中，使它们更加可分离。根据可用性，我们提出两种类型的指南集：一种使用纹理（图像）指南，另一种使用表示聚类中心的原型向量。在具有挑战性的基准 RSSCN、LSUN 和 TU-Berlin 数据集上获得的实验结果证明了所提出方法的有效性，因为我们在很大程度上优于现有的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GuCNet方法，通过引导聚类技术提升复杂数据集的语义分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分类方法在处理高度杂乱的复杂数据集时效果有限，需借助易分类的引导数据集提升模型表现。
AI.method: 利用两种引导集（纹理图像和聚类原型向量），将目标数据集特征映射到引导集的可分离聚类中以增强分类可区分性。
AI.result: 在RSSCN、LSUN和TU-Berlin数据集上显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GuCNet通过引导聚类有效提升复杂场景下的分类精度，验证了跨数据集特征引导的有效性。

motivation: 现有分类方法在处理高度杂乱的复杂数据集时效果有限，需借助易分类的引导数据集提升模型表现。
method: 利用两种引导集（纹理图像和聚类原型向量），将目标数据集特征映射到引导集的可分离聚类中以增强分类可区分性。
result: 在RSSCN、LSUN和TU-Berlin数据集上显著优于现有先进方法。
conclusion: GuCNet通过引导聚类有效提升复杂场景下的分类精度，验证了跨数据集特征引导的有效性。
search_text: GuCNet: A Guided Clustering-based Network for Improved Classification GuCNet：用于改进分类的基于引导聚类的网络 We deal with the problem of semantic classification of challenging and highly-cluttered dataset. We present a novel, and yet a very simple classification technique by leveraging the ease of classifiability of any existing well separable dataset for guidance. Since the guide dataset which may or may not have any semantic relationship with the experimental dataset, forms well separable clusters in the feature set, the proposed network tries to embed class-wise features of the challenging dataset to those distinct clusters of the guide set, making them more separable. Depending on the availability, we propose two types of guide sets: one using texture (image) guides and another using prototype vectors representing cluster centers. Experimental results obtained on the challenging benchmark RSSCN, LSUN, and TU-Berlin datasets establish the efficacy of the proposed method as we outperform the existing state-of-the-art techniques by a considerable margin. 我们处理具有挑战性和高度混乱的数据集的语义分类问题。我们通过利用任何现有的可良好分离数据集的易于分类性作为指导，提出了一种新颖但非常简单的分类技术。由于指导数据集可能与实验数据集有任何语义关系，也可能没有任何语义关系，在特征集中形成可很好分离的簇，因此所提出的网络尝试将具有挑战性的数据集的类特征嵌入到指导集的那些不同簇中，使它们更加可分离。根据可用性，我们提出两种类型的指南集：一种使用纹理（图像）指南，另一种使用表示聚类中心的原型向量。在具有挑战性的基准 RSSCN、LSUN 和 TU-Berlin 数据集上获得的实验结果证明了所提出方法的有效性，因为我们在很大程度上优于现有的最先进技术。 本文提出GuCNet方法，通过引导聚类技术提升复杂数据集的语义分类性能。 Ushasi Chaudhuri,Syomantak Chaudhuri,Subhasis Chaudhuri cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhuotao Tian,Xin Lai,Li Jiang,Shu Liu,Michelle Shu,Hengshuang Zhao,Jiaya Jia
title: Generalized Few-shot Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 广义少样本语义分割
abstract: Training semantic segmentation models requires a large amount of finely annotated data, making it hard to quickly adapt to novel classes not satisfying this condition. Few-Shot Segmentation (FS-Seg) tackles this problem with many constraints. In this paper, we introduce a new benchmark, called Generalized Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation (GFS-Seg), to analyze the generalization ability of simultaneously segmenting the novel categories with very few examples and the base categories with sufficient examples. It is the first study showing that previous representative state-of-the-art FS-Seg methods fall short in GFS-Seg and the performance discrepancy mainly comes from the constrained setting of FS-Seg. To make GFS-Seg tractable, we set up a GFS-Seg baseline that achieves decent performance without structural change on the original model. Then, since context is essential for semantic segmentation, we propose the Context-Aware Prototype Learning (CAPL) that significantly improves performance by 1) leveraging the co-occurrence prior knowledge from support samples, and 2) dynamically enriching contextual information to the classifier, conditioned on the content of each query image. Both two contributions are experimentally shown to have substantial practical merit. Extensive experiments on Pascal-VOC and COCO manifest the effectiveness of CAPL, and CAPL generalizes well to FS-Seg by achieving competitive performance. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/GFS-Seg.
summary: Training semantic segmentation models requires a large amount of finely annotated data, making it hard to quickly adapt to novel classes not satisfying this condition. Few-Shot Segmentation (FS-Seg) tackles this problem with many constraints. In this paper, we introduce a new benchmark, called Generalized Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation (GFS-Seg), to analyze the generalization ability of simultaneously segmenting the novel categories with very few examples and the base categories with sufficient examples. It is the first study showing that previous representative state-of-the-art FS-Seg methods fall short in GFS-Seg and the performance discrepancy mainly comes from the constrained setting of FS-Seg. To make GFS-Seg tractable, we set up a GFS-Seg baseline that achieves decent performance without structural change on the original model. Then, since context is essential for semantic segmentation, we propose the Context-Aware Prototype Learning (CAPL) that significantly improves performance by 1) leveraging the co-occurrence prior knowledge from support samples, and 2) dynamically enriching contextual information to the classifier, conditioned on the content of each query image. Both two contributions are experimentally shown to have substantial practical merit. Extensive experiments on Pascal-VOC and COCO manifest the effectiveness of CAPL, and CAPL generalizes well to FS-Seg by achieving competitive performance. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/GFS-Seg.
abstract_zh: 训练语义分割模型需要大量精细注释的数据，因此很难快速适应不满足此条件的新类。少镜头分割（FS-Seg）解决了这个有很多限制的问题。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的基准，称为广义少样本语义分割（GFS-Seg），来分析同时分割具有很少示例的新类别和具有足够示例的基本类别的泛化能力。这是第一个研究表明，先前代表性的最先进的 FS-Seg 方法在 GFS-Seg 方面存在不足，并且性能差异主要来自 FS-Seg 的约束设置。为了使 GFS-Seg 易于处理，我们建立了一个 GFS-Seg 基线，该基线无需对原始模型进行结构更改即可实现不错的性能。然后，由于上下文对于语义分割至关重要，因此我们提出了上下文感知原型学习（CAPL），它通过以下方式显着提高性能：1）利用支持样本中的共现先验知识，2）根据每个查询图像的内容动态丰富分类器的上下文信息。实验证明这两项贡献都具有重大的实际价值。 Pascal-VOC 和 COCO 上的大量实验证明了 CAPL 的有效性，并且 CAPL 通过实现有竞争力的性能很好地推广到 FS-Seg。代码可在 https://github.com/dvlab-research/GFS-Seg 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出广义少样本语义分割基准（GFS-Seg）及上下文感知原型学习方法（CAPL），以提升模型在同时处理新类别和基础类别的分割任务中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统FS-Seg方法在同时处理新类别和基础类别的分割任务中表现不足，需解决泛化能力限制问题。
AI.method: 建立GFS-Seg基准并提出CAPL方法，通过利用支持样本的共现先验知识及动态丰富查询图像的上下文信息提升分类器性能。
AI.result: 在Pascal-VOC和COCO数据集上验证CAPL有效性，且其在FS-Seg任务中也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 传统FS-Seg方法在GFS-Seg中存在局限，CAPL通过上下文感知机制显著提升性能，为少样本分割研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Fiona Guerin,Alice Rey,Enis Caliskan,Erik Kynast,Andreas Zimmerer,Ilhan Aslan,Elisabeth André
title: Towards Somaesthetics Inspired Games: Exploring the Influence of a Mirror Effect on Self-Presentation in a Public Setting
title_zh: 走向身体美学启发的游戏：探索镜子效应对公共环境中自我呈现的影响
abstract: We report on an initial user study, which explores how players of an augmented mirror game, self-style or self-present themselves when they are allowed to see themselves in the mirror compared to when they do not see themselves. To this end, we customized an open source fruit slicing game into an interactive installation for an architecture museum and conducted with 36 visitors a field study. Based on an analysis of video recordings of participants we identified, for example significant differences in how often participants smile. Ultimately, presenting a self-image to gamers in a social setting resulted in behavior change, which we argue could be utilized carefully from a Somaesthetics perspective as an experience design feature in future games.
summary: We report on an initial user study, which explores how players of an augmented mirror game, self-style or self-present themselves when they are allowed to see themselves in the mirror compared to when they do not see themselves. To this end, we customized an open source fruit slicing game into an interactive installation for an architecture museum and conducted with 36 visitors a field study. Based on an analysis of video recordings of participants we identified, for example significant differences in how often participants smile. Ultimately, presenting a self-image to gamers in a social setting resulted in behavior change, which we argue could be utilized carefully from a Somaesthetics perspective as an experience design feature in future games.
abstract_zh: 我们报告了一项初步的用户研究，该研究探讨了增强镜像游戏的玩家在允许在镜子中看到自己时与没有看到自己时相比如何自我风格或自我呈现。为此，我们为某建筑博物馆定制了一款开源切水果游戏的互动装置，并与36名参观者进行了实地考察。根据对参与者视频记录的分析，我们确定了参与者微笑频率的显着差异。最终，在社交环境中向游戏玩家呈现自我形象会导致行为改变，我们认为可以从身体美学的角度仔细利用这一点，作为未来游戏中的体验设计功能。

AI.tldr: 本文通过用户研究探讨了在公共场合中，玩家在允许看到自己镜像与不允许看到自己镜像的情况下，自我呈现行为的差异，并尝试将体感美学（Somaesthetics）应用于游戏设计。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在探索体感美学视角下，镜像效应如何影响玩家在社交环境中的自我表达行为，为未来游戏体验设计提供理论支持。
AI.method: 将开源水果切割游戏改造为互动装置，于建筑博物馆进行实地研究，观察并分析36名访客在不同镜像条件下的行为差异（如微笑频率）。
AI.result: 实验发现，当玩家能通过镜像看到自身形象时，其行为表现（如微笑频率）发生显著变化，表明自我形象展示可能引发行为改变。
AI.conclusion: 镜像反馈可作为体感美学驱动的游戏设计元素，未来需谨慎运用以引导积极的行为改变。

title: Connecting the Dots Between Fact Verification and Fake News Detection
title_zh: 连接事实验证和假新闻检测之间的点
abstract: Fact verification models have enjoyed a fast advancement in the last two years with the development of pre-trained language models like BERT and the release of large scale datasets such as FEVER. However, the challenging problem of fake news detection has not benefited from the improvement of fact verification models, which is closely related to fake news detection. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to connect the dots between fact verification and fake news detection. Our approach first employs a text summarization model pre-trained on news corpora to summarize the long news article into a short claim. Then we use a fact verification model pre-trained on the FEVER dataset to detect whether the input news article is real or fake. Our approach makes use of the recent success of fact verification models and enables zero-shot fake news detection, alleviating the need of large-scale training data to train fake news detection models. Experimental results on FakenewsNet, a benchmark dataset for fake news detection, demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
summary: Fact verification models have enjoyed a fast advancement in the last two years with the development of pre-trained language models like BERT and the release of large scale datasets such as FEVER. However, the challenging problem of fake news detection has not benefited from the improvement of fact verification models, which is closely related to fake news detection. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to connect the dots between fact verification and fake news detection. Our approach first employs a text summarization model pre-trained on news corpora to summarize the long news article into a short claim. Then we use a fact verification model pre-trained on the FEVER dataset to detect whether the input news article is real or fake. Our approach makes use of the recent success of fact verification models and enables zero-shot fake news detection, alleviating the need of large-scale training data to train fake news detection models. Experimental results on FakenewsNet, a benchmark dataset for fake news detection, demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 随着 BERT 等预训练语言模型的发展以及 FEVER 等大规模数据集的发布，事实验证模型在过去两年中得到了快速发展。然而，假新闻检测这一具有挑战性的问题并没有受益于与假新闻检测密切相关的事实验证模型的改进。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来连接事实验证和假新闻检测之间的点。我们的方法首先采用在新闻语料库上预先训练的文本摘要模型，将长新闻文章总结为简短的声明。然后，我们使用在 FEVER 数据集上预训练的事实验证模型来检测输入的新闻文章是真是假。我们的方法利用最近成功的事实验证模型，实现零样本假新闻检测，减轻了训练假新闻检测模型时对大规模训练数据的需求。 FakenewsNet（假新闻检测基准数据集）上的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将事实核查与假新闻检测结合的方法，通过文本摘要模型和预训练的事实核查模型实现零样本假新闻检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管事实核查模型因预训练语言模型和大规模数据集取得进展，但假新闻检测仍面临数据需求大、效果不佳的问题，需探索更高效的方法。
AI.method: 首先使用新闻语料预训练的文本摘要模型将长新闻压缩为简短声明，再利用FEVER数据集预训练的事实核查模型判断新闻真伪，无需额外训练数据。
AI.result: 在FakenewsNet基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在假新闻检测任务中表现有效，验证了跨任务迁移的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过连接事实核查与假新闻检测任务，本文提出的方法为减少对大规模标注数据的依赖提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Connecting the Dots Between Fact Verification and Fake News Detection 连接事实验证和假新闻检测之间的点 Fact verification models have enjoyed a fast advancement in the last two years with the development of pre-trained language models like BERT and the release of large scale datasets such as FEVER. However, the challenging problem of fake news detection has not benefited from the improvement of fact verification models, which is closely related to fake news detection. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to connect the dots between fact verification and fake news detection. Our approach first employs a text summarization model pre-trained on news corpora to summarize the long news article into a short claim. Then we use a fact verification model pre-trained on the FEVER dataset to detect whether the input news article is real or fake. Our approach makes use of the recent success of fact verification models and enables zero-shot fake news detection, alleviating the need of large-scale training data to train fake news detection models. Experimental results on FakenewsNet, a benchmark dataset for fake news detection, demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach. 随着 BERT 等预训练语言模型的发展以及 FEVER 等大规模数据集的发布，事实验证模型在过去两年中得到了快速发展。然而，假新闻检测这一具有挑战性的问题并没有受益于与假新闻检测密切相关的事实验证模型的改进。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来连接事实验证和假新闻检测之间的点。我们的方法首先采用在新闻语料库上预先训练的文本摘要模型，将长新闻文章总结为简短的声明。然后，我们使用在 FEVER 数据集上预训练的事实验证模型来检测输入的新闻文章是真是假。我们的方法利用最近成功的事实验证模型，实现零样本假新闻检测，减轻了训练假新闻检测模型时对大规模训练数据的需求。 FakenewsNet（假新闻检测基准数据集）上的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种将事实核查与假新闻检测结合的方法，通过文本摘要模型和预训练的事实核查模型实现零样本假新闻检测。 Qifei Li,Wangchunshu Zhou cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Autonomous Parking by Successive Convexification and Compound State Triggers
title_zh: 通过连续凸化和复合状态触发器实现自动停车
abstract: In this paper, we propose an algorithm for optimal generation of nonholonomic paths for planning parking maneuvers with a kinematic car model. We demonstrate the use of Successive Convexification algorithms (SCvx), which guarantee path feasibility and constraint satisfaction, for parking scenarios. In addition, we formulate obstacle avoidance with state-triggered constraints which enables the use of logical constraints in a continuous formulation of optimization problems. This paper contributes to the optimal nonholonomic path planning literature by demonstrating the use of SCvx and state-triggered constraints which allows the formulation of the parking problem as a single optimisation problem. The resulting algorithm can be used to plan constrained paths with cusp points in narrow parking environments.
summary: In this paper, we propose an algorithm for optimal generation of nonholonomic paths for planning parking maneuvers with a kinematic car model. We demonstrate the use of Successive Convexification algorithms (SCvx), which guarantee path feasibility and constraint satisfaction, for parking scenarios. In addition, we formulate obstacle avoidance with state-triggered constraints which enables the use of logical constraints in a continuous formulation of optimization problems. This paper contributes to the optimal nonholonomic path planning literature by demonstrating the use of SCvx and state-triggered constraints which allows the formulation of the parking problem as a single optimisation problem. The resulting algorithm can be used to plan constrained paths with cusp points in narrow parking environments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种优化生成非完整路径的算法，用于使用运动学汽车模型规划停车操作。我们演示了连续凸化算法 (SCvx) 的使用，该算法保证停车场景的路径可行性和约束满足。此外，我们使用状态触发约束来制定避障，这使得能够在优化问题的连续制定中使用逻辑约束。本文通过演示 SCvx 和状态触发约束的使用，为最佳非完整路径规划文献做出了贡献，这允许将停车问题表述为单个优化问题。由此产生的算法可用于在狭窄的停车环境中规划具有尖点的约束路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连续凸化算法和状态触发约束的非完整路径规划方法，用于解决自动停车场景中的路径优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在处理狭窄停车环境中的约束满足和可行性保障存在不足，需开发更高效的优化算法以应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 采用连续凸化算法（SCvx）保证路径可行性，并结合状态触发约束将逻辑条件嵌入连续优化问题，将停车问题统一为单目标优化问题。
AI.result: 算法成功规划出包含尖点的约束路径，可在狭窄停车环境中实现可行且最优的自动停车轨迹生成。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过结合SCvx与状态触发约束，为非完整系统路径规划提供了新思路，提升了自动停车场景下的优化求解能力。

authors_text: Reza Hojabr,Kamyar Givaki,Kossar Pourahmadi,Parsa Nooralinejad,Ahmad Khonsari,Dara Rahmati,M. Hassan Najafi
title: TaxoNN: A Light-Weight Accelerator for Deep Neural Network Training
title_zh: TaxoNN：用于深度神经网络训练的轻量级加速器
abstract: Emerging intelligent embedded devices rely on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to be able to interact with the real-world environment. This interaction comes with the ability to retrain DNNs, since environmental conditions change continuously in time. Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is a widely used algorithm to train DNNs by optimizing the parameters over the training data iteratively. In this work, first we present a novel approach to add the training ability to a baseline DNN accelerator (inference only) by splitting the SGD algorithm into simple computational elements. Then, based on this heuristic approach we propose TaxoNN, a light-weight accelerator for DNN training. TaxoNN can easily tune the DNN weights by reusing the hardware resources used in the inference process using a time-multiplexing approach and low-bitwidth units. Our experimental results show that TaxoNN delivers, on average, 0.97% higher misclassification rate compared to a full-precision implementation. Moreover, TaxoNN provides 2.1$\times$ power saving and 1.65$\times$ area reduction over the state-of-the-art DNN training accelerator.
summary: Emerging intelligent embedded devices rely on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to be able to interact with the real-world environment. This interaction comes with the ability to retrain DNNs, since environmental conditions change continuously in time. Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is a widely used algorithm to train DNNs by optimizing the parameters over the training data iteratively. In this work, first we present a novel approach to add the training ability to a baseline DNN accelerator (inference only) by splitting the SGD algorithm into simple computational elements. Then, based on this heuristic approach we propose TaxoNN, a light-weight accelerator for DNN training. TaxoNN can easily tune the DNN weights by reusing the hardware resources used in the inference process using a time-multiplexing approach and low-bitwidth units. Our experimental results show that TaxoNN delivers, on average, 0.97% higher misclassification rate compared to a full-precision implementation. Moreover, TaxoNN provides 2.1$\times$ power saving and 1.65$\times$ area reduction over the state-of-the-art DNN training accelerator.
abstract_zh: 新兴的智能嵌入式设备依靠深度神经网络 (DNN) 来与现实世界环境进行交互。由于环境条件随时间不断变化，因此这种交互具有重新训练 DNN 的能力。随机梯度下降 (SGD) 是一种广泛使用的算法，通过迭代优化训练数据的参数来训练 DNN。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的方法，通过将 SGD 算法拆分为简单的计算元素，为基线 DNN 加速器（仅推理）添加训练能力。然后，基于这种启发式方法，我们提出了 TaxoNN，一种用于 DNN 训练的轻量级加速器。 TaxoNN 可以通过使用时间复用方法和低位宽单元重用推理过程中使用的硬件资源来轻松调整 DNN 权重。我们的实验结果表明，与全精度实现相比，TaxoNN 的误分类率平均高出 0.97%。此外，与最先进的 DNN 训练加速器相比，TaxoNN 可以节省 2.1$\times$ 的功耗，并减少 1.65$\times$ 的面积。

AI.tldr: 设计一种轻量级深度神经网络训练加速器TaxoNN，通过复用推理硬件资源实现低功耗高效训练。
AI.motivation: 智能嵌入式设备需要实时适应环境变化，但传统训练算法资源消耗大，现有加速器难以兼顾训练效率与硬件成本。
AI.method: 将随机梯度下降算法拆解为基本计算单元，利用时间复用技术与低比特宽硬件模块，在推理架构基础上实现权重调整。
AI.result: 相较全精度方案误分类率仅增加0.97%，功耗降低2.1倍，面积缩减1.65倍，优于现有训练加速器。
AI.conclusion: TaxoNN通过创新架构设计，在保持较高训练精度的同时显著降低硬件开销，为边缘设备部署提供了可行方案。

result: 相较全精度方案误分类率仅增加0.97%，功耗降低2.1倍，面积缩减1.65倍，优于现有训练加速器。
conclusion: TaxoNN通过创新架构设计，在保持较高训练精度的同时显著降低硬件开销，为边缘设备部署提供了可行方案。
search_text: TaxoNN: A Light-Weight Accelerator for Deep Neural Network Training TaxoNN：用于深度神经网络训练的轻量级加速器 Emerging intelligent embedded devices rely on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to be able to interact with the real-world environment. This interaction comes with the ability to retrain DNNs, since environmental conditions change continuously in time. Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is a widely used algorithm to train DNNs by optimizing the parameters over the training data iteratively. In this work, first we present a novel approach to add the training ability to a baseline DNN accelerator (inference only) by splitting the SGD algorithm into simple computational elements. Then, based on this heuristic approach we propose TaxoNN, a light-weight accelerator for DNN training. TaxoNN can easily tune the DNN weights by reusing the hardware resources used in the inference process using a time-multiplexing approach and low-bitwidth units. Our experimental results show that TaxoNN delivers, on average, 0.97% higher misclassification rate compared to a full-precision implementation. Moreover, TaxoNN provides 2.1$\times$ power saving and 1.65$\times$ area reduction over the state-of-the-art DNN training accelerator. 新兴的智能嵌入式设备依靠深度神经网络 (DNN) 来与现实世界环境进行交互。由于环境条件随时间不断变化，因此这种交互具有重新训练 DNN 的能力。随机梯度下降 (SGD) 是一种广泛使用的算法，通过迭代优化训练数据的参数来训练 DNN。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的方法，通过将 SGD 算法拆分为简单的计算元素，为基线 DNN 加速器（仅推理）添加训练能力。然后，基于这种启发式方法，我们提出了 TaxoNN，一种用于 DNN 训练的轻量级加速器。 TaxoNN 可以通过使用时间复用方法和低位宽单元重用推理过程中使用的硬件资源来轻松调整 DNN 权重。我们的实验结果表明，与全精度实现相比，TaxoNN 的误分类率平均高出 0.97%。此外，与最先进的 DNN 训练加速器相比，TaxoNN 可以节省 2.1$\times$ 的功耗，并减少 1.65$\times$ 的面积。 设计一种轻量级深度神经网络训练加速器TaxoNN，通过复用推理硬件资源实现低功耗高效训练。 Reza Hojabr,Kamyar Givaki,Kossar Pourahmadi,Parsa Nooralinejad,Ahmad Khonsari,Dara Rahmati,M. Hassan Najafi cs.AR,cs.LG,cs.NE

title: Lexically Cohesive Neural Machine Translation with Copy Mechanism
title_zh: 具有复制机制的词汇衔接神经机器翻译
abstract: Lexically cohesive translations preserve consistency in word choices in document-level translation. We employ a copy mechanism into a context-aware neural machine translation model to allow copying words from previous translation outputs. Different from previous context-aware neural machine translation models that handle all the discourse phenomena implicitly, our model explicitly addresses the lexical cohesion problem by boosting the probabilities to output words consistently. We conduct experiments on Japanese to English translation using an evaluation dataset for discourse translation. The results showed that the proposed model significantly improved lexical cohesion compared to previous context-aware models.
summary: Lexically cohesive translations preserve consistency in word choices in document-level translation. We employ a copy mechanism into a context-aware neural machine translation model to allow copying words from previous translation outputs. Different from previous context-aware neural machine translation models that handle all the discourse phenomena implicitly, our model explicitly addresses the lexical cohesion problem by boosting the probabilities to output words consistently. We conduct experiments on Japanese to English translation using an evaluation dataset for discourse translation. The results showed that the proposed model significantly improved lexical cohesion compared to previous context-aware models.
abstract_zh: 词汇衔接翻译在文档级翻译中保持单词选择的一致性。我们在上下文感知神经机器翻译模型中采用了复制机制，以允许从以前的翻译输出中复制单词。与之前隐式处理所有话语现象的上下文感知神经机器翻译模型不同，我们的模型通过提高一致输出单词的概率来明确解决词汇衔接问题。我们使用话语翻译评估数据集进行日英翻译实验。结果表明，与之前的上下文感知模型相比，所提出的模型显着提高了词汇衔接。

AI.tldr: 提出一种带有复制机制的神经机器翻译模型，以提升文档级翻译中的词汇一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型隐式处理语篇现象，难以有效保持翻译中词汇选择的一致性，需显式解决词汇连贯性问题。
AI.method: 在上下文感知的神经机器翻译模型中引入复制机制，通过显式复制前序翻译词汇增强输出一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在日语到英语的翻译任务中显著提升了词汇一致性。
AI.conclusion: 显式处理词汇一致性可有效提升文档级翻译质量，复制机制为解决该问题提供有效途径。

title: Learning Adaptive Language Interfaces through Decomposition
title_zh: 通过分解学习自适应语言界面
comment: Accepted at the 1st Workshop for Interactive and Executable Semantic Parsing (IntEx-SemPar) @ EMNLP 2020. 11 pages, 5 figures
comments: Accepted at the 1st Workshop for Interactive and Executable Semantic Parsing (IntEx-SemPar) @ EMNLP 2020. 11 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Our goal is to create an interactive natural language interface that efficiently and reliably learns from users to complete tasks in simulated robotics settings. We introduce a neural semantic parsing system that learns new high-level abstractions through decomposition: users interactively teach the system by breaking down high-level utterances describing novel behavior into low-level steps that it can understand. Unfortunately, existing methods either rely on grammars which parse sentences with limited flexibility, or neural sequence-to-sequence models that do not learn efficiently or reliably from individual examples. Our approach bridges this gap, demonstrating the flexibility of modern neural systems, as well as the one-shot reliable generalization of grammar-based methods. Our crowdsourced interactive experiments suggest that over time, users complete complex tasks more efficiently while using our system by leveraging what they just taught. At the same time, getting users to trust the system enough to be incentivized to teach high-level utterances is still an ongoing challenge. We end with a discussion of some of the obstacles we need to overcome to fully realize the potential of the interactive paradigm.
summary: Our goal is to create an interactive natural language interface that efficiently and reliably learns from users to complete tasks in simulated robotics settings. We introduce a neural semantic parsing system that learns new high-level abstractions through decomposition: users interactively teach the system by breaking down high-level utterances describing novel behavior into low-level steps that it can understand. Unfortunately, existing methods either rely on grammars which parse sentences with limited flexibility, or neural sequence-to-sequence models that do not learn efficiently or reliably from individual examples. Our approach bridges this gap, demonstrating the flexibility of modern neural systems, as well as the one-shot reliable generalization of grammar-based methods. Our crowdsourced interactive experiments suggest that over time, users complete complex tasks more efficiently while using our system by leveraging what they just taught. At the same time, getting users to trust the system enough to be incentivized to teach high-level utterances is still an ongoing challenge. We end with a discussion of some of the obstacles we need to overcome to fully realize the potential of the interactive paradigm.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是创建一个交互式自然语言界面，可以高效可靠地向用户学习，以在模拟机器人设置中完成任务。我们引入了一种神经语义解析系统，该系统通过分解来学习新的高级抽象：用户通过将描述新行为的高级话语分解为它可以理解的低级步骤来交互式地教导系统。不幸的是，现有的方法要么依赖于灵活性有限的解析句子的语法，要么依赖于不能从单个示例中有效或可靠地学习的神经序列到序列模型。我们的方法弥补了这一差距，展示了现代神经系统的灵活性，以及​​基于语法的方法的一次性可靠泛化。我们的众包互动实验表明，随着时间的推移，用户通过利用他们刚刚教授的内容来使用我们的系统，从而更有效地完成复杂的任务。与此同时，让用户对系统有足够的信任，从而有动力教授高级话语仍然是一个持续的挑战。最后我们讨论了我们需要克服的一些障碍，以充分发挥交互范式的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在创建一种交互式自然语言接口，通过分解用户指令为低层步骤，使系统能在模拟机器人环境中高效学习并完成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或依赖灵活性有限的语法解析，或依赖难以从单例中可靠学习的神经序列模型，无法兼顾灵活性与学习效率。
AI.method: 提出神经语义解析系统，结合现代神经网络的灵活性与语法方法的泛化能力，通过用户交互分解高层指令为可执行的低层步骤。
AI.result: 实验表明用户随时间推移能更高效完成复杂任务，但系统需进一步解决用户信任及激励其教学高层指令的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需克服用户信任与教学激励等障碍，才能充分实现交互式学习范式的潜力。

title: On Structural Parameterizations of Load Coloring
title_zh: 负载着色的结构参数化
abstract: Given a graph $G$ and a positive integer $k$, the 2-Load coloring problem is to check whether there is a $2$-coloring $f:V(G) \rightarrow \{r,b\}$ of $G$ such that for every $i \in \{r,b\}$, there are at least $k$ edges with both end vertices colored $i$. It is known that the problem is NP-complete even on special classes of graphs like regular graphs. Gutin and Jones (Inf Process Lett 114:446-449, 2014) showed that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable by giving a kernel with at most $7k$ vertices. Barbero et al. (Algorithmica 79:211-229, 2017) obtained a kernel with less than $4k$ vertices and $O(k)$ edges, improving the earlier result. In this paper, we study the parameterized complexity of the problem with respect to structural graph parameters. We show that \lcp{} cannot be solved in time $f(w)n^{o(w)}$, unless ETH fails and it can be solved in time $n^{O(w)}$, where $n$ is the size of the input graph, $w$ is the clique-width of the graph and $f$ is an arbitrary function of $w$. Next, we consider the parameters distance to cluster graphs, distance to co-cluster graphs and distance to threshold graphs, which are weaker than the parameter clique-width and show that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) with respect to these parameters. Finally, we show that \lcp{} is NP-complete even on bipartite graphs and split graphs.
summary: Given a graph $G$ and a positive integer $k$, the 2-Load coloring problem is to check whether there is a $2$-coloring $f:V(G) \rightarrow \{r,b\}$ of $G$ such that for every $i \in \{r,b\}$, there are at least $k$ edges with both end vertices colored $i$. It is known that the problem is NP-complete even on special classes of graphs like regular graphs. Gutin and Jones (Inf Process Lett 114:446-449, 2014) showed that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable by giving a kernel with at most $7k$ vertices. Barbero et al. (Algorithmica 79:211-229, 2017) obtained a kernel with less than $4k$ vertices and $O(k)$ edges, improving the earlier result. In this paper, we study the parameterized complexity of the problem with respect to structural graph parameters. We show that \lcp{} cannot be solved in time $f(w)n^{o(w)}$, unless ETH fails and it can be solved in time $n^{O(w)}$, where $n$ is the size of the input graph, $w$ is the clique-width of the graph and $f$ is an arbitrary function of $w$. Next, we consider the parameters distance to cluster graphs, distance to co-cluster graphs and distance to threshold graphs, which are weaker than the parameter clique-width and show that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) with respect to these parameters. Finally, we show that \lcp{} is NP-complete even on bipartite graphs and split graphs.
abstract_zh: 给定一个图 $G$ 和一个正整数 $k$，2-Load 着色问题是检查 $G$ 是否存在 $2$ 着色 $f:V(G) \rightarrow \{r,b\}$，使得对于 \{r,b\}$ 中的每个 $i \，至少有 $k$ 条边，其两端顶点着色为 $i$。众所周知，即使在特殊类别的图（如常规图）上，该问题也是 NP 完全的。 Gutin 和 Jones（Inf Process Lett 114:446-449, 2014）表明，通过给出最多具有 $7k$ 顶点的内核，该问题可以通过固定参数处理。巴贝罗等人。 (Algorithmica 79:211-229, 2017) 获得了一个少于 $4k$ 顶点和 $O(k)$ 边的内核，改进了早期的结果。在本文中，我们研究了关于结构图参数的问题的参数化复杂性。我们证明 \lcp{} 无法在 $f(w)n^{o(w)}$ 时间内解决，除非 ETH 失败并且可以在 $n^{O(w)}$ 时间内解决，其中 $n$ 是输入图的大小，$w$ 是图的团宽度，$f$ 是 $w$ 的任意函数。接下来，我们考虑参数到聚类图的距离、到共聚类图的距离和到阈值图的距离，这些参数比参数 clique-width 弱，并且表明该问题对于这些参数是固定参数可处理（FPT）的。最后，我们证明 \lcp{} 即使在二部图和分割图上也是 NP 完全的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了2-负载着色问题在结构图参数下的参数化复杂性，分析了其在不同参数下的计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 尽管已知2-负载着色问题在一般图中是NP难的，且存在基于顶点数的参数化结果，但针对结构图参数（如团宽、到特定图类的距离）的复杂性研究仍不明确，需进一步探索。
AI.method: 通过ETH假设推导下界，设计针对距离簇图、共簇图和阈值图等结构参数的FPT算法，并证明问题在二分图和分割图中的NP完全性。
AI.result: 证明问题无法在亚指数时间内解决（除非ETH失败），对距离簇图等参数具有FPT算法，且问题在二分图和分割图中保持NP完全。
AI.conclusion: 结构参数化视角下，2-负载着色问题在部分参数下可高效求解，但在其他参数和图类中仍具挑战性，需更多参数化分析。

search_text: On Structural Parameterizations of Load Coloring 负载着色的结构参数化 Given a graph $G$ and a positive integer $k$, the 2-Load coloring problem is to check whether there is a $2$-coloring $f:V(G) \rightarrow \{r,b\}$ of $G$ such that for every $i \in \{r,b\}$, there are at least $k$ edges with both end vertices colored $i$. It is known that the problem is NP-complete even on special classes of graphs like regular graphs. Gutin and Jones (Inf Process Lett 114:446-449, 2014) showed that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable by giving a kernel with at most $7k$ vertices. Barbero et al. (Algorithmica 79:211-229, 2017) obtained a kernel with less than $4k$ vertices and $O(k)$ edges, improving the earlier result. In this paper, we study the parameterized complexity of the problem with respect to structural graph parameters. We show that \lcp{} cannot be solved in time $f(w)n^{o(w)}$, unless ETH fails and it can be solved in time $n^{O(w)}$, where $n$ is the size of the input graph, $w$ is the clique-width of the graph and $f$ is an arbitrary function of $w$. Next, we consider the parameters distance to cluster graphs, distance to co-cluster graphs and distance to threshold graphs, which are weaker than the parameter clique-width and show that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) with respect to these parameters. Finally, we show that \lcp{} is NP-complete even on bipartite graphs and split graphs. 给定一个图 $G$ 和一个正整数 $k$，2-Load 着色问题是检查 $G$ 是否存在 $2$ 着色 $f:V(G) \rightarrow \{r,b\}$，使得对于 \{r,b\}$ 中的每个 $i \，至少有 $k$ 条边，其两端顶点着色为 $i$。众所周知，即使在特殊类别的图（如常规图）上，该问题也是 NP 完全的。 Gutin 和 Jones（Inf Process Lett 114:446-449, 2014）表明，通过给出最多具有 $7k$ 顶点的内核，该问题可以通过固定参数处理。巴贝罗等人。 (Algorithmica 79:211-229, 2017) 获得了一个少于 $4k$ 顶点和 $O(k)$ 边的内核，改进了早期的结果。在本文中，我们研究了关于结构图参数的问题的参数化复杂性。我们证明 \lcp{} 无法在 $f(w)n^{o(w)}$ 时间内解决，除非 ETH 失败并且可以在 $n^{O(w)}$ 时间内解决，其中 $n$ 是输入图的大小，$w$ 是图的团宽度，$f$ 是 $w$ 的任意函数。接下来，我们考虑参数到聚类图的距离、到共聚类图的距离和到阈值图的距离，这些参数比参数 clique-width 弱，并且表明该问题对于这些参数是固定参数可处理（FPT）的。最后，我们证明 \lcp{} 即使在二部图和分割图上也是 NP 完全的。 本文研究了2-负载着色问题在结构图参数下的参数化复杂性，分析了其在不同参数下的计算复杂度。 I. Vinod Reddy cs.DS

title: Constructing a Visual Relationship Authenticity Dataset
title_zh: 构建视觉关系真实性数据集
abstract: A visual relationship denotes a relationship between two objects in an image, which can be represented as a triplet of (subject; predicate; object). Visual relationship detection is crucial for scene understanding in images. Existing visual relationship detection datasets only contain true relationships that correctly describe the content in an image. However, distinguishing false visual relationships from true ones is also crucial for image understanding and grounded natural language processing. In this paper, we construct a visual relationship authenticity dataset, where both true and false relationships among all objects appeared in the captions in the Flickr30k entities image caption dataset are annotated. The dataset is available at https://github.com/codecreator2053/VR_ClassifiedDataset. We hope that this dataset can promote the study on both vision and language understanding.
summary: A visual relationship denotes a relationship between two objects in an image, which can be represented as a triplet of (subject; predicate; object). Visual relationship detection is crucial for scene understanding in images. Existing visual relationship detection datasets only contain true relationships that correctly describe the content in an image. However, distinguishing false visual relationships from true ones is also crucial for image understanding and grounded natural language processing. In this paper, we construct a visual relationship authenticity dataset, where both true and false relationships among all objects appeared in the captions in the Flickr30k entities image caption dataset are annotated. The dataset is available at https://github.com/codecreator2053/VR_ClassifiedDataset. We hope that this dataset can promote the study on both vision and language understanding.
abstract_zh: 视觉关系表示图像中两个对象之间的关系，可以表示为（主语；谓语；宾语）的三元组。视觉关系检测对于图像中的场景理解至关重要。现有的视觉关系检测数据集仅包含正确描述图像内容的真实关系。然而，区分虚假视觉关系和真实视觉关系对于图像理解和基础自然语言处理也至关重要。在本文中，我们构建了一个视觉关系真实性数据集，其中注释了 Flickr30k 实体图像标题数据集中的标题中出现的所有对象之间的真假关系。该数据集可从 https://github.com/codecreator2053/VR_ClassifiedDataset 获取。我们希望这个数据集能够促进视觉和语言理解的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个包含真实与虚假视觉关系的标注数据集，用于促进图像理解与语言处理的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉关系检测数据集仅包含真实关系，但区分虚假关系对图像理解及语言处理至关重要，缺乏相关数据制约了研究进展。
AI.method: 基于Flickr30k实体数据集的图像字幕，对所有对象间的关系进行标注，分类为真实或虚假关系，并构建公开数据集。
AI.result: 成功创建了包含真实与虚假视觉关系的分类数据集，已开源至GitHub供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为视觉与语言联合理解任务提供了新资源，有望推动相关算法的改进与应用。

title: Contrastive Explanations for Reinforcement Learning via Embedded Self Predictions
title_zh: 通过嵌入式自我预测进行强化学习的对比解释
abstract: We investigate a deep reinforcement learning (RL) architecture that supports explaining why a learned agent prefers one action over another. The key idea is to learn action-values that are directly represented via human-understandable properties of expected futures. This is realized via the embedded self-prediction (ESP)model, which learns said properties in terms of human provided features. Action preferences can then be explained by contrasting the future properties predicted for each action. To address cases where there are a large number of features, we develop a novel method for computing minimal sufficient explanations from anESP. Our case studies in three domains, including a complex strategy game, show that ESP models can be effectively learned and support insightful explanations.
summary: We investigate a deep reinforcement learning (RL) architecture that supports explaining why a learned agent prefers one action over another. The key idea is to learn action-values that are directly represented via human-understandable properties of expected futures. This is realized via the embedded self-prediction (ESP)model, which learns said properties in terms of human provided features. Action preferences can then be explained by contrasting the future properties predicted for each action. To address cases where there are a large number of features, we develop a novel method for computing minimal sufficient explanations from anESP. Our case studies in three domains, including a complex strategy game, show that ESP models can be effectively learned and support insightful explanations.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种深度强化学习（RL）架构，该架构支持解释为什么学习代理更喜欢一个动作而不是另一个动作。关键思想是学习通过人类可理解的预期未来属性直接表示的行动价值。这是通过嵌入式自我预测（ESP）模型实现的，该模型根据人类提供的特征来学习所述属性。然后可以通过对比每个动作预测的未来属性来解释动作偏好。为了解决存在大量特征的情况，我们开发了一种新方法，用于从 ESP 计算最少的充分解释。我们在三个领域（包括复杂策略游戏）的案例研究表明，ESP 模型可以有效学习并支持富有洞察力的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过嵌入式自预测（ESP）模型来解释强化学习中智能体为何偏好某一动作的深度强化学习架构。
AI.motivation: 现有的强化学习模型通常难以解释智能体为何偏好某一动作，缺乏对决策过程的直观理解，因此需要一种能够生成可解释性解释的模型。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种嵌入式自预测（ESP）模型，通过学习与人类提供的特征相关的未来属性来表示动作值，并通过对比不同动作的未来属性来解释动作偏好。
AI.result: 在三个不同领域（包括一个复杂策略游戏）的案例研究中，ESP模型被有效学习并支持了有洞察力的解释。
AI.conclusion: ESP模型能够有效地学习并解释强化学习智能体的动作偏好，为理解复杂决策过程提供了新的方法。

Our case studies in three domains, including a complex strategy game, show that ESP models can be effectively learned and support insightful explanations. 我们研究了一种深度强化学习（RL）架构，该架构支持解释为什么学习代理更喜欢一个动作而不是另一个动作。关键思想是学习通过人类可理解的预期未来属性直接表示的行动价值。这是通过嵌入式自我预测（ESP）模型实现的，该模型根据人类提供的特征来学习所述属性。然后可以通过对比每个动作预测的未来属性来解释动作偏好。为了解决存在大量特征的情况，我们开发了一种新方法，用于从 ESP 计算最少的充分解释。我们在三个领域（包括复杂策略游戏）的案例研究表明，ESP 模型可以有效学习并支持富有洞察力的解释。 本文提出了一种通过嵌入式自预测（ESP）模型来解释强化学习中智能体为何偏好某一动作的深度强化学习架构。 Zhengxian Lin,Kim-Ho Lam,Alan Fern cs.AI

title: MammoGANesis: Controlled Generation of High-Resolution Mammograms for Radiology Education
title_zh: MammoGANesis：用于放射学教育的高分辨率乳房 X 光照片的受控生成
abstract: During their formative years, radiology trainees are required to interpret hundreds of mammograms per month, with the objective of becoming apt at discerning the subtle patterns differentiating benign from malignant lesions. Unfortunately, medico-legal and technical hurdles make it difficult to access and query medical images for training. In this paper we train a generative adversarial network (GAN) to synthesize 512 x 512 high-resolution mammograms. The resulting model leads to the unsupervised separation of high-level features (e.g. the standard mammography views and the nature of the breast lesions), with stochastic variation in the generated images (e.g. breast adipose tissue, calcification), enabling user-controlled global and local attribute-editing of the synthesized images. We demonstrate the model's ability to generate anatomically and medically relevant mammograms by achieving an average AUC of 0.54 in a double-blind study on four expert mammography radiologists to distinguish between generated and real images, ascribing to the high visual quality of the synthesized and edited mammograms, and to their potential use in advancing and facilitating medical education.
summary: During their formative years, radiology trainees are required to interpret hundreds of mammograms per month, with the objective of becoming apt at discerning the subtle patterns differentiating benign from malignant lesions. Unfortunately, medico-legal and technical hurdles make it difficult to access and query medical images for training. In this paper we train a generative adversarial network (GAN) to synthesize 512 x 512 high-resolution mammograms. The resulting model leads to the unsupervised separation of high-level features (e.g. the standard mammography views and the nature of the breast lesions), with stochastic variation in the generated images (e.g. breast adipose tissue, calcification), enabling user-controlled global and local attribute-editing of the synthesized images. We demonstrate the model's ability to generate anatomically and medically relevant mammograms by achieving an average AUC of 0.54 in a double-blind study on four expert mammography radiologists to distinguish between generated and real images, ascribing to the high visual quality of the synthesized and edited mammograms, and to their potential use in advancing and facilitating medical education.
abstract_zh: 在他们的成长过程中，放射学实习生每月需要解读数百张乳房X光照片，目的是善于辨别良性病变和恶性病变的微妙模式。不幸的是，医学法律和技术障碍使得访问和查询用于训练的医学图像变得困难。在本文中，我们训练生成对抗网络 (GAN) 来合成 512 x 512 高分辨率乳房 X 光照片。由此产生的模型导致高级特征（例如标准乳房X线摄影视图和乳房病变的性质）的无监督分离，生成的图像具有随机变化（例如乳房脂肪组织、钙化），从而实现用户控制的合成图像的全局和局部属性编辑。我们在四位乳腺 X 线摄影放射科医生的双盲研究中实现了 0.54 的平均 AUC，以区分生成的图像和真实图像，从而证明了该模型生成解剖学和医学相关的乳腺 X 线照片的能力，这归因于合成和编辑的乳房 X 线照片的高视觉质量，以及它们在推进和促进医学教育方面的潜在用途。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MammoGANesis模型，利用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成高分辨率乳腺X光片以辅助放射学教育。
AI.motivation: 放射科住院医师需大量解读乳腺X光片，但医疗法律和技术限制导致难以获取真实图像进行训练。
AI.method: 训练GAN生成512x512高分辨率合成乳腺X光片，实现无监督特征分离与用户可控的全局/局部属性编辑。
AI.result: 双盲测试中四位专家区分生成与真实图像的平均AUC为0.54，验证了图像的视觉质量与医学适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可生成解剖学和医学上可信的乳腺X光片，有望推动医学教育发展。

title: Complexity-based speciation and genotype representation for neuroevolution
title_zh: 基于复杂性的神经进化物种形成和基因型表示
comment: ef:2016 IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC), Vancouver, BC, 2016, pp. 3092-3101
comments: ef:2016 IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC), Vancouver, BC, 2016, pp. 3092-3101
abstract: This paper introduces a speciation principle for neuroevolution where evolving networks are grouped into species based on the number of hidden neurons, which is indicative of the complexity of the search space. This speciation principle is indivisibly coupled with a novel genotype representation which is characterised by zero genome redundancy, high resilience to bloat, explicit marking of recurrent connections, as well as an efficient and reproducible stack-based evaluation procedure for networks with arbitrary topology. Furthermore, the proposed speciation principle is employed in several techniques designed to promote and preserve diversity within species and in the ecosystem as a whole. The competitive performance of the proposed framework, named Cortex, is demonstrated through experiments. A highly customisable software platform which implements the concepts proposed in this study is also introduced in the hope that it will serve as a useful and reliable tool for experimentation in the field of neuroevolution.
summary: This paper introduces a speciation principle for neuroevolution where evolving networks are grouped into species based on the number of hidden neurons, which is indicative of the complexity of the search space. This speciation principle is indivisibly coupled with a novel genotype representation which is characterised by zero genome redundancy, high resilience to bloat, explicit marking of recurrent connections, as well as an efficient and reproducible stack-based evaluation procedure for networks with arbitrary topology. Furthermore, the proposed speciation principle is employed in several techniques designed to promote and preserve diversity within species and in the ecosystem as a whole. The competitive performance of the proposed framework, named Cortex, is demonstrated through experiments. A highly customisable software platform which implements the concepts proposed in this study is also introduced in the hope that it will serve as a useful and reliable tool for experimentation in the field of neuroevolution.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了神经进化的物种形成原理，其中进化网络根据隐藏神经元的数量分为物种，这表明了搜索空间的复杂性。这种形态形成原理与一种新颖的基因型表示不可分割地结合在一起，其特点是零基因组冗余、对膨胀的高弹性、重复连接的显式标记，以及针对具有任意拓扑的网络的高效且可重复的基于堆栈的评估程序。此外，所提出的物种形成原理被应用于多种旨在促进和保护物种内部和整个生态系统多样性的技术中。通过实验证明了所提出的框架（称为 Cortex）的竞争性能。还介绍了一个高度可定制的软件平台，该平台实现了本研究中提出的概念，希望它将成为神经进化领域实验的有用且可靠的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于复杂度的神经进化物种划分原则及新型基因型表示方法，旨在提升神经网络演化效率与多样性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经进化方法在处理复杂网络时存在基因组冗余、抗膨胀能力差及多样性不足等问题，需改进种群管理与表示机制。
AI.method: 基于隐藏神经元数量划分物种，设计零冗余基因型表示，包含循环连接标记与栈式评估程序，并引入多样性维持技术。
AI.result: 提出的Cortex框架在实验中表现优异，配套软件平台可支持神经进化领域的可定制化研究。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效平衡了复杂度控制与多样性保持，为神经进化提供了高效可靠的实现工具。
