title: The Knowledge Graph for Macroeconomic Analysis with Alternative Big Data
title_zh: 用另类大数据进行宏观经济分析的知识图
abstract: The current knowledge system of macroeconomics is built on interactions among a small number of variables, since traditional macroeconomic models can mostly handle a handful of inputs. Recent work using big data suggests that a much larger number of variables are active in driving the dynamics of the aggregate economy. In this paper, we introduce a knowledge graph (KG) that consists of not only linkages between traditional economic variables but also new alternative big data variables. We extract these new variables and the linkages by applying advanced natural language processing (NLP) tools on the massive textual data of academic literature and research reports. As one example of the potential applications, we use it as the prior knowledge to select variables for economic forecasting models in macroeconomics. Compared to statistical variable selection methods, KG-based methods achieve significantly higher forecasting accuracy, especially for long run forecasts.
summary: The current knowledge system of macroeconomics is built on interactions among a small number of variables, since traditional macroeconomic models can mostly handle a handful of inputs. Recent work using big data suggests that a much larger number of variables are active in driving the dynamics of the aggregate economy. In this paper, we introduce a knowledge graph (KG) that consists of not only linkages between traditional economic variables but also new alternative big data variables. We extract these new variables and the linkages by applying advanced natural language processing (NLP) tools on the massive textual data of academic literature and research reports. As one example of the potential applications, we use it as the prior knowledge to select variables for economic forecasting models in macroeconomics. Compared to statistical variable selection methods, KG-based methods achieve significantly higher forecasting accuracy, especially for long run forecasts.
abstract_zh: 当前的宏观经济学知识体系是建立在少数变量之间的相互作用之上的，因为传统的宏观经济模型大多只能处理少量的输入。最近使用大数据的研究表明，有更多的变量在推动总体经济的动态方面发挥着积极作用。在本文中，我们引入了一种知识图（KG），它不仅包含传统经济变量之间的联系，还包含新的替代大数据变量之间的联系。我们通过对学术文献和研究报告的海量文本数据应用先进的自然语言处理（NLP）工具来提取这些新变量和联系。作为潜在应用的一个例子，我们用它作为先验知识来选择宏观经济学中经济预测模型的变量。与统计变量选择方法相比，基于知识图谱的方法具有显着更高的预测精度，特别是对于长期预测。

AI.tldr: 构建融合传统经济变量与替代大数据变量的知识图谱，用于提升宏观经济分析的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统宏观经济模型仅能处理少量变量，而大数据表明更多变量驱动经济动态，需新方法整合多元数据。
AI.method: 利用自然语言处理技术从学术文献和研究报告中提取新变量及关联，构建包含传统与大数据变量的知识图谱。
AI.result: 基于知识图谱的变量选择方法在经济预测中显著优于统计方法，尤其在长期预测中准确性提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱能有效整合多源变量关系，为宏观经济分析提供更精准的预测工具，拓展传统模型的分析边界。

search_text: The Knowledge Graph for Macroeconomic Analysis with Alternative Big Data 用另类大数据进行宏观经济分析的知识图 The current knowledge system of macroeconomics is built on interactions among a small number of variables, since traditional macroeconomic models can mostly handle a handful of inputs. Recent work using big data suggests that a much larger number of variables are active in driving the dynamics of the aggregate economy. In this paper, we introduce a knowledge graph (KG) that consists of not only linkages between traditional economic variables but also new alternative big data variables. We extract these new variables and the linkages by applying advanced natural language processing (NLP) tools on the massive textual data of academic literature and research reports. As one example of the potential applications, we use it as the prior knowledge to select variables for economic forecasting models in macroeconomics. Compared to statistical variable selection methods, KG-based methods achieve significantly higher forecasting accuracy, especially for long run forecasts. 当前的宏观经济学知识体系是建立在少数变量之间的相互作用之上的，因为传统的宏观经济模型大多只能处理少量的输入。最近使用大数据的研究表明，有更多的变量在推动总体经济的动态方面发挥着积极作用。在本文中，我们引入了一种知识图（KG），它不仅包含传统经济变量之间的联系，还包含新的替代大数据变量之间的联系。我们通过对学术文献和研究报告的海量文本数据应用先进的自然语言处理（NLP）工具来提取这些新变量和联系。作为潜在应用的一个例子，我们用它作为先验知识来选择宏观经济学中经济预测模型的变量。与统计变量选择方法相比，基于知识图谱的方法具有显着更高的预测精度，特别是对于长期预测。 构建融合传统经济变量与替代大数据变量的知识图谱，用于提升宏观经济分析的预测准确性。 Yucheng Yang,Yue Pang,Guanhua Huang,Weinan E econ.GN,cs.AI

authors_text: Changhan Wang,Yun Tang,Xutai Ma,Anne Wu,Sravya Popuri,Dmytro Okhonko,Juan Pino
title: fairseq S2T: Fast Speech-to-Text Modeling with fairseq
title_zh: fairseq S2T：使用 fairseq 进行快速语音到文本建模
abstract: We introduce fairseq S2T, a fairseq extension for speech-to-text (S2T) modeling tasks such as end-to-end speech recognition and speech-to-text translation. It follows fairseq's careful design for scalability and extensibility. We provide end-to-end workflows from data pre-processing, model training to offline (online) inference. We implement state-of-the-art RNN-based, Transformer-based as well as Conformer-based models and open-source detailed training recipes. Fairseq's machine translation models and language models can be seamlessly integrated into S2T workflows for multi-task learning or transfer learning. Fairseq S2T documentation and examples are available at https://github.com/pytorch/fairseq/tree/master/examples/speech_to_text.
summary: We introduce fairseq S2T, a fairseq extension for speech-to-text (S2T) modeling tasks such as end-to-end speech recognition and speech-to-text translation. It follows fairseq's careful design for scalability and extensibility. We provide end-to-end workflows from data pre-processing, model training to offline (online) inference. We implement state-of-the-art RNN-based, Transformer-based as well as Conformer-based models and open-source detailed training recipes. Fairseq's machine translation models and language models can be seamlessly integrated into S2T workflows for multi-task learning or transfer learning. Fairseq S2T documentation and examples are available at https://github.com/pytorch/fairseq/tree/master/examples/speech_to_text.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 fairseq S2T，这是用于语音到文本 (S2T) 建模任务（例如端到端语音识别和语音到文本翻译）的 fairseq 扩展。它遵循 fairseq 对可伸缩性和可扩展性的精心设计。我们提供从数据预处理、模型训练到离线（在线）推理的端到端工作流程。我们实施最先进的基于 RNN、Transformer 以及 Conformer 的模型和开源详细训练方案。 Fairseq 的机器翻译模型和语言模型可以无缝集成到 S2T 工作流程中，以进行多任务学习或迁移学习。 Fairseq S2T 文档和示例可在 https://github.com/pytorch/fairseq/tree/master/examples/speech_to_text 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了fairseq S2T，一个基于fairseq的语音到文本建模框架，支持端到端语音识别和语音翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 为了解决语音到文本任务中模型扩展性差、流程不统一的问题，提供可扩展且模块化的工具和训练方案。
AI.method: 实现基于RNN、Transformer和Conformer的模型，提供从数据预处理到推理的端到端流程，并集成机器翻译和语言模型以支持多任务学习。
AI.result: 开源了详细训练方案和代码，支持多任务与迁移学习，提升了语音到文本任务的灵活性和性能。
AI.conclusion: fairseq S2T为语音到文本研究提供了高效且可扩展的工具，促进了相关领域的技术发展与应用落地。

authors_text: Rohan Ramanath,Konstantin Salomatin,Jeffrey D. Gee,Kirill Talanine,Onkar Dalal,Gungor Polatkan,Sara Smoot,Deepak Kumar
title: Lambda Learner: Fast Incremental Learning on Data Streams
title_zh: Lambda Learner：数据流上的快速增量学习
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 27th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining, 2021
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 27th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining, 2021
abstract: One of the most well-established applications of machine learning is in deciding what content to show website visitors. When observation data comes from high-velocity, user-generated data streams, machine learning methods perform a balancing act between model complexity, training time, and computational costs. Furthermore, when model freshness is critical, the training of models becomes time-constrained. Parallelized batch offline training, although horizontally scalable, is often not time-considerate or cost-effective. In this paper, we propose Lambda Learner, a new framework for training models by incremental updates in response to mini-batches from data streams. We show that the resulting model of our framework closely estimates a periodically updated model trained on offline data and outperforms it when model updates are time-sensitive. We provide theoretical proof that the incremental learning updates improve the loss-function over a stale batch model. We present a large-scale deployment on the sponsored content platform for a large social network, serving hundreds of millions of users across different channels (e.g., desktop, mobile). We address challenges and complexities from both algorithms and infrastructure perspectives, and illustrate the system details for computation, storage, and streaming production of training data.
summary: One of the most well-established applications of machine learning is in deciding what content to show website visitors. When observation data comes from high-velocity, user-generated data streams, machine learning methods perform a balancing act between model complexity, training time, and computational costs. Furthermore, when model freshness is critical, the training of models becomes time-constrained. Parallelized batch offline training, although horizontally scalable, is often not time-considerate or cost-effective. In this paper, we propose Lambda Learner, a new framework for training models by incremental updates in response to mini-batches from data streams. We show that the resulting model of our framework closely estimates a periodically updated model trained on offline data and outperforms it when model updates are time-sensitive. We provide theoretical proof that the incremental learning updates improve the loss-function over a stale batch model. We present a large-scale deployment on the sponsored content platform for a large social network, serving hundreds of millions of users across different channels (e.g., desktop, mobile). We address challenges and complexities from both algorithms and infrastructure perspectives, and illustrate the system details for computation, storage, and streaming production of training data.
abstract_zh: 机器学习最成熟的应用之一是决定向网站访问者显示哪些内容。当观测数据来自高速、用户生成的数据流时，机器学习方法会在模型复杂性、训练时间和计算成本之间执行平衡操作。此外，当模型的新鲜度至关重要时，模型的训练就会受到时间限制。并行批量离线训练虽然可以水平扩展，但通常不节省时间或成本效益。在本文中，我们提出了 Lambda Learner，这是一种通过增量更新来训练模型的新框架，以响应数据流中的小批量。我们表明，我们框架的结果模型密切估计了在离线数据上训练的定期更新模型，并且当模型更新对时间敏感时，其性能优于该模型。我们提供了理论证明，证明增量学习更新可以改善过时批量模型的损失函数。我们在大型社交网络的赞助内容平台上进行了大规模部署，为不同渠道（例如桌面、移动）的数亿用户提供服务。我们从算法和基础设施的角度解决了挑战和复杂性，并说明了训练数据的计算、存储和流式生产的系统细节。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Lambda Learner的新框架，用于通过数据流中的小批量增量更新来训练模型。
AI.motivation: 在高速度、用户生成的数据流中，传统的批量离线训练方法在时间和成本上不够高效，且无法满足模型更新的时效性需求。
AI.method: Lambda Learner框架通过增量学习方法，在数据流中对模型进行小批量更新，从而实现实时模型训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，Lambda Learner框架训练的模型在时效性要求高的情况下优于传统离线训练模型，并且在大规模社交网络平台上成功部署。
AI.conclusion: Lambda Learner框架有效解决了数据流中模型更新的时效性和计算成本问题，适用于大规模在线内容推荐系统。

authors_text: Tsung-Yen Yang,Michael Hu,Yinlam Chow,Peter J. Ramadge,Karthik Narasimhan
title: Safe Reinforcement Learning with Natural Language Constraints
title_zh: 具有自然语言约束的安全强化学习
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
comments: The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: While safe reinforcement learning (RL) holds great promise for many practical applications like robotics or autonomous cars, current approaches require specifying constraints in mathematical form. Such specifications demand domain expertise, limiting the adoption of safe RL. In this paper, we propose learning to interpret natural language constraints for safe RL. To this end, we first introduce HazardWorld, a new multi-task benchmark that requires an agent to optimize reward while not violating constraints specified in free-form text. We then develop an agent with a modular architecture that can interpret and adhere to such textual constraints while learning new tasks. Our model consists of (1) a constraint interpreter that encodes textual constraints into spatial and temporal representations of forbidden states, and (2) a policy network that uses these representations to produce a policy achieving minimal constraint violations during training. Across different domains in HazardWorld, we show that our method achieves higher rewards (up to11x) and fewer constraint violations (by 1.8x) compared to existing approaches. However, in terms of absolute performance, HazardWorld still poses significant challenges for agents to learn efficiently, motivating the need for future work.
summary: While safe reinforcement learning (RL) holds great promise for many practical applications like robotics or autonomous cars, current approaches require specifying constraints in mathematical form. Such specifications demand domain expertise, limiting the adoption of safe RL. In this paper, we propose learning to interpret natural language constraints for safe RL. To this end, we first introduce HazardWorld, a new multi-task benchmark that requires an agent to optimize reward while not violating constraints specified in free-form text. We then develop an agent with a modular architecture that can interpret and adhere to such textual constraints while learning new tasks. Our model consists of (1) a constraint interpreter that encodes textual constraints into spatial and temporal representations of forbidden states, and (2) a policy network that uses these representations to produce a policy achieving minimal constraint violations during training. Across different domains in HazardWorld, we show that our method achieves higher rewards (up to11x) and fewer constraint violations (by 1.8x) compared to existing approaches. However, in terms of absolute performance, HazardWorld still poses significant challenges for agents to learn efficiently, motivating the need for future work.
abstract_zh: 虽然安全强化学习 (RL) 对于机器人或自动驾驶汽车等许多实际应用具有广阔的前景，但当前的方法需要以数学形式指定约束。此类规范需要领域专业知识，限制了安全强化学习的采用。在本文中，我们建议学习解释自然语言约束以实现安全强化学习。为此，我们首先引入 HazardWorld，这是一种新的多任务基准，要求代理优化奖励，同时不违反自由格式文本中指定的约束。然后，我们开发一个具有模块化架构的代理，可以在学习新任务的同时解释并遵守此类文本约束。我们的模型由（1）一个约束解释器组成，它将文本约束编码为禁止状态的空间和时间表示，以及（2）一个策略网络，使用这些表示来生成在训练期间实现最小约束违规的策略。在 HazardWorld 的不同领域中，我们表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法获得了更高的奖励（高达 11 倍）和更少的约束违规（1.8 倍）。然而，就绝对性能而言，HazardWorld 仍然对智能体高效学习提出了重大挑战，激发了未来工作的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然语言约束的安全强化学习方法，通过模块化架构实现对文本约束的解读与遵循。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习依赖数学形式约束，需领域专业知识，限制了实际应用的普及。
AI.method: 构建HazardWorld多任务基准，设计包含约束解释器（将文本转化为时空状态表示）和策略网络（生成低违规策略）的模块化智能体。
AI.result: 在HazardWorld中取得最高11倍奖励和1.8倍约束违规减少效果，但基准环境仍存在显著学习效率挑战。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言约束方法展现优势，但需进一步研究解决HazardWorld环境中的高效学习难题。

search_text: Safe Reinforcement Learning with Natural Language Constraints 具有自然语言约束的安全强化学习 While safe reinforcement learning (RL) holds great promise for many practical applications like robotics or autonomous cars, current approaches require specifying constraints in mathematical form. Such specifications demand domain expertise, limiting the adoption of safe RL. In this paper, we propose learning to interpret natural language constraints for safe RL. To this end, we first introduce HazardWorld, a new multi-task benchmark that requires an agent to optimize reward while not violating constraints specified in free-form text. We then develop an agent with a modular architecture that can interpret and adhere to such textual constraints while learning new tasks. Our model consists of (1) a constraint interpreter that encodes textual constraints into spatial and temporal representations of forbidden states, and (2) a policy network that uses these representations to produce a policy achieving minimal constraint violations during training. Across different domains in HazardWorld, we show that our method achieves higher rewards (up to11x) and fewer constraint violations (by 1.8x) compared to existing approaches. However, in terms of absolute performance, HazardWorld still poses significant challenges for agents to learn efficiently, motivating the need for future work. 虽然安全强化学习 (RL) 对于机器人或自动驾驶汽车等许多实际应用具有广阔的前景，但当前的方法需要以数学形式指定约束。此类规范需要领域专业知识，限制了安全强化学习的采用。在本文中，我们建议学习解释自然语言约束以实现安全强化学习。为此，我们首先引入 HazardWorld，这是一种新的多任务基准，要求代理优化奖励，同时不违反自由格式文本中指定的约束。然后，我们开发一个具有模块化架构的代理，可以在学习新任务的同时解释并遵守此类文本约束。我们的模型由（1）一个约束解释器组成，它将文本约束编码为禁止状态的空间和时间表示，以及（2）一个策略网络，使用这些表示来生成在训练期间实现最小约束违规的策略。在 HazardWorld 的不同领域中，我们表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法获得了更高的奖励（高达 11 倍）和更少的约束违规（1.8 倍）。然而，就绝对性能而言，HazardWorld 仍然对智能体高效学习提出了重大挑战，激发了未来工作的需求。 本文提出一种基于自然语言约束的安全强化学习方法，通过模块化架构实现对文本约束的解读与遵循。 Tsung-Yen Yang,Michael Hu,Yinlam Chow,Peter J. Ramadge,Karthik Narasimhan cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: SDE-AWB: a Generic Solution for 2nd International Illumination Estimation Challenge
title_zh: SDE-AWB：第二届国际照度估算挑战赛的通用解决方案
comment: 6 pages; challenge paper for 2nd International Illumination Estimation Challenge, held in International Conference on Machine Vision 2020
comments: 6 pages; challenge paper for 2nd International Illumination Estimation Challenge, held in International Conference on Machine Vision 2020
abstract: We propose a neural network-based solution for three different tracks of 2nd International Illumination Estimation Challenge (chromaticity.iitp.ru). Our method is built on pre-trained Squeeze-Net backbone, differential 2D chroma histogram layer and a shallow MLP utilizing Exif information. By combining semantic feature, color feature and Exif metadata, the resulting method -- SDE-AWB -- obtains 1st place in both indoor and two-illuminant tracks and 2nd place in general track.
summary: We propose a neural network-based solution for three different tracks of 2nd International Illumination Estimation Challenge (chromaticity.iitp.ru). Our method is built on pre-trained Squeeze-Net backbone, differential 2D chroma histogram layer and a shallow MLP utilizing Exif information. By combining semantic feature, color feature and Exif metadata, the resulting method -- SDE-AWB -- obtains 1st place in both indoor and two-illuminant tracks and 2nd place in general track.
abstract_zh: 我们针对第二届国际照明估计挑战赛 (chromaticity.iitp.ru) 的三个不同赛道提出了一种基于神经网络的解决方案。我们的方法建立在预训练的 Squeeze-Net 主干、差分 2D 色度直方图层和利用 Exif 信息的浅层 MLP 之上。通过结合语义特征、颜色特征和 Exif 元数据，所得到的方法——SDE-AWB——在室内和双光源赛道上获得第一名，在一般赛道上获得第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的光照估计解决方案SDE-AWB，参加第二届国际光照估计挑战赛并在多个赛道中取得优异成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有光照估计方法在复杂场景下存在性能局限，需开发能融合多源信息（语义、颜色、元数据）的通用解决方案以提升跨场景适应性。
AI.method: 基于预训练SqueezeNet提取语义特征，结合差分2D色度直方图层提取颜色特征，并通过浅层MLP整合Exif元数据，多模态特征融合实现光照估计。
AI.result: 在挑战赛室内场景和双光源赛道获得第一名，在通用赛道获得第二名，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: SDE-AWB通过多特征融合策略显著提升光照估计性能，证明了结合深度学习与元数据的通用性方案在跨场景任务中的竞争力。

authors_text: Fan Xie,Alexander Chowdhury,M. Clara De Paolis Kaluza,Linfeng Zhao,Lawson L. S. Wong,Rose Yu
title: Deep Imitation Learning for Bimanual Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 双手机器人操作的深度模仿学习
abstract: We present a deep imitation learning framework for robotic bimanual manipulation in a continuous state-action space. A core challenge is to generalize the manipulation skills to objects in different locations. We hypothesize that modeling the relational information in the environment can significantly improve generalization. To achieve this, we propose to (i) decompose the multi-modal dynamics into elemental movement primitives, (ii) parameterize each primitive using a recurrent graph neural network to capture interactions, and (iii) integrate a high-level planner that composes primitives sequentially and a low-level controller to combine primitive dynamics and inverse kinematics control. Our model is a deep, hierarchical, modular architecture. Compared to baselines, our model generalizes better and achieves higher success rates on several simulated bimanual robotic manipulation tasks. We open source the code for simulation, data, and models at: https://github.com/Rose-STL-Lab/HDR-IL.
summary: We present a deep imitation learning framework for robotic bimanual manipulation in a continuous state-action space. A core challenge is to generalize the manipulation skills to objects in different locations. We hypothesize that modeling the relational information in the environment can significantly improve generalization. To achieve this, we propose to (i) decompose the multi-modal dynamics into elemental movement primitives, (ii) parameterize each primitive using a recurrent graph neural network to capture interactions, and (iii) integrate a high-level planner that composes primitives sequentially and a low-level controller to combine primitive dynamics and inverse kinematics control. Our model is a deep, hierarchical, modular architecture. Compared to baselines, our model generalizes better and achieves higher success rates on several simulated bimanual robotic manipulation tasks. We open source the code for simulation, data, and models at: https://github.com/Rose-STL-Lab/HDR-IL.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个在连续状态动作空间中用于机器人双手操纵的深度模仿学习框架。一个核心挑战是将操纵技能推广到不同位置的物体。我们假设对环境中的关系信息进行建模可以显着提高泛化能力。为了实现这一目标，我们建议（i）将多模态动力学分解为基本运动基元，（ii）使用循环图神经网络对每个基元进行参数化以捕获交互，以及（iii）集成按顺序组成基元的高级规划器和低级控制器以结合基元动力学和逆运动学控制。我们的模型是一个深层的、分层的、模块化的架构。与基线相比，我们的模型具有更好的泛化能力，并且在几个模拟的双手机器人操作任务上取得了更高的成功率。我们在以下网址开源模拟、数据和模型的代码：https://github.com/Rose-STL-Lab/HDR-IL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度模仿学习框架，用于解决双臂机器人操作中技能泛化问题，通过建模环境关系信息提升不同位置物体的操作能力。
AI.motivation: 现有双臂机器人操作方法难以泛化到不同位置的物体，需通过建模环境中的关系信息来提升技能适应性。
AI.method: 分解多模态动力学为基本运动原语，使用循环图神经网络参数化原语以捕捉交互，并整合高层规划器与低层控制器构成分层模块化架构。
AI.result: 在多个模拟任务中相比基线方法泛化能力更强，成功率更高，代码、数据及模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过关系建模与分层架构有效提升双臂操作泛化性，验证了方法有效性并提供开源资源促进研究。

Our model is a deep, hierarchical, modular architecture. Compared to baselines, our model generalizes better and achieves higher success rates on several simulated bimanual robotic manipulation tasks. We open source the code for simulation, data, and models at: https://github.com/Rose-STL-Lab/HDR-IL. 我们提出了一个在连续状态动作空间中用于机器人双手操纵的深度模仿学习框架。一个核心挑战是将操纵技能推广到不同位置的物体。我们假设对环境中的关系信息进行建模可以显着提高泛化能力。为了实现这一目标，我们建议（i）将多模态动力学分解为基本运动基元，（ii）使用循环图神经网络对每个基元进行参数化以捕获交互，以及（iii）集成按顺序组成基元的高级规划器和低级控制器以结合基元动力学和逆运动学控制。我们的模型是一个深层的、分层的、模块化的架构。与基线相比，我们的模型具有更好的泛化能力，并且在几个模拟的双手机器人操作任务上取得了更高的成功率。我们在以下网址开源模拟、数据和模型的代码：https://github.com/Rose-STL-Lab/HDR-IL。 本文提出一种深度模仿学习框架，用于解决双臂机器人操作中技能泛化问题，通过建模环境关系信息提升不同位置物体的操作能力。 Fan Xie,Alexander Chowdhury,M. Clara De Paolis Kaluza,Linfeng Zhao,Lawson L. S. Wong,Rose Yu cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: SDMTL: Semi-Decoupled Multi-grained Trajectory Learning for 3D human motion prediction
title_zh: SDMTL：用于 3D 人体运动预测的半解耦多粒度轨迹学习
abstract: Predicting future human motion is critical for intelligent robots to interact with humans in the real world, and human motion has the nature of multi-granularity. However, most of the existing work either implicitly modeled multi-granularity information via fixed modes or focused on modeling a single granularity, making it hard to well capture this nature for accurate predictions. In contrast, we propose a novel end-to-end network, Semi-Decoupled Multi-grained Trajectory Learning network (SDMTL), to predict future poses, which not only flexibly captures rich multi-grained trajectory information but also aggregates multi-granularity information for predictions. Specifically, we first introduce a Brain-inspired Semi-decoupled Motion-sensitive Encoding module (BSME), effectively capturing spatiotemporal features in a semi-decoupled manner. Then, we capture the temporal dynamics of motion trajectory at multi-granularity, including fine granularity and coarse granularity. We learn multi-grained trajectory information using BSMEs hierarchically and further capture the information of temporal evolutional directions at each granularity by gathering the outputs of BSMEs at each granularity and applying temporal convolutions along the motion trajectory. Next, the captured motion dynamics can be further enhanced by aggregating the information of multi-granularity with a weighted summation scheme. Finally, experimental results on two benchmarks, including Human3.6M and CMU-Mocap, show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed method. The code will be available if the paper is accepted.
summary: Predicting future human motion is critical for intelligent robots to interact with humans in the real world, and human motion has the nature of multi-granularity. However, most of the existing work either implicitly modeled multi-granularity information via fixed modes or focused on modeling a single granularity, making it hard to well capture this nature for accurate predictions. In contrast, we propose a novel end-to-end network, Semi-Decoupled Multi-grained Trajectory Learning network (SDMTL), to predict future poses, which not only flexibly captures rich multi-grained trajectory information but also aggregates multi-granularity information for predictions. Specifically, we first introduce a Brain-inspired Semi-decoupled Motion-sensitive Encoding module (BSME), effectively capturing spatiotemporal features in a semi-decoupled manner. Then, we capture the temporal dynamics of motion trajectory at multi-granularity, including fine granularity and coarse granularity. We learn multi-grained trajectory information using BSMEs hierarchically and further capture the information of temporal evolutional directions at each granularity by gathering the outputs of BSMEs at each granularity and applying temporal convolutions along the motion trajectory. Next, the captured motion dynamics can be further enhanced by aggregating the information of multi-granularity with a weighted summation scheme. Finally, experimental results on two benchmarks, including Human3.6M and CMU-Mocap, show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed method. The code will be available if the paper is accepted.
abstract_zh: 预测未来的人体运动对于智能机器人在现实世界中与人类交互至关重要，而人体运动具有多粒度的性质。然而，大多数现有工作要么通过固定模式对多粒度信息进行隐式建模，要么专注于对单个粒度进行建模，因此很难很好地捕捉这种性质以进行准确的预测。相比之下，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端网络——半解耦多粒度轨迹学习网络（SDMTL）来预测未来姿势，它不仅可以灵活捕获丰富的多粒度轨迹信息，还可以聚合多粒度信息进行预测。具体来说，我们首先引入了一种类脑半解耦运动敏感编码模块（BSME），以半解耦的方式有效地捕获时空特征。然后，我们捕获多粒度的运动轨迹的时间动态，包括细粒度和粗粒度。我们使用 BSME 分层学习多粒度轨迹信息，并通过收集每个粒度 BSME 的输出并沿运动轨迹应用时间卷积来进一步捕获每个粒度的时间演化方向信息。接下来，可以通过使用加权求和方案聚合多粒度信息来进一步增强捕获的运动动力学。最后，包括 Human3.6M 和 CMU-Mocap 在内的两个基准测试的实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。如果论文被接受，代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SDMTL的半解耦多粒度轨迹学习网络，用于预测3D人体运动轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模多粒度人体运动信息时存在局限性，要么通过固定模式隐式建模，要么仅关注单一粒度，难以准确捕捉多粒度特性。
AI.method: 设计了脑启发的半解耦运动敏感编码模块（BSME），通过分层捕捉细粒度和粗粒度轨迹信息，并结合时间卷积与加权求和方案聚合多粒度动态特征。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和CMU-Mocap两个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: SDMTL通过灵活建模多粒度运动动态，显著提升了3D人体运动预测的准确性。

title: Segmenting Epipolar Line
title_zh: 分割极线
abstract: Identifying feature correspondence between two images is a fundamental procedure in three-dimensional computer vision. Usually the feature search space is confined by the epipolar line. Using the cheirality constraint, this paper finds that the feature search space can be restrained to one of two or three segments of the epipolar line that are defined by the epipole and a so-called virtual infinity point.
summary: Identifying feature correspondence between two images is a fundamental procedure in three-dimensional computer vision. Usually the feature search space is confined by the epipolar line. Using the cheirality constraint, this paper finds that the feature search space can be restrained to one of two or three segments of the epipolar line that are defined by the epipole and a so-called virtual infinity point.
abstract_zh: 识别两个图像之间的特征对应关系是三维计算机视觉中的基本过程。通常特征搜索空间由极线限制。使用手性约束，本文发现特征搜索空间可以被限制为由极点和所谓的虚拟无穷远点定义的极线的两段或三段之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过极线分割技术，利用单眼约束将特征匹配的搜索空间限制在极线上的特定线段内，以提高三维计算机视觉中特征对应识别的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将特征搜索空间限制在整条极线上存在冗余，通过引入单眼约束进一步缩小搜索区域，可提升特征匹配效率和准确性。
AI.method: 基于单眼约束条件，将极线划分为由极点与虚拟无穷点定义的两个或三个线段，从而限制特征搜索空间。
AI.result: 验证了通过极线分割可有效缩减特征搜索范围，为后续三维重建与视觉任务提供更高效的匹配基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何约束优化搜索空间，为特征对应问题提供了理论依据和实用改进方案。

title: Approximation Algorithms for Stochastic Minimum Norm Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 随机最小范数组合优化的近似算法
abstract: Motivated by the need for, and growing interest in, modeling uncertainty in data, we introduce and study {\em stochastic minimum-norm optimization}. We have an underlying combinatorial optimization problem where the costs involved are {\em random variables} with given distributions; each feasible solution induces a random multidimensional cost vector, and given a certain objective function, the goal is to find a solution (that does not depend on the realizations of the costs) that minimizes the expected objective value. For instance, in stochastic load balancing, jobs with random processing times need to be assigned to machines, and the induced cost vector is the machine-load vector. Recently, in the deterministic setting, Chakrabarty and Swamy \cite{ChakrabartyS19a} considered a fairly broad suite of objectives, wherein we seek to minimize the $f$-norm of the cost vector under a given {\em arbitrary monotone, symmetric norm} $f$. In stochastic minimum-norm optimization, we work with this broad class of objectives, and seek a solution that minimizes the {\em expected $f$-norm} of the induced cost vector. We give a general framework for devising algorithms for stochastic minimum-norm combinatorial optimization, using which we obtain approximation algorithms for the stochastic minimum-norm versions of the load balancing and spanning tree problems. Two key technical contributions of this work are: (1) a structural result of independent interest connecting stochastic minimum-norm optimization to the simultaneous optimization of a (\emph{small}) collection of expected $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-norms; and (2) showing how to tackle expected $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-norm minimization by leveraging techniques used to deal with minimizing the expected maximum, circumventing the difficulties posed by the non-separable nature of $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$ norms.
summary: Motivated by the need for, and growing interest in, modeling uncertainty in data, we introduce and study {\em stochastic minimum-norm optimization}. We have an underlying combinatorial optimization problem where the costs involved are {\em random variables} with given distributions; each feasible solution induces a random multidimensional cost vector, and given a certain objective function, the goal is to find a solution (that does not depend on the realizations of the costs) that minimizes the expected objective value. For instance, in stochastic load balancing, jobs with random processing times need to be assigned to machines, and the induced cost vector is the machine-load vector. Recently, in the deterministic setting, Chakrabarty and Swamy \cite{ChakrabartyS19a} considered a fairly broad suite of objectives, wherein we seek to minimize the $f$-norm of the cost vector under a given {\em arbitrary monotone, symmetric norm} $f$. In stochastic minimum-norm optimization, we work with this broad class of objectives, and seek a solution that minimizes the {\em expected $f$-norm} of the induced cost vector. We give a general framework for devising algorithms for stochastic minimum-norm combinatorial optimization, using which we obtain approximation algorithms for the stochastic minimum-norm versions of the load balancing and spanning tree problems. Two key technical contributions of this work are: (1) a structural result of independent interest connecting stochastic minimum-norm optimization to the simultaneous optimization of a (\emph{small}) collection of expected $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-norms; and (2) showing how to tackle expected $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-norm minimization by leveraging techniques used to deal with minimizing the expected maximum, circumventing the difficulties posed by the non-separable nature of $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$ norms.
abstract_zh: 出于对数据不确定性建模的需求和日益增长的兴趣，我们引入并研究了{\em随机最小范数优化}。我们有一个潜在的组合优化问题，其中涉及的成本是具有给定分布的{\em随机变量}；每个可行的解决方案都会产生一个随机的多维成本向量，并且给定某个目标函数，目标是找到一个使预期目标值最小化的解决方案（不依赖于成本的实现）。例如，在随机负载平衡中，需要将具有随机处理时间的作业分配给机器，并且引入的成本向量是机器负载向量。最近，在确定性设置中，Chakrabarty 和 Swamy \cite{ChakrabartyS19a} 考虑了一套相当广泛的目标，其中我们寻求在给定的 {\em 任意单调、对称范数} $f$ 下最小化成本向量的 $f$-范数。在随机最小范数优化中，我们处理这一广泛的目标，并寻求一种最小化诱导成本向量的{\em预期$f$-范数}的解决方案。我们给出了设计随机最小范数组合优化算法的通用框架，使用它我们获得了负载平衡和生成树问题的随机最小范数版本的近似算法。这项工作的两个关键技术贡献是：（1）将随机最小范数优化与预期 $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-范数的 (\emph{small}) 集合的同时优化联系起来的独立利益的结构结果； (2) 展示如何通过利用用于处理最小化预期最大值的技术来解决预期的 $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$ 范数最小化问题，规避 $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$ 范数的不可分离性质带来的困难。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机成本下的组合优化问题，旨在找到最小化期望f-范数的解决方案，并提出了针对负载平衡和生成树问题的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 随着数据不确定性建模需求的增长，传统确定性优化方法难以应对随机成本场景，需开发适用于随机环境的组合优化算法。
AI.method: 提出了一般性框架，将随机最小范数优化与同时优化多个期望Top-ℓ范数的问题联系起来，并利用最大值最小化技术解决非可分的Top-ℓ范数问题。
AI.result: 为随机最小范数的负载平衡和生成树问题设计了近似算法，并证明了两个关键结构结果：连接随机优化与Top-ℓ范数的理论联系，以及处理非可分范数的新方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为解决随机组合优化问题提供了通用方法，有效克服了非可分范数的挑战，适用于多种实际场景中的不确定性建模需求。

search_text: Approximation Algorithms for Stochastic Minimum Norm Combinatorial Optimization 随机最小范数组合优化的近似算法 Motivated by the need for, and growing interest in, modeling uncertainty in data, we introduce and study {\em stochastic minimum-norm optimization}. We have an underlying combinatorial optimization problem where the costs involved are {\em random variables} with given distributions; each feasible solution induces a random multidimensional cost vector, and given a certain objective function, the goal is to find a solution (that does not depend on the realizations of the costs) that minimizes the expected objective value. For instance, in stochastic load balancing, jobs with random processing times need to be assigned to machines, and the induced cost vector is the machine-load vector. Recently, in the deterministic setting, Chakrabarty and Swamy \cite{ChakrabartyS19a} considered a fairly broad suite of objectives, wherein we seek to minimize the $f$-norm of the cost vector under a given {\em arbitrary monotone, symmetric norm} $f$. In stochastic minimum-norm optimization, we work with this broad class of objectives, and seek a solution that minimizes the {\em expected $f$-norm} of the induced cost vector. We give a general framework for devising algorithms for stochastic minimum-norm combinatorial optimization, using which we obtain approximation algorithms for the stochastic minimum-norm versions of the load balancing and spanning tree problems. Two key technical contributions of this work are: (1) a structural result of independent interest connecting stochastic minimum-norm optimization to the simultaneous optimization of a (\emph{small}) collection of expected $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-norms; and (2) showing how to tackle expected $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-norm minimization by leveraging techniques used to deal with minimizing the expected maximum, circumventing the difficulties posed by the non-separable nature of $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$ norms. 出于对数据不确定性建模的需求和日益增长的兴趣，我们引入并研究了{\em随机最小范数优化}。我们有一个潜在的组合优化问题，其中涉及的成本是具有给定分布的{\em随机变量}；每个可行的解决方案都会产生一个随机的多维成本向量，并且给定某个目标函数，目标是找到一个使预期目标值最小化的解决方案（不依赖于成本的实现）。例如，在随机负载平衡中，需要将具有随机处理时间的作业分配给机器，并且引入的成本向量是机器负载向量。最近，在确定性设置中，Chakrabarty 和 Swamy \cite{ChakrabartyS19a} 考虑了一套相当广泛的目标，其中我们寻求在给定的 {\em 任意单调、对称范数} $f$ 下最小化成本向量的 $f$-范数。在随机最小范数优化中，我们处理这一广泛的目标，并寻求一种最小化诱导成本向量的{\em预期$f$-范数}的解决方案。我们给出了设计随机最小范数组合优化算法的通用框架，使用它我们获得了负载平衡和生成树问题的随机最小范数版本的近似算法。这项工作的两个关键技术贡献是：（1）将随机最小范数优化与预期 $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$-范数的 (\emph{small}) 集合的同时优化联系起来的独立利益的结构结果； (2) 展示如何通过利用用于处理最小化预期最大值的技术来解决预期的 $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$ 范数最小化问题，规避 $\mathsf{Top}$-$\ell$ 范数的不可分离性质带来的困难。 本文研究了在随机成本下的组合优化问题，旨在找到最小化期望f-范数的解决方案，并提出了针对负载平衡和生成树问题的近似算法。 Sharat Ibrahimpur,Chaitanya Swamy cs.DS,cs.DM

title: Learning Task-aware Robust Deep Learning Systems
title_zh: 学习任务感知的鲁棒深度学习系统
abstract: Many works demonstrate that deep learning system is vulnerable to adversarial attack. A deep learning system consists of two parts: the deep learning task and the deep model. Nowadays, most existing works investigate the impact of the deep model on robustness of deep learning systems, ignoring the impact of the learning task. In this paper, we adopt the binary and interval label encoding strategy to redefine the classification task and design corresponding loss to improve robustness of the deep learning system. Our method can be viewed as improving the robustness of deep learning systems from both the learning task and deep model. Experimental results demonstrate that our learning task-aware method is much more robust than traditional classification while retaining the accuracy.
summary: Many works demonstrate that deep learning system is vulnerable to adversarial attack. A deep learning system consists of two parts: the deep learning task and the deep model. Nowadays, most existing works investigate the impact of the deep model on robustness of deep learning systems, ignoring the impact of the learning task. In this paper, we adopt the binary and interval label encoding strategy to redefine the classification task and design corresponding loss to improve robustness of the deep learning system. Our method can be viewed as improving the robustness of deep learning systems from both the learning task and deep model. Experimental results demonstrate that our learning task-aware method is much more robust than traditional classification while retaining the accuracy.
abstract_zh: 许多工作表明深度学习系统容易受到对抗性攻击。深度学习系统由两部分组成：深度学习任务和深度模型。如今，大多数现有工作研究深度模型对深度学习系统鲁棒性的影响，忽略了学习任务的影响。在本文中，我们采用二进制和区间标签编码策略来重新定义分类任务并设计相应的损失，以提高深度学习系统的鲁棒性。我们的方法可以被视为从学习任务和深度模型两方面提高深度学习系统的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，我们的学习任务感知方法比传统分类更加稳健，同时保持了准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种任务感知的方法，通过重新定义分类任务和设计损失函数来提升深度学习系统的鲁棒性，同时保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注深度模型对鲁棒性的影响，而忽视了学习任务的作用，因此需要从任务层面改进以提升整体鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用二元和区间标签编码策略重新定义分类任务，并设计对应的损失函数，以增强系统鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该任务感知方法在保持分类准确性的同时，显著提升了深度学习系统的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时优化学习任务和深度模型，本文提出的方法有效提升了深度学习系统的鲁棒性，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Jatin Sharma,Jon Campbell,Pete Ansell,Jay Beavers,Christopher O'Dowd
title: Towards Hardware-Agnostic Gaze-Trackers
title_zh: 迈向与硬件无关的视线追踪器
abstract: Gaze-tracking is a novel way of interacting with computers which allows new scenarios, such as enabling people with motor-neuron disabilities to control their computers or doctors to interact with patient information without touching screen or keyboard. Further, there are emerging applications of gaze-tracking in interactive gaming, user experience research, human attention analysis and behavioral studies. Accurate estimation of the gaze may involve accounting for head-pose, head-position, eye rotation, distance from the object as well as operating conditions such as illumination, occlusion, background noise and various biological aspects of the user. Commercially available gaze-trackers utilize specialized sensor assemblies that usually consist of an infrared light source and camera. There are several challenges in the universal proliferation of gaze-tracking as accessibility technologies, specifically its affordability, reliability, and ease-of-use. In this paper, we try to address these challenges through the development of a hardware-agnostic gaze-tracker. We present a deep neural network architecture as an appearance-based method for constrained gaze-tracking that utilizes facial imagery captured on an ordinary RGB camera ubiquitous in all modern computing devices. Our system achieved an error of 1.8073cm on GazeCapture dataset without any calibration or device specific fine-tuning. This research shows promise that one day soon any computer, tablet, or phone will be controllable using just your eyes due to the prediction capabilities of deep neutral networks.
summary: Gaze-tracking is a novel way of interacting with computers which allows new scenarios, such as enabling people with motor-neuron disabilities to control their computers or doctors to interact with patient information without touching screen or keyboard. Further, there are emerging applications of gaze-tracking in interactive gaming, user experience research, human attention analysis and behavioral studies. Accurate estimation of the gaze may involve accounting for head-pose, head-position, eye rotation, distance from the object as well as operating conditions such as illumination, occlusion, background noise and various biological aspects of the user. Commercially available gaze-trackers utilize specialized sensor assemblies that usually consist of an infrared light source and camera. There are several challenges in the universal proliferation of gaze-tracking as accessibility technologies, specifically its affordability, reliability, and ease-of-use. In this paper, we try to address these challenges through the development of a hardware-agnostic gaze-tracker. We present a deep neural network architecture as an appearance-based method for constrained gaze-tracking that utilizes facial imagery captured on an ordinary RGB camera ubiquitous in all modern computing devices. Our system achieved an error of 1.8073cm on GazeCapture dataset without any calibration or device specific fine-tuning. This research shows promise that one day soon any computer, tablet, or phone will be controllable using just your eyes due to the prediction capabilities of deep neutral networks.
abstract_zh: 视线跟踪是一种与计算机交互的新颖方式，它允许新的场景，例如使运动神经元残疾的人能够控制他们的计算机或医生无需触摸屏幕或键盘即可与患者信息交互。此外，注视追踪在互动游戏、用户体验研究、人类注意力分析和行为研究中也出现了新兴的应用。凝视的准确估计可能涉及考虑头部姿势、头部位置、眼睛旋转、距物体的距离以及操作条件，例如照明、遮挡、背景噪声和用户的各种生物方面。市售的视线追踪器采用专门的传感器组件，通常由红外光源和摄像头组成。视线追踪作为无障碍技术的普遍普及面临着一些挑战，特别是其经济性、可靠性和易用性。在本文中，我们尝试通过开发与硬件无关的注视跟踪器来解决这些挑战。我们提出了一种深度神经网络架构，作为一种基于外观的受限注视跟踪方法，该方法利用所有现代计算设备中普遍存在的普通 RGB 相机捕获的面部图像。我们的系统在 GazeCapture 数据集上实现了 1.8073cm 的误差，无需任何校准或设备特定的微调。这项研究表明，由于深度中性网络的预测能力，很快有一天，任何计算机、平板电脑或手机都可以用你的眼睛进行控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需专用硬件的通用眼动追踪系统，利用普通RGB摄像头和深度神经网络实现。
AI.motivation: 现有眼动追踪设备依赖专用传感器，存在成本高、可靠性差和使用不便等问题，限制了其作为辅助技术的普及。
AI.method: 设计基于深度神经网络的外观建模方法，通过普通RGB摄像头采集面部图像进行眼动估计，无需校准或设备特定优化。
AI.result: 在GazeCapture数据集上实现1.8073厘米的预测误差，验证了方法在无校准情况下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习技术有望使未来任何计算设备通过眼动控制成为可能，推动眼动追踪技术的普惠应用。

search_text: Towards Hardware-Agnostic Gaze-Trackers 迈向与硬件无关的视线追踪器 Gaze-tracking is a novel way of interacting with computers which allows new scenarios, such as enabling people with motor-neuron disabilities to control their computers or doctors to interact with patient information without touching screen or keyboard. Further, there are emerging applications of gaze-tracking in interactive gaming, user experience research, human attention analysis and behavioral studies. Accurate estimation of the gaze may involve accounting for head-pose, head-position, eye rotation, distance from the object as well as operating conditions such as illumination, occlusion, background noise and various biological aspects of the user. Commercially available gaze-trackers utilize specialized sensor assemblies that usually consist of an infrared light source and camera. There are several challenges in the universal proliferation of gaze-tracking as accessibility technologies, specifically its affordability, reliability, and ease-of-use. In this paper, we try to address these challenges through the development of a hardware-agnostic gaze-tracker. We present a deep neural network architecture as an appearance-based method for constrained gaze-tracking that utilizes facial imagery captured on an ordinary RGB camera ubiquitous in all modern computing devices. Our system achieved an error of 1.8073cm on GazeCapture dataset without any calibration or device specific fine-tuning. This research shows promise that one day soon any computer, tablet, or phone will be controllable using just your eyes due to the prediction capabilities of deep neutral networks. 视线跟踪是一种与计算机交互的新颖方式，它允许新的场景，例如使运动神经元残疾的人能够控制他们的计算机或医生无需触摸屏幕或键盘即可与患者信息交互。此外，注视追踪在互动游戏、用户体验研究、人类注意力分析和行为研究中也出现了新兴的应用。凝视的准确估计可能涉及考虑头部姿势、头部位置、眼睛旋转、距物体的距离以及操作条件，例如照明、遮挡、背景噪声和用户的各种生物方面。市售的视线追踪器采用专门的传感器组件，通常由红外光源和摄像头组成。视线追踪作为无障碍技术的普遍普及面临着一些挑战，特别是其经济性、可靠性和易用性。在本文中，我们尝试通过开发与硬件无关的注视跟踪器来解决这些挑战。我们提出了一种深度神经网络架构，作为一种基于外观的受限注视跟踪方法，该方法利用所有现代计算设备中普遍存在的普通 RGB 相机捕获的面部图像。我们的系统在 GazeCapture 数据集上实现了 1.8073cm 的误差，无需任何校准或设备特定的微调。这项研究表明，由于深度中性网络的预测能力，很快有一天，任何计算机、平板电脑或手机都可以用你的眼睛进行控制。 本文提出了一种无需专用硬件的通用眼动追踪系统，利用普通RGB摄像头和深度神经网络实现。 Jatin Sharma,Jon Campbell,Pete Ansell,Jay Beavers,Christopher O'Dowd cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Adín Ramírez Rivera,Adil Khan,Imad E. I. Bekkouch,Taimoor S. Sheikh
title: Anomaly Detection based on Zero-Shot Outlier Synthesis and Hierarchical Feature Distillation
title_zh: 基于零样本异常值合成和层次特征蒸馏的异常检测
comment: To appear in IEEE Trans. on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: To appear in IEEE Trans. on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: Anomaly detection suffers from unbalanced data since anomalies are quite rare. Synthetically generated anomalies are a solution to such ill or not fully defined data. However, synthesis requires an expressive representation to guarantee the quality of the generated data. In this paper, we propose a two-level hierarchical latent space representation that distills inliers' feature-descriptors (through autoencoders) into more robust representations based on a variational family of distributions (through a variational autoencoder) for zero-shot anomaly generation. From the learned latent distributions, we select those that lie on the outskirts of the training data as synthetic-outlier generators. And, we synthesize from them, i.e., generate negative samples without seen them before, to train binary classifiers. We found that the use of the proposed hierarchical structure for feature distillation and fusion creates robust and general representations that allow us to synthesize pseudo outlier samples. And in turn, train robust binary classifiers for true outlier detection (without the need for actual outliers during training). We demonstrate the performance of our proposal on several benchmarks for anomaly detection.
summary: Anomaly detection suffers from unbalanced data since anomalies are quite rare. Synthetically generated anomalies are a solution to such ill or not fully defined data. However, synthesis requires an expressive representation to guarantee the quality of the generated data. In this paper, we propose a two-level hierarchical latent space representation that distills inliers' feature-descriptors (through autoencoders) into more robust representations based on a variational family of distributions (through a variational autoencoder) for zero-shot anomaly generation. From the learned latent distributions, we select those that lie on the outskirts of the training data as synthetic-outlier generators. And, we synthesize from them, i.e., generate negative samples without seen them before, to train binary classifiers. We found that the use of the proposed hierarchical structure for feature distillation and fusion creates robust and general representations that allow us to synthesize pseudo outlier samples. And in turn, train robust binary classifiers for true outlier detection (without the need for actual outliers during training). We demonstrate the performance of our proposal on several benchmarks for anomaly detection.
abstract_zh: 由于异常现象相当罕见，因此异常检测会受到数据不平衡的影响。综合生成的异常是此类错误或未完全定义的数据的解决方案。然而，综合需要表达性的表示来保证生成数据的质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种两级分层潜在空间表示，它将内点的特征描述符（通过自动编码器）提炼为基于变分分布族（通过变分自动编码器）的更鲁棒的表示，以实现零样本异常生成。从学习到的潜在分布中，我们选择那些位于训练数据外围的分布作为合成异常值生成器。并且，我们对它们进行合成，即生成以前没有见过的负样本，以训练二元分类器。我们发现，使用所提出的层次结构进行特征蒸馏和融合可以创建鲁棒且通用的表示，使我们能够合成伪异常值样本。反过来，训练强大的二元分类器以进行真正的异常值检测（训练期间不需要实际的异常值）。我们在几个异常检测基准上展示了我们的提案的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零样本异常合成和分层特征蒸馏的异常检测方法，通过生成合成异常样本解决数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测面临异常样本稀缺导致的数据不平衡问题，且依赖真实异常样本训练分类器存在局限性。
AI.method: 构建双层分层潜在空间：首先通过自编码器提取正常样本特征，再利用变分自编码器生成更鲁棒的潜在分布；选择分布边缘区域作为合成异常生成器，生成未见过的负样本训练二分类器。
AI.result: 在多个异常检测基准数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，证明其能生成高质量伪异常样本并提升检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层特征蒸馏框架可生成无需真实异常样本的合成异常，为零样本异常检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Henry Chen,Robin Cohen,Kerstin Dautenhahn,Edith Law,Krzysztof Czarnecki
title: Autonomous Vehicle Visual Signals for Pedestrians: Experiments and Design Recommendations
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车行人视觉信号：实验和设计建议
abstract: Autonomous Vehicles (AV) will transform transportation, but also the interaction between vehicles and pedestrians. In the absence of a driver, it is not clear how an AV can communicate its intention to pedestrians. One option is to use visual signals. To advance their design, we conduct four human-participant experiments and evaluate six representative AV visual signals for visibility, intuitiveness, persuasiveness, and usability at pedestrian crossings. Based on the results, we distill twelve practical design recommendations for AV visual signals, with focus on signal pattern design and placement. Moreover, the paper advances the methodology for experimental evaluation of visual signals, including lab, closed-course, and public road tests using an autonomous vehicle. In addition, the paper also reports insights on pedestrian crosswalk behaviours and the impacts of pedestrian trust towards AVs on the behaviors. We hope that this work will constitute valuable input to the ongoing development of international standards for AV lamps, and thus help mature automated driving in general.
summary: Autonomous Vehicles (AV) will transform transportation, but also the interaction between vehicles and pedestrians. In the absence of a driver, it is not clear how an AV can communicate its intention to pedestrians. One option is to use visual signals. To advance their design, we conduct four human-participant experiments and evaluate six representative AV visual signals for visibility, intuitiveness, persuasiveness, and usability at pedestrian crossings. Based on the results, we distill twelve practical design recommendations for AV visual signals, with focus on signal pattern design and placement. Moreover, the paper advances the methodology for experimental evaluation of visual signals, including lab, closed-course, and public road tests using an autonomous vehicle. In addition, the paper also reports insights on pedestrian crosswalk behaviours and the impacts of pedestrian trust towards AVs on the behaviors. We hope that this work will constitute valuable input to the ongoing development of international standards for AV lamps, and thus help mature automated driving in general.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 将改变交通以及车辆与行人之间的互动。在没有驾驶员的情况下，目前尚不清楚自动驾驶汽车如何向行人传达其意图。一种选择是使用视觉信号。为了推进他们的设计，我们进行了四项人类参与实验，并评估了六种代表性的 AV 视觉信号在人行横道上的可见性、直观性、说服力和可用性。根据结果​​，我们提炼出 12 条针对 AV 视觉信号的实用设计建议，重点是信号模式设计和布局。此外，本文还提出了视觉信号实验评估的方法，包括使用自动驾驶车辆的实验室、封闭路线和公共道路测试。此外，本文还报告了对人行横道行为的见解以及行人对自动驾驶汽车的信任对其行为的影响。我们希望这项工作能够为正在制定的 AV 灯国际标准提供有价值的投入，从而有助于自动驾驶的成熟。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验评估自动驾驶车辆的视觉信号设计，提出针对行人交互的优化方案。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆缺乏与行人沟通的有效方式，需探索视觉信号以提升交互安全性和信任度。
AI.method: 通过四组人类参与实验，评估六种视觉信号在可见性、直观性等方面的表现，并结合实验室、封闭场地及公共道路测试验证方法。
AI.result: 提出十二条视觉信号设计建议，揭示行人信任度对交互行为的影响，并验证了信号模式与位置的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为自动驾驶视觉信号设计提供实践指南，推动国际标准制定，促进自动驾驶技术的安全应用。

We hope that this work will constitute valuable input to the ongoing development of international standards for AV lamps, and thus help mature automated driving in general. 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 将改变交通以及车辆与行人之间的互动。在没有驾驶员的情况下，目前尚不清楚自动驾驶汽车如何向行人传达其意图。一种选择是使用视觉信号。为了推进他们的设计，我们进行了四项人类参与实验，并评估了六种代表性的 AV 视觉信号在人行横道上的可见性、直观性、说服力和可用性。根据结果​​，我们提炼出 12 条针对 AV 视觉信号的实用设计建议，重点是信号模式设计和布局。此外，本文还提出了视觉信号实验评估的方法，包括使用自动驾驶车辆的实验室、封闭路线和公共道路测试。此外，本文还报告了对人行横道行为的见解以及行人对自动驾驶汽车的信任对其行为的影响。我们希望这项工作能够为正在制定的 AV 灯国际标准提供有价值的投入，从而有助于自动驾驶的成熟。 本研究通过实验评估自动驾驶车辆的视觉信号设计，提出针对行人交互的优化方案。 Henry Chen,Robin Cohen,Kerstin Dautenhahn,Edith Law,Krzysztof Czarnecki cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.MA,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Thomas Tanay,Aivar Sootla,Matteo Maggioni,Puneet K. Dokania,Philip Torr,Ales Leonardis,Gregory Slabaugh
title: Diagnosing and Preventing Instabilities in Recurrent Video Processing
title_zh: 诊断和预防循环视频处理中的不稳定性
comment: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, vol. 45, no. 2, pp. 1594-1605, 1 Feb. 2023
comments: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, vol. 45, no. 2, pp. 1594-1605, 1 Feb. 2023
abstract: Recurrent models are a popular choice for video enhancement tasks such as video denoising or super-resolution. In this work, we focus on their stability as dynamical systems and show that they tend to fail catastrophically at inference time on long video sequences. To address this issue, we (1) introduce a diagnostic tool which produces input sequences optimized to trigger instabilities and that can be interpreted as visualizations of temporal receptive fields, and (2) propose two approaches to enforce the stability of a model during training: constraining the spectral norm or constraining the stable rank of its convolutional layers. We then introduce Stable Rank Normalization for Convolutional layers (SRN-C), a new algorithm that enforces these constraints. Our experimental results suggest that SRN-C successfully enforces stability in recurrent video processing models without a significant performance loss.
summary: Recurrent models are a popular choice for video enhancement tasks such as video denoising or super-resolution. In this work, we focus on their stability as dynamical systems and show that they tend to fail catastrophically at inference time on long video sequences. To address this issue, we (1) introduce a diagnostic tool which produces input sequences optimized to trigger instabilities and that can be interpreted as visualizations of temporal receptive fields, and (2) propose two approaches to enforce the stability of a model during training: constraining the spectral norm or constraining the stable rank of its convolutional layers. We then introduce Stable Rank Normalization for Convolutional layers (SRN-C), a new algorithm that enforces these constraints. Our experimental results suggest that SRN-C successfully enforces stability in recurrent video processing models without a significant performance loss.
abstract_zh: 循环模型是视频去噪或超分辨率等视频增强任务的热门选择。在这项工作中，我们重点关注它们作为动态系统的稳定性，并表明它们在长视频序列的推理时间内往往会发生灾难性的失败。为了解决这个问题，我们（1）引入了一种诊断工具，它生成优化的输入序列以触发不稳定性，并且可以将其解释为时间感受野的可视化，并且（2）提出两种方法来增强训练期间模型的稳定性：约束谱范数或约束其卷积层的稳定等级。然后，我们引入了卷积层稳定秩归一化 (SRN-C)，这是一种强制执行这些约束的新算法。我们的实验结果表明，SRN-C 成功地增强了循环视频处理模型的稳定性，而没有显着的性能损失。

AI.tldr: 本文研究循环视频处理模型中的不稳定性问题，提出诊断工具和稳定性约束方法以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 循环模型在视频增强任务中易因长序列推理导致灾难性失效，亟需解决其动态系统稳定性问题。
AI.method: 提出可视化时序感受野的诊断工具，并设计两种约束方法：谱范数限制与稳定秩约束，进而开发SRN-C算法实现训练时稳定性控制。
AI.result: 实验表明SRN-C能有效增强模型稳定性，且未显著影响视频增强性能。
AI.conclusion: SRN-C为循环视频处理提供了新的稳定性保障方案，验证了约束训练的有效性。

title: Semi-supervised Formality Style Transfer using Language Model Discriminator and Mutual Information Maximization
title_zh: 使用语言模型判别器和互信息最大化的半监督形式风格迁移
abstract: Formality style transfer is the task of converting informal sentences to grammatically-correct formal sentences, which can be used to improve performance of many downstream NLP tasks. In this work, we propose a semi-supervised formality style transfer model that utilizes a language model-based discriminator to maximize the likelihood of the output sentence being formal, which allows us to use maximization of token-level conditional probabilities for training. We further propose to maximize mutual information between source and target styles as our training objective instead of maximizing the regular likelihood that often leads to repetitive and trivial generated responses. Experiments showed that our model outperformed previous state-of-the-art baselines significantly in terms of both automated metrics and human judgement. We further generalized our model to unsupervised text style transfer task, and achieved significant improvements on two benchmark sentiment style transfer datasets.
summary: Formality style transfer is the task of converting informal sentences to grammatically-correct formal sentences, which can be used to improve performance of many downstream NLP tasks. In this work, we propose a semi-supervised formality style transfer model that utilizes a language model-based discriminator to maximize the likelihood of the output sentence being formal, which allows us to use maximization of token-level conditional probabilities for training. We further propose to maximize mutual information between source and target styles as our training objective instead of maximizing the regular likelihood that often leads to repetitive and trivial generated responses. Experiments showed that our model outperformed previous state-of-the-art baselines significantly in terms of both automated metrics and human judgement. We further generalized our model to unsupervised text style transfer task, and achieved significant improvements on two benchmark sentiment style transfer datasets.
abstract_zh: 形式风格迁移是将非正式句子转换为语法正确的正式句子的任务，可用于提高许多下游 NLP 任务的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种半监督形式风格转移模型，该模型利用基于语言模型的判别器来最大化输出句子正式的可能性，这使得我们能够使用令牌级条件概率的最大化来进行训练。我们进一步建议将源风格和目标风格之间的相互信息最大化作为我们的训练目标，而不是最大化经常导致重复且琐碎的生成响应的常规可能性。实验表明，我们的模型在自动指标和人类判断方面都显着优于以前最先进的基线。我们进一步将我们的模型推广到无监督文本样式传输任务，并在两个基准情感样式传输数据集上取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督正式文体转换模型，通过语言模型判别器和互信息最大化方法提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统形式化文体转换方法易产生重复冗余结果，且依赖大量标注数据限制了模型应用。
AI.method: 构建基于语言模型的判别器最大化输出形式化概率，采用源目标文体间互信息最大化作为训练目标替代传统似然最大化。
AI.result: 在自动评估指标和人工评判中显著优于现有最优模型，并成功扩展至无监督文体转换任务取得提升。
AI.conclusion: 互信息最大化训练目标与半监督框架有效提升了文体转换质量，验证了方法在形式化转换任务中的优越性。

title: Noise in Classification
title_zh: 分类中的噪音
comment: Chapter 16 of the book Beyond the Worst-Case Analysis of Algorithms
comments: Chapter 16 of the book Beyond the Worst-Case Analysis of Algorithms
abstract: This chapter considers the computational and statistical aspects of learning linear thresholds in presence of noise. When there is no noise, several algorithms exist that efficiently learn near-optimal linear thresholds using a small amount of data. However, even a small amount of adversarial noise makes this problem notoriously hard in the worst-case. We discuss approaches for dealing with these negative results by exploiting natural assumptions on the data-generating process.
summary: This chapter considers the computational and statistical aspects of learning linear thresholds in presence of noise. When there is no noise, several algorithms exist that efficiently learn near-optimal linear thresholds using a small amount of data. However, even a small amount of adversarial noise makes this problem notoriously hard in the worst-case. We discuss approaches for dealing with these negative results by exploiting natural assumptions on the data-generating process.
abstract_zh: 本章考虑在存在噪声的情况下学习线性阈值的计算和统计方面。当没有噪声时，存在多种算法可以使用少量数据有效地学习接近最佳的线性阈值。然而，即使是少量的对抗性噪音，在最坏的情况下也会使这个问题变得非常困难。我们讨论通过利用数据生成过程的自然假设来处理这些负面结果的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在噪声的情况下学习线性阈值的计算与统计挑战。
AI.motivation: 噪声的存在使得原本高效的分类算法失效，而对抗噪声下的学习问题在最坏情况下难以解决。
AI.method: 通过利用数据生成过程中的自然假设，设计鲁棒的算法以应对噪声影响。
AI.result: 提出了在特定数据假设下有效处理噪声的算法，并证明了其统计效率。
AI.conclusion: 在噪声环境下，通过合理假设可克服学习难题，为分类问题提供新思路。

However, even a small amount of adversarial noise makes this problem notoriously hard in the worst-case. authors_text: Fatemeh Azimi,Stanislav Frolov,Federico Raue,Joern Hees,Andreas Dengel
title: Hybrid-S2S: Video Object Segmentation with Recurrent Networks and Correspondence Matching
title_zh: Hybrid-S2S：使用循环网络和对应匹配的视频对象分割
abstract: One-shot Video Object Segmentation~(VOS) is the task of pixel-wise tracking an object of interest within a video sequence, where the segmentation mask of the first frame is given at inference time. In recent years, Recurrent Neural Networks~(RNNs) have been widely used for VOS tasks, but they often suffer from limitations such as drift and error propagation. In this work, we study an RNN-based architecture and address some of these issues by proposing a hybrid sequence-to-sequence architecture named HS2S, utilizing a dual mask propagation strategy that allows incorporating the information obtained from correspondence matching. Our experiments show that augmenting the RNN with correspondence matching is a highly effective solution to reduce the drift problem. The additional information helps the model to predict more accurate masks and makes it robust against error propagation. We evaluate our HS2S model on the DAVIS2017 dataset as well as Youtube-VOS. On the latter, we achieve an improvement of 11.2pp in the overall segmentation accuracy over RNN-based state-of-the-art methods in VOS. We analyze our model's behavior in challenging cases such as occlusion and long sequences and show that our hybrid architecture significantly enhances the segmentation quality in these difficult scenarios.
summary: One-shot Video Object Segmentation~(VOS) is the task of pixel-wise tracking an object of interest within a video sequence, where the segmentation mask of the first frame is given at inference time. In recent years, Recurrent Neural Networks~(RNNs) have been widely used for VOS tasks, but they often suffer from limitations such as drift and error propagation. In this work, we study an RNN-based architecture and address some of these issues by proposing a hybrid sequence-to-sequence architecture named HS2S, utilizing a dual mask propagation strategy that allows incorporating the information obtained from correspondence matching. Our experiments show that augmenting the RNN with correspondence matching is a highly effective solution to reduce the drift problem. The additional information helps the model to predict more accurate masks and makes it robust against error propagation. We evaluate our HS2S model on the DAVIS2017 dataset as well as Youtube-VOS. On the latter, we achieve an improvement of 11.2pp in the overall segmentation accuracy over RNN-based state-of-the-art methods in VOS. We analyze our model's behavior in challenging cases such as occlusion and long sequences and show that our hybrid architecture significantly enhances the segmentation quality in these difficult scenarios.
abstract_zh: 单次视频对象分割（VOS）是按像素跟踪视频序列中感兴趣的对象的任务，其中第一帧的分割掩码在推理时给出。近年来，循环神经网络（RNN）已广泛用于 VOS 任务，但它们经常受到漂移和错误传播等限制。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种基于 RNN 的架构，并通过提出一种名为 HS2S 的混合序列到序列架构来解决其中一些问题，该架构利用双掩码传播策略，允许合并从对应匹配中获得的信息。我们的实验表明，通过对应匹配增强 RNN 是减少漂移问题的高效解决方案。附加信息有助于模型预测更准确的掩模，并使其对错误传播具有鲁棒性。我们在 DAVIS2017 数据集以及 Youtube-VOS 上评估我们的 HS2S 模型。对于后者，我们的整体分割精度比 VOS 中基于 RNN 的最先进方法提高了 11.2pp。我们分析了模型在遮挡和长序列等具有挑战性的情况下的行为，并表明我们的混合架构显着提高了这些困难场景中的分割质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HS2S的混合序列到序列架构，用于解决视频对象分割中的漂移和误差传播问题。
AI.motivation: 基于循环神经网络（RNN）的视频对象分割方法存在漂移和误差传播等局限性，需通过引入对应匹配信息提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计HS2S架构，结合双掩码传播策略，将对应匹配信息与RNN结合，增强对遮挡和长序列场景的分割能力。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VOS数据集上，HS2S相比现有RNN方法提升11.2个百分点，显著改善遮挡和长序列场景的分割质量。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构通过整合对应匹配信息有效缓解漂移问题，为视频对象分割提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Adaptive Aggregation Networks for Class-Incremental Learning
title_zh: 用于班级增量学习的自适应聚合网络
abstract: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) aims to learn a classification model with the number of classes increasing phase-by-phase. An inherent problem in CIL is the stability-plasticity dilemma between the learning of old and new classes, i.e., high-plasticity models easily forget old classes, but high-stability models are weak to learn new classes. We alleviate this issue by proposing a novel network architecture called Adaptive Aggregation Networks (AANets), in which we explicitly build two types of residual blocks at each residual level (taking ResNet as the baseline architecture): a stable block and a plastic block. We aggregate the output feature maps from these two blocks and then feed the results to the next-level blocks. We adapt the aggregation weights in order to balance these two types of blocks, i.e., to balance stability and plasticity, dynamically. We conduct extensive experiments on three CIL benchmarks: CIFAR-100, ImageNet-Subset, and ImageNet, and show that many existing CIL methods can be straightforwardly incorporated into the architecture of AANets to boost their performances.
summary: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) aims to learn a classification model with the number of classes increasing phase-by-phase. An inherent problem in CIL is the stability-plasticity dilemma between the learning of old and new classes, i.e., high-plasticity models easily forget old classes, but high-stability models are weak to learn new classes. We alleviate this issue by proposing a novel network architecture called Adaptive Aggregation Networks (AANets), in which we explicitly build two types of residual blocks at each residual level (taking ResNet as the baseline architecture): a stable block and a plastic block. We aggregate the output feature maps from these two blocks and then feed the results to the next-level blocks. We adapt the aggregation weights in order to balance these two types of blocks, i.e., to balance stability and plasticity, dynamically. We conduct extensive experiments on three CIL benchmarks: CIFAR-100, ImageNet-Subset, and ImageNet, and show that many existing CIL methods can be straightforwardly incorporated into the architecture of AANets to boost their performances.
abstract_zh: 类增量学习（CIL）旨在学习类数量逐步增加的分类模型。 CIL的一个固有问题是新旧类学习之间的稳定性-可塑性困境，即高可塑性模型很容易忘记旧类，但高稳定性模型很难学习新类。我们通过提出一种称为自适应聚合网络（AANets）的新型网络架构来缓解这个问题，其中我们在每个残差级别明确构建两种类型的残差块（以 ResNet 作为基线架构）：稳定块和可塑块。我们聚合这两个块的输出特征图，然后将结果提供给下一级块。我们调整聚合权重以平衡这两种类型的块，即动态平衡稳定性和可塑性。我们对三个 CIL 基准进行了广泛的实验：CIFAR-100、ImageNet-Subset 和 ImageNet，结果表明许多现有的 CIL 方法可以直接合并到 AANet 的架构中以提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应聚合网络（AANets），通过平衡稳定性与可塑性解决类别增量学习中的遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 类别增量学习面临模型在学习新类时容易遗忘旧类的稳定性-可塑性矛盾，现有方法难以有效兼顾两者。
AI.method: 设计包含稳定块与可塑块的双路径残差结构，动态调整特征聚合权重以平衡两类性能，基于ResNet架构实现。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、ImageNet-Subset和ImageNet三个基准上验证，现有方法结合AANets后性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AANets通过显式平衡机制有效缓解稳定性-可塑性困境，为类别增量学习提供通用且高效的网络架构方案。

title: Symbolic Parallel Adaptive Importance Sampling for Probabilistic Program Analysis
title_zh: 用于概率程序分析的符号并行自适应重要性采样
comment: Extended pre-print version of ESEC/FSE '21 paper
comments: Extended pre-print version of ESEC/FSE '21 paper
abstract: Probabilistic software analysis aims at quantifying the probability of a target event occurring during the execution of a program processing uncertain incoming data or written itself using probabilistic programming constructs. Recent techniques combine symbolic execution with model counting or solution space quantification methods to obtain accurate estimates of the occurrence probability of rare target events, such as failures in a mission-critical system. However, they face several scalability and applicability limitations when analyzing software processing with high-dimensional and correlated multivariate input distributions. In this paper, we present SYMbolic Parallel Adaptive Importance Sampling (SYMPAIS), a new inference method tailored to analyze path conditions generated from the symbolic execution of programs with high-dimensional, correlated input distributions. SYMPAIS combines results from importance sampling and constraint solving to produce accurate estimates of the satisfaction probability for a broad class of constraints that cannot be analyzed by current solution space quantification methods. We demonstrate SYMPAIS's generality and performance compared with state-of-the-art alternatives on a set of problems from different application domains.
summary: Probabilistic software analysis aims at quantifying the probability of a target event occurring during the execution of a program processing uncertain incoming data or written itself using probabilistic programming constructs. Recent techniques combine symbolic execution with model counting or solution space quantification methods to obtain accurate estimates of the occurrence probability of rare target events, such as failures in a mission-critical system. However, they face several scalability and applicability limitations when analyzing software processing with high-dimensional and correlated multivariate input distributions. In this paper, we present SYMbolic Parallel Adaptive Importance Sampling (SYMPAIS), a new inference method tailored to analyze path conditions generated from the symbolic execution of programs with high-dimensional, correlated input distributions. SYMPAIS combines results from importance sampling and constraint solving to produce accurate estimates of the satisfaction probability for a broad class of constraints that cannot be analyzed by current solution space quantification methods. We demonstrate SYMPAIS's generality and performance compared with state-of-the-art alternatives on a set of problems from different application domains.
abstract_zh: 概率软件分析旨在量化在处理不确定的输入数据或使用概率编程结构编写的程序执行期间发生目标事件的概率。最近的技术将符号执行与模型计数或解空间量化方法相结合，以获得罕见目标事件发生概率的准确估计，例如关键任务系统中的故障。然而，在分析具有高维和相关多元输入分布的软件处理时，它们面临一些可扩展性和适用性限制。在本文中，我们提出了符号并行自适应重要性采样（SYMPAIS），这是一种新的推理方法，专门用于分析具有高维相关输入分布的程序的符号执行所生成的路径条件。 SYMPAIS 将重要性采样和约束求解的结果结合起来，为当前解空间量化方法无法分析的一大类约束生成满足概率的准确估计。我们针对来自不同应用领域的一系列问题，展示了 SYMPAIS 的通用性和性能，并与最先进的替代方案进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SYMPAIS的新方法，用于处理具有高维和相关多变量输入分布的程序的概率分析，以提高现有技术的可扩展性和适用性。
AI.motivation: 现有技术在处理高维和相关多变量输入分布时面临可扩展性和适用性限制，难以准确估计复杂约束的满足概率。
AI.method: 结合重要性采样与约束求解技术，通过符号执行生成路径条件，从而高效估算目标事件的概率。
AI.result: 在多个应用领域的问题上，SYMPAIS相比现有最先进的方法展现出更广泛的适用性和更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: SYMPAIS有效解决了现有方法在处理复杂输入分布和约束时的不足，为概率程序分析提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Symbolic Parallel Adaptive Importance Sampling for Probabilistic Program Analysis 用于概率程序分析的符号并行自适应重要性采样 Probabilistic software analysis aims at quantifying the probability of a target event occurring during the execution of a program processing uncertain incoming data or written itself using probabilistic programming constructs. Recent techniques combine symbolic execution with model counting or solution space quantification methods to obtain accurate estimates of the occurrence probability of rare target events, such as failures in a mission-critical system. However, they face several scalability and applicability limitations when analyzing software processing with high-dimensional and correlated multivariate input distributions. In this paper, we present SYMbolic Parallel Adaptive Importance Sampling (SYMPAIS), a new inference method tailored to analyze path conditions generated from the symbolic execution of programs with high-dimensional, correlated input distributions. SYMPAIS combines results from importance sampling and constraint solving to produce accurate estimates of the satisfaction probability for a broad class of constraints that cannot be analyzed by current solution space quantification methods. We demonstrate SYMPAIS's generality and performance compared with state-of-the-art alternatives on a set of problems from different application domains. 概率软件分析旨在量化在处理不确定的输入数据或使用概率编程结构编写的程序执行期间发生目标事件的概率。最近的技术将符号执行与模型计数或解空间量化方法相结合，以获得罕见目标事件发生概率的准确估计，例如关键任务系统中的故障。然而，在分析具有高维和相关多元输入分布的软件处理时，它们面临一些可扩展性和适用性限制。在本文中，我们提出了符号并行自适应重要性采样（SYMPAIS），这是一种新的推理方法，专门用于分析具有高维相关输入分布的程序的符号执行所生成的路径条件。 SYMPAIS 将重要性采样和约束求解的结果结合起来，为当前解空间量化方法无法分析的一大类约束生成满足概率的准确估计。我们针对来自不同应用领域的一系列问题，展示了 SYMPAIS 的通用性和性能，并与最先进的替代方案进行比较。 本文提出了一种名为SYMPAIS的新方法，用于处理具有高维和相关多变量输入分布的程序的概率分析，以提高现有技术的可扩展性和适用性。 Yicheng Luo,Antonio Filieri,Yuan Zhou cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.PL

authors_text: Franziska Geiger,Michelle Martin,Monika Pichlmair,Ilhan Aslan,Hannes Ritschel,Björn Bittner,Elisabeth André
title: Drawing with AI -- Exploring Collaborative Inking Experiences Based on Mid-air Pointing and Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 人工智能绘画——探索基于空中指向和强化学习的协作墨迹体验
abstract: Digitalization is changing the nature of tools and materials, which are used in artistic practices in professional and non-professional settings. For example, today it is common that even children express their ideas and explore their creativity by drawing on tablets as digital canvases. While there are many software-based tools, which resemble traditional tools, such as various forms of virtual brushes, erasers, etc. in contrast to traditional materials there is potential in augmenting software-based tools and digital canvases with artificial intelligence. Curious about how it would feel to interact with a digital canvas, which would be in contrast to a traditional canvas dynamic, responsive, and potentially able to continuously adapt to its user's input, we developed a drawing application and conducted a qualitative study with 14 users. In this paper, we describe details of our design process, which lead up to using a k-armed bandit as a simple form of reinforcement learning and a LeapMotion sensor to allow people from all walks of like, old and young to draw on pervasive displays, small and large, positioned near or far.
summary: Digitalization is changing the nature of tools and materials, which are used in artistic practices in professional and non-professional settings. For example, today it is common that even children express their ideas and explore their creativity by drawing on tablets as digital canvases. While there are many software-based tools, which resemble traditional tools, such as various forms of virtual brushes, erasers, etc. in contrast to traditional materials there is potential in augmenting software-based tools and digital canvases with artificial intelligence. Curious about how it would feel to interact with a digital canvas, which would be in contrast to a traditional canvas dynamic, responsive, and potentially able to continuously adapt to its user's input, we developed a drawing application and conducted a qualitative study with 14 users. In this paper, we describe details of our design process, which lead up to using a k-armed bandit as a simple form of reinforcement learning and a LeapMotion sensor to allow people from all walks of like, old and young to draw on pervasive displays, small and large, positioned near or far.
abstract_zh: 数字化正在改变专业和非专业环境中艺术实践中使用的工具和材料的性质。例如，如今，即使是孩子也经常通过在平板电脑上绘画作为数字画布来表达他们的想法并探索他们的创造力。虽然有许多基于软件的工具类似于传统工具，例如各种形式的虚拟画笔、橡皮擦等，但与传统材料相比，利用人工智能增强基于软件的工具和数字画布具有潜力。与传统画布相比，数字画布是动态的、响应灵敏的，并且可能能够持续适应用户的输入，我们很好奇与数字画布交互的感觉如何，因此我们开发了一个绘图应用程序，并对 14 位用户进行了定性研究。在本文中，我们描述了设计过程的细节，最终使用 k 臂老虎机作为强化学习的简单形式，并使用 LeapMotion 传感器，让各行各业的人们，无论老少，都可以在无处不在的显示器上画画，无论大小，无论位置近或远。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种结合空中指点和强化学习的AI绘画应用，探索协作式数字作画体验。
AI.motivation: 数字工具正在改变艺术创作方式，但传统软件工具缺乏动态适应性，需通过AI增强数字画布的交互性与响应能力。
AI.method: 采用k-臂老虎机强化学习算法与LeapMotion传感器实现空中手势交互，并通过14名用户的定性研究验证设计效果。
AI.result: 用户反馈表明该系统能提供新颖的动态绘画体验，AI辅助的笔触适应性提升了创作自由度与协作可能性。
AI.conclusion: AI与感知技术结合可创造新型数字艺术交互模式，为未来智能创作工具开发提供可行路径。

authors_text: Hao Zhang,Yichen Xie,Longjie Zheng,Die Zhang,Quanshi Zhang
title: Interpreting Multivariate Shapley Interactions in DNNs
title_zh: 解释 DNN 中的多元 Shapley 相互作用
abstract: This paper aims to explain deep neural networks (DNNs) from the perspective of multivariate interactions. In this paper, we define and quantify the significance of interactions among multiple input variables of the DNN. Input variables with strong interactions usually form a coalition and reflect prototype features, which are memorized and used by the DNN for inference. We define the significance of interactions based on the Shapley value, which is designed to assign the attribution value of each input variable to the inference. We have conducted experiments with various DNNs. Experimental results have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: This paper aims to explain deep neural networks (DNNs) from the perspective of multivariate interactions. In this paper, we define and quantify the significance of interactions among multiple input variables of the DNN. Input variables with strong interactions usually form a coalition and reflect prototype features, which are memorized and used by the DNN for inference. We define the significance of interactions based on the Shapley value, which is designed to assign the attribution value of each input variable to the inference. We have conducted experiments with various DNNs. Experimental results have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在从多元交互的角度解释深度神经网络（DNN）。在本文中，我们定义并量化了 DNN 的多个输入变量之间相互作用的重要性。具有强交互作用的输入变量通常形成一个联盟并反映原型特征，这些原型特征被 DNN 记忆并用于推理。我们根据 Shapley 值定义交互的重要性，该值旨在将每个输入变量的归因值分配给推理。我们用各种 DNN 进行了实验。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从多变量交互的角度解释深度神经网络（DNNs），定义并量化输入变量间的交互重要性。
AI.motivation: 理解DNN如何通过输入变量的交互进行推理，识别关键特征组合以提高模型可解释性。
AI.method: 基于Shapley值理论，量化多个输入变量的交互效应，识别对模型预测有贡献的变量组合。
AI.result: 实验结果证明了该方法在多种DNN上的有效性，能够准确识别关键交互特征。
AI.conclusion: 多变量Shapley交互分析可有效解释DNN决策过程，揭示模型依赖的原型特征组合。

authors_text: Daniel J. Foguelman,Philipp Henning,Adelinde Uhrmacher,Rodrigo Castro
title: EB-DEVS: A Formal Framework for Modeling and Simulation of Emergent Behavior in Dynamic Complex Systems
title_zh: EB-DEVS：动态复杂系统中紧急行为建模和仿真的正式框架
comment: 38 page document with: original content 25 pages, references 3 pages, appendices 10 pages
comments: 38 page document with: original content 25 pages, references 3 pages, appendices 10 pages
abstract: Emergent behavior is a key feature defining a system under study as a complex system. Simulation has been recognized as the only way to deal with the study of the emergency of properties (at a macroscopic level) among groups of system components (at a microscopic level), for the manifestations of emergent structures cannot be deduced from analysing components in isolation. A systems-oriented generalisation must consider the presence of feedback loops (micro components react to macro properties), interaction among components of different classes (modular composition) and layered interaction of subsystems operating at different spatio-temporal scales (hierarchical organisation). In this work we introduce Emergent Behavior-DEVS (EB-DEVS) a Modeling and Simulation (M&S) formalism that permits reasoning about complex systems where emergent behavior is placed at the forefront of the analysis activity. EB-DEVS builds on the DEVS formalism, adding upward/downward communication channels to well-established capabilities for modular and hierarchical M&S of heterogeneous multi-formalism systems. EB-DEVS takes a minimalist stance on expressiveness, introducing a small set of extensions on Classic DEVS that can cope with emergent behavior, and making both formalisms interoperable (the modeler decides which subsystems deserve to be expressed via micro-macro dynamics). We present three case studies: flocks of birds with learning, population epidemics with vaccination and sub-cellular dynamics with homeostasis, through which we showcase how EB-DEVS performs by placing emergent properties at the center of the M&S process.
summary: Emergent behavior is a key feature defining a system under study as a complex system. Simulation has been recognized as the only way to deal with the study of the emergency of properties (at a macroscopic level) among groups of system components (at a microscopic level), for the manifestations of emergent structures cannot be deduced from analysing components in isolation. A systems-oriented generalisation must consider the presence of feedback loops (micro components react to macro properties), interaction among components of different classes (modular composition) and layered interaction of subsystems operating at different spatio-temporal scales (hierarchical organisation). In this work we introduce Emergent Behavior-DEVS (EB-DEVS) a Modeling and Simulation (M&S) formalism that permits reasoning about complex systems where emergent behavior is placed at the forefront of the analysis activity. EB-DEVS builds on the DEVS formalism, adding upward/downward communication channels to well-established capabilities for modular and hierarchical M&S of heterogeneous multi-formalism systems. EB-DEVS takes a minimalist stance on expressiveness, introducing a small set of extensions on Classic DEVS that can cope with emergent behavior, and making both formalisms interoperable (the modeler decides which subsystems deserve to be expressed via micro-macro dynamics). We present three case studies: flocks of birds with learning, population epidemics with vaccination and sub-cellular dynamics with homeostasis, through which we showcase how EB-DEVS performs by placing emergent properties at the center of the M&S process.
abstract_zh: 突现行为是将所研究的系统定义为复杂系统的关键特征。仿真被认为是处理系统组件组（微观层面）之间属性紧急情况（宏观层面）研究的唯一方法，因为紧急结构的表现不能通过孤立地分析组件来推断。面向系统的概括必须考虑反馈循环的存在（微观组件对宏观属性做出反应）、不同类组件之间的交互（模块化组合）以及在不同时空尺度上运行的子系统的分层交互（分层组织）。在这项工作中，我们引入了紧急行为-DEVS (EB-DEVS)，这是一种建模和模拟 (M&S) 形式，允许对复杂系统进行推理，其中紧急行为被置于分析活动的最前沿。 EB-DEVS 建立在 DEVS 形式主义的基础上，为异构多形式主义系统的模块化和分层 M&S 的完善功能添加了向上/向下通信通道。 EB-DEVS 在表达性上采取极简主义立场，在经典 DEVS 上引入一小组扩展，可以应对紧急行为，并使两种形式可以互操作（建模者决定哪些子系统值得通过微观-宏观动力学来表达）。我们提出了三个案例研究：具有学习能力的鸟群、具有疫苗接种的群体流行病以及具有稳态的亚细胞动力学，通过这些案例我们展示了 EB-DEVS 如何通过将新兴特性置于 M&S 过程的中心来发挥作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EB-DEVS的形式化框架，用于动态复杂系统中涌现行为的建模与仿真。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理复杂系统中由组件交互产生的宏观涌现特性，需构建支持微观-宏观动态交互的新型建模方法。
AI.method: 在经典DEVS基础上扩展上下行通信通道，通过最小化扩展实现异构多形式系统的模块化分层建模与仿真。
AI.result: 通过鸟类群体学习、疫苗接种流行病和细胞内稳态三个案例验证了EB-DEVS在中心化处理涌现特性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: EB-DEVS为复杂系统研究提供了灵活且简洁的形式化工具，支持模型构建者自主选择微观-宏观动态表达方式。
