search_text: EB-DEVS: A Formal Framework for Modeling and Simulation of Emergent Behavior in Dynamic Complex Systems EB-DEVS：动态复杂系统中紧急行为建模和仿真的正式框架 Emergent behavior is a key feature defining a system under study as a complex system. Simulation has been recognized as the only way to deal with the study of the emergency of properties (at a macroscopic level) among groups of system components (at a microscopic level), for the manifestations of emergent structures cannot be deduced from analysing components in isolation. A systems-oriented generalisation must consider the presence of feedback loops (micro components react to macro properties), interaction among components of different classes (modular composition) and layered interaction of subsystems operating at different spatio-temporal scales (hierarchical organisation). In this work we introduce Emergent Behavior-DEVS (EB-DEVS) a Modeling and Simulation (M&S) formalism that permits reasoning about complex systems where emergent behavior is placed at the forefront of the analysis activity. EB-DEVS builds on the DEVS formalism, adding upward/downward communication channels to well-established capabilities for modular and hierarchical M&S of heterogeneous multi-formalism systems. EB-DEVS takes a minimalist stance on expressiveness, introducing a small set of extensions on Classic DEVS that can cope with emergent behavior, and making both formalisms interoperable (the modeler decides which subsystems deserve to be expressed via micro-macro dynamics). We present three case studies: flocks of birds with learning, population epidemics with vaccination and sub-cellular dynamics with homeostasis, through which we showcase how EB-DEVS performs by placing emergent properties at the center of the M&S process. 突现行为是将所研究的系统定义为复杂系统的关键特征。仿真被认为是处理系统组件组（微观层面）之间属性紧急情况（宏观层面）研究的唯一方法，因为紧急结构的表现不能通过孤立地分析组件来推断。面向系统的概括必须考虑反馈循环的存在（微观组件对宏观属性做出反应）、不同类组件之间的交互（模块化组合）以及在不同时空尺度上运行的子系统的分层交互（分层组织）。在这项工作中，我们引入了紧急行为-DEVS (EB-DEVS)，这是一种建模和模拟 (M&S) 形式，允许对复杂系统进行推理，其中紧急行为被置于分析活动的最前沿。 EB-DEVS 建立在 DEVS 形式主义的基础上，为异构多形式主义系统的模块化和分层 M&S 的完善功能添加了向上/向下通信通道。 EB-DEVS 在表达性上采取极简主义立场，在经典 DEVS 上引入一小组扩展，可以应对紧急行为，并使两种形式可以互操作（建模者决定哪些子系统值得通过微观-宏观动力学来表达）。我们提出了三个案例研究：具有学习能力的鸟群、具有疫苗接种的群体流行病以及具有稳态的亚细胞动力学，通过这些案例我们展示了 EB-DEVS 如何通过将新兴特性置于 M&S 过程的中心来发挥作用。 本文提出了一种名为EB-DEVS的形式化框架，用于动态复杂系统中涌现行为的建模与仿真。 Daniel J. Foguelman,Philipp Henning,Adelinde Uhrmacher,Rodrigo Castro cs.MA,cs.AI,nlin.AO

authors_text: Jun Wang,Qianying Liu,Haotian Xie,Zhaogang Yang,Hefeng Zhou
title: Boosted EfficientNet: Detection of Lymph Node Metastases in Breast Cancer Using Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: Boosted EfficientNet：使用卷积神经网络检测乳腺癌淋巴结转移
abstract: In recent years, advances in the development of whole-slide images have laid a foundation for the utilization of digital images in pathology. With the assistance of computer images analysis that automatically identifies tissue or cell types, they have greatly improved the histopathologic interpretation and diagnosis accuracy. In this paper, the Convolutional Neutral Network (CNN) has been adapted to predict and classify lymph node metastasis in breast cancer. Unlike traditional image cropping methods that are only suitable for large resolution images, we propose a novel data augmentation method named Random Center Cropping (RCC) to facilitate small resolution images. RCC enriches the datasets while retaining the image resolution and the center area of images. In addition, we reduce the downsampling scale of the network to further facilitate small resolution images better. Moreover, Attention and Feature Fusion (FF) mechanisms are employed to improve the semantic information of images. Experiments demonstrate that our methods boost performances of basic CNN architectures. And the best-performed method achieves an accuracy of 97.96% and an AUC of 99.68% on RPCam datasets, respectively.
summary: In recent years, advances in the development of whole-slide images have laid a foundation for the utilization of digital images in pathology. With the assistance of computer images analysis that automatically identifies tissue or cell types, they have greatly improved the histopathologic interpretation and diagnosis accuracy. In this paper, the Convolutional Neutral Network (CNN) has been adapted to predict and classify lymph node metastasis in breast cancer. Unlike traditional image cropping methods that are only suitable for large resolution images, we propose a novel data augmentation method named Random Center Cropping (RCC) to facilitate small resolution images. RCC enriches the datasets while retaining the image resolution and the center area of images. In addition, we reduce the downsampling scale of the network to further facilitate small resolution images better. Moreover, Attention and Feature Fusion (FF) mechanisms are employed to improve the semantic information of images. Experiments demonstrate that our methods boost performances of basic CNN architectures. And the best-performed method achieves an accuracy of 97.96% and an AUC of 99.68% on RPCam datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 近年来，全切片图像发展的进步为数字图像在病理学中的应用奠定了基础。借助自动识别组织或细胞类型的计算机图像分析，极大地提高了组织病理学解释和诊断的准确性。在本文中，卷积神经网络（CNN）已被用于预测和分类乳腺癌的淋巴结转移。与仅适用于大分辨率图像的传统图像裁剪方法不同，我们提出了一种名为随机中心裁剪（RCC）的新型数据增强方法，以方便小分辨率图像。 RCC丰富了数据集，同时保留了图像分辨率和图像的中心区域。此外，我们减少了网络的下采样规模，以进一步更好地促进小分辨率图像的发展。此外，采用注意力和特征融合（FF）机制来改善图像的语义信息。实验表明，我们的方法提高了基本 CNN 架构的性能。性能最佳的方法在 RPCam 数据集上分别实现了 97.96% 的准确率和 99.68% 的 AUC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的改进方法，用于检测乳腺癌淋巴结转移，通过优化数据增强和网络结构提升小分辨率病理图像的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像裁剪方法难以处理小分辨率病理图像，且现有CNN在低分辨率场景下性能受限，需设计适配小图像的数据增强与网络优化方案。
AI.method: 提出随机中心裁剪（RCC）数据增强方法以保留图像中心区域并扩充数据集，降低网络下采样比例以适应小分辨率图像，并引入注意力机制与特征融合（FF）提升语义信息提取能力。
AI.result: 在RPCam数据集上，最佳方法达到97.96%的准确率和99.68%的AUC值，显著优于基础CNN架构。
AI.conclusion: RCC增强与网络结构优化有效提升了小分辨率病理图像的淋巴结转移检测性能，验证了改进方法在乳腺癌诊断中的可行性与优越性。

title: Reinforcement Learning on Computational Resource Allocation of Cloud-based Wireless Networks
title_zh: 基于云的无线网络计算资源分配的强化学习
comment: This paper has been accepted by the IEEE 6th World Forum on Internet of Things conference
comments: This paper has been accepted by the IEEE 6th World Forum on Internet of Things conference
abstract: Wireless networks used for Internet of Things (IoT) are expected to largely involve cloud-based computing and processing. Softwarised and centralised signal processing and network switching in the cloud enables flexible network control and management. In a cloud environment, dynamic computational resource allocation is essential to save energy while maintaining the performance of the processes. The stochastic features of the Central Processing Unit (CPU) load variation as well as the possible complex parallelisation situations of the cloud processes makes the dynamic resource allocation an interesting research challenge. This paper models this dynamic computational resource allocation problem into a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and designs a model-based reinforcement-learning agent to optimise the dynamic resource allocation of the CPU usage. Value iteration method is used for the reinforcement-learning agent to pick up the optimal policy during the MDP. To evaluate our performance we analyse two types of processes that can be used in the cloud-based IoT networks with different levels of parallelisation capabilities, i.e., Software-Defined Radio (SDR) and Software-Defined Networking (SDN). The results show that our agent rapidly converges to the optimal policy, stably performs in different parameter settings, outperforms or at least equally performs compared to a baseline algorithm in energy savings for different scenarios.
summary: Wireless networks used for Internet of Things (IoT) are expected to largely involve cloud-based computing and processing. Softwarised and centralised signal processing and network switching in the cloud enables flexible network control and management. In a cloud environment, dynamic computational resource allocation is essential to save energy while maintaining the performance of the processes. The stochastic features of the Central Processing Unit (CPU) load variation as well as the possible complex parallelisation situations of the cloud processes makes the dynamic resource allocation an interesting research challenge. This paper models this dynamic computational resource allocation problem into a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and designs a model-based reinforcement-learning agent to optimise the dynamic resource allocation of the CPU usage. Value iteration method is used for the reinforcement-learning agent to pick up the optimal policy during the MDP. To evaluate our performance we analyse two types of processes that can be used in the cloud-based IoT networks with different levels of parallelisation capabilities, i.e., Software-Defined Radio (SDR) and Software-Defined Networking (SDN). The results show that our agent rapidly converges to the optimal policy, stably performs in different parameter settings, outperforms or at least equally performs compared to a baseline algorithm in energy savings for different scenarios.
abstract_zh: 用于物联网 (IoT) 的无线网络预计将主要涉及基于云的计算和处理。云中的软件化和集中式信号处理和网络交换可实现灵活的网络控制和管理。在云环境中，动态计算资源分配对于节省能源同时保持进程性能至关重要。中央处理单元（CPU）负载变化的随机特征以及云进程可能的复杂并行情况使得动态资源分配成为一个有趣的研究挑战。本文将这种动态计算资源分配问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并设计一个基于模型的强化学习代理来优化 CPU 使用的动态资源分配。强化学习代理在 MDP 过程中使用值迭代方法来选择最优策略。为了评估我们的性能，我们分析了可在具有不同并行化能力级别的基于云的物联网网络中使用的两种类型的流程，即软件定义无线电（SDR）和软件定义网络（SDN）。结果表明，我们的代理快速收敛到最优策略，在不同的参数设置下稳定执行，在不同场景的节能方面优于或至少与基线算法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文将强化学习应用于云基无线网络的计算资源分配，通过马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）建模并设计基于价值迭代的模型驱动智能体，以优化CPU资源动态分配。
AI.motivation: 云基物联网网络需应对CPU负载波动和复杂并行化场景，传统方法难以兼顾能效与性能，亟需动态资源分配优化方案。
AI.method: 将资源分配问题建模为MDP，采用模型驱动的强化学习方法，结合价值迭代算法训练智能体，并在软件定义无线电（SDR）和软件定义网络（SDN）场景中验证性能。
AI.result: 智能体能快速收敛至最优策略，稳定适应不同参数设置，在多种场景下实现优于或至少等同于基线算法的能耗节省效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了云基无线网络动态资源分配的挑战，为物联网环境下的能效优化提供了可行方案。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning on Computational Resource Allocation of Cloud-based Wireless Networks 基于云的无线网络计算资源分配的强化学习 Wireless networks used for Internet of Things (IoT) are expected to largely involve cloud-based computing and processing. Softwarised and centralised signal processing and network switching in the cloud enables flexible network control and management. In a cloud environment, dynamic computational resource allocation is essential to save energy while maintaining the performance of the processes. The stochastic features of the Central Processing Unit (CPU) load variation as well as the possible complex parallelisation situations of the cloud processes makes the dynamic resource allocation an interesting research challenge. This paper models this dynamic computational resource allocation problem into a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and designs a model-based reinforcement-learning agent to optimise the dynamic resource allocation of the CPU usage. Value iteration method is used for the reinforcement-learning agent to pick up the optimal policy during the MDP. To evaluate our performance we analyse two types of processes that can be used in the cloud-based IoT networks with different levels of parallelisation capabilities, i.e., Software-Defined Radio (SDR) and Software-Defined Networking (SDN). The results show that our agent rapidly converges to the optimal policy, stably performs in different parameter settings, outperforms or at least equally performs compared to a baseline algorithm in energy savings for different scenarios. 用于物联网 (IoT) 的无线网络预计将主要涉及基于云的计算和处理。云中的软件化和集中式信号处理和网络交换可实现灵活的网络控制和管理。在云环境中，动态计算资源分配对于节省能源同时保持进程性能至关重要。中央处理单元（CPU）负载变化的随机特征以及云进程可能的复杂并行情况使得动态资源分配成为一个有趣的研究挑战。本文将这种动态计算资源分配问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并设计一个基于模型的强化学习代理来优化 CPU 使用的动态资源分配。强化学习代理在 MDP 过程中使用值迭代方法来选择最优策略。为了评估我们的性能，我们分析了可在具有不同并行化能力级别的基于云的物联网网络中使用的两种类型的流程，即软件定义无线电（SDR）和软件定义网络（SDN）。结果表明，我们的代理快速收敛到最优策略，在不同的参数设置下稳定执行，在不同场景的节能方面优于或至少与基线算法相当。 本文将强化学习应用于云基无线网络的计算资源分配，通过马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）建模并设计基于价值迭代的模型驱动智能体，以优化CPU资源动态分配。 Beiran Chen,Yi Zhang,George Iosifidis,Mingming Liu cs.AI,cs.LG

title: An Encoder-Decoder CNN for Hair Removal in Dermoscopic Images
title_zh: 用于皮肤镜图像脱毛的编码器-解码器 CNN
abstract: The process of removing occluding hair has a relevant role in the early and accurate diagnosis of skin cancer. It consists of detecting hairs and restore the texture below them, which is sporadically occluded. In this work, we present a model based on convolutional neural networks for hair removal in dermoscopic images. During the network's training, we use a combined loss function to improve the restoration ability of the proposed model. In order to train the CNN and to quantitatively validate their performance, we simulate the presence of skin hair in hairless images extracted from publicly known datasets such as the PH2, dermquest, dermis, EDRA2002, and the ISIC Data Archive. As far as we know, there is no other hair removal method based on deep learning. Thus, we compare our results with six state-of-the-art algorithms based on traditional computer vision techniques by means of similarity measures that compare the reference hairless image and the one with hair simulated. Finally, a statistical test is used to compare the methods. Both qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our network.
summary: The process of removing occluding hair has a relevant role in the early and accurate diagnosis of skin cancer. It consists of detecting hairs and restore the texture below them, which is sporadically occluded. In this work, we present a model based on convolutional neural networks for hair removal in dermoscopic images. During the network's training, we use a combined loss function to improve the restoration ability of the proposed model. In order to train the CNN and to quantitatively validate their performance, we simulate the presence of skin hair in hairless images extracted from publicly known datasets such as the PH2, dermquest, dermis, EDRA2002, and the ISIC Data Archive. As far as we know, there is no other hair removal method based on deep learning. Thus, we compare our results with six state-of-the-art algorithms based on traditional computer vision techniques by means of similarity measures that compare the reference hairless image and the one with hair simulated. Finally, a statistical test is used to compare the methods. Both qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our network.
abstract_zh: 去除遮挡毛发的过程对于皮肤癌的早期和准确诊断具有相关作用。它包括检测毛发并恢复毛发下方偶尔被遮挡的纹理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的模型，用于皮肤镜图像中的脱毛。在网络的训练过程中，我们使用组合损失函数来提高所提出模型的恢复能力。为了训练 CNN 并定量验证其性能，我们模拟了从公开数据集（例如 PH2、dermquest、dermis、EDRA2002 和 ISIC Data Archive）中提取的无毛图像中皮肤毛发的存在。据我们所知，目前还没有其他基于深度学习的脱毛方法。因此，我们通过相似性度量将我们的结果与基于传统计算机视觉技术的六种最先进的算法进行比较，该相似性度量将参考无毛图像与模拟头发图像进行比较。最后，使用统计检验来比较这些方法。定性和定量结果都证明了我们网络的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的编码器-解码器模型，用于皮肤镜图像中的毛发去除任务。
AI.motivation: 毛发遮挡会影响皮肤癌的早期准确诊断，现有方法难以有效恢复毛发下方的皮肤纹理。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器CNN架构，采用组合损失函数训练模型，并基于公开数据集生成带毛发模拟的训练样本进行验证。
AI.result: 定性结果展示图像修复效果更自然，定量指标优于6种传统算法，统计检验验证了方法优越性。
AI.conclusion: 所提深度学习方法在皮肤镜图像毛发去除任务中较传统方法具有显著优势，为皮肤癌诊断提供有效预处理方案。

authors_text: Xinyu Wang,Yong Jiang,Zhaohui Yan,Zixia Jia,Nguyen Bach,Tao Wang,Zhongqiang Huang,Fei Huang,Kewei Tu
title: Structural Knowledge Distillation: Tractably Distilling Information for Structured Predictor
title_zh: 结构知识蒸馏：为结构化预测器轻松蒸馏信息
comment: Accepted to Proceedings of ACL-IJCNLP 2021. 15 pages
comments: Accepted to Proceedings of ACL-IJCNLP 2021. 15 pages
abstract: Knowledge distillation is a critical technique to transfer knowledge between models, typically from a large model (the teacher) to a more fine-grained one (the student). The objective function of knowledge distillation is typically the cross-entropy between the teacher and the student's output distributions. However, for structured prediction problems, the output space is exponential in size; therefore, the cross-entropy objective becomes intractable to compute and optimize directly. In this paper, we derive a factorized form of the knowledge distillation objective for structured prediction, which is tractable for many typical choices of the teacher and student models. In particular, we show the tractability and empirical effectiveness of structural knowledge distillation between sequence labeling and dependency parsing models under four different scenarios: 1) the teacher and student share the same factorization form of the output structure scoring function; 2) the student factorization produces more fine-grained substructures than the teacher factorization; 3) the teacher factorization produces more fine-grained substructures than the student factorization; 4) the factorization forms from the teacher and the student are incompatible.
summary: Knowledge distillation is a critical technique to transfer knowledge between models, typically from a large model (the teacher) to a more fine-grained one (the student). The objective function of knowledge distillation is typically the cross-entropy between the teacher and the student's output distributions. However, for structured prediction problems, the output space is exponential in size; therefore, the cross-entropy objective becomes intractable to compute and optimize directly. In this paper, we derive a factorized form of the knowledge distillation objective for structured prediction, which is tractable for many typical choices of the teacher and student models. In particular, we show the tractability and empirical effectiveness of structural knowledge distillation between sequence labeling and dependency parsing models under four different scenarios: 1) the teacher and student share the same factorization form of the output structure scoring function; 2) the student factorization produces more fine-grained substructures than the teacher factorization; 3) the teacher factorization produces more fine-grained substructures than the student factorization; 4) the factorization forms from the teacher and the student are incompatible.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是一种在模型之间转移知识的关键技术，通常是从大型模型（教师）到更细粒度的模型（学生）。知识蒸馏的目标函数通常是教师和学生输出分布之间的交叉熵。然而，对于结构化预测问题，输出空间的大小是指数级的；因此，交叉熵目标变得难以直接计算和优化。在本文中，我们推导了用于结构化预测的知识蒸馏目标的分解形式，这对于教师和学生模型的许多典型选择来说是易于处理的。特别是，我们展示了在四种不同场景下序列标记和依存解析模型之间结构知识蒸馏的易处理性和经验有效性：1）教师和学生共享输出结构评分函数的相同因式分解形式； 2）学生因式分解比教师因式分解产生更细粒度的子结构； 3）教师因式分解比学生因式分解产生更细粒度的子结构； 4）教师和学生的因式分解形式不兼容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于结构化预测问题的可扩展知识蒸馏方法，解决传统交叉熵目标函数在输出空间指数级增长时的计算难题。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏在结构化预测任务中因输出空间指数级膨胀导致交叉熵目标函数难以直接计算和优化，需寻找新的可扩展解决方案。
AI.method: 推导出结构化知识蒸馏的因子化目标函数形式，通过四种不同场景（模型因子化形式兼容性、粒度差异等）验证其可计算性与有效性。
AI.result: 在序列标注和依存句法分析任务中，四种场景下的实验均验证了该方法的可行性与性能优势，证明其能有效传递结构化知识。
AI.conclusion: 因子化目标函数为结构化预测模型的知识蒸馏提供了通用框架，解决了传统方法的可扩展性瓶颈，具有广泛的应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于结构化预测问题的可扩展知识蒸馏方法，解决传统交叉熵目标函数在输出空间指数级增长时的计算难题。
motivation: 传统知识蒸馏在结构化预测任务中因输出空间指数级膨胀导致交叉熵目标函数难以直接计算和优化，需寻找新的可扩展解决方案。
method: 推导出结构化知识蒸馏的因子化目标函数形式，通过四种不同场景（模型因子化形式兼容性、粒度差异等）验证其可计算性与有效性。
result: 在序列标注和依存句法分析任务中，四种场景下的实验均验证了该方法的可行性与性能优势，证明其能有效传递结构化知识。
conclusion: 因子化目标函数为结构化预测模型的知识蒸馏提供了通用框架，解决了传统方法的可扩展性瓶颈，具有广泛的应用潜力。
search_text: Structural Knowledge Distillation: Tractably Distilling Information for Structured Predictor 结构知识蒸馏：为结构化预测器轻松蒸馏信息 Knowledge distillation is a critical technique to transfer knowledge between models, typically from a large model (the teacher) to a more fine-grained one (the student). The objective function of knowledge distillation is typically the cross-entropy between the teacher and the student's output distributions. However, for structured prediction problems, the output space is exponential in size; therefore, the cross-entropy objective becomes intractable to compute and optimize directly. In this paper, we derive a factorized form of the knowledge distillation objective for structured prediction, which is tractable for many typical choices of the teacher and student models. In particular, we show the tractability and empirical effectiveness of structural knowledge distillation between sequence labeling and dependency parsing models under four different scenarios: 1) the teacher and student share the same factorization form of the output structure scoring function; 2) the student factorization produces more fine-grained substructures than the teacher factorization; 3) the teacher factorization produces more fine-grained substructures than the student factorization; 4) the factorization forms from the teacher and the student are incompatible. 知识蒸馏是一种在模型之间转移知识的关键技术，通常是从大型模型（教师）到更细粒度的模型（学生）。知识蒸馏的目标函数通常是教师和学生输出分布之间的交叉熵。然而，对于结构化预测问题，输出空间的大小是指数级的；因此，交叉熵目标变得难以直接计算和优化。在本文中，我们推导了用于结构化预测的知识蒸馏目标的分解形式，这对于教师和学生模型的许多典型选择来说是易于处理的。特别是，我们展示了在四种不同场景下序列标记和依存解析模型之间结构知识蒸馏的易处理性和经验有效性：1）教师和学生共享输出结构评分函数的相同因式分解形式； 2）学生因式分解比教师因式分解产生更细粒度的子结构； 3）教师因式分解比学生因式分解产生更细粒度的子结构； 4）教师和学生的因式分解形式不兼容。 本文提出了一种适用于结构化预测问题的可扩展知识蒸馏方法，解决传统交叉熵目标函数在输出空间指数级增长时的计算难题。 Xinyu Wang,Yong Jiang,Zhaohui Yan,Zixia Jia,Nguyen Bach,Tao Wang,Zhongqiang Huang,Fei Huang,Kewei Tu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Category-Learning with Context-Augmented Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用上下文增强自动编码器进行类别学习
abstract: Finding an interpretable non-redundant representation of real-world data is one of the key problems in Machine Learning. Biological neural networks are known to solve this problem quite well in unsupervised manner, yet unsupervised artificial neural networks either struggle to do it or require fine tuning for each task individually. We associate this with the fact that a biological brain learns in the context of the relationships between observations, while an artificial network does not. We also notice that, though a naive data augmentation technique can be very useful for supervised learning problems, autoencoders typically fail to generalize transformations from data augmentations. Thus, we believe that providing additional knowledge about relationships between data samples will improve model's capability of finding useful inner data representation. More formally, we consider a dataset not as a manifold, but as a category, where the examples are objects. Two these objects are connected by a morphism, if they actually represent different transformations of the same entity. Following this formalism, we propose a novel method of using data augmentations when training autoencoders. We train a Variational Autoencoder in such a way, that it makes transformation outcome predictable by auxiliary network in terms of the hidden representation. We believe that the classification accuracy of a linear classifier on the learned representation is a good metric to measure its interpretability. In our experiments, present approach outperforms $β$-VAE and is comparable with Gaussian-mixture VAE.
summary: Finding an interpretable non-redundant representation of real-world data is one of the key problems in Machine Learning. Biological neural networks are known to solve this problem quite well in unsupervised manner, yet unsupervised artificial neural networks either struggle to do it or require fine tuning for each task individually. We associate this with the fact that a biological brain learns in the context of the relationships between observations, while an artificial network does not. We also notice that, though a naive data augmentation technique can be very useful for supervised learning problems, autoencoders typically fail to generalize transformations from data augmentations. Thus, we believe that providing additional knowledge about relationships between data samples will improve model's capability of finding useful inner data representation. More formally, we consider a dataset not as a manifold, but as a category, where the examples are objects. Two these objects are connected by a morphism, if they actually represent different transformations of the same entity. Following this formalism, we propose a novel method of using data augmentations when training autoencoders. We train a Variational Autoencoder in such a way, that it makes transformation outcome predictable by auxiliary network in terms of the hidden representation. We believe that the classification accuracy of a linear classifier on the learned representation is a good metric to measure its interpretability. In our experiments, present approach outperforms $β$-VAE and is comparable with Gaussian-mixture VAE.
abstract_zh: 找到现实世界数据的可解释的非冗余表示是机器学习的关键问题之一。众所周知，生物神经网络可以以无监督的方式很好地解决这个问题，但无监督的人工神经网络要么很难做到这一点，要么需要对每个任务单独进行微调。我们将此与以下事实联系起来：生物大脑在观察之间的关系的背景下进行学习，而人工网络则不然。我们还注意到，尽管简单的数据增强技术对于监督学习问题非常有用，但自动编码器通常无法概括数据增强的转换。因此，我们相信提供有关数据样本之间关系的额外知识将提高模型找到有用的内部数据表示的能力。更正式地说，我们不将数据集视为流形，而是将其视为类别，其中示例是对象。如果这两个对象实际上代表同一实体的不同变换，则它们通过态射连接。按照这种形式，我们提出了一种在训练自动编码器时使用数据增强的新方法。我们以这样的方式训练变分自动编码器，使得辅助网络可以根据隐藏表示来预测转换结果。我们认为，线性分类器在学习表示上的分类准确性是衡量其可解释性的一个很好的指标。在我们的实验中，本方法优于 $β$-VAE，并且与高斯混合 VAE 相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于范畴论的上下文增强自编码器，通过引入数据样本间的关系信息提升模型的可解释性与表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器难以学习到可解释的非冗余表示，而生物神经网络能通过上下文关系实现无监督学习，因此需探索利用数据样本间关系的建模方法。
AI.method: 将数据集视为范畴论中的对象集合，利用态射描述样本间变换关系，训练变分自编码器使隐藏表示能预测辅助网络的变换结果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在分类准确率指标上优于β-VAE，且性能接近高斯混合VAE，验证了上下文信息对表示学习的促进作用。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入范畴论框架和上下文信息，模型能更有效地学习到具有可解释性的数据表示，为无监督表征学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xinyu Wang,Yong Jiang,Nguyen Bach,Tao Wang,Zhongqiang Huang,Fei Huang,Kewei Tu
title: Automated Concatenation of Embeddings for Structured Prediction
title_zh: 用于结构化预测的嵌入的自动串联
comment: Accepted to Proceedings of ACL-IJCNLP 2021. 17 pages
comments: Accepted to Proceedings of ACL-IJCNLP 2021. 17 pages
abstract: Pretrained contextualized embeddings are powerful word representations for structured prediction tasks. Recent work found that better word representations can be obtained by concatenating different types of embeddings. However, the selection of embeddings to form the best concatenated representation usually varies depending on the task and the collection of candidate embeddings, and the ever-increasing number of embedding types makes it a more difficult problem. In this paper, we propose Automated Concatenation of Embeddings (ACE) to automate the process of finding better concatenations of embeddings for structured prediction tasks, based on a formulation inspired by recent progress on neural architecture search. Specifically, a controller alternately samples a concatenation of embeddings, according to its current belief of the effectiveness of individual embedding types in consideration for a task, and updates the belief based on a reward. We follow strategies in reinforcement learning to optimize the parameters of the controller and compute the reward based on the accuracy of a task model, which is fed with the sampled concatenation as input and trained on a task dataset. Empirical results on 6 tasks and 21 datasets show that our approach outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance with fine-tuned embeddings in all the evaluations.
summary: Pretrained contextualized embeddings are powerful word representations for structured prediction tasks. Recent work found that better word representations can be obtained by concatenating different types of embeddings. However, the selection of embeddings to form the best concatenated representation usually varies depending on the task and the collection of candidate embeddings, and the ever-increasing number of embedding types makes it a more difficult problem. In this paper, we propose Automated Concatenation of Embeddings (ACE) to automate the process of finding better concatenations of embeddings for structured prediction tasks, based on a formulation inspired by recent progress on neural architecture search. Specifically, a controller alternately samples a concatenation of embeddings, according to its current belief of the effectiveness of individual embedding types in consideration for a task, and updates the belief based on a reward. We follow strategies in reinforcement learning to optimize the parameters of the controller and compute the reward based on the accuracy of a task model, which is fed with the sampled concatenation as input and trained on a task dataset. Empirical results on 6 tasks and 21 datasets show that our approach outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance with fine-tuned embeddings in all the evaluations.
abstract_zh: 预训练的上下文嵌入是用于结构化预测任务的强大单词表示。最近的工作发现，通过连接不同类型的嵌入可以获得更好的单词表示。然而，选择嵌入来形成最佳串联表示通常会根据任务和候选嵌入的集合而变化，并且嵌入类型数量的不断增加使其成为一个更加困难的问题。在本文中，我们提出了嵌入自动串联（ACE），以自动化为结构化预测任务寻找更好的嵌入串联的过程，该过程基于受神经架构搜索最新进展启发的公式。具体来说，控制器根据其当前对单个嵌入类型有效性的信念（考虑到任务）交替对嵌入串联进行采样，并根据奖励更新信念。我们遵循强化学习中的策略来优化控制器的参数，并根据任务模型的准确性计算奖励，该任务模型以采样串联作为输入并在任务数据集上进行训练。 6 个任务和 21 个数据集的实证结果表明，我们的方法优于强大的基线，并在所有评估中通过微调嵌入实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化的嵌入拼接方法（ACE），用于优化结构化预测任务中的嵌入组合选择。
AI.motivation: 手动选择最佳嵌入组合因任务差异和嵌入类型激增而变得复杂，需自动化方法提升效率与效果。
AI.method: 基于神经架构搜索，设计控制器通过强化学习动态采样嵌入组合，并根据任务模型准确率调整策略参数。
AI.result: 在6个任务21个数据集上，ACE超越强基线并在微调嵌入下达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: ACE有效解决了嵌入组合选择难题，为结构化预测提供了高效自动化方案。

Specifically, a controller alternately samples a concatenation of embeddings, according to its current belief of the effectiveness of individual embedding types in consideration for a task, and updates the belief based on a reward. We follow strategies in reinforcement learning to optimize the parameters of the controller and compute the reward based on the accuracy of a task model, which is fed with the sampled concatenation as input and trained on a task dataset. Empirical results on 6 tasks and 21 datasets show that our approach outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance with fine-tuned embeddings in all the evaluations. 预训练的上下文嵌入是用于结构化预测任务的强大单词表示。最近的工作发现，通过连接不同类型的嵌入可以获得更好的单词表示。然而，选择嵌入来形成最佳串联表示通常会根据任务和候选嵌入的集合而变化，并且嵌入类型数量的不断增加使其成为一个更加困难的问题。在本文中，我们提出了嵌入自动串联（ACE），以自动化为结构化预测任务寻找更好的嵌入串联的过程，该过程基于受神经架构搜索最新进展启发的公式。具体来说，控制器根据其当前对单个嵌入类型有效性的信念（考虑到任务）交替对嵌入串联进行采样，并根据奖励更新信念。我们遵循强化学习中的策略来优化控制器的参数，并根据任务模型的准确性计算奖励，该任务模型以采样串联作为输入并在任务数据集上进行训练。 6 个任务和 21 个数据集的实证结果表明，我们的方法优于强大的基线，并在所有评估中通过微调嵌入实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种自动化的嵌入拼接方法（ACE），用于优化结构化预测任务中的嵌入组合选择。 Xinyu Wang,Yong Jiang,Nguyen Bach,Tao Wang,Zhongqiang Huang,Fei Huang,Kewei Tu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Generalizations of Length Limited Huffman Coding for Hierarchical Memory Settings
title_zh: 分层内存设置的长度有限霍夫曼编码的推广
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of designing prefix-free encoding schemes having minimum average code length that can be decoded efficiently under a decode cost model that captures memory hierarchy induced cost functions. We also study a special case of this problem that is closely related to the length limited Huffman coding (LLHC) problem; we call this the {\em soft-length limited Huffman coding} problem. In this version, there is a penalty associated with each of the $n$ characters of the alphabet whose encodings exceed a specified bound $D$($\leq n$), where the penalty increases linearly with the length of the encoding beyond $D$. The goal of the problem is to find a prefix-free encoding having minimum average code length and total penalty within a pre-specified bound ${\cal P}$. This generalizes the LLHC problem. We present an algorithm to solve this problem that runs in time $O( nD )$. We study a further generalization in which the penalty function and the objective function can both be arbitrary monotonically non-decreasing functions of the codeword length. We provide dynamic programming based exact and PTAS algorithms for this setting.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of designing prefix-free encoding schemes having minimum average code length that can be decoded efficiently under a decode cost model that captures memory hierarchy induced cost functions. We also study a special case of this problem that is closely related to the length limited Huffman coding (LLHC) problem; we call this the {\em soft-length limited Huffman coding} problem. In this version, there is a penalty associated with each of the $n$ characters of the alphabet whose encodings exceed a specified bound $D$($\leq n$), where the penalty increases linearly with the length of the encoding beyond $D$. The goal of the problem is to find a prefix-free encoding having minimum average code length and total penalty within a pre-specified bound ${\cal P}$. This generalizes the LLHC problem. We present an algorithm to solve this problem that runs in time $O( nD )$. We study a further generalization in which the penalty function and the objective function can both be arbitrary monotonically non-decreasing functions of the codeword length. We provide dynamic programming based exact and PTAS algorithms for this setting.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了设计具有最小平均代码长度的无前缀编码方案的问题，该方案可以在捕获存储器层次结构引起的成本函数的解码成本模型下有效地解码。我们还研究了该问题的一个特殊情况，它与长度有限的霍夫曼编码（LLHC）问题密切相关；我们称之为{\em软长度受限霍夫曼编码}问题。在此版本中，编码超过指定界限 $D$($\leq n$) 的字母表中的每个 $n$ 个字符都会受到惩罚，其中惩罚随着超过 $D$ 的编码长度线性增加。该问题的目标是在预先指定的界限 ${\cal P}$ 内找到具有最小平均代码长度和总惩罚的无前缀编码。这概括了 LLHC 问题。我们提出了一个算法来解决这个问题，运行时间为$O(nD)$。我们研究了进一步的推广，其中惩罚函数和目标函数都可以是码字长度的任意单调非递减函数。我们为此设置提供基于动态规划的精确算法和 PTAS 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在分层内存设置下设计最小平均码长的前缀编码方案，并提出了软长度限制霍夫曼编码问题及其扩展算法。
AI.motivation: 传统霍夫曼编码未考虑分层内存的解码成本，而实际应用中内存层次结构会显著影响解码效率，需设计兼顾码长限制与解码成本的编码方案。
AI.method: 提出软长度限制霍夫曼编码问题，设计O(nD)时间复杂度的算法，并通过动态规划解决更一般的单调非递减惩罚函数和目标函数场景，提供精确算法和PTAS。
AI.result: 解决了软长度限制编码问题，给出了分层内存模型下的最优编码算法，并扩展到任意单调惩罚函数场景，提供动态规划框架及近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文推广了长度限制霍夫曼编码，为分层内存环境下的编码优化提供了理论方法和高效算法，平衡了码长限制与解码成本的矛盾。

authors_text: Wanqing Cui,Yanyan Lan,Liang Pang,Jiafeng Guo,Xueqi Cheng
title: Beyond Language: Learning Commonsense from Images for Reasoning
title_zh: 超越语言：从图像中学习常识以进行推理
abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach to learn commonsense from images, instead of limited raw texts or costly constructed knowledge bases, for the commonsense reasoning problem in NLP. Our motivation comes from the fact that an image is worth a thousand words, where richer scene information could be leveraged to help distill the commonsense knowledge, which is often hidden in languages. Our approach, namely Loire, consists of two stages. In the first stage, a bi-modal sequence-to-sequence approach is utilized to conduct the scene layout generation task, based on a text representation model ViBERT. In this way, the required visual scene knowledge, such as spatial relations, will be encoded in ViBERT by the supervised learning process with some bi-modal data like COCO. Then ViBERT is concatenated with a pre-trained language model to perform the downstream commonsense reasoning tasks. Experimental results on two commonsense reasoning problems, i.e. commonsense question answering and pronoun resolution, demonstrate that Loire outperforms traditional language-based methods. We also give some case studies to show what knowledge is learned from images and explain how the generated scene layout helps the commonsense reasoning process.
summary: This paper proposes a novel approach to learn commonsense from images, instead of limited raw texts or costly constructed knowledge bases, for the commonsense reasoning problem in NLP. Our motivation comes from the fact that an image is worth a thousand words, where richer scene information could be leveraged to help distill the commonsense knowledge, which is often hidden in languages. Our approach, namely Loire, consists of two stages. In the first stage, a bi-modal sequence-to-sequence approach is utilized to conduct the scene layout generation task, based on a text representation model ViBERT. In this way, the required visual scene knowledge, such as spatial relations, will be encoded in ViBERT by the supervised learning process with some bi-modal data like COCO. Then ViBERT is concatenated with a pre-trained language model to perform the downstream commonsense reasoning tasks. Experimental results on two commonsense reasoning problems, i.e. commonsense question answering and pronoun resolution, demonstrate that Loire outperforms traditional language-based methods. We also give some case studies to show what knowledge is learned from images and explain how the generated scene layout helps the commonsense reasoning process.
abstract_zh: 本文针对 NLP 中的常识推理问题，提出了一种从图像中学习常识的新方法，而不是有限的原始文本或昂贵的构建知识库。我们的动机来自这样一个事实：一张图像胜过一千个单词，可以利用更丰富的场景信息来帮助提取通常隐藏在语言中的常识知识。我们的方法，即卢瓦尔河，由两个阶段组成。在第一阶段，基于文本表示模型 ViBERT，采用双模态序列到序列方法来执行场景布局生成任务。这样，所需的视觉场景知识（例如空间关系）将通过监督学习过程与一些双模态数据（如 COCO）编码在 ViBERT 中。然后，ViBERT 与预先训练的语言模型相连接，以执行下游的常识推理任务。常识问答和代词解析这两个常识推理问题的实验结果表明，Loire 优于传统的基于语言的方法。我们还提供了一些案例研究来展示从图像中学到了哪些知识，并解释了生成的场景布局如何帮助常识推理过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从图像中学习常识知识以提升自然语言推理能力的方法。
AI.motivation: 图像包含丰富的场景信息，能更有效地挖掘隐藏在语言中的常识知识，克服传统文本或知识库的局限性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法Loire：第一阶段通过双模态序列到序列模型生成场景布局，利用ViBERT编码视觉常识；第二阶段将ViBERT与预训练语言模型结合，完成常识推理任务。
AI.result: 在常识问答和代词消解任务中优于传统语言模型方法，案例研究验证了图像学习的常识知识对推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 图像驱动的常识学习能有效增强自然语言推理能力，为跨模态知识获取提供新思路。

title: A Recursive Markov Boundary-Based Approach to Causal Structure Learning
title_zh: 基于递归马尔可夫边界的因果结构学习方法
abstract: Constraint-based methods are one of the main approaches for causal structure learning that are particularly valued as they are asymptotically guaranteed to find a structure that is Markov equivalent to the causal graph of the system. On the other hand, they may require an exponentially large number of conditional independence (CI) tests in the number of variables of the system. In this paper, we propose a novel recursive constraint-based method for causal structure learning that significantly reduces the required number of CI tests compared to the existing literature. The idea of the proposed approach is to use Markov boundary information to identify a specific variable that can be removed from the set of variables without affecting the statistical dependencies among the other variables. Having identified such a variable, we discover its neighborhood, remove that variable from the set of variables, and recursively learn the causal structure over the remaining variables. We further provide a lower bound on the number of CI tests required by any constraint-based method. Comparing this lower bound to our achievable bound demonstrates the efficiency of the proposed approach. Our experimental results show that the proposed algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art both on synthetic and real-world structures.
summary: Constraint-based methods are one of the main approaches for causal structure learning that are particularly valued as they are asymptotically guaranteed to find a structure that is Markov equivalent to the causal graph of the system. On the other hand, they may require an exponentially large number of conditional independence (CI) tests in the number of variables of the system. In this paper, we propose a novel recursive constraint-based method for causal structure learning that significantly reduces the required number of CI tests compared to the existing literature. The idea of the proposed approach is to use Markov boundary information to identify a specific variable that can be removed from the set of variables without affecting the statistical dependencies among the other variables. Having identified such a variable, we discover its neighborhood, remove that variable from the set of variables, and recursively learn the causal structure over the remaining variables. We further provide a lower bound on the number of CI tests required by any constraint-based method. Comparing this lower bound to our achievable bound demonstrates the efficiency of the proposed approach. Our experimental results show that the proposed algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art both on synthetic and real-world structures.
abstract_zh: 基于约束的方法是因果结构学习的主要方法之一，因其渐近保证找到与系统因果图等价的马尔可夫结构而受到特别重视。另一方面，它们可能需要对系统变量的数量进行指数级数量的条件独立性 (CI) 测试。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于递归约束的因果结构学习方法，与现有文献相比，该方法显着减少了所需的 CI 测试数量。所提出方法的思想是使用马尔可夫边界信息来识别可以从变量集中删除的特定变量，而不影响其他变量之间的统计依赖性。识别出这样一个变量后，我们发现它的邻域，从变量集中删除该变量，并递归地学习剩余变量的因果结构。我们进一步提供了任何基于约束的方法所需的 CI 测试数量的下限。将此下限与我们可实现的界限进行比较证明了所提出方法的效率。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的算法在合成结构和现实世界结构上都优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫边界信息的递归约束方法，用于减少因果结构学习中的条件独立性检验次数。
AI.motivation: 传统约束方法需进行指数级条件独立性检验，效率低下，亟需更高效算法。
AI.method: 利用马尔可夫边界识别可移除变量，递归学习剩余变量的因果结构，并提供约束方法的CI检验下界。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在合成数据和真实数据集上均优于现有方法，且检验次数显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过递归消除变量有效降低计算复杂度，在因果结构学习中具有显著优势。

search_text: A Recursive Markov Boundary-Based Approach to Causal Structure Learning 基于递归马尔可夫边界的因果结构学习方法 Constraint-based methods are one of the main approaches for causal structure learning that are particularly valued as they are asymptotically guaranteed to find a structure that is Markov equivalent to the causal graph of the system. On the other hand, they may require an exponentially large number of conditional independence (CI) tests in the number of variables of the system. In this paper, we propose a novel recursive constraint-based method for causal structure learning that significantly reduces the required number of CI tests compared to the existing literature. The idea of the proposed approach is to use Markov boundary information to identify a specific variable that can be removed from the set of variables without affecting the statistical dependencies among the other variables. Having identified such a variable, we discover its neighborhood, remove that variable from the set of variables, and recursively learn the causal structure over the remaining variables. We further provide a lower bound on the number of CI tests required by any constraint-based method. Comparing this lower bound to our achievable bound demonstrates the efficiency of the proposed approach. Our experimental results show that the proposed algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art both on synthetic and real-world structures. 基于约束的方法是因果结构学习的主要方法之一，因其渐近保证找到与系统因果图等价的马尔可夫结构而受到特别重视。另一方面，它们可能需要对系统变量的数量进行指数级数量的条件独立性 (CI) 测试。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于递归约束的因果结构学习方法，与现有文献相比，该方法显着减少了所需的 CI 测试数量。所提出方法的思想是使用马尔可夫边界信息来识别可以从变量集中删除的特定变量，而不影响其他变量之间的统计依赖性。识别出这样一个变量后，我们发现它的邻域，从变量集中删除该变量，并递归地学习剩余变量的因果结构。我们进一步提供了任何基于约束的方法所需的 CI 测试数量的下限。将此下限与我们可实现的界限进行比较证明了所提出方法的效率。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的算法在合成结构和现实世界结构上都优于最先进的算法。 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫边界信息的递归约束方法，用于减少因果结构学习中的条件独立性检验次数。 Ehsan Mokhtarian,Sina Akbari,AmirEmad Ghassami,Negar Kiyavash cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Christos Sardianos,Iraklis Varlamis,Christos Chronis,George Dimitrakopoulos,Abdullah Alsalemi,Yassine Himeur,Faycal Bensaali,Abbes Amira
title: The emergence of Explainability of Intelligent Systems: Delivering Explainable and Personalised Recommendations for Energy Efficiency
title_zh: 智能系统可解释性的出现：提供可解释和个性化的能源效率建议
abstract: The recent advances in artificial intelligence namely in machine learning and deep learning, have boosted the performance of intelligent systems in several ways. This gave rise to human expectations, but also created the need for a deeper understanding of how intelligent systems think and decide. The concept of explainability appeared, in the extent of explaining the internal system mechanics in human terms. Recommendation systems are intelligent systems that support human decision making, and as such, they have to be explainable in order to increase user trust and improve the acceptance of recommendations. In this work, we focus on a context-aware recommendation system for energy efficiency and develop a mechanism for explainable and persuasive recommendations, which are personalized to user preferences and habits. The persuasive facts either emphasize on the economical saving prospects (Econ) or on a positive ecological impact (Eco) and explanations provide the reason for recommending an energy saving action. Based on a study conducted using a Telegram bot, different scenarios have been validated with actual data and human feedback. Current results show a total increase of 19\% on the recommendation acceptance ratio when both economical and ecological persuasive facts are employed. This revolutionary approach on recommendation systems, demonstrates how intelligent recommendations can effectively encourage energy saving behavior.
summary: The recent advances in artificial intelligence namely in machine learning and deep learning, have boosted the performance of intelligent systems in several ways. This gave rise to human expectations, but also created the need for a deeper understanding of how intelligent systems think and decide. The concept of explainability appeared, in the extent of explaining the internal system mechanics in human terms. Recommendation systems are intelligent systems that support human decision making, and as such, they have to be explainable in order to increase user trust and improve the acceptance of recommendations. In this work, we focus on a context-aware recommendation system for energy efficiency and develop a mechanism for explainable and persuasive recommendations, which are personalized to user preferences and habits. The persuasive facts either emphasize on the economical saving prospects (Econ) or on a positive ecological impact (Eco) and explanations provide the reason for recommending an energy saving action. Based on a study conducted using a Telegram bot, different scenarios have been validated with actual data and human feedback. This revolutionary approach on recommendation systems, demonstrates how intelligent recommendations can effectively encourage energy saving behavior.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（即机器学习和深度学习）的最新进展从多个方面提高了智能系统的性能。这引起了人类的期望，但也产生了对智能系统如何思考和决策的更深入理解的需要。可解释性的概念出现了，是在用人类的术语解释内部系统机制的范围内。推荐系统是支持人类决策的智能系统，因此，它们必须是可解释的，以增加用户信任并提高推荐的接受度。在这项工作中，我们专注于上下文感知的能源效率推荐系统，并开发一种可解释和有说服力的推荐机制，该机制根据用户偏好和习惯进行个性化。有说服力的事实要么强调经济节约前景（Econ），要么强调积极的生态影响（Eco），并且解释提供了建议节能行动的理由。根据使用 Telegram 机器人进行的一项研究，不同的场景已通过实际数据和人类反馈进行了验证。目前的结果显示，当同时采用经济和生态说服性事实时，推荐接受率总共增加了 19%。这种推荐系统的革命性方法展示了智能推荐如何有效地鼓励节能行为。

AI.tldr: 开发可解释且个性化的推荐系统，通过结合经济与生态说服策略提升能源效率。
AI.motivation: 人工智能性能提升引发用户对系统决策透明度的需求，推荐系统需通过可解释性增强信任并促进节能行为。
AI.method: 构建上下文感知推荐系统，结合经济节省（Econ）与生态影响（Eco）双维度说服策略，并通过Telegram机器人验证。
AI.result: 实验显示结合经济与生态说服因素后，推荐接受率提升19%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明可解释推荐系统能有效驱动节能行为，为智能系统设计提供新方向。

title: FIND: Human-in-the-Loop Debugging Deep Text Classifiers
title_zh: FIND：人机交互调试深度文本分类器
comment: 17 pages including appendices; To appear at EMNLP 2020
comments: 17 pages including appendices; To appear at EMNLP 2020
abstract: Since obtaining a perfect training dataset (i.e., a dataset which is considerably large, unbiased, and well-representative of unseen cases) is hardly possible, many real-world text classifiers are trained on the available, yet imperfect, datasets. These classifiers are thus likely to have undesirable properties. For instance, they may have biases against some sub-populations or may not work effectively in the wild due to overfitting. In this paper, we propose FIND -- a framework which enables humans to debug deep learning text classifiers by disabling irrelevant hidden features. Experiments show that by using FIND, humans can improve CNN text classifiers which were trained under different types of imperfect datasets (including datasets with biases and datasets with dissimilar train-test distributions).
summary: Since obtaining a perfect training dataset (i.e., a dataset which is considerably large, unbiased, and well-representative of unseen cases) is hardly possible, many real-world text classifiers are trained on the available, yet imperfect, datasets. These classifiers are thus likely to have undesirable properties. For instance, they may have biases against some sub-populations or may not work effectively in the wild due to overfitting. In this paper, we propose FIND -- a framework which enables humans to debug deep learning text classifiers by disabling irrelevant hidden features. Experiments show that by using FIND, humans can improve CNN text classifiers which were trained under different types of imperfect datasets (including datasets with biases and datasets with dissimilar train-test distributions).
abstract_zh: 由于获得完美的训练数据集（即相当大、无偏见且能很好地代表未见过的情况的数据集）几乎是不可能的，因此许多现实世界的文本分类器都是在可用但不完美的数据集上进行训练的。因此，这些分类器可能具有不良特性。例如，它们可能对某些亚群体存在偏见，或者由于过度拟合而无法在野外有效工作。在本文中，我们提出了 FIND——一个框架，使人类能够通过禁用不相关的隐藏特征来调试深度学习文本分类器。实验表明，通过使用 FIND，人类可以改进在不同类型的不完美数据集（包括具有偏差的数据集和具有不同训练测试分布的数据集）下训练的 CNN 文本分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FIND框架，通过人类干预禁用无关隐藏特征来调试深度文本分类器。
AI.motivation: 现实中的文本分类器因训练数据存在偏差或分布差异等问题，可能导致模型性能下降或产生偏见，现有方法难以有效解决此类问题。
AI.method: 设计FIND框架，允许人类通过交互式界面禁用深度神经网络中与任务无关的隐藏特征，从而修正模型缺陷。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用FIND框架可有效提升在存在偏差或分布差异数据集上训练的CNN分类器性能。
AI.conclusion: FIND通过人类参与的特征禁用机制，为调试基于不完美数据集的深度文本分类模型提供了可行方案。

These classifiers are thus likely to have undesirable properties. For instance, they may have biases against some sub-populations or may not work effectively in the wild due to overfitting. Experiments show that by using FIND, humans can improve CNN text classifiers which were trained under different types of imperfect datasets (including datasets with biases and datasets with dissimilar train-test distributions). 由于获得完美的训练数据集（即相当大、无偏见且能很好地代表未见过的情况的数据集）几乎是不可能的，因此许多现实世界的文本分类器都是在可用但不完美的数据集上进行训练的。因此，这些分类器可能具有不良特性。例如，它们可能对某些亚群体存在偏见，或者由于过度拟合而无法在野外有效工作。在本文中，我们提出了 FIND——一个框架，使人类能够通过禁用不相关的隐藏特征来调试深度学习文本分类器。实验表明，通过使用 FIND，人类可以改进在不同类型的不完美数据集（包括具有偏差的数据集和具有不同训练测试分布的数据集）下训练的 CNN 文本分类器。 本文提出FIND框架，通过人类干预禁用无关隐藏特征来调试深度文本分类器。 Piyawat Lertvittayakumjorn,Lucia Specia,Francesca Toni cs.CL,cs.HC,cs.LG

title: A Termination Criterion for Probabilistic PointClouds Registration
title_zh: 概率点云配准的终止标准
abstract: Probabilistic Point Clouds Registration (PPCR) is an algorithm that, in its multi-iteration version, outperformed state of the art algorithms for local point clouds registration. However, its performances have been tested using a fixed high number of iterations. To be of practical usefulness, we think that the algorithm should decide by itself when to stop, to avoid an excessive number of iterations and, therefore, wasting computational time. With this work, we compare different termination criterion on several datasets and prove that the chosen one produce very good results that are comparable to those obtained using a very high number of iterations while saving computational time.
summary: Probabilistic Point Clouds Registration (PPCR) is an algorithm that, in its multi-iteration version, outperformed state of the art algorithms for local point clouds registration. However, its performances have been tested using a fixed high number of iterations. To be of practical usefulness, we think that the algorithm should decide by itself when to stop, to avoid an excessive number of iterations and, therefore, wasting computational time. With this work, we compare different termination criterion on several datasets and prove that the chosen one produce very good results that are comparable to those obtained using a very high number of iterations while saving computational time.
abstract_zh: 概率点云配准 (PPCR) 是一种算法，在其多次迭代版本中，其性能优于本地点云配准的最先进算法。然而，它的性能已经通过固定的大量迭代进行了测试。为了具有实际用途，我们认为算法应该自行决定何时停止，以避免过多的迭代次数，从而浪费计算时间。通过这项工作，我们比较了几个数据集上的不同终止标准，并证明所选的终止标准产生了非常好的结果，可以与使用大量迭代获得的结果相媲美，同时节省了计算时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种终止准则以优化概率点云配准算法的迭代次数。
AI.motivation: 现有概率点云配准算法依赖固定高迭代次数导致计算资源浪费，需自主终止机制提升效率。
AI.method: 在多个数据集上比较不同终止准则，验证其效果与高迭代次数的等效性。
AI.result: 所选终止准则在保证配准精度的同时显著减少迭代次数和计算时间。
AI.conclusion: 提出的终止准则有效平衡了计算效率与配准性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Gang Chen,Wei Dong,Xinjun Sheng,Xiangyang Zhu,Han Ding
title: An Active Sense and Avoid System for Flying Robots in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 动态环境中飞行机器人的主动感知和回避系统
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mechatronics on 27 Jan 2021
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mechatronics on 27 Jan 2021
abstract: This paper investigates a novel active-sensing-based obstacle avoidance paradigm for flying robots in dynamic environments. Instead of fusing multiple sensors to enlarge the field of view (FOV), we introduce an alternative approach that utilizes a stereo camera with an independent rotational DOF to sense the obstacles actively. In particular, the sensing direction is planned heuristically by multiple objectives, including tracking dynamic obstacles, observing the heading direction, and exploring the previously unseen area. With the sensing result, a flight path is then planned based on real-time sampling and uncertainty-aware collision checking in the state space, which constitutes an active sense and avoid (ASAA) system. Experiments in both simulation and the real world demonstrate that this system can well cope with dynamic obstacles and abrupt goal direction changes. Since only one stereo camera is utilized, this system provides a low-cost and effective approach to overcome the FOV limitation in visual navigation.
summary: This paper investigates a novel active-sensing-based obstacle avoidance paradigm for flying robots in dynamic environments. Instead of fusing multiple sensors to enlarge the field of view (FOV), we introduce an alternative approach that utilizes a stereo camera with an independent rotational DOF to sense the obstacles actively. In particular, the sensing direction is planned heuristically by multiple objectives, including tracking dynamic obstacles, observing the heading direction, and exploring the previously unseen area. With the sensing result, a flight path is then planned based on real-time sampling and uncertainty-aware collision checking in the state space, which constitutes an active sense and avoid (ASAA) system. Experiments in both simulation and the real world demonstrate that this system can well cope with dynamic obstacles and abrupt goal direction changes. Since only one stereo camera is utilized, this system provides a low-cost and effective approach to overcome the FOV limitation in visual navigation.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一种新型的基于主动传感的动态环境中飞行机器人避障范例。我们没有融合多个传感器来扩大视场（FOV），而是引入了一种替代方法，利用具有独立旋转自由度的立体相机来主动感知障碍物。特别是，传感方向是通过多个目标启发式规划的，包括跟踪动态障碍物、观察前进方向以及探索以前未见过的区域。根据感知结果，基于状态空间中的实时采样和不确定性感知碰撞检查来规划飞行路径，构成主动感知和避免（ASAA）系统。模拟和现实世界的实验表明，该系统可以很好地应对动态障碍和突然的目标方向变化。由于仅使用一个立体相机，该系统提供了一种低成本且有效的方法来克服视觉导航中的视场限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主动感知的飞行机器人动态避障系统，通过单目立体相机主动感知环境以克服视野限制。
AI.motivation: 传统多传感器融合方法成本高且复杂，而动态环境中飞行机器人需要低成本有效解决视觉导航的视野局限问题。
AI.method: 采用带独立旋转自由度的立体相机，通过多目标启发式算法规划感知方向，并结合实时采样与不确定性碰撞检测规划飞行路径。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验验证系统可有效应对动态障碍物和突发目标方向变化，且仅使用单目相机实现低成本方案。
AI.conclusion: 该主动感知与避障系统为动态环境下的飞行机器人提供了经济高效的视觉导航解决方案。

title: Distilling a Deep Neural Network into a Takagi-Sugeno-Kang Fuzzy Inference System
title_zh: 将深度神经网络提炼为 Takagi-Sugeno-Kang 模糊推理系统
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) demonstrate great success in classification tasks. However, they act as black boxes and we don't know how they make decisions in a particular classification task. To this end, we propose to distill the knowledge from a DNN into a fuzzy inference system (FIS), which is Takagi-Sugeno-Kang (TSK)-type in this paper. The model has the capability to express the knowledge acquired by a DNN based on fuzzy rules, thus explaining a particular decision much easier. Knowledge distillation (KD) is applied to create a TSK-type FIS that generalizes better than one directly from the training data, which is guaranteed through experiments in this paper. To further improve the performances, we modify the baseline method of KD and obtain good results.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) demonstrate great success in classification tasks. However, they act as black boxes and we don't know how they make decisions in a particular classification task. To this end, we propose to distill the knowledge from a DNN into a fuzzy inference system (FIS), which is Takagi-Sugeno-Kang (TSK)-type in this paper. The model has the capability to express the knowledge acquired by a DNN based on fuzzy rules, thus explaining a particular decision much easier. Knowledge distillation (KD) is applied to create a TSK-type FIS that generalizes better than one directly from the training data, which is guaranteed through experiments in this paper. To further improve the performances, we modify the baseline method of KD and obtain good results.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在分类任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，它们充当黑匣子，我们不知道它们如何在特定的分类任务中做出决策。为此，我们建议将 DNN 中的知识提炼成模糊推理系统 (FIS)，即本文中的 Takagi-Sugeno-Kang (TSK) 类型。该模型能够表达 DNN 基于模糊规则获得的知识，从而更容易地解释特定决策。应用知识蒸馏（KD）来创建一种 TSK 型 FIS，其泛化能力优于直接从训练数据中获得的 FIS，这一点通过本文的实验得到了保证。为了进一步提高性能，我们修改了KD的基线方法并获得了良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将深度神经网络（DNN）的知识蒸馏到Takagi-Sugeno-Kang（TSK）模糊推理系统中，以提升模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽在分类任务中表现优异，但其决策过程缺乏可解释性，而模糊推理系统能更直观地表达知识。
AI.method: 通过知识蒸馏（KD）技术，将DNN的决策逻辑转化为TSK模糊规则，并优化KD基线方法以提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，蒸馏得到的TSK系统比直接训练的模型具有更好的泛化能力，且能有效解释DNN的决策过程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了DNN向可解释模糊系统的知识迁移，在保持性能的同时增强了模型透明度。

The model has the capability to express the knowledge acquired by a DNN based on fuzzy rules, thus explaining a particular decision much easier. Knowledge distillation (KD) is applied to create a TSK-type FIS that generalizes better than one directly from the training data, which is guaranteed through experiments in this paper. To further improve the performances, we modify the baseline method of KD and obtain good results. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在分类任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，它们充当黑匣子，我们不知道它们如何在特定的分类任务中做出决策。为此，我们建议将 DNN 中的知识提炼成模糊推理系统 (FIS)，即本文中的 Takagi-Sugeno-Kang (TSK) 类型。该模型能够表达 DNN 基于模糊规则获得的知识，从而更容易地解释特定决策。应用知识蒸馏（KD）来创建一种 TSK 型 FIS，其泛化能力优于直接从训练数据中获得的 FIS，这一点通过本文的实验得到了保证。为了进一步提高性能，我们修改了KD的基线方法并获得了良好的结果。 本文提出将深度神经网络（DNN）的知识蒸馏到Takagi-Sugeno-Kang（TSK）模糊推理系统中，以提升模型的可解释性。 Xiangming Gu,Xiang Cheng cs.AI

authors_text: Keren Fu,Yao Jiang,Ge-Peng Ji,Tao Zhou,Qijun Zhao,Deng-Ping Fan
title: Light Field Salient Object Detection: A Review and Benchmark
title_zh: 光场显着物体检测：回顾和基准
comment: ef:Computational Visual Media, 2022, Vol. 8, No. 4, Pages: 509-534
comments: ef:Computational Visual Media, 2022, Vol. 8, No. 4, Pages: 509-534
abstract: Salient object detection (SOD) is a long-standing research topic in computer vision and has drawn an increasing amount of research interest in the past decade. This paper provides the first comprehensive review and benchmark for light field SOD, which has long been lacking in the saliency community. Firstly, we introduce preliminary knowledge on light fields, including theory and data forms, and then review existing studies on light field SOD, covering ten traditional models, seven deep learning-based models, one comparative study, and one brief review. Existing datasets for light field SOD are also summarized with detailed information and statistical analyses. Secondly, we benchmark nine representative light field SOD models together with several cutting-edge RGB-D SOD models on four widely used light field datasets, from which insightful discussions and analyses, including a comparison between light field SOD and RGB-D SOD models, are achieved. Besides, due to the inconsistency of datasets in their current forms, we further generate complete data and supplement focal stacks, depth maps and multi-view images for the inconsistent datasets, making them consistent and unified. Our supplemental data makes a universal benchmark possible. Lastly, because light field SOD is quite a special problem attributed to its diverse data representations and high dependency on acquisition hardware, making it differ greatly from other saliency detection tasks, we provide nine hints into the challenges and future directions, and outline several open issues. We hope our review and benchmarking could help advance research in this field. All the materials including collected models, datasets, benchmarking results, and supplemented light field datasets will be publicly available on our project site https://github.com/kerenfu/LFSOD-Survey.

abstract_zh: 显着目标检测（SOD）是计算机视觉领域的一个长期研究课题，在过去十年中引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。本文首次对光场 SOD 进行了全面的回顾和基准测试，这在显着性领域中是长期缺乏的。首先，我们介绍了光场的初步知识，包括理论和数据形式，然后回顾了光场SOD的现有研究，涵盖十种传统模型、七种基于深度学习的模型、一项比较研究和一项简要回顾。现有的光场 SOD 数据集还总结了详细信息和统计分析。其次，我们在四个广泛使用的光场数据集上对九个代表性的光场 SOD 模型以及几个前沿的 RGB-D SOD 模型进行了基准测试，从中进行了富有洞察力的讨论和分析，包括光场 SOD 和 RGB-D SOD 模型之间的比较。此外，由于目前数据集形式不一致，我们进一步生成完整的数据，并对不一致的数据集补充焦点堆栈、深度图和多视图图像，使其一致和统一。我们的补充数据使通用基准成为可能。最后，由于光场 SOD 是一个相当特殊的问题，归因于其多样化的数据表示和对采集硬件的高度依赖，使其与其他显着性检测任务有很大不同，因此我们针对挑战和未来方向提供了九个提示，并概述了几个悬而未决的问题。我们希望我们的审查和基准测试能够帮助推进该领域的研究。所有材料，包括收集的模型、数据集、基准测试结果和补充光场数据集，都将在我们的项目网站 https://github.com/kerenfu/LFSOD-Survey 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文首次对光场显著性目标检测（LFSOD）进行系统综述与基准测试，填补了该领域的研究空白。
AI.motivation: 光场显著性目标检测缺乏全面的综述和统一的基准数据集，限制了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 梳理光场理论与数据形式，回顾10个传统模型与7个深度学习模型，总结现有数据集并生成补充数据，统一不一致数据集，基准测试9个LFSOD模型与RGB-D模型。
AI.result: 建立首个LFSOD基准，揭示LFSOD与RGB-D模型差异，生成标准化数据集，提供模型、数据集及基准结果的公开资源。
AI.conclusion: 通过综述与基准测试推动LFSOD研究，明确挑战与未来方向，为后续研究提供统一实验平台与数据支持。

title: Scaling Guarantees for Nearest Counterfactual Explanations
title_zh: 最接近的反事实解释的扩展保证
abstract: Counterfactual explanations (CFE) are being widely used to explain algorithmic decisions, especially in consequential decision-making contexts (e.g., loan approval or pretrial bail). In this context, CFEs aim to provide individuals affected by an algorithmic decision with the most similar individual (i.e., nearest individual) with a different outcome. However, while an increasing number of works propose algorithms to compute CFEs, such approaches either lack in optimality of distance (i.e., they do not return the nearest individual) and perfect coverage (i.e., they do not provide a CFE for all individuals); or they cannot handle complex models, such as neural networks. In this work, we provide a framework based on Mixed-Integer Programming (MIP) to compute nearest counterfactual explanations with provable guarantees and with runtimes comparable to gradient-based approaches. Our experiments on the Adult, COMPAS, and Credit datasets show that, in contrast with previous methods, our approach allows for efficiently computing diverse CFEs with both distance guarantees and perfect coverage.
summary: Counterfactual explanations (CFE) are being widely used to explain algorithmic decisions, especially in consequential decision-making contexts (e.g., loan approval or pretrial bail). In this context, CFEs aim to provide individuals affected by an algorithmic decision with the most similar individual (i.e., nearest individual) with a different outcome. However, while an increasing number of works propose algorithms to compute CFEs, such approaches either lack in optimality of distance (i.e., they do not return the nearest individual) and perfect coverage (i.e., they do not provide a CFE for all individuals); or they cannot handle complex models, such as neural networks. In this work, we provide a framework based on Mixed-Integer Programming (MIP) to compute nearest counterfactual explanations with provable guarantees and with runtimes comparable to gradient-based approaches. Our experiments on the Adult, COMPAS, and Credit datasets show that, in contrast with previous methods, our approach allows for efficiently computing diverse CFEs with both distance guarantees and perfect coverage.
abstract_zh: 反事实解释（CFE）被广泛用于解释算法决策，特别是在后续决策环境中（例如贷款批准或审前保释）。在这种情况下，CFE 旨在为受算法决策影响的个体提供与最相似的个体（即最近的个体）不同的结果。然而，虽然越来越多的工作提出了计算 CFE 的算法，但这些方法要么缺乏距离最优性（即，它们不返回最近的个体），要么缺乏完美的覆盖范围（即，它们不为所有个体提供 CFE）；或者他们无法处理复杂的模型，例如神经网络。在这项工作中，我们提供了一个基于混合整数编程（MIP）的框架来计算最接近的反事实解释，并具有可证明的保证，并且运行时间与基于梯度的方法相当。我们在 Adult、COMPAS 和 Credit 数据集上的实验表明，与以前的方法相比，我们的方法可以有效地计算具有距离保证和完美覆盖的多样化 CFE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合整数规划（MIP）的框架，用于计算具有可证明保证的最近反事实解释（CFE），解决了现有方法在距离最优性、覆盖率及复杂模型处理上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有CFE算法存在距离非最优、覆盖率不足或无法处理复杂模型（如神经网络）的问题，需开发兼顾效率与可靠性的新方法。
AI.method: 采用混合整数规划（MIP）框架，结合可证明的距离保证与高效求解策略，实现与梯度方法相当的运行时延。
AI.result: 在Adult、COMPAS和Credit数据集上验证，该方法能高效生成具有距离保证和完美覆盖率的多样化CFE，优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架为复杂模型提供了兼具理论保证与计算效率的CFE生成方案，推动了算法决策可解释性的发展。

authors_text: Jinmian Ye,Guangxi Li,Di Chen,Haiqin Yang,Shandian Zhe,Zenglin Xu
title: Block-term Tensor Neural Networks
title_zh: 块项张量神经网络
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved outstanding performance in a wide range of applications, e.g., image classification, natural language processing, etc. Despite the good performance, the huge number of parameters in DNNs brings challenges to efficient training of DNNs and also their deployment in low-end devices with limited computing resources. In this paper, we explore the correlations in the weight matrices, and approximate the weight matrices with the low-rank block-term tensors. We name the new corresponding structure as block-term tensor layers (BT-layers), which can be easily adapted to neural network models, such as CNNs and RNNs. In particular, the inputs and the outputs in BT-layers are reshaped into low-dimensional high-order tensors with a similar or improved representation power. Sufficient experiments have demonstrated that BT-layers in CNNs and RNNs can achieve a very large compression ratio on the number of parameters while preserving or improving the representation power of the original DNNs.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved outstanding performance in a wide range of applications, e.g., image classification, natural language processing, etc. Despite the good performance, the huge number of parameters in DNNs brings challenges to efficient training of DNNs and also their deployment in low-end devices with limited computing resources. In this paper, we explore the correlations in the weight matrices, and approximate the weight matrices with the low-rank block-term tensors. We name the new corresponding structure as block-term tensor layers (BT-layers), which can be easily adapted to neural network models, such as CNNs and RNNs. In particular, the inputs and the outputs in BT-layers are reshaped into low-dimensional high-order tensors with a similar or improved representation power. Sufficient experiments have demonstrated that BT-layers in CNNs and RNNs can achieve a very large compression ratio on the number of parameters while preserving or improving the representation power of the original DNNs.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在图像分类、自然语言处理等广泛应用中取得了出色的性能。尽管性能良好，但DNN中大量的参数给DNN的高效训练及其在计算资源有限的低端设备中的部署带来了挑战。在本文中，我们探索权重矩阵中的相关性，并用低秩块项张量近似权重矩阵。我们将新的相应结构命名为块项张量层（BT 层），它可以轻松适应神经网络模型，例如 CNN 和 RNN。特别是，BT 层中的输入和输出被重塑为具有相似或改进的表示能力的低维高阶张量。足够的实验表明，CNN 和 RNN 中的 BT 层可以在参数数量上实现非常大的压缩比，同时保留或提高原始 DNN 的表示能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于块张量结构的神经网络层（BT-layers），通过低秩张量近似压缩深度神经网络参数，同时保持或提升模型表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络参数量庞大，导致训练效率低且难以部署到计算资源受限的设备，需探索参数压缩方法。
AI.method: 通过分析权重矩阵的内在相关性，用低秩块张量分解近似权重矩阵，构建可集成于CNN/RNN的BT-layers，并对输入输出进行张量重塑以保持表征能力。
AI.result: 实验表明BT-layers在CNN和RNN中实现显著参数压缩（压缩比未具体说明），同时保持原有模型性能或有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 块张量结构为高效神经网络设计提供新思路，在参数压缩与性能保持间取得平衡，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yanwen Chong,Congchong Nie,Yulong Tao,Xiaoshu Chen,Shaoming Pan
title: HCNet: Hierarchical Context Network for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: HCNet：用于语义分割的分层上下文网络
abstract: Global context information is vital in visual understanding problems, especially in pixel-level semantic segmentation. The mainstream methods adopt the self-attention mechanism to model global context information. However, pixels belonging to different classes usually have weak feature correlation. Modeling the global pixel-level correlation matrix indiscriminately is extremely redundant in the self-attention mechanism. In order to solve the above problem, we propose a hierarchical context network to differentially model homogeneous pixels with strong correlations and heterogeneous pixels with weak correlations. Specifically, we first propose a multi-scale guided pre-segmentation module to divide the entire feature map into different classed-based homogeneous regions. Within each homogeneous region, we design the pixel context module to capture pixel-level correlations. Subsequently, different from the self-attention mechanism that still models weak heterogeneous correlations in a dense pixel-level manner, the region context module is proposed to model sparse region-level dependencies using a unified representation of each region. Through aggregating fine-grained pixel context features and coarse-grained region context features, our proposed network can not only hierarchically model global context information but also harvest multi-granularity representations to more robustly identify multi-scale objects. We evaluate our approach on Cityscapes and the ISPRS Vaihingen dataset. Without Bells or Whistles, our approach realizes a mean IoU of 82.8% and overall accuracy of 91.4% on Cityscapes and ISPRS Vaihingen test set, achieving state-of-the-art results.
summary: Global context information is vital in visual understanding problems, especially in pixel-level semantic segmentation. The mainstream methods adopt the self-attention mechanism to model global context information. However, pixels belonging to different classes usually have weak feature correlation. Modeling the global pixel-level correlation matrix indiscriminately is extremely redundant in the self-attention mechanism. In order to solve the above problem, we propose a hierarchical context network to differentially model homogeneous pixels with strong correlations and heterogeneous pixels with weak correlations. Specifically, we first propose a multi-scale guided pre-segmentation module to divide the entire feature map into different classed-based homogeneous regions. Within each homogeneous region, we design the pixel context module to capture pixel-level correlations. Subsequently, different from the self-attention mechanism that still models weak heterogeneous correlations in a dense pixel-level manner, the region context module is proposed to model sparse region-level dependencies using a unified representation of each region. Through aggregating fine-grained pixel context features and coarse-grained region context features, our proposed network can not only hierarchically model global context information but also harvest multi-granularity representations to more robustly identify multi-scale objects. We evaluate our approach on Cityscapes and the ISPRS Vaihingen dataset. Without Bells or Whistles, our approach realizes a mean IoU of 82.8% and overall accuracy of 91.4% on Cityscapes and ISPRS Vaihingen test set, achieving state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 全局上下文信息对于视觉理解问题至关重要，尤其是在像素级语义分割中。主流方法采用自注意力机制来建模全局上下文信息。然而，属于不同类别的像素通常具有较弱的特征相关性。在自注意力机制中，不加区别地对全局像素级相关矩阵进行建模是极其多余的。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种分层上下文网络，对具有强相关性的同质像素和具有弱相关性的异质像素进行差分建模。具体来说，我们首先提出一个多尺度引导预分割模块，将整个特征图划分为不同的基于类别的同质区域。在每个同质区域内，我们设计像素上下文模块来捕获像素级相关性。随后，与仍然以密集像素级方式建模弱异质相关性的自注意力机制不同，区域上下文模块被提出使用每个区域的统一表示来建模稀疏区域级依赖关系。通过聚合细粒度像素上下文特征和粗粒度区域上下文特征，我们提出的网络不仅可以对全局上下文信息进行分层建模，还可以收获多粒度表示以更鲁棒地识别多尺度对象。我们评估了我们在 Cityscapes 和 ISPRS Vaihingen 数据集上的方法。在没有花哨的情况下，我们的方法在 Cityscapes 和 ISPRS Vaihingen 测试集上实现了 82.8% 的平均 IoU 和 91.4% 的总体准确率，达到了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HCNet，一种分层上下文网络，用于改进语义分割中的全局上下文建模。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制在建模全局像素相关性时存在冗余，因不同类别像素相关性弱，需区分处理同质与异质像素。
AI.method: 设计多尺度引导预分割模块划分同质区域，通过像素上下文模块捕捉细粒度相关性，并用区域上下文模块建模稀疏区域依赖，融合多粒度特征。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和ISPRS Vaihingen数据集上达到82.8% mIoU和91.4%整体准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HCNet通过分层建模和多粒度特征融合，有效提升语义分割性能，达到SOTA结果。

authors_text: Xingwei Sun,Ze-Feng Gao,Zhong-Yi Lu,Junfeng Li,Yonghong Yan
title: A Model Compression Method with Matrix Product Operators for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 一种基于矩阵乘积算子的语音增强模型压缩方法
abstract: The deep neural network (DNN) based speech enhancement approaches have achieved promising performance. However, the number of parameters involved in these methods is usually enormous for the real applications of speech enhancement on the device with the limited resources. This seriously restricts the applications. To deal with this issue, model compression techniques are being widely studied. In this paper, we propose a model compression method based on matrix product operators (MPO) to substantially reduce the number of parameters in DNN models for speech enhancement. In this method, the weight matrices in the linear transformations of neural network model are replaced by the MPO decomposition format before training. In experiment, this process is applied to the causal neural network models, such as the feedforward multilayer perceptron (MLP) and long short-term memory (LSTM) models. Both MLP and LSTM models with/without compression are then utilized to estimate the ideal ratio mask for monaural speech enhancement. The experimental results show that our proposed MPO-based method outperforms the widely-used pruning method for speech enhancement under various compression rates, and further improvement can be achieved with respect to low compression rates. Our proposal provides an effective model compression method for speech enhancement, especially in cloud-free application.
summary: The deep neural network (DNN) based speech enhancement approaches have achieved promising performance. However, the number of parameters involved in these methods is usually enormous for the real applications of speech enhancement on the device with the limited resources. This seriously restricts the applications. To deal with this issue, model compression techniques are being widely studied. In this paper, we propose a model compression method based on matrix product operators (MPO) to substantially reduce the number of parameters in DNN models for speech enhancement. In this method, the weight matrices in the linear transformations of neural network model are replaced by the MPO decomposition format before training. In experiment, this process is applied to the causal neural network models, such as the feedforward multilayer perceptron (MLP) and long short-term memory (LSTM) models. Both MLP and LSTM models with/without compression are then utilized to estimate the ideal ratio mask for monaural speech enhancement. The experimental results show that our proposed MPO-based method outperforms the widely-used pruning method for speech enhancement under various compression rates, and further improvement can be achieved with respect to low compression rates. Our proposal provides an effective model compression method for speech enhancement, especially in cloud-free application.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络（DNN）的语音增强方法已经取得了可喜的性能。然而，对于在资源有限的设备上进行语音增强的实际应用来说，这些方法所涉及的参数数量通常是巨大的。这严重限制了应用。为了解决这个问题，模型压缩技术正在被广泛研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于矩阵乘积算子（MPO）的模型压缩方法，以大幅减少用于语音增强的 DNN 模型中的参数数量。该方法在训练前将神经网络模型线性变换中的权重矩阵替换为MPO分解格式。在实验中，该过程应用于因果神经网络模型，例如前馈多层感知器（MLP）和长短期记忆（LSTM）模型。然后利用带/不带压缩的 MLP 和 LSTM 模型来估计单声道语音增强的理想比率掩模。实验结果表明，我们提出的基于 MPO 的方法在各种压缩率下优于广泛使用的语音增强修剪方法，并且在低压缩率下可以实现进一步的改进。我们的建议为语音增强提供了一种有效的模型压缩方法，特别是在无云应用中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于矩阵乘积算子（MPO）的模型压缩方法，用于减少语音增强深度神经网络的参数数量。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在语音增强中表现优异，但参数量过大限制了其在资源受限设备上的实际应用，需通过模型压缩技术解决此问题。
AI.method: 在训练前将神经网络线性变换中的权重矩阵替换为MPO分解格式，并应用于因果网络模型（如MLP和LSTM）进行实验。
AI.result: MPO压缩方法在多种压缩率下优于传统剪枝方法，尤其在低压缩率时性能提升显著。

search_text: A Model Compression Method with Matrix Product Operators for Speech Enhancement 一种基于矩阵乘积算子的语音增强模型压缩方法 The deep neural network (DNN) based speech enhancement approaches have achieved promising performance. However, the number of parameters involved in these methods is usually enormous for the real applications of speech enhancement on the device with the limited resources. This seriously restricts the applications. To deal with this issue, model compression techniques are being widely studied. In this paper, we propose a model compression method based on matrix product operators (MPO) to substantially reduce the number of parameters in DNN models for speech enhancement. In this method, the weight matrices in the linear transformations of neural network model are replaced by the MPO decomposition format before training. In experiment, this process is applied to the causal neural network models, such as the feedforward multilayer perceptron (MLP) and long short-term memory (LSTM) models. Both MLP and LSTM models with/without compression are then utilized to estimate the ideal ratio mask for monaural speech enhancement. The experimental results show that our proposed MPO-based method outperforms the widely-used pruning method for speech enhancement under various compression rates, and further improvement can be achieved with respect to low compression rates. Our proposal provides an effective model compression method for speech enhancement, especially in cloud-free application. 基于深度神经网络（DNN）的语音增强方法已经取得了可喜的性能。然而，对于在资源有限的设备上进行语音增强的实际应用来说，这些方法所涉及的参数数量通常是巨大的。这严重限制了应用。为了解决这个问题，模型压缩技术正在被广泛研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于矩阵乘积算子（MPO）的模型压缩方法，以大幅减少用于语音增强的 DNN 模型中的参数数量。该方法在训练前将神经网络模型线性变换中的权重矩阵替换为MPO分解格式。在实验中，该过程应用于因果神经网络模型，例如前馈多层感知器（MLP）和长短期记忆（LSTM）模型。然后利用带/不带压缩的 MLP 和 LSTM 模型来估计单声道语音增强的理想比率掩模。实验结果表明，我们提出的基于 MPO 的方法在各种压缩率下优于广泛使用的语音增强修剪方法，并且在低压缩率下可以实现进一步的改进。我们的建议为语音增强提供了一种有效的模型压缩方法，特别是在无云应用中。 本文提出一种基于矩阵乘积算子（MPO）的模型压缩方法，用于减少语音增强深度神经网络的参数数量。 Xingwei Sun,Ze-Feng Gao,Zhong-Yi Lu,Junfeng Li,Yonghong Yan cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS,quant-ph

title: Image Generation With Neural Cellular Automatas
title_zh: 使用神经元胞自动机生成图像
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate images (or other artworks) by using neural cellular automatas (NCAs). Rather than training NCAs based on single images one by one, we combined the idea with variational autoencoders (VAEs), and hence explored some applications, such as image restoration and style fusion. The code for model implementation is available online.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate images (or other artworks) by using neural cellular automatas (NCAs). Rather than training NCAs based on single images one by one, we combined the idea with variational autoencoders (VAEs), and hence explored some applications, such as image restoration and style fusion. The code for model implementation is available online.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用神经细胞自动机（NCA）生成图像（或其他艺术品）的新方法。我们没有根据一张一张图像来训练 NCA，而是将这一想法与变分自动编码器 (VAE) 结合起来，从而探索了一些应用，例如图像恢复和风格融合。模型实现的代码可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种使用神经细胞自动机生成图像或其他艺术品的新方法
AI.motivation: 传统逐图训练NCAs效率低，需结合VAEs提升生成效果与应用
AI.method: 将神经细胞自动机与变分自编码器结合，用于图像生成、修复及风格融合
AI.result: 实现了基于NCAs与VAEs的图像生成方法，展示了在修复和风格融合中的应用效果
AI.conclusion: 结合VAEs的NCAs方法有效提升了图像生成质量，适用于多种图像处理任务
