authors_text: Yong Guo,Qingyao Wu,Chaorui Deng,Jian Chen,Mingkui Tan
title: Double Forward Propagation for Memorized Batch Normalization
title_zh: 用于记忆批量归一化的双重前向传播
abstract: Batch Normalization (BN) has been a standard component in designing deep neural networks (DNNs). Although the standard BN can significantly accelerate the training of DNNs and improve the generalization performance, it has several underlying limitations which may hamper the performance in both training and inference. In the training stage, BN relies on estimating the mean and variance of data using a single minibatch. Consequently, BN can be unstable when the batch size is very small or the data is poorly sampled. In the inference stage, BN often uses the so called moving mean and moving variance instead of batch statistics, i.e., the training and inference rules in BN are not consistent. Regarding these issues, we propose a memorized batch normalization (MBN), which considers multiple recent batches to obtain more accurate and robust statistics. Note that after the SGD update for each batch, the model parameters will change, and the features will change accordingly, leading to the Distribution Shift before and after the update for the considered batch. To alleviate this issue, we present a simple Double-Forward scheme in MBN which can further improve the performance. Compared to related methods, the proposed MBN exhibits consistent behaviors in both training and inference. Empirical results show that the MBN based models trained with the Double-Forward scheme greatly reduce the sensitivity of data and significantly improve the generalization performance.
summary: Batch Normalization (BN) has been a standard component in designing deep neural networks (DNNs). Although the standard BN can significantly accelerate the training of DNNs and improve the generalization performance, it has several underlying limitations which may hamper the performance in both training and inference. In the training stage, BN relies on estimating the mean and variance of data using a single minibatch. Consequently, BN can be unstable when the batch size is very small or the data is poorly sampled. In the inference stage, BN often uses the so called moving mean and moving variance instead of batch statistics, i.e., the training and inference rules in BN are not consistent. Regarding these issues, we propose a memorized batch normalization (MBN), which considers multiple recent batches to obtain more accurate and robust statistics. Note that after the SGD update for each batch, the model parameters will change, and the features will change accordingly, leading to the Distribution Shift before and after the update for the considered batch. To alleviate this issue, we present a simple Double-Forward scheme in MBN which can further improve the performance. Compared to related methods, the proposed MBN exhibits consistent behaviors in both training and inference. Empirical results show that the MBN based models trained with the Double-Forward scheme greatly reduce the sensitivity of data and significantly improve the generalization performance.
abstract_zh: 批量归一化 (BN) 一直是设计深度神经网络 (DNN) 的标准组件。尽管标准 BN 可以显着加速 DNN 的训练并提高泛化性能，但它有一些潜在的局限性，可能会影响训练和推理的性能。在训练阶段，BN 依赖于使用单个小批量来估计数据的均值和方差。因此，当批量大小非常小时或数据采样不良时，BN 可能会不稳定。在推理阶段，BN经常使用所谓的移动均值和移动方差来代替批量统计，即BN中的训练和推理规则不一致。关于这些问题，我们提出了一种记忆批量归一化（MBN），它考虑多个最近的批次以获得更准确和稳健的统计数据。请注意，每个批次的 SGD 更新后，模型参数都会发生变化，特征也会相应变化，从而导致所考虑的批次更新前后的分布偏移。为了缓解这个问题，我们在 MBN 中提出了一种简单的 Double-Forward 方案，可以进一步提高性能。与相关方法相比，所提出的 MBN 在训练和推理方面表现出一致的行为。实证结果表明，采用 Double-Forward 方案训练的基于 MBN 的模型大大降低了数据的敏感性，并显着提高了泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为Memorized Batch Normalization（MBN）的新方法，并结合Double-Forward传播机制，以解决传统批归一化（BN）在训练和推理阶段的不一致性及稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统BN在训练时依赖单个小批量的统计量估计，导致小批量或数据采样不佳时不稳定；推理时使用移动统计量，造成训练与推理规则不一致，影响模型性能。
AI.method: MBN通过整合多个近期小批量的统计信息提升稳定性，并引入Double-Forward机制，在参数更新后通过两次前向传播缓解分布偏移问题，实现训练与推理阶段的一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于MBN的模型显著降低了数据敏感性，提升了泛化能力，且在训练和推理中表现出行为一致性。
AI.conclusion: MBN通过改进统计计算方式和Double-Forward机制，有效解决了传统BN的局限性，为深度学习模型的稳定性与一致性提供了新思路。

title: An Empirical Study on Detecting COVID-19 in Chest X-ray Images Using Deep Learning Based Methods
title_zh: 使用基于深度学习的方法检测胸部 X 射线图像中的 COVID-19 的实证研究
comment: This paper is submitted to the The IKT 2020 conference
comments: This paper is submitted to the The IKT 2020 conference
abstract: Spreading of COVID-19 virus has increased the efforts to provide testing kits. Not only the preparation of these kits had been hard, rare, and expensive but also using them is another issue. Results have shown that these kits take some crucial time to recognize the virus, in addition to the fact that they encounter with 30% loss. In this paper, we have studied the usage of x-ray pictures which are ubiquitous, for the classification of COVID-19 chest Xray images, by the existing convolutional neural networks (CNNs). We intend to train chest x-rays of infected and not infected ones with different CNNs architectures including VGG19, Densnet-121, and Xception. Training these architectures resulted in different accuracies which were much faster and more precise than usual ways of testing.
summary: Spreading of COVID-19 virus has increased the efforts to provide testing kits. Not only the preparation of these kits had been hard, rare, and expensive but also using them is another issue. Results have shown that these kits take some crucial time to recognize the virus, in addition to the fact that they encounter with 30% loss. In this paper, we have studied the usage of x-ray pictures which are ubiquitous, for the classification of COVID-19 chest Xray images, by the existing convolutional neural networks (CNNs). We intend to train chest x-rays of infected and not infected ones with different CNNs architectures including VGG19, Densnet-121, and Xception. Training these architectures resulted in different accuracies which were much faster and more precise than usual ways of testing.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 病毒的传播加大了提供检测试剂盒的力度。这些试剂盒的制备不仅困难、稀有且昂贵，而且使用它们也是另一个问题。结果表明，这些试剂盒需要一些关键的时间才能识别病毒，而且损失率高达 30%。在本文中，我们研究了通过现有的卷积神经网络（CNN）使用普遍存在的 X 射线图片对 COVID-19 胸部 X 射线图像进行分类。我们打算使用不同的 CNN 架构（包括 VGG19、Densnet-121 和 Xception）来训练感染者和未感染者的胸部 X 光检查。训练这些架构会产生不同的精度，比通常的测试方法更快、更精确。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用深度学习方法（如VGG19、DenseNet-121、Xception）对胸部X光图像进行分类，以检测COVID-19。
AI.motivation: 传统检测方法存在成本高、耗时长且准确率低的问题，而胸部X光图像更易获取，深度学习方法可能提供更快更精确的检测方案。
AI.method: 采用多种CNN架构（VGG19、DenseNet-121、Xception）训练感染与未感染的胸部X光图像数据集。
AI.result: 不同CNN模型在分类任务中取得较高准确率，显著优于传统检测方法的速度和精度。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在COVID-19检测中具有潜力，可为医疗资源有限的地区提供高效辅助诊断方案。

search_text: An Empirical Study on Detecting COVID-19 in Chest X-ray Images Using Deep Learning Based Methods 使用基于深度学习的方法检测胸部 X 射线图像中的 COVID-19 的实证研究 Spreading of COVID-19 virus has increased the efforts to provide testing kits. Not only the preparation of these kits had been hard, rare, and expensive but also using them is another issue. Results have shown that these kits take some crucial time to recognize the virus, in addition to the fact that they encounter with 30% loss. In this paper, we have studied the usage of x-ray pictures which are ubiquitous, for the classification of COVID-19 chest Xray images, by the existing convolutional neural networks (CNNs). We intend to train chest x-rays of infected and not infected ones with different CNNs architectures including VGG19, Densnet-121, and Xception. Training these architectures resulted in different accuracies which were much faster and more precise than usual ways of testing. title: HPCC-YNU at SemEval-2020 Task 9: A Bilingual Vector Gating Mechanism for Sentiment Analysis of Code-Mixed Text
title_zh: HPCC-YNU at SemEval-2020 任务 9：用于代码混合文本情感分析的双语向量门控机制
abstract: It is fairly common to use code-mixing on a social media platform to express opinions and emotions in multilingual societies. The purpose of this task is to detect the sentiment of code-mixed social media text. Code-mixed text poses a great challenge for the traditional NLP system, which currently uses monolingual resources to deal with the problem of multilingual mixing. This task has been solved in the past using lexicon lookup in respective sentiment dictionaries and using a long short-term memory (LSTM) neural network for monolingual resources. In this paper, we (my codalab username is kongjun) present a system that uses a bilingual vector gating mechanism for bilingual resources to complete the task. The model consists of two main parts: the vector gating mechanism, which combines the character and word levels, and the attention mechanism, which extracts the important emotional parts of the text. The results show that the proposed system outperforms the baseline algorithm. We achieved fifth place in Spanglish and 19th place in Hinglish.The code of this paper is availabled at : https://github.com/JunKong5/Semveal2020-task9
summary: It is fairly common to use code-mixing on a social media platform to express opinions and emotions in multilingual societies. The purpose of this task is to detect the sentiment of code-mixed social media text. Code-mixed text poses a great challenge for the traditional NLP system, which currently uses monolingual resources to deal with the problem of multilingual mixing. This task has been solved in the past using lexicon lookup in respective sentiment dictionaries and using a long short-term memory (LSTM) neural network for monolingual resources. In this paper, we (my codalab username is kongjun) present a system that uses a bilingual vector gating mechanism for bilingual resources to complete the task. The model consists of two main parts: the vector gating mechanism, which combines the character and word levels, and the attention mechanism, which extracts the important emotional parts of the text. The results show that the proposed system outperforms the baseline algorithm. We achieved fifth place in Spanglish and 19th place in Hinglish.The code of this paper is availabled at : https://github.com/JunKong5/Semveal2020-task9
abstract_zh: 在社交媒体平台上使用代码混合来表达多语言社会中的观点和情感是相当普遍的。此任务的目的是检测代码混合的社交媒体文本的情绪。代码混合文本对传统的NLP系统提出了巨大的挑战，传统的NLP系统目前使用单语言资源来处理多语言混合的问题。过去已经通过在各自的情感词典中查找词典并使用单语言资源的长短期记忆（LSTM）神经网络来解决此任务。在本文中，我们（我的codalab用户名是kongjun）提出了一个系统，该系统使用双语资源的双语向量门控机制来完成任务。该模型由两个主要部分组成：向量门控机制，结合字符和单词级别；注意力机制，提取文本的重要情感部分。结果表明，所提出的系统优于基线算法。我们在西班牙英语中获得第五名，在印度英语中获得第十九名。本文的代码位于：https://github.com/JunKong5/Semveal2020-task9

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双语向量门控机制，用于社交媒体上混合语言文本的情感分析任务。
AI.motivation: 传统NLP系统依赖单语资源处理混合语言文本存在局限，需探索更有效的双语资源利用方法。
AI.method: 设计双语向量门控机制融合字符级和词级特征，并结合注意力机制提取文本情感关键部分。
AI.result: 在SemEval-2020任务中，该系统在Spanglish子任务中排名第五，在Hinglish子任务中排名19th。
AI.conclusion: 双语向量门控机制有效提升了混合语言情感分析性能，验证了该方法的可行性。

authors_text: Zicheng Kan,Yazhan Zhang,Chohei Pang,Michael Yu Wang
title: Origami-based Shape Morphing Fingertip to Enhance Grasping Stability and Dexterity
title_zh: 基于折纸的形状变形指尖可增强抓握稳定性和灵活性
abstract: Adaptation to various scene configurations and object properties, stability and dexterity in robotic grasping manipulation is far from explored. This work presents an origami-based shape morphing fingertip design to actively tackle the grasping stability and dexterity problems. The proposed fingertip utilizes origami as its skeleton providing degrees of freedom at desired positions and motor-driven four-bar-linkages as its transmission components to achieve a compact size of the fingertip. 3 morphing types that are commonly observed and essential in robotic grasping are studied and validated with geometrical modeling. Experiments including grasping an object with convex point contact to pivot or do pinch grasping, grasped object reorientation, and enveloping grasping with concave fingertip surfaces are implemented to demonstrate the advantages of our fingertip compared to conventional parallel grippers. Multi-functionality on enhancing grasping stability and dexterity via active adaptation given different grasped objects and manipulation tasks are justified. Video is available at youtu.be/jJoJ3xnDdVk/.
summary: Adaptation to various scene configurations and object properties, stability and dexterity in robotic grasping manipulation is far from explored. This work presents an origami-based shape morphing fingertip design to actively tackle the grasping stability and dexterity problems. The proposed fingertip utilizes origami as its skeleton providing degrees of freedom at desired positions and motor-driven four-bar-linkages as its transmission components to achieve a compact size of the fingertip. 3 morphing types that are commonly observed and essential in robotic grasping are studied and validated with geometrical modeling. Experiments including grasping an object with convex point contact to pivot or do pinch grasping, grasped object reorientation, and enveloping grasping with concave fingertip surfaces are implemented to demonstrate the advantages of our fingertip compared to conventional parallel grippers. Multi-functionality on enhancing grasping stability and dexterity via active adaptation given different grasped objects and manipulation tasks are justified. Video is available at youtu.be/jJoJ3xnDdVk/.
abstract_zh: 机器人抓取操作对各种场景配置和物体属性的适应、稳定性和灵活性还远未得到探索。这项工作提出了一种基于折纸的形状变形指尖设计，以积极解决抓取稳定性和灵活性问题。所提出的指尖利用折纸作为其骨架，在所需位置提供自由度，并利用电机驱动的四连杆作为其传动部件，以实现指尖的紧凑尺寸。通过几何建模研究和验证了机器人抓取中常见且必不可少的 3 种变形类型。实验包括通过凸点接触来抓取物体以枢转或进行捏握、抓取物体重新定向以及用凹指尖表面进行包络抓取，以证明我们的指尖与传统平行夹具相比的优势。考虑到不同的抓取物体和操作任务，通过主动适应来增强抓取稳定性和灵活性的多功能性是合理的。视频可在 youtu.be/jJoJ3xnDdVk/ 上观看。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于折纸结构的可变形指尖设计，通过主动适应提升机械抓取的稳定性和灵巧性。
AI.motivation: 传统机械夹爪在应对复杂物体形状和多样化抓取任务时，存在稳定性和灵巧性不足的问题，亟需新型自适应结构。
AI.method: 采用折纸骨架提供可控自由度，结合电机驱动的四连杆机构实现紧凑结构；通过几何建模验证三种典型变形模式，并开展凸点抓取、物体再定位及凹面包裹抓取等实验。
AI.result: 实验表明该指尖在凸点支点抓取、捏合抓取及凹面包裹等任务中，相较传统夹爪展现出更优的抓取稳定性与操作灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 折纸驱动的可变形指尖通过主动形态适应，有效提升了机械手在不同物体和任务下的抓取性能，验证了多功能自适应抓取的可行性。

Experiments including grasping an object with convex point contact to pivot or do pinch grasping, grasped object reorientation, and enveloping grasping with concave fingertip surfaces are implemented to demonstrate the advantages of our fingertip compared to conventional parallel grippers. Multi-functionality on enhancing grasping stability and dexterity via active adaptation given different grasped objects and manipulation tasks are justified. Video is available at youtu.be/jJoJ3xnDdVk/. 机器人抓取操作对各种场景配置和物体属性的适应、稳定性和灵活性还远未得到探索。这项工作提出了一种基于折纸的形状变形指尖设计，以积极解决抓取稳定性和灵活性问题。所提出的指尖利用折纸作为其骨架，在所需位置提供自由度，并利用电机驱动的四连杆作为其传动部件，以实现指尖的紧凑尺寸。通过几何建模研究和验证了机器人抓取中常见且必不可少的 3 种变形类型。实验包括通过凸点接触来抓取物体以枢转或进行捏握、抓取物体重新定向以及用凹指尖表面进行包络抓取，以证明我们的指尖与传统平行夹具相比的优势。考虑到不同的抓取物体和操作任务，通过主动适应来增强抓取稳定性和灵活性的多功能性是合理的。视频可在 youtu.be/jJoJ3xnDdVk/ 上观看。 本文提出一种基于折纸结构的可变形指尖设计，通过主动适应提升机械抓取的稳定性和灵巧性。 Zicheng Kan,Yazhan Zhang,Chohei Pang,Michael Yu Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Haoming Li,Xin Yang,Jiamin Liang,Wenlong Shi,Chaoyu Chen,Haoran Dou,Rui Li,Rui Gao,Guangquan Zhou,Jinghui Fang,Xiaowen Liang,Ruobing Huang,Alejandro Frangi,Zhiyi Chen,Dong Ni
title: Contrastive Rendering for Ultrasound Image Segmentation
title_zh: 超声图像分割的对比渲染
abstract: Ultrasound (US) image segmentation embraced its significant improvement in deep learning era. However, the lack of sharp boundaries in US images still remains an inherent challenge for segmentation. Previous methods often resort to global context, multi-scale cues or auxiliary guidance to estimate the boundaries. It is hard for these methods to approach pixel-level learning for fine-grained boundary generating. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective framework to improve boundary estimation in US images. Our work has three highlights. First, we propose to formulate the boundary estimation as a rendering task, which can recognize ambiguous points (pixels/voxels) and calibrate the boundary prediction via enriched feature representation learning. Second, we introduce point-wise contrastive learning to enhance the similarity of points from the same class and contrastively decrease the similarity of points from different classes. Boundary ambiguities are therefore further addressed. Third, both rendering and contrastive learning tasks contribute to consistent improvement while reducing network parameters. As a proof-of-concept, we performed validation experiments on a challenging dataset of 86 ovarian US volumes. Results show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods and has the potential to be used in clinical practice.
summary: Ultrasound (US) image segmentation embraced its significant improvement in deep learning era. However, the lack of sharp boundaries in US images still remains an inherent challenge for segmentation. Previous methods often resort to global context, multi-scale cues or auxiliary guidance to estimate the boundaries. It is hard for these methods to approach pixel-level learning for fine-grained boundary generating. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective framework to improve boundary estimation in US images. Our work has three highlights. First, we propose to formulate the boundary estimation as a rendering task, which can recognize ambiguous points (pixels/voxels) and calibrate the boundary prediction via enriched feature representation learning. Second, we introduce point-wise contrastive learning to enhance the similarity of points from the same class and contrastively decrease the similarity of points from different classes. Boundary ambiguities are therefore further addressed. Third, both rendering and contrastive learning tasks contribute to consistent improvement while reducing network parameters. As a proof-of-concept, we performed validation experiments on a challenging dataset of 86 ovarian US volumes. Results show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods and has the potential to be used in clinical practice.
abstract_zh: 超声（美国）图像分割在深度学习时代迎来了显着进步。然而，美国图像缺乏清晰的边界仍然是分割的固有挑战。以前的方法通常依靠全局背景、多尺度线索或辅助指导来估计边界。这些方法很难接近像素级学习来生成细粒度的边界。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的框架来改进美国图像中的边界估计。我们的工作有三个亮点。首先，我们建议将边界估计制定为渲染任务，它可以识别模糊点（像素/体素）并通过丰富的特征表示学习来校准边界预测。其次，我们引入逐点对比学习来增强同一类点的相似度，并对比降低不同类点的相似度。因此，边界模糊性得到进一步解决。第三，渲染和对比学习任务都有助于持续改进，同时减少网络参数。作为概念验证，我们对 86 个卵巢 US 体积的具有挑战性的数据集进行了验证实验。结果表明，我们提出的方法优于最先进的方法，并且具有在临床实践中使用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于超声图像分割的对比渲染框架，旨在提高边界估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在超声图像分割中取得了显著进展，但超声图像中边界模糊的问题仍然存在，现有方法难以实现像素级的精细边界生成。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的框架，包括将边界估计视为渲染任务、引入点级对比学习以增强同类点相似性并减少异类点相似性，同时减少网络参数。
AI.result: 在86个卵巢超声体积的具有挑战性的数据集上进行验证实验，结果表明该方法优于现有最先进方法，并具有临床应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的对比渲染方法有效提升了超声图像的边界估计性能，具有良好的临床应用前景。

authors_text: Qiansheng Wang,Yuxin Liu,Chengguo Lv,Zhen Wang,Guohong Fu
title: Cue-word Driven Neural Response Generation with a Shrinking Vocabulary
title_zh: 词汇量不断缩小的提示词驱动神经响应生成
abstract: Open-domain response generation is the task of generating sensible and informative re-sponses to the source sentence. However, neural models tend to generate safe and mean-ingless responses. While cue-word introducing approaches encourage responses with concrete semantics and have shown tremendous potential, they still fail to explore di-verse responses during decoding. In this paper, we propose a novel but natural approach that can produce multiple cue-words during decoding, and then uses the produced cue-words to drive decoding and shrinks the decoding vocabulary. Thus the neural genera-tion model can explore the full space of responses and discover informative ones with efficiency. Experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms several strong baseline models with much lower decoding complexity. Especially, our approach can converge to concrete semantics more efficiently during decoding.
summary: Open-domain response generation is the task of generating sensible and informative re-sponses to the source sentence. However, neural models tend to generate safe and mean-ingless responses. While cue-word introducing approaches encourage responses with concrete semantics and have shown tremendous potential, they still fail to explore di-verse responses during decoding. In this paper, we propose a novel but natural approach that can produce multiple cue-words during decoding, and then uses the produced cue-words to drive decoding and shrinks the decoding vocabulary. Thus the neural genera-tion model can explore the full space of responses and discover informative ones with efficiency. Experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms several strong baseline models with much lower decoding complexity. Especially, our approach can converge to concrete semantics more efficiently during decoding.
abstract_zh: 开放域响应生成是针对源句子生成合理且信息丰富的响应的任务。然而，神经模型往往会产生安全且无意义的反应。虽然提示词引入方法鼓励具有具体语义的响应并显示出巨大的潜力，但它们仍然无法在解码过程中探索多样化的响应。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖但自然的方法，可以在解码过程中生成多个提示词，然后使用生成的提示词来驱动解码并缩小解码词汇表。因此，神经生成模型可以探索整个反应空间并有效地发现信息丰富的反应。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于几种强大的基线模型，并且解码复杂度低得多。特别是，我们的方法可以在解码过程中更有效地收敛到具体语义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示词和缩减词汇表的神经响应生成方法，以解决开放域对话中模型生成无意义回复的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经模型生成的回复缺乏多样性且语义模糊，而引入提示词的方法尚未有效探索多样的解码路径。
AI.method: 在解码过程中动态生成多个提示词，利用提示词驱动解码并逐步缩减词汇表，引导模型高效探索语义空间。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持低解码复杂度的同时显著优于基线模型，且能更高效收敛到具体语义。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过提示词与词汇缩减机制有效提升了响应生成的质量与效率，为对话系统研究提供了新思路。

title: Regularizing Neural Networks via Adversarial Model Perturbation
title_zh: 通过对抗模型扰动正则化神经网络
abstract: Effective regularization techniques are highly desired in deep learning for alleviating overfitting and improving generalization. This work proposes a new regularization scheme, based on the understanding that the flat local minima of the empirical risk cause the model to generalize better. This scheme is referred to as adversarial model perturbation (AMP), where instead of directly minimizing the empirical risk, an alternative "AMP loss" is minimized via SGD. Specifically, the AMP loss is obtained from the empirical risk by applying the "worst" norm-bounded perturbation on each point in the parameter space. Comparing with most existing regularization schemes, AMP has strong theoretical justifications, in that minimizing the AMP loss can be shown theoretically to favour flat local minima of the empirical risk. Extensive experiments on various modern deep architectures establish AMP as a new state of the art among regularization schemes. Our code is available at https://github.com/hiyouga/AMP-Regularizer.
summary: Effective regularization techniques are highly desired in deep learning for alleviating overfitting and improving generalization. This work proposes a new regularization scheme, based on the understanding that the flat local minima of the empirical risk cause the model to generalize better. This scheme is referred to as adversarial model perturbation (AMP), where instead of directly minimizing the empirical risk, an alternative "AMP loss" is minimized via SGD. Specifically, the AMP loss is obtained from the empirical risk by applying the "worst" norm-bounded perturbation on each point in the parameter space. Comparing with most existing regularization schemes, AMP has strong theoretical justifications, in that minimizing the AMP loss can be shown theoretically to favour flat local minima of the empirical risk. Extensive experiments on various modern deep architectures establish AMP as a new state of the art among regularization schemes. Our code is available at https://github.com/hiyouga/AMP-Regularizer.
abstract_zh: 深度学习中非常需要有效的正则化技术来减轻过度拟合和提高泛化能力。这项工作提出了一种新的正则化方案，基于这样的理解：经验风险的平坦局部最小值使模型具有更好的泛化能力。该方案称为对抗性模型扰动 (AMP)，其中不是直接最小化经验风险，而是通过 SGD 最小化替代的“AMP 损失”。具体来说，AMP 损失是通过对参数空间中的每个点应用“最差”范数有界扰动从经验风险获得的。与大多数现有的正则化方案相比，AMP 具有很强的理论依据，因为理论上可以证明最小化 AMP 损失有利于经验风险的平坦局部最小值。对各种现代深度架构的广泛实验使 AMP 成为正则化方案中最先进的技术。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hiyouga/AMP-Regularizer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的神经网络正则化方法——对抗模型扰动（AMP），通过引入参数空间中的最坏扰动来优化损失函数，以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有正则化方法难以有效缓解深度学习中的过拟合问题，而理论表明平坦的局部极小值更有利于模型泛化，因此需要设计新的正则化方案。
AI.method: 通过构造AMP损失函数，对参数空间中每个点施加范数有界的最大扰动，并利用SGD最小化该损失，从而引导模型收敛到平坦局部极小值。
AI.result: 在多种现代深度架构上实验表明，AMP在泛化性能上优于现有正则化方法，成为新的状态-of-the-art技术。
AI.conclusion: AMP方法具有坚实的理论依据和实验验证，为深度学习模型的正则化提供了有效新途径。

ai_content.motivation: 现有正则化方法难以有效缓解深度学习中的过拟合问题，而理论表明平坦的局部极小值更有利于模型泛化，因此需要设计新的正则化方案。
ai_content.method: 通过构造AMP损失函数，对参数空间中每个点施加范数有界的最大扰动，并利用SGD最小化该损失，从而引导模型收敛到平坦局部极小值。

search_text: Regularizing Neural Networks via Adversarial Model Perturbation 通过对抗模型扰动正则化神经网络 Effective regularization techniques are highly desired in deep learning for alleviating overfitting and improving generalization. This work proposes a new regularization scheme, based on the understanding that the flat local minima of the empirical risk cause the model to generalize better. This scheme is referred to as adversarial model perturbation (AMP), where instead of directly minimizing the empirical risk, an alternative "AMP loss" is minimized via SGD. Specifically, the AMP loss is obtained from the empirical risk by applying the "worst" norm-bounded perturbation on each point in the parameter space. Comparing with most existing regularization schemes, AMP has strong theoretical justifications, in that minimizing the AMP loss can be shown theoretically to favour flat local minima of the empirical risk. Extensive experiments on various modern deep architectures establish AMP as a new state of the art among regularization schemes. Our code is available at https://github.com/hiyouga/AMP-Regularizer. 深度学习中非常需要有效的正则化技术来减轻过度拟合和提高泛化能力。这项工作提出了一种新的正则化方案，基于这样的理解：经验风险的平坦局部最小值使模型具有更好的泛化能力。该方案称为对抗性模型扰动 (AMP)，其中不是直接最小化经验风险，而是通过 SGD 最小化替代的“AMP 损失”。具体来说，AMP 损失是通过对参数空间中的每个点应用“最差”范数有界扰动从经验风险获得的。与大多数现有的正则化方案相比，AMP 具有很强的理论依据，因为理论上可以证明最小化 AMP 损失有利于经验风险的平坦局部最小值。对各种现代深度架构的广泛实验使 AMP 成为正则化方案中最先进的技术。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hiyouga/AMP-Regularizer 获取。 本文提出一种新的神经网络正则化方法——对抗模型扰动（AMP），通过引入参数空间中的最坏扰动来优化损失函数，以提升模型泛化能力。 Yaowei Zheng,Richong Zhang,Yongyi Mao cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: On Long-Tailed Phenomena in Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 神经机器翻译中的长尾现象
abstract: State-of-the-art Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models struggle with generating low-frequency tokens, tackling which remains a major challenge. The analysis of long-tailed phenomena in the context of structured prediction tasks is further hindered by the added complexities of search during inference. In this work, we quantitatively characterize such long-tailed phenomena at two levels of abstraction, namely, token classification and sequence generation. We propose a new loss function, the Anti-Focal loss, to better adapt model training to the structural dependencies of conditional text generation by incorporating the inductive biases of beam search in the training process. We show the efficacy of the proposed technique on a number of Machine Translation (MT) datasets, demonstrating that it leads to significant gains over cross-entropy across different language pairs, especially on the generation of low-frequency words. We have released the code to reproduce our results.
summary: State-of-the-art Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models struggle with generating low-frequency tokens, tackling which remains a major challenge. The analysis of long-tailed phenomena in the context of structured prediction tasks is further hindered by the added complexities of search during inference. In this work, we quantitatively characterize such long-tailed phenomena at two levels of abstraction, namely, token classification and sequence generation. We propose a new loss function, the Anti-Focal loss, to better adapt model training to the structural dependencies of conditional text generation by incorporating the inductive biases of beam search in the training process. We show the efficacy of the proposed technique on a number of Machine Translation (MT) datasets, demonstrating that it leads to significant gains over cross-entropy across different language pairs, especially on the generation of low-frequency words. We have released the code to reproduce our results.
abstract_zh: 最先进的神经机器翻译（NMT）模型在生成低频标记方面遇到了困难，解决这个问题仍然是一个重大挑战。在结构化预测任务的背景下对长尾现象的分析因推理过程中搜索的复杂性增加而进一步受到阻碍。在这项工作中，我们在两个抽象层面（即标记分类和序列生成）定量地描述了这种长尾现象。我们提出了一种新的损失函数，即反焦点损失，通过在训练过程中结合波束搜索的归纳偏差，更好地使模型训练适应条件文本生成的结构依赖性。我们在许多机器翻译（MT）数据集上展示了所提出的技术的有效性，证明它可以在不同语言对的交叉熵上带来显着的收益，特别是在低频词的生成方面。我们已经发布了代码来重现我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经机器翻译中低频词生成困难的长尾现象，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有NMT模型在生成低频词时表现不佳，而推理阶段的搜索机制进一步加剧了这一问题，需针对性解决长尾分布挑战。
AI.method: 提出新的Anti-Focal损失函数，在训练中融入束搜索的归纳偏置，从token分类和序列生成两个层面量化分析长尾现象。
AI.result: 在多个翻译数据集上显著优于交叉熵损失，尤其提升了低频词生成准确率，并开源了实现代码。
AI.conclusion: 通过将束搜索机制引入训练过程，Anti-Focal损失有效缓解了长尾现象，为低频词生成提供了新思路。

title: Structured Self-Attention Weights Encode Semantics in Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 结构化自注意力权重编码情感分析中的语义
abstract: Neural attention, especially the self-attention made popular by the Transformer, has become the workhorse of state-of-the-art natural language processing (NLP) models. Very recent work suggests that the self-attention in the Transformer encodes syntactic information; Here, we show that self-attention scores encode semantics by considering sentiment analysis tasks. In contrast to gradient-based feature attribution methods, we propose a simple and effective Layer-wise Attention Tracing (LAT) method to analyze structured attention weights. We apply our method to Transformer models trained on two tasks that have surface dissimilarities, but share common semantics---sentiment analysis of movie reviews and time-series valence prediction in life story narratives. Across both tasks, words with high aggregated attention weights were rich in emotional semantics, as quantitatively validated by an emotion lexicon labeled by human annotators. Our results show that structured attention weights encode rich semantics in sentiment analysis, and match human interpretations of semantics.
summary: Neural attention, especially the self-attention made popular by the Transformer, has become the workhorse of state-of-the-art natural language processing (NLP) models. Very recent work suggests that the self-attention in the Transformer encodes syntactic information; Here, we show that self-attention scores encode semantics by considering sentiment analysis tasks. In contrast to gradient-based feature attribution methods, we propose a simple and effective Layer-wise Attention Tracing (LAT) method to analyze structured attention weights. We apply our method to Transformer models trained on two tasks that have surface dissimilarities, but share common semantics---sentiment analysis of movie reviews and time-series valence prediction in life story narratives. Across both tasks, words with high aggregated attention weights were rich in emotional semantics, as quantitatively validated by an emotion lexicon labeled by human annotators. Our results show that structured attention weights encode rich semantics in sentiment analysis, and match human interpretations of semantics.
abstract_zh: 神经注意力，尤其是 Transformer 所流行的自注意力，已经成为最先进的自然语言处理（NLP）模型的主力。最近的研究表明 Transformer 中的自注意力编码了句法信息；在这里，我们通过考虑情感分析任务来证明自注意力分数编码语义。与基于梯度的特征归因方法相比，我们提出了一种简单有效的逐层注意力追踪（LAT）方法来分析结构化注意力权重。我们将我们的方法应用于 Transformer 模型，该模型接受了两项具有表面差异但具有共同语义的任务——电影评论的情感分析和生活故事叙述中的时间序列效价预测。在这两项任务中，具有高聚合注意力权重的单词具有丰富的情感语义，正如人类注释者标记的情感词典所定量验证的那样。我们的结果表明，结构化注意力权重在情感分析中编码了丰富的语义，并且与人类对语义的解释相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Transformer模型中结构化自注意力权重在情感分析任务中是否编码语义信息，并提出了一种新的分析方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管自注意力机制在NLP中广泛应用，但其是否编码语义信息尚不明确。本文旨在通过情感分析任务验证自注意力权重的语义表征能力，并提出无需梯度的方法进行分析。
AI.method: 提出分层注意力追踪（LAT）方法，通过聚合多层自注意力权重分析词与语义的关系，并在电影评论情感分析和人生叙事情感预测任务中验证。
AI.result: 高注意力权重的词汇在情感词典中具有丰富的情感语义，且与人类标注的情感标签高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 结构化自注意力权重能有效编码情感语义，且与人类对语义的理解一致，为解释Transformer模型提供了新视角。

authors_text: Qikui Zhu,Liang Li,Jiangnan Hao,Yunfei Zha,Yan Zhang,Yanxiang Cheng,Fei Liao,Pingxiang Li
title: Selective Information Passing for MR/CT Image Segmentation
title_zh: MR/CT 图像分割的选择性信息传递
abstract: Automated medical image segmentation plays an important role in many clinical applications, which however is a very challenging task, due to complex background texture, lack of clear boundary and significant shape and texture variation between images. Many researchers proposed an encoder-decoder architecture with skip connections to combine low-level feature maps from the encoder path with high-level feature maps from the decoder path for automatically segmenting medical images. The skip connections have been shown to be effective in recovering fine-grained details of the target objects and may facilitate the gradient back-propagation. However, not all the feature maps transmitted by those connections contribute positively to the network performance. In this paper, to adaptively select useful information to pass through those skip connections, we propose a novel 3D network with self-supervised function, named selective information passing network (SIP-Net). We evaluate our proposed model on the MICCAI Prostate MR Image Segmentation 2012 Grant Challenge dataset, TCIA Pancreas CT-82 and MICCAI 2017 Liver Tumor Segmentation (LiTS) Challenge dataset. The experimental results across these data sets show that our model achieved improved segmentation results and outperformed other state-of-the-art methods. The source code of this work is available at https://github.com/ahukui/SIPNet.
summary: Automated medical image segmentation plays an important role in many clinical applications, which however is a very challenging task, due to complex background texture, lack of clear boundary and significant shape and texture variation between images. Many researchers proposed an encoder-decoder architecture with skip connections to combine low-level feature maps from the encoder path with high-level feature maps from the decoder path for automatically segmenting medical images. The skip connections have been shown to be effective in recovering fine-grained details of the target objects and may facilitate the gradient back-propagation. However, not all the feature maps transmitted by those connections contribute positively to the network performance. In this paper, to adaptively select useful information to pass through those skip connections, we propose a novel 3D network with self-supervised function, named selective information passing network (SIP-Net). We evaluate our proposed model on the MICCAI Prostate MR Image Segmentation 2012 Grant Challenge dataset, TCIA Pancreas CT-82 and MICCAI 2017 Liver Tumor Segmentation (LiTS) Challenge dataset. The experimental results across these data sets show that our model achieved improved segmentation results and outperformed other state-of-the-art methods. The source code of this work is available at https://github.com/ahukui/SIPNet.
abstract_zh: 自动医学图像分割在许多临床应用中发挥着重要作用，然而，由于复杂的背景纹理、缺乏清晰的边界以及图像之间显着的形状和纹理变化，这是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。许多研究人员提出了一种具有跳跃连接的编码器-解码器架构，将来自编码器路径的低级特征图与来自解码器路径的高级特征图结合起来，以自动分割医学图像。跳跃连接已被证明可以有效地恢复目标对象的细粒度细节，并且可以促进梯度反向传播。然而，并非这些连接传输的所有特征图都对网络性能有积极贡献。在本文中，为了自适应地选择有用信息通过这些跳跃连接，我们提出了一种具有自监督功能的新型3D网络，称为选择性信息传递网络（SIP-Net）。我们在 MICCAI 前列腺 MR 图像分割 2012 年 Grant 挑战数据集、TCIA 胰腺 CT-82 和 MICCAI 2017 肝脏肿瘤分割 (LiTS) 挑战数据集上评估了我们提出的模型。这些数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型取得了改进的分割结果，并且优于其他最先进的方法。这项工作的源代码可在 https://github.com/ahukui/SIPNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SIP-Net的3D网络，通过选择性信息传递机制改进医学图像（MR/CT）分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于跳跃连接的编码器-解码器架构在医学图像分割中存在冗余特征传递问题，非必要特征可能影响网络性能。
AI.method: 设计具有自监督功能的3D网络SIP-Net，在跳跃连接中引入自适应信息选择机制，过滤无效特征并保留关键细节信息。
AI.result: 在MICCAI前列腺MRI、TCIA胰腺CT和LiTS肝肿瘤分割数据集上，SIP-Net的分割效果优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 选择性信息传递机制能有效提升医学图像分割精度，SIP-Net在多个数据集上验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Richard G. Freedman,Steven J. Levine,Brian C. Williams,Shlomo Zilberstein
title: Helpfulness as a Key Metric of Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 乐于助人是人机协作的关键指标
comment: Accepted for presentation at the AAAI 2020 Fall Symposium Series, in the symposium for Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction: Trust & Explainability in Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction
comments: Accepted for presentation at the AAAI 2020 Fall Symposium Series, in the symposium for Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction: Trust & Explainability in Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: As robotic teammates become more common in society, people will assess the robots' roles in their interactions along many dimensions. One such dimension is effectiveness: people will ask whether their robotic partners are trustworthy and effective collaborators. This begs a crucial question: how can we quantitatively measure the helpfulness of a robotic partner for a given task at hand? This paper seeks to answer this question with regards to the interactive robot's decision making. We describe a clear, concise, and task-oriented metric applicable to many different planning and execution paradigms. The proposed helpfulness metric is fundamental to assessing the benefit that a partner has on a team for a given task. In this paper, we define helpfulness, illustrate it on concrete examples from a variety of domains, discuss its properties and ramifications for planning interactions with humans, and present preliminary results.
summary: As robotic teammates become more common in society, people will assess the robots' roles in their interactions along many dimensions. One such dimension is effectiveness: people will ask whether their robotic partners are trustworthy and effective collaborators. This begs a crucial question: how can we quantitatively measure the helpfulness of a robotic partner for a given task at hand? This paper seeks to answer this question with regards to the interactive robot's decision making. We describe a clear, concise, and task-oriented metric applicable to many different planning and execution paradigms. The proposed helpfulness metric is fundamental to assessing the benefit that a partner has on a team for a given task. In this paper, we define helpfulness, illustrate it on concrete examples from a variety of domains, discuss its properties and ramifications for planning interactions with humans, and present preliminary results.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人队友在社会中变得越来越普遍，人们将在多个维度上评估机器人在互动中的角色。其中一个维度是有效性：人们会问他们的机器人伙伴是否是值得信赖和有效的合作者。这就引出了一个关键问题：我们如何定量衡量机器人伙伴对手头给定任务的帮助程度？本文试图回答这个有关交互式机器人决策的问题。我们描述了一个清晰、简洁、面向任务的指标，适用于许多不同的计划和执行范例。所提出的有用性指标对于评估合作伙伴在给定任务中为团队带来的好处至关重要。在本文中，我们定义了帮助性，通过各个领域的具体例子来说明它，讨论了它的属性和对规划与人类交互的影响，并提出了初步结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一个量化评估协作机器人帮助性的任务导向度量标准
AI.motivation: 随着协作机器人普及，需解决如何量化其帮助性以评估在团队任务中的贡献
AI.method: 定义帮助性度量标准并结合多领域实例验证，分析其对人机交互规划的影响
AI.result: 展示度量标准在多个场景的应用案例及初步验证结果
AI.conclusion: 帮助性度量为评估协作机器人价值提供基础，可优化人机协作策略

title: Interpretable Neural Computation for Real-World Compositional Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 用于现实世界组合视觉问答的可解释神经计算
abstract: There are two main lines of research on visual question answering (VQA): compositional model with explicit multi-hop reasoning, and monolithic network with implicit reasoning in the latent feature space. The former excels in interpretability and compositionality but fails on real-world images, while the latter usually achieves better performance due to model flexibility and parameter efficiency. We aim to combine the two to build an interpretable framework for real-world compositional VQA. In our framework, images and questions are disentangled into scene graphs and programs, and a symbolic program executor runs on them with full transparency to select the attention regions, which are then iteratively passed to a visual-linguistic pre-trained encoder to predict answers. Experiments conducted on the GQA benchmark demonstrate that our framework outperforms the compositional prior arts and achieves competitive accuracy among monolithic ones. With respect to the validity, plausibility and distribution metrics, our framework surpasses others by a considerable margin.
summary: There are two main lines of research on visual question answering (VQA): compositional model with explicit multi-hop reasoning, and monolithic network with implicit reasoning in the latent feature space. The former excels in interpretability and compositionality but fails on real-world images, while the latter usually achieves better performance due to model flexibility and parameter efficiency. We aim to combine the two to build an interpretable framework for real-world compositional VQA. In our framework, images and questions are disentangled into scene graphs and programs, and a symbolic program executor runs on them with full transparency to select the attention regions, which are then iteratively passed to a visual-linguistic pre-trained encoder to predict answers. Experiments conducted on the GQA benchmark demonstrate that our framework outperforms the compositional prior arts and achieves competitive accuracy among monolithic ones. With respect to the validity, plausibility and distribution metrics, our framework surpasses others by a considerable margin.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）的研究主要有两条线：具有显式多跳推理的组合模型，以及在潜在特征空间中具有隐式推理的整体网络。前者在可解释性和组合性方面表现出色，但在真实图像上表现不佳，而后者由于模型灵活性和参数效率通常会实现更好的性能。我们的目标是将两者结合起来，为现实世界的组合 VQA 构建一个可解释的框架。在我们的框架中，图像和问题被分解为场景图和程序，并且符号程序执行器以完全透明的方式在它们上运行以选择注意区域，然后将其迭代地传递给视觉语言预训练编码器以预测答案。在 GQA 基准上进行的实验表明，我们的框架优于组合现有技术，并在整体框架中实现了具有竞争力的准确性。在有效性、合理性和分布指标方面，我们的框架远远超过其他框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的神经计算框架，结合显式多跳推理与隐式特征学习，解决现实世界中的组合型视觉问答问题。
AI.motivation: 现有组合模型虽具可解释性但难以处理现实图像，单片网络虽性能优异但缺乏透明度，需融合两者优势以实现兼顾性能与可解释性的VQA系统。
AI.method: 将图像和问题解耦为场景图与程序，通过符号程序执行器透明选择注意力区域，并迭代输入视觉语言预训练编码器生成答案。
AI.result: 在GQA基准测试中，框架超越组合模型且准确率接近单片网络，在有效性、合理性及分布度量指标上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功整合显式推理与隐式学习，为现实场景下的可解释组合型VQA提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的神经计算框架，结合显式多跳推理与隐式特征学习，解决现实世界中的组合型视觉问答问题。

motivation: 现有组合模型虽具可解释性但难以处理现实图像，单片网络虽性能优异但缺乏透明度，需融合两者优势以实现兼顾性能与可解释性的VQA系统。
method: 将图像和问题解耦为场景图与程序，通过符号程序执行器透明选择注意力区域，并迭代输入视觉语言预训练编码器生成答案。
result: 在GQA基准测试中，框架超越组合模型且准确率接近单片网络，在有效性、合理性及分布度量指标上显著优于现有方法。
conclusion: 该框架成功整合显式推理与隐式学习，为现实场景下的可解释组合型VQA提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: Interpretable Neural Computation for Real-World Compositional Visual Question Answering 用于现实世界组合视觉问答的可解释神经计算 There are two main lines of research on visual question answering (VQA): compositional model with explicit multi-hop reasoning, and monolithic network with implicit reasoning in the latent feature space. The former excels in interpretability and compositionality but fails on real-world images, while the latter usually achieves better performance due to model flexibility and parameter efficiency. We aim to combine the two to build an interpretable framework for real-world compositional VQA. In our framework, images and questions are disentangled into scene graphs and programs, and a symbolic program executor runs on them with full transparency to select the attention regions, which are then iteratively passed to a visual-linguistic pre-trained encoder to predict answers. Experiments conducted on the GQA benchmark demonstrate that our framework outperforms the compositional prior arts and achieves competitive accuracy among monolithic ones. With respect to the validity, plausibility and distribution metrics, our framework surpasses others by a considerable margin. 视觉问答（VQA）的研究主要有两条线：具有显式多跳推理的组合模型，以及在潜在特征空间中具有隐式推理的整体网络。前者在可解释性和组合性方面表现出色，但在真实图像上表现不佳，而后者由于模型灵活性和参数效率通常会实现更好的性能。我们的目标是将两者结合起来，为现实世界的组合 VQA 构建一个可解释的框架。在我们的框架中，图像和问题被分解为场景图和程序，并且符号程序执行器以完全透明的方式在它们上运行以选择注意区域，然后将其迭代地传递给视觉语言预训练编码器以预测答案。在 GQA 基准上进行的实验表明，我们的框架优于组合现有技术，并在整体框架中实现了具有竞争力的准确性。在有效性、合理性和分布指标方面，我们的框架远远超过其他框架。 本文提出一种可解释的神经计算框架，结合显式多跳推理与隐式特征学习，解决现实世界中的组合型视觉问答问题。 Ruixue Tang,Chao Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Qifei Wang,Junjie Ke,Joshua Greaves,Grace Chu,Gabriel Bender,Luciano Sbaiz,Alec Go,Andrew Howard,Feng Yang,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Jeff Gilbert,Peyman Milanfar
title: Multi-path Neural Networks for On-device Multi-domain Visual Classification
title_zh: 用于设备上多域视觉分类的多路径神经网络
abstract: Learning multiple domains/tasks with a single model is important for improving data efficiency and lowering inference cost for numerous vision tasks, especially on resource-constrained mobile devices. However, hand-crafting a multi-domain/task model can be both tedious and challenging. This paper proposes a novel approach to automatically learn a multi-path network for multi-domain visual classification on mobile devices. The proposed multi-path network is learned from neural architecture search by applying one reinforcement learning controller for each domain to select the best path in the super-network created from a MobileNetV3-like search space. An adaptive balanced domain prioritization algorithm is proposed to balance optimizing the joint model on multiple domains simultaneously. The determined multi-path model selectively shares parameters across domains in shared nodes while keeping domain-specific parameters within non-shared nodes in individual domain paths. This approach effectively reduces the total number of parameters and FLOPS, encouraging positive knowledge transfer while mitigating negative interference across domains. Extensive evaluations on the Visual Decathlon dataset demonstrate that the proposed multi-path model achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of accuracy, model size, and FLOPS against other approaches using MobileNetV3-like architectures. Furthermore, the proposed method improves average accuracy over learning single-domain models individually, and reduces the total number of parameters and FLOPS by 78% and 32% respectively, compared to the approach that simply bundles single-domain models for multi-domain learning.
summary: Learning multiple domains/tasks with a single model is important for improving data efficiency and lowering inference cost for numerous vision tasks, especially on resource-constrained mobile devices. However, hand-crafting a multi-domain/task model can be both tedious and challenging. This paper proposes a novel approach to automatically learn a multi-path network for multi-domain visual classification on mobile devices. The proposed multi-path network is learned from neural architecture search by applying one reinforcement learning controller for each domain to select the best path in the super-network created from a MobileNetV3-like search space. An adaptive balanced domain prioritization algorithm is proposed to balance optimizing the joint model on multiple domains simultaneously. The determined multi-path model selectively shares parameters across domains in shared nodes while keeping domain-specific parameters within non-shared nodes in individual domain paths. This approach effectively reduces the total number of parameters and FLOPS, encouraging positive knowledge transfer while mitigating negative interference across domains. Extensive evaluations on the Visual Decathlon dataset demonstrate that the proposed multi-path model achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of accuracy, model size, and FLOPS against other approaches using MobileNetV3-like architectures. Furthermore, the proposed method improves average accuracy over learning single-domain models individually, and reduces the total number of parameters and FLOPS by 78% and 32% respectively, compared to the approach that simply bundles single-domain models for multi-domain learning.
abstract_zh: 使用单个模型学习多个领域/任务对于提高数据效率和降低众多视觉任务的推理成本非常重要，尤其是在资源有限的移动设备上。然而，手工制作多领域/任务模型可能既乏味又具有挑战性。本文提出了一种自动学习多路径网络的新方法，用于移动设备上的多域视觉分类。所提出的多路径网络是从神经架构搜索中学习的，通过为每个域应用一个强化学习控制器来选择从类似 MobileNetV3 的搜索空间创建的超级网络中的最佳路径。提出了一种自适应平衡域优先级算法来同时平衡优化多个域上的联合模型。确定的多路径模型选择性地在共享节点中跨域共享参数，同时将域特定参数保留在各个域路径中的非共享节点内。这种方法有效地减少了参数总数和 FLOPS，鼓励积极的知识转移，同时减轻跨领域的负面干扰。对 Visual Decathlon 数据集的广泛评估表明，与使用类似 MobileNetV3 架构的其他方法相比，所提出的多路径模型在准确性、模型大小和 FLOPS 方面实现了最先进的性能。此外，与简单捆绑单域模型进行多域学习的方法相比，该方法提高了单独学习单域模型的平均准确率，并将参数总数和 FLOPS 分别减少了 78% 和 32%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多路径神经网络方法，用于在移动设备上实现多领域视觉分类。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的移动设备上，通过单一模型学习多个领域/任务可提升数据效率并降低推理成本，但手动设计多领域模型既繁琐又具挑战性。
AI.method: 基于神经架构搜索，为每个领域设计强化学习控制器以选择最优路径，并通过自适应平衡算法协调多领域优化。共享节点参数跨领域，非共享节点保留领域特有参数。
AI.result: 在Visual Decathlon数据集上，模型在准确率、参数量和FLOPS指标上达到SOTA，相比单领域模型平均准确率提升，参数量和FLOPS分别减少78%和32%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过参数共享与领域平衡机制，在降低模型复杂度的同时提升多领域视觉分类性能，适用于移动设备部署。

title: What Do Position Embeddings Learn? An Empirical Study of Pre-Trained Language Model Positional Encoding
title_zh: 位置嵌入学到什么？预训练语言模型位置编码的实证研究
abstract: In recent years, pre-trained Transformers have dominated the majority of NLP benchmark tasks. Many variants of pre-trained Transformers have kept breaking out, and most focus on designing different pre-training objectives or variants of self-attention. Embedding the position information in the self-attention mechanism is also an indispensable factor in Transformers however is often discussed at will. Therefore, this paper carries out an empirical study on position embeddings of mainstream pre-trained Transformers, which mainly focuses on two questions: 1) Do position embeddings really learn the meaning of positions? 2) How do these different learned position embeddings affect Transformers for NLP tasks? This paper focuses on providing a new insight of pre-trained position embeddings through feature-level analysis and empirical experiments on most of iconic NLP tasks. It is believed that our experimental results can guide the future work to choose the suitable positional encoding function for specific tasks given the application property.
summary: In recent years, pre-trained Transformers have dominated the majority of NLP benchmark tasks. Many variants of pre-trained Transformers have kept breaking out, and most focus on designing different pre-training objectives or variants of self-attention. Embedding the position information in the self-attention mechanism is also an indispensable factor in Transformers however is often discussed at will. Therefore, this paper carries out an empirical study on position embeddings of mainstream pre-trained Transformers, which mainly focuses on two questions: 1) Do position embeddings really learn the meaning of positions? 2) How do these different learned position embeddings affect Transformers for NLP tasks? This paper focuses on providing a new insight of pre-trained position embeddings through feature-level analysis and empirical experiments on most of iconic NLP tasks. It is believed that our experimental results can guide the future work to choose the suitable positional encoding function for specific tasks given the application property.
abstract_zh: 近年来，预训练的 Transformer 主导了大多数 NLP 基准任务。预训练 Transformer 的许多变体不断涌现，大多数都专注于设计不同的预训练目标或自注意力的变体。在自注意力机制中嵌入位置信息也是 Transformers 中不可或缺的因素，但经常被随意讨论。因此，本文对主流预训练 Transformer 的位置嵌入进行实证研究，主要关注两个问题：1）位置嵌入真的学到了位置的含义吗？ 2）这些不同的学习位置嵌入如何影响 NLP 任务的 Transformer？本文重点通过对大多数标志性 NLP 任务进行特征级分析和实证实验，提供对预训练位置嵌入的新见解。相信我们的实验结果可以指导未来的工作，根据应用属性为特定任务选择合适的位置编码函数。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究分析主流预训练Transformer模型的位置嵌入机制，探讨其是否学习到位置语义及其对NLP任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管位置嵌入是Transformer模型的关键组成部分，但其实际学习到的位置信息及对任务的影响尚未被系统研究，亟需通过实证分析提供新见解。
AI.method: 通过对主流预训练模型的位置嵌入进行特征级分析，并在多个经典NLP任务上开展实验，验证不同位置编码对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明位置嵌入确实学习到位置相关语义，且不同编码方式对任务表现有显著影响，揭示了位置信息与模型性能之间的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为不同应用场景选择合适的位置编码函数提供了指导，未来工作可基于具体任务特性优化位置嵌入设计。

Therefore, this paper carries out an empirical study on position embeddings of mainstream pre-trained Transformers, which mainly focuses on two questions: 1) Do position embeddings really learn the meaning of positions? 2) How do these different learned position embeddings affect Transformers for NLP tasks? This paper focuses on providing a new insight of pre-trained position embeddings through feature-level analysis and empirical experiments on most of iconic NLP tasks. It is believed that our experimental results can guide the future work to choose the suitable positional encoding function for specific tasks given the application property. 近年来，预训练的 Transformer 主导了大多数 NLP 基准任务。预训练 Transformer 的许多变体不断涌现，大多数都专注于设计不同的预训练目标或自注意力的变体。在自注意力机制中嵌入位置信息也是 Transformers 中不可或缺的因素，但经常被随意讨论。因此，本文对主流预训练 Transformer 的位置嵌入进行实证研究，主要关注两个问题：1）位置嵌入真的学到了位置的含义吗？ 2）这些不同的学习位置嵌入如何影响 NLP 任务的 Transformer？本文重点通过对大多数标志性 NLP 任务进行特征级分析和实证实验，提供对预训练位置嵌入的新见解。相信我们的实验结果可以指导未来的工作，根据应用属性为特定任务选择合适的位置编码函数。 本文通过实证研究分析主流预训练Transformer模型的位置嵌入机制，探讨其是否学习到位置语义及其对NLP任务的影响。 Yu-An Wang,Yun-Nung Chen cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Toward Micro-Dialect Identification in Diaglossic and Code-Switched Environments
title_zh: 在诊断和语码转换环境中实现微方言识别
abstract: Although the prediction of dialects is an important language processing task, with a wide range of applications, existing work is largely limited to coarse-grained varieties. Inspired by geolocation research, we propose the novel task of Micro-Dialect Identification (MDI) and introduce MARBERT, a new language model with striking abilities to predict a fine-grained variety (as small as that of a city) given a single, short message. For modeling, we offer a range of novel spatially and linguistically-motivated multi-task learning models. To showcase the utility of our models, we introduce a new, large-scale dataset of Arabic micro-varieties (low-resource) suited to our tasks. MARBERT predicts micro-dialects with 9.9% F1, ~76X better than a majority class baseline. Our new language model also establishes new state-of-the-art on several external tasks.
summary: Although the prediction of dialects is an important language processing task, with a wide range of applications, existing work is largely limited to coarse-grained varieties. Inspired by geolocation research, we propose the novel task of Micro-Dialect Identification (MDI) and introduce MARBERT, a new language model with striking abilities to predict a fine-grained variety (as small as that of a city) given a single, short message. For modeling, we offer a range of novel spatially and linguistically-motivated multi-task learning models. To showcase the utility of our models, we introduce a new, large-scale dataset of Arabic micro-varieties (low-resource) suited to our tasks. MARBERT predicts micro-dialects with 9.9% F1, ~76X better than a majority class baseline. Our new language model also establishes new state-of-the-art on several external tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管方言预测是一项重要的语言处理任务，具有广泛的应用范围，但现有的工作很大程度上仅限于粗粒度的变体。受地理定位研究的启发，我们提出了微方言识别（MDI）的新任务，并引入了 MARBERT，这是一种新的语言模型，具有惊人的能力，可以在给定单个短消息的情况下预测细粒度的变体（小至城市的变体）。对于建模，我们提供了一系列新颖的空间和语言驱动的多任务学习模型。为了展示我们模型的实用性，我们引入了适合我们任务的新的大规模阿拉伯微品种（低资源）数据集。 MARBERT 预测微方言的 F1 为 9.9%，比多数类别基线好约 76 倍。我们的新语言模型还在几个外部任务上建立了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出微方言识别（MDI）任务，旨在通过短消息预测细粒度方言（如城市级别），并开发了MARBERT模型以应对语码转换环境。
AI.motivation: 现有方言识别研究局限于粗粒度方言，无法满足实际需求。受地理定位研究启发，需开发能处理细粒度方言及语码转换场景的模型。
AI.method: 提出MARBERT语言模型，结合空间与语言学驱动的多任务学习框架，并构建阿拉伯语微方言大规模低资源数据集。
AI.result: MARBERT在微方言识别任务上达到9.9% F1分数（较基线提升76倍），并在多个外部任务上取得新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: MARBERT有效解决了微方言识别难题，验证了空间-语言学多任务学习的可行性，同时为低资源方言研究提供了新数据集。

authors_text: Sarah Al-Hussaini,Shantanu Thakar,Hyojeong Kim,Pradeep Rajendran,Brual C. Shah,Jeremy A. Marvel,Satyandra K. Gupta
title: Human-Supervised Semi-Autonomous Mobile Manipulators for Safely and Efficiently Executing Machine Tending Tasks
title_zh: 人工监督的半自主移动机械手，用于安全高效地执行机器管理任务
abstract: Mobile manipulators can be used for machine tending and material handling tasks in small volume manufacturing applications. These applications usually have semi-structured work environment. The use of a fully autonomous mobile manipulator for such applications can be risky, as an inaccurate model of the workspace may result in damage to expensive equipment. On the other hand, the use of a fully teleoperated mobile manipulator may require a significant amount of operator time. In this paper, a semi-autonomous mobile manipulator is developed for safely and efficiently carrying out machine tending tasks under human supervision. The robot is capable of generating motion plans from the high-level task description and presenting simulation results to the human for approval. The human operator can authorize the robot to execute the automatically generated plan or provide additional input to the planner to refine the plan. If the level of uncertainty in some parts of the workspace model is high, then the human can decide to perform teleoperation to safely execute the task. Our preliminary user trials show that non-expert operators can quickly learn to use the system and perform machine tending tasks.
summary: Mobile manipulators can be used for machine tending and material handling tasks in small volume manufacturing applications. These applications usually have semi-structured work environment. The use of a fully autonomous mobile manipulator for such applications can be risky, as an inaccurate model of the workspace may result in damage to expensive equipment. On the other hand, the use of a fully teleoperated mobile manipulator may require a significant amount of operator time. In this paper, a semi-autonomous mobile manipulator is developed for safely and efficiently carrying out machine tending tasks under human supervision. The robot is capable of generating motion plans from the high-level task description and presenting simulation results to the human for approval. The human operator can authorize the robot to execute the automatically generated plan or provide additional input to the planner to refine the plan. If the level of uncertainty in some parts of the workspace model is high, then the human can decide to perform teleoperation to safely execute the task. Our preliminary user trials show that non-expert operators can quickly learn to use the system and perform machine tending tasks.
abstract_zh: 移动机械手可用于小批量制造应用中的机器维护和物料搬运任务。这些应用程序通常具有半结构化的工作环境。在此类应用中使用完全自主的移动机械手可能存在风险，因为工作空间的不准确模型可能会导致昂贵设备的损坏。另一方面，使用完全远程操作的移动机械手可能需要大量的操作时间。本文开发了一种半自主移动机械手，用于在人类监督下安全有效地执行机器维护任务。机器人能够根据高级任务描述生成运动计划，并将模拟结果呈现给人类批准。人类操作员可以授权机器人执行自动生成的计划或向计划者提供额外的输入以完善计划。如果工作空间模型的某些部分的不确定性水平很高，那么人们可以决定执行远程操作以安全地执行任务。我们的初步用户试验表明，非专业操作员可以快速学习使用该系统并执行机器维护任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在人类监督下的半自主移动机械臂系统，用于安全高效地执行机器上料任务。
AI.motivation: 全自主移动机械臂可能因环境模型不准确导致设备损坏，而全远程操作则效率低下，需平衡安全性和效率。
AI.method: 系统通过高阶任务描述生成运动计划并展示模拟结果供人类审批，允许在不确定区域切换至远程操作。
AI.result: 初步用户试验表明非专家操作者能快速掌握系统并完成机器上料任务。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过结合自主规划与人类监督，在半结构化环境中实现了安全高效的机器上料作业。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种在人类监督下的半自主移动机械臂系统，用于安全高效地执行机器上料任务。

Shah,Jeremy A. Marvel,Satyandra K. Gupta cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Ahmad Esmaeili,John C. Gallagher,John A. Springer,Eric T. Matson
title: HAMLET: A Hierarchical Agent-based Machine Learning Platform
title_zh: HAMLET：基于代理的分层机器学习平台
abstract: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Systems provide convenient and relevant ways to analyze, model, and simulate complex systems composed of a large number of entities that interact at different levels of abstraction. In this paper, we introduce HAMLET (Hierarchical Agent-based Machine LEarning plaTform), a hybrid machine learning platform based on hierarchical multi-agent systems, to facilitate the research and democratization of geographically and/or locally distributed machine learning entities. The proposed system models a machine learning solutions as a hypergraph and autonomously sets up a multi-level structure of heterogeneous agents based on their innate capabilities and learned skills. HAMLET aids the design and management of machine learning systems and provides analytical capabilities for research communities to assess the existing and/or new algorithms/datasets through flexible and customizable queries. The proposed hybrid machine learning platform does not assume restrictions on the type of learning algorithms/datasets and is theoretically proven to be sound and complete with polynomial computational requirements. Additionally, it is examined empirically on 120 training and four generalized batch testing tasks performed on 24 machine learning algorithms and 9 standard datasets. The provided experimental results not only establish confidence in the platform's consistency and correctness but also demonstrate its testing and analytical capacity.
summary: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Systems provide convenient and relevant ways to analyze, model, and simulate complex systems composed of a large number of entities that interact at different levels of abstraction. In this paper, we introduce HAMLET (Hierarchical Agent-based Machine LEarning plaTform), a hybrid machine learning platform based on hierarchical multi-agent systems, to facilitate the research and democratization of geographically and/or locally distributed machine learning entities. The proposed system models a machine learning solutions as a hypergraph and autonomously sets up a multi-level structure of heterogeneous agents based on their innate capabilities and learned skills. HAMLET aids the design and management of machine learning systems and provides analytical capabilities for research communities to assess the existing and/or new algorithms/datasets through flexible and customizable queries. The proposed hybrid machine learning platform does not assume restrictions on the type of learning algorithms/datasets and is theoretically proven to be sound and complete with polynomial computational requirements. Additionally, it is examined empirically on 120 training and four generalized batch testing tasks performed on 24 machine learning algorithms and 9 standard datasets. The provided experimental results not only establish confidence in the platform's consistency and correctness but also demonstrate its testing and analytical capacity.
abstract_zh: 分层多代理系统提供了方便且相关的方法来分析、建模和模拟由大量在不同抽象级别交互的实体组成的复杂系统。在本文中，我们介绍了 HAMLET（基于分层代理的机器学习平台），这是一个基于分层多代理系统的混合机器学习平台，以促进地理和/或本地分布式机器学习实体的研究和民主化。所提出的系统将机器学习解决方案建模为超图，并根据异构代理的先天能力和学习技能自主建立异构代理的多级结构。 HAMLET 有助于机器学习系统的设计和管理，并为研究社区提供分析功能，以通过灵活且可定制的查询来评估现有和/或新算法/数据集。所提出的混合机器学习平台不对学习算法/数据集的类型进行限制，并且理论上被证明是合理且完整的，并且满足多项式计算要求。此外，还对 24 种机器学习算法和 9 个标准数据集执行的 120 项训练和 4 项广义批量测试任务进行了实证检验。提供的实验结果不仅建立了对平台一致性和正确性的信心，而且证明了其测试和分析能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAMLET，一个基于分层多智能体系统的混合机器学习平台，用于建模和管理分布式机器学习实体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理地理分布或本地化机器学习实体的复杂交互，需一种灵活且可扩展的平台支持多算法/数据集研究。
AI.method: 将机器学习解决方案建模为超图，通过异构智能体的层级结构自主构建系统，支持无限制的算法和数据集类型，并提供可定制分析查询。
AI.result: 在24种算法和9个标准数据集的120个训练任务及4个测试任务中验证了平台的正确性、一致性及分析能力。

search_text: HAMLET: A Hierarchical Agent-based Machine Learning Platform HAMLET：基于代理的分层机器学习平台 Hierarchical Multi-Agent Systems provide convenient and relevant ways to analyze, model, and simulate complex systems composed of a large number of entities that interact at different levels of abstraction. In this paper, we introduce HAMLET (Hierarchical Agent-based Machine LEarning plaTform), a hybrid machine learning platform based on hierarchical multi-agent systems, to facilitate the research and democratization of geographically and/or locally distributed machine learning entities. The proposed system models a machine learning solutions as a hypergraph and autonomously sets up a multi-level structure of heterogeneous agents based on their innate capabilities and learned skills. HAMLET aids the design and management of machine learning systems and provides analytical capabilities for research communities to assess the existing and/or new algorithms/datasets through flexible and customizable queries. The proposed hybrid machine learning platform does not assume restrictions on the type of learning algorithms/datasets and is theoretically proven to be sound and complete with polynomial computational requirements. Additionally, it is examined empirically on 120 training and four generalized batch testing tasks performed on 24 machine learning algorithms and 9 standard datasets. The provided experimental results not only establish confidence in the platform's consistency and correctness but also demonstrate its testing and analytical capacity. 分层多代理系统提供了方便且相关的方法来分析、建模和模拟由大量在不同抽象级别交互的实体组成的复杂系统。在本文中，我们介绍了 HAMLET（基于分层代理的机器学习平台），这是一个基于分层多代理系统的混合机器学习平台，以促进地理和/或本地分布式机器学习实体的研究和民主化。所提出的系统将机器学习解决方案建模为超图，并根据异构代理的先天能力和学习技能自主建立异构代理的多级结构。 HAMLET 有助于机器学习系统的设计和管理，并为研究社区提供分析功能，以通过灵活且可定制的查询来评估现有和/或新算法/数据集。所提出的混合机器学习平台不对学习算法/数据集的类型进行限制，并且理论上被证明是合理且完整的，并且满足多项式计算要求。此外，还对 24 种机器学习算法和 9 个标准数据集执行的 120 项训练和 4 项广义批量测试任务进行了实证检验。提供的实验结果不仅建立了对平台一致性和正确性的信心，而且证明了其测试和分析能力。 本文提出HAMLET，一个基于分层多智能体系统的混合机器学习平台，用于建模和管理分布式机器学习实体。 Ahmad Esmaeili,John C. Gallagher,John A. Springer,Eric T. Matson cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Soufiane Belharbi,Ismail Ben Ayed,Luke McCaffrey,Eric Granger
title: Deep Active Learning for Joint Classification & Segmentation with Weak Annotator
title_zh: 使用弱注释器进行联合分类和分割的深度主动学习
abstract: CNN visualization and interpretation methods, like class-activation maps (CAMs), are typically used to highlight the image regions linked to class predictions. These models allow to simultaneously classify images and extract class-dependent saliency maps, without the need for costly pixel-level annotations. However, they typically yield segmentations with high false-positive rates and, therefore, coarse visualisations, more so when processing challenging images, as encountered in histology. To mitigate this issue, we propose an active learning (AL) framework, which progressively integrates pixel-level annotations during training. Given training data with global image-level labels, our deep weakly-supervised learning model jointly performs supervised image-level classification and active learning for segmentation, integrating pixel annotations by an oracle. Unlike standard AL methods that focus on sample selection, we also leverage large numbers of unlabeled images via pseudo-segmentations (i.e., self-learning at the pixel level), and integrate them with the oracle-annotated samples during training. We report extensive experiments over two challenging benchmarks -- high-resolution medical images (histology GlaS data for colon cancer) and natural images (CUB-200-2011 for bird species). Our results indicate that, by simply using random sample selection, the proposed approach can significantly outperform state-of the-art CAMs and AL methods, with an identical oracle-supervision budget. Our code is publicly available.
summary: CNN visualization and interpretation methods, like class-activation maps (CAMs), are typically used to highlight the image regions linked to class predictions. These models allow to simultaneously classify images and extract class-dependent saliency maps, without the need for costly pixel-level annotations. However, they typically yield segmentations with high false-positive rates and, therefore, coarse visualisations, more so when processing challenging images, as encountered in histology. To mitigate this issue, we propose an active learning (AL) framework, which progressively integrates pixel-level annotations during training. Given training data with global image-level labels, our deep weakly-supervised learning model jointly performs supervised image-level classification and active learning for segmentation, integrating pixel annotations by an oracle. Unlike standard AL methods that focus on sample selection, we also leverage large numbers of unlabeled images via pseudo-segmentations (i.e., self-learning at the pixel level), and integrate them with the oracle-annotated samples during training. We report extensive experiments over two challenging benchmarks -- high-resolution medical images (histology GlaS data for colon cancer) and natural images (CUB-200-2011 for bird species). Our results indicate that, by simply using random sample selection, the proposed approach can significantly outperform state-of the-art CAMs and AL methods, with an identical oracle-supervision budget. Our code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: CNN 可视化和解释方法，例如类激活图 (CAM)，通常用于突出显示与类预测相关的图像区域。这些模型允许同时对图像进行分类并提取与类相关的显着图，而不需要昂贵的像素级注释。然而，它们通常会产生假阳性率较高的分割，因此可视化效果很粗糙，在处理组织学中遇到的具有挑战性的图像时更是如此。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个主动学习（AL）框架，该框架在训练期间逐步集成像素级注释。给定具有全局图像级标签的训练数据，我们的深度弱监督学习模型联合执行监督图像级分类和主动学习进行分割，并通过预言机集成像素注释。与专注于样本选择的标准 AL 方法不同，我们还通过伪分割（即像素级别的自学习）利用大量未标记的图像，并在训练期间将它们与预言机注释的样本集成。我们报告了针对两个具有挑战性的基准的大量实验——高分辨率医学图像（结肠癌的组织学 GlaS 数据）和自然图像（鸟类的 CUB-200-2011）。我们的结果表明，通过简单地使用随机样本选择，所提出的方法可以在相同的预言机监督预算下显着优于最先进的 CAM 和 AL 方法。我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度主动学习框架，结合弱标注与像素级注释，实现图像分类与分割的联合优化。
AI.motivation: 现有基于类激活图（CAM）的方法在分割任务中存在高误检率问题，尤其在医学图像等复杂场景下表现不足，需减少对昂贵像素级标注的依赖。
AI.method: 设计主动学习框架，在训练过程中逐步引入像素级注释，结合全局图像标签与伪分割（自学习生成）及人工标注样本，实现分类与分割联合训练。
AI.result: 在高分辨率医学图像（GlaS数据集）和自然图像（CUB-200-2011）基准测试中，仅使用随机样本选择即可超越现有CAM和主动学习方法，且标注预算相同。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过主动学习与伪分割有效提升分割精度，减少对人工标注的依赖，在复杂场景下具有显著优势。

authors_text: Mengyao Li,Areen Alsaid,Sofia I. Noejovich,Ernest V. Cross,John D. Lee
title: Towards a Conversational Measure of Trust
title_zh: 迈向对话式信任衡量标准
abstract: The increasingly collaborative decision-making process between humans and agents demands a comprehensive, continuous, and unobtrusive measure of trust in agents. The gold standard format for measuring trust, a Likert-style survey, suffers from major limitations in dynamic human-agent interactions. We proposed a new approach to evaluate trust in a nondirective and relational conversation. The term nondirective refers to abstract word selections in open-ended prompts, which can probe respondents to freely describe their attitudes. The term relational refers to interactive conversations where respondents can clarify their responses in followup questions. We propose a systematic process for generating nondirective trust-based prompts by using text analysis from previously validated trust scales. This nondirective and relational approach provides a complementary trust measurement, which can unobtrusively elicit rich and dynamic information on situational trust throughout a human-agent interaction.
summary: The increasingly collaborative decision-making process between humans and agents demands a comprehensive, continuous, and unobtrusive measure of trust in agents. The gold standard format for measuring trust, a Likert-style survey, suffers from major limitations in dynamic human-agent interactions. We proposed a new approach to evaluate trust in a nondirective and relational conversation. The term nondirective refers to abstract word selections in open-ended prompts, which can probe respondents to freely describe their attitudes. The term relational refers to interactive conversations where respondents can clarify their responses in followup questions. We propose a systematic process for generating nondirective trust-based prompts by using text analysis from previously validated trust scales. This nondirective and relational approach provides a complementary trust measurement, which can unobtrusively elicit rich and dynamic information on situational trust throughout a human-agent interaction.
abstract_zh: 人类和智能体之间日益协作的决策过程需要对智能体进行全面、连续且不引人注目的信任衡量。衡量信任的黄金标准格式（李克特式调查）在动态人机交互中受到重大限制。我们提出了一种新方法来评估非指导性和关系性对话中的信任。非指导性一词是指开放式提示中的抽象词语选择，可以引导受访者自由地描述他们的态度。术语“关系”是指互动对话，受访者可以在后续问题中澄清他们的回答。我们提出了一个系统化的过程，通过使用先前验证的信任量表的文本分析来生成非指导性的基于信任的提示。这种非指导性和关系性方法提供了一种互补的信任测量，可以在整个人与代理交互过程中不引人注意地获取有关情境信任的丰富且动态的信息。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于对话的非指导性、关系性信任度量方法，以动态评估人与智能体互动中的信任。
AI.motivation: 传统信任测量方法（如李克特量表）无法有效捕捉动态人机互动中的信任变化，需更自然、持续的评估方式。
AI.method: 通过文本分析生成非指导性开放问题，结合互动对话澄清回答，构建动态信任评估框架。
AI.result: 成功开发出能动态、非侵入式获取人与智能体互动中信任信息的对话式评估方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为信任评估提供了新途径，可有效补充传统问卷的不足，适用于动态人机协作场景。

The term relational refers to interactive conversations where respondents can clarify their responses in followup questions. We propose a systematic process for generating nondirective trust-based prompts by using text analysis from previously validated trust scales. This nondirective and relational approach provides a complementary trust measurement, which can unobtrusively elicit rich and dynamic information on situational trust throughout a human-agent interaction. 人类和智能体之间日益协作的决策过程需要对智能体进行全面、连续且不引人注目的信任衡量。衡量信任的黄金标准格式（李克特式调查）在动态人机交互中受到重大限制。我们提出了一种新方法来评估非指导性和关系性对话中的信任。非指导性一词是指开放式提示中的抽象词语选择，可以引导受访者自由地描述他们的态度。术语“关系”是指互动对话，受访者可以在后续问题中澄清他们的回答。我们提出了一个系统化的过程，通过使用先前验证的信任量表的文本分析来生成非指导性的基于信任的提示。这种非指导性和关系性方法提供了一种互补的信任测量，可以在整个人与代理交互过程中不引人注意地获取有关情境信任的丰富且动态的信息。 开发一种基于对话的非指导性、关系性信任度量方法，以动态评估人与智能体互动中的信任。 Mengyao Li,Areen Alsaid,Sofia I. Noejovich,Ernest V. Cross,John D. Lee cs.HC

title: Truck-and-Trailer Backer-Upper problem using Cascaded Fuzzy Controllers
title_zh: 使用级联模糊控制器的卡车和拖车支撑上问题
abstract: In this paper we craft a cascaded fuzzy controlling system for the traditional Truck-and-Trailer Backer-Upper problem, which is a benchmarking for testing various intelligent controlling systems. Inspired by the most inclination of human operations, we decompose the original overall controlling problem into two sub-controlling problems. A first fuzzy controller which predicts the optimal deviation of the trailer leading to a most potential successful docking is designed based on previous work of other scholars, then a second fuzzy controller which maximizes such a potentiality is applied to the truck in an intuitive manner. The final simulation and results not only demonstrate the practicability of the approach proposed in this paper, but also exhibits the dramatic simplicity compared with previous work which try to optimize the system from overall perspective.
summary: In this paper we craft a cascaded fuzzy controlling system for the traditional Truck-and-Trailer Backer-Upper problem, which is a benchmarking for testing various intelligent controlling systems. Inspired by the most inclination of human operations, we decompose the original overall controlling problem into two sub-controlling problems. A first fuzzy controller which predicts the optimal deviation of the trailer leading to a most potential successful docking is designed based on previous work of other scholars, then a second fuzzy controller which maximizes such a potentiality is applied to the truck in an intuitive manner. The final simulation and results not only demonstrate the practicability of the approach proposed in this paper, but also exhibits the dramatic simplicity compared with previous work which try to optimize the system from overall perspective.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们针对传统的卡车和拖车 Backer-Upper 问题设计了一个级联模糊控制系统，这是测试各种智能控制系统的基准。受到人类操作最倾向性的启发，我们将原来的总体控制问题分解为两个子控制问题。基于其他学者之前的工作，设计了第一个模糊控制器，它预测拖车最有可能成功对接的最佳偏差，然后将第二个模糊控制器最大化这种潜力，以直观的方式应用于卡车。最终的仿真和结果不仅证明了本文提出的方法的实用性，而且与之前尝试从整体角度优化系统的工作相比，也表现出极大的简单性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种级联模糊控制系统以解决传统卡车与拖车倒车对接问题，并通过分解控制任务提升系统性能。
AI.motivation: 传统整体优化方法复杂度高，而人类操作倾向于分步决策，因此需通过分解问题简化控制逻辑。
AI.method: 将整体控制分解为两个子问题：第一级模糊控制器预测拖车最优偏差，第二级模糊控制器优化卡车操作以最大化对接成功率。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该方法的可行性，相较于整体优化方法具有显著简化优势。
AI.conclusion: 级联模糊控制器通过任务分解有效解决了倒车对接问题，为智能控制系统设计提供了更简洁的解决方案。

authors_text: Xinyin Ma,Yongliang Shen,Gongfan Fang,Chen Chen,Chenghao Jia,Weiming Lu
title: Adversarial Self-Supervised Data-Free Distillation for Text Classification
title_zh: 用于文本分类的对抗性自监督无数据蒸馏
abstract: Large pre-trained transformer-based language models have achieved impressive results on a wide range of NLP tasks. In the past few years, Knowledge Distillation(KD) has become a popular paradigm to compress a computationally expensive model to a resource-efficient lightweight model. However, most KD algorithms, especially in NLP, rely on the accessibility of the original training dataset, which may be unavailable due to privacy issues. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel two-stage data-free distillation method, named Adversarial self-Supervised Data-Free Distillation (AS-DFD), which is designed for compressing large-scale transformer-based models (e.g., BERT). To avoid text generation in discrete space, we introduce a Plug & Play Embedding Guessing method to craft pseudo embeddings from the teacher's hidden knowledge. Meanwhile, with a self-supervised module to quantify the student's ability, we adapt the difficulty of pseudo embeddings in an adversarial training manner. To the best of our knowledge, our framework is the first data-free distillation framework designed for NLP tasks. We verify the effectiveness of our method on several text classification datasets.
summary: Large pre-trained transformer-based language models have achieved impressive results on a wide range of NLP tasks. In the past few years, Knowledge Distillation(KD) has become a popular paradigm to compress a computationally expensive model to a resource-efficient lightweight model. However, most KD algorithms, especially in NLP, rely on the accessibility of the original training dataset, which may be unavailable due to privacy issues. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel two-stage data-free distillation method, named Adversarial self-Supervised Data-Free Distillation (AS-DFD), which is designed for compressing large-scale transformer-based models (e.g., BERT). To avoid text generation in discrete space, we introduce a Plug & Play Embedding Guessing method to craft pseudo embeddings from the teacher's hidden knowledge. Meanwhile, with a self-supervised module to quantify the student's ability, we adapt the difficulty of pseudo embeddings in an adversarial training manner. To the best of our knowledge, our framework is the first data-free distillation framework designed for NLP tasks. We verify the effectiveness of our method on several text classification datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的大型预训练语言模型在各种 NLP 任务上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。在过去的几年中，知识蒸馏（KD）已成为一种流行的范例，用于将计算量大的模型压缩为资源高效的轻量级模型。然而，大多数 KD 算法，尤其是 NLP 中的算法，都依赖于原始训练数据集的可访问性，而由于隐私问题，原始训练数据集可能不可用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段无数据蒸馏方法，称为对抗性自监督无数据蒸馏（AS-DFD），该方法旨在压缩基于大规模 Transformer 的模型（例如 BERT）。为了避免在离散空间中生成文本，我们引入了一种即插即用嵌入猜测方法，根据教师的隐藏知识制作伪嵌入。同时，通过自我监督模块来量化学生的能力，我们以对抗性训练的方式适应伪嵌入的难度。据我们所知，我们的框架是第一个专为 NLP 任务设计的无数据蒸馏框架。我们在几个文本分类数据集上验证了我们的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需原始训练数据的对抗自监督知识蒸馏方法（AS-DFD），用于压缩大型文本分类模型。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏依赖原始训练数据，但隐私问题常导致数据不可用，需开发无需数据的蒸馏框架。
AI.method: 设计两阶段数据-free蒸馏框架：通过嵌入猜测生成伪嵌入，并利用自监督模块以对抗训练方式调整伪嵌入难度。
AI.result: 在多个文本分类数据集上验证了AS-DFD的有效性，证明其可有效压缩BERT等大模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出适用于NLP任务的数据-free蒸馏框架，解决了训练数据不可用时的模型压缩难题。

In the past few years, Knowledge Distillation(KD) has become a popular paradigm to compress a computationally expensive model to a resource-efficient lightweight model. However, most KD algorithms, especially in NLP, rely on the accessibility of the original training dataset, which may be unavailable due to privacy issues. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel two-stage data-free distillation method, named Adversarial self-Supervised Data-Free Distillation (AS-DFD), which is designed for compressing large-scale transformer-based models (e.g., BERT).
