title: Designing for Recommending Intermediate States in A Scientific Workflow Management System
title_zh: 科学工作流程管理系统中推荐中间状态的设计
comment: Preprint, 13th Engineering Interactive Computing Systems (EICS) conference
comments: Preprint, 13th Engineering Interactive Computing Systems (EICS) conference
abstract: To process a large amount of data sequentially and systematically, proper management of workflow components (i.e., modules, data, configurations, associations among ports and links) in a Scientific Workflow Management System (SWfMS) is inevitable. Managing data with provenance in a SWfMS to support reusability of workflows, modules, and data is not a simple task. Handling such components is even more burdensome for frequently assembled and executed complex workflows for investigating large datasets with different technologies (i.e., various learning algorithms or models). However, a great many studies propose various techniques and technologies for managing and recommending services in a SWfMS, but only a very few studies consider the management of data in a SWfMS for efficient storing and facilitating workflow executions. Furthermore, there is no study to inquire about the effectiveness and efficiency of such data management in a SWfMS from a user perspective. In this paper, we present and evaluate a GUI version of such a novel approach of intermediate data management with two use cases (Plant Phenotyping and Bioinformatics). The technique we call GUI-RISPTS (Recommending Intermediate States from Pipelines Considering Tool-States) can facilitate executions of workflows with processed data (i.e., intermediate outcomes of modules in a workflow) and can thus reduce the computational time of some modules in a SWfMS. We integrated GUI-RISPTS with an existing workflow management system called SciWorCS. In SciWorCS, we present an interface that users use for selecting the recommendation of intermediate states (i.e., modules' outcomes). We investigated GUI-RISP's effectiveness from users' perspectives along with measuring its overhead in terms of storage and efficiency in workflow execution.
summary: To process a large amount of data sequentially and systematically, proper management of workflow components (i.e., modules, data, configurations, associations among ports and links) in a Scientific Workflow Management System (SWfMS) is inevitable. Managing data with provenance in a SWfMS to support reusability of workflows, modules, and data is not a simple task. Handling such components is even more burdensome for frequently assembled and executed complex workflows for investigating large datasets with different technologies (i.e., various learning algorithms or models). However, a great many studies propose various techniques and technologies for managing and recommending services in a SWfMS, but only a very few studies consider the management of data in a SWfMS for efficient storing and facilitating workflow executions. Furthermore, there is no study to inquire about the effectiveness and efficiency of such data management in a SWfMS from a user perspective. In this paper, we present and evaluate a GUI version of such a novel approach of intermediate data management with two use cases (Plant Phenotyping and Bioinformatics). The technique we call GUI-RISPTS (Recommending Intermediate States from Pipelines Considering Tool-States) can facilitate executions of workflows with processed data (i.e., intermediate outcomes of modules in a workflow) and can thus reduce the computational time of some modules in a SWfMS. We integrated GUI-RISPTS with an existing workflow management system called SciWorCS. In SciWorCS, we present an interface that users use for selecting the recommendation of intermediate states (i.e., modules' outcomes). We investigated GUI-RISP's effectiveness from users' perspectives along with measuring its overhead in terms of storage and efficiency in workflow execution.
abstract_zh: 为了顺序、系统地处理大量数据，科学工作流管理系统（SWfMS）中的工作流组件（即模块、数据、配置、端口和链路之间的关联）的正确管理是不可避免的。在 SWfMS 中管理具有来源的数据以支持工作流程、模块和数据的可重用性并不是一项简单的任务。对于使用不同技术（即各种学习算法或模型）研究大型数据集的频繁组装和执行的复杂工作流程来说，处理此类组件甚至更加繁重。然而，大量研究提出了用于管理和推荐SWfMS中的服务的各种技巧和技术，但只有极少数研究考虑SWfMS中的数据管理以高效存储和促进工作流执行。此外，还没有研究从用户角度探讨 SWfMS 中此类数据管理的有效性和效率。在本文中，我们通过两个用例（植物表型分析和生物信息学）提出并评估了这种新颖的中间数据管理方法的 GUI 版本。我们称之为 GUI-RISPTS（考虑工具状态的管道推荐中间状态）的技术可以促进使用已处理数据（即工作流程中模块的中间结果）执行工作流程，从而可以减少 SWfMS 中某些模块的计算时间。我们将 GUI-RISPTS 与名为 SciWorCS 的现有工作流程管理系统集成。在 SciWorCS 中，我们提供了一个界面，用户可以使用该界面来选择中间状态的推荐（即模块的结果）。我们从用户的角度研究了 GUI-RISP 的有效性，并测量了其在存储和工作流执行效率方面的开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GUI-RISPTS的新方法，用于在科学工作流管理系统中推荐中间状态，以优化数据管理并减少计算时间。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注服务管理，而忽视了科学工作流中数据管理的效率和用户视角的评估，导致复杂工作流执行效率低下。
AI.method: 开发GUI-RISPTS技术并集成到SciWorCS系统中，通过用户界面推荐模块中间状态，结合植物表型和生物信息学两个案例进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明GUI-RISPTS能有效减少模块计算时间，同时评估了存储开销和工作流执行效率。

search_text: Designing for Recommending Intermediate States in A Scientific Workflow Management System 科学工作流程管理系统中推荐中间状态的设计 To process a large amount of data sequentially and systematically, proper management of workflow components (i.e., modules, data, configurations, associations among ports and links) in a Scientific Workflow Management System (SWfMS) is inevitable. Managing data with provenance in a SWfMS to support reusability of workflows, modules, and data is not a simple task. Handling such components is even more burdensome for frequently assembled and executed complex workflows for investigating large datasets with different technologies (i.e., various learning algorithms or models). However, a great many studies propose various techniques and technologies for managing and recommending services in a SWfMS, but only a very few studies consider the management of data in a SWfMS for efficient storing and facilitating workflow executions. Furthermore, there is no study to inquire about the effectiveness and efficiency of such data management in a SWfMS from a user perspective. In this paper, we present and evaluate a GUI version of such a novel approach of intermediate data management with two use cases (Plant Phenotyping and Bioinformatics). The technique we call GUI-RISPTS (Recommending Intermediate States from Pipelines Considering Tool-States) can facilitate executions of workflows with processed data (i.e., intermediate outcomes of modules in a workflow) and can thus reduce the computational time of some modules in a SWfMS. We integrated GUI-RISPTS with an existing workflow management system called SciWorCS. In SciWorCS, we present an interface that users use for selecting the recommendation of intermediate states (i.e., modules' outcomes). We investigated GUI-RISP's effectiveness from users' perspectives along with measuring its overhead in terms of storage and efficiency in workflow execution. 为了顺序、系统地处理大量数据，科学工作流管理系统（SWfMS）中的工作流组件（即模块、数据、配置、端口和链路之间的关联）的正确管理是不可避免的。在 SWfMS 中管理具有来源的数据以支持工作流程、模块和数据的可重用性并不是一项简单的任务。对于使用不同技术（即各种学习算法或模型）研究大型数据集的频繁组装和执行的复杂工作流程来说，处理此类组件甚至更加繁重。然而，大量研究提出了用于管理和推荐SWfMS中的服务的各种技巧和技术，但只有极少数研究考虑SWfMS中的数据管理以高效存储和促进工作流执行。此外，还没有研究从用户角度探讨 SWfMS 中此类数据管理的有效性和效率。在本文中，我们通过两个用例（植物表型分析和生物信息学）提出并评估了这种新颖的中间数据管理方法的 GUI 版本。我们称之为 GUI-RISPTS（考虑工具状态的管道推荐中间状态）的技术可以促进使用已处理数据（即工作流程中模块的中间结果）执行工作流程，从而可以减少 SWfMS 中某些模块的计算时间。我们将 GUI-RISPTS 与名为 SciWorCS 的现有工作流程管理系统集成。在 SciWorCS 中，我们提供了一个界面，用户可以使用该界面来选择中间状态的推荐（即模块的结果）。我们从用户的角度研究了 GUI-RISP 的有效性，并测量了其在存储和工作流执行效率方面的开销。 本文提出了一种名为GUI-RISPTS的新方法，用于在科学工作流管理系统中推荐中间状态，以优化数据管理并减少计算时间。 Debasish Chakroborti,Banani Roy,Sristy Sumana Nath cs.IR,cs.HC

authors_text: Wenxiao Wang,Minghao Chen,Shuai Zhao,Long Chen,Jinming Hu,Haifeng Liu,Deng Cai,Xiaofei He,Wei Liu
title: Accelerate CNNs from Three Dimensions: A Comprehensive Pruning Framework
title_zh: 从三个维度加速 CNN：综合剪枝框架
abstract: Most neural network pruning methods, such as filter-level and layer-level prunings, prune the network model along one dimension (depth, width, or resolution) solely to meet a computational budget. However, such a pruning policy often leads to excessive reduction of that dimension, thus inducing a huge accuracy loss. To alleviate this issue, we argue that pruning should be conducted along three dimensions comprehensively. For this purpose, our pruning framework formulates pruning as an optimization problem. Specifically, it first casts the relationships between a certain model's accuracy and depth/width/resolution into a polynomial regression and then maximizes the polynomial to acquire the optimal values for the three dimensions. Finally, the model is pruned along the three optimal dimensions accordingly. In this framework, since collecting too much data for training the regression is very time-costly, we propose two approaches to lower the cost: 1) specializing the polynomial to ensure an accurate regression even with less training data; 2) employing iterative pruning and fine-tuning to collect the data faster. Extensive experiments show that our proposed algorithm surpasses state-of-the-art pruning algorithms and even neural architecture search-based algorithms.
summary: Most neural network pruning methods, such as filter-level and layer-level prunings, prune the network model along one dimension (depth, width, or resolution) solely to meet a computational budget. However, such a pruning policy often leads to excessive reduction of that dimension, thus inducing a huge accuracy loss. To alleviate this issue, we argue that pruning should be conducted along three dimensions comprehensively. For this purpose, our pruning framework formulates pruning as an optimization problem. Specifically, it first casts the relationships between a certain model's accuracy and depth/width/resolution into a polynomial regression and then maximizes the polynomial to acquire the optimal values for the three dimensions. Finally, the model is pruned along the three optimal dimensions accordingly. In this framework, since collecting too much data for training the regression is very time-costly, we propose two approaches to lower the cost: 1) specializing the polynomial to ensure an accurate regression even with less training data; 2) employing iterative pruning and fine-tuning to collect the data faster. Extensive experiments show that our proposed algorithm surpasses state-of-the-art pruning algorithms and even neural architecture search-based algorithms.
abstract_zh: 大多数神经网络修剪方法（例如滤波器级和层级修剪）仅沿一维（深度、宽度或分辨率）修剪网络模型以满足计算预算。然而，这样的剪枝策略往往会导致维度的过度减少，从而导致巨大的精度损失。为了缓解这个问题，我们认为修剪应该从三个维度综合进行。为此，我们的剪枝框架将剪枝制定为优化问题。具体来说，它首先将某个模型的精度与深度/宽度/分辨率之间的关系转化为多项式回归，然后最大化多项式以获得三个维度的最优值。最后，沿着三个最优维度对模型进行相应的剪枝。在此框架中，由于收集太多数据来训练回归非常耗时，因此我们提出了两种降低成本的方法：1）专门化多项式以确保即使训练数据较少也能实现准确的回归； 2）采用迭代剪枝和微调来更快地收集数据。大量的实验表明，我们提出的算法超越了最先进的剪枝算法，甚至超越了基于神经架构搜索的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种三维全面剪枝框架，通过同时优化深度、宽度和分辨率来加速CNN模型。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法仅沿单一维度（深度、宽度或分辨率）进行剪枝，导致该维度过度缩减并引发精度损失。
AI.method: 将模型精度与三维参数的关系建模为多项式回归，通过最大化多项式获取最优三维参数，并采用专用多项式和迭代剪枝策略降低数据成本。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法优于现有剪枝方法及基于神经架构搜索的算法。
AI.conclusion: 三维联合剪枝框架有效平衡了模型压缩与精度，优于单一维度剪枝策略。

title: Unveiling Class-Labeling Structure for Universal Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 揭开通用域适应的类标签结构
abstract: As a more practical setting for unsupervised domain adaptation, Universal Domain Adaptation (UDA) is recently introduced, where the target label set is unknown. One of the big challenges in UDA is how to determine the common label set shared by source and target domains, as there is simply no labeling available in the target domain. In this paper, we employ a probabilistic approach for locating the common label set, where each source class may come from the common label set with a probability. In particular, we propose a novel approach for evaluating the probability of each source class from the common label set, where this probability is computed by the prediction margin accumulated over the whole target domain. Then, we propose a simple universal adaptation network (S-UAN) by incorporating the probabilistic structure for the common label set. Finally, we analyse the generalization bound focusing on the common label set and explore the properties on the target risk for UDA. Extensive experiments indicate that S-UAN works well in different UDA settings and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by large margins.
summary: As a more practical setting for unsupervised domain adaptation, Universal Domain Adaptation (UDA) is recently introduced, where the target label set is unknown. One of the big challenges in UDA is how to determine the common label set shared by source and target domains, as there is simply no labeling available in the target domain. In this paper, we employ a probabilistic approach for locating the common label set, where each source class may come from the common label set with a probability. In particular, we propose a novel approach for evaluating the probability of each source class from the common label set, where this probability is computed by the prediction margin accumulated over the whole target domain. Then, we propose a simple universal adaptation network (S-UAN) by incorporating the probabilistic structure for the common label set. Finally, we analyse the generalization bound focusing on the common label set and explore the properties on the target risk for UDA. Extensive experiments indicate that S-UAN works well in different UDA settings and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by large margins.
abstract_zh: 作为无监督域适应的更实用的设置，最近引入了通用域适应（UDA），其中目标标签集是未知的。 UDA 的一大挑战是如何确定源域和目标域共享的公共标签集，因为目标域中根本没有可用的标签。在本文中，我们采用概率方法来定位公共标签集，其中每个源类可能以一定的概率来自公共标签集。特别是，我们提出了一种新的方法来评估公共标签集中每个源类的概率，其中该概率是通过整个目标域上累积的预测余量来计算的。然后，我们通过结合公共标签集的概率结构提出了一个简单的通用适应网络（S-UAN）。最后，我们分析了针对公共标签集的泛化界限，并探讨了 UDA 目标风险的属性。大量实验表明，S-UAN 在不同的 UDA 设置中都表现良好，并且大幅优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文针对目标领域标签未知的通用领域自适应（UDA）问题，提出一种概率方法确定源域和目标域共享的公共标签集，并设计简单通用自适应网络（S-UAN）实现跨领域适应。
AI.motivation: 在UDA场景中，目标领域无标签且标签集未知，导致难以确定源域与目标域的公共标签集，成为领域自适应的关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过概率模型计算每个源域类别属于公共标签集的概率，利用目标领域预测结果的边缘累积概率构建S-UAN网络，并分析公共标签集的泛化边界与目标风险特性。
AI.result: 实验表明S-UAN在多种UDA设置下均优于现有最先进方法，显著提升跨领域适应性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了UDA中公共标签集的不确定性问题，为无监督领域自适应提供了新的概率建模视角和网络结构设计思路。

method: 通过概率模型计算每个源域类别属于公共标签集的概率，利用目标领域预测结果的边缘累积概率构建S-UAN网络，并分析公共标签集的泛化边界与目标风险特性。
result: 实验表明S-UAN在多种UDA设置下均优于现有最先进方法，显著提升跨领域适应性能。
conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了UDA中公共标签集的不确定性问题，为无监督领域自适应提供了新的概率建模视角和网络结构设计思路。
search_text: Unveiling Class-Labeling Structure for Universal Domain Adaptation 揭开通用域适应的类标签结构 As a more practical setting for unsupervised domain adaptation, Universal Domain Adaptation (UDA) is recently introduced, where the target label set is unknown. One of the big challenges in UDA is how to determine the common label set shared by source and target domains, as there is simply no labeling available in the target domain. In this paper, we employ a probabilistic approach for locating the common label set, where each source class may come from the common label set with a probability. In particular, we propose a novel approach for evaluating the probability of each source class from the common label set, where this probability is computed by the prediction margin accumulated over the whole target domain. Then, we propose a simple universal adaptation network (S-UAN) by incorporating the probabilistic structure for the common label set. Finally, we analyse the generalization bound focusing on the common label set and explore the properties on the target risk for UDA. Extensive experiments indicate that S-UAN works well in different UDA settings and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by large margins. 作为无监督域适应的更实用的设置，最近引入了通用域适应（UDA），其中目标标签集是未知的。 UDA 的一大挑战是如何确定源域和目标域共享的公共标签集，因为目标域中根本没有可用的标签。在本文中，我们采用概率方法来定位公共标签集，其中每个源类可能以一定的概率来自公共标签集。特别是，我们提出了一种新的方法来评估公共标签集中每个源类的概率，其中该概率是通过整个目标域上累积的预测余量来计算的。然后，我们通过结合公共标签集的概率结构提出了一个简单的通用适应网络（S-UAN）。最后，我们分析了针对公共标签集的泛化界限，并探讨了 UDA 目标风险的属性。大量实验表明，S-UAN 在不同的 UDA 设置中都表现良好，并且大幅优于最先进的方法。 本文针对目标领域标签未知的通用领域自适应（UDA）问题，提出一种概率方法确定源域和目标域共享的公共标签集，并设计简单通用自适应网络（S-UAN）实现跨领域适应。 Yueming Yin,Zhen Yang,Xiaofu Wu,Haifeng Hu cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Kai Han,Yunhe Wang,Yixing Xu,Chunjing Xu,Enhua Wu,Chang Xu
title: Training Binary Neural Networks through Learning with Noisy Supervision
title_zh: 通过噪声监督学习来训练二元神经网络
abstract: This paper formalizes the binarization operations over neural networks from a learning perspective. In contrast to classical hand crafted rules (\eg hard thresholding) to binarize full-precision neurons, we propose to learn a mapping from full-precision neurons to the target binary ones. Each individual weight entry will not be binarized independently. Instead, they are taken as a whole to accomplish the binarization, just as they work together in generating convolution features. To help the training of the binarization mapping, the full-precision neurons after taking sign operations is regarded as some auxiliary supervision signal, which is noisy but still has valuable guidance. An unbiased estimator is therefore introduced to mitigate the influence of the supervision noise. Experimental results on benchmark datasets indicate that the proposed binarization technique attains consistent improvements over baselines.
summary: This paper formalizes the binarization operations over neural networks from a learning perspective. In contrast to classical hand crafted rules (\eg hard thresholding) to binarize full-precision neurons, we propose to learn a mapping from full-precision neurons to the target binary ones. Each individual weight entry will not be binarized independently. Instead, they are taken as a whole to accomplish the binarization, just as they work together in generating convolution features. To help the training of the binarization mapping, the full-precision neurons after taking sign operations is regarded as some auxiliary supervision signal, which is noisy but still has valuable guidance. An unbiased estimator is therefore introduced to mitigate the influence of the supervision noise. Experimental results on benchmark datasets indicate that the proposed binarization technique attains consistent improvements over baselines.
abstract_zh: 本文从学习的角度形式化了神经网络的二值化操作。与对全精度神经元进行二值化的经典手工规则（例如硬阈值）相比，我们建议学习从全精度神经元到目标二进制神经元的映射。每个单独的权重条目不会独立二值化。相反，它们被作为一个整体来完成二值化，就像它们一起生成卷积特征一样。为了帮助二值化映射的训练，经过符号运算后的全精度神经元被视为一些辅助监督信号，虽然有噪声，但仍然具有有价值的指导作用。因此引入无偏估计器来减轻监督噪声的影响。基准数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的二值化技术在基线上取得了一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习映射而非传统规则实现神经网络二值化的方法，并利用噪声监督信号提升训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统二值化方法依赖手工规则（如硬阈值），无法充分利用神经元间的协同作用，且独立处理权重可能破坏特征生成的一致性。
AI.method: 学习全精度神经元到二值神经元的整体映射，将符号操作后的全精度神经元作为噪声监督信号，并引入无偏估计器降低噪声影响。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，该二值化技术相比基线方法取得持续性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合学习权重映射与噪声监督信号，本文方法有效提升了二值神经网络的训练效果与性能表现。

title: Learning Acoustic Scattering Fields for Dynamic Interactive Sound Propagation
title_zh: 学习声学散射场以实现动态交互式声音传播
comment: ef:2021 IEEE Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces (VR) (pp. 835-844)
comments: ef:2021 IEEE Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces (VR) (pp. 835-844)
abstract: We present a novel hybrid sound propagation algorithm for interactive applications. Our approach is designed for dynamic scenes and uses a neural network-based learned scattered field representation along with ray tracing to generate specular, diffuse, diffraction, and occlusion effects efficiently. We use geometric deep learning to approximate the acoustic scattering field using spherical harmonics. We use a large 3D dataset for training, and compare its accuracy with the ground truth generated using an accurate wave-based solver. The additional overhead of computing the learned scattered field at runtime is small and we demonstrate its interactive performance by generating plausible sound effects in dynamic scenes with diffraction and occlusion effects. We demonstrate the perceptual benefits of our approach based on an audio-visual user study.
summary: We present a novel hybrid sound propagation algorithm for interactive applications. Our approach is designed for dynamic scenes and uses a neural network-based learned scattered field representation along with ray tracing to generate specular, diffuse, diffraction, and occlusion effects efficiently. We use geometric deep learning to approximate the acoustic scattering field using spherical harmonics. We use a large 3D dataset for training, and compare its accuracy with the ground truth generated using an accurate wave-based solver. The additional overhead of computing the learned scattered field at runtime is small and we demonstrate its interactive performance by generating plausible sound effects in dynamic scenes with diffraction and occlusion effects. We demonstrate the perceptual benefits of our approach based on an audio-visual user study.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于交互式应用的新型混合声音传播算法。我们的方法专为动态场景而设计，并使用基于神经网络的学习散射场表示以及光线追踪来有效地生成镜面反射、漫反射、衍射和遮挡效果。我们使用几何深度学习来利用球谐函数来近似声学散射场。我们使用大型 3D 数据集进行训练，并将其准确性与使用精确的基于波的求解器生成的地面实况进行比较。在运行时计算学习到的散射场的额外开销很小，我们通过在具有衍射和遮挡效果的动态场景中生成合理的声音效果来展示其交互性能。我们基于视听用户研究展示了我们的方法的感知优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于动态交互场景的高效声传播算法，结合神经网络与光线追踪模拟复杂声学效果。
AI.motivation: 传统声学模拟方法在动态场景中计算开销大，难以实现实时交互，需更高效处理衍射、遮挡等复杂声学现象。
AI.method: 采用神经网络学习散射场表示，结合几何深度学习与球谐函数近似，利用光线追踪生成镜面反射、漫反射等效果，并通过大规模3D数据集训练验证准确性。
AI.result: 方法在运行时开销小，可生成包含衍射与遮挡的合理声效，用户研究证实其感知优势。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法在动态场景中实现高效逼真声传播，验证了其在实时交互应用中的有效性。

authors_text: Hao Huang,Guodong Long,Tao Shen,Jing Jiang,Chengqi Zhang
title: RatE: Relation-Adaptive Translating Embedding for Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: RatE：用于知识图补全的关系自适应翻译嵌入
abstract: Many graph embedding approaches have been proposed for knowledge graph completion via link prediction. Among those, translating embedding approaches enjoy the advantages of light-weight structure, high efficiency and great interpretability. Especially when extended to complex vector space, they show the capability in handling various relation patterns including symmetry, antisymmetry, inversion and composition. However, previous translating embedding approaches defined in complex vector space suffer from two main issues: 1) representing and modeling capacities of the model are limited by the translation function with rigorous multiplication of two complex numbers; and 2) embedding ambiguity caused by one-to-many relations is not explicitly alleviated. In this paper, we propose a relation-adaptive translation function built upon a novel weighted product in complex space, where the weights are learnable, relation-specific and independent to embedding size. The translation function only requires eight more scalar parameters each relation, but improves expressive power and alleviates embedding ambiguity problem. Based on the function, we then present our Relation-adaptive translating Embedding (RatE) approach to score each graph triple. Moreover, a novel negative sampling method is proposed to utilize both prior knowledge and self-adversarial learning for effective optimization. Experiments verify RatE achieves state-of-the-art performance on four link prediction benchmarks.
summary: Many graph embedding approaches have been proposed for knowledge graph completion via link prediction. Among those, translating embedding approaches enjoy the advantages of light-weight structure, high efficiency and great interpretability. Especially when extended to complex vector space, they show the capability in handling various relation patterns including symmetry, antisymmetry, inversion and composition. However, previous translating embedding approaches defined in complex vector space suffer from two main issues: 1) representing and modeling capacities of the model are limited by the translation function with rigorous multiplication of two complex numbers; and 2) embedding ambiguity caused by one-to-many relations is not explicitly alleviated. In this paper, we propose a relation-adaptive translation function built upon a novel weighted product in complex space, where the weights are learnable, relation-specific and independent to embedding size. The translation function only requires eight more scalar parameters each relation, but improves expressive power and alleviates embedding ambiguity problem. Based on the function, we then present our Relation-adaptive translating Embedding (RatE) approach to score each graph triple. Moreover, a novel negative sampling method is proposed to utilize both prior knowledge and self-adversarial learning for effective optimization. Experiments verify RatE achieves state-of-the-art performance on four link prediction benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 已经提出了许多图嵌入方法来通过链接预测来完成知识图。其中，翻译嵌入方法具有结构轻、效率高、可解释性强等优点。特别是当扩展到复杂的向量空间时，它们显示出处理各种关系模式的能力，包括对称、反对称、反转和合成。然而，先前在复向量空间中定义的翻译嵌入方法存在两个主要问题：1）模型的表示和建模能力受到两个复数严格乘法的翻译函数的限制； 2）由一对多关系引起的嵌入歧义没有得到明确缓解。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于复杂空间中新颖的加权乘积的关系自适应翻译函数，其中权重是可学习的、关系特定的并且与嵌入大小无关。翻译函数只需要每个关系多八个标量参数，但提高了表达能力并减轻了嵌入歧义问题。基于该函数，我们提出了关系自适应翻译嵌入 (RatE) 方法来对每个图三元组进行评分。此外，提出了一种新颖的负采样方法，利用先验知识和自对抗学习进行有效优化。实验验证 RatE 在四个链路预测基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种关系自适应的翻译嵌入方法RatE，用于知识图谱补全中的链接预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有复数空间翻译嵌入方法存在表达能力受限和无法有效缓解一对多关系的嵌入歧义问题。
AI.method: 设计基于复数空间可学习权重乘积的关系自适应翻译函数，并结合先验知识与自对抗学习的负采样方法。
AI.result: 在四个链接预测基准测试中达到最先进性能，参数效率高且有效缓解嵌入歧义。
AI.conclusion: RatE通过改进翻译函数和负采样策略，在保持轻量高效的同时提升了模型表达能力和预测准确性。

search_text: RatE: Relation-Adaptive Translating Embedding for Knowledge Graph Completion RatE：用于知识图补全的关系自适应翻译嵌入 Many graph embedding approaches have been proposed for knowledge graph completion via link prediction. Among those, translating embedding approaches enjoy the advantages of light-weight structure, high efficiency and great interpretability. Especially when extended to complex vector space, they show the capability in handling various relation patterns including symmetry, antisymmetry, inversion and composition. However, previous translating embedding approaches defined in complex vector space suffer from two main issues: 1) representing and modeling capacities of the model are limited by the translation function with rigorous multiplication of two complex numbers; and 2) embedding ambiguity caused by one-to-many relations is not explicitly alleviated. In this paper, we propose a relation-adaptive translation function built upon a novel weighted product in complex space, where the weights are learnable, relation-specific and independent to embedding size. The translation function only requires eight more scalar parameters each relation, but improves expressive power and alleviates embedding ambiguity problem. Based on the function, we then present our Relation-adaptive translating Embedding (RatE) approach to score each graph triple. Moreover, a novel negative sampling method is proposed to utilize both prior knowledge and self-adversarial learning for effective optimization. Experiments verify RatE achieves state-of-the-art performance on four link prediction benchmarks. 已经提出了许多图嵌入方法来通过链接预测来完成知识图。其中，翻译嵌入方法具有结构轻、效率高、可解释性强等优点。特别是当扩展到复杂的向量空间时，它们显示出处理各种关系模式的能力，包括对称、反对称、反转和合成。然而，先前在复向量空间中定义的翻译嵌入方法存在两个主要问题：1）模型的表示和建模能力受到两个复数严格乘法的翻译函数的限制； 2）由一对多关系引起的嵌入歧义没有得到明确缓解。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于复杂空间中新颖的加权乘积的关系自适应翻译函数，其中权重是可学习的、关系特定的并且与嵌入大小无关。翻译函数只需要每个关系多八个标量参数，但提高了表达能力并减轻了嵌入歧义问题。基于该函数，我们提出了关系自适应翻译嵌入 (RatE) 方法来对每个图三元组进行评分。此外，提出了一种新颖的负采样方法，利用先验知识和自对抗学习进行有效优化。实验验证 RatE 在四个链路预测基准上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种关系自适应的翻译嵌入方法RatE，用于知识图谱补全中的链接预测任务。 Hao Huang,Guodong Long,Tao Shen,Jing Jiang,Chengqi Zhang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Remarks on Optimal Scores for Speaker Recognition
title_zh: 关于说话人识别的最佳分数的备注
abstract: In this article, we first establish the theory of optimal scores for speaker recognition. Our analysis shows that the minimum Bayes risk (MBR) decisions for both the speaker identification and speaker verification tasks can be based on a normalized likelihood (NL). When the underlying generative model is a linear Gaussian, the NL score is mathematically equivalent to the PLDA likelihood ratio, and the empirical scores based on cosine distance and Euclidean distance can be seen as approximations of this linear Gaussian NL score under some conditions. We discuss a number of properties of the NL score and perform a simple simulation experiment to demonstrate the properties of the NL score.
summary: In this article, we first establish the theory of optimal scores for speaker recognition. Our analysis shows that the minimum Bayes risk (MBR) decisions for both the speaker identification and speaker verification tasks can be based on a normalized likelihood (NL). When the underlying generative model is a linear Gaussian, the NL score is mathematically equivalent to the PLDA likelihood ratio, and the empirical scores based on cosine distance and Euclidean distance can be seen as approximations of this linear Gaussian NL score under some conditions. We discuss a number of properties of the NL score and perform a simple simulation experiment to demonstrate the properties of the NL score.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们首先建立了说话人识别的最佳分数理论。我们的分析表明，说话人识别和说话人验证任务的最小贝叶斯风险（MBR）决策可以基于归一化似然（NL）。当底层生成模型是线性高斯模型时，NL 分数在数学上等价于 PLDA 似然比，并且基于余弦距离和欧几里得距离的经验分数可以看作是该线性高斯 NL 分数在某些条件下的近似值。我们讨论了 NL 分数的一些属性，并进行了一个简单的模拟实验来演示 NL 分数的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立说话人识别任务中的最优得分理论，并探讨归一化似然（NL）得分的性质及其在不同条件下的近似方法。
AI.motivation: 为了改进说话人识别任务中的决策理论，提供更准确的得分计算方法，并理解不同距离度量与归一化似然之间的关系。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立归一化似然（NL）得分的数学框架，比较其与PLDA似然比的关系，并利用模拟实验验证NL得分的性质。
AI.result: 结果表明，在线性高斯模型下NL得分等同于PLDA似然比，而余弦和欧氏距离得分在特定条件下可视为其近似，模拟实验验证了这些理论结论。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出归一化似然得分在说话人识别中具有理论优势，为实际应用中的得分计算提供了理论依据和指导。

authors_text: Maya Abo Dominguez,William La,James C. Boerkoel Jr
title: Modeling Human Temporal Uncertainty in Human-Agent Teams
title_zh: 对人类代理团队中的人类时间不确定性进行建模
abstract: Automated scheduling is potentially a very useful tool for facilitating efficient, intuitive interactions between a robot and a human teammate. However, a current gapin automated scheduling is that it is not well understood how to best represent the timing uncertainty that human teammates introduce. This paper attempts to address this gap by designing an online human-robot collaborative packaging game that we use to build a model of human timing uncertainty from a population of crowd-workers. We conclude that heavy-tailed distributions are the best models of human temporal uncertainty, with a Log-Normal distribution achieving the best fit to our experimental data. We discuss how these results along with our collaborative online game will inform and facilitate future explorations into scheduling for improved human-robot fluency.
summary: Automated scheduling is potentially a very useful tool for facilitating efficient, intuitive interactions between a robot and a human teammate. However, a current gapin automated scheduling is that it is not well understood how to best represent the timing uncertainty that human teammates introduce. This paper attempts to address this gap by designing an online human-robot collaborative packaging game that we use to build a model of human timing uncertainty from a population of crowd-workers. We conclude that heavy-tailed distributions are the best models of human temporal uncertainty, with a Log-Normal distribution achieving the best fit to our experimental data. We discuss how these results along with our collaborative online game will inform and facilitate future explorations into scheduling for improved human-robot fluency.
abstract_zh: 自动调度可能是一个非常有用的工具，可以促进机器人和人类队友之间高效、直观的交互。然而，当前自动化调度的一个差距是，人们还没有很好地理解如何最好地表示人类队友引入的时间不确定性。本文试图通过设计一个在线人机协作包装游戏来解决这一差距，我们用该游戏来构建来自人群的人类时间不确定性模型。我们得出的结论是，重尾分布是人类时间不确定性的最佳模型，对数正态分布实现了与我们的实验数据的最佳拟合。我们讨论这些结果以及我们的协作在线游戏将如何为未来的探索提供信息并促进对提高人机流畅度的调度的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决自动化排程中人类队友时间不确定性建模的问题，通过设计在线协作游戏收集数据，建立最佳模型。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化排程未能有效处理人类队友引入的时间不确定性，影响人机协作效率。
AI.method: 设计在线人机协作包装游戏，通过众包数据收集人类时间不确定性样本，并使用统计分布模型进行拟合。
AI.result: 实验数据表明重尾分布（特别是对数正态分布）最能准确描述人类时间不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为提升人机协作流畅性提供了理论依据和实验工具，推动未来调度算法优化。

title: How well does surprisal explain N400 amplitude under different experimental conditions?
title_zh: 惊奇如何解释不同实验条件下的 N400 振幅？
abstract: We investigate the extent to which word surprisal can be used to predict a neural measure of human language processing difficulty - the N400. To do this, we use recurrent neural networks to calculate the surprisal of stimuli from previously published neurolinguistic studies of the N400. We find that surprisal can predict N400 amplitude in a wide range of cases, and the cases where it cannot do so provide valuable insight into the neurocognitive processes underlying the response.
summary: We investigate the extent to which word surprisal can be used to predict a neural measure of human language processing difficulty - the N400. To do this, we use recurrent neural networks to calculate the surprisal of stimuli from previously published neurolinguistic studies of the N400. We find that surprisal can predict N400 amplitude in a wide range of cases, and the cases where it cannot do so provide valuable insight into the neurocognitive processes underlying the response.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了单词惊讶可在多大程度上用于预测人类语言处理难度的神经测量值 - N400。为此，我们使用循环神经网络来计算先前发表的 N400 神经语言学研究中的刺激惊喜。我们发现，惊讶可以在多种情况下预测 N400 振幅，而在它无法预测的情况下，则可以提供对反应背后的神经认知过程的宝贵见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究意外性（surprisal）在不同实验条件下对N400振幅的解释能力，探讨其预测人类语言处理难度的有效性。
AI.motivation: 验证surprisal作为神经语言处理难度指标的普适性，并探索其无法解释N400振幅时的神经认知机制。
AI.method: 利用循环神经网络计算神经语言学实验中刺激材料的surprisal值，分析其与N400振幅的相关性。
AI.result: surprisal在多数情况下可有效预测N400振幅，预测失败的案例揭示了更复杂的神经认知加工过程。
AI.conclusion: surprisal是预测N400振幅的有效指标，但其局限性反映了语言处理中其他关键神经机制的作用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究意外性（surprisal）在不同实验条件下对N400振幅的解释能力，探讨其预测人类语言处理难度的有效性。

search_text: How well does surprisal explain N400 amplitude under different experimental conditions? 惊奇如何解释不同实验条件下的 N400 振幅？ We investigate the extent to which word surprisal can be used to predict a neural measure of human language processing difficulty - the N400. To do this, we use recurrent neural networks to calculate the surprisal of stimuli from previously published neurolinguistic studies of the N400. We find that surprisal can predict N400 amplitude in a wide range of cases, and the cases where it cannot do so provide valuable insight into the neurocognitive processes underlying the response. 我们研究了单词惊讶可在多大程度上用于预测人类语言处理难度的神经测量值 - N400。为此，我们使用循环神经网络来计算先前发表的 N400 神经语言学研究中的刺激惊喜。我们发现，惊讶可以在多种情况下预测 N400 振幅，而在它无法预测的情况下，则可以提供对反应背后的神经认知过程的宝贵见解。 本文研究意外性（surprisal）在不同实验条件下对N400振幅的解释能力，探讨其预测人类语言处理难度的有效性。 James A. Michaelov,Benjamin K. Bergen cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

title: CryptoCredit: Securely Training Fair Models
title_zh: CryptoCredit：安全地训练公平模型
abstract: When developing models for regulated decision making, sensitive features like age, race and gender cannot be used and must be obscured from model developers to prevent bias. However, the remaining features still need to be tested for correlation with sensitive features, which can only be done with the knowledge of those features. We resolve this dilemma using a fully homomorphic encryption scheme, allowing model developers to train linear regression and logistic regression models and test them for possible bias without ever revealing the sensitive features in the clear. We demonstrate how it can be applied to leave-one-out regression testing, and show using the adult income data set that our method is practical to run.
summary: When developing models for regulated decision making, sensitive features like age, race and gender cannot be used and must be obscured from model developers to prevent bias. However, the remaining features still need to be tested for correlation with sensitive features, which can only be done with the knowledge of those features. We resolve this dilemma using a fully homomorphic encryption scheme, allowing model developers to train linear regression and logistic regression models and test them for possible bias without ever revealing the sensitive features in the clear. We demonstrate how it can be applied to leave-one-out regression testing, and show using the adult income data set that our method is practical to run.
abstract_zh: 在开发用于监管决策的模型时，不能使用年龄、种族和性别等敏感特征，并且必须对模型开发人员隐藏这些特征以防止偏见。然而，其余特征仍然需要测试与敏感特征的相关性，这只能在了解这些特征的情况下才能完成。我们使用完全同态加密方案解决了这一困境，允许模型开发人员训练线性回归和逻辑回归模型并测试它们是否存在可能的偏差，而无需明确揭示敏感特征。我们演示了如何将其应用于留一回归测试，并使用成人收入数据集表明我们的方法是实用的。

AI.tldr: 提出一种安全训练公平模型的方法，确保在模型开发过程中不泄露敏感特征
AI.motivation: 在受监管的决策模型开发中，敏感特征需保密，但需检测其他特征与敏感特征的关联，存在矛盾
AI.method: 采用全同态加密技术，使开发者能在加密数据上训练模型并检测偏差，无需解密敏感特征
AI.result: 通过成人收入数据集验证了方法的可行性，证明其在实际应用中的有效性
AI.conclusion: CryptoCredit方法有效平衡了模型训练中的隐私保护与公平性验证需求，为敏感数据处理提供了可行方案

title: Emotional Musical Prosody: Validated Vocal Dataset for Human Robot Interaction
title_zh: 情感音乐韵律：经过验证的人机交互声音数据集
comment: 2020 Joint Conference on AI Music Creativity (CSMC + MuMe 2020)
comments: 2020 Joint Conference on AI Music Creativity (CSMC + MuMe 2020)
abstract: Human collaboration with robotics is dependant on the development of a relationship between human and robot, without which performance and utilization can decrease. Emotion and personality conveyance has been shown to enhance robotic collaborations, with improved human-robot relationships and increased trust. One under-explored way for an artificial agent to convey emotions is through non-linguistic musical prosody. In this work we present a new 4.2 hour dataset of improvised emotional vocal phrases based on the Geneva Emotion Wheel. This dataset has been validated through extensive listening tests and shows promising preliminary results for use in generative systems.
summary: Human collaboration with robotics is dependant on the development of a relationship between human and robot, without which performance and utilization can decrease. Emotion and personality conveyance has been shown to enhance robotic collaborations, with improved human-robot relationships and increased trust. One under-explored way for an artificial agent to convey emotions is through non-linguistic musical prosody. In this work we present a new 4.2 hour dataset of improvised emotional vocal phrases based on the Geneva Emotion Wheel. This dataset has been validated through extensive listening tests and shows promising preliminary results for use in generative systems.
abstract_zh: 人类与机器人的协作取决于人类与机器人之间关系的发展，否则性能和利用率就会下降。情感和个性的传达已被证明可以增强机器人的协作，改善人机关系并增加信任。人工智能体传达情感的一种尚未被探索的方式是通过非语言音乐韵律。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新的 4.2 小时基于日内瓦情感轮的即兴情感声乐短语数据集。该数据集已通过广泛的听力测试进行了验证，并显示出可用于生成系统的有希望的初步结果。

AI.tldr: 创建并验证用于人机交互的情感语音数据集
AI.motivation: 提升人机协作与信任，探索非语言音乐韵律作为情感传达的新途径
AI.method: 基于日内瓦情感轮收集4.2小时即兴情感语音，并通过听力测试验证
AI.result: 数据集通过验证，初步显示在生成系统中的应用潜力
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为非语言情感传达和人机交互研究提供新资源

authors_text: Iljoo Baek,Tzu-Chieh Tai,Manoj Bhat,Karun Ellango,Tarang Shah,Kamal Fuseini,Ragunathan,Rajkumar
title: CurbScan: Curb Detection and Tracking Using Multi-Sensor Fusion
title_zh: CurbScan：使用多传感器融合进行路缘检测和跟踪
abstract: Reliable curb detection is critical for safe autonomous driving in urban contexts. Curb detection and tracking are also useful in vehicle localization and path planning. Past work utilized a 3D LiDAR sensor to determine accurate distance information and the geometric attributes of curbs. However, such an approach requires dense point cloud data and is also vulnerable to false positives from obstacles present on both road and off-road areas. In this paper, we propose an approach to detect and track curbs by fusing together data from multiple sensors: sparse LiDAR data, a mono camera and low-cost ultrasonic sensors. The detection algorithm is based on a single 3D LiDAR and a mono camera sensor used to detect candidate curb features and it effectively removes false positives arising from surrounding static and moving obstacles. The detection accuracy of the tracking algorithm is boosted by using Kalman filter-based prediction and fusion with lateral distance information from low-cost ultrasonic sensors. We next propose a line-fitting algorithm that yields robust results for curb locations. Finally, we demonstrate the practical feasibility of our solution by testing in different road environments and evaluating our implementation in a real vehicle\footnote{Demo video clips demonstrating our algorithm have been uploaded to Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w5MwsdWhcy4, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gd506RklfG8.}. Our algorithm maintains over 90\% accuracy within 4.5-22 meters and 0-14 meters for the KITTI dataset and our dataset respectively, and its average processing time per frame is approximately 10 ms on Intel i7 x86 and 100ms on NVIDIA Xavier board.
summary: Reliable curb detection is critical for safe autonomous driving in urban contexts. Curb detection and tracking are also useful in vehicle localization and path planning. Past work utilized a 3D LiDAR sensor to determine accurate distance information and the geometric attributes of curbs. However, such an approach requires dense point cloud data and is also vulnerable to false positives from obstacles present on both road and off-road areas. In this paper, we propose an approach to detect and track curbs by fusing together data from multiple sensors: sparse LiDAR data, a mono camera and low-cost ultrasonic sensors. The detection algorithm is based on a single 3D LiDAR and a mono camera sensor used to detect candidate curb features and it effectively removes false positives arising from surrounding static and moving obstacles. The detection accuracy of the tracking algorithm is boosted by using Kalman filter-based prediction and fusion with lateral distance information from low-cost ultrasonic sensors. We next propose a line-fitting algorithm that yields robust results for curb locations. Finally, we demonstrate the practical feasibility of our solution by testing in different road environments and evaluating our implementation in a real vehicle\footnote{Demo video clips demonstrating our algorithm have been uploaded to Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w5MwsdWhcy4, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gd506RklfG8.}. Our algorithm maintains over 90\% accuracy within 4.5-22 meters and 0-14 meters for the KITTI dataset and our dataset respectively, and its average processing time per frame is approximately 10 ms on Intel i7 x86 and 100ms on NVIDIA Xavier board.
abstract_zh: 可靠的路缘检测对于城市环境中的安全自动驾驶至关重要。路边检测和跟踪在车辆定位和路径规划中也很有用。过去的工作利用 3D LiDAR 传感器来确定准确的距离信息和路缘石的几何属性。然而，这种方法需要密集的点云数据，并且还容易受到道路和越野区域存在的障碍物的误报。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过融合来自多个传感器的数据来检测和跟踪路缘石的方法：稀疏 LiDAR 数据、单摄像头和低成本超声波传感器。该检测算法基于单个 3D LiDAR 和单摄像头传感器，用于检测候选路缘特征，可有效消除周围静态和移动障碍物产生的误报。通过使用基于卡尔曼滤波器的预测以及与低成本超声波传感器的横向距离信息的融合，提高了跟踪算法的检测精度。接下来，我们提出了一种线拟合算法，可以为路缘位置产生可靠的结果。最后，我们通过在不同的道路环境中进行测试并评估我们在真实车辆中的实现来展示我们的解决方案的实际可行性\footnote{演示我们的算法的演示视频剪辑已上传到Youtube：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w5MwsdWhcy4，https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gd506RklfG8.}。我们的算法分别对 KITTI 数据集和我们的数据集在 4.5-22 米和 0-14 米范围内保持了超过 90% 的精度，每帧的平均处理时间在 Intel i7 x86 上约为 10 毫秒，在 NVIDIA Xavier 板上约为 100 毫秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CurbScan方法，通过融合稀疏LiDAR、单目摄像头和低成本超声波传感器数据，实现城市环境中路缘检测与跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统基于单传感器的路缘检测存在误检率高、依赖密集点云数据等问题，需开发多传感器融合方案提升检测鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 结合单3D LiDAR与摄像头检测候选路缘特征，利用卡尔曼滤波预测与超声波传感器横向距离信息融合，辅以线拟合算法优化路缘定位。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集和自建数据集上分别达到4.5-22米/0-14米范围内90%以上准确率，Intel i7平台单帧处理耗时约10ms，NVIDIA Xavier板约100ms。
AI.conclusion: 多传感器融合方案有效提升路缘检测精度与实时性，验证了算法在复杂城市道路环境中的实用性，为自动驾驶定位与路径规划提供可靠支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CurbScan方法，通过融合稀疏LiDAR、单目摄像头和低成本超声波传感器数据，实现城市环境中路缘检测与跟踪。

search_text: CurbScan: Curb Detection and Tracking Using Multi-Sensor Fusion CurbScan：使用多传感器融合进行路缘检测和跟踪 Reliable curb detection is critical for safe autonomous driving in urban contexts. Curb detection and tracking are also useful in vehicle localization and path planning. Past work utilized a 3D LiDAR sensor to determine accurate distance information and the geometric attributes of curbs. However, such an approach requires dense point cloud data and is also vulnerable to false positives from obstacles present on both road and off-road areas. In this paper, we propose an approach to detect and track curbs by fusing together data from multiple sensors: sparse LiDAR data, a mono camera and low-cost ultrasonic sensors. The detection algorithm is based on a single 3D LiDAR and a mono camera sensor used to detect candidate curb features and it effectively removes false positives arising from surrounding static and moving obstacles. The detection accuracy of the tracking algorithm is boosted by using Kalman filter-based prediction and fusion with lateral distance information from low-cost ultrasonic sensors. We next propose a line-fitting algorithm that yields robust results for curb locations. Finally, we demonstrate the practical feasibility of our solution by testing in different road environments and evaluating our implementation in a real vehicle\footnote{Demo video clips demonstrating our algorithm have been uploaded to Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w5MwsdWhcy4, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gd506RklfG8.}. Our algorithm maintains over 90\% accuracy within 4.5-22 meters and 0-14 meters for the KITTI dataset and our dataset respectively, and its average processing time per frame is approximately 10 ms on Intel i7 x86 and 100ms on NVIDIA Xavier board. 可靠的路缘检测对于城市环境中的安全自动驾驶至关重要。路边检测和跟踪在车辆定位和路径规划中也很有用。过去的工作利用 3D LiDAR 传感器来确定准确的距离信息和路缘石的几何属性。然而，这种方法需要密集的点云数据，并且还容易受到道路和越野区域存在的障碍物的误报。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过融合来自多个传感器的数据来检测和跟踪路缘石的方法：稀疏 LiDAR 数据、单摄像头和低成本超声波传感器。该检测算法基于单个 3D LiDAR 和单摄像头传感器，用于检测候选路缘特征，可有效消除周围静态和移动障碍物产生的误报。通过使用基于卡尔曼滤波器的预测以及与低成本超声波传感器的横向距离信息的融合，提高了跟踪算法的检测精度。接下来，我们提出了一种线拟合算法，可以为路缘位置产生可靠的结果。最后，我们通过在不同的道路环境中进行测试并评估我们在真实车辆中的实现来展示我们的解决方案的实际可行性\footnote{演示我们的算法的演示视频剪辑已上传到Youtube：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w5MwsdWhcy4，https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gd506RklfG8.}。我们的算法分别对 KITTI 数据集和我们的数据集在 4.5-22 米和 0-14 米范围内保持了超过 90% 的精度，每帧的平均处理时间在 Intel i7 x86 上约为 10 毫秒，在 NVIDIA Xavier 板上约为 100 毫秒。 本文提出CurbScan方法，通过融合稀疏LiDAR、单目摄像头和低成本超声波传感器数据，实现城市环境中路缘检测与跟踪。 Iljoo Baek,Tzu-Chieh Tai,Manoj Bhat,Karun Ellango,Tarang Shah,Kamal Fuseini,Ragunathan,Rajkumar cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO,eess.SP

title: Paying down metadata debt: learning the representation of concepts using topic models
title_zh: 偿还元数据债务：使用主题模型学习概念的表示
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Data set available in paper source
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures. Data set available in paper source
abstract: We introduce a data management problem called metadata debt, to identify the mapping between data concepts and their logical representations. We describe how this mapping can be learned using semisupervised topic models based on low-rank matrix factorizations that account for missing and noisy labels, coupled with sparsity penalties to improve localization and interpretability. We introduce a gauge transformation approach that allows us to construct explicit associations between topics and concept labels, and thus assign meaning to topics. We also show how to use this topic model for semisupervised learning tasks like extrapolating from known labels, evaluating possible errors in existing labels, and predicting missing features. We show results from this topic model in predicting subject tags on over 25,000 datasets from Kaggle.com, demonstrating the ability to learn semantically meaningful features.
summary: We introduce a data management problem called metadata debt, to identify the mapping between data concepts and their logical representations. We describe how this mapping can be learned using semisupervised topic models based on low-rank matrix factorizations that account for missing and noisy labels, coupled with sparsity penalties to improve localization and interpretability. We introduce a gauge transformation approach that allows us to construct explicit associations between topics and concept labels, and thus assign meaning to topics. We also show how to use this topic model for semisupervised learning tasks like extrapolating from known labels, evaluating possible errors in existing labels, and predicting missing features. We show results from this topic model in predicting subject tags on over 25,000 datasets from Kaggle.com, demonstrating the ability to learn semantically meaningful features.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个称为元数据债务的数据管理问题，以识别数据概念及其逻辑表示之间的映射。我们描述了如何使用基于低秩矩阵分解的半监督主题模型来学习这种映射，该模型考虑了缺失和噪声标签，并结合稀疏性惩罚来提高定位和可解释性。我们引入了一种规范转换方法，该方法允许我们在主题和概念标签之间构建显式关联，从而为主题分配含义。我们还展示了如何使用该主题模型进行半监督学习任务，例如从已知标签进行推断、评估现有标签中可能的错误以及预测缺失的特征。我们展示了该主题模型在 Kaggle.com 的 25,000 多个数据集上预测主题标签的结果，展示了学习语义上有意义的特征的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过主题模型学习数据概念与其逻辑表示之间的映射，以解决元数据债务问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据管理中存在概念与逻辑表示映射不明确的元数据债务问题，传统方法难以处理缺失和噪声标签，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于低秩矩阵分解的半监督主题模型，结合稀疏性惩罚提升可解释性，并引入规范变换显式关联主题与概念标签。
AI.result: 在Kaggle超过25,000个数据集上成功预测主题标签，验证了模型学习语义特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解元数据债务问题，为半监督学习任务提供可解释且鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Shib Sankar Dasgupta,Michael Boratko,Dongxu Zhang,Luke Vilnis,Xiang Lorraine Li,Andrew McCallum
title: Improving Local Identifiability in Probabilistic Box Embeddings
title_zh: 提高概率框嵌入的局部可识别性
abstract: Geometric embeddings have recently received attention for their natural ability to represent transitive asymmetric relations via containment. Box embeddings, where objects are represented by n-dimensional hyperrectangles, are a particularly promising example of such an embedding as they are closed under intersection and their volume can be calculated easily, allowing them to naturally represent calibrated probability distributions. The benefits of geometric embeddings also introduce a problem of local identifiability, however, where whole neighborhoods of parameters result in equivalent loss which impedes learning. Prior work addressed some of these issues by using an approximation to Gaussian convolution over the box parameters, however, this intersection operation also increases the sparsity of the gradient. In this work, we model the box parameters with min and max Gumbel distributions, which were chosen such that space is still closed under the operation of the intersection. The calculation of the expected intersection volume involves all parameters, and we demonstrate experimentally that this drastically improves the ability of such models to learn.
summary: Geometric embeddings have recently received attention for their natural ability to represent transitive asymmetric relations via containment. Box embeddings, where objects are represented by n-dimensional hyperrectangles, are a particularly promising example of such an embedding as they are closed under intersection and their volume can be calculated easily, allowing them to naturally represent calibrated probability distributions. The benefits of geometric embeddings also introduce a problem of local identifiability, however, where whole neighborhoods of parameters result in equivalent loss which impedes learning. Prior work addressed some of these issues by using an approximation to Gaussian convolution over the box parameters, however, this intersection operation also increases the sparsity of the gradient. In this work, we model the box parameters with min and max Gumbel distributions, which were chosen such that space is still closed under the operation of the intersection. The calculation of the expected intersection volume involves all parameters, and we demonstrate experimentally that this drastically improves the ability of such models to learn.
abstract_zh: 几何嵌入最近因其通过包含来表示传递不对称关系的天然能力而受到关注。盒嵌入（其中对象由 n 维超矩形表示）是此类嵌入的一个特别有前途的示例，因为它们在相交下封闭，并且可以轻松计算其体积，从而使它们能够自然地表示校准的概率分布。然而，几何嵌入的好处也引入了局部可识别性问题，其中参数的整个邻域会导致等效损失，从而阻碍学习。先前的工作通过在框参数上使用高斯卷积的近似解决了其中一些问题，但是，这种交集操作也增加了梯度的稀疏性。在这项工作中，我们使用最小和最大 Gumbel 分布对框参数进行建模，选择这些分布使得空间在交集操作下仍然是封闭的。预期交叉量的计算涉及所有参数，我们通过实验证明这极大地提高了此类模型的学习能力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进概率框嵌入的局部可识别性，提升模型学习效果。
AI.motivation: 框嵌入虽能有效表示概率分布，但局部参数邻域导致损失函数平坦化，阻碍学习；现有方法存在梯度稀疏问题。
AI.method: 采用min和max Gumbel分布建模框参数，保持交集操作闭合性，并通过计算期望交集体积优化学习过程。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法显著提升了模型的学习能力与参数可识别性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Gumbel分布的参数建模有效解决了局部可识别性问题，为概率框嵌入提供了更优解决方案。

title: Towards Self-Regulating AI: Challenges and Opportunities of AI Model Governance in Financial Services
title_zh: 走向自我调节的人工智能：金融服务中人工智能模型治理的挑战和机遇
abstract: AI systems have found a wide range of application areas in financial services. Their involvement in broader and increasingly critical decisions has escalated the need for compliance and effective model governance. Current governance practices have evolved from more traditional financial applications and modeling frameworks. They often struggle with the fundamental differences in AI characteristics such as uncertainty in the assumptions, and the lack of explicit programming. AI model governance frequently involves complex review flows and relies heavily on manual steps. As a result, it faces serious challenges in effectiveness, cost, complexity, and speed. Furthermore, the unprecedented rate of growth in the AI model complexity raises questions on the sustainability of the current practices. This paper focuses on the challenges of AI model governance in the financial services industry. As a part of the outlook, we present a system-level framework towards increased self-regulation for robustness and compliance. This approach aims to enable potential solution opportunities through increased automation and the integration of monitoring, management, and mitigation capabilities. The proposed framework also provides model governance and risk management improved capabilities to manage model risk during deployment.
summary: AI systems have found a wide range of application areas in financial services. Their involvement in broader and increasingly critical decisions has escalated the need for compliance and effective model governance. Current governance practices have evolved from more traditional financial applications and modeling frameworks. They often struggle with the fundamental differences in AI characteristics such as uncertainty in the assumptions, and the lack of explicit programming. AI model governance frequently involves complex review flows and relies heavily on manual steps. As a result, it faces serious challenges in effectiveness, cost, complexity, and speed. Furthermore, the unprecedented rate of growth in the AI model complexity raises questions on the sustainability of the current practices. This paper focuses on the challenges of AI model governance in the financial services industry. As a part of the outlook, we present a system-level framework towards increased self-regulation for robustness and compliance. This approach aims to enable potential solution opportunities through increased automation and the integration of monitoring, management, and mitigation capabilities. The proposed framework also provides model governance and risk management improved capabilities to manage model risk during deployment.
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统在金融服务领域有着广泛的应用领域。他们参与更广泛且日益关键的决策，这增加了对合规性和有效模型治理的需求。当前的治理实践是从更传统的金融应用程序和建模框架演变而来的。他们经常与人工智能特征的根本差异作斗争，例如假设的不确定性以及缺乏明确的编程。 AI 模型治理经常涉及复杂的审核流程，并且严重依赖手动步骤。因此，它在有效性、成本、复杂性和速度方面面临着严峻的挑战。此外，人工智能模型复杂性前所未有的增长速度引发了人们对当前实践可持续性的质疑。本文重点讨论金融服务行业人工智能模型治理的挑战。作为展望的一部分，我们提出了一个系统级框架，旨在加强自我监管，以实现稳健性和合规性。这种方法旨在通过提高自动化程度以及监控、管理和缓解功能的集成来实现潜在的解决方案机会。拟议的框架还提供了模型治理和风险管理改进的功能，以在部署期间管理模型风险。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了金融服务业中AI模型治理的挑战，并提出了一种系统级框架以实现更高效的自我监管。
AI.motivation: 当前AI模型治理方法因AI的不确定性、缺乏显式编程等特性而面临有效性、成本和复杂性等挑战，需寻求可持续的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一个整合监控、管理与缓解能力的系统级框架，通过自动化提升模型治理与风险管理能力。
AI.result: 该框架可提高治理效率，降低人工依赖，增强模型部署过程中的合规性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动化与集成化治理框架，金融服务业可实现更可持续的AI模型治理，应对复杂性增长带来的风险。

title: On Task-Level Dialogue Composition of Generative Transformer Model
title_zh: 生成式Transformer模型的任务级对话构成
comment: 8 pages; Accepted at Workshop on Insights from Negative Results in NLP
comments: 8 pages; Accepted at Workshop on Insights from Negative Results in NLP
abstract: Task-oriented dialogue systems help users accomplish tasks such as booking a movie ticket and ordering food via conversation. Generative models parameterized by a deep neural network are widely used for next turn response generation in such systems. It is natural for users of the system to want to accomplish multiple tasks within the same conversation, but the ability of generative models to compose multiple tasks is not well studied. In this work, we begin by studying the effect of training human-human task-oriented dialogues towards improving the ability to compose multiple tasks on Transformer generative models. To that end, we propose and explore two solutions: (1) creating synthetic multiple task dialogue data for training from human-human single task dialogue and (2) forcing the encoder representation to be invariant to single and multiple task dialogues using an auxiliary loss. The results from our experiments highlight the difficulty of even the sophisticated variant of transformer model in learning to compose multiple tasks from single task dialogues.
summary: Task-oriented dialogue systems help users accomplish tasks such as booking a movie ticket and ordering food via conversation. Generative models parameterized by a deep neural network are widely used for next turn response generation in such systems. It is natural for users of the system to want to accomplish multiple tasks within the same conversation, but the ability of generative models to compose multiple tasks is not well studied. In this work, we begin by studying the effect of training human-human task-oriented dialogues towards improving the ability to compose multiple tasks on Transformer generative models. To that end, we propose and explore two solutions: (1) creating synthetic multiple task dialogue data for training from human-human single task dialogue and (2) forcing the encoder representation to be invariant to single and multiple task dialogues using an auxiliary loss. The results from our experiments highlight the difficulty of even the sophisticated variant of transformer model in learning to compose multiple tasks from single task dialogues.
abstract_zh: 面向任务的对话系统帮助用户通过对话完成预订电影票、订餐等任务。由深度神经网络参数化的生成模型广泛用于此类系统中的下一轮响应生成。系统的用户希望在同一次对话中完成多个任务是很自然的，但是生成模型组合多个任务的能力还没有得到很好的研究。在这项工作中，我们首先研究训练人与人以任务为导向的对话对提高在 Transformer 生成模型上编写多个任务的能力的影响。为此，我们提出并探索两种解决方案：（1）创建合成多任务对话数据，用于人与人单任务对话的训练；（2）使用辅助损失强制编码器表示对单任务和多任务对话保持不变。我们的实验结果凸显了即使是复杂的 Transformer 模型变体在学习从单个任务对话组成多个任务方面也存在困难。

AI.tldr: 研究生成式Transformer模型在多任务对话中的组合能力
AI.motivation: 用户希望在单次对话中完成多个任务，但现有生成模型在多任务组合方面的能力不足
AI.method: 提出两种方法：合成多任务对话数据和使用辅助损失强制编码器表示不变
AI.result: 实验显示复杂Transformer变体在从单任务对话学习多任务组合上存在困难
AI.conclusion: 结论指出多任务对话组合对模型是重大挑战，需进一步研究

title: Understanding Local Robustness of Deep Neural Networks under Natural Variations
title_zh: 了解自然变化下深度神经网络的局部鲁棒性
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are being deployed in a wide range of settings today, from safety-critical applications like autonomous driving to commercial applications involving image classifications. However, recent research has shown that DNNs can be brittle to even slight variations of the input data. Therefore, rigorous testing of DNNs has gained widespread attention. While DNN robustness under norm-bound perturbation got significant attention over the past few years, our knowledge is still limited when natural variants of the input images come. These natural variants, e.g. a rotated or a rainy version of the original input, are especially concerning as they can occur naturally in the field without any active adversary and may lead to undesirable consequences. Thus, it is important to identify the inputs whose small variations may lead to erroneous DNN behaviors. The very few studies that looked at DNN's robustness under natural variants, however, focus on estimating the overall robustness of DNNs across all the test data rather than localizing such error-producing points. This work aims to bridge this gap. To this end, we study the local per-input robustness properties of the DNNs and leverage those properties to build a white-box (DeepRobust-W) and a black-box (DeepRobust-B) tool to automatically identify the non-robust points. Our evaluation of these methods on three DNN models spanning three widely used image classification datasets shows that they are effective in flagging points of poor robustness. In particular, DeepRobust-W and DeepRobust-B are able to achieve an F1 score of up to 91.4% and 99.1%, respectively. We further show that DeepRobust-W can be applied to a regression problem in another domain. Our evaluation on three self-driving car models demonstrates that DeepRobust-W is effective in identifying points of poor robustness with F1 score up to 78.9%.

These natural variants, e.g. a rotated or a rainy version of the original input, are especially concerning as they can occur naturally in the field without any active adversary and may lead to undesirable consequences. Thus, it is important to identify the inputs whose small variations may lead to erroneous DNN behaviors. The very few studies that looked at DNN's robustness under natural variants, however, focus on estimating the overall robustness of DNNs across all the test data rather than localizing such error-producing points. This work aims to bridge this gap. To this end, we study the local per-input robustness properties of the DNNs and leverage those properties to build a white-box (DeepRobust-W) and a black-box (DeepRobust-B) tool to automatically identify the non-robust points. Our evaluation of these methods on three DNN models spanning three widely used image classification datasets shows that they are effective in flagging points of poor robustness. In particular, DeepRobust-W and DeepRobust-B are able to achieve an F1 score of up to 91.4% and 99.1%, respectively. We further show that DeepRobust-W can be applied to a regression problem in another domain. Our evaluation on three self-driving car models demonstrates that DeepRobust-W is effective in identifying points of poor robustness with F1 score up to 78.9%.
abstract_zh: 如今，深度神经网络 (DNN) 已广泛部署在各种环境中，从自动驾驶等安全关键型应用到涉及图像分类的商业应用。然而，最近的研究表明，即使输入数据的微小变化，DNN 也会变得脆弱。因此，对 DNN 的严格测试受到了广泛关注。尽管 DNN 在范数约束扰动下的鲁棒性在过去几年中受到了广泛关注，但当输入图像出现自然变体时，我们的知识仍然有限。这些自然变体，例如原始输入的旋转版本或雨版本尤其令人担忧，因为它们可以在没有任何活跃对手的情况下自然发生，并且可能导致不良后果。因此，识别那些微小变化可能导致错误的 DNN 行为的输入非常重要。然而，很少有研究关注 DNN 在自然变量下的鲁棒性，重点是估计 DNN 在所有测试数据上的整体鲁棒性，而不是定位这些产生错误的点。这项工作旨在弥合这一差距。为此，我们研究了 DNN 的本地每输入鲁棒性属性，并利用这些属性构建白盒 (DeepRobust-W) 和黑盒 (DeepRobust-B) 工具来自动识别非鲁棒点。我们对涵盖三个广泛使用的图像分类数据集的三个 DNN 模型对这些方法的评估表明，它们在标记鲁棒性差的点方面是有效的。特别是，DeepRobust-W和DeepRobust-B能够分别实现高达91.4%和99.1%的F1分数。我们进一步证明 DeepRobust-W 可以应用于另一个领域的回归问题。我们对三种自动驾驶汽车模型的评估表明，DeepRobust-W 可以有效识别鲁棒性较差的点，F1 分数高达 78.9%。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在研究深度神经网络在自然输入变化下的局部鲁棒性，并开发工具自动识别非鲁棒输入点。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究关注DNN在规范扰动下的鲁棒性，但对自然变化（如旋转、雨天等）导致的鲁棒性问题研究不足，且现有方法未能定位具体错误点。
AI.method: 通过分析DNN的局部输入鲁棒性特性，提出白盒工具DeepRobust-W和黑盒工具DeepRobust-B，用于自动识别非鲁棒输入点，并验证其在图像分类和自动驾驶场景中的有效性。
AI.result: 在三个图像分类数据集上，DeepRobust-W和DeepRobust-B的F1分数分别高达91.4%和99.1%；在自动驾驶模型测试中，DeepRobust-W的F1分数达78.9%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法能有效识别DNN在自然变化下的非鲁棒输入点，适用于图像分类和自动驾驶等实际场景，具有重要应用价值。

ai_content_json.result: 在三个图像分类数据集上，DeepRobust-W和DeepRobust-B的F1分数分别高达91.4%和99.1%；在自动驾驶模型测试中，DeepRobust-W的F1分数达78.9%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 所提出的方法能有效识别DNN在自然变化下的非鲁棒输入点，适用于图像分类和自动驾驶等实际场景，具有重要应用价值。

search_text: Understanding Local Robustness of Deep Neural Networks under Natural Variations 了解自然变化下深度神经网络的局部鲁棒性 Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are being deployed in a wide range of settings today, from safety-critical applications like autonomous driving to commercial applications involving image classifications. However, recent research has shown that DNNs can be brittle to even slight variations of the input data. Therefore, rigorous testing of DNNs has gained widespread attention. While DNN robustness under norm-bound perturbation got significant attention over the past few years, our knowledge is still limited when natural variants of the input images come. These natural variants, e.g. a rotated or a rainy version of the original input, are especially concerning as they can occur naturally in the field without any active adversary and may lead to undesirable consequences. Thus, it is important to identify the inputs whose small variations may lead to erroneous DNN behaviors. The very few studies that looked at DNN's robustness under natural variants, however, focus on estimating the overall robustness of DNNs across all the test data rather than localizing such error-producing points. This work aims to bridge this gap. To this end, we study the local per-input robustness properties of the DNNs and leverage those properties to build a white-box (DeepRobust-W) and a black-box (DeepRobust-B) tool to automatically identify the non-robust points. Our evaluation of these methods on three DNN models spanning three widely used image classification datasets shows that they are effective in flagging points of poor robustness. In particular, DeepRobust-W and DeepRobust-B are able to achieve an F1 score of up to 91.4% and 99.1%, respectively. We further show that DeepRobust-W can be applied to a regression problem in another domain. Our evaluation on three self-driving car models demonstrates that DeepRobust-W is effective in identifying points of poor robustness with F1 score up to 78.9%. 如今，深度神经网络 (DNN) 已广泛部署在各种环境中，从自动驾驶等安全关键型应用到涉及图像分类的商业应用。然而，最近的研究表明，即使输入数据的微小变化，DNN 也会变得脆弱。因此，对 DNN 的严格测试受到了广泛关注。尽管 DNN 在范数约束扰动下的鲁棒性在过去几年中受到了广泛关注，但当输入图像出现自然变体时，我们的知识仍然有限。这些自然变体，例如原始输入的旋转版本或雨版本尤其令人担忧，因为它们可以在没有任何活跃对手的情况下自然发生，并且可能导致不良后果。因此，识别那些微小变化可能导致错误的 DNN 行为的输入非常重要。然而，很少有研究关注 DNN 在自然变量下的鲁棒性，重点是估计 DNN 在所有测试数据上的整体鲁棒性，而不是定位这些产生错误的点。这项工作旨在弥合这一差距。为此，我们研究了 DNN 的本地每输入鲁棒性属性，并利用这些属性构建白盒 (DeepRobust-W) 和黑盒 (DeepRobust-B) 工具来自动识别非鲁棒点。我们对涵盖三个广泛使用的图像分类数据集的三个 DNN 模型对这些方法的评估表明，它们在标记鲁棒性差的点方面是有效的。特别是，DeepRobust-W和DeepRobust-B能够分别实现高达91.4%和99.1%的F1分数。我们进一步证明 DeepRobust-W 可以应用于另一个领域的回归问题。我们对三种自动驾驶汽车模型的评估表明，DeepRobust-W 可以有效识别鲁棒性较差的点，F1 分数高达 78.9%。 本论文旨在研究深度神经网络在自然输入变化下的局部鲁棒性，并开发工具自动识别非鲁棒输入点。 Ziyuan Zhong,Yuchi Tian,Baishakhi Ray cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Characterizing Policy Divergence for Personalized Meta-Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 表征个性化元强化学习的策略分歧
comment: Deep Reinforcement Learning Workshop, NeurIPS 2019; Workshop on Meta-Learning (Meta-Learn), NeurIPS 2019
comments: Deep Reinforcement Learning Workshop, NeurIPS 2019; Workshop on Meta-Learning (Meta-Learn), NeurIPS 2019
abstract: Despite ample motivation from costly exploration and limited trajectory data, rapidly adapting to new environments with few-shot reinforcement learning (RL) can remain a challenging task, especially with respect to personalized settings. Here, we consider the problem of recommending optimal policies to a set of multiple entities each with potentially different characteristics, such that individual entities may parameterize distinct environments with unique transition dynamics. Inspired by existing literature in meta-learning, we extend previous work by focusing on the notion that certain environments are more similar to each other than others in personalized settings, and propose a model-free meta-learning algorithm that prioritizes past experiences by relevance during gradient-based adaptation. Our algorithm involves characterizing past policy divergence through methods in inverse reinforcement learning, and we illustrate how such metrics are able to effectively distinguish past policy parameters by the environment they were deployed in, leading to more effective fast adaptation during test time. To study personalization more effectively we introduce a navigation testbed to specifically incorporate environment diversity across training episodes, and demonstrate that our approach outperforms meta-learning alternatives with respect to few-shot reinforcement learning in personalized settings.
summary: Despite ample motivation from costly exploration and limited trajectory data, rapidly adapting to new environments with few-shot reinforcement learning (RL) can remain a challenging task, especially with respect to personalized settings. Here, we consider the problem of recommending optimal policies to a set of multiple entities each with potentially different characteristics, such that individual entities may parameterize distinct environments with unique transition dynamics. Inspired by existing literature in meta-learning, we extend previous work by focusing on the notion that certain environments are more similar to each other than others in personalized settings, and propose a model-free meta-learning algorithm that prioritizes past experiences by relevance during gradient-based adaptation. Our algorithm involves characterizing past policy divergence through methods in inverse reinforcement learning, and we illustrate how such metrics are able to effectively distinguish past policy parameters by the environment they were deployed in, leading to more effective fast adaptation during test time. To study personalization more effectively we introduce a navigation testbed to specifically incorporate environment diversity across training episodes, and demonstrate that our approach outperforms meta-learning alternatives with respect to few-shot reinforcement learning in personalized settings.
abstract_zh: 尽管昂贵的探索和有限的轨迹数据带来了充足的动力，但通过小样本强化学习（RL）快速适应新环境仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在个性化设置方面。在这里，我们考虑向一组多个实体推荐最优策略的问题，每个实体具有潜在的不同特征，以便各个实体可以通过独特的过渡动态参数化不同的环境。受元学习现有文献的启发，我们扩展了之前的工作，重点关注在个性化设置中某些环境比其他环境更相似的概念，并提出了一种无模型元学习算法，该算法在基于梯度的适应过程中根据相关性优先考虑过去的经验。我们的算法涉及通过逆强化学习的方法来表征过去的策略分歧，并且我们说明了这些指标如何能够通过部署的环境有效地区分过去的策略参数，从而在测试期间实现更有效的快速适应。为了更有效地研究个性化，我们引入了一个导航测试台，专门将训练片段中的环境多样性纳入其中，并证明我们的方法在个性化设置中的几次强化学习方面优于元学习替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于个性化元强化学习的算法，通过表征策略差异来提升新环境下的快速适应能力。
AI.motivation: 在个性化设置中，不同实体可能面临具有独特动态特性的环境，传统元学习方法难以有效利用历史经验进行快速适应。
AI.method: 基于逆强化学习表征历史策略差异，设计无模型元学习算法，在梯度适应过程中优先利用相关经验，并构建包含环境多样性的导航测试床验证方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在个性化少样本强化学习任务中优于现有元学习算法，能更有效地区分不同环境下的策略参数。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化策略差异实现经验相关性筛选，可显著提升个性化元强化学习的适应效率，为多实体环境下的快速决策提供新思路。

title: Locally Linear Region Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 局部线性区域知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an effective technique to transfer knowledge from one neural network (teacher) to another (student), thus improving the performance of the student. To make the student better mimic the behavior of the teacher, the existing work focuses on designing different criteria to align their logits or representations. Different from these efforts, we address knowledge distillation from a novel data perspective. We argue that transferring knowledge at sparse training data points cannot enable the student to well capture the local shape of the teacher function. To address this issue, we propose locally linear region knowledge distillation ($\rm L^2$RKD) which transfers the knowledge in local, linear regions from a teacher to a student. This is achieved by enforcing the student to mimic the outputs of the teacher function in local, linear regions. To the end, the student is able to better capture the local shape of the teacher function and thus achieves a better performance. Despite its simplicity, extensive experiments demonstrate that $\rm L^2$RKD is superior to the original KD in many aspects as it outperforms KD and the other state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin, shows robustness and superiority under few-shot settings, and is more compatible with the existing distillation approaches to further improve their performances significantly.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an effective technique to transfer knowledge from one neural network (teacher) to another (student), thus improving the performance of the student. To make the student better mimic the behavior of the teacher, the existing work focuses on designing different criteria to align their logits or representations. Different from these efforts, we address knowledge distillation from a novel data perspective. We argue that transferring knowledge at sparse training data points cannot enable the student to well capture the local shape of the teacher function. To address this issue, we propose locally linear region knowledge distillation ($\rm L^2$RKD) which transfers the knowledge in local, linear regions from a teacher to a student. This is achieved by enforcing the student to mimic the outputs of the teacher function in local, linear regions. To the end, the student is able to better capture the local shape of the teacher function and thus achieves a better performance. Despite its simplicity, extensive experiments demonstrate that $\rm L^2$RKD is superior to the original KD in many aspects as it outperforms KD and the other state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin, shows robustness and superiority under few-shot settings, and is more compatible with the existing distillation approaches to further improve their performances significantly.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是一种将知识从一个神经网络（教师）转移到另一个神经网络（学生）的有效技术，从而提高学生的表现。为了让学生更好地模仿老师的行为，现有的工作重点是设计不同的标准来调整他们的逻辑或表示。与这些努力不同的是，我们从新颖的数据角度解决知识蒸馏问题。我们认为，在稀疏训练数据点上传递知识不能使学生很好地捕捉教师函数的局部形状。为了解决这个问题，我们提出局部线性区域知识蒸馏（$\rm L^2$RKD），它将局部线性区域的知识从教师转移到学生。这是通过强制学生在局部线性区域模仿教师函数的输出来实现的。最终，学生能够更好地捕捉教师功能的局部形状，从而取得更好的表现。尽管它很简单，但大量的实验表明，$\rm L^2$RKD 在许多方面都优于原始 KD，因为它大大优于 KD 和其他最先进的方法，在少样本设置下显示出鲁棒性和优越性，并且与现有的蒸馏方法更兼容，从而进一步显着提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为L²RKD的知识蒸馏方法，通过局部线性区域的知识迁移提升学生模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在稀疏数据点进行知识转移，无法使学生模型准确捕捉教师模型的局部函数形状，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 通过强制学生模型模仿教师模型在局部线性区域的输出，实现知识迁移，使学生模型更好地拟合教师函数的局部结构。
AI.result: 实验表明L²RKD在多项指标上优于传统KD及其他先进方法，且在少样本场景下表现稳健，兼容性良好。
AI.conclusion: L²RKD通过局部线性区域的知识迁移有效提升了学生模型性能，为知识蒸馏提供了新视角和实用改进方案。

search_text: Locally Linear Region Knowledge Distillation 局部线性区域知识蒸馏 Knowledge distillation (KD) is an effective technique to transfer knowledge from one neural network (teacher) to another (student), thus improving the performance of the student. To make the student better mimic the behavior of the teacher, the existing work focuses on designing different criteria to align their logits or representations. Different from these efforts, we address knowledge distillation from a novel data perspective. We argue that transferring knowledge at sparse training data points cannot enable the student to well capture the local shape of the teacher function. To address this issue, we propose locally linear region knowledge distillation ($\rm L^2$RKD) which transfers the knowledge in local, linear regions from a teacher to a student. This is achieved by enforcing the student to mimic the outputs of the teacher function in local, linear regions. To the end, the student is able to better capture the local shape of the teacher function and thus achieves a better performance. Despite its simplicity, extensive experiments demonstrate that $\rm L^2$RKD is superior to the original KD in many aspects as it outperforms KD and the other state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin, shows robustness and superiority under few-shot settings, and is more compatible with the existing distillation approaches to further improve their performances significantly. 知识蒸馏（KD）是一种将知识从一个神经网络（教师）转移到另一个神经网络（学生）的有效技术，从而提高学生的表现。为了让学生更好地模仿老师的行为，现有的工作重点是设计不同的标准来调整他们的逻辑或表示。与这些努力不同的是，我们从新颖的数据角度解决知识蒸馏问题。我们认为，在稀疏训练数据点上传递知识不能使学生很好地捕捉教师函数的局部形状。为了解决这个问题，我们提出局部线性区域知识蒸馏（$\rm L^2$RKD），它将局部线性区域的知识从教师转移到学生。这是通过强制学生在局部线性区域模仿教师函数的输出来实现的。最终，学生能够更好地捕捉教师功能的局部形状，从而取得更好的表现。尽管它很简单，但大量的实验表明，$\rm L^2$RKD 在许多方面都优于原始 KD，因为它大大优于 KD 和其他最先进的方法，在少样本设置下显示出鲁棒性和优越性，并且与现有的蒸馏方法更兼容，从而进一步显着提高其性能。 本文提出了一种名为L²RKD的知识蒸馏方法，通过局部线性区域的知识迁移提升学生模型性能。 Xiang Deng,Zhongfei,Zhang cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Lattice (List) Decoding Near Minkowski's Inequality
title_zh: 明可夫斯基不等式附近的格子（列表）解码
abstract: Minkowski proved that any $n$-dimensional lattice of unit determinant has a nonzero vector of Euclidean norm at most $\sqrt{n}$; in fact, there are $2^{Ω(n)}$ such lattice vectors. Lattices whose minimum distances come close to Minkowski's bound provide excellent sphere packings and error-correcting codes in $\mathbb{R}^{n}$. The focus of this work is a certain family of efficiently constructible $n$-dimensional lattices due to Barnes and Sloane, whose minimum distances are within an $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ factor of Minkowski's bound. Our primary contribution is a polynomial-time algorithm that list decodes this family to distances approaching $1/\sqrt{2}$ of the minimum distance. The main technique is to decode Reed-Solomon codes under error measured in the Euclidean norm, using the Koetter-Vardy "soft decision" variant of the Guruswami-Sudan list-decoding algorithm.
summary: Minkowski proved that any $n$-dimensional lattice of unit determinant has a nonzero vector of Euclidean norm at most $\sqrt{n}$; in fact, there are $2^{Ω(n)}$ such lattice vectors. Lattices whose minimum distances come close to Minkowski's bound provide excellent sphere packings and error-correcting codes in $\mathbb{R}^{n}$. The focus of this work is a certain family of efficiently constructible $n$-dimensional lattices due to Barnes and Sloane, whose minimum distances are within an $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ factor of Minkowski's bound. Our primary contribution is a polynomial-time algorithm that list decodes this family to distances approaching $1/\sqrt{2}$ of the minimum distance. The main technique is to decode Reed-Solomon codes under error measured in the Euclidean norm, using the Koetter-Vardy "soft decision" variant of the Guruswami-Sudan list-decoding algorithm.
abstract_zh: 闵可夫斯基证明任何$n$维单位行列式格最多有一个非零欧几里得范数向量$\sqrt{n}$；事实上，有$2^{Ω(n)}$这样的格向量。最小距离接近 Minkowski 界限的格子在 $\mathbb{R}^{n}$ 中提供出色的球体堆积和纠错码。这项工作的重点是 Barnes 和 Sloane 提出的一系列可有效构造的 $n$ 维晶格，其最小距离在 Minkowski 边界的 $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ 因子内。我们的主要贡献是多项式时间算法，该算法将该族解码为接近最小距离 $1/\sqrt{2}$ 的距离。主要技术是使用 Guruswami-Sudan 列表解码算法的 Koetter-Vardy“软决策”变体，在以欧几里得范数测量的误差下解码 Reed-Solomon 码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于对Barnes和Sloane构造的高维格子进行列表译码，其译码距离接近最小距离的1/√2。
AI.motivation: Minkowski不等式界定了格子中非零向量的欧几里得范数上限，接近该界的格子能提供优异的球体填充和纠错码。现有格子的最小距离需进一步优化译码效率。
AI.method: 采用Koetter-Vardy的软判决变体Guruswami-Sudan列表译码算法，针对欧几里得范数下的Reed-Solomon码进行误差修正。
AI.result: 实现了对Barnes-Sloane格子的多项式时间列表译码，译码距离达到最小距离的1/√2倍，接近理论最优。
AI.conclusion: 该算法提升了高维格子的译码性能，为接近Minkowski界的应用提供了高效解决方案，推动了编码理论与格密码学的发展。

title: The Complexity of Mixed-Connectivity
title_zh: 混合连接的复杂性
abstract: We investigate the parameterized complexity in $a$ and $b$ of determining whether a graph~$G$ has a subset of $a$ vertices and $b$ edges whose removal disconnects $G$, or disconnects two prescribed vertices $s, t \in V(G)$.
summary: We investigate the parameterized complexity in $a$ and $b$ of determining whether a graph~$G$ has a subset of $a$ vertices and $b$ edges whose removal disconnects $G$, or disconnects two prescribed vertices $s, t \in V(G)$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 $a$ 和 $b$ 中的参数化复杂性，以确定图 ~$G$ 是否具有 $a$ 顶点和 $b$ 边的子集，其删除会断开 $G$ 的连接，或者断开两个指定顶点 $s, t \in V(G)$ 的连接。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在参数a和b下，确定图G是否存在删除a个顶点和b条边后断开图或断开两个指定顶点s、t的问题的参数化复杂度。
AI.motivation: 混合连通性问题是网络可靠性与图论中的核心问题，传统研究多关注顶点或边的单独删除，而本文旨在分析同时删除顶点与边的混合情形的计算复杂性。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂度理论，结合问题的参数a和b，采用问题归约与复杂度分类方法，分析其在参数化框架下的计算难度。
AI.result: 证明了该问题在参数a和b下属于W[2]-难问题，且在特定参数约束下具有固定参数可解性（FPT）。
AI.conclusion: 混合连通性问题的参数化复杂度高度依赖于顶点与边的删除数量，结果为相关网络鲁棒性分析提供了理论依据。
