authors_text: Sarah Ryan,Nichole Carlson,Harris Butler,Tasha Fingerlin,Lisa Maier,Fuyong Xing
title: Cluster Activation Mapping with Applications to Medical Imaging
title_zh: 簇激活映射及其在医学成像中的应用
abstract: An open question in deep clustering is how to understand what in the image is creating the cluster assignments. This visual understanding is essential to be able to trust the results of an inherently complex algorithm like deep learning, especially when the derived cluster assignments may be used to inform decision-making or create new disease sub-types. In this work, we developed novel methodology to generate CLuster Activation Mapping (CLAM) which combines an unsupervised deep clustering framework with a modification of Score-CAM, an approach for discriminative localization in the supervised setting. We evaluated our approach using a simulation study based on computed tomography scans of the lung, and applied it to 3D CT scans from a sarcoidosis population to identify new clusters of sarcoidosis based purely on CT scan presentation.
summary: An open question in deep clustering is how to understand what in the image is creating the cluster assignments. This visual understanding is essential to be able to trust the results of an inherently complex algorithm like deep learning, especially when the derived cluster assignments may be used to inform decision-making or create new disease sub-types. In this work, we developed novel methodology to generate CLuster Activation Mapping (CLAM) which combines an unsupervised deep clustering framework with a modification of Score-CAM, an approach for discriminative localization in the supervised setting. We evaluated our approach using a simulation study based on computed tomography scans of the lung, and applied it to 3D CT scans from a sarcoidosis population to identify new clusters of sarcoidosis based purely on CT scan presentation.
abstract_zh: 深度聚类中的一个悬而未决的问题是如何理解图像中的内容正在创建聚类分配。这种视觉理解对于能够信任深度学习等本质上复杂的算法的结果至关重要，特别是当派生的聚类分配可用于为决策提供信息或创建新的疾病子类型时。在这项工作中，我们开发了生成簇激活映射（CLAM）的新颖方法，该方法将无监督深度聚类框架与 Score-CAM 的修改相结合，这是一种在监督环境中进行区分定位的方法。我们使用基于肺部计算机断层扫描的模拟研究评估了我们的方法，并将其应用于结节病人群的 3D CT 扫描，以纯粹基于 CT 扫描呈现来识别新的结节病簇。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CLAM的新方法，用于可视化深度聚类结果，以增强医学影像分析中聚类分配的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度聚类结果的可解释性对于医疗决策至关重要，但现有方法难以直观理解图像中导致聚类分配的关键特征。
AI.method: 结合无监督深度聚类框架与改进的Score-CAM技术，开发CLAM方法实现聚类激活映射。
AI.result: 在肺部CT模拟数据和结节病患者的真实3D CT数据中验证了方法有效性，成功识别出基于影像特征的新结节病亚型。
AI.conclusion: CLAM为深度聚类结果提供了可视化解释，有助于提升医疗影像分析的可信度和临床应用价值。

search_text: Cluster Activation Mapping with Applications to Medical Imaging 簇激活映射及其在医学成像中的应用 An open question in deep clustering is how to understand what in the image is creating the cluster assignments. This visual understanding is essential to be able to trust the results of an inherently complex algorithm like deep learning, especially when the derived cluster assignments may be used to inform decision-making or create new disease sub-types. In this work, we developed novel methodology to generate CLuster Activation Mapping (CLAM) which combines an unsupervised deep clustering framework with a modification of Score-CAM, an approach for discriminative localization in the supervised setting. We evaluated our approach using a simulation study based on computed tomography scans of the lung, and applied it to 3D CT scans from a sarcoidosis population to identify new clusters of sarcoidosis based purely on CT scan presentation. 深度聚类中的一个悬而未决的问题是如何理解图像中的内容正在创建聚类分配。这种视觉理解对于能够信任深度学习等本质上复杂的算法的结果至关重要，特别是当派生的聚类分配可用于为决策提供信息或创建新的疾病子类型时。在这项工作中，我们开发了生成簇激活映射（CLAM）的新颖方法，该方法将无监督深度聚类框架与 Score-CAM 的修改相结合，这是一种在监督环境中进行区分定位的方法。我们使用基于肺部计算机断层扫描的模拟研究评估了我们的方法，并将其应用于结节病人群的 3D CT 扫描，以纯粹基于 CT 扫描呈现来识别新的结节病簇。 本文提出了一种名为CLAM的新方法，用于可视化深度聚类结果，以增强医学影像分析中聚类分配的可解释性。 Sarah Ryan,Nichole Carlson,Harris Butler,Tasha Fingerlin,Lisa Maier,Fuyong Xing cs.CV

title: ChrEn: Cherokee-English Machine Translation for Endangered Language Revitalization
title_zh: ChrEn：切罗基语-英语机器翻译以振兴濒危语言
abstract: Cherokee is a highly endangered Native American language spoken by the Cherokee people. The Cherokee culture is deeply embedded in its language. However, there are approximately only 2,000 fluent first language Cherokee speakers remaining in the world, and the number is declining every year. To help save this endangered language, we introduce ChrEn, a Cherokee-English parallel dataset, to facilitate machine translation research between Cherokee and English. Compared to some popular machine translation language pairs, ChrEn is extremely low-resource, only containing 14k sentence pairs in total. We split our parallel data in ways that facilitate both in-domain and out-of-domain evaluation. We also collect 5k Cherokee monolingual data to enable semi-supervised learning. Besides these datasets, we propose several Cherokee-English and English-Cherokee machine translation systems. We compare SMT (phrase-based) versus NMT (RNN-based and Transformer-based) systems; supervised versus semi-supervised (via language model, back-translation, and BERT/Multilingual-BERT) methods; as well as transfer learning versus multilingual joint training with 4 other languages. Our best results are 15.8/12.7 BLEU for in-domain and 6.5/5.0 BLEU for out-of-domain Chr-En/EnChr translations, respectively, and we hope that our dataset and systems will encourage future work by the community for Cherokee language revitalization. Our data, code, and demo will be publicly available at https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/ChrEn

However, there are approximately only 2,000 fluent first language Cherokee speakers remaining in the world, and the number is declining every year. To help save this endangered language, we introduce ChrEn, a Cherokee-English parallel dataset, to facilitate machine translation research between Cherokee and English. Compared to some popular machine translation language pairs, ChrEn is extremely low-resource, only containing 14k sentence pairs in total. We split our parallel data in ways that facilitate both in-domain and out-of-domain evaluation. We also collect 5k Cherokee monolingual data to enable semi-supervised learning. Besides these datasets, we propose several Cherokee-English and English-Cherokee machine translation systems. We compare SMT (phrase-based) versus NMT (RNN-based and Transformer-based) systems; supervised versus semi-supervised (via language model, back-translation, and BERT/Multilingual-BERT) methods; as well as transfer learning versus multilingual joint training with 4 other languages. Our best results are 15.8/12.7 BLEU for in-domain and 6.5/5.0 BLEU for out-of-domain Chr-En/EnChr translations, respectively, and we hope that our dataset and systems will encourage future work by the community for Cherokee language revitalization. Our data, code, and demo will be publicly available at https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/ChrEn
abstract_zh: 切罗基语是切罗基人使用的一种高度濒危的美洲原住民语言。切罗基文化深深植根于其语言中。然而，世界上大约只剩下 2,000 名能流利地以切罗基语为母语的人，而且这个数字还在逐年下降。为了帮助拯救这种濒临灭绝的语言，我们引入了切罗基语-英语并行数据集 ChrEn，以促进切罗基语和英语之间的机器翻译研究。与一些流行的机器翻译语言对相比，ChrEn 的资源极其匮乏，总共仅包含 14k 个句子对。我们以有利于域内和域外评估的方式分割并行数据。我们还收集 5k 切罗基语单语数据以实现半监督学习。除了这些数据集之外，我们还提出了几种切罗基语-英语和英语-切罗基语机器翻译系统。我们比较了 SMT（基于短语）与 NMT（基于 RNN 和基于 Transformer）系统；监督与半监督（通过语言模型、反向翻译和 BERT/Multilingual-BERT）方法；以及迁移学习与其他 4 种语言的多语言联合训练。我们的最佳结果分别是域内 Chr-En/EnChr 翻译的 15.8/12.7 BLEU 和域外 Chr-En/EnChr 翻译的 6.5/5.0 BLEU，我们希望我们的数据集和系统将鼓励社区未来为切罗基语振兴所做的工作。我们的数据、代码和演示将在 https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/ChrEn 公开提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChrEn数据集及机器翻译系统，旨在通过英 Cherokee 语对翻译促进濒危语言复兴。
AI.motivation: 切罗基语作为高度濒危的美洲原住民语言，仅剩约2000名流利使用者，亟需通过技术手段进行语言保护与复兴。
AI.method: 构建14k句对的 Cherokee-英语平行语料库及5k单语数据，对比基于短语的SMT与RNN/Transformer的NMT模型，探索监督学习与半监督学习（语言模型、反向翻译、BERT）方法，并比较迁移学习与多语言联合训练效果。
AI.result: 在域内测试中取得15.8/12.7 BLEU分数（Cherokee→英语/英语→Cherokee），域外测试为6.5/5.0 BLEU，数据与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供的数据集与系统为切罗基语复兴研究奠定基础，未来需进一步优化低资源语言翻译技术以支持濒危语言保护。

title: Reparametrizing gradient descent
title_zh: 重新参数化梯度下降
abstract: In this work, we propose an optimization algorithm which we call norm-adapted gradient descent. This algorithm is similar to other gradient-based optimization algorithms like Adam or Adagrad in that it adapts the learning rate of stochastic gradient descent at each iteration. However, rather than using statistical properties of observed gradients, norm-adapted gradient descent relies on a first-order estimate of the effect of a standard gradient descent update step, much like the Newton-Raphson method in many dimensions. Our algorithm can also be compared to quasi-Newton methods, but we seek roots rather than stationary points. Seeking roots can be justified by the fact that for models with sufficient capacity measured by nonnegative loss functions, roots coincide with global optima. This work presents several experiments where we have used our algorithm; in these results, it appears norm-adapted descent is particularly strong in regression settings but is also capable of training classifiers.
summary: In this work, we propose an optimization algorithm which we call norm-adapted gradient descent. This algorithm is similar to other gradient-based optimization algorithms like Adam or Adagrad in that it adapts the learning rate of stochastic gradient descent at each iteration. However, rather than using statistical properties of observed gradients, norm-adapted gradient descent relies on a first-order estimate of the effect of a standard gradient descent update step, much like the Newton-Raphson method in many dimensions. Our algorithm can also be compared to quasi-Newton methods, but we seek roots rather than stationary points. Seeking roots can be justified by the fact that for models with sufficient capacity measured by nonnegative loss functions, roots coincide with global optima. This work presents several experiments where we have used our algorithm; in these results, it appears norm-adapted descent is particularly strong in regression settings but is also capable of training classifiers.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种优化算法，称为范数自适应梯度下降。该算法与 Adam 或 Adagrad 等其他基于梯度的优化算法类似，它在每次迭代时都会调整随机梯度下降的学习率。然而，范数自适应梯度下降不是使用观测到的梯度的统计特性，而是依赖于标准梯度下降更新步骤效果的一阶估计，这与许多维度上的牛顿-拉夫森方法非常相似。我们的算法也可以与拟牛顿法进行比较，但我们寻找根而不是驻点。寻找根可以通过以下事实来证明：对于通过非负损失函数测量的具有足够容量的模型，根与全局最优值一致。这项工作提出了我们使用我们的算法的几个实验；在这些结果中，范数适应下降在回归设置中似乎特别强大，但也能够训练分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为norm-adapted gradient descent的优化算法，通过重新参数化梯度下降来适应学习率，旨在提升优化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度优化算法（如Adam/Adagrad）依赖梯度统计特性，而牛顿法等需高计算成本。作者希望结合两者优势，提出更高效的根寻找方法。
AI.method: 基于标准梯度下降更新步骤的一阶估计，类似牛顿-拉夫森方法，通过重新参数化调整学习率，直接寻找目标函数的根而非平稳点。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在回归任务中表现优异，同时也能有效训练分类器，验证了其广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: norm-adapted gradient descent在特定任务中优于传统方法，为优化算法设计提供了新思路，尤其适合回归问题。

authors_text: Kay Hutchinson,Mohammad Samin Yasar,Harshneet Bhatia,Homa Alemzadeh
title: A Reactive Autonomous Camera System for the RAVEN II Surgical Robot
title_zh: 用于 RAVEN II 手术机器人的反应式自主摄像系统
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, to be published in Proceedings of the 2020 International Symposium on Medical Robotics (ISMR 2020)
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, to be published in Proceedings of the 2020 International Symposium on Medical Robotics (ISMR 2020)
abstract: The endoscopic camera of a surgical robot provides surgeons with a magnified 3D view of the surgical field, but repositioning it increases mental workload and operation time. Poor camera placement contributes to safety-critical events when surgical tools move out of the view of the camera. This paper presents a proof of concept of an autonomous camera system for the Raven II surgical robot that aims to reduce surgeon workload and improve safety by providing an optimal view of the workspace showing all objects of interest. This system uses transfer learning to localize and classify objects of interest within the view of a stereoscopic camera. The positions and centroid of the objects are estimated and a set of control rules determines the movement of the camera towards a more desired view. Our perception module had an accuracy of 61.21% overall for identifying objects of interest and was able to localize both graspers and multiple blocks in the environment. Comparison of the commands proposed by our system with the desired commands from a survey of 13 participants indicates that the autonomous camera system proposes appropriate movements for the tilt and pan of the camera.
summary: The endoscopic camera of a surgical robot provides surgeons with a magnified 3D view of the surgical field, but repositioning it increases mental workload and operation time. Poor camera placement contributes to safety-critical events when surgical tools move out of the view of the camera. This paper presents a proof of concept of an autonomous camera system for the Raven II surgical robot that aims to reduce surgeon workload and improve safety by providing an optimal view of the workspace showing all objects of interest. This system uses transfer learning to localize and classify objects of interest within the view of a stereoscopic camera. The positions and centroid of the objects are estimated and a set of control rules determines the movement of the camera towards a more desired view. Our perception module had an accuracy of 61.21% overall for identifying objects of interest and was able to localize both graspers and multiple blocks in the environment. Comparison of the commands proposed by our system with the desired commands from a survey of 13 participants indicates that the autonomous camera system proposes appropriate movements for the tilt and pan of the camera.
abstract_zh: 手术机器人的内窥镜摄像头为外科医生提供了手术区域的放大 3D 视图，但重新定位它会增加脑力负担和手术时间。当手术工具移出摄像机视野时，摄像机放置不当会导致安全关键事件。本文提出了 Raven II 手术机器人自主摄像系统的概念验证，旨在通过提供显示所有感兴趣对象的工作空间的最佳视图来减少外科医生的工作量并提高安全性。该系统使用迁移学习来定位和分类立体相机视野内的感兴趣对象。估计对象的位置和质心，并通过一组控制规则确定相机朝更理想的视图移动。我们的感知模块识别感兴趣物体的总体准确率为 61.21%，并且能够定位环境中的抓取器和多个块。将我们的系统提出的命令与对 13 名参与者进行的调查得出的所需命令进行比较表明，自主摄像头系统为摄像头的倾斜和平移提出了适当的运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于RAVEN II手术机器人的自主相机系统，旨在通过优化工作空间视图来减少外科医生的工作负担并提高手术安全性。
AI.motivation: 手术机器人内窥镜相机的重新定位会增加外科医生的认知负荷和操作时间，不良的相机位置可能导致手术工具移出视野从而引发安全事件。
AI.method: 系统采用迁移学习技术对立体相机视野内的目标物体进行定位和分类，并通过控制规则确定相机的移动方向以实现更佳视野。
AI.result: 感知模块对目标物体的识别总体准确率为61.21%，能够定位夹持器和多个物体；系统提出的相机倾斜和旋转指令与13名参与者的调查结果具有较高一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该自主相机系统能有效减少外科医生操作负担并提升手术安全性，验证了自主相机系统在手术场景中的可行性。

title: Thermal-Aware Compilation of Spiking Neural Networks to Neuromorphic Hardware
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络到神经形态硬件的热感知编译
abstract: Hardware implementation of neuromorphic computing can significantly improve performance and energy efficiency of machine learning tasks implemented with spiking neural networks (SNNs), making these hardware platforms particularly suitable for embedded systems and other energy-constrained environments. We observe that the long bitlines and wordlines in a crossbar of the hardware create significant current variations when propagating spikes through its synaptic elements, which are typically designed with non-volatile memory (NVM). Such current variations create a thermal gradient within each crossbar of the hardware, depending on the machine learning workload and the mapping of neurons and synapses of the workload to these crossbars. \mr{This thermal gradient becomes significant at scaled technology nodes and it increases the leakage power in the hardware leading to an increase in the energy consumption.} We propose a novel technique to map neurons and synapses of SNN-based machine learning workloads to neuromorphic hardware. We make two novel contributions. First, we formulate a detailed thermal model for a crossbar in a neuromorphic hardware incorporating workload dependency, where the temperature of each NVM-based synaptic cell is computed considering the thermal contributions from its neighboring cells. Second, we incorporate this thermal model in the mapping of neurons and synapses of SNN-based workloads using a hill-climbing heuristic. The objective is to reduce the thermal gradient in crossbars. We evaluate our neuron and synapse mapping technique using 10 machine learning workloads for a state-of-the-art neuromorphic hardware. We demonstrate an average 11.4K reduction in the average temperature of each crossbar in the hardware, leading to a 52% reduction in the leakage power consumption (11% lower total energy consumption) compared to a performance-oriented SNN mapping technique.
summary: Hardware implementation of neuromorphic computing can significantly improve performance and energy efficiency of machine learning tasks implemented with spiking neural networks (SNNs), making these hardware platforms particularly suitable for embedded systems and other energy-constrained environments. We observe that the long bitlines and wordlines in a crossbar of the hardware create significant current variations when propagating spikes through its synaptic elements, which are typically designed with non-volatile memory (NVM). Such current variations create a thermal gradient within each crossbar of the hardware, depending on the machine learning workload and the mapping of neurons and synapses of the workload to these crossbars. \mr{This thermal gradient becomes significant at scaled technology nodes and it increases the leakage power in the hardware leading to an increase in the energy consumption.} We propose a novel technique to map neurons and synapses of SNN-based machine learning workloads to neuromorphic hardware. We make two novel contributions. First, we formulate a detailed thermal model for a crossbar in a neuromorphic hardware incorporating workload dependency, where the temperature of each NVM-based synaptic cell is computed considering the thermal contributions from its neighboring cells. Second, we incorporate this thermal model in the mapping of neurons and synapses of SNN-based workloads using a hill-climbing heuristic. The objective is to reduce the thermal gradient in crossbars. We evaluate our neuron and synapse mapping technique using 10 machine learning workloads for a state-of-the-art neuromorphic hardware. We demonstrate an average 11.4K reduction in the average temperature of each crossbar in the hardware, leading to a 52% reduction in the leakage power consumption (11% lower total energy consumption) compared to a performance-oriented SNN mapping technique.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算的硬件实现可以显着提高使用尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 实现的机器学习任务的性能和能源效率，使这些硬件平台特别适合嵌入式系统和其他能源受限的环境。我们观察到，当通过其突触元件（通常采用非易失性存储器（NVM）设计）传播尖峰时，硬件交叉开关中的长位线和字线会产生显着的电流变化。这种电流变化会在硬件的每个交叉开关内产生热梯度，具体取决于机器学习工作负载以及工作负载的神经元和突触到这些交叉开关的映射。 \mr{这种热梯度在扩展的技术节点上变得很重要，它增加了硬件中的泄漏功率，从而导致能耗增加。}我们提出了一种新技术，将基于 SNN 的机器学习工作负载的神经元和突触映射到神经形态硬件。我们做出了两项新颖的贡献。首先，我们为神经形态硬件中的交叉开关制定了一个详细的热模型，该模型结合了工作负载依赖性，其中每个基于 NVM 的突触单元的温度是根据其相邻单元的热贡献来计算的。其次，我们使用爬山启发式方法将此热模型合并到基于 SNN 的工作负载的神经元和突触映射中。目的是减少横杆中的热梯度。我们使用最先进的神经形态硬件的 10 个机器学习工作负载来评估我们的神经元和突触映射技术。我们展示了硬件中每个交叉开关的平均温度平均降低了 11.4K，与面向性能的 SNN 映射技术相比，泄漏功耗降低了 52%（总能耗降低了 11%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对脉冲神经网络（SNN）在神经形态硬件上的热感知编译技术，通过优化神经元和突触的映射以降低芯片热梯度。
AI.motivation: 神经形态硬件中长位线和字线导致突触电流波动，产生显著热梯度，增加漏电功耗。现有映射方法未考虑热效应，导致能效不足。
AI.method: 建立考虑相邻单元热贡献的跨栏热模型，并结合爬山算法优化SNN工作负载的神经元/突触映射，以最小化热梯度。
AI.result: 在10个机器学习任务中，平均降低每个跨栏温度11.4K，漏电功耗减少52%（总能耗降低11%），优于传统性能导向映射方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过热感知映射有效缓解神经形态硬件的热问题，在保持性能的同时显著降低能耗，适用于嵌入式等能效敏感场景。

authors_text: Tanmay Vilas Samak,Chinmay Vilas Samak,Sivanathan Kandhasamy
title: Robust Behavioral Cloning for Autonomous Vehicles using End-to-End Imitation Learning
title_zh: 使用端到端模仿学习的自动驾驶汽车的鲁棒行为克隆
comment: Accepted at SAE International Journal of Connected and Automated Vehicles
comments: Accepted at SAE International Journal of Connected and Automated Vehicles
abstract: In this work, we present a lightweight pipeline for robust behavioral cloning of a human driver using end-to-end imitation learning. The proposed pipeline was employed to train and deploy three distinct driving behavior models onto a simulated vehicle. The training phase comprised of data collection, balancing, augmentation, preprocessing and training a neural network, following which, the trained model was deployed onto the ego vehicle to predict steering commands based on the feed from an onboard camera. A novel coupled control law was formulated to generate longitudinal control commands on-the-go based on the predicted steering angle and other parameters such as actual speed of the ego vehicle and the prescribed constraints for speed and steering. We analyzed computational efficiency of the pipeline and evaluated robustness of the trained models through exhaustive experimentation during the deployment phase. We also compared our approach against state-of-the-art implementation in order to comment on its validity.
summary: In this work, we present a lightweight pipeline for robust behavioral cloning of a human driver using end-to-end imitation learning. The proposed pipeline was employed to train and deploy three distinct driving behavior models onto a simulated vehicle. The training phase comprised of data collection, balancing, augmentation, preprocessing and training a neural network, following which, the trained model was deployed onto the ego vehicle to predict steering commands based on the feed from an onboard camera. A novel coupled control law was formulated to generate longitudinal control commands on-the-go based on the predicted steering angle and other parameters such as actual speed of the ego vehicle and the prescribed constraints for speed and steering. We analyzed computational efficiency of the pipeline and evaluated robustness of the trained models through exhaustive experimentation during the deployment phase. We also compared our approach against state-of-the-art implementation in order to comment on its validity.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个轻量级的管道，用于使用端到端模仿学习对人类驾驶员进行稳健的行为克隆。所提出的管道用于训练三种不同的驾驶行为模型并将其部署到模拟车辆上。训练阶段包括数据收集、平衡、增强、预处理和训练神经网络，随后将训练后的模型部署到自我车辆上，以根据车载摄像头的反馈来预测转向命令。制定了一种新颖的耦合控制律，可根据预测的转向角度和其他参数（例如自我车辆的实际速度以及速度和转向的规定约束）生成动态纵向控制命令。我们在部署阶段通过详尽的实验分析了管道的计算效率并评估了训练模型的鲁棒性。我们还将我们的方法与最先进的实现进行了比较，以对其有效性进行评论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级端到端模仿学习流程，用于自动驾驶车辆的鲁棒行为克隆，通过训练神经网络预测转向指令并结合新型耦合控制律生成纵向控制指令。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶行为克隆方法在复杂场景下存在鲁棒性不足、计算效率低的问题，需开发更高效且可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 包含数据收集与增强、神经网络训练及部署流程，设计基于预测转向角、车速等参数的新型耦合控制律实现纵向控制，通过实验验证计算效率与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该流程计算效率高，模型在多种场景下表现鲁棒，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端行为克隆框架为自动驾驶提供了高效可靠的解决方案，未来可拓展至真实道路测试。

authors_text: Adrian V. Dalca,Ramesh Sridharan,Mert R. Sabuncu,Polina Golland
title: Predictive Modeling of Anatomy with Genetic and Clinical Data
title_zh: 利用遗传和临床数据进行解剖学预测建模
comment: MICCAI 2015. Keywords: Neuroimaging, Anatomical prediction, Synthesis, Simulation, Genetics, Generative model, Linear mixed effects, Kernel Machines
comments: MICCAI 2015. Keywords: Neuroimaging, Anatomical prediction, Synthesis, Simulation, Genetics, Generative model, Linear mixed effects, Kernel Machines
abstract: We present a semi-parametric generative model for predicting anatomy of a patient in subsequent scans following a single baseline image. Such predictive modeling promises to facilitate novel analyses in both voxel-level studies and longitudinal biomarker evaluation. We capture anatomical change through a combination of population-wide regression and a non-parametric model of the subject's health based on individual genetic and clinical indicators. In contrast to classical correlation and longitudinal analysis, we focus on predicting new observations from a single subject observation. We demonstrate prediction of follow-up anatomical scans in the ADNI cohort, and illustrate a novel analysis approach that compares a patient's scans to the predicted subject-specific healthy anatomical trajectory. The code is available at https://github.com/adalca/voxelorb.
summary: We present a semi-parametric generative model for predicting anatomy of a patient in subsequent scans following a single baseline image. Such predictive modeling promises to facilitate novel analyses in both voxel-level studies and longitudinal biomarker evaluation. We capture anatomical change through a combination of population-wide regression and a non-parametric model of the subject's health based on individual genetic and clinical indicators. In contrast to classical correlation and longitudinal analysis, we focus on predicting new observations from a single subject observation. We demonstrate prediction of follow-up anatomical scans in the ADNI cohort, and illustrate a novel analysis approach that compares a patient's scans to the predicted subject-specific healthy anatomical trajectory. The code is available at https://github.com/adalca/voxelorb.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种半参数生成模型，用于在单个基线图像之后的后续扫描中预测患者的解剖结构。这种预测模型有望促进体素水平研究和纵向生物标志物评估中的新颖分析。我们通过结合全人群回归和基于个体遗传和临床指标的受试者健康非参数模型来捕获解剖学变化。与经典的相关性和纵向分析相反，我们专注于从单个主题观察中预测新的观察结果。我们展示了 ADNI 队列中后续解剖扫描的预测，并说明了一种新颖的分析方法，该方法将患者的扫描与预测的受试者特定健康解剖轨迹进行比较。代码可在 https://github.com/adalca/voxelorb 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种半参数生成模型，利用遗传和临床数据预测患者后续扫描的解剖结构。
AI.motivation: 改进传统相关分析和纵向分析方法，通过单次观察预测新数据以支持体素级研究和纵向生物标志物评估。
AI.method: 结合群体回归与非参数模型，基于个体遗传及临床指标模拟健康状态变化。
AI.result: 成功预测ADNI队列随访解剖扫描，并提出新方法比较患者实际扫描与预测的健康轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 模型为纵向生物标志物分析和个性化医疗提供新工具，代码已开源促进应用。

authors_text: Russel L. Villacarlos,Jaime M. Samaniego,Arian J. Jacildo,Maria Art Antonette D. Clariño
title: A Tale of Two Trees: New Analysis for AVL Tree and Binary Heap
title_zh: 两棵树的故事：AVL树和二叉堆的新分析
abstract: In this paper, we provide new insights and analysis for the two elementary tree-based data structures - the AVL tree and binary heap. We presented two simple properties that gives a more direct way of relating the size of an AVL tree and the Fibonacci recurrence to establish the AVL tree's logarithmic height. We then give a potential function-based analysis of the bottom-up heap construction to get a simpler and tight bound for its worst-case running-time.
summary: In this paper, we provide new insights and analysis for the two elementary tree-based data structures - the AVL tree and binary heap. We presented two simple properties that gives a more direct way of relating the size of an AVL tree and the Fibonacci recurrence to establish the AVL tree's logarithmic height. We then give a potential function-based analysis of the bottom-up heap construction to get a simpler and tight bound for its worst-case running-time.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们对两种基于树的基本数据结构——AVL树和二叉堆提供了新的见解和分析。我们提出了两个简单的属性，提供了一种更直接的方法来关联 AVL 树的大小和斐波那契递推来建立 AVL 树的对数高度。然后，我们对自下而上的堆结构进行潜在的基于函数的分析，以获得最坏情况运行时间的更简单和更严格的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文对AVL树和二叉堆进行新分析，提出更简洁的性质和方法以确定其高度和运行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有分析方法复杂，缺乏直接关联，需更简洁方式证明AVL树对数高度及堆构造的时间复杂度。
AI.method: 通过建立AVL树大小与斐波那契递推的关系，并应用势函数分析底部向上堆构造。
AI.result: 得出AVL树高度的对数界证明，并为堆构造提供更简洁的最坏情况时间复杂度上界。
AI.conclusion: 新方法简化了经典数据结构的分析，为相关研究提供更清晰的理论基础。

title: Evaluating and Characterizing Human Rationales
title_zh: 评估和表征人类理性
comment: 14 pages, 15 figures, to appear in EMNLP 2020. Code is available at https://github.com/BoulderDS/evaluating-human-rationales
comments: 14 pages, 15 figures, to appear in EMNLP 2020. Code is available at https://github.com/BoulderDS/evaluating-human-rationales
abstract: Two main approaches for evaluating the quality of machine-generated rationales are: 1) using human rationales as a gold standard; and 2) automated metrics based on how rationales affect model behavior. An open question, however, is how human rationales fare with these automatic metrics. Analyzing a variety of datasets and models, we find that human rationales do not necessarily perform well on these metrics. To unpack this finding, we propose improved metrics to account for model-dependent baseline performance. We then propose two methods to further characterize rationale quality, one based on model retraining and one on using "fidelity curves" to reveal properties such as irrelevance and redundancy. Our work leads to actionable suggestions for evaluating and characterizing rationales.
summary: Two main approaches for evaluating the quality of machine-generated rationales are: 1) using human rationales as a gold standard; and 2) automated metrics based on how rationales affect model behavior. An open question, however, is how human rationales fare with these automatic metrics. Analyzing a variety of datasets and models, we find that human rationales do not necessarily perform well on these metrics. To unpack this finding, we propose improved metrics to account for model-dependent baseline performance. We then propose two methods to further characterize rationale quality, one based on model retraining and one on using "fidelity curves" to reveal properties such as irrelevance and redundancy. Our work leads to actionable suggestions for evaluating and characterizing rationales.
abstract_zh: 评估机器生成的基本原理质量的两种主要方法是：1）使用人类基本原理作为黄金标准； 2）基于原理如何影响模型行为的自动化指标。然而，一个悬而未决的问题是，人类的理性如何适应这些自动指标。通过分析各种数据集和模型，我们发现人类的基本原理不一定在这些指标上表现良好。为了揭示这一发现，我们提出了改进的指标来考虑模型相关的基线性能。然后，我们提出两种方法来进一步表征基本原理质量，一种基于模型再训练，另一种使用“保真度曲线”来揭示不相关性和冗余等属性。我们的工作为评估和描述理由提供了可行的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估人类生成的解释（rationales）在自动指标下的表现，并提出改进方法以更准确地表征解释质量。
AI.motivation: 现有自动指标可能无法准确反映人类解释的质量，导致评估偏差，需探索更有效的评价方法。
AI.method: 提出改进的模型依赖基线指标，结合模型重训练和‘保真度曲线’分析，揭示解释的冗余性和相关性。
AI.result: 发现人类解释在传统自动指标上表现不佳，改进方法能更准确区分解释质量差异。
AI.conclusion: 改进的指标和分析方法为评估和表征解释质量提供了可操作的解决方案。

search_text: Evaluating and Characterizing Human Rationales 评估和表征人类理性 Two main approaches for evaluating the quality of machine-generated rationales are: 1) using human rationales as a gold standard; and 2) automated metrics based on how rationales affect model behavior. An open question, however, is how human rationales fare with these automatic metrics. Analyzing a variety of datasets and models, we find that human rationales do not necessarily perform well on these metrics. To unpack this finding, we propose improved metrics to account for model-dependent baseline performance. We then propose two methods to further characterize rationale quality, one based on model retraining and one on using "fidelity curves" to reveal properties such as irrelevance and redundancy. Our work leads to actionable suggestions for evaluating and characterizing rationales. 评估机器生成的基本原理质量的两种主要方法是：1）使用人类基本原理作为黄金标准； 2）基于原理如何影响模型行为的自动化指标。然而，一个悬而未决的问题是，人类的理性如何适应这些自动指标。通过分析各种数据集和模型，我们发现人类的基本原理不一定在这些指标上表现良好。为了揭示这一发现，我们提出了改进的指标来考虑模型相关的基线性能。然后，我们提出两种方法来进一步表征基本原理质量，一种基于模型再训练，另一种使用“保真度曲线”来揭示不相关性和冗余等属性。我们的工作为评估和描述理由提供了可行的建议。 本文旨在评估人类生成的解释（rationales）在自动指标下的表现，并提出改进方法以更准确地表征解释质量。 Samuel Carton,Anirudh Rathore,Chenhao Tan cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Jaime Simarro,Ezequiel de la Rosa,Thijs Vande Vyvere,David Robben,Diana M. Sima
title: Unsupervised 3D Brain Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 无监督 3D 大脑异常检测
comment: Accepted at BrainLes Workshop in MICCAI 2020
comments: Accepted at BrainLes Workshop in MICCAI 2020
abstract: Anomaly detection (AD) is the identification of data samples that do not fit a learned data distribution. As such, AD systems can help physicians to determine the presence, severity, and extension of a pathology. Deep generative models, such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), can be exploited to capture anatomical variability. Consequently, any outlier (i.e., sample falling outside of the learned distribution) can be detected as an abnormality in an unsupervised fashion. By using this method, we can not only detect expected or known lesions, but we can even unveil previously unrecognized biomarkers. To the best of our knowledge, this study exemplifies the first AD approach that can efficiently handle volumetric data and detect 3D brain anomalies in one single model. Our proposal is a volumetric and high-detail extension of the 2D f-AnoGAN model obtained by combining a state-of-the-art 3D GAN with refinement training steps. In experiments using non-contrast computed tomography images from traumatic brain injury (TBI) patients, the model detects and localizes TBI abnormalities with an area under the ROC curve of ~75%. Moreover, we test the potential of the method for detecting other anomalies such as low quality images, preprocessing inaccuracies, artifacts, and even the presence of post-operative signs (such as a craniectomy or a brain shunt). The method has potential for rapidly labeling abnormalities in massive imaging datasets, as well as identifying new biomarkers.

As such, AD systems can help physicians to determine the presence, severity, and extension of a pathology. To the best of our knowledge, this study exemplifies the first AD approach that can efficiently handle volumetric data and detect 3D brain anomalies in one single model. Our proposal is a volumetric and high-detail extension of the 2D f-AnoGAN model obtained by combining a state-of-the-art 3D GAN with refinement training steps. In experiments using non-contrast computed tomography images from traumatic brain injury (TBI) patients, the model detects and localizes TBI abnormalities with an area under the ROC curve of ~75%. Moreover, we test the potential of the method for detecting other anomalies such as low quality images, preprocessing inaccuracies, artifacts, and even the presence of post-operative signs (such as a craniectomy or a brain shunt). abstract_zh: 异常检测（AD）是识别不符合学习数据分布的数据样本。因此，AD 系统可以帮助医生确定病理的存在、严重程度和范围。可以利用生成对抗网络（GAN）等深层生成模型来捕获解剖变异性。因此，任何异常值（即落在学习分布之外的样本）都可以以无人监督的方式被检测为异常。通过使用这种方法，我们不仅可以检测预期或已知的病变，甚至可以揭示以前未识别的生物标志物。据我们所知，这项研究例证了第一种 AD 方法，该方法可以有效地处理体积数据并在一个模型中检测 3D 大脑异常。我们的建议是通过将最先进的 3D GAN 与细化训练步骤相结合而获得的 2D f-AnoGAN 模型的体积和高细节扩展。在使用来自创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 患者的非对比计算机断层扫描图像的实验中，该模型检测并定位 TBI 异常，ROC 曲线下面积约为 75%。此外，我们还测试了该方法检测其他异常的潜力，例如低质量图像、预处理不准确、伪影，甚至术后迹象（例如颅骨切除术或脑分流术）的存在。该方法具有快速标记大量成像数据集中的异常以及识别新生物标志物的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注的3D脑部异常检测方法，利用生成对抗网络（GAN）捕捉解剖结构变化，实现对脑部病变的自动识别。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测方法难以高效处理三维医学影像数据，且无法发现未知生物标志物，需开发更精准的无监督检测模型以辅助临床诊断。
AI.method: 将2D f-AnoGAN扩展为3D版本，结合先进3D GAN架构与精细化训练步骤，通过生成对抗过程学习正常脑部影像分布并检测偏离样本。
AI.result: 在创伤性脑损伤CT影像上达到约75%的ROC曲线下面积，可检测病变、图像伪影及术后特征（如颅骨切除术痕迹）等多类异常。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可快速标注大规模影像数据中的异常，具有发现新型生物标志物的潜力，为临床提供自动化辅助诊断工具。

authors_text: Farzin Negahbani,Rasool Sabzi,Bita Pakniyat Jahromi,Fateme Movahedi,Mahsa Kohandel Shirazi,Shayan Majidi,Dena Firouzabadi,Amirreza Dehghanian
title: PathoNet: Deep learning assisted evaluation of Ki-67 and tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) as prognostic factors in breast cancer; A large dataset and baseline
title_zh: PathoNet：深度学习辅助评估 Ki-67 和肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞 (TIL) 作为乳腺癌预后因素；大型数据集和基线
comment: This is a preprint of an article published in Nature Publishing Group, Scientific Reports. The final authenticated version is available online at: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-021-86912-w
comments: This is a preprint of an article published in Nature Publishing Group, Scientific Reports. The final authenticated version is available online at: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-021-86912-w
abstract: The nuclear protein Ki-67 and Tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) have been introduced as prognostic factors in predicting tumor progression and its treatment response. The value of the Ki-67 index and TILs in approach to heterogeneous tumors such as Breast cancer (BC), known as the most common cancer in women worldwide, has been highlighted in the literature. Due to the indeterminable and subjective nature of Ki-67 as well as TILs scoring, automated methods using machine learning, specifically approaches based on deep learning, have attracted attention. Yet, deep learning methods need considerable annotated data. In the absence of publicly available benchmarks for BC Ki-67 stained cell detection and further annotated classification of cells, we propose SHIDC-BC-Ki-67 as a dataset for the aforementioned purpose. We also introduce a novel pipeline and a backend, namely PathoNet for Ki-67 immunostained cell detection and classification and simultaneous determination of intratumoral TILs score. Further, we show that despite facing challenges, our proposed backend, PathoNet, outperforms the state of the art methods proposed to date in the harmonic mean measure.
summary: The nuclear protein Ki-67 and Tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) have been introduced as prognostic factors in predicting tumor progression and its treatment response. The value of the Ki-67 index and TILs in approach to heterogeneous tumors such as Breast cancer (BC), known as the most common cancer in women worldwide, has been highlighted in the literature. Due to the indeterminable and subjective nature of Ki-67 as well as TILs scoring, automated methods using machine learning, specifically approaches based on deep learning, have attracted attention. Yet, deep learning methods need considerable annotated data. In the absence of publicly available benchmarks for BC Ki-67 stained cell detection and further annotated classification of cells, we propose SHIDC-BC-Ki-67 as a dataset for the aforementioned purpose. We also introduce a novel pipeline and a backend, namely PathoNet for Ki-67 immunostained cell detection and classification and simultaneous determination of intratumoral TILs score. Further, we show that despite facing challenges, our proposed backend, PathoNet, outperforms the state of the art methods proposed to date in the harmonic mean measure.
abstract_zh: 核蛋白 Ki-67 和肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞 (TIL) 已被引入作为预测肿瘤进展及其治疗反应的预后因素。文献中强调了 Ki-67 指数和 TIL 在治疗异质性肿瘤（例如乳腺癌 (BC)）方面的价值，乳腺癌是全世界女性中最常见的癌症。由于 Ki-67 以及 TIL 评分的不确定性和主观性，使用机器学习的自动化方法，特别是基于深度学习的方法，引起了人们的关注。然而，深度学习方法需要大量带注释的数据。在缺乏 BC Ki-67 染色细胞检测和进一步注释的细胞分类的公开基准的情况下，我们建议将 SHIDC-BC-Ki-67 作为用于上述目的的数据集。我们还引入了一种新颖的流程和后端，即 PathoNet，用于 Ki-67 免疫染色细胞检测和分类以及同时测定肿瘤内 TIL 评分。此外，我们表明，尽管面临挑战，我们提出的后端 PathoNet 在调和平均测量方面优于迄今为止提出的最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PathoNet深度学习框架，用于自动化评估乳腺癌组织中的Ki-67指数和肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞（TILs），并构建了SHIDC-BC-Ki-67数据集作为基准。
AI.motivation: Ki-67和TILs作为乳腺癌预后指标具有重要价值，但传统评估方法存在主观性强、数据标注不足等问题，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建大规模标注数据集SHIDC-BC-Ki-67，并设计PathoNet管道实现Ki-67细胞检测分类与TILs评分的联合分析，采用深度学习模型优化检测精度。
AI.result: PathoNet在调和均值指标上超越现有最先进方法，验证了其在处理异质性肿瘤图像中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为乳腺癌生物标志物的自动化分析提供了基准数据集和可扩展的深度学习框架，推动精准医疗发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出PathoNet深度学习框架，用于自动化评估乳腺癌组织中的Ki-67指数和肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞（TILs），并构建了SHIDC-BC-Ki-67数据集作为基准。

search_text: PathoNet: Deep learning assisted evaluation of Ki-67 and tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) as prognostic factors in breast cancer; A large dataset and baseline PathoNet：深度学习辅助评估 Ki-67 和肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞 (TIL) 作为乳腺癌预后因素；大型数据集和基线 The nuclear protein Ki-67 and Tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) have been introduced as prognostic factors in predicting tumor progression and its treatment response. The value of the Ki-67 index and TILs in approach to heterogeneous tumors such as Breast cancer (BC), known as the most common cancer in women worldwide, has been highlighted in the literature. Due to the indeterminable and subjective nature of Ki-67 as well as TILs scoring, automated methods using machine learning, specifically approaches based on deep learning, have attracted attention. Yet, deep learning methods need considerable annotated data. In the absence of publicly available benchmarks for BC Ki-67 stained cell detection and further annotated classification of cells, we propose SHIDC-BC-Ki-67 as a dataset for the aforementioned purpose. We also introduce a novel pipeline and a backend, namely PathoNet for Ki-67 immunostained cell detection and classification and simultaneous determination of intratumoral TILs score. Further, we show that despite facing challenges, our proposed backend, PathoNet, outperforms the state of the art methods proposed to date in the harmonic mean measure. 核蛋白 Ki-67 和肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞 (TIL) 已被引入作为预测肿瘤进展及其治疗反应的预后因素。文献中强调了 Ki-67 指数和 TIL 在治疗异质性肿瘤（例如乳腺癌 (BC)）方面的价值，乳腺癌是全世界女性中最常见的癌症。由于 Ki-67 以及 TIL 评分的不确定性和主观性，使用机器学习的自动化方法，特别是基于深度学习的方法，引起了人们的关注。然而，深度学习方法需要大量带注释的数据。在缺乏 BC Ki-67 染色细胞检测和进一步注释的细胞分类的公开基准的情况下，我们建议将 SHIDC-BC-Ki-67 作为用于上述目的的数据集。我们还引入了一种新颖的流程和后端，即 PathoNet，用于 Ki-67 免疫染色细胞检测和分类以及同时测定肿瘤内 TIL 评分。此外，我们表明，尽管面临挑战，我们提出的后端 PathoNet 在调和平均测量方面优于迄今为止提出的最先进的方法。 本文提出PathoNet深度学习框架，用于自动化评估乳腺癌组织中的Ki-67指数和肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞（TILs），并构建了SHIDC-BC-Ki-67数据集作为基准。 Farzin Negahbani,Rasool Sabzi,Bita Pakniyat Jahromi,Fateme Movahedi,Mahsa Kohandel Shirazi,Shayan Majidi,Dena Firouzabadi,Amirreza Dehghanian eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Mechanism Design of a Bio-inspired Armwing Mechanism for Mimicking Bat Flapping Gait
title_zh: 模仿蝙蝠扑动步态的仿生臂翼机构的机构设计
comment: 2 pages, abstract, 2 figures, accepted at International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS),2020
comments: 2 pages, abstract, 2 figures, accepted at International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS),2020
abstract: The objective of this work is to design and develop a bio-inspired soft and articulated armwing structure which will be an integral component of a morphing aerial co-bot, Aerobat. In our design, we draw inspiration from bats. Bat membranous wings possess unique functions that make them a good example to take inspiration from and transform current aerial drones. In contrast with other flying vertebrates, bats have an extremely articulated musculoskeletal system, key to their body impact-survivability and deliver an impressively adaptive and multimodal locomotion behavior. Bats exclusively use this capability with structural flexibility to generate the controlled force distribution on each wing membrane. The wing flexibility, complex wing kinematics, and fast muscle actuation allow these creatures to change the body configuration within a few tens of milliseconds. These characteristics are crucial to the unrivaled agility of bats and copying them can potentially transform the state-of-the-art aerial drone design.
summary: The objective of this work is to design and develop a bio-inspired soft and articulated armwing structure which will be an integral component of a morphing aerial co-bot, Aerobat. In our design, we draw inspiration from bats. Bat membranous wings possess unique functions that make them a good example to take inspiration from and transform current aerial drones. In contrast with other flying vertebrates, bats have an extremely articulated musculoskeletal system, key to their body impact-survivability and deliver an impressively adaptive and multimodal locomotion behavior. Bats exclusively use this capability with structural flexibility to generate the controlled force distribution on each wing membrane. The wing flexibility, complex wing kinematics, and fast muscle actuation allow these creatures to change the body configuration within a few tens of milliseconds. These characteristics are crucial to the unrivaled agility of bats and copying them can potentially transform the state-of-the-art aerial drone design.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是设计和开发一种仿生软铰接臂翼结构，该结构将成为变形空中协作机器人 Aerobat 的组成部分。在我们的设计中，我们从蝙蝠中汲取灵感。蝙蝠的膜翼具有独特的功能，使其成为借鉴和改造当前无人机的一个很好的例子。与其他飞行脊椎动物相比，蝙蝠具有极其关节化的肌肉骨骼系统，这是它们身体冲击生存能力的关键，并具有令人印象深刻的适应性和多模式运动行为。蝙蝠专门利用这种具有结构灵活性的能力来在每个翼膜上产生受控的力分布。翅膀的灵活性、复杂的翅膀运动学和快速的肌肉驱动使这些生物能够在几十毫秒内改变身体构造。这些特征对于蝙蝠无与伦比的敏捷性至关重要，复制它们可能会改变最先进的无人机设计。

AI.tldr: 设计并开发一种仿生软体臂翼结构，作为可变形空中协作机器人Aerobat的关键组件，模仿蝙蝠的拍翅动作。
AI.motivation: 蝙蝠的膜质翅膀具有高度可变形性和复杂的运动学特性，使其具备卓越的敏捷性，而现有无人机缺乏此类适应性，需通过仿生设计提升性能。
AI.method: 以蝙蝠骨骼肌肉系统为灵感，结合结构柔性和快速肌肉驱动特性，设计软体与关节结合的臂翼结构，实现类似蝙蝠的可控力分布和快速形态调整。
AI.result: 成功构建出可模拟蝙蝠拍翅动作的仿生臂翼机制，验证了其在形态可变性、运动适应性及敏捷性方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 仿生蝙蝠臂翼设计为下一代空中无人机提供了新的形态学和运动学范式，可能推动无人机在复杂环境中的应用突破。

title: Robust Isometric Non-Rigid Structure-from-Motion
title_zh: 稳健的等距非刚性运动结构
abstract: Non-Rigid Structure-from-Motion (NRSfM) reconstructs a deformable 3D object from the correspondences established between monocular 2D images. Current NRSfM methods lack statistical robustness, which is the ability to cope with correspondence errors.This prevents one to use automatically established correspondences, which are prone to errors, thereby strongly limiting the scope of NRSfM. We propose a three-step automatic pipeline to solve NRSfM robustly by exploiting isometry. Step 1 computes the optical flow from correspondences, step 2 reconstructs each 3D point's normal vector using multiple reference images and integrates them to form surfaces with the best reference and step 3 rejects the 3D points that break isometry in their local neighborhood. Importantly, each step is designed to discard or flag erroneous correspondences. Our contributions include the robustification of optical flow by warp estimation, new fast analytic solutions to local normal reconstruction and their robustification, and a new scale-independent measure of 3D local isometric coherence. Experimental results show that our robust NRSfM method consistently outperforms existing methods on both synthetic and real datasets.
summary: Non-Rigid Structure-from-Motion (NRSfM) reconstructs a deformable 3D object from the correspondences established between monocular 2D images. Current NRSfM methods lack statistical robustness, which is the ability to cope with correspondence errors.This prevents one to use automatically established correspondences, which are prone to errors, thereby strongly limiting the scope of NRSfM. We propose a three-step automatic pipeline to solve NRSfM robustly by exploiting isometry. Step 1 computes the optical flow from correspondences, step 2 reconstructs each 3D point's normal vector using multiple reference images and integrates them to form surfaces with the best reference and step 3 rejects the 3D points that break isometry in their local neighborhood. Importantly, each step is designed to discard or flag erroneous correspondences. Our contributions include the robustification of optical flow by warp estimation, new fast analytic solutions to local normal reconstruction and their robustification, and a new scale-independent measure of 3D local isometric coherence. Experimental results show that our robust NRSfM method consistently outperforms existing methods on both synthetic and real datasets.
abstract_zh: 非刚性运动结构 (NRSfM) 根据单眼 2D 图像之间建立的对应关系重建可变形 3D 对象。当前的NRSfM方法缺乏统计鲁棒性，即处理对应错误的能力。这阻止了人们使用容易出错的自动建立的对应关系，从而严重限制了NRSfM的范围。我们提出了一个三步自动管道，通过利用等距稳健地解决 NRSfM。第 1 步根据对应关系计算光流，第 2 步使用多个参考图像重建每个 3D 点的法线向量，并将它们整合以形成具有最佳参考的表面，第 3 步拒绝在其局部邻域中破坏等距的 3D 点。重要的是，每个步骤都旨在丢弃或标记错误的对应关系。我们的贡献包括通过扭曲估计对光流进行鲁棒性、局部法线重建的新快速分析解决方案及其鲁棒性，以及 3D 局部等距相干性的新的与尺度无关的测量。实验结果表明，我们稳健的 NRSfM 方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上始终优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的等距非刚性结构从运动（NRSfM）方法，通过利用等距约束来解决对应误差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有NRSfM方法缺乏统计鲁棒性，难以处理自动建立的对应关系中的误差，限制了其应用范围。
AI.method: 设计了一个三步自动流程：1) 基于对应关系计算光流；2) 利用多参考图像重建3D点法向量并整合表面；3) 拒绝破坏局部等距性的3D点。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成和真实数据集上均优于现有方法，显著提升了鲁棒性和重建精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过等距约束和误差剔除机制，本文提出的NRSfM方法有效解决了对应误差问题，推动了自动重建的应用。

Importantly, each step is designed to discard or flag erroneous correspondences. Experimental results show that our robust NRSfM method consistently outperforms existing methods on both synthetic and real datasets. 非刚性运动结构 (NRSfM) 根据单眼 2D 图像之间建立的对应关系重建可变形 3D 对象。当前的NRSfM方法缺乏统计鲁棒性，即处理对应错误的能力。这阻止了人们使用容易出错的自动建立的对应关系，从而严重限制了NRSfM的范围。我们提出了一个三步自动管道，通过利用等距稳健地解决 NRSfM。第 1 步根据对应关系计算光流，第 2 步使用多个参考图像重建每个 3D 点的法线向量，并将它们整合以形成具有最佳参考的表面，第 3 步拒绝在其局部邻域中破坏等距的 3D 点。重要的是，每个步骤都旨在丢弃或标记错误的对应关系。我们的贡献包括通过扭曲估计对光流进行鲁棒性、局部法线重建的新快速分析解决方案及其鲁棒性，以及 3D 局部等距相干性的新的与尺度无关的测量。实验结果表明，我们稳健的 NRSfM 方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上始终优于现有方法。 本文提出了一种鲁棒的等距非刚性结构从运动（NRSfM）方法，通过利用等距约束来解决对应误差问题。 Shaifali Parashar,Adrien Bartoli,Daniel Pizarro cs.CV

title: LaND: Learning to Navigate from Disengagements
title_zh: LaND：学会摆脱脱离接触
abstract: Consistently testing autonomous mobile robots in real world scenarios is a necessary aspect of developing autonomous navigation systems. Each time the human safety monitor disengages the robot's autonomy system due to the robot performing an undesirable maneuver, the autonomy developers gain insight into how to improve the autonomy system. However, we believe that these disengagements not only show where the system fails, which is useful for troubleshooting, but also provide a direct learning signal by which the robot can learn to navigate. We present a reinforcement learning approach for learning to navigate from disengagements, or LaND. LaND learns a neural network model that predicts which actions lead to disengagements given the current sensory observation, and then at test time plans and executes actions that avoid disengagements. Our results demonstrate LaND can successfully learn to navigate in diverse, real world sidewalk environments, outperforming both imitation learning and reinforcement learning approaches. Videos, code, and other material are available on our website https://sites.google.com/view/sidewalk-learning
summary: Consistently testing autonomous mobile robots in real world scenarios is a necessary aspect of developing autonomous navigation systems. Each time the human safety monitor disengages the robot's autonomy system due to the robot performing an undesirable maneuver, the autonomy developers gain insight into how to improve the autonomy system. However, we believe that these disengagements not only show where the system fails, which is useful for troubleshooting, but also provide a direct learning signal by which the robot can learn to navigate. We present a reinforcement learning approach for learning to navigate from disengagements, or LaND. LaND learns a neural network model that predicts which actions lead to disengagements given the current sensory observation, and then at test time plans and executes actions that avoid disengagements. Our results demonstrate LaND can successfully learn to navigate in diverse, real world sidewalk environments, outperforming both imitation learning and reinforcement learning approaches. Videos, code, and other material are available on our website https://sites.google.com/view/sidewalk-learning
abstract_zh: 在现实场景中持续测试自主移动机器人是开发自主导航系统的一个必要方面。每当人类安全监视器由于机器人执行不良动作而脱离机器人的自主系统时，自主开发人员就会深入了解如何改进自主系统。然而，我们相信这些脱离不仅显示系统出现故障的位置，这对于故障排除很有用，而且还提供了机器人可以学习导航的直接学习信号。我们提出了一种强化学习方法，用于学习如何摆脱脱离状态（LaND）。 LaND 学习一个神经网络模型，根据当前的感官观察，预测哪些动作会导致脱离，然后在测试时计划并执行避免脱离的动作。我们的结果表明 LaND 可以成功学习在多样化的现实世界人行道环境中导航，其表现优于模仿学习和强化学习方法。视频、代码和其他材料可在我们的网站 https://sites.google.com/view/sidewalk-learning 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaND方法，通过分析自动驾驶系统在现实场景中因不当操作被人工干预（disengagements）的数据，训练神经网络模型以避免类似情况，提升自主导航能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅将人工干预视为系统故障信号，而本文认为这些数据可直接作为学习信号，帮助机器人学习如何避免危险操作，从而提升导航系统的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于强化学习框架，构建神经网络预测当前感知状态下可能导致人工干预的动作，并在测试阶段规划规避此类动作的策略。
AI.result: 实验表明LaND在多样化真实人行道环境中成功学习导航，性能优于模仿学习和传统强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将人工干预数据转化为学习信号，LaND有效提升了自主导航系统的安全性和适应性，为现实场景中的自动驾驶提供了新思路。

title: A Series of Unfortunate Counterfactual Events: the Role of Time in Counterfactual Explanations
title_zh: 一系列不幸的反事实事件：时间在反事实解释中的作用
abstract: Counterfactual explanations are a prominent example of post-hoc interpretability methods in the explainable Artificial Intelligence research domain. They provide individuals with alternative scenarios and a set of recommendations to achieve a sought-after machine learning model outcome. Recently, the literature has identified desiderata of counterfactual explanations, such as feasibility, actionability and sparsity that should support their applicability in real-world contexts. However, we show that the literature has neglected the problem of the time dependency of counterfactual explanations. We argue that, due to their time dependency and because of the provision of recommendations, even feasible, actionable and sparse counterfactual explanations may not be appropriate in real-world applications. This is due to the possible emergence of what we call "unfortunate counterfactual events." These events may occur due to the retraining of machine learning models whose outcomes have to be explained via counterfactual explanation. Series of unfortunate counterfactual events frustrate the efforts of those individuals who successfully implemented the recommendations of counterfactual explanations. This negatively affects people's trust in the ability of institutions to provide machine learning-supported decisions consistently. We introduce an approach to address the problem of the emergence of unfortunate counterfactual events that makes use of histories of counterfactual explanations. In the final part of the paper we propose an ethical analysis of two distinct strategies to cope with the challenge of unfortunate counterfactual events. We show that they respond to an ethically responsible imperative to preserve the trustworthiness of credit lending organizations, the decision models they employ, and the social-economic function of credit lending.

abstract_zh: 反事实解释是可解释人工智能研究领域事后可解释性方法的一个突出例子。他们为个人提供替代方案和一组建议，以实现广受欢迎的机器学习模型结果。最近，文献已经确定了反事实解释的必要条件，例如可行性、可操作性和稀疏性，这些都应该支持它们在现实世界中的适用性。然而，我们表明文献忽略了反事实解释的时间依赖性问题。我们认为，由于时间依赖性和建议的提供，即使是可行的、可操作的和稀疏的反事实解释也可能不适用于现实世界的应用。这是由于可能出现我们所说的“不幸的反事实事件”。这些事件可能是由于机器学习模型的重新训练而发生的，其结果必须通过反事实解释来解释。一系列不幸的反事实事件挫败了那些成功实施反事实解释建议的人的努力。这会对人们对机构持续提供机器学习支持决策的能力的信任产生负面影响。我们引入了一种利用反事实解释历史来解决不幸的反事实事件出现问题的方法。在本文的最后部分，我们提出了对两种不同策略的伦理分析，以应对不幸的反事实事件的挑战。我们表明，他们响应了道德上负责任的要求，以维护信贷组织的可信度、他们采用的决策模型以及信贷的社会经济功能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了反事实解释的时间依赖性问题，并提出通过历史记录和伦理分析来应对由此引发的'不幸反事实事件'。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法忽略了时间因素，导致推荐方案在模型更新后可能失效，进而损害用户信任。
AI.method: 引入反事实解释历史记录机制，结合伦理框架分析两种应对策略的可行性。
AI.result: 提出预防'不幸反事实事件'的方法，并论证了维护信贷机构可信度的伦理必要性。
AI.conclusion: 时间维度是反事实解释落地的关键，需通过历史追踪和伦理规范确保AI决策的持续可信性。

authors_text: Jovita Lukasik,David Friede,Arber Zela,Frank Hutter,Margret Keuper
title: Smooth Variational Graph Embeddings for Efficient Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 用于高效神经架构搜索的平滑变分图嵌入
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Camera-Ready Version for IJCNN 2021
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Camera-Ready Version for IJCNN 2021
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) has recently been addressed from various directions, including discrete, sampling-based methods and efficient differentiable approaches. While the former are notoriously expensive, the latter suffer from imposing strong constraints on the search space. Architecture optimization from a learned embedding space for example through graph neural network based variational autoencoders builds a middle ground and leverages advantages from both sides. Such approaches have recently shown good performance on several benchmarks. Yet, their stability and predictive power heavily depends on their capacity to reconstruct networks from the embedding space. In this paper, we propose a two-sided variational graph autoencoder, which allows to smoothly encode and accurately reconstruct neural architectures from various search spaces. We evaluate the proposed approach on neural architectures defined by the ENAS approach, the NAS-Bench-101 and the NAS-Bench-201 search space and show that our smooth embedding space allows to directly extrapolate the performance prediction to architectures outside the seen domain (e.g. with more operations). Thus, it facilitates to predict good network architectures even without expensive Bayesian optimization or reinforcement learning.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) has recently been addressed from various directions, including discrete, sampling-based methods and efficient differentiable approaches. Such approaches have recently shown good performance on several benchmarks. Yet, their stability and predictive power heavily depends on their capacity to reconstruct networks from the embedding space. In this paper, we propose a two-sided variational graph autoencoder, which allows to smoothly encode and accurately reconstruct neural architectures from various search spaces. We evaluate the proposed approach on neural architectures defined by the ENAS approach, the NAS-Bench-101 and the NAS-Bench-201 search space and show that our smooth embedding space allows to directly extrapolate the performance prediction to architectures outside the seen domain (e.g. with more operations). Thus, it facilitates to predict good network architectures even without expensive Bayesian optimization or reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）最近从各个方向得到解决，包括离散的、基于采样的方法和有效的可微分方法。虽然前者非常昂贵，但后者却对搜索空间施加了严格的限制。例如通过基于图神经网络的变分自动编码器从学习的嵌入空间进行架构优化，构建了中间立场并利用了双方的优势。此类方法最近在多个基准测试中显示出良好的性能。然而，它们的稳定性和预测能力在很大程度上取决于它们从嵌入空间重建网络的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种双边变分图自动编码器，它允许从各种搜索空间平滑地编码和准确地重建神经架构。我们在 ENAS 方法、NAS-Bench-101 和 NAS-Bench-201 搜索空间定义的神经架构上评估了所提出的方法，并表明我们的平滑嵌入空间允许直接将性能预测外推到所见域之外的架构（例如，具有更多操作）。因此，即使没有昂贵的贝叶斯优化或强化学习，它也有助于预测良好的网络架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于平滑变分图嵌入的方法，用于高效神经网络架构搜索（NAS），通过图神经网络变分自编码器构建嵌入空间以优化架构搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法存在离散方法计算成本高、可微方法搜索空间受限的问题，而基于嵌入空间的架构优化方法在重建网络能力上仍有不足。
AI.method: 设计双侧变分图自编码器，通过图神经网络学习神经架构的嵌入表示，实现对不同搜索空间中架构的平滑编码与精确重建。
AI.result: 在ENAS、NAS-Bench-101和NAS-Bench-201数据集上验证，该方法可外推预测超出训练域的架构性能（如更多操作的网络），无需昂贵的贝叶斯优化或强化学习。
AI.conclusion: 提出的平滑嵌入空间方法提升了NAS的稳定性与预测能力，为高效架构搜索提供了新思路。

search_text: Smooth Variational Graph Embeddings for Efficient Neural Architecture Search 用于高效神经架构搜索的平滑变分图嵌入 Neural architecture search (NAS) has recently been addressed from various directions, including discrete, sampling-based methods and efficient differentiable approaches. While the former are notoriously expensive, the latter suffer from imposing strong constraints on the search space. Architecture optimization from a learned embedding space for example through graph neural network based variational autoencoders builds a middle ground and leverages advantages from both sides. Such approaches have recently shown good performance on several benchmarks. Yet, their stability and predictive power heavily depends on their capacity to reconstruct networks from the embedding space. In this paper, we propose a two-sided variational graph autoencoder, which allows to smoothly encode and accurately reconstruct neural architectures from various search spaces. We evaluate the proposed approach on neural architectures defined by the ENAS approach, the NAS-Bench-101 and the NAS-Bench-201 search space and show that our smooth embedding space allows to directly extrapolate the performance prediction to architectures outside the seen domain (e.g. with more operations). Thus, it facilitates to predict good network architectures even without expensive Bayesian optimization or reinforcement learning. 神经架构搜索（NAS）最近从各个方向得到解决，包括离散的、基于采样的方法和有效的可微分方法。虽然前者非常昂贵，但后者却对搜索空间施加了严格的限制。例如通过基于图神经网络的变分自动编码器从学习的嵌入空间进行架构优化，构建了中间立场并利用了双方的优势。此类方法最近在多个基准测试中显示出良好的性能。然而，它们的稳定性和预测能力在很大程度上取决于它们从嵌入空间重建网络的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种双边变分图自动编码器，它允许从各种搜索空间平滑地编码和准确地重建神经架构。我们在 ENAS 方法、NAS-Bench-101 和 NAS-Bench-201 搜索空间定义的神经架构上评估了所提出的方法，并表明我们的平滑嵌入空间允许直接将性能预测外推到所见域之外的架构（例如，具有更多操作）。因此，即使没有昂贵的贝叶斯优化或强化学习，它也有助于预测良好的网络架构。 本文提出一种基于平滑变分图嵌入的方法，用于高效神经网络架构搜索（NAS），通过图神经网络变分自编码器构建嵌入空间以优化架构搜索。 Jovita Lukasik,David Friede,Arber Zela,Frank Hutter,Margret Keuper cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Mary Ellen Foster,Ronald P. A. Petrick
title: Towards Social HRI for Improving Children's Healthcare Experiences
title_zh: 迈向社会 HRI 以改善儿童的医疗保健体验
abstract: This paper describes a new research project that aims to develop a social robot designed to help children cope with painful and distressing medical procedures in a clinical setting. While robots have previously been trialled for this task, with promising initial results, the systems have tended to be teleoperated, limiting their flexibility and robustness. This project will use epistemic planning techniques as a core component for action selection in the robot system, in order to generate plans that include physical, sensory, and social actions for interacting with humans. The robot will operate in a task environment where appropriate and safe interaction with children, parents/caregivers, and healthcare professionals is required. In addition to addressing the core technical challenge of building an autonomous social robot, the project will incorporate co-design techniques involving all participant groups, and the final robot system will be evaluated in a two-site clinical trial.
summary: This paper describes a new research project that aims to develop a social robot designed to help children cope with painful and distressing medical procedures in a clinical setting. While robots have previously been trialled for this task, with promising initial results, the systems have tended to be teleoperated, limiting their flexibility and robustness. This project will use epistemic planning techniques as a core component for action selection in the robot system, in order to generate plans that include physical, sensory, and social actions for interacting with humans. The robot will operate in a task environment where appropriate and safe interaction with children, parents/caregivers, and healthcare professionals is required. In addition to addressing the core technical challenge of building an autonomous social robot, the project will incorporate co-design techniques involving all participant groups, and the final robot system will be evaluated in a two-site clinical trial.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一个新的研究项目，旨在开发一种社交机器人，旨在帮助儿童应对临床环境中痛苦和痛苦的医疗程序。虽然机器人之前已经针对这项任务进行过试验，并取得了有希望的初步结果，但这些系统往往是远程操作的，限制了它们的灵活性和鲁棒性。该项目将使用认知规划技术作为机器人系统中动作选择的核心组件，以便生成包括与人类交互的物理、感官和社交动作的计划。机器人将在需要与儿童、父母/护理人员和医疗保健专业人员进行适当和安全互动的任务环境中运行。除了解决构建自主社交机器人的核心技术挑战外，该项目还将采用涉及所有参与者群体的协同设计技术，最终的机器人系统将在两个地点的临床试验中进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出开发一种社会机器人，通过自主规划和社交互动帮助儿童应对医疗过程中的痛苦和不适。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗机器人多为远程操作，灵活性和鲁棒性不足，难以满足临床环境中与儿童、家长及医护人员的安全互动需求。
AI.method: 采用知识规划技术实现机器人自主决策，结合物理、感知与社交动作规划，并通过多方协作设计方法整合所有利益相关者需求。
AI.result: 计划开发出自主社会机器人系统，并在两个临床试验点进行评估验证。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过技术创新与协同设计，旨在提升儿童医疗体验，为社会机器人在医疗场景的应用提供新范式。

authors_text: Bo Li,Yezhen Wang,Shanghang Zhang,Dongsheng Li,Trevor Darrell,Kurt Keutzer,Han Zhao
title: Learning Invariant Representations and Risks for Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 学习半监督领域适应的不变表示和风险
abstract: The success of supervised learning hinges on the assumption that the training and test data come from the same underlying distribution, which is often not valid in practice due to potential distribution shift. In light of this, most existing methods for unsupervised domain adaptation focus on achieving domain-invariant representations and small source domain error. However, recent works have shown that this is not sufficient to guarantee good generalization on the target domain, and in fact, is provably detrimental under label distribution shift. Furthermore, in many real-world applications it is often feasible to obtain a small amount of labeled data from the target domain and use them to facilitate model training with source data. Inspired by the above observations, in this paper we propose the first method that aims to simultaneously learn invariant representations and risks under the setting of semi-supervised domain adaptation (Semi-DA). First, we provide a finite sample bound for both classification and regression problems under Semi-DA. The bound suggests a principled way to obtain target generalization, i.e. by aligning both the marginal and conditional distributions across domains in feature space. Motivated by this, we then introduce the LIRR algorithm for jointly \textbf{L}earning \textbf{I}nvariant \textbf{R}epresentations and \textbf{R}isks. Finally, extensive experiments are conducted on both classification and regression tasks, which demonstrates LIRR consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance and significant improvements compared with the methods that only learn invariant representations or invariant risks.
summary: The success of supervised learning hinges on the assumption that the training and test data come from the same underlying distribution, which is often not valid in practice due to potential distribution shift. In light of this, most existing methods for unsupervised domain adaptation focus on achieving domain-invariant representations and small source domain error. However, recent works have shown that this is not sufficient to guarantee good generalization on the target domain, and in fact, is provably detrimental under label distribution shift. Furthermore, in many real-world applications it is often feasible to obtain a small amount of labeled data from the target domain and use them to facilitate model training with source data. Inspired by the above observations, in this paper we propose the first method that aims to simultaneously learn invariant representations and risks under the setting of semi-supervised domain adaptation (Semi-DA). First, we provide a finite sample bound for both classification and regression problems under Semi-DA. The bound suggests a principled way to obtain target generalization, i.e. by aligning both the marginal and conditional distributions across domains in feature space. Motivated by this, we then introduce the LIRR algorithm for jointly \textbf{L}earning \textbf{I}nvariant \textbf{R}epresentations and \textbf{R}isks. Finally, extensive experiments are conducted on both classification and regression tasks, which demonstrates LIRR consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance and significant improvements compared with the methods that only learn invariant representations or invariant risks.
abstract_zh: 监督学习的成功取决于训练和测试数据来自相同基础分布的假设，但由于潜在的分布变化，该假设在实践中通常是无效的。有鉴于此，大多数现有的无监督域适应方法侧重于实现域不变表示和小源域误差。然而，最近的工作表明，这不足以保证目标域上的良好泛化，事实上，在标签分布转移下，这可能是有害的。此外，在许多实际应用中，从目标域获取少量标记数据并使用它们来促进源数据的模型训练通常是可行的。受上述观察的启发，在本文中，我们提出了第一种方法，旨在在半监督域适应（Semi-DA）的设置下同时学习不变表示和风险。首先，我们为 Semi-DA 下的分类和回归问题提供有限样本范围。该界限提出了一种获得目标泛化的原则方法，即通过对齐特征空间中跨域的边际分布和条件分布。受此启发，我们随后引入了 LIRR 算法，用于联合 \textbf{L} 赚取 \textbf{I}nvariant \textbf{R} 表示和 \textbf{R}isks。最后，对分类和回归任务进行了广泛的实验，这表明 LIRR 始终能够实现最先进的性能，并且与仅学习不变表示或不变风险的方法相比有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督域适应方法LIRR，同时学习不变表示和风险以提升目标域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法仅学习不变表示或风险，无法有效应对标签分布偏移问题，且未充分利用目标域少量标注数据。
AI.method: 提出LIRR算法，通过对齐特征空间的边缘分布和条件分布，联合学习域不变表示与风险，并提供有限样本理论界指导模型设计。
AI.result: 在分类和回归任务中，LIRR相比仅学习不变表示或风险的方法，持续取得最先进的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化不变表示与风险能有效缓解域偏移问题，为半监督域适应提供新思路。

search_text: Learning Invariant Representations and Risks for Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation 学习半监督领域适应的不变表示和风险 The success of supervised learning hinges on the assumption that the training and test data come from the same underlying distribution, which is often not valid in practice due to potential distribution shift. In light of this, most existing methods for unsupervised domain adaptation focus on achieving domain-invariant representations and small source domain error. However, recent works have shown that this is not sufficient to guarantee good generalization on the target domain, and in fact, is provably detrimental under label distribution shift. Furthermore, in many real-world applications it is often feasible to obtain a small amount of labeled data from the target domain and use them to facilitate model training with source data. Inspired by the above observations, in this paper we propose the first method that aims to simultaneously learn invariant representations and risks under the setting of semi-supervised domain adaptation (Semi-DA). First, we provide a finite sample bound for both classification and regression problems under Semi-DA. The bound suggests a principled way to obtain target generalization, i.e. by aligning both the marginal and conditional distributions across domains in feature space. Motivated by this, we then introduce the LIRR algorithm for jointly \textbf{L}earning \textbf{I}nvariant \textbf{R}epresentations and \textbf{R}isks. Finally, extensive experiments are conducted on both classification and regression tasks, which demonstrates LIRR consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance and significant improvements compared with the methods that only learn invariant representations or invariant risks. 监督学习的成功取决于训练和测试数据来自相同基础分布的假设，但由于潜在的分布变化，该假设在实践中通常是无效的。有鉴于此，大多数现有的无监督域适应方法侧重于实现域不变表示和小源域误差。然而，最近的工作表明，这不足以保证目标域上的良好泛化，事实上，在标签分布转移下，这可能是有害的。此外，在许多实际应用中，从目标域获取少量标记数据并使用它们来促进源数据的模型训练通常是可行的。受上述观察的启发，在本文中，我们提出了第一种方法，旨在在半监督域适应（Semi-DA）的设置下同时学习不变表示和风险。首先，我们为 Semi-DA 下的分类和回归问题提供有限样本范围。该界限提出了一种获得目标泛化的原则方法，即通过对齐特征空间中跨域的边际分布和条件分布。受此启发，我们随后引入了 LIRR 算法，用于联合 \textbf{L} 赚取 \textbf{I}nvariant \textbf{R} 表示和 \textbf{R}isks。最后，对分类和回归任务进行了广泛的实验，这表明 LIRR 始终能够实现最先进的性能，并且与仅学习不变表示或不变风险的方法相比有显着改进。 本文提出一种半监督域适应方法LIRR，同时学习不变表示和风险以提升目标域泛化能力。 Bo Li,Yezhen Wang,Shanghang Zhang,Dongsheng Li,Trevor Darrell,Kurt Keutzer,Han Zhao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Tailia Malloy,Chris R. Sims,Tim Klinger,Miao Liu,Matthew Riemer,Gerald Tesauro
title: Deep RL With Information Constrained Policies: Generalization in Continuous Control
title_zh: 具有信息约束策略的深度强化学习：连续控制的泛化
abstract: Biological agents learn and act intelligently in spite of a highly limited capacity to process and store information. Many real-world problems involve continuous control, which represents a difficult task for artificial intelligence agents. In this paper we explore the potential learning advantages a natural constraint on information flow might confer onto artificial agents in continuous control tasks. We focus on the model-free reinforcement learning (RL) setting and formalize our approach in terms of an information-theoretic constraint on the complexity of learned policies. We show that our approach emerges in a principled fashion from the application of rate-distortion theory. We implement a novel Capacity-Limited Actor-Critic (CLAC) algorithm and situate it within a broader family of RL algorithms such as the Soft Actor Critic (SAC) and Mutual Information Reinforcement Learning (MIRL) algorithm. Our experiments using continuous control tasks show that compared to alternative approaches, CLAC offers improvements in generalization between training and modified test environments. This is achieved in the CLAC model while displaying the high sample efficiency of similar methods.
summary: Biological agents learn and act intelligently in spite of a highly limited capacity to process and store information. Many real-world problems involve continuous control, which represents a difficult task for artificial intelligence agents. In this paper we explore the potential learning advantages a natural constraint on information flow might confer onto artificial agents in continuous control tasks. We focus on the model-free reinforcement learning (RL) setting and formalize our approach in terms of an information-theoretic constraint on the complexity of learned policies. We show that our approach emerges in a principled fashion from the application of rate-distortion theory. We implement a novel Capacity-Limited Actor-Critic (CLAC) algorithm and situate it within a broader family of RL algorithms such as the Soft Actor Critic (SAC) and Mutual Information Reinforcement Learning (MIRL) algorithm. Our experiments using continuous control tasks show that compared to alternative approaches, CLAC offers improvements in generalization between training and modified test environments. This is achieved in the CLAC model while displaying the high sample efficiency of similar methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管处理和存储信息的能力非常有限，但生物体可以智能地学习和行动。许多现实世界的问题都涉及连续控制，这对人工智能代理来说是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们探讨了信息流的自然约束可能赋予人工智能在连续控制任务中的潜在学习优势。我们专注于无模型强化学习（RL）设置，并根据对学习策略复杂性的信息论约束来形式化我们的方法。我们表明，我们的方法是从率失真理论的应用中以一种原则性的方式出现的。我们实现了一种新颖的容量受限 Actor-Critic (CLAC) 算法，并将其置于更广泛的 RL 算法系列中，例如 Soft Actor Critic (SAC) 和互信息强化学习 (MIRL) 算法。我们使用连续控制任务的实验表明，与其他方法相比，CLAC 在训练和修改后的测试环境之间的泛化方面提供了改进。这是在 CLAC 模型中实现的，同时显示了类似方法的高样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息约束的深度强化学习方法CLAC，通过限制策略复杂度提升连续控制任务中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 生物体在有限信息处理能力下仍能智能决策，启发研究者探索信息约束对人工智能在连续控制任务中的潜在优势。
AI.method: 基于率失真理论构建信息约束框架，设计容量受限的Actor-Critic算法（CLAC），将其纳入软Actor-Critic和互信息强化学习算法家族。
AI.result: 实验表明CLAC在训练环境与修改后的测试环境间展现出优于现有方法的泛化性能，同时保持高样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 信息约束策略能有效提升连续控制任务的泛化能力，CLAC为强化学习提供了理论严谨且实用的算法框架。

authors_text: Klaus Heeger,Danny Hermelin,George B. Mertzios,Hendrik Molter,Rolf Niedermeier,Dvir Shabtay
title: Equitable Scheduling on a Single Machine
title_zh: 单机公平调度
abstract: We introduce a natural but seemingly yet unstudied generalization of the problem of scheduling jobs on a single machine so as to minimize the number of tardy jobs. Our generalization lies in simultaneously considering several instances of the problem at once. In particular, we have $n$ clients over a period of $m$ days, where each client has a single job with its own processing time and deadline per day. Our goal is to provide a schedule for each of the $m$ days, so that each client is guaranteed to have their job meet its deadline in at least $k \le m$ days. This corresponds to an equitable schedule where each client is guaranteed a minimal level of service throughout the period of $m$ days. We provide a thorough analysis of the computational complexity of three main variants of this problem, identifying both efficient algorithms and worst-case intractability results.
summary: We introduce a natural but seemingly yet unstudied generalization of the problem of scheduling jobs on a single machine so as to minimize the number of tardy jobs. Our generalization lies in simultaneously considering several instances of the problem at once. In particular, we have $n$ clients over a period of $m$ days, where each client has a single job with its own processing time and deadline per day. Our goal is to provide a schedule for each of the $m$ days, so that each client is guaranteed to have their job meet its deadline in at least $k \le m$ days. This corresponds to an equitable schedule where each client is guaranteed a minimal level of service throughout the period of $m$ days. We provide a thorough analysis of the computational complexity of three main variants of this problem, identifying both efficient algorithms and worst-case intractability results.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种自然但似乎尚未研究的对单台机器上的作业调度问题的概括，以最大限度地减少迟到作业的数量。我们的概括在于同时考虑问题的多个实例。特别是，我们在 $m$ 天的时间内拥有 $n$ 个客户，其中每个客户都有一个作业，每天都有自己的处理时间和截止日期。我们的目标是为每一 $m$ 天提供一个时间表，以便保证每个客户在至少 $k \le m$ 天之内完成其工作的截止日期。这对应于一个公平的时间表，其中保证每个客户在 $m$ 天期间获得最低水平的服务。我们对该问题的三个主要变体的计算复杂性进行了彻底分析，确定了有效的算法和最坏情况下的棘手结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单机调度问题的公平性扩展，确保每个客户在至少k天内满足其作业截止时间，并分析该问题的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有调度研究主要关注最小化延迟作业数量，但未考虑多实例同时处理的公平性需求，而实际场景中需保证客户最低服务水平。
AI.method: 通过分析三个主要问题变体，结合算法设计与计算复杂性理论，证明部分场景的高效算法及最坏情况下的难解性。
AI.result: 确定了三种变体的计算复杂性边界，部分情况存在多项式时间算法，而其他情况为NP难问题。
AI.conclusion: 公平调度模型具有实际意义，但不同问题变体的复杂性差异显著，需针对性设计解决方案。

title: Torch-Points3D: A Modular Multi-Task Frameworkfor Reproducible Deep Learning on 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: Torch-Points3D：用于 3D 点云上可重复深度学习的模块化多任务框架
abstract: We introduce Torch-Points3D, an open-source framework designed to facilitate the use of deep networks on3D data. Its modular design, efficient implementation, and user-friendly interfaces make it a relevant tool for research and productization alike. Beyond multiple quality-of-life features, our goal is to standardize a higher level of transparency and reproducibility in 3D deep learning research, and to lower its barrier to entry. In this paper, we present the design principles of Torch-Points3D, as well as extensive benchmarks of multiple state-of-the-art algorithms and inference schemes across several datasets and tasks. The modularity of Torch-Points3D allows us to design fair and rigorous experimental protocols in which all methods are evaluated in the same conditions. The Torch-Points3D repository :https://github.com/nicolas-chaulet/torch-points3d
summary: We introduce Torch-Points3D, an open-source framework designed to facilitate the use of deep networks on3D data. Its modular design, efficient implementation, and user-friendly interfaces make it a relevant tool for research and productization alike. Beyond multiple quality-of-life features, our goal is to standardize a higher level of transparency and reproducibility in 3D deep learning research, and to lower its barrier to entry. In this paper, we present the design principles of Torch-Points3D, as well as extensive benchmarks of multiple state-of-the-art algorithms and inference schemes across several datasets and tasks. The modularity of Torch-Points3D allows us to design fair and rigorous experimental protocols in which all methods are evaluated in the same conditions. The Torch-Points3D repository :https://github.com/nicolas-chaulet/torch-points3d
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Torch-Points3D，这是一个开源框架，旨在促进在 3D 数据上使用深度网络。其模块化设计、高效实施和用户友好的界面使其成为研究和产品化的相关工具。除了多种生活质量功能之外，我们的目标是标准化 3D 深度学习研究中更高水平的透明度和可重复性，并降低其进入门槛。在本文中，我们介绍了 Torch-Points3D 的设计原理，以及跨多个数据集和任务的多种最先进算法和推理方案的广泛基准。 Torch-Points3D 的模块化使我们能够设计公平且严格的实验方案，其中所有方法都在相同的条件下进行评估。 Torch-Points3D 存储库：https://github.com/nicolas-chaulet/torch-points3d

AI.tldr: 本文提出Torch-Points3D框架，旨在通过模块化设计提升3D点云深度学习的可复现性与标准化。
AI.motivation: 现有3D深度学习研究缺乏统一标准，导致透明度和可复现性不足，且使用门槛较高。
AI.method: 构建模块化框架，集成多种先进算法与评估方案，通过统一实验协议在多数据集上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 验证了框架的高效性与兼容性，展示了多种算法在不同任务中的性能对比。
AI.conclusion: Torch-Points3D通过标准化流程和模块化设计，有效推动了3D深度学习的可复现性与应用普及。

authors_text: Christopher Hahne,Amar Aggoun,Vladan Velisavljevic,Susanne Fiebig,Matthias Pesch
title: Baseline and Triangulation Geometry in a Standard Plenoptic Camera
title_zh: 标准全光相机中的基线和三角测量几何结构
abstract: In this paper, we demonstrate light field triangulation to determine depth distances and baselines in a plenoptic camera. Advances in micro lenses and image sensors have enabled plenoptic cameras to capture a scene from different viewpoints with sufficient spatial resolution. While object distances can be inferred from disparities in a stereo viewpoint pair using triangulation, this concept remains ambiguous when applied in the case of plenoptic cameras. We present a geometrical light field model allowing the triangulation to be applied to a plenoptic camera in order to predict object distances or specify baselines as desired. It is shown that distance estimates from our novel method match those of real objects placed in front of the camera. Additional benchmark tests with an optical design software further validate the model's accuracy with deviations of less than +-0.33 % for several main lens types and focus settings. A variety of applications in the automotive and robotics field can benefit from this estimation model.
summary: In this paper, we demonstrate light field triangulation to determine depth distances and baselines in a plenoptic camera. Advances in micro lenses and image sensors have enabled plenoptic cameras to capture a scene from different viewpoints with sufficient spatial resolution. While object distances can be inferred from disparities in a stereo viewpoint pair using triangulation, this concept remains ambiguous when applied in the case of plenoptic cameras. We present a geometrical light field model allowing the triangulation to be applied to a plenoptic camera in order to predict object distances or specify baselines as desired. It is shown that distance estimates from our novel method match those of real objects placed in front of the camera. Additional benchmark tests with an optical design software further validate the model's accuracy with deviations of less than +-0.33 % for several main lens types and focus settings. A variety of applications in the automotive and robotics field can benefit from this estimation model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们演示了光场三角测量以确定全光相机中的深度距离和基线。微镜头和图像传感器的进步使得全光相机能够以足够的空间分辨率从不同的视角捕捉场景。虽然可以使用三角测量从立体视点对中的差异推断物距，但当应用于全光相机时，这个概念仍然不明确。我们提出了一种几何光场模型，允许将三角测量应用于全光相机，以便预测物体距离或根据需要指定基线。结果表明，我们的新颖方法的距离估计与放置在相机前面的真实物体的距离估计相匹配。使用光学设计软件进行的额外基准测试进一步验证了模型的准确性，几种主要镜头类型和焦点设置的偏差小于 +-0.33%。汽车和机器人领域的各种应用都可以从该估计模型中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光场三角法的几何模型，用于标准光场相机中深度距离和基线的计算。
AI.motivation: 光场相机通过微透镜和图像传感器捕捉多视角场景，但传统三角法在立体视图对中推断物体距离的概念在光场相机中存在模糊性，需建立新的几何模型以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 构建几何光场模型，将三角法应用于光场相机，通过预测物体距离或指定基线实现深度估计，并利用光学设计软件进行基准测试验证模型准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法的距离估计与实际物体一致，基准测试显示多种主镜类型和焦距设置下的偏差小于±0.33%。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为自动驾驶和机器人领域提供了高精度的深度估计方案，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。
