title: Attaining Real-Time Super-Resolution for Microscopic Images Using GAN
title_zh: 使用 GAN 获得显微图像的实时超分辨率
abstract: In the last few years, several deep learning models, especially Generative Adversarial Networks have received a lot of attention for the task of Single Image Super-Resolution (SISR). These methods focus on building an end-to-end framework, which produce a high resolution(SR) image from a given low resolution(LR) image in a single step to achieve state-of-the-art performance. This paper focuses on improving an existing deep-learning based method to perform Super-Resolution Microscopy in real-time using a standard GPU. For this, we first propose a tiling strategy, which takes advantage of parallelism provided by a GPU to speed up the network training process. Further, we suggest simple changes to the architecture of the generator and the discriminator of SRGAN. Subsequently, We compare the quality and the running time for the outputs produced by our model, opening its applications in different areas like low-end benchtop and even mobile microscopy. Finally, we explore the possibility of the trained network to produce High-Resolution HR outputs for different domains.
summary: In the last few years, several deep learning models, especially Generative Adversarial Networks have received a lot of attention for the task of Single Image Super-Resolution (SISR). These methods focus on building an end-to-end framework, which produce a high resolution(SR) image from a given low resolution(LR) image in a single step to achieve state-of-the-art performance. This paper focuses on improving an existing deep-learning based method to perform Super-Resolution Microscopy in real-time using a standard GPU. For this, we first propose a tiling strategy, which takes advantage of parallelism provided by a GPU to speed up the network training process. Further, we suggest simple changes to the architecture of the generator and the discriminator of SRGAN. Subsequently, We compare the quality and the running time for the outputs produced by our model, opening its applications in different areas like low-end benchtop and even mobile microscopy. Finally, we explore the possibility of the trained network to produce High-Resolution HR outputs for different domains.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，几种深度学习模型，特别是生成对抗网络，在单图像超分辨率（SISR）任务中受到了广泛的关注。这些方法侧重于构建端到端框架，该框架只需一步即可从给定的低分辨率 (LR) 图像生成高分辨率 (SR) 图像，以实现最先进的性能。本文重点改进现有的基于深度学习的方法，以使用标准 GPU 实时执行超分辨率显微镜。为此，我们首先提出了一种平铺策略，该策略利用 GPU 提供的并行性来加速网络训练过程。此外，我们建议对 SRGAN 的生成器和判别器的架构进行简单的更改。随后，我们比较了我们的模型产生的输出的质量和运行时间，打开了其在低端台式甚至移动显微镜等不同领域的应用。最后，我们探讨了经过训练的网络为不同领域生成高分辨率 HR 输出的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）改进显微图像的实时超分辨率技术，通过优化模型结构和训练策略以适应标准GPU硬件。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法在实时性或硬件适配性上存在不足，需开发适用于低端设备和移动显微镜的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出分块训练策略以利用GPU并行性加速训练，同时对SRGAN的生成器和判别器结构进行简化改进。
AI.result: 模型在保证图像质量的同时显著提升运行效率，验证了其在低端设备和移动显微镜场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过架构优化和训练策略改进，实现了适用于多种硬件平台的实时显微图像超分辨率解决方案。

Subsequently, We compare the quality and the running time for the outputs produced by our model, opening its applications in different areas like low-end benchtop and even mobile microscopy. Finally, we explore the possibility of the trained network to produce High-Resolution HR outputs for different domains. 在过去的几年中，几种深度学习模型，特别是生成对抗网络，在单图像超分辨率（SISR）任务中受到了广泛的关注。这些方法侧重于构建端到端框架，该框架只需一步即可从给定的低分辨率 (LR) 图像生成高分辨率 (SR) 图像，以实现最先进的性能。本文重点改进现有的基于深度学习的方法，以使用标准 GPU 实时执行超分辨率显微镜。为此，我们首先提出了一种平铺策略，该策略利用 GPU 提供的并行性来加速网络训练过程。此外，我们建议对 SRGAN 的生成器和判别器的架构进行简单的更改。随后，我们比较了我们的模型产生的输出的质量和运行时间，打开了其在低端台式甚至移动显微镜等不同领域的应用。最后，我们探讨了经过训练的网络为不同领域生成高分辨率 HR 输出的可能性。 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）改进显微图像的实时超分辨率技术，通过优化模型结构和训练策略以适应标准GPU硬件。 Vibhu Bhatia,Yatender Kumar eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Learning Binary Decision Trees by Argmin Differentiation
title_zh: 通过 Argmin 微分学习二元决策树
abstract: We address the problem of learning binary decision trees that partition data for some downstream task. We propose to learn discrete parameters (i.e., for tree traversals and node pruning) and continuous parameters (i.e., for tree split functions and prediction functions) simultaneously using argmin differentiation. We do so by sparsely relaxing a mixed-integer program for the discrete parameters, to allow gradients to pass through the program to continuous parameters. We derive customized algorithms to efficiently compute the forward and backward passes. This means that our tree learning procedure can be used as an (implicit) layer in arbitrary deep networks, and can be optimized with arbitrary loss functions. We demonstrate that our approach produces binary trees that are competitive with existing single tree and ensemble approaches, in both supervised and unsupervised settings. Further, apart from greedy approaches (which do not have competitive accuracies), our method is faster to train than all other tree-learning baselines we compare with. The code for reproducing the results is available at https://github.com/vzantedeschi/LatentTrees.
summary: We address the problem of learning binary decision trees that partition data for some downstream task. We propose to learn discrete parameters (i.e., for tree traversals and node pruning) and continuous parameters (i.e., for tree split functions and prediction functions) simultaneously using argmin differentiation. We do so by sparsely relaxing a mixed-integer program for the discrete parameters, to allow gradients to pass through the program to continuous parameters. We derive customized algorithms to efficiently compute the forward and backward passes. This means that our tree learning procedure can be used as an (implicit) layer in arbitrary deep networks, and can be optimized with arbitrary loss functions. We demonstrate that our approach produces binary trees that are competitive with existing single tree and ensemble approaches, in both supervised and unsupervised settings. Further, apart from greedy approaches (which do not have competitive accuracies), our method is faster to train than all other tree-learning baselines we compare with. The code for reproducing the results is available at https://github.com/vzantedeschi/LatentTrees.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了学习二元决策树的问题，该二元决策树为某些下游任务划分数据。我们建议使用 argmin 微分同时学习离散参数（即，用于树遍历和节点修剪）和连续参数（即，用于树分割函数和预测函数）。我们通过稀疏地放松离散参数的混合整数程序来实现这一点，以允许梯度通过程序传递到连续参数。我们推导出定制的算法来有效地计算前向和后向传递。这意味着我们的树学习过程可以用作任意深度网络中的（隐式）层，并且可以使用任意损失函数进行优化。我们证明，我们的方法生成的二叉树在监督和无监督设置中都与现有的单树和集成方法具有竞争力。此外，除了贪婪方法（不具有竞争精度）之外，我们的方法比我们比较的所有其他树学习基线的训练速度更快。用于重现结果的代码可在 https://github.com/vzantedeschi/LatentTrees 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过Argmin微分同时学习二叉决策树离散参数和连续参数的方法，实现树结构的端到端优化。
AI.motivation: 传统决策树学习方法通常分离离散结构学习与连续参数优化，难以在深度网络中灵活集成且训练效率低下。
AI.method: 通过稀疏松弛混合整数规划问题，利用Argmin微分实现离散参数梯度传递，设计定制化前向/反向传播算法，使树结构可作为深度网络隐式层进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在监督和非监督场景下，该方法生成的树结构性能与现有单树及集成方法相当，且训练速度优于所有非贪心基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为决策树学习提供了高效可微的端到端框架，在保持性能的同时显著提升训练效率，适用于深度学习模型集成。

authors_text: Omar Shaikh,Jiaao Chen,Jon Saad-Falcon,Duen Horng Chau,Diyi Yang
title: Examining the Ordering of Rhetorical Strategies in Persuasive Requests
title_zh: 检查说服性请求中修辞策略的顺序
abstract: Interpreting how persuasive language influences audiences has implications across many domains like advertising, argumentation, and propaganda. Persuasion relies on more than a message's content. Arranging the order of the message itself (i.e., ordering specific rhetorical strategies) also plays an important role. To examine how strategy orderings contribute to persuasiveness, we first utilize a Variational Autoencoder model to disentangle content and rhetorical strategies in textual requests from a large-scale loan request corpus. We then visualize interplay between content and strategy through an attentional LSTM that predicts the success of textual requests. We find that specific (orderings of) strategies interact uniquely with a request's content to impact success rate, and thus the persuasiveness of a request.
summary: Interpreting how persuasive language influences audiences has implications across many domains like advertising, argumentation, and propaganda. Persuasion relies on more than a message's content. Arranging the order of the message itself (i.e., ordering specific rhetorical strategies) also plays an important role. To examine how strategy orderings contribute to persuasiveness, we first utilize a Variational Autoencoder model to disentangle content and rhetorical strategies in textual requests from a large-scale loan request corpus. We then visualize interplay between content and strategy through an attentional LSTM that predicts the success of textual requests. We find that specific (orderings of) strategies interact uniquely with a request's content to impact success rate, and thus the persuasiveness of a request.
abstract_zh: 解释说服性语言如何影响受众对广告、论证和宣传等许多领域都有影响。说服力不仅仅依赖于消息的内容。安排信息本身的顺序（即排列特定的修辞策略）也起着重要作用。为了研究策略排序如何有助于说服力，我们首先利用变分自动编码器模型从大规模贷款请求语料库中分离出文本请求中的内容和修辞策略。然后，我们通过注意力 LSTM 来可视化内容和策略之间的相互作用，预测文本请求的成功。我们发现特定的策略（顺序）与请求的内容独特地相互作用，影响成功率，从而影响请求的说服力。

AI.tldr: 研究说服性请求中修辞策略顺序对说服效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 说服力在广告、论点等领域至关重要，但现有研究多关注内容本身，忽视了修辞策略排列顺序的作用，需探索其影响机制。
AI.method: 采用变分自编码器分离文本内容与修辞策略，结合注意力机制LSTM模型分析策略顺序与内容的交互作用。
AI.result: 特定策略顺序与内容相互作用显著影响请求成功率，证明顺序安排对说服力具有关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 修辞策略的排列顺序是影响说服效果的重要因素，未来可进一步研究具体交互机制及应用优化。

title: Hyperspectral Unmixing via Nonnegative Matrix Factorization with Handcrafted and Learnt Priors
title_zh: 通过手工和学习先验的非负矩阵分解进行高光谱分解
abstract: Nowadays, nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF) based methods have been widely applied to blind spectral unmixing. Introducing proper regularizers to NMF is crucial for mathematically constraining the solutions and physically exploiting spectral and spatial properties of images. Generally, properly handcrafting regularizers and solving the associated complex optimization problem are non-trivial tasks. In our work, we propose an NMF based unmixing framework which jointly uses a handcrafting regularizer and a learnt regularizer from data. we plug learnt priors of abundances where the associated subproblem can be addressed using various image denoisers, and we consider an l_2,1-norm regularizer to the abundance matrix to promote sparse unmixing results. The proposed framework is flexible and extendable. Both synthetic data and real airborne data are conducted to confirm the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Nowadays, nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF) based methods have been widely applied to blind spectral unmixing. Introducing proper regularizers to NMF is crucial for mathematically constraining the solutions and physically exploiting spectral and spatial properties of images. Generally, properly handcrafting regularizers and solving the associated complex optimization problem are non-trivial tasks. In our work, we propose an NMF based unmixing framework which jointly uses a handcrafting regularizer and a learnt regularizer from data. we plug learnt priors of abundances where the associated subproblem can be addressed using various image denoisers, and we consider an l_2,1-norm regularizer to the abundance matrix to promote sparse unmixing results. The proposed framework is flexible and extendable. Both synthetic data and real airborne data are conducted to confirm the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 如今，基于非负矩阵分解（NMF）的方法已广泛应用于盲谱解混。向 NMF 引入适当的正则化器对于在数学上约束解决方案以及在物理上利用图像的光谱和空间特性至关重要。一般来说，正确地手工制作正则化器并解决相关的复杂优化问题是非常重要的任务。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种基于 NMF 的分解框架，该框架联合使用手工正则化器和从数据中学习的正则化器。我们插入学习到的丰度先验，其中相关的子问题可以使用各种图像降噪器来解决，并且我们考虑对丰度矩阵使用 l_2,1-norm 正则化器来促进稀疏解混合结果。所提出的框架是灵活且可扩展的。合成数据和真实机载数据都被用来证实我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合手工设计和数据学习先验的非负矩阵分解（NMF）框架，用于高光谱解混任务。
AI.motivation: 传统NMF方法在高光谱解混中需设计复杂正则化项以约束解的物理性和光谱空间特性，但手工设计正则化项和求解优化问题均存在挑战。
AI.method: 联合使用手工设计的l₂₁范数正则化（促进稀疏性）与从数据中学习的先验信息，通过图像去噪器解决子问题，构建灵活可扩展的解混框架。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实航空数据集上验证了方法有效性，解混结果优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 融合手工先验与数据驱动先验的NMF框架能有效提升高光谱解混性能，具有良好的扩展性。

ai_content_json.method: 联合使用手工设计的l₂₁范数正则化（促进稀疏性）与从数据中学习的先验信息，通过图像去噪器解决子问题，构建灵活可扩展的解混框架。
ai_content_json.result: 在合成数据和真实航空数据集上验证了方法有效性，解混结果优于现有技术。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 融合手工先验与数据驱动先验的NMF框架能有效提升高光谱解混性能，具有良好的扩展性。

search_text: Hyperspectral Unmixing via Nonnegative Matrix Factorization with Handcrafted and Learnt Priors 通过手工和学习先验的非负矩阵分解进行高光谱分解 Nowadays, nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF) based methods have been widely applied to blind spectral unmixing. Introducing proper regularizers to NMF is crucial for mathematically constraining the solutions and physically exploiting spectral and spatial properties of images. Generally, properly handcrafting regularizers and solving the associated complex optimization problem are non-trivial tasks. In our work, we propose an NMF based unmixing framework which jointly uses a handcrafting regularizer and a learnt regularizer from data. we plug learnt priors of abundances where the associated subproblem can be addressed using various image denoisers, and we consider an l_2,1-norm regularizer to the abundance matrix to promote sparse unmixing results. The proposed framework is flexible and extendable. Both synthetic data and real airborne data are conducted to confirm the effectiveness of our method. 如今，基于非负矩阵分解（NMF）的方法已广泛应用于盲谱解混。向 NMF 引入适当的正则化器对于在数学上约束解决方案以及在物理上利用图像的光谱和空间特性至关重要。一般来说，正确地手工制作正则化器并解决相关的复杂优化问题是非常重要的任务。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种基于 NMF 的分解框架，该框架联合使用手工正则化器和从数据中学习的正则化器。我们插入学习到的丰度先验，其中相关的子问题可以使用各种图像降噪器来解决，并且我们考虑对丰度矩阵使用 l_2,1-norm 正则化器来促进稀疏解混合结果。所提出的框架是灵活且可扩展的。合成数据和真实机载数据都被用来证实我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种结合手工设计和数据学习先验的非负矩阵分解（NMF）框架，用于高光谱解混任务。 Min Zhao,Tiande Gao,Jie Chen,Wei Chen cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Mark-Evaluate: Assessing Language Generation using Population Estimation Methods
title_zh: 标记评估：使用总体估计方法评估语言生成
abstract: We propose a family of metrics to assess language generation derived from population estimation methods widely used in ecology. More specifically, we use mark-recapture and maximum-likelihood methods that have been applied over the past several decades to estimate the size of closed populations in the wild. We propose three novel metrics: ME$_\text{Petersen}$ and ME$_\text{CAPTURE}$, which retrieve a single-valued assessment, and ME$_\text{Schnabel}$ which returns a double-valued metric to assess the evaluation set in terms of quality and diversity, separately. In synthetic experiments, our family of methods is sensitive to drops in quality and diversity. Moreover, our methods show a higher correlation to human evaluation than existing metrics on several challenging tasks, namely unconditional language generation, machine translation, and text summarization.
summary: We propose a family of metrics to assess language generation derived from population estimation methods widely used in ecology. More specifically, we use mark-recapture and maximum-likelihood methods that have been applied over the past several decades to estimate the size of closed populations in the wild. We propose three novel metrics: ME$_\text{Petersen}$ and ME$_\text{CAPTURE}$, which retrieve a single-valued assessment, and ME$_\text{Schnabel}$ which returns a double-valued metric to assess the evaluation set in terms of quality and diversity, separately. In synthetic experiments, our family of methods is sensitive to drops in quality and diversity. Moreover, our methods show a higher correlation to human evaluation than existing metrics on several challenging tasks, namely unconditional language generation, machine translation, and text summarization.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一系列指标来评估源自生态学中广泛使用的人口估计方法的语言生成。更具体地说，我们使用过去几十年来应用的标记重捕获和最大似然方法来估计野生封闭种群的规模。我们提出了三个新颖的指标：ME$_\text{Petersen}$ 和 ME$_\text{CAPTURE}$（检索单值评估）和 ME$_\text{Schnabel}$（返回双值指标，以分别评估评估集的质量和多样性）。在合成实验中，我们的方法系列对质量和多样性的下降很敏感。此外，在几个具有挑战性的任务（即无条件语言生成、机器翻译和文本摘要）上，我们的方法与人类评估的相关性高于现有指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生态学种群估计方法的语言生成评估指标，包括ME_Petersen、ME_CAPTURE和ME_Schnabel，用于衡量生成文本的质量和多样性。
AI.motivation: 传统语言生成评估指标难以同时有效捕捉质量与多样性，而生态学中的标记重捕法等种群估计方法能敏感反映种群变化，启发了该研究的跨学科应用。
AI.method: 借鉴生态学中Petersen估计、CAPTURE方法及Schnabel模型，设计三种新型评估指标，其中ME_Schnabel输出双值结果分别评估质量与多样性，并在合成数据及多个NLP任务中验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在无条件生成、机器翻译和文本摘要任务中，与人类评估的相关性高于现有指标，且对质量与多样性的下降更敏感。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科引入生态学方法可提升语言生成评估的准确性，ME_Schnabel的双值输出为模型优化提供了更细致的反馈维度。

title: Instance Weighted Incremental Evolution Strategies for Reinforcement Learning in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 动态环境中强化学习的实例加权增量进化策略
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2022, DOI: 10.1109/TNNLS.2022.3160173
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2022, DOI: 10.1109/TNNLS.2022.3160173
abstract: Evolution strategies (ES), as a family of black-box optimization algorithms, recently emerge as a scalable alternative to reinforcement learning (RL) approaches such as Q-learning or policy gradient, and are much faster when many central processing units (CPUs) are available due to better parallelization. In this paper, we propose a systematic incremental learning method for ES in dynamic environments. The goal is to adjust previously learned policy to a new one incrementally whenever the environment changes. We incorporate an instance weighting mechanism with ES to facilitate its learning adaptation, while retaining scalability of ES. During parameter updating, higher weights are assigned to instances that contain more new knowledge, thus encouraging the search distribution to move towards new promising areas of parameter space. We propose two easy-to-implement metrics to calculate the weights: instance novelty and instance quality. Instance novelty measures an instance's difference from the previous optimum in the original environment, while instance quality corresponds to how well an instance performs in the new environment. The resulting algorithm, Instance Weighted Incremental Evolution Strategies (IW-IES), is verified to achieve significantly improved performance on challenging RL tasks ranging from robot navigation to locomotion. This paper thus introduces a family of scalable ES algorithms for RL domains that enables rapid learning adaptation to dynamic environments.
summary: Evolution strategies (ES), as a family of black-box optimization algorithms, recently emerge as a scalable alternative to reinforcement learning (RL) approaches such as Q-learning or policy gradient, and are much faster when many central processing units (CPUs) are available due to better parallelization. In this paper, we propose a systematic incremental learning method for ES in dynamic environments. The goal is to adjust previously learned policy to a new one incrementally whenever the environment changes. We incorporate an instance weighting mechanism with ES to facilitate its learning adaptation, while retaining scalability of ES. During parameter updating, higher weights are assigned to instances that contain more new knowledge, thus encouraging the search distribution to move towards new promising areas of parameter space. We propose two easy-to-implement metrics to calculate the weights: instance novelty and instance quality. Instance novelty measures an instance's difference from the previous optimum in the original environment, while instance quality corresponds to how well an instance performs in the new environment. The resulting algorithm, Instance Weighted Incremental Evolution Strategies (IW-IES), is verified to achieve significantly improved performance on challenging RL tasks ranging from robot navigation to locomotion. This paper thus introduces a family of scalable ES algorithms for RL domains that enables rapid learning adaptation to dynamic environments.
abstract_zh: 进化策略 (ES) 作为一系列黑盒优化算法，最近作为强化学习 (RL) 方法（例如 Q 学习或策略梯度）的可扩展替代方案出现，并且由于更好的并行化，当许多中央处理单元 (CPU) 可用时，进化策略 (ES) 的速度要快得多。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态环境中 ES 的系统增量学习方法。目标是每当环境发生变化时，将先前学习的策略逐步调整为新的策略。我们将实例权重机制与 ES 结合起来，以促进其学习适应，同时保留 ES 的可扩展性。在参数更新过程中，更高的权重被分配给包含更多新知识的实例，从而鼓励搜索分布向参数空间的新的有希望的区域移动。我们提出了两个易于实现的指标来计算权重：实例新颖性和实例质量。实例新颖性衡量实例与原始环境中先前最佳实例的差异，而实例质量对应于实例在新环境中的执行情况。由此产生的算法实例加权增量进化策略 (IW-IES) 经过验证，可以在从机器人导航到运动等具有挑战性的 RL 任务中显着提高性能。因此，本文介绍了一系列用于 RL 领域的可扩展 ES 算法，能够快速学习适应动态环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实例加权增量进化策略（IW-IES），用于在动态环境中改进强化学习的适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在动态环境中适应性不足，而进化策略（ES）虽具可扩展性但缺乏对环境变化的增量学习能力。
AI.method: 通过引入实例新颖性（与旧最优解的差异）和实例质量（在新环境中的表现）两个指标，为ES的参数更新分配动态权重，引导搜索分布向新优化区域移动。
AI.result: 在机器人导航和运动控制等复杂任务中，IW-IES显著优于传统ES和RL方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: IW-IES为动态环境下的强化学习提供了可扩展且高效的增量学习框架，平衡了适应性与计算效率。

title: Integrating Intrinsic and Extrinsic Explainability: The Relevance of Understanding Neural Networks for Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 整合内在和外在可解释性：理解神经网络与人机交互的相关性
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) can help foster trust in and acceptance of intelligent and autonomous systems. Moreover, understanding the motivation for an agent's behavior results in better and more successful collaborations between robots and humans. However, not only can humans benefit from a robot's explanation but the robot itself can also benefit from explanations given to him. Currently, most attention is paid to explaining deep neural networks and black-box models. However, a lot of these approaches are not applicable to humanoid robots. Therefore, in this position paper, current problems with adapting XAI methods to explainable neurorobotics are described. Furthermore, NICO, an open-source humanoid robot platform, is introduced and how the interaction of intrinsic explanations by the robot itself and extrinsic explanations provided by the environment enable efficient robotic behavior.
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) can help foster trust in and acceptance of intelligent and autonomous systems. Moreover, understanding the motivation for an agent's behavior results in better and more successful collaborations between robots and humans. However, not only can humans benefit from a robot's explanation but the robot itself can also benefit from explanations given to him. Currently, most attention is paid to explaining deep neural networks and black-box models. However, a lot of these approaches are not applicable to humanoid robots. Therefore, in this position paper, current problems with adapting XAI methods to explainable neurorobotics are described. Furthermore, NICO, an open-source humanoid robot platform, is introduced and how the interaction of intrinsic explanations by the robot itself and extrinsic explanations provided by the environment enable efficient robotic behavior.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 有助于培养人们对智能自主系统的信任和接受。此外，了解智能体行为的动机可以使机器人和人类之间更好、更成功的合作。然而，不仅人类可以从机器人的解释中受益，机器人本身也可以从给予他的解释中受益。目前，最关注的是解释深度神经网络和黑盒模型。然而，这些方法中有很多并不适用于人形机器人。因此，在这篇立场文件中，描述了将 XAI 方法应用于可解释神经机器人的当前问题。此外，还介绍了开源人形机器人平台NICO，以及机器人本身的内在解释和环境提供的外在解释的相互作用如何实现高效的机器人行为。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在神经机器人学中应用可解释人工智能（XAI）的挑战，并介绍了NICO平台如何通过内在和外在解释机制提升人机协作效率。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法难以适应人形机器人，导致机器人行为解释不足，影响人机信任与协作效果，需探索更适合的解释框架。
AI.method: 通过综述现有XAI在机器人领域的局限性，提出结合机器人自身内在解释与环境外在解释的交互框架，并以NICO开源平台为例进行验证。
AI.result: 明确了内在（机器人自主生成解释）与外在（环境反馈解释）机制的协同作用，为神经机器人学的可解释性研究提供了新方向。
AI.conclusion: 整合内在与外在解释机制可有效提升人形机器人的可解释性，未来需进一步探索其在复杂交互场景中的应用与优化。

title: GRF: Learning a General Radiance Field for 3D Representation and Rendering
title_zh: GRF：学习 3D 表示和渲染的通用辐射场
comment: ICCV 2021. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/alextrevithick/GRF
comments: ICCV 2021. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/alextrevithick/GRF
abstract: We present a simple yet powerful neural network that implicitly represents and renders 3D objects and scenes only from 2D observations. The network models 3D geometries as a general radiance field, which takes a set of 2D images with camera poses and intrinsics as input, constructs an internal representation for each point of the 3D space, and then renders the corresponding appearance and geometry of that point viewed from an arbitrary position. The key to our approach is to learn local features for each pixel in 2D images and to then project these features to 3D points, thus yielding general and rich point representations. We additionally integrate an attention mechanism to aggregate pixel features from multiple 2D views, such that visual occlusions are implicitly taken into account. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can generate high-quality and realistic novel views for novel objects, unseen categories and challenging real-world scenes.
summary: We present a simple yet powerful neural network that implicitly represents and renders 3D objects and scenes only from 2D observations. The network models 3D geometries as a general radiance field, which takes a set of 2D images with camera poses and intrinsics as input, constructs an internal representation for each point of the 3D space, and then renders the corresponding appearance and geometry of that point viewed from an arbitrary position. The key to our approach is to learn local features for each pixel in 2D images and to then project these features to 3D points, thus yielding general and rich point representations. We additionally integrate an attention mechanism to aggregate pixel features from multiple 2D views, such that visual occlusions are implicitly taken into account. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can generate high-quality and realistic novel views for novel objects, unseen categories and challenging real-world scenes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个简单但功能强大的神经网络，它仅根据 2D 观察隐式表示和渲染 3D 对象和场景。该网络将 3D 几何形状建模为通用辐射场，以一组带有相机姿态和内在特征的 2D 图像作为输入，为 3D 空间的每个点构建内部表示，然后渲染从任意位置查看的该点的相应外观和几何形状。我们方法的关键是学习 2D 图像中每个像素的局部特征，然后将这些特征投影到 3D 点，从而产生通用且丰富的点表示。我们还集成了一种注意力机制来聚合来自多个 2D 视图的像素特征，从而隐式地考虑视觉遮挡。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以为新颖的物体、看不见的类别和具有挑战性的现实世界场景生成高质量和逼真的新颖视图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的通用辐射场方法GRF，仅从2D观测图像中隐式表示和渲染3D物体与场景。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法通常依赖复杂结构或特定场景假设，难以处理真实复杂场景。本文旨在开发一种简单且通用的3D表示方法，能够从多视角2D图像中学习丰富点表示并生成高质量新视角。
AI.method: 通过学习2D图像像素的局部特征并投影到3D空间，构建通用辐射场。引入注意力机制聚合多视角特征，隐式处理遮挡问题，实现任意视角的几何与外观渲染。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成高质量新视角，适用于新物体、未见过类别及复杂真实场景，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GRF提供了一种简单有效的3D表示与渲染框架，通过隐式辐射场和多视角特征融合，在多种场景下均表现优异。

Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can generate high-quality and realistic novel views for novel objects, unseen categories and challenging real-world scenes. 我们提出了一个简单但功能强大的神经网络，它仅根据 2D 观察隐式表示和渲染 3D 对象和场景。该网络将 3D 几何形状建模为通用辐射场，以一组带有相机姿态和内在特征的 2D 图像作为输入，为 3D 空间的每个点构建内部表示，然后渲染从任意位置查看的该点的相应外观和几何形状。我们方法的关键是学习 2D 图像中每个像素的局部特征，然后将这些特征投影到 3D 点，从而产生通用且丰富的点表示。我们还集成了一种注意力机制来聚合来自多个 2D 视图的像素特征，从而隐式地考虑视觉遮挡。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以为新颖的物体、看不见的类别和具有挑战性的现实世界场景生成高质量和逼真的新颖视图。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的通用辐射场方法GRF，仅从2D观测图像中隐式表示和渲染3D物体与场景。 Alex Trevithick,Bo Yang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: A Novel ANN Structure for Image Recognition
title_zh: 一种用于图像识别的新型人工神经网络结构
abstract: The paper presents Multi-layer Auto Resonance Networks (ARN), a new neural model, for image recognition. Neurons in ARN, called Nodes, latch on to an incoming pattern and resonate when the input is within its 'coverage.' Resonance allows the neuron to be noise tolerant and tunable. Coverage of nodes gives them an ability to approximate the incoming pattern. Its latching characteristics allow it to respond to episodic events without disturbing the existing trained network. These networks are capable of addressing problems in varied fields but have not been sufficiently explored. Implementation of an image classification and identification system using two-layer ARN is discussed in this paper. Recognition accuracy of 94% has been achieved for MNIST dataset with only two layers of neurons and just 50 samples per numeral, making it useful in computing at the edge of cloud infrastructure.
summary: The paper presents Multi-layer Auto Resonance Networks (ARN), a new neural model, for image recognition. Neurons in ARN, called Nodes, latch on to an incoming pattern and resonate when the input is within its 'coverage.' Resonance allows the neuron to be noise tolerant and tunable. Coverage of nodes gives them an ability to approximate the incoming pattern. Its latching characteristics allow it to respond to episodic events without disturbing the existing trained network. These networks are capable of addressing problems in varied fields but have not been sufficiently explored. Implementation of an image classification and identification system using two-layer ARN is discussed in this paper. Recognition accuracy of 94% has been achieved for MNIST dataset with only two layers of neurons and just 50 samples per numeral, making it useful in computing at the edge of cloud infrastructure.
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了多层自动共振网络（ARN），这是一种用于图像识别的新神经模型。 ARN 中的神经元（称为节点）会锁定传入模式，并在输入位于其“覆盖范围”内时发生共振。共振使神经元具有噪声耐受性和可调性。节点的覆盖范围使它们能够近似输入模式。其锁存特性使其能够响应偶发事件，而不会干扰现有的训练网络。这些网络能够解决不同领域的问题，但尚未得到充分探索。本文讨论了使用两层 ARN 的图像分类和识别系统的实现。仅两层神经元且每个数字仅 50 个样本的 MNIST 数据集即可实现 94% 的识别准确率，使其可用于云基础设施边缘的计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经网络结构Multi-layer Auto Resonance Networks (ARN)，用于图像识别任务，并在MNIST数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在噪声容忍性、可调性及边缘计算效率方面存在不足，亟需更高效且鲁棒的图像识别模型。
AI.method: 设计多层自共振网络（ARN），通过节点共振机制实现模式匹配，利用覆盖范围近似输入并具备闩锁特性，采用两层结构构建图像分类系统。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上以两层神经元和每类50个样本实现94%识别准确率，验证了ARN在边缘计算场景下的可行性。
AI.conclusion: ARN通过共振机制显著提升了图像识别的噪声容忍能力，其轻量化结构适合边缘计算，未来可拓展至更多应用场景。

ai_content_json.conclusion: ARN通过共振机制显著提升了图像识别的噪声容忍能力，其轻量化结构适合边缘计算，未来可拓展至更多应用场景。

tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经网络结构Multi-layer Auto Resonance Networks (ARN)，用于图像识别任务，并在MNIST数据集上验证其有效性。
motivation: 传统神经网络在噪声容忍性、可调性及边缘计算效率方面存在不足，亟需更高效且鲁棒的图像识别模型。
method: 设计多层自共振网络（ARN），通过节点共振机制实现模式匹配，利用覆盖范围近似输入并具备闩锁特性，采用两层结构构建图像分类系统。
result: 在MNIST数据集上以两层神经元和每类50个样本实现94%识别准确率，验证了ARN在边缘计算场景下的可行性。
conclusion: ARN通过共振机制显著提升了图像识别的噪声容忍能力，其轻量化结构适合边缘计算，未来可拓展至更多应用场景。
search_text: A Novel ANN Structure for Image Recognition 一种用于图像识别的新型人工神经网络结构 The paper presents Multi-layer Auto Resonance Networks (ARN), a new neural model, for image recognition. Neurons in ARN, called Nodes, latch on to an incoming pattern and resonate when the input is within its 'coverage.' Resonance allows the neuron to be noise tolerant and tunable. Coverage of nodes gives them an ability to approximate the incoming pattern. Its latching characteristics allow it to respond to episodic events without disturbing the existing trained network. These networks are capable of addressing problems in varied fields but have not been sufficiently explored. Implementation of an image classification and identification system using two-layer ARN is discussed in this paper. Recognition accuracy of 94% has been achieved for MNIST dataset with only two layers of neurons and just 50 samples per numeral, making it useful in computing at the edge of cloud infrastructure. 该论文提出了多层自动共振网络（ARN），这是一种用于图像识别的新神经模型。 ARN 中的神经元（称为节点）会锁定传入模式，并在输入位于其“覆盖范围”内时发生共振。共振使神经元具有噪声耐受性和可调性。节点的覆盖范围使它们能够近似输入模式。其锁存特性使其能够响应偶发事件，而不会干扰现有的训练网络。这些网络能够解决不同领域的问题，但尚未得到充分探索。本文讨论了使用两层 ARN 的图像分类和识别系统的实现。仅两层神经元且每个数字仅 50 个样本的 MNIST 数据集即可实现 94% 的识别准确率，使其可用于云基础设施边缘的计算。 本文提出一种新型神经网络结构Multi-layer Auto Resonance Networks (ARN)，用于图像识别任务，并在MNIST数据集上验证其有效性。 Shilpa Mayannavar,Uday Wali,V M Aparanji cs.CV,cs.AI

title: HENIN: Learning Heterogeneous Neural Interaction Networks for Explainable Cyberbullying Detection on Social Media
title_zh: HENIN：学习异构神经交互网络以实现社交媒体上可解释的网络欺凌检测
comment: EMNLP 2020 long paper. Code is available at https://github.com/HsinYu7330/HENIN
comments: EMNLP 2020 long paper. Code is available at https://github.com/HsinYu7330/HENIN
abstract: In the computational detection of cyberbullying, existing work largely focused on building generic classifiers that rely exclusively on text analysis of social media sessions. Despite their empirical success, we argue that a critical missing piece is the model explainability, i.e., why a particular piece of media session is detected as cyberbullying. In this paper, therefore, we propose a novel deep model, HEterogeneous Neural Interaction Networks (HENIN), for explainable cyberbullying detection. HENIN contains the following components: a comment encoder, a post-comment co-attention sub-network, and session-session and post-post interaction extractors. Extensive experiments conducted on real datasets exhibit not only the promising performance of HENIN, but also highlight evidential comments so that one can understand why a media session is identified as cyberbullying.
summary: In the computational detection of cyberbullying, existing work largely focused on building generic classifiers that rely exclusively on text analysis of social media sessions. Despite their empirical success, we argue that a critical missing piece is the model explainability, i.e., why a particular piece of media session is detected as cyberbullying. In this paper, therefore, we propose a novel deep model, HEterogeneous Neural Interaction Networks (HENIN), for explainable cyberbullying detection. HENIN contains the following components: a comment encoder, a post-comment co-attention sub-network, and session-session and post-post interaction extractors. Extensive experiments conducted on real datasets exhibit not only the promising performance of HENIN, but also highlight evidential comments so that one can understand why a media session is identified as cyberbullying.
abstract_zh: 在网络欺凌的计算检测中，现有的工作主要集中在构建完全依赖于社交媒体会话的文本分析的通用分类器。尽管他们在实证上取得了成功，但我们认为，模型的可解释性是一个关键的缺失部分，即为什么媒体会话的特定部分被检测为网络欺凌。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度模型，异构神经交互网络（HENIN），用于可解释的网络欺凌检测。 HENIN 包含以下组件：评论编码器、评论后共同注意子网络以及会话-会话和后后交互提取器。在真实数据集上进行的大量实验不仅展示了 HENIN 的良好性能，而且还突出了证据性评论，以便人们能够理解为什么媒体会话被认定为网络欺凌。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HENIN模型，通过异构神经交互网络实现社交媒体上可解释的网络欺凌检测。
AI.motivation: 现有网络欺凌检测方法过度依赖文本分析且缺乏模型可解释性，无法说明为何特定内容被判定为欺凌。
AI.method: 设计包含评论编码器、帖子-评论共注意力子网络及会话间/帖子间交互提取器的HENIN架构，捕捉多粒度交互信息并生成可解释证据。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了HENIN的优越检测性能，并能有效标注支持检测结论的关键评论证据。
AI.conclusion: HENIN通过结构化交互建模和证据可视化，在提升检测准确率的同时实现了网络欺凌检测的可解释性突破。

authors_text: Anastasia Bolotnikova,Pierre Gergondet,Arnaud Tanguy,Sébastien Courtois,Abderrahmane Kheddar
title: Task-Space Control Interface for SoftBank Humanoid Robots and its Human-Robot Interaction Applications
title_zh: SoftBank 人形机器人的任务空间控制接口及其人机交互应用
comment: IEEE/SICE 13th International Symposium on System Integration (SII 2021)
comments: IEEE/SICE 13th International Symposium on System Integration (SII 2021)
abstract: We present an open-source software interface, called mc_naoqi, that allows to perform whole-body task-space Quadratic Programming based control, implemented in mc_rtc framework, on the SoftBank Robotics Europe humanoid robots. We describe the control interface, associated robot description packages, robot modules and sample whole-body controllers. We demonstrate the use of these tools in simulation for a robot interacting with a human model. Finally, we showcase and discuss the use of the developed open-source tools for running the human-robot close contact interaction experiments with real human subjects inspired from assistance scenarios.
summary: We present an open-source software interface, called mc_naoqi, that allows to perform whole-body task-space Quadratic Programming based control, implemented in mc_rtc framework, on the SoftBank Robotics Europe humanoid robots. We describe the control interface, associated robot description packages, robot modules and sample whole-body controllers. We demonstrate the use of these tools in simulation for a robot interacting with a human model. Finally, we showcase and discuss the use of the developed open-source tools for running the human-robot close contact interaction experiments with real human subjects inspired from assistance scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个名为 mc_naoqi 的开源软件接口，它允许在 SoftBank Robotics Europe 人形机器人上执行基于全身任务空间二次规划的控制，在 mc_rtc 框架中实现。我们描述了控制接口、相关的机器人描述包、机器人模块和示例全身控制器。我们演示了这些工具在机器人与人类模型交互的模拟中的使用。最后，我们展示并讨论了如何使用开发的开源工具，在援助场景的启发下，与真实的人类受试者一起运行人机密切接触交互实验。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个开源软件接口mc_naoqi，用于在SoftBank人形机器人上实现基于二次规划的全身任务空间控制，并探索其在人机交互中的应用。
AI.motivation: 为SoftBank人形机器人提供灵活的控制接口，以支持复杂的人机协作任务和真实场景下的交互实验。
AI.method: 基于mc_rtc框架开发mc_naoqi接口，集成机器人描述包、模块化控制器，并通过仿真与真实实验验证控制效果。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中实现机器人与人类模型的交互，并通过真实人体实验展示了该工具在辅助场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该开源工具为研究人形机器人与人类的紧密交互提供了有效技术支持，适用于医疗、服务等辅助场景。

authors_text: Daniel Hernández García,Yanchao Yu,Weronika Sieińska,Jose L. Part,Nancie Gunson,Oliver Lemon,Christian Dondrup
title: Explainable Representations of the Social State: A Model for Social Human-Robot Interactions
title_zh: 社会状态的可解释表示：社会人机交互模型
abstract: In this paper, we propose a minimum set of concepts and signals needed to track the social state during Human-Robot Interaction. We look into the problem of complex continuous interactions in a social context with multiple humans and robots, and discuss the creation of an explainable and tractable representation/model of their social interaction. We discuss these representations according to their representational and communicational properties, and organize them into four cognitive domains (scene-understanding, behaviour-profiling, mental-state, and dialogue-grounding).
summary: In this paper, we propose a minimum set of concepts and signals needed to track the social state during Human-Robot Interaction. We look into the problem of complex continuous interactions in a social context with multiple humans and robots, and discuss the creation of an explainable and tractable representation/model of their social interaction. We discuss these representations according to their representational and communicational properties, and organize them into four cognitive domains (scene-understanding, behaviour-profiling, mental-state, and dialogue-grounding).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了跟踪人机交互过程中的社会状态所需的一组最小概念和信号。我们研究了在社会环境中与多个人类和机器人进行复杂的连续交互的问题，并讨论了创建可解释且易于处理的社交交互表示/模型。我们根据这些表征和交流特性来讨论这些表征，并将它们组织成四个认知领域（场景理解、行为分析、心理状态和对话基础）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的社交状态表示模型，用于多智能体人机交互场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理复杂连续的社交互动场景，需要建立可解释且可操作的社交状态表示框架。
AI.method: 通过分析社交交互的表示与通信特性，将模型划分为场景理解、行为分析、心理状态和对话基础四个认知领域。
AI.result: 构建了结构化社交状态表示框架，明确了不同认知域的表征机制与交互规则。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为实现可解释的人机社交交互提供了理论基础，有助于提升多智能体系统的交互自然性与可理解性。

search_text: Explainable Representations of the Social State: A Model for Social Human-Robot Interactions 社会状态的可解释表示：社会人机交互模型 In this paper, we propose a minimum set of concepts and signals needed to track the social state during Human-Robot Interaction. We look into the problem of complex continuous interactions in a social context with multiple humans and robots, and discuss the creation of an explainable and tractable representation/model of their social interaction. We discuss these representations according to their representational and communicational properties, and organize them into four cognitive domains (scene-understanding, behaviour-profiling, mental-state, and dialogue-grounding). 在本文中，我们提出了跟踪人机交互过程中的社会状态所需的一组最小概念和信号。我们研究了在社会环境中与多个人类和机器人进行复杂的连续交互的问题，并讨论了创建可解释且易于处理的社交交互表示/模型。我们根据这些表征和交流特性来讨论这些表征，并将它们组织成四个认知领域（场景理解、行为分析、心理状态和对话基础）。 本文提出了一种可解释的社交状态表示模型，用于多智能体人机交互场景。 Daniel Hernández García,Yanchao Yu,Weronika Sieińska,Jose L. Part,Nancie Gunson,Oliver Lemon,Christian Dondrup cs.RO,cs.HC

title: Table Structure Recognition using Top-Down and Bottom-Up Cues
title_zh: 使用自上而下和自下而上提示的表格结构识别
abstract: Tables are information-rich structured objects in document images. While significant work has been done in localizing tables as graphic objects in document images, only limited attempts exist on table structure recognition. Most existing literature on structure recognition depends on extraction of meta-features from the PDF document or on the optical character recognition (OCR) models to extract low-level layout features from the image. However, these methods fail to generalize well because of the absence of meta-features or errors made by the OCR when there is a significant variance in table layouts and text organization. In our work, we focus on tables that have complex structures, dense content, and varying layouts with no dependency on meta-features and/or OCR. We present an approach for table structure recognition that combines cell detection and interaction modules to localize the cells and predict their row and column associations with other detected cells. We incorporate structural constraints as additional differential components to the loss function for cell detection. We empirically validate our method on the publicly available real-world datasets - ICDAR-2013, ICDAR-2019 (cTDaR) archival, UNLV, SciTSR, SciTSR-COMP, TableBank, and PubTabNet. Our attempt opens up a new direction for table structure recognition by combining top-down (table cells detection) and bottom-up (structure recognition) cues in visually understanding the tables.
summary: Tables are information-rich structured objects in document images. While significant work has been done in localizing tables as graphic objects in document images, only limited attempts exist on table structure recognition. Most existing literature on structure recognition depends on extraction of meta-features from the PDF document or on the optical character recognition (OCR) models to extract low-level layout features from the image. However, these methods fail to generalize well because of the absence of meta-features or errors made by the OCR when there is a significant variance in table layouts and text organization. In our work, we focus on tables that have complex structures, dense content, and varying layouts with no dependency on meta-features and/or OCR. We present an approach for table structure recognition that combines cell detection and interaction modules to localize the cells and predict their row and column associations with other detected cells. We incorporate structural constraints as additional differential components to the loss function for cell detection. We empirically validate our method on the publicly available real-world datasets - ICDAR-2013, ICDAR-2019 (cTDaR) archival, UNLV, SciTSR, SciTSR-COMP, TableBank, and PubTabNet. Our attempt opens up a new direction for table structure recognition by combining top-down (table cells detection) and bottom-up (structure recognition) cues in visually understanding the tables.
abstract_zh: 表格是文档图像中信息丰富的结构化对象。虽然在将表格本地化为文档图像中的图形对象方面已经做了大量工作，但在表格结构识别方面仅进行了有限的尝试。大多数有关结构识别的现有文献依赖于从 PDF 文档中提取元特征，或者依赖于光学字符识别 (OCR) 模型来从图像中提取低级布局特征。然而，这些方法无法很好地推广，因为缺乏元特征，或者当表格布局和文本组织存在显着差异时，OCR 会产生错误。在我们的工作中，我们专注于具有复杂结构、密集内容和不同布局的表格，而不依赖于元特征和/或 OCR。我们提出了一种表结构识别方法，该方法结合了单元格检测和交互模块来定位单元格并预测它们与其他检测到的单元格的行和列关联。我们将结构约束作为细胞检测损失函数的附加微分组件。我们在公开的真实世界数据集 - ICDAR-2013、ICDAR-2019 (cTDaR) 档案、UNLV、SciTSR、SciTSR-COMP、TableBank 和 PubTabNet 上实证验证了我们的方法。我们的尝试通过结合自上而下（表格单元格检测）和自下而上（结构识别）线索来直观地理解表格，为表格结构识别开辟了新的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖PDF元数据或OCR的表格结构识别方法，结合自上而下（单元格检测）与自下而上（结构识别）线索进行表格结构分析。
AI.motivation: 现有表格结构识别方法依赖PDF元数据或OCR技术，难以处理复杂布局和密集内容的表格，且存在元数据缺失或OCR误差问题。
AI.method: 设计单元格检测与交互模块定位单元格并预测行列关联，将结构约束作为损失函数的差分组件，结合自上而下与自下而上线索进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在ICDAR-2013、TableBank等7个真实数据集上验证，证明方法在复杂表格结构识别任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合自上而下单元格检测与自下而上结构识别线索，为表格结构分析提供了新的技术路径。

title: Audio-Visual Speech Inpainting with Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习进行视听语音修复
abstract: In this paper, we present a deep-learning-based framework for audio-visual speech inpainting, i.e., the task of restoring the missing parts of an acoustic speech signal from reliable audio context and uncorrupted visual information. Recent work focuses solely on audio-only methods and generally aims at inpainting music signals, which show highly different structure than speech. Instead, we inpaint speech signals with gaps ranging from 100 ms to 1600 ms to investigate the contribution that vision can provide for gaps of different duration. We also experiment with a multi-task learning approach where a phone recognition task is learned together with speech inpainting. Results show that the performance of audio-only speech inpainting approaches degrades rapidly when gaps get large, while the proposed audio-visual approach is able to plausibly restore missing information. In addition, we show that multi-task learning is effective, although the largest contribution to performance comes from vision.
summary: In this paper, we present a deep-learning-based framework for audio-visual speech inpainting, i.e., the task of restoring the missing parts of an acoustic speech signal from reliable audio context and uncorrupted visual information. Recent work focuses solely on audio-only methods and generally aims at inpainting music signals, which show highly different structure than speech. Instead, we inpaint speech signals with gaps ranging from 100 ms to 1600 ms to investigate the contribution that vision can provide for gaps of different duration. We also experiment with a multi-task learning approach where a phone recognition task is learned together with speech inpainting. Results show that the performance of audio-only speech inpainting approaches degrades rapidly when gaps get large, while the proposed audio-visual approach is able to plausibly restore missing information. In addition, we show that multi-task learning is effective, although the largest contribution to performance comes from vision.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的视听语音修复框架，即从可靠的音频上下文和未损坏的视觉信息中恢复声学语音信号丢失部分的任务。最近的工作仅关注纯音频方法，通常旨在修复音乐信号，其结构与语音有很大不同。相反，我们修复了间隙范围从 100 毫秒到 1600 毫秒的语音信号，以研究视觉对不同持续时间间隙的贡献。我们还尝试了一种多任务学习方法，其中电话识别任务与语音修复一起学习。结果表明，当间隙变大时，纯音频语音修复方法的性能会迅速下降，而所提出的视听方法能够合理地恢复丢失的信息。此外，我们表明多任务学习是有效的，尽管对性能的最大贡献来自视觉。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习的音频-视觉语音修复框架，利用可靠音频上下文和未损坏视觉信息恢复缺失的语音信号部分
AI.motivation: 现有研究多专注于音频-only方法且针对音乐信号，而语音信号的结构差异大，需探索视觉信息对不同长度缺失部分的贡献
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，同时学习音素识别与语音修复任务，利用视觉信息辅助音频缺失部分的修复
AI.result: 音频-only方法在长缺口时效果差，而提出的视听方法能有效恢复，且视觉信息贡献最大，多任务学习也有帮助
AI.conclusion: 视听融合显著提升语音修复效果，视觉信息是主要贡献，多任务学习辅助提升性能

title: Neural Random Projection: From the Initial Task To the Input Similarity Problem
title_zh: 神经随机投影：从初始任务到输入相似性问题
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel approach for implicit data representation to evaluate similarity of input data using a trained neural network. In contrast to the previous approach, which uses gradients for representation, we utilize only the outputs from the last hidden layer of a neural network and do not use a backward step. The proposed technique explicitly takes into account the initial task and significantly reduces the size of the vector representation, as well as the computation time. The key point is minimization of information loss between layers. Generally, a neural network discards information that is not related to the problem, which makes the last hidden layer representation useless for input similarity task. In this work, we consider two main causes of information loss: correlation between neurons and insufficient size of the last hidden layer. To reduce the correlation between neurons we use orthogonal weight initialization for each layer and modify the loss function to ensure orthogonality of the weights during training. Moreover, we show that activation functions can potentially increase correlation. To solve this problem, we apply modified Batch-Normalization with Dropout. Using orthogonal weight matrices allow us to consider such neural networks as an application of the Random Projection method and get a lower bound estimate for the size of the last hidden layer. We perform experiments on MNIST and physical examination datasets. In both experiments, initially, we split a set of labels into two disjoint subsets to train a neural network for binary classification problem, and then use this model to measure similarity between input data and define hidden classes. Our experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves competitive results on the input similarity task while reducing both computation time and the size of the input representation.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel approach for implicit data representation to evaluate similarity of input data using a trained neural network. In contrast to the previous approach, which uses gradients for representation, we utilize only the outputs from the last hidden layer of a neural network and do not use a backward step. The proposed technique explicitly takes into account the initial task and significantly reduces the size of the vector representation, as well as the computation time. The key point is minimization of information loss between layers. Generally, a neural network discards information that is not related to the problem, which makes the last hidden layer representation useless for input similarity task. In this work, we consider two main causes of information loss: correlation between neurons and insufficient size of the last hidden layer. To reduce the correlation between neurons we use orthogonal weight initialization for each layer and modify the loss function to ensure orthogonality of the weights during training. Moreover, we show that activation functions can potentially increase correlation. To solve this problem, we apply modified Batch-Normalization with Dropout. Using orthogonal weight matrices allow us to consider such neural networks as an application of the Random Projection method and get a lower bound estimate for the size of the last hidden layer. We perform experiments on MNIST and physical examination datasets. In both experiments, initially, we split a set of labels into two disjoint subsets to train a neural network for binary classification problem, and then use this model to measure similarity between input data and define hidden classes. Our experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves competitive results on the input similarity task while reducing both computation time and the size of the input representation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种隐式数据表示的新方法，使用经过训练的神经网络来评估输入数据的相似性。与之前使用梯度进行表示的方法相比，我们仅利用神经网络最后一个隐藏层的输出，而不使用后向步骤。所提出的技术明确考虑了初始任务，并显着减少了向量表示的大小以及计算时间。关键点是层间信息损失最小化。通常，神经网络会丢弃与问题无关的信息，这使得最后的隐藏层表示对于输入相似性任务毫无用处。在这项工作中，我们考虑了信息丢失的两个主要原因：神经元之间的相关性和最后一个隐藏层的大小不足。为了减少神经元之间的相关性，我们对每层使用正交权重初始化，并修改损失函数以确保训练期间权重的正交性。此外，我们表明激活函数可以潜在地增加相关性。为了解决这个问题，我们应用了带有 Dropout 的修改后的 Batch-Normalization。使用正交权重矩阵使我们能够将此类神经网络视为随机投影方法的应用，并获得最后隐藏层大小的下界估计。我们在 MNIST 和体检数据集上进行实验。在这两个实验中，最初，我们将一组标签分成两个不相交的子集，以训练用于二元分类问题的神经网络，然后使用该模型来测量输入数据之间的相似性并定义隐藏类。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在输入相似性任务上取得了有竞争力的结果，同时减少了计算时间和输入表示的大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络隐层输出的输入相似性评估方法，通过减少信息损失和计算量来优化数据表示。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖梯度进行数据表示，存在计算复杂度高和信息损失大的问题，而隐层输出未充分利用且可能丢失关键信息，需改进以提升相似性评估效率。
AI.method: 采用正交权重初始化和修改损失函数以保持权重正交性，结合改进的Batch-Normalization与Dropout降低神经元相关性，并利用正交矩阵将网络视为随机投影方法，估算隐层尺寸下限。
AI.result: 在MNIST和体检数据集实验中，该方法在相似性任务上表现与现有方法相当，同时显著减少计算时间和表示维度。
AI.conclusion: 正交权重与随机投影结合有效提升输入相似性评估效率，为隐层尺寸设计提供理论依据，适用于需要高效表示的实际场景。

authors_text: Osama N. Hassan,Serhat Sahin,Vahid Mohammadzadeh,Xiaohe Yang,Navid Amini,Apoorva Mylavarapu,Jack Martinyan,Tae Hong,Golnoush Mahmoudinezhad,Daniel Rueckert,Kouros Nouri-Mahdavi,Fabien Scalzo
title: Conditional GAN for Prediction of Glaucoma Progression with Macular Optical Coherence Tomography
title_zh: 使用黄斑光学相干断层扫描预测青光眼进展的条件 GAN
abstract: The estimation of glaucoma progression is a challenging task as the rate of disease progression varies among individuals in addition to other factors such as measurement variability and the lack of standardization in defining progression. Structural tests, such as thickness measurements of the retinal nerve fiber layer or the macula with optical coherence tomography (OCT), are able to detect anatomical changes in glaucomatous eyes. Such changes may be observed before any functional damage. In this work, we built a generative deep learning model using the conditional GAN architecture to predict glaucoma progression over time. The patient's OCT scan is predicted from three or two prior measurements. The predicted images demonstrate high similarity with the ground truth images. In addition, our results suggest that OCT scans obtained from only two prior visits may actually be sufficient to predict the next OCT scan of the patient after six months.
summary: The estimation of glaucoma progression is a challenging task as the rate of disease progression varies among individuals in addition to other factors such as measurement variability and the lack of standardization in defining progression. Structural tests, such as thickness measurements of the retinal nerve fiber layer or the macula with optical coherence tomography (OCT), are able to detect anatomical changes in glaucomatous eyes. Such changes may be observed before any functional damage. In this work, we built a generative deep learning model using the conditional GAN architecture to predict glaucoma progression over time. The patient's OCT scan is predicted from three or two prior measurements. The predicted images demonstrate high similarity with the ground truth images. In addition, our results suggest that OCT scans obtained from only two prior visits may actually be sufficient to predict the next OCT scan of the patient after six months.
abstract_zh: 青光眼进展的估计是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为除了测量变异性和定义进展缺乏标准化等其他因素外，疾病进展的速度因人而异。结构测试，例如使用光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 测量视网膜神经纤维层或黄斑的厚度，能够检测青光眼眼睛的解剖变化。在任何功能损坏之前可以观察到此类变化。在这项工作中，我们使用条件 GAN 架构构建了一个生成深度学习模型来预测青光眼随时间的进展。患者的 OCT 扫描是根据之前的三到两次测量来预测的。预测图像与地面真实图像表现出高度相似性。此外，我们的结果表明，仅从之前两次就诊中获得的 OCT 扫描实际上可能足以预测患者六个月后的下一次 OCT 扫描。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）模型，基于患者历史OCT扫描数据预测青光眼病情进展。
AI.motivation: 青光眼进展速度个体差异大且缺乏标准化评估体系，传统方法难以准确预测。OCT可检测早期结构变化，但需探索更有效的预测模型。
AI.method: 构建条件GAN架构，利用患者3次或2次历史OCT扫描作为输入，生成未来6个月的OCT预测图像并评估相似度。
AI.result: 预测图像与真实图像具有高相似度，且仅使用2次历史扫描即可实现有效预测，验证了模型的可行性。
AI.conclusion: cGAN在青光眼进展预测中表现优异，少量历史数据即可实现准确预测，为临床提供新工具。

title: AI Centered on Scene Fitting and Dynamic Cognitive Network
title_zh: 以场景拟合和动态认知网络为核心的人工智能
abstract: This paper briefly analyzes the advantages and problems of AI mainstream technology and puts forward: To achieve stronger Artificial Intelligence, the end-to-end function calculation must be changed and adopt the technology system centered on scene fitting. It also discusses the concrete scheme named Dynamic Cognitive Network model (DC Net). Discussions : The knowledge and data in the comprehensive domain are uniformly represented by using the rich connection heterogeneous Dynamic Cognitive Network constructed by conceptualized elements; A network structure of two dimensions and multi layers is designed to achieve unified implementation of AI core processing such as combination and generalization; This paper analyzes the implementation differences of computer systems in different scenes, such as open domain, closed domain, significant probability and non-significant probability, and points out that the implementation in open domain and significant probability scene is the key of AI, and a cognitive probability model combining bidirectional conditional probability, probability passing and superposition, probability col-lapse is designed; An omnidirectional network matching-growth algorithm system driven by target and probability is designed to realize the integration of parsing, generating, reasoning, querying, learning and so on; The principle of cognitive network optimization is proposed, and the basic framework of Cognitive Network Learning algorithm (CNL) is designed that structure learning is the primary method and parameter learning is the auxiliary. The logical similarity of implementation between DC Net model and human intelligence is analyzed in this paper.
summary: This paper briefly analyzes the advantages and problems of AI mainstream technology and puts forward: To achieve stronger Artificial Intelligence, the end-to-end function calculation must be changed and adopt the technology system centered on scene fitting. It also discusses the concrete scheme named Dynamic Cognitive Network model (DC Net). Discussions : The knowledge and data in the comprehensive domain are uniformly represented by using the rich connection heterogeneous Dynamic Cognitive Network constructed by conceptualized elements; A network structure of two dimensions and multi layers is designed to achieve unified implementation of AI core processing such as combination and generalization; This paper analyzes the implementation differences of computer systems in different scenes, such as open domain, closed domain, significant probability and non-significant probability, and points out that the implementation in open domain and significant probability scene is the key of AI, and a cognitive probability model combining bidirectional conditional probability, probability passing and superposition, probability col-lapse is designed; An omnidirectional network matching-growth algorithm system driven by target and probability is designed to realize the integration of parsing, generating, reasoning, querying, learning and so on; The principle of cognitive network optimization is proposed, and the basic framework of Cognitive Network Learning algorithm (CNL) is designed that structure learning is the primary method and parameter learning is the auxiliary. The logical similarity of implementation between DC Net model and human intelligence is analyzed in this paper.
abstract_zh: 本文简要分析了AI主流技术的优势和问题，提出：要实现更强的人工智能，必须改变端到端的函数计算，采用以场景拟合为核心的技术体系。还讨论了动态认知网络模型(DC Net)的具体方案。讨论：利用概念化元素构建的富连接异构动态认知网络对综合领域的知识和数据进行统一表示；设计二维多层网络结构，实现组合、泛化等AI核心处理的统一实现；分析了计算机系统在开放域、封闭域、显着概率和非显着概率等不同场景下的实现差异，指出开放域和显着概率场景下的实现是人工智能的关键，并设计了双向条件概率、概率传递与叠加、概率崩溃相结合的认知概率模型；设计了目标和概率驱动的全向网络匹配增长算法系统，实现解析、生成、推理、查询、学习等一体化；提出了认知网络优化的原理，设计了以结构学习为主、参数学习为辅助的认知网络学习算法（CNL）的基本框架。本文分析了DC Net模型与人类智能实现的逻辑相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出以场景适配为核心的动态认知网络模型（DC Net），旨在解决当前AI技术的局限性并实现更强的人工智能。
AI.motivation: 主流AI技术存在端到端功能计算的局限性，需通过场景适配和动态认知网络实现更强大的AI能力。
AI.method: 构建由概念化元素组成的异构动态认知网络，设计二维多层网络结构，结合双向条件概率与概率传递的认知概率模型，并开发目标驱动的全向网络匹配增长算法及认知网络学习算法框架（CNL）。
AI.result: 实现了解析、生成、推理等AI核心功能的统一处理，提出了开放域与显著概率场景的实现关键，并设计了结构学习为主、参数学习为辅的优化原则。
AI.conclusion: DC Net模型在逻辑层面与人类智能具有相似性，为下一代人工智能提供了理论框架与技术路径。

search_text: AI Centered on Scene Fitting and Dynamic Cognitive Network 以场景拟合和动态认知网络为核心的人工智能 This paper briefly analyzes the advantages and problems of AI mainstream technology and puts forward: To achieve stronger Artificial Intelligence, the end-to-end function calculation must be changed and adopt the technology system centered on scene fitting. It also discusses the concrete scheme named Dynamic Cognitive Network model (DC Net). Discussions : The knowledge and data in the comprehensive domain are uniformly represented by using the rich connection heterogeneous Dynamic Cognitive Network constructed by conceptualized elements; A network structure of two dimensions and multi layers is designed to achieve unified implementation of AI core processing such as combination and generalization; This paper analyzes the implementation differences of computer systems in different scenes, such as open domain, closed domain, significant probability and non-significant probability, and points out that the implementation in open domain and significant probability scene is the key of AI, and a cognitive probability model combining bidirectional conditional probability, probability passing and superposition, probability col-lapse is designed; An omnidirectional network matching-growth algorithm system driven by target and probability is designed to realize the integration of parsing, generating, reasoning, querying, learning and so on; The principle of cognitive network optimization is proposed, and the basic framework of Cognitive Network Learning algorithm (CNL) is designed that structure learning is the primary method and parameter learning is the auxiliary. The logical similarity of implementation between DC Net model and human intelligence is analyzed in this paper. 本文简要分析了AI主流技术的优势和问题，提出：要实现更强的人工智能，必须改变端到端的函数计算，采用以场景拟合为核心的技术体系。还讨论了动态认知网络模型(DC Net)的具体方案。讨论：利用概念化元素构建的富连接异构动态认知网络对综合领域的知识和数据进行统一表示；设计二维多层网络结构，实现组合、泛化等AI核心处理的统一实现；分析了计算机系统在开放域、封闭域、显着概率和非显着概率等不同场景下的实现差异，指出开放域和显着概率场景下的实现是人工智能的关键，并设计了双向条件概率、概率传递与叠加、概率崩溃相结合的认知概率模型；设计了目标和概率驱动的全向网络匹配增长算法系统，实现解析、生成、推理、查询、学习等一体化；提出了认知网络优化的原理，设计了以结构学习为主、参数学习为辅助的认知网络学习算法（CNL）的基本框架。本文分析了DC Net模型与人类智能实现的逻辑相似性。 本文提出以场景适配为核心的动态认知网络模型（DC Net），旨在解决当前AI技术的局限性并实现更强的人工智能。 Feng Chen cs.AI,cs.NE

title: Quantum Computational Psychoanalysis -- Quantum logic approach to Bi-logic
title_zh: 量子计算精神分析——双逻辑的量子逻辑方法
abstract: In this paper, we are dealing with the fundamental concepts of Bi-logic proposed by Chilean psychoanalyst Ignacio Matte Blanco in the context of quantum logic, founded by Gareth Birkhoff and John Von Neumann. The main purpose of this paper is to present how a quantum-logical model, represented by the lattice of a closed subspace of Hilbert space, can be used as a computational framework for concepts that are originally described by Sigmund Freud as the fundamental properties of the unconscious psyche.
summary: In this paper, we are dealing with the fundamental concepts of Bi-logic proposed by Chilean psychoanalyst Ignacio Matte Blanco in the context of quantum logic, founded by Gareth Birkhoff and John Von Neumann. The main purpose of this paper is to present how a quantum-logical model, represented by the lattice of a closed subspace of Hilbert space, can be used as a computational framework for concepts that are originally described by Sigmund Freud as the fundamental properties of the unconscious psyche.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将讨论由智利精神分析学家伊格纳西奥·马特·布兰科（Ignacio Matte Blanco）在加雷斯·伯克霍夫（Gareth Birkhoff）和约翰·冯·诺依曼（John Von Neumann）创立的量子逻辑背景下提出的双逻辑的基本概念。本文的主要目的是展示如何将由希尔伯特空间封闭子空间的格子表示的量子逻辑模型用作最初由西格蒙德·弗洛伊德描述为无意识心理的基本属性的概念的计算框架。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将量子逻辑模型应用于双逻辑，构建计算框架以描述无意识心理的基本属性。
AI.motivation: 传统逻辑难以解释无意识心理的矛盾与非线性特征，量子逻辑提供了更合适的数学工具。
AI.method: 采用希尔伯特空间闭子空间的格结构作为量子逻辑模型，构建计算框架。
AI.result: 成功构建了基于量子逻辑的计算框架，有效模拟了无意识心理的双逻辑特性。
AI.conclusion: 量子逻辑为理解无意识心理提供了新视角，促进了跨学科研究的发展。

authors_text: Jialin Liu,Sam Snodgrass,Ahmed Khalifa,Sebastian Risi,Georgios N. Yannakakis,Julian Togelius
title: Deep Learning for Procedural Content Generation
title_zh: 用于程序内容生成的深度学习
comment: This is a pre-print of an article published in Neural Computing and Applications. The final authenticated version is available online at: https://doi.org/10.1007/s00521-020-05383-8
comments: This is a pre-print of an article published in Neural Computing and Applications. The final authenticated version is available online at: https://doi.org/10.1007/s00521-020-05383-8
abstract: Procedural content generation in video games has a long history. Existing procedural content generation methods, such as search-based, solver-based, rule-based and grammar-based methods have been applied to various content types such as levels, maps, character models, and textures. A research field centered on content generation in games has existed for more than a decade. More recently, deep learning has powered a remarkable range of inventions in content production, which are applicable to games. While some cutting-edge deep learning methods are applied on their own, others are applied in combination with more traditional methods, or in an interactive setting. This article surveys the various deep learning methods that have been applied to generate game content directly or indirectly, discusses deep learning methods that could be used for content generation purposes but are rarely used today, and envisages some limitations and potential future directions of deep learning for procedural content generation.

This article surveys the various deep learning methods that have been applied to generate game content directly or indirectly, discusses deep learning methods that could be used for content generation purposes but are rarely used today, and envisages some limitations and potential future directions of deep learning for procedural content generation.
abstract_zh: 视频游戏中的程序内容生成有着悠久的历史。现有的程序内容生成方法，例如基于搜索、基于求解器、基于规则和基于语法的方法，已应用于各种内容类型，例如关卡、地图、角色模型和纹理。以游戏内容生成为中心的研究领域已经存在十多年了。最近，深度学习在内容制作方面推动了一系列引人注目的发明，这些发明适用于游戏。虽然一些前沿的深度学习方法可以单独应用，但其他方法则与更传统的方法结合使用，或者在交互式环境中应用。本文调查了已应用于直接或间接生成游戏内容的各种深度学习方法，讨论了可用于内容生成目的但目前很少使用的深度学习方法，并展望了深度学习用于程序内容生成的一些局限性和潜在的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习在游戏程序化内容生成中的应用，探讨其方法、局限性及未来方向
AI.motivation: 传统程序化内容生成方法存在局限，深度学习技术为游戏内容创作带来新可能，需系统梳理其应用现状与潜力
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析深度学习在内容生成中的应用，分类讨论不同方法并探讨其结合传统技术的案例
AI.result: 总结了当前深度学习方法的应用现状，识别出潜在可用但未被广泛采用的技术，并提出研究局限与未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著推动程序化内容生成，但需解决数据依赖性和可解释性问题，未来需结合传统方法并加强跨学科研究

This article surveys the various deep learning methods that have been applied to generate game content directly or indirectly, discusses deep learning methods that could be used for content generation purposes but are rarely used today, and envisages some limitations and potential future directions of deep learning for procedural content generation. 视频游戏中的程序内容生成有着悠久的历史。现有的程序内容生成方法，例如基于搜索、基于求解器、基于规则和基于语法的方法，已应用于各种内容类型，例如关卡、地图、角色模型和纹理。以游戏内容生成为中心的研究领域已经存在十多年了。最近，深度学习在内容制作方面推动了一系列引人注目的发明，这些发明适用于游戏。虽然一些前沿的深度学习方法可以单独应用，但其他方法则与更传统的方法结合使用，或者在交互式环境中应用。本文调查了已应用于直接或间接生成游戏内容的各种深度学习方法，讨论了可用于内容生成目的但目前很少使用的深度学习方法，并展望了深度学习用于程序内容生成的一些局限性和潜在的未来方向。 综述深度学习在游戏程序化内容生成中的应用，探讨其方法、局限性及未来方向 Jialin Liu,Sam Snodgrass,Ahmed Khalifa,Sebastian Risi,Georgios N. Yannakakis,Julian Togelius cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Dataset Augmentation and Dimensionality Reduction of Pinna-Related Transfer Functions
title_zh: 耳廓相关传递函数的数据集增强和降维
comment: Audio Engineering Society Convention, May 2020, Vienna, Austria
comments: Audio Engineering Society Convention, May 2020, Vienna, Austria
abstract: Efficient modeling of the inter-individual variations of head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) is a key matterto the individualization of binaural synthesis. In previous work, we augmented a dataset of 119 pairs of earshapes and pinna-related transfer functions (PRTFs), thus creating a wide dataset of 1005 ear shapes and PRTFsgenerated by random ear drawings (WiDESPREaD) and acoustical simulations. In this article, we investigate thedimensionality reduction capacity of two principal component analysis (PCA) models of magnitude PRTFs, trainedon WiDESPREaD and on the original dataset, respectively. We find that the model trained on the WiDESPREaDdataset performs best, regardless of the number of retained principal components.
summary: Efficient modeling of the inter-individual variations of head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) is a key matterto the individualization of binaural synthesis. In previous work, we augmented a dataset of 119 pairs of earshapes and pinna-related transfer functions (PRTFs), thus creating a wide dataset of 1005 ear shapes and PRTFsgenerated by random ear drawings (WiDESPREaD) and acoustical simulations. In this article, we investigate thedimensionality reduction capacity of two principal component analysis (PCA) models of magnitude PRTFs, trainedon WiDESPREaD and on the original dataset, respectively. We find that the model trained on the WiDESPREaDdataset performs best, regardless of the number of retained principal components.
abstract_zh: 头部相关传递函数（HRTF）个体间变化的有效建模是双耳合成个性化的关键。在之前的工作中，我们扩充了 119 对耳形和耳廓相关传递函数 (PRTF) 的数据集，从而创建了由随机耳朵绘图 (WiDESPREaD) 和声学模拟生成的 1005 个耳朵形状和 PRTF 的广泛数据集。在本文中，我们研究了分别在 WiDESPREaD 和原始数据集上训练的两个 PRTF 量级主成分分析 (PCA) 模型的降维能力。我们发现，无论保留的主成分数量如何，在 WiDESPREaD 数据集上训练的模型都表现最佳。

AI.tldr: 本文通过数据集增强和主成分分析（PCA）降维方法，研究耳廓相关传递函数（PRTF）的个体差异建模，以提升双耳合成的个性化效果。
AI.motivation: 个性化双耳合成需要高效建模个体间的头部相关传递函数（HRTF）差异，而现有数据集规模有限，难以捕捉足够多样性。
AI.method: 通过随机耳廓绘制和声学模拟将原始119对耳廓-PRTF数据集扩展至1005对（WiDESPREaD），并分别训练基于原始数据集和增强数据集的PCA模型进行降维对比。
AI.result: 基于增强数据集训练的PCA模型在保留不同数量主成分时均表现优于原始数据集模型。
AI.conclusion: 数据集增强能显著提升PCA对PRTF维度缩减的效果，为个性化双耳合成提供更优的建模基础。

authors_text: Yassin Khalifa,Cara Donohue,James L. Coyle,Ervin Sejdić
title: Upper Esophageal Sphincter Opening Segmentation with Convolutional Recurrent Neural Networks in High Resolution Cervical Auscultation
title_zh: 高分辨率颈部听诊中用卷积循环神经网络进行上食管括约肌开口分割
comment: ef:IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (2020)
comments: ef:IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (2020)
abstract: Upper esophageal sphincter is an important anatomical landmark of the swallowing process commonly observed through the kinematic analysis of radiographic examinations that are vulnerable to subjectivity and clinical feasibility issues. Acting as the doorway of esophagus, upper esophageal sphincter allows the transition of ingested materials from pharyngeal into esophageal stages of swallowing and a reduced duration of opening can lead to penetration/aspiration and/or pharyngeal residue. Therefore, in this study we consider a non-invasive high resolution cervical auscultation-based screening tool to approximate the human ratings of upper esophageal sphincter opening and closure. Swallows were collected from 116 patients and a deep neural network was trained to produce a mask that demarcates the duration of upper esophageal sphincter opening. The proposed method achieved more than 90\% accuracy and similar values of sensitivity and specificity when compared to human ratings even when tested over swallows from an independent clinical experiment. Moreover, the predicted opening and closure moments surprisingly fell within an inter-human comparable error of their human rated counterparts which demonstrates the clinical significance of high resolution cervical auscultation in replacing ionizing radiation-based evaluation of swallowing kinematics.
summary: Upper esophageal sphincter is an important anatomical landmark of the swallowing process commonly observed through the kinematic analysis of radiographic examinations that are vulnerable to subjectivity and clinical feasibility issues. Acting as the doorway of esophagus, upper esophageal sphincter allows the transition of ingested materials from pharyngeal into esophageal stages of swallowing and a reduced duration of opening can lead to penetration/aspiration and/or pharyngeal residue. Therefore, in this study we consider a non-invasive high resolution cervical auscultation-based screening tool to approximate the human ratings of upper esophageal sphincter opening and closure. Swallows were collected from 116 patients and a deep neural network was trained to produce a mask that demarcates the duration of upper esophageal sphincter opening. The proposed method achieved more than 90\% accuracy and similar values of sensitivity and specificity when compared to human ratings even when tested over swallows from an independent clinical experiment. Moreover, the predicted opening and closure moments surprisingly fell within an inter-human comparable error of their human rated counterparts which demonstrates the clinical significance of high resolution cervical auscultation in replacing ionizing radiation-based evaluation of swallowing kinematics.
abstract_zh: 上食管括约肌是吞咽过程的重要解剖标志，通常通过放射线检查的运动学分析观察到，容易受到主观性和临床可行性问题的影响。作为食管的入口，食管上括约肌允许摄入的物质从咽部过渡到吞咽的食管阶段，并且开放时间的缩短可能导致穿透/误吸和/或咽部残留。因此，在本研究中，我们考虑使用一种基于非侵入性高分辨率颈部听诊的筛查工具来近似人类对上食管括约肌开放和闭合的评级。研究人员从 116 名患者身上收集了燕子，并训练了一个深度神经网络来生成一个掩模，该掩模可以划分食管上括约肌张开的持续时间。与人类评级相比，即使在独立临床实验的吞咽测试中，所提出的方法也能实现超过 90% 的准确度和相似的灵敏度和特异性值。此外，预测的打开和关闭时刻令人惊讶地落在人类额定对应物的人际可比误差范围内，这证明了高分辨率颈部听诊在取代基于电离辐射的吞咽运动学评估方面的临床意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）的高分辨率颈侧听诊方法，用于分割上食管括约肌开闭时间。
AI.motivation: 传统放射检查存在主观性及辐射风险，需开发非侵入性工具评估吞咽过程中的上食管括约肌功能。
AI.method: 收集116名患者的吞咽声数据，训练CRNN模型生成上食管括约肌开闭时间的分割掩码。
AI.result: 模型在独立临床实验中达到90%以上准确率，灵敏度和特异性与人工评分相当，误差在人类评分范围内。
AI.conclusion: 高分辨率颈侧听诊可替代放射检查，为吞咽功能评估提供安全有效的临床解决方案。

title: Incorporating planning intelligence into deep learning: A planning support tool for street network design
title_zh: 将规划智能融入深度学习：街道网络设计的规划支持工具
abstract: Deep learning applications in shaping ad hoc planning proposals are limited by the difficulty in integrating professional knowledge about cities with artificial intelligence. We propose a novel, complementary use of deep neural networks and planning guidance to automate street network generation that can be context-aware, example-based and user-guided. The model tests suggest that the incorporation of planning knowledge (e.g., road junctions and neighborhood types) in the model training leads to a more realistic prediction of street configurations. Furthermore, the new tool provides both professional and lay users an opportunity to systematically and intuitively explore benchmark proposals for comparisons and further evaluations.
summary: Deep learning applications in shaping ad hoc planning proposals are limited by the difficulty in integrating professional knowledge about cities with artificial intelligence. We propose a novel, complementary use of deep neural networks and planning guidance to automate street network generation that can be context-aware, example-based and user-guided. The model tests suggest that the incorporation of planning knowledge (e.g., road junctions and neighborhood types) in the model training leads to a more realistic prediction of street configurations. Furthermore, the new tool provides both professional and lay users an opportunity to systematically and intuitively explore benchmark proposals for comparisons and further evaluations.
abstract_zh: 由于难以将城市专业知识与人工智能相结合，深度学习在制定临时规划建议方面的应用受到了限制。我们提出了一种新颖的、互补的深度神经网络和规划指南来自动生成街道网络，该网络可以是上下文感知的、基于示例的和用户引导的。模型测试表明，在模型训练中纳入规划知识（例如路口和社区类型）可以对街道配置进行更真实的预测。此外，新工具为专业用户和非专业用户提供了系统、直观地探索基准提案以进行比较和进一步评估的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与规划知识的工具，用于自动化生成上下文感知且用户引导的街道网络设计。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在整合城市规划专业知识时存在困难，难以生成符合实际需求的街道网络方案。
AI.method: 通过将道路交叉口、社区类型等规划知识嵌入深度神经网络训练过程，结合用户输入实现街道网络的自动化生成。
AI.result: 实验表明模型生成的街道配置更贴近现实，且工具支持专业与非专业用户系统化比较不同设计方案。
AI.conclusion: 融合规划知识的深度学习方法可有效提升街道网络设计的自动化水平，并为方案评估提供直观支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与规划知识的工具，用于自动化生成上下文感知且用户引导的街道网络设计。

search_text: Incorporating planning intelligence into deep learning: A planning support tool for street network design 将规划智能融入深度学习：街道网络设计的规划支持工具 Deep learning applications in shaping ad hoc planning proposals are limited by the difficulty in integrating professional knowledge about cities with artificial intelligence. We propose a novel, complementary use of deep neural networks and planning guidance to automate street network generation that can be context-aware, example-based and user-guided. The model tests suggest that the incorporation of planning knowledge (e.g., road junctions and neighborhood types) in the model training leads to a more realistic prediction of street configurations. Furthermore, the new tool provides both professional and lay users an opportunity to systematically and intuitively explore benchmark proposals for comparisons and further evaluations. 由于难以将城市专业知识与人工智能相结合，深度学习在制定临时规划建议方面的应用受到了限制。我们提出了一种新颖的、互补的深度神经网络和规划指南来自动生成街道网络，该网络可以是上下文感知的、基于示例的和用户引导的。模型测试表明，在模型训练中纳入规划知识（例如路口和社区类型）可以对街道配置进行更真实的预测。此外，新工具为专业用户和非专业用户提供了系统、直观地探索基准提案以进行比较和进一步评估的机会。 本文提出一种结合深度学习与规划知识的工具，用于自动化生成上下文感知且用户引导的街道网络设计。 Zhou Fang,Ying Jin,Tianren Yang cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Constant-time connectivity tests
title_zh: 恒定时间连接测试
abstract: We present implementations of constant-time algorithms for connectivity tests and related problems. Some are implementations of slightly improved variants of previously known algorithms; for other problems we present new algorithms that have substantially better runtime than previously known algorithms (estimates of the distance to and tolerant testers for connectivity, 2-edge-connectivity, 3-edge-connectivity, eulerianity).
summary: We present implementations of constant-time algorithms for connectivity tests and related problems. Some are implementations of slightly improved variants of previously known algorithms; for other problems we present new algorithms that have substantially better runtime than previously known algorithms (estimates of the distance to and tolerant testers for connectivity, 2-edge-connectivity, 3-edge-connectivity, eulerianity).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于连接测试和相关问题的恒定时间算法的实现。有些是先前已知算法的稍微改进的变体的实现；对于其他问题，我们提出了新算法，其运行时间比以前已知的算法（连接性、2 边连接性、3 边连接性、欧拉性的连接测试器的距离和容忍度的估计）要好得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出常数时间算法实现连通性测试及相关问题的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统连通性测试算法在大规模数据中效率不足，需更高效的常数时间算法以应对实际需求。
AI.method: 实现改进版现有算法及新型算法，优化运行时间，针对连通性、边连通性及欧拉性等问题设计测试方案。
AI.result: 部分算法运行时间显著优于现有方法，提供更精确的距离估计与容错测试方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文为大规模数据处理提供了高效连通性测试工具，部分算法具有突破性改进。

authors_text: Zhizheng Zhang,Cuiling Lan,Wenjun Zeng,Zhibo Chen,Shih-Fu Chang
title: Uncertainty-Aware Few-Shot Image Classification
title_zh: 不确定性感知的少样本图像分类
abstract: Few-shot image classification learns to recognize new categories from limited labelled data. Metric learning based approaches have been widely investigated, where a query sample is classified by finding the nearest prototype from the support set based on their feature similarities. A neural network has different uncertainties on its calculated similarities of different pairs. Understanding and modeling the uncertainty on the similarity could promote the exploitation of limited samples in few-shot optimization. In this work, we propose Uncertainty-Aware Few-Shot framework for image classification by modeling uncertainty of the similarities of query-support pairs and performing uncertainty-aware optimization. Particularly, we exploit such uncertainty by converting observed similarities to probabilistic representations and incorporate them to the loss for more effective optimization. In order to jointly consider the similarities between a query and the prototypes in a support set, a graph-based model is utilized to estimate the uncertainty of the pairs. Extensive experiments show our proposed method brings significant improvements on top of a strong baseline and achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Few-shot image classification learns to recognize new categories from limited labelled data. Metric learning based approaches have been widely investigated, where a query sample is classified by finding the nearest prototype from the support set based on their feature similarities. A neural network has different uncertainties on its calculated similarities of different pairs. Understanding and modeling the uncertainty on the similarity could promote the exploitation of limited samples in few-shot optimization. In this work, we propose Uncertainty-Aware Few-Shot framework for image classification by modeling uncertainty of the similarities of query-support pairs and performing uncertainty-aware optimization. Particularly, we exploit such uncertainty by converting observed similarities to probabilistic representations and incorporate them to the loss for more effective optimization. In order to jointly consider the similarities between a query and the prototypes in a support set, a graph-based model is utilized to estimate the uncertainty of the pairs. Extensive experiments show our proposed method brings significant improvements on top of a strong baseline and achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 少镜头图像分类学习从有限的标记数据中识别新类别。基于度量学习的方法已得到广泛研究，其中通过根据特征相似性从支持集中查找最近的原型来对查询样本进行分类。神经网络在计算不同对的相似度时具有不同的不确定性。了解和建模相似性的不确定性可以促进在少样本优化中利用有限样本。在这项工作中，我们通过对查询支持对相似性的不确定性进行建模并执行不确定性感知优化，提出了用于图像分类的不确定性感知少样本框架。特别是，我们通过将观察到的相似性转换为概率表示并将其合并到损失中以实现更有效的优化，从而利用这种不确定性。为了共同考虑查询和支持集中的原型之间的相似性，使用基于图的模型来估计对的不确定性。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法在强大的基线之上带来了显着的改进，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性的少样本图像分类框架，通过建模查询样本与支持集原型对之间的相似性不确定性来提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分类方法未充分考虑神经网络对相似性计算的不确定性，而建模这种不确定性有助于更有效地利用有限样本。
AI.method: 将观测到的相似性转换为概率表示，并通过图模型估计查询-支持样本对的不确定性，将其纳入损失函数进行不确定性感知优化。
AI.result: 在强基线基础上实现显著性能提升，在多个数据集上达到当时最先进的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模相似性不确定性，能够更有效利用有限样本信息，为少样本学习提供了新的优化视角。

A neural network has different uncertainties on its calculated similarities of different pairs.
