title: Multi-Objective Optimisation of Multi-Output Neural Trees
title_zh: 多输出神经树的多目标优化
abstract: We propose an algorithm and a new method to tackle the classification problems. We propose a multi-output neural tree (MONT) algorithm, which is an evolutionary learning algorithm trained by the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm (NSGA)-III. Since evolutionary learning is stochastic, a hypothesis found in the form of MONT is unique for each run of evolutionary learning, i.e., each hypothesis (tree) generated bears distinct properties compared to any other hypothesis both in topological space and parameter-space. This leads to a challenging optimisation problem where the aim is to minimise the tree-size and maximise the classification accuracy. Therefore, the Pareto-optimality concerns were met by hypervolume indicator analysis. We used nine benchmark classification learning problems to evaluate the performance of the MONT. As a result of our experiments, we obtained MONTs which are able to tackle the classification problems with high accuracy. The performance of MONT emerged better over a set of problems tackled in this study compared with a set of well-known classifiers: multilayer perceptron, reduced-error pruning tree, naive Bayes classifier, decision tree, and support vector machine. Moreover, the performances of three versions of MONT's training using genetic programming, NSGA-II, and NSGA-III suggest that the NSGA-III gives the best Pareto-optimal solution.
summary: We propose an algorithm and a new method to tackle the classification problems. We propose a multi-output neural tree (MONT) algorithm, which is an evolutionary learning algorithm trained by the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm (NSGA)-III. Since evolutionary learning is stochastic, a hypothesis found in the form of MONT is unique for each run of evolutionary learning, i.e., each hypothesis (tree) generated bears distinct properties compared to any other hypothesis both in topological space and parameter-space. This leads to a challenging optimisation problem where the aim is to minimise the tree-size and maximise the classification accuracy. Therefore, the Pareto-optimality concerns were met by hypervolume indicator analysis. We used nine benchmark classification learning problems to evaluate the performance of the MONT. As a result of our experiments, we obtained MONTs which are able to tackle the classification problems with high accuracy. The performance of MONT emerged better over a set of problems tackled in this study compared with a set of well-known classifiers: multilayer perceptron, reduced-error pruning tree, naive Bayes classifier, decision tree, and support vector machine. Moreover, the performances of three versions of MONT's training using genetic programming, NSGA-II, and NSGA-III suggest that the NSGA-III gives the best Pareto-optimal solution.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法和一种新方法来解决分类问题。我们提出了一种多输出神经树（MONT）算法，它是一种由非支配排序遗传算法（NSGA）-III训练的进化学习算法。由于进化学习是随机的，因此以 MONT 形式发现的假设对于每次运行的进化学习都是唯一的，即，与拓扑空间和参数空间中的任何其他假设相比，生成的每个假设（树）都具有不同的属性。这导致了一个具有挑战性的优化问题，其目标是最小化树大小并最大化分类精度。因此，超交易量指标分析满足了帕累托最优性的担忧。我们使用九个基准分类学习问题来评估 MONT 的性能。我们的实验结果是，我们获得了能够高精度解决分类问题的 MONT。与一组著名的分类器相比，MONT 在本研究中解决的一系列问题上表现得更好：多层感知器、减少误差剪枝树、朴素贝叶斯分类器、决策树和支持向量机。此外，使用遗传编程的 MONT 训练的三个版本 NSGA-II 和 NSGA-III 的性能表明 NSGA-III 给出了最佳的帕累托最优解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非支配排序遗传算法NSGA-III的多输出神经树（MONT）算法，用于解决分类问题的多目标优化。
AI.motivation: 传统分类器在处理复杂问题时存在局限性，而进化学习的随机性导致每次生成的假设（树）在结构和参数上均不同，需通过多目标优化平衡树大小与分类准确率。
AI.method: 设计MONT算法，结合NSGA-III进行多目标进化学习，通过超体积指标分析帕累托最优解，并在九个基准分类问题上验证性能。
AI.result: MONT在多个问题上优于MLP、决策树等经典分类器，且NSGA-III训练的MONT版本在帕累托最优解上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: MONT算法能有效解决分类问题，NSGA-III在多目标优化中优于其他进化算法。

ai_content_json.result: MONT在多个问题上优于MLP、决策树等经典分类器，且NSGA-III训练的MONT版本在帕累托最优解上表现最佳。
ai_content_json.conclusion: MONT算法能有效解决分类问题，NSGA-III在多目标优化中优于其他进化算法。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于非支配排序遗传算法NSGA-III的多输出神经树（MONT）算法，用于解决分类问题的多目标优化。
motivation: 传统分类器在处理复杂问题时存在局限性，而进化学习的随机性导致每次生成的假设（树）在结构和参数上均不同，需通过多目标优化平衡树大小与分类准确率。
method: 设计MONT算法，结合NSGA-III进行多目标进化学习，通过超体积指标分析帕累托最优解，并在九个基准分类问题上验证性能。
result: MONT在多个问题上优于MLP、决策树等经典分类器，且NSGA-III训练的MONT版本在帕累托最优解上表现最佳。

search_text: Multi-Objective Optimisation of Multi-Output Neural Trees 多输出神经树的多目标优化 We propose an algorithm and a new method to tackle the classification problems. We propose a multi-output neural tree (MONT) algorithm, which is an evolutionary learning algorithm trained by the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm (NSGA)-III. Since evolutionary learning is stochastic, a hypothesis found in the form of MONT is unique for each run of evolutionary learning, i.e., each hypothesis (tree) generated bears distinct properties compared to any other hypothesis both in topological space and parameter-space. This leads to a challenging optimisation problem where the aim is to minimise the tree-size and maximise the classification accuracy. Therefore, the Pareto-optimality concerns were met by hypervolume indicator analysis. We used nine benchmark classification learning problems to evaluate the performance of the MONT. As a result of our experiments, we obtained MONTs which are able to tackle the classification problems with high accuracy. The performance of MONT emerged better over a set of problems tackled in this study compared with a set of well-known classifiers: multilayer perceptron, reduced-error pruning tree, naive Bayes classifier, decision tree, and support vector machine. Moreover, the performances of three versions of MONT's training using genetic programming, NSGA-II, and NSGA-III suggest that the NSGA-III gives the best Pareto-optimal solution. 我们提出了一种算法和一种新方法来解决分类问题。我们提出了一种多输出神经树（MONT）算法，它是一种由非支配排序遗传算法（NSGA）-III训练的进化学习算法。由于进化学习是随机的，因此以 MONT 形式发现的假设对于每次运行的进化学习都是唯一的，即，与拓扑空间和参数空间中的任何其他假设相比，生成的每个假设（树）都具有不同的属性。这导致了一个具有挑战性的优化问题，其目标是最小化树大小并最大化分类精度。因此，超交易量指标分析满足了帕累托最优性的担忧。我们使用九个基准分类学习问题来评估 MONT 的性能。我们的实验结果是，我们获得了能够高精度解决分类问题的 MONT。与一组著名的分类器相比，MONT 在本研究中解决的一系列问题上表现得更好：多层感知器、减少误差剪枝树、朴素贝叶斯分类器、决策树和支持向量机。此外，使用遗传编程的 MONT 训练的三个版本 NSGA-II 和 NSGA-III 的性能表明 NSGA-III 给出了最佳的帕累托最优解。 本文提出一种基于非支配排序遗传算法NSGA-III的多输出神经树（MONT）算法，用于解决分类问题的多目标优化。 Varun Ojha,Giuseppe Nicosia cs.NE

title: Real Time Face Recognition Using Convoluted Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行实时人脸识别
comment: ef:International Journal of Sciences and Technology (2019) volume - 7
comments: ef:International Journal of Sciences and Technology (2019) volume - 7
abstract: Face Recognition is one of the process of identifying people using their face, it has various applications like authentication systems, surveillance systems and law enforcement. Convolutional Neural Networks are proved to be best for facial recognition. Detecting faces using core-ml api and processing the extracted face through a coreML model, which is trained to recognize specific persons. The creation of dataset is done by converting face videos of the persons to be recognized into Hundreds of images of person, which is further used for training and validation of the model to provide accurate real-time results.
summary: Face Recognition is one of the process of identifying people using their face, it has various applications like authentication systems, surveillance systems and law enforcement. Convolutional Neural Networks are proved to be best for facial recognition. Detecting faces using core-ml api and processing the extracted face through a coreML model, which is trained to recognize specific persons. The creation of dataset is done by converting face videos of the persons to be recognized into Hundreds of images of person, which is further used for training and validation of the model to provide accurate real-time results.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别是利用人脸识别人的过程之一，它具有多种应用，例如身份验证系统、监控系统和执法系统。卷积神经网络被证明最适合面部识别。使用 core-ml api 检测人脸，并通过 coreML 模型处理提取的人脸，该模型经过训练可以识别特定的人。数据集的创建是通过将待识别人员的面部视频转换为数百张人员图像来完成的，该数据集进一步用于模型的训练和验证，以提供准确的实时结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的实时人脸识别方法，通过CoreML模型实现人脸检测与识别。
AI.motivation: 人脸识别在安防、身份验证等领域需求迫切，而卷积神经网络在图像识别任务中表现优异，需结合实时处理框架提升应用效率。
AI.method: 使用CoreML API进行人脸检测，将目标人物视频转换为静态图像构建数据集，训练CoreML模型并部署实现实时识别。
AI.result: 模型通过训练和验证可提供准确的实时人脸识别结果，满足实际应用场景需求。
AI.conclusion: 基于卷积神经网络与CoreML框架的方案有效实现了高精度实时人脸识别，验证了深度学习在实际系统中的可行性。

title: Be Your Own Best Competitor! Multi-Branched Adversarial Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 成为自己最好的竞争对手！多分支对抗性知识转移
abstract: Deep neural network architectures have attained remarkable improvements in scene understanding tasks. Utilizing an efficient model is one of the most important constraints for limited-resource devices. Recently, several compression methods have been proposed to diminish the heavy computational burden and memory consumption. Among them, the pruning and quantizing methods exhibit a critical drop in performances by compressing the model parameters. While the knowledge distillation methods improve the performance of compact models by focusing on training lightweight networks with the supervision of cumbersome networks. In the proposed method, the knowledge distillation has been performed within the network by constructing multiple branches over the primary stream of the model, known as the self-distillation method. Therefore, the ensemble of sub-neural network models has been proposed to transfer the knowledge among themselves with the knowledge distillation policies as well as an adversarial learning strategy. Hence, The proposed ensemble of sub-models is trained against a discriminator model adversarially. Besides, their knowledge is transferred within the ensemble by four different loss functions. The proposed method has been devoted to both lightweight image classification and encoder-decoder architectures to boost the performance of small and compact models without incurring extra computational overhead at the inference process. Extensive experimental results on the main challenging datasets show that the proposed network outperforms the primary model in terms of accuracy at the same number of parameters and computational cost. The obtained results show that the proposed model has achieved significant improvement over earlier ideas of self-distillation methods. The effectiveness of the proposed models has also been illustrated in the encoder-decoder model.

Utilizing an efficient model is one of the most important constraints for limited-resource devices. Recently, several compression methods have been proposed to diminish the heavy computational burden and memory consumption. In the proposed method, the knowledge distillation has been performed within the network by constructing multiple branches over the primary stream of the model, known as the self-distillation method. Therefore, the ensemble of sub-neural network models has been proposed to transfer the knowledge among themselves with the knowledge distillation policies as well as an adversarial learning strategy. Hence, The proposed ensemble of sub-models is trained against a discriminator model adversarially. Besides, their knowledge is transferred within the ensemble by four different loss functions. The proposed method has been devoted to both lightweight image classification and encoder-decoder architectures to boost the performance of small and compact models without incurring extra computational overhead at the inference process. Extensive experimental results on the main challenging datasets show that the proposed network outperforms the primary model in terms of accuracy at the same number of parameters and computational cost. The obtained results show that the proposed model has achieved significant improvement over earlier ideas of self-distillation methods. The effectiveness of the proposed models has also been illustrated in the encoder-decoder model.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络架构在场景理解任务中取得了显着的进步。使用高效的模型是有限资源设备最重要的限制之一。最近，已经提出了几种压缩方法来减少繁重的计算负担和内存消耗。其中，剪枝和量化方法通过压缩模型参数而表现出严重的性能下降。而知识蒸馏方法通过在繁琐网络的监督下专注于训练轻量级网络来提高紧凑模型的性能。在所提出的方法中，通过在模型的主流上构建多个分支，在网络内进行知识蒸馏，称为自蒸馏方法。因此，提出了子神经网络模型的集合，通过知识蒸馏策略和对抗性学习策略在它们之间传递知识。因此，所提出的子模型集合是针对判别器模型进行对抗性训练的。此外，他们的知识通过四种不同的损失函数在集成中转移。所提出的方法致力于轻量级图像分类和编码器-解码器架构，以提高小型紧凑模型的性能，而不会在推理过程中产生额外的计算开销。对主要具有挑战性的数据集的大量实验结果表明，在相同数量的参数和计算成本下，所提出的网络在准确性方面优于主要模型。获得的结果表明，所提出的模型比早期的自蒸馏方法思想取得了显着的改进。所提出模型的有效性也在编码器-解码器模型中得到了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多分支对抗知识迁移方法，通过自蒸馏和对抗学习提升轻量级模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型压缩方法（如剪枝、量化）会导致性能显著下降，而知识蒸馏虽能提升轻量模型效果，但传统方法存在计算开销大、难以保持精度的问题。
AI.method: 构建多分支网络结构，通过自蒸馏在子网络间传递知识，并引入对抗学习策略，结合四种损失函数实现子模型间知识迁移与优化。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上，该方法在相同参数量和计算成本下优于基线模型，且在编码器-解码器架构中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多分支对抗知识迁移方法能在不增加推理计算量的前提下，显著提升轻量模型性能，优于现有自蒸馏方案。

authors_text: Mohammad Hasan Yeganegi,Majid Khadiv,Andrea Del Prete,S. Ali A. Moosavian,Ludovic Righetti
title: Robust walking based on MPC with viability guarantees
title_zh: 基于 MPC 的稳健行走并具有可行性保证
abstract: Model predictive control (MPC) has shown great success for controlling complex systems such as legged robots. However, when closing the loop, the performance and feasibility of the finite horizon optimal control problem (OCP) solved at each control cycle is not guaranteed anymore. This is due to model discrepancies, the effect of low-level controllers, uncertainties and sensor noise. To address these issues, we propose a modified version of a standard MPC approach used in legged locomotion with viability (weak forward invariance) guarantees. In this approach, instead of adding a (conservative) terminal constraint to the problem, we propose to use the measured state projected to the viability kernel in the OCP solved at each control cycle. Moreover, we use past experimental data to find the best cost weights, which measure a combination of performance, constraint satisfaction robustness, or stability (invariance). These interpretable costs measure the trade off between robustness and performance. For this purpose, we use Bayesian optimization (BO) to systematically design experiments that help efficiently collect data to learn a cost function leading to robust performance. Our simulation results with different realistic disturbances (i.e. external pushes, unmodeled actuator dynamics and computational delay) show the effectiveness of our approach to create robust controllers for humanoid robots.
summary: Model predictive control (MPC) has shown great success for controlling complex systems such as legged robots. However, when closing the loop, the performance and feasibility of the finite horizon optimal control problem (OCP) solved at each control cycle is not guaranteed anymore. This is due to model discrepancies, the effect of low-level controllers, uncertainties and sensor noise. To address these issues, we propose a modified version of a standard MPC approach used in legged locomotion with viability (weak forward invariance) guarantees. In this approach, instead of adding a (conservative) terminal constraint to the problem, we propose to use the measured state projected to the viability kernel in the OCP solved at each control cycle. Moreover, we use past experimental data to find the best cost weights, which measure a combination of performance, constraint satisfaction robustness, or stability (invariance). These interpretable costs measure the trade off between robustness and performance. For this purpose, we use Bayesian optimization (BO) to systematically design experiments that help efficiently collect data to learn a cost function leading to robust performance. Our simulation results with different realistic disturbances (i.e. external pushes, unmodeled actuator dynamics and computational delay) show the effectiveness of our approach to create robust controllers for humanoid robots.
abstract_zh: 模型预测控制 (MPC) 在控制复杂系统（例如腿式机器人）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，当闭环时，在每个控制周期求解的有限视野最优控制问题（OCP）的性能和可行性不再得到保证。这是由于模型差异、低级控制器的影响、不确定性和传感器噪声造成的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于腿式运动的标准 MPC 方法的修改版本，并具有可行性（弱前向不变性）保证。在这种方法中，我们建议使用投影到每个控制周期求解的 OCP 中的可行性内核的测量状态，而不是向问题添加（保守的）终端约束。此外，我们使用过去的实验数据来找到最佳成本权重，该权重衡量性能、约束满足鲁棒性或稳定性（不变性）的组合。这些可解释的成本衡量稳健性和性能之间的权衡。为此，我们使用贝叶斯优化（BO）系统地设计实验，帮助有效收集数据以学习导致稳健性能的成本函数。我们对不同现实干扰（即外部推动、未建模的执行器动力学和计算延迟）的仿真结果显示了我们为人形机器人创建鲁棒控制器的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的稳健行走方法，通过可行性保证确保双足机器人在复杂环境下的控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MPC在闭环控制中因模型误差、传感器噪声等因素可能导致性能下降或不可行，现有终端约束方法过于保守，需改进以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过将当前状态投影到生存核（viability kernel）替代终端约束，并利用贝叶斯优化（BO）从历史数据中学习最优成本权重，平衡性能与稳定性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在外部干扰、执行器动态不确定性等场景下能有效提升双足机器人的控制鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生存核投影与数据驱动的成本优化，为双足机器人提供了兼具性能与可行性的MPC框架，可推广至其他复杂系统控制。

However, when closing the loop, the performance and feasibility of the finite horizon optimal control problem (OCP) solved at each control cycle is not guaranteed anymore. This is due to model discrepancies, the effect of low-level controllers, uncertainties and sensor noise. In this approach, instead of adding a (conservative) terminal constraint to the problem, we propose to use the measured state projected to the viability kernel in the OCP solved at each control cycle. These interpretable costs measure the trade off between robustness and performance. For this purpose, we use Bayesian optimization (BO) to systematically design experiments that help efficiently collect data to learn a cost function leading to robust performance. title: Controllable Continuous Gaze Redirection
title_zh: 可控连续视线重定向
comment: accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM), 2020
comments: accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM), 2020
abstract: In this work, we present interpGaze, a novel framework for controllable gaze redirection that achieves both precise redirection and continuous interpolation. Given two gaze images with different attributes, our goal is to redirect the eye gaze of one person into any gaze direction depicted in the reference image or to generate continuous intermediate results. To accomplish this, we design a model including three cooperative components: an encoder, a controller and a decoder. The encoder maps images into a well-disentangled and hierarchically-organized latent space. The controller adjusts the magnitudes of latent vectors to the desired strength of corresponding attributes by altering a control vector. The decoder converts the desired representations from the attribute space to the image space. To facilitate covering the full space of gaze directions, we introduce a high-quality gaze image dataset with a large range of directions, which also benefits researchers in related areas. Extensive experimental validation and comparisons to several baseline methods show that the proposed interpGaze outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of image quality and redirection precision.
summary: In this work, we present interpGaze, a novel framework for controllable gaze redirection that achieves both precise redirection and continuous interpolation. Given two gaze images with different attributes, our goal is to redirect the eye gaze of one person into any gaze direction depicted in the reference image or to generate continuous intermediate results. To accomplish this, we design a model including three cooperative components: an encoder, a controller and a decoder. The encoder maps images into a well-disentangled and hierarchically-organized latent space. The controller adjusts the magnitudes of latent vectors to the desired strength of corresponding attributes by altering a control vector. The decoder converts the desired representations from the attribute space to the image space. To facilitate covering the full space of gaze directions, we introduce a high-quality gaze image dataset with a large range of directions, which also benefits researchers in related areas. Extensive experimental validation and comparisons to several baseline methods show that the proposed interpGaze outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of image quality and redirection precision.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 interpGaze，一种用于可控注视重定向的新颖框架，可以实现精确重定向和连续插值。给定两个具有不同属性的注视图像，我们的目标是将一个人的眼睛注视重定向到参考图像中描绘的任何注视方向或生成连续的中间结果。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一个包含三个协作组件的模型：编码器、控制器和解码器。编码器将图像映射到一个良好解缠结且分层组织的潜在空间中。控制器通过改变控制向量将潜在向量的大小调整到相应属性的期望强度。解码器将所需的表示从属性空间转换到图像空间。为了便于覆盖注视方向的整个空间，我们引入了具有大范围方向的高质量注视图像数据集，这也使相关领域的研究人员受益。广泛的实验验证和与几种基线方法的比较表明，所提出的 interpGaze 在图像质量和重定向精度方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出interpGaze框架，实现可控且连续的注视方向重定向，通过编码器、控制器和解码器的协作，将参考图像中的注视方向映射到目标图像中。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时实现精确的注视重定向与连续中间结果生成，且缺乏覆盖广泛注视方向的高质量数据集，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 设计包含编码器、控制器和解码器的三组件模型：编码器将图像映射到解耦的潜在空间，控制器通过调整控制向量改变潜在向量幅度以控制属性强度，解码器将属性空间表示转换为图像空间。同时构建覆盖全方向的高质量注视图像数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明interpGaze在图像质量和重定向精度上优于现有方法，且能生成平滑的连续中间结果，数据集也提升了相关领域研究的基准。
AI.conclusion: interpGaze通过解耦潜在空间与动态控制机制，有效解决了可控连续注视重定向问题，其数据集和方法为后续研究提供了重要支持。

title: Sickle-cell disease diagnosis support selecting the most appropriate machinelearning method: Towards a general and interpretable approach for cellmorphology analysis from microscopy images
title_zh: 镰状细胞病诊断支持选择最合适的机器学习方法：从显微镜图像中进行细胞形态分析的通用且可解释的方法
abstract: In this work we propose an approach to select the classification method and features, based on the state-of-the-art, with best performance for diagnostic support through peripheral blood smear images of red blood cells. In our case we used samples of patients with sickle-cell disease which can be generalized for other study cases. To trust the behavior of the proposed system, we also analyzed the interpretability. We pre-processed and segmented microscopic images, to ensure high feature quality. We applied the methods used in the literature to extract the features from blood cells and the machine learning methods to classify their morphology. Next, we searched for their best parameters from the resulting data in the feature extraction phase. Then, we found the best parameters for every classifier using Randomized and Grid search. For the sake of scientific progress, we published parameters for each classifier, the implemented code library, the confusion matrices with the raw data, and we used the public erythrocytesIDB dataset for validation. We also defined how to select the most important features for classification to decrease the complexity and the training time, and for interpretability purpose in opaque models. Finally, comparing the best performing classification methods with the state-of-the-art, we obtained better results even with interpretable model classifiers.
summary: In this work we propose an approach to select the classification method and features, based on the state-of-the-art, with best performance for diagnostic support through peripheral blood smear images of red blood cells. We also defined how to select the most important features for classification to decrease the complexity and the training time, and for interpretability purpose in opaque models. Finally, comparing the best performing classification methods with the state-of-the-art, we obtained better results even with interpretable model classifiers.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于最先进的方法来选择分类方法和特征的方法，通过红细胞的外周血涂片图像提供最佳的诊断支持性能。在我们的案例中，我们使用了镰状细胞病患者的样本，这些样本可以推广到其他研究案例。为了信任所提出的系统的行为，我们还分析了可解释性。我们对显微图像进行预处理和分割，以确保高特征质量。我们应用文献中使用的方法从血细胞中提取特征，并应用机器学习方法对其形态进行分类。接下来，我们在特征提取阶段从结果数据中搜索它们的最佳参数。然后，我们使用随机和网格搜索找到每个分类器的最佳参数。为了科学进步，我们发布了每个分类器的参数、实现的代码库、原始数据的混淆矩阵，并使用公共红细胞IDB数据集进行验证。我们还定义了如何选择最重要的分类特征，以降低复杂性和训练时间，并实现不透明模型中的可解释性目的。最后，将性能最佳的分类方法与最先进的分类方法进行比较，即使使用可解释的模型分类器，我们也获得了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显微镜图像的红细胞形态分析方法，旨在为镰状细胞病诊断选择最优机器学习模型与特征组合，同时兼顾模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有诊断方法依赖人工分析存在主观性，需开发通用且可解释的自动化诊断工具以提高镰状细胞病检测准确性，并为其他血液疾病研究提供参考。
AI.method: 通过图像预处理与分割提取红细胞形态特征，结合网格搜索与随机搜索优化分类器参数，利用特征选择降低模型复杂度，并基于公开数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在保持模型可解释性的前提下，所提方法在分类性能上超越现有主流算法，且通过公开参数、代码与数据促进研究复现与技术迭代。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为血液疾病自动化诊断提供了兼顾性能与可解释性的解决方案，通过标准化特征选择流程与参数公开，推动了可解释AI在医学影像分析中的应用。

search_text: Sickle-cell disease diagnosis support selecting the most appropriate machinelearning method: Towards a general and interpretable approach for cellmorphology analysis from microscopy images 镰状细胞病诊断支持选择最合适的机器学习方法：从显微镜图像中进行细胞形态分析的通用且可解释的方法 In this work we propose an approach to select the classification method and features, based on the state-of-the-art, with best performance for diagnostic support through peripheral blood smear images of red blood cells. In our case we used samples of patients with sickle-cell disease which can be generalized for other study cases. To trust the behavior of the proposed system, we also analyzed the interpretability. We pre-processed and segmented microscopic images, to ensure high feature quality. We applied the methods used in the literature to extract the features from blood cells and the machine learning methods to classify their morphology. Next, we searched for their best parameters from the resulting data in the feature extraction phase. Then, we found the best parameters for every classifier using Randomized and Grid search. For the sake of scientific progress, we published parameters for each classifier, the implemented code library, the confusion matrices with the raw data, and we used the public erythrocytesIDB dataset for validation. We also defined how to select the most important features for classification to decrease the complexity and the training time, and for interpretability purpose in opaque models. Finally, comparing the best performing classification methods with the state-of-the-art, we obtained better results even with interpretable model classifiers. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于最先进的方法来选择分类方法和特征的方法，通过红细胞的外周血涂片图像提供最佳的诊断支持性能。在我们的案例中，我们使用了镰状细胞病患者的样本，这些样本可以推广到其他研究案例。为了信任所提出的系统的行为，我们还分析了可解释性。我们对显微图像进行预处理和分割，以确保高特征质量。我们应用文献中使用的方法从血细胞中提取特征，并应用机器学习方法对其形态进行分类。接下来，我们在特征提取阶段从结果数据中搜索它们的最佳参数。然后，我们使用随机和网格搜索找到每个分类器的最佳参数。为了科学进步，我们发布了每个分类器的参数、实现的代码库、原始数据的混淆矩阵，并使用公共红细胞IDB数据集进行验证。我们还定义了如何选择最重要的分类特征，以降低复杂性和训练时间，并实现不透明模型中的可解释性目的。最后，将性能最佳的分类方法与最先进的分类方法进行比较，即使使用可解释的模型分类器，我们也获得了更好的结果。 本文提出一种基于显微镜图像的红细胞形态分析方法，旨在为镰状细胞病诊断选择最优机器学习模型与特征组合，同时兼顾模型可解释性。 Nataša Petrović,Gabriel Moyà-Alcover,Antoni Jaume-i-Capó,Manuel González-Hidalgo cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Ye Zheng,Ruoran Huang,Chuanqi Han,Xi Huang,Li Cui
title: Background Learnable Cascade for Zero-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: 用于零样本目标检测的后台可学习级联
abstract: Zero-shot detection (ZSD) is crucial to large-scale object detection with the aim of simultaneously localizing and recognizing unseen objects. There remain several challenges for ZSD, including reducing the ambiguity between background and unseen objects as well as improving the alignment between visual and semantic concept. In this work, we propose a novel framework named Background Learnable Cascade (BLC) to improve ZSD performance. The major contributions for BLC are as follows: (i) we propose a multi-stage cascade structure named Cascade Semantic R-CNN to progressively refine the alignment between visual and semantic of ZSD; (ii) we develop the semantic information flow structure and directly add it between each stage in Cascade Semantic RCNN to further improve the semantic feature learning; (iii) we propose the background learnable region proposal network (BLRPN) to learn an appropriate word vector for background class and use this learned vector in Cascade Semantic R CNN, this design makes \Background Learnable" and reduces the confusion between background and unseen classes. Our extensive experiments show BLC obtains significantly performance improvements for MS-COCO over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Zero-shot detection (ZSD) is crucial to large-scale object detection with the aim of simultaneously localizing and recognizing unseen objects. There remain several challenges for ZSD, including reducing the ambiguity between background and unseen objects as well as improving the alignment between visual and semantic concept. In this work, we propose a novel framework named Background Learnable Cascade (BLC) to improve ZSD performance. The major contributions for BLC are as follows: (i) we propose a multi-stage cascade structure named Cascade Semantic R-CNN to progressively refine the alignment between visual and semantic of ZSD; (ii) we develop the semantic information flow structure and directly add it between each stage in Cascade Semantic RCNN to further improve the semantic feature learning; (iii) we propose the background learnable region proposal network (BLRPN) to learn an appropriate word vector for background class and use this learned vector in Cascade Semantic R CNN, this design makes \Background Learnable" and reduces the confusion between background and unseen classes. Our extensive experiments show BLC obtains significantly performance improvements for MS-COCO over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 零样本检测（ZSD）对于大规模物体检测至关重要，其目的是同时定位和识别看不见的物体。 ZSD 仍然存在一些挑战，包括减少背景和看不见的对象之间的模糊性以及提高视觉和语义概念之间的一致性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为后台可学习级联（BLC）的新颖框架来提高 ZSD 性能。 BLC 的主要贡献如下：（i）我们提出了一种名为 Cascade Semantic R-CNN 的多级级联结构，以逐步细化 ZSD 的视觉和语义之间的对齐； (ii)我们开发了语义信息流结构，并将其直接添加到Cascade Semantic RCNN的每个阶段之间，以进一步改进语义特征学习； (iii) 我们提出了背景可学习区域提议网络（BLRPN）来学习背景类的适当词向量，并在 Cascade Semantic R CNN 中使用这个学习向量，这种设计使得“背景可学习”，并减少了背景类和未见类之间的混淆。我们大量的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，BLC 为 MS-COCO 带来了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出背景可学习级联框架（BLC），旨在提升零样本目标检测（ZSD）性能，通过改进视觉-语义对齐与背景-未见类别的区分。
AI.motivation: 零样本检测面临背景与未见对象的歧义问题及视觉语义对齐不足的挑战，现有方法难以有效解决这些关键问题。
AI.method: 设计多阶段级联结构Cascade Semantic R-CNN逐步优化对齐，引入语义信息流增强特征学习，并提出背景可学习区域建议网络（BLRPN）以生成背景词向量减少混淆。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，BLC显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: BLC通过级联结构与背景学习机制有效解决了ZSD的核心挑战，为零样本检测提供了新思路。

The major contributions for BLC are as follows: (i) we propose a multi-stage cascade structure named Cascade Semantic R-CNN to progressively refine the alignment between visual and semantic of ZSD; (ii) we develop the semantic information flow structure and directly add it between each stage in Cascade Semantic RCNN to further improve the semantic feature learning; (iii) we propose the background learnable region proposal network (BLRPN) to learn an appropriate word vector for background class and use this learned vector in Cascade Semantic R CNN, this design makes \Background Learnable" and reduces the confusion between background and unseen classes. title: Scalable Many-Objective Pathfinding Benchmark Suite
title_zh: 可扩展的多目标寻路基准套件
abstract: Route planning also known as pathfinding is one of the key elements in logistics, mobile robotics and other applications, where engineers face many conflicting objectives. However, most of the current route planning algorithms consider only up to three objectives. In this paper, we propose a scalable many-objective benchmark problem covering most of the important features for routing applications based on real-world data. We define five objective functions representing distance, traveling time, delays caused by accidents, and two route specific features such as curvature and elevation. We analyse several different instances for this test problem and provide their true Pareto-front to analyse the problem difficulties. We apply three well-known evolutionary multi-objective algorithms. Since this test benchmark can be easily transferred to real-world routing problems, we construct a routing problem from OpenStreetMap data. We evaluate the three optimisation algorithms and observe that we are able to provide promising results for such a real-world application. The proposed benchmark represents a scalable many-objective route planning optimisation problem enabling researchers and engineers to evaluate their many-objective approaches.
summary: Route planning also known as pathfinding is one of the key elements in logistics, mobile robotics and other applications, where engineers face many conflicting objectives. However, most of the current route planning algorithms consider only up to three objectives. In this paper, we propose a scalable many-objective benchmark problem covering most of the important features for routing applications based on real-world data. We define five objective functions representing distance, traveling time, delays caused by accidents, and two route specific features such as curvature and elevation. We analyse several different instances for this test problem and provide their true Pareto-front to analyse the problem difficulties. We apply three well-known evolutionary multi-objective algorithms. Since this test benchmark can be easily transferred to real-world routing problems, we construct a routing problem from OpenStreetMap data. We evaluate the three optimisation algorithms and observe that we are able to provide promising results for such a real-world application. The proposed benchmark represents a scalable many-objective route planning optimisation problem enabling researchers and engineers to evaluate their many-objective approaches.
abstract_zh: 路线规划也称为寻路，是物流、移动机器人和其他应用中的关键要素之一，工程师在这些应用中面临许多相互冲突的目标。然而，当前大多数路线规划算法仅考虑最多三个目标。在本文中，我们提出了一个可扩展的多目标基准问题，涵盖了基于真实世界数据的路由应用程序的大多数重要特征。我们定义了五个目标函数，分别代表距离、行驶时间、事故造成的延误以及两个路线特定特征，例如曲率和海拔。我们分析了这个测试问题的几个不同实例，并提供它们真实的帕累托前沿来分析问题的难度。我们应用了三种著名的进化多目标算法。由于这个测试基准可以很容易地转移到现实世界的路由问题，我们从 OpenStreetMap 数据构建一个路由问题。我们评估了三种优化算法，并观察到我们能够为此类实际应用提供有希望的结果。拟议的基准代表了一个可扩展的多目标路线规划优化问题，使研究人员和工程师能够评估他们的多目标方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个可扩展的多目标路径规划基准套件，用于评估多目标优化算法在实际路由问题中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有路径规划算法通常仅考虑最多三个目标，难以应对实际应用中多个冲突目标的需求，需构建更全面的基准测试问题。
AI.method: 定义包含距离、时间、事故延误、曲率和海拔的五目标函数，分析多个实例并提供真实Pareto前沿，应用三种进化算法，并基于OpenStreetMap构建实际路由场景进行评估。
AI.result: 三种多目标优化算法在真实路由问题中展现出有效性和可行性，验证了基准套件的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准套件为研究者提供了可扩展的多目标路径规划测试平台，有助于推动多目标优化算法在实际场景中的应用与发展。

search_text: Scalable Many-Objective Pathfinding Benchmark Suite 可扩展的多目标寻路基准套件 Route planning also known as pathfinding is one of the key elements in logistics, mobile robotics and other applications, where engineers face many conflicting objectives. However, most of the current route planning algorithms consider only up to three objectives. In this paper, we propose a scalable many-objective benchmark problem covering most of the important features for routing applications based on real-world data. We define five objective functions representing distance, traveling time, delays caused by accidents, and two route specific features such as curvature and elevation. We analyse several different instances for this test problem and provide their true Pareto-front to analyse the problem difficulties. We apply three well-known evolutionary multi-objective algorithms. Since this test benchmark can be easily transferred to real-world routing problems, we construct a routing problem from OpenStreetMap data. We evaluate the three optimisation algorithms and observe that we are able to provide promising results for such a real-world application. The proposed benchmark represents a scalable many-objective route planning optimisation problem enabling researchers and engineers to evaluate their many-objective approaches. 路线规划也称为寻路，是物流、移动机器人和其他应用中的关键要素之一，工程师在这些应用中面临许多相互冲突的目标。然而，当前大多数路线规划算法仅考虑最多三个目标。在本文中，我们提出了一个可扩展的多目标基准问题，涵盖了基于真实世界数据的路由应用程序的大多数重要特征。我们定义了五个目标函数，分别代表距离、行驶时间、事故造成的延误以及两个路线特定特征，例如曲率和海拔。我们分析了这个测试问题的几个不同实例，并提供它们真实的帕累托前沿来分析问题的难度。我们应用了三种著名的进化多目标算法。由于这个测试基准可以很容易地转移到现实世界的路由问题，我们从 OpenStreetMap 数据构建一个路由问题。我们评估了三种优化算法，并观察到我们能够为此类实际应用提供有希望的结果。拟议的基准代表了一个可扩展的多目标路线规划优化问题，使研究人员和工程师能够评估他们的多目标方法。 本文提出一个可扩展的多目标路径规划基准套件，用于评估多目标优化算法在实际路由问题中的性能。 Jens Weise,Sanaz Mostaghim cs.NE

authors_text: Seyed Iman Mirzadeh,Mehrdad Farajtabar,Dilan Gorur,Razvan Pascanu,Hassan Ghasemzadeh
title: Linear Mode Connectivity in Multitask and Continual Learning
title_zh: 多任务和持续学习中的线性模式连接
abstract: Continual (sequential) training and multitask (simultaneous) training are often attempting to solve the same overall objective: to find a solution that performs well on all considered tasks. The main difference is in the training regimes, where continual learning can only have access to one task at a time, which for neural networks typically leads to catastrophic forgetting. That is, the solution found for a subsequent task does not perform well on the previous ones anymore. However, the relationship between the different minima that the two training regimes arrive at is not well understood. What sets them apart? Is there a local structure that could explain the difference in performance achieved by the two different schemes? Motivated by recent work showing that different minima of the same task are typically connected by very simple curves of low error, we investigate whether multitask and continual solutions are similarly connected. We empirically find that indeed such connectivity can be reliably achieved and, more interestingly, it can be done by a linear path, conditioned on having the same initialization for both. We thoroughly analyze this observation and discuss its significance for the continual learning process. Furthermore, we exploit this finding to propose an effective algorithm that constrains the sequentially learned minima to behave as the multitask solution. We show that our method outperforms several state of the art continual learning algorithms on various vision benchmarks.
summary: Continual (sequential) training and multitask (simultaneous) training are often attempting to solve the same overall objective: to find a solution that performs well on all considered tasks. The main difference is in the training regimes, where continual learning can only have access to one task at a time, which for neural networks typically leads to catastrophic forgetting. That is, the solution found for a subsequent task does not perform well on the previous ones anymore. However, the relationship between the different minima that the two training regimes arrive at is not well understood. What sets them apart? Is there a local structure that could explain the difference in performance achieved by the two different schemes? Motivated by recent work showing that different minima of the same task are typically connected by very simple curves of low error, we investigate whether multitask and continual solutions are similarly connected. We empirically find that indeed such connectivity can be reliably achieved and, more interestingly, it can be done by a linear path, conditioned on having the same initialization for both. We thoroughly analyze this observation and discuss its significance for the continual learning process. Furthermore, we exploit this finding to propose an effective algorithm that constrains the sequentially learned minima to behave as the multitask solution. We show that our method outperforms several state of the art continual learning algorithms on various vision benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 持续（顺序）训练和多任务（同时）训练通常试图解决相同的总体目标：找到在所有考虑的任务上表现良好的解决方案。主要区别在于训练机制，持续学习一次只能完成一项任务，这对于神经网络来说通常会导致灾难性遗忘。也就是说，为后续任务找到的解决方案在之前的任务中不再表现良好。然而，两种训练制度达到的不同最小值之间的关系尚不清楚。是什么让他们与众不同？是否存在可以解释两种不同方案所实现的性能差异的局部结构？最近的工作表明，同一任务的不同最小值通常通过非常简单的低误差曲线连接，我们研究了多任务和连续解决方案是否具有类似的连接。我们凭经验发现，这种连接确实可以可靠地实现，更有趣的是，它可以通过线性路径来完成，条件是两者具有相同的初始化。我们彻底分析这一观察结果，并讨论其对持续学习过程的意义。此外，我们利用这一发现提出了一种有效的算法，该算法将顺序学习的最小值限制为多任务解决方案。我们表明，我们的方法在各种视觉基准上优于几种最先进的持续学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多任务学习与持续学习中不同训练方式所得解之间的连接性，发现通过相同初始化的线性路径可实现二者连接，并提出改进持续学习效果的算法。
AI.motivation: 持续学习面临灾难性遗忘问题，而多任务学习可同时处理多个任务。现有研究显示不同极小值可通过简单路径连接，但两种训练方式得到的解间关系尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过实验证明多任务与持续学习的解可通过线性路径连接，基于相同初始化条件提出约束顺序学习解的算法，使其行为趋近于多任务解。
AI.result: 该方法在多个视觉基准测试中优于现有持续学习算法，验证了线性连接性假设的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 发现解间的线性连接性为持续学习提供了新视角，所提算法通过约束解空间有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Leon Yan,Nathan Banka,Parker Owan,Walter Tony Piaskowy,Joseph Garbini,Santosh Devasia
title: MIMO ILC for Precision SEA robots using Input-weighted Complex-Kernel Regression
title_zh: 使用输入加权复杂核回归的用于 Precision SEA 机器人的 MIMO ILC
abstract: This work improves the positioning precision of lightweight robots with series elastic actuators (SEAs). Lightweight SEA robots, along with low-impedance control, can maneuver without causing damage in uncertain, confined spaces such as inside an aircraft wing during aircraft assembly. Nevertheless, substantial modeling uncertainties in SEA robots reduce the precision achieved by model-based approaches such as inversion-based feedforward. Therefore, this article improves the precision of SEA robots around specified operating points, through a multi-input multi-output (MIMO), iterative learning control (ILC) approach. The main contributions of this article are to (i) introduce an input-weighted complex kernel to estimate local MIMO models using complex Gaussian process regression (c-GPR) (ii) develop Geršgorin-theorem-based conditions on the iteration gains for ensuring ILC convergence to precision within noise-related limits, even with errors in the estimated model; and (iii) demonstrate precision positioning with an experimental SEA robot. Comparative experimental results, with and without ILC, show around 90% improvement in the positioning precision (close to the repeatability limit of the robot) and a 10-times increase in the SEA robot's operating speed with the use of the MIMO ILC.
summary: This work improves the positioning precision of lightweight robots with series elastic actuators (SEAs). Lightweight SEA robots, along with low-impedance control, can maneuver without causing damage in uncertain, confined spaces such as inside an aircraft wing during aircraft assembly. Nevertheless, substantial modeling uncertainties in SEA robots reduce the precision achieved by model-based approaches such as inversion-based feedforward. Therefore, this article improves the precision of SEA robots around specified operating points, through a multi-input multi-output (MIMO), iterative learning control (ILC) approach. The main contributions of this article are to (i) introduce an input-weighted complex kernel to estimate local MIMO models using complex Gaussian process regression (c-GPR) (ii) develop Geršgorin-theorem-based conditions on the iteration gains for ensuring ILC convergence to precision within noise-related limits, even with errors in the estimated model; and (iii) demonstrate precision positioning with an experimental SEA robot. Comparative experimental results, with and without ILC, show around 90% improvement in the positioning precision (close to the repeatability limit of the robot) and a 10-times increase in the SEA robot's operating speed with the use of the MIMO ILC.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提高了带有串联弹性执行器（SEA）的轻型机器人的定位精度。轻型 SEA 机器人加上低阻抗控制，可以在不确定的有限空间（例如飞机组装过程中的机翼内部）中进行机动，而不会造成损坏。然而，SEA 机器人中的大量建模不确定性降低了基于模型的方法（例如基于反演的前馈）所实现的精度。因此，本文通过多输入多输出（MIMO）、迭代学习控制（ILC）方法提高了SEA机器人在指定操作点周围的精度。本文的主要贡献是 (i) 引入输入加权复杂核，使用复杂高斯过程回归 (c-GPR) 来估计局部 MIMO 模型 (ii) 开发基于 Geršgorin 定理的迭代增益条件，以确保 ILC 收敛到噪声相关限制内的精度，即使估计模型存在误差； (iii) 使用实验性 SEA 机器人演示精确定位。对比实验结果显示，使用和不使用 ILC 时，使用 MIMO ILC 后，定位精度提高了约 90%（接近机器人的重复性极限），并且 SEA 机器人的运行速度提高了 10 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多输入多输出（MIMO）迭代学习控制（ILC）的方法，以提高轻型系列弹性执行器（SEA）机器人的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 轻型SEA机器人在不确定和受限空间中操作时，由于模型不确定性，传统基于模型的方法难以实现高精度定位，因此需要改进方法。
AI.method: 本文引入了输入加权复核函数，结合复高斯过程回归（c-GPR）估计局部MIMO模型，并基于Geršgorin定理开发了迭代增益条件，以确保ILC收敛。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用MIMO ILC方法后，SEA机器人的定位精度提高了约90%，并且操作速度提高了10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了SEA机器人在特定操作点的定位精度和操作速度，具有良好的应用前景。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多输入多输出（MIMO）迭代学习控制（ILC）的方法，以提高轻型系列弹性执行器（SEA）机器人的定位精度。
motivation: 轻型SEA机器人在不确定和受限空间中操作时，由于模型不确定性，传统基于模型的方法难以实现高精度定位，因此需要改进方法。
method: 本文引入了输入加权复核函数，结合复高斯过程回归（c-GPR）估计局部MIMO模型，并基于Geršgorin定理开发了迭代增益条件，以确保ILC收敛。
result: 实验结果表明，使用MIMO ILC方法后，SEA机器人的定位精度提高了约90%，并且操作速度提高了10倍。
conclusion: 该方法有效提升了SEA机器人在特定操作点的定位精度和操作速度，具有良好的应用前景。
search_text: MIMO ILC for Precision SEA robots using Input-weighted Complex-Kernel Regression 使用输入加权复杂核回归的用于 Precision SEA 机器人的 MIMO ILC This work improves the positioning precision of lightweight robots with series elastic actuators (SEAs). Lightweight SEA robots, along with low-impedance control, can maneuver without causing damage in uncertain, confined spaces such as inside an aircraft wing during aircraft assembly. Nevertheless, substantial modeling uncertainties in SEA robots reduce the precision achieved by model-based approaches such as inversion-based feedforward. Therefore, this article improves the precision of SEA robots around specified operating points, through a multi-input multi-output (MIMO), iterative learning control (ILC) approach. The main contributions of this article are to (i) introduce an input-weighted complex kernel to estimate local MIMO models using complex Gaussian process regression (c-GPR) (ii) develop Geršgorin-theorem-based conditions on the iteration gains for ensuring ILC convergence to precision within noise-related limits, even with errors in the estimated model; and (iii) demonstrate precision positioning with an experimental SEA robot. Comparative experimental results, with and without ILC, show around 90% improvement in the positioning precision (close to the repeatability limit of the robot) and a 10-times increase in the SEA robot's operating speed with the use of the MIMO ILC. 这项工作提高了带有串联弹性执行器（SEA）的轻型机器人的定位精度。轻型 SEA 机器人加上低阻抗控制，可以在不确定的有限空间（例如飞机组装过程中的机翼内部）中进行机动，而不会造成损坏。然而，SEA 机器人中的大量建模不确定性降低了基于模型的方法（例如基于反演的前馈）所实现的精度。因此，本文通过多输入多输出（MIMO）、迭代学习控制（ILC）方法提高了SEA机器人在指定操作点周围的精度。本文的主要贡献是 (i) 引入输入加权复杂核，使用复杂高斯过程回归 (c-GPR) 来估计局部 MIMO 模型 (ii) 开发基于 Geršgorin 定理的迭代增益条件，以确保 ILC 收敛到噪声相关限制内的精度，即使估计模型存在误差； (iii) 使用实验性 SEA 机器人演示精确定位。对比实验结果显示，使用和不使用 ILC 时，使用 MIMO ILC 后，定位精度提高了约 90%（接近机器人的重复性极限），并且 SEA 机器人的运行速度提高了 10 倍。 本文提出了一种基于多输入多输出（MIMO）迭代学习控制（ILC）的方法，以提高轻型系列弹性执行器（SEA）机器人的定位精度。 Leon Yan,Nathan Banka,Parker Owan,Walter Tony Piaskowy,Joseph Garbini,Santosh Devasia eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Gangming Zhao,Chaowei Fang,Guanbin Li,Licheng Jiao,Yizhou Yu
title: Contralaterally Enhanced Networks for Thoracic Disease Detection
title_zh: 用于胸部疾病检测的对侧增强网络
abstract: Identifying and locating diseases in chest X-rays are very challenging, due to the low visual contrast between normal and abnormal regions, and distortions caused by other overlapping tissues. An interesting phenomenon is that there exist many similar structures in the left and right parts of the chest, such as ribs, lung fields and bronchial tubes. This kind of similarities can be used to identify diseases in chest X-rays, according to the experience of broad-certificated radiologists. Aimed at improving the performance of existing detection methods, we propose a deep end-to-end module to exploit the contralateral context information for enhancing feature representations of disease proposals. First of all, under the guidance of the spine line, the spatial transformer network is employed to extract local contralateral patches, which can provide valuable context information for disease proposals. Then, we build up a specific module, based on both additive and subtractive operations, to fuse the features of the disease proposal and the contralateral patch. Our method can be integrated into both fully and weakly supervised disease detection frameworks. It achieves 33.17 AP50 on a carefully annotated private chest X-ray dataset which contains 31,000 images. Experiments on the NIH chest X-ray dataset indicate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in weakly-supervised disease localization.
summary: Identifying and locating diseases in chest X-rays are very challenging, due to the low visual contrast between normal and abnormal regions, and distortions caused by other overlapping tissues. An interesting phenomenon is that there exist many similar structures in the left and right parts of the chest, such as ribs, lung fields and bronchial tubes. This kind of similarities can be used to identify diseases in chest X-rays, according to the experience of broad-certificated radiologists. Aimed at improving the performance of existing detection methods, we propose a deep end-to-end module to exploit the contralateral context information for enhancing feature representations of disease proposals. First of all, under the guidance of the spine line, the spatial transformer network is employed to extract local contralateral patches, which can provide valuable context information for disease proposals. Then, we build up a specific module, based on both additive and subtractive operations, to fuse the features of the disease proposal and the contralateral patch. Our method can be integrated into both fully and weakly supervised disease detection frameworks. It achieves 33.17 AP50 on a carefully annotated private chest X-ray dataset which contains 31,000 images. Experiments on the NIH chest X-ray dataset indicate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in weakly-supervised disease localization.
abstract_zh: 由于正常和异常区域之间的视觉对比度较低，以及其他重叠组织造成的扭曲，在胸部 X 光检查中识别和定位疾病非常具有挑战性。一个有趣的现象是，胸部的左右部分存在许多相似的结构，如肋骨、肺野和支气管。根据广泛认证的放射科医生的经验，这种相似性可用于通过胸部 X 光检查来识别疾病。为了提高现有检测方法的性能，我们提出了一种深度端到端模块来利用对侧上下文信息来增强疾病建议的特征表示。首先，在脊柱线的引导下，利用空间变换网络提取局部对侧斑块，这可以为疾病建议提供有价值的上下文信息。然后，我们基于加法和减法运算构建一个特定的模块，以融合疾病建议和对侧补丁的特征。我们的方法可以集成到完全和弱监督的疾病检测框架中。它在包含 31,000 张图像的经过仔细注释的私人胸部 X 射线数据集上达到了 33.17 AP50。在 NIH 胸部 X 射线数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在弱监督疾病定位方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用胸部X光片对侧结构信息增强特征表示的深度网络模块，以提升胸腔疾病检测性能。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光片中正常与异常区域的视觉对比度低且存在组织重叠，导致疾病检测困难。利用左右侧对称结构（如肋骨、肺野）的相似性可辅助疾病定位，但现有方法未充分挖掘对侧上下文信息。
AI.method: 基于脊柱线引导的空间变换网络提取对侧局部区域 patches，并通过加减运算模块融合病灶提案与对侧补丁特征。该方法兼容全监督和弱监督检测框架。
AI.result: 在包含31,000张图像的私有数据集上达到33.17 AP50，在NIH数据集的弱监督定位任务中取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 对侧增强网络通过有效利用解剖对称性，显著提升了胸部疾病检测的准确性和鲁棒性，尤其适用于弱监督场景。

title: gundapusunil at SemEval-2020 Task 8: Multimodal Memotion Analysis
title_zh: Gundapusunil 在 SemEval-2020 任务 8：多模态记忆分析
abstract: Recent technological advancements in the Internet and Social media usage have resulted in the evolution of faster and efficient platforms of communication. These platforms include visual, textual and speech mediums and have brought a unique social phenomenon called Internet memes. Internet memes are in the form of images with witty, catchy, or sarcastic text descriptions. In this paper, we present a multi-modal sentiment analysis system using deep neural networks combining Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing. Our aim is different than the normal sentiment analysis goal of predicting whether a text expresses positive or negative sentiment; instead, we aim to classify the Internet meme as a positive, negative, or neutral, identify the type of humor expressed and quantify the extent to which a particular effect is being expressed. Our system has been developed using CNN and LSTM and outperformed the baseline score.
summary: Recent technological advancements in the Internet and Social media usage have resulted in the evolution of faster and efficient platforms of communication. These platforms include visual, textual and speech mediums and have brought a unique social phenomenon called Internet memes. Internet memes are in the form of images with witty, catchy, or sarcastic text descriptions. In this paper, we present a multi-modal sentiment analysis system using deep neural networks combining Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing. Our aim is different than the normal sentiment analysis goal of predicting whether a text expresses positive or negative sentiment; instead, we aim to classify the Internet meme as a positive, negative, or neutral, identify the type of humor expressed and quantify the extent to which a particular effect is being expressed. Our system has been developed using CNN and LSTM and outperformed the baseline score.
abstract_zh: 互联网和社交媒体使用的最新技术进步导致了更快、更高效的通信平台的发展。这些平台包括视觉、文本和语音媒介，并带来了一种独特的社会现象，称为互联网模因。互联网模因采用图像形式，并带有诙谐、吸引人或讽刺的文字描述。在本文中，我们提出了一种结合计算机视觉和自然语言处理的使用深度神经网络的多模态情感分析系统。我们的目标与预测文本是否表达积极情绪或消极情绪的正常情绪分析目标不同；相反，我们的目标是将互联网模因分类为积极、消极或中性，识别所表达的幽默类型并量化特定效果所表达的程度。我们的系统是使用 CNN 和 LSTM 开发的，并且表现优于基线分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合计算机视觉和自然语言处理的多模态情感分析系统，用于分类互联网迷因的情感倾向、识别幽默类型并量化表达效果。
AI.motivation: 传统情感分析主要针对文本，而互联网迷因融合了图像和文本，需开发更复杂的多模态分析方法以准确捕捉其独特的情感表达。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）处理图像，长短期记忆网络（LSTM）处理文本，并通过深度神经网络融合多模态特征进行联合分析。
AI.result: 该系统在基准测试中表现优于现有方法，成功提升了迷因情感分类和幽默类型识别的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态深度学习方法有效解决了互联网迷因的情感分析难题，验证了CNN与LSTM结合在复杂数据处理中的优势。

Our system has been developed using CNN and LSTM and outperformed the baseline score. 互联网和社交媒体使用的最新技术进步导致了更快、更高效的通信平台的发展。这些平台包括视觉、文本和语音媒介，并带来了一种独特的社会现象，称为互联网模因。互联网模因采用图像形式，并带有诙谐、吸引人或讽刺的文字描述。在本文中，我们提出了一种结合计算机视觉和自然语言处理的使用深度神经网络的多模态情感分析系统。我们的目标与预测文本是否表达积极情绪或消极情绪的正常情绪分析目标不同；相反，我们的目标是将互联网模因分类为积极、消极或中性，识别所表达的幽默类型并量化特定效果所表达的程度。我们的系统是使用 CNN 和 LSTM 开发的，并且表现优于基线分数。 本文提出一种结合计算机视觉和自然语言处理的多模态情感分析系统，用于分类互联网迷因的情感倾向、识别幽默类型并量化表达效果。 Sunil Gundapu,Radhika Mamidi cs.CV

title: Learning Not to Learn: Nature versus Nurture in Silico
title_zh: 学会不去学习：计算机中的先天与后天
abstract: Animals are equipped with a rich innate repertoire of sensory, behavioral and motor skills, which allows them to interact with the world immediately after birth. At the same time, many behaviors are highly adaptive and can be tailored to specific environments by means of learning. In this work, we use mathematical analysis and the framework of meta-learning (or 'learning to learn') to answer when it is beneficial to learn such an adaptive strategy and when to hard-code a heuristic behavior. We find that the interplay of ecological uncertainty, task complexity and the agents' lifetime has crucial effects on the meta-learned amortized Bayesian inference performed by an agent. There exist two regimes: One in which meta-learning yields a learning algorithm that implements task-dependent information-integration and a second regime in which meta-learning imprints a heuristic or 'hard-coded' behavior. Further analysis reveals that non-adaptive behaviors are not only optimal for aspects of the environment that are stable across individuals, but also in situations where an adaptation to the environment would in fact be highly beneficial, but could not be done quickly enough to be exploited within the remaining lifetime. Hard-coded behaviors should hence not only be those that always work, but also those that are too complex to be learned within a reasonable time frame.
summary: Animals are equipped with a rich innate repertoire of sensory, behavioral and motor skills, which allows them to interact with the world immediately after birth. At the same time, many behaviors are highly adaptive and can be tailored to specific environments by means of learning. In this work, we use mathematical analysis and the framework of meta-learning (or 'learning to learn') to answer when it is beneficial to learn such an adaptive strategy and when to hard-code a heuristic behavior. We find that the interplay of ecological uncertainty, task complexity and the agents' lifetime has crucial effects on the meta-learned amortized Bayesian inference performed by an agent. There exist two regimes: One in which meta-learning yields a learning algorithm that implements task-dependent information-integration and a second regime in which meta-learning imprints a heuristic or 'hard-coded' behavior. Further analysis reveals that non-adaptive behaviors are not only optimal for aspects of the environment that are stable across individuals, but also in situations where an adaptation to the environment would in fact be highly beneficial, but could not be done quickly enough to be exploited within the remaining lifetime. Hard-coded behaviors should hence not only be those that always work, but also those that are too complex to be learned within a reasonable time frame.
abstract_zh: 动物天生具有丰富的感觉、行为和运动技能，这使它们能够在出生后立即与世界互动。同时，许多行为具有高度适应性，可以通过学习的方式适应特定环境。在这项工作中，我们使用数学分析和元学习（或“学会学习”）的框架来回答何时学习这种自适应策略是有益的以及何时对启发式行为进行硬编码。我们发现生态不确定性、任务复杂性和智能体生命周期的相互作用对智能体执行的元学习摊销贝叶斯推理具有至关重要的影响。存在两种机制：一种是元学习产生一种实现任务相关信息集成的学习算法，另一种是元学习印记启发式或“硬编码”行为。进一步的分析表明，非适应性行为不仅对于个体之间稳定的环境方面是最佳的，而且对于环境的适应实际上是非常有益的，但不能足够快地完成以在剩余的一生中被利用的情况。因此，硬编码的行为不仅应该是那些始终有效的行为，还应该是那些过于复杂而无法在合理的时间范围内学习的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文通过数学分析和元学习框架，探讨智能体在何种情况下应学习适应性策略，何时应采用固定启发式行为。
AI.motivation: 动物具有先天技能和后天学习能力，但环境不确定性、任务复杂度与生命周期影响行为策略选择，需明确两者的平衡机制。
AI.method: 运用元学习理论与贝叶斯推断模型，分析生态不确定性、任务复杂度及智能体生命周期对策略选择的影响。
AI.result: 发现两种场景：元学习生成任务依赖的信息整合算法，或固化启发式行为；非适应性行为在环境稳定或学习时间不足时最优。
AI.conclusion: 固定行为不仅适用于普遍有效的情况，也适用于因复杂度高而无法及时学习的场景，需综合环境与生命周期因素决策。

title: Bioinspired Bipedal Locomotion Control for Humanoid Robotics Based on EACO
title_zh: 基于 EACO 的仿生双足仿人机器人运动控制
abstract: To construct a robot that can walk as efficiently and steadily as humans or other legged animals, we develop an enhanced elitist-mutated ant colony optimization~(EACO) algorithm with genetic and crossover operators in real-time applications to humanoid robotics or other legged robots. This work presents promoting global search capability and convergence rate of the EACO applied to humanoid robots in real-time by estimating the expected convergence rate using Markov chain. Furthermore, we put a special focus on the EACO algorithm on a wide range of problems, from ACO, real-coded GAs, GAs with neural networks~(NNs), particle swarm optimization~(PSO) to complex robotics systems including gait synthesis, dynamic modeling of parameterizable trajectories and gait optimization of humanoid robotics. The experimental results illustrate the capability of this method to discover the premature convergence probability, tackle successfully inherent stagnation, and promote the convergence rate of the EACO-based humanoid robotics systems and demonstrated the applicability and the effectiveness of our strategy for solving sophisticated optimization tasks. We found reliable and fast walking gaits with a velocity of up to 0.47m/s using the EACO optimization strategy. These findings have significant implications for understanding and tackling inherent stagnation and poor convergence rate of the EACO and provide new insight into the genetic architectures and control optimization of humanoid robotics.
summary: To construct a robot that can walk as efficiently and steadily as humans or other legged animals, we develop an enhanced elitist-mutated ant colony optimization~(EACO) algorithm with genetic and crossover operators in real-time applications to humanoid robotics or other legged robots. This work presents promoting global search capability and convergence rate of the EACO applied to humanoid robots in real-time by estimating the expected convergence rate using Markov chain. Furthermore, we put a special focus on the EACO algorithm on a wide range of problems, from ACO, real-coded GAs, GAs with neural networks~(NNs), particle swarm optimization~(PSO) to complex robotics systems including gait synthesis, dynamic modeling of parameterizable trajectories and gait optimization of humanoid robotics. The experimental results illustrate the capability of this method to discover the premature convergence probability, tackle successfully inherent stagnation, and promote the convergence rate of the EACO-based humanoid robotics systems and demonstrated the applicability and the effectiveness of our strategy for solving sophisticated optimization tasks. We found reliable and fast walking gaits with a velocity of up to 0.47m/s using the EACO optimization strategy. These findings have significant implications for understanding and tackling inherent stagnation and poor convergence rate of the EACO and provide new insight into the genetic architectures and control optimization of humanoid robotics.
abstract_zh: 为了构建一个能够像人类或其他有腿动物一样高效稳定行走的机器人，我们开发了一种增强型精英突变蚁群优化（EACO）算法，该算法具有遗传和交叉算子，可实时应用于人形机器人或其他有腿机器人。这项工作提出了通过使用马尔可夫链估计预期收敛速度来实时提升应用于人形机器人的 EACO 的全局搜索能力和收敛速度。此外，我们特别关注 EACO 算法解决各种问题，从 ACO、实编码 GA、神经网络 GA（NN）、粒子群优化（PSO）到复杂的机器人系统，包括步态合成、可参数化轨迹的动态建模和人形机器人的步态优化。实验结果说明了该方法能够发现早熟收敛概率，成功解决固有停滞问题，并提高基于 EACO 的人形机器人系统的收敛速度，并证明了我们的策略解决复杂优化任务的适用性和有效性。我们使用 EACO 优化策略找到了可靠且快速的步行步态，速度高达 0.47m/s。这些发现对于理解和解决 EACO 固有的停滞和较差的收敛速度具有重要意义，并为人形机器人的遗传结构和控制优化提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的精英变异蚁群优化算法（EACO），用于提升人形机器人双足行走的效率和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统蚁群优化算法在解决复杂机器人优化问题时存在收敛速度慢、易陷入局部最优等缺陷，需改进算法以应对人形机器人动态建模与步态优化的挑战。
AI.method: 融合遗传算法与交叉算子的EACO算法，结合马尔可夫链估计收敛率，应用于步态合成、轨迹动态建模及参数优化等多维度问题。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法可有效解决早熟收敛问题，提升收敛速度，实现最高0.47m/s的稳定行走步态，证明其在复杂优化任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的EACO算法为解决人形机器人控制优化提供了新思路，同时为遗传架构设计与收敛性改进提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Bolin Wei,Yongmin Li,Ge Li,Xin Xia,Zhi Jin
title: Retrieve and Refine: Exemplar-based Neural Comment Generation
title_zh: 检索和细化：基于示例的神经注释生成
comment: to be published in the 35th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE 2020) (ASE'20)
comments: to be published in the 35th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE 2020) (ASE'20)
abstract: Code comment generation which aims to automatically generate natural language descriptions for source code, is a crucial task in the field of automatic software development. Traditional comment generation methods use manually-crafted templates or information retrieval (IR) techniques to generate summaries for source code. In recent years, neural network-based methods which leveraged acclaimed encoder-decoder deep learning framework to learn comment generation patterns from a large-scale parallel code corpus, have achieved impressive results. However, these emerging methods only take code-related information as input. Software reuse is common in the process of software development, meaning that comments of similar code snippets are helpful for comment generation. Inspired by the IR-based and template-based approaches, in this paper, we propose a neural comment generation approach where we use the existing comments of similar code snippets as exemplars to guide comment generation. Specifically, given a piece of code, we first use an IR technique to retrieve a similar code snippet and treat its comment as an exemplar. Then we design a novel seq2seq neural network that takes the given code, its AST, its similar code, and its exemplar as input, and leverages the information from the exemplar to assist in the target comment generation based on the semantic similarity between the source code and the similar code. We evaluate our approach on a large-scale Java corpus, which contains about 2M samples, and experimental results demonstrate that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a substantial margin.

abstract_zh: 代码注释生成旨在自动生成源代码的自然语言描述，是自动软件开发领域的一项关键任务。传统的注释生成方法使用手动制作的模板或信息检索 (IR) 技术来生成源代码摘要。近年来，基于神经网络的方法利用广受好评的编码器-解码器深度学习框架从大规模并行代码语料库中学习评论生成模式，取得了令人瞩目的成果。然而，这些新兴方法仅将代码相关信息作为输入。软件复用在软件开发过程中很常见，这意味着类似代码片段的注释有助于注释的生成。受基于 IR 和基于模板的方法的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种神经评论生成方法，其中我们使用类似代码片段的现有评论作为示例来指导评论生成。具体来说，给定一段代码，我们首先使用 IR 技术来检索相似的代码片段并将其注释视为示例。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的 seq2seq 神经网络，该网络将给定代码、其 AST、相似代码及其示例作为输入，并利用示例中的信息来辅助基于源代码和相似代码之间的语义相似性生成目标评论。我们在包含约 200 万个样本的大规模 Java 语料库上评估了我们的方法，实验结果表明我们的模型在很大程度上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于示例的神经网络代码评论生成方法，通过检索相似代码片段的评论作为示例来指导生成。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络方法仅依赖代码相关输入，未利用软件复用中相似代码片段的评论信息，而传统方法效果有限。
AI.method: 结合信息检索技术检索相似代码并获取其评论作为示例，设计seq2seq模型融合代码、AST、相似代码及示例信息进行生成。
AI.result: 在包含200万Java样本的语料库中，模型性能显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用相似代码评论示例能有效提升神经网络代码评论生成质量。

authors_text: Yuan Yin,Vincent Le Guen,Jérémie Dona,Emmanuel de Bézenac,Ibrahim Ayed,Nicolas Thome,Patrick Gallinari
title: Augmenting Physical Models with Deep Networks for Complex Dynamics Forecasting
title_zh: 使用深度网络增强物理模型以进行复杂的动态预测
abstract: Forecasting complex dynamical phenomena in settings where only partial knowledge of their dynamics is available is a prevalent problem across various scientific fields. While purely data-driven approaches are arguably insufficient in this context, standard physical modeling based approaches tend to be over-simplistic, inducing non-negligible errors. In this work, we introduce the APHYNITY framework, a principled approach for augmenting incomplete physical dynamics described by differential equations with deep data-driven models. It consists in decomposing the dynamics into two components: a physical component accounting for the dynamics for which we have some prior knowledge, and a data-driven component accounting for errors of the physical model. The learning problem is carefully formulated such that the physical model explains as much of the data as possible, while the data-driven component only describes information that cannot be captured by the physical model, no more, no less. This not only provides the existence and uniqueness for this decomposition, but also ensures interpretability and benefits generalization. Experiments made on three important use cases, each representative of a different family of phenomena, i.e. reaction-diffusion equations, wave equations and the non-linear damped pendulum, show that APHYNITY can efficiently leverage approximate physical models to accurately forecast the evolution of the system and correctly identify relevant physical parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/yuan-yin/APHYNITY .
summary: Forecasting complex dynamical phenomena in settings where only partial knowledge of their dynamics is available is a prevalent problem across various scientific fields. While purely data-driven approaches are arguably insufficient in this context, standard physical modeling based approaches tend to be over-simplistic, inducing non-negligible errors. It consists in decomposing the dynamics into two components: a physical component accounting for the dynamics for which we have some prior knowledge, and a data-driven component accounting for errors of the physical model. The learning problem is carefully formulated such that the physical model explains as much of the data as possible, while the data-driven component only describes information that cannot be captured by the physical model, no more, no less. This not only provides the existence and uniqueness for this decomposition, but also ensures interpretability and benefits generalization. Experiments made on three important use cases, each representative of a different family of phenomena, i.e. reaction-diffusion equations, wave equations and the non-linear damped pendulum, show that APHYNITY can efficiently leverage approximate physical models to accurately forecast the evolution of the system and correctly identify relevant physical parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/yuan-yin/APHYNITY .
abstract_zh: 在仅掌握部分动力学知识的情况下预测复杂的动力学现象是各个科学领域的一个普遍问题。虽然纯粹的数据驱动方法在这种情况下可能是不够的，但基于标准物理建模的方法往往过于简单化，会导致不可忽略的错误。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 APHYNITY 框架，这是一种利用深度数据驱动模型增强微分方程描述的不完整物理动力学的原理方法。它将动力学分解为两个部分：一个是我们有一些先验知识的解释动力学的物理部分，另一个是解释物理模型的错误的数据驱动部分。学习问题经过精心制定，使得物理模型能够解释尽可能多的数据，而数据驱动组件仅描述物理模型无法捕获的信息，不多也不少。这不仅为这种分解提供了存在性和唯一性，而且保证了可解释性并有利于泛化。对三个重要用例进行的实验表明，APHYNITY 可以有效地利用近似物理模型来准确预测系统的演化并正确识别相关物理参数，每个用例代表不同的现象系列，即反应扩散方程、波动方程和非线性阻尼摆。代码可在 https://github.com/yuan-yin/APHYNITY 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出APHYNITY框架，结合物理模型和深度网络以提高复杂动力学系统的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 纯数据驱动方法在部分已知动力学系统中效果不足，传统物理模型因过度简化导致误差较大，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 将动力学分解为物理组件（处理已知动态）和数据驱动组件（修正物理模型误差），通过约束学习使物理模型最大化解释数据，数据驱动部分仅补充物理模型无法捕捉的信息。
AI.result: 在反应扩散方程、波动方程和非线性阻尼摆三个案例中，APHYNITY有效提升预测精度并准确识别物理参数。
AI.conclusion: APHYNITY通过结构化分解实现物理与数据驱动模型的互补，增强预测可靠性与可解释性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Wen-Chin Huang,Patrick Lumban Tobing,Yi-Chiao Wu,Kazuhiro Kobayashi,Tomoki Toda
title: The NU Voice Conversion System for the Voice Conversion Challenge 2020: On the Effectiveness of Sequence-to-sequence Models and Autoregressive Neural Vocoders
title_zh: 应对 2020 年语音转换挑战赛的 NU 语音转换系统：论序列到序列模型和自回归神经声码器的有效性
comment: Accepted to the ISCA Joint Workshop for the Blizzard Challenge and Voice Conversion Challenge 2020
comments: Accepted to the ISCA Joint Workshop for the Blizzard Challenge and Voice Conversion Challenge 2020
abstract: In this paper, we present the voice conversion (VC) systems developed at Nagoya University (NU) for the Voice Conversion Challenge 2020 (VCC2020). We aim to determine the effectiveness of two recent significant technologies in VC: sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) models and autoregressive (AR) neural vocoders. Two respective systems were developed for the two tasks in the challenge: for task 1, we adopted the Voice Transformer Network, a Transformer-based seq2seq VC model, and extended it with synthetic parallel data to tackle nonparallel data; for task 2, we used the frame-based cyclic variational autoencoder (CycleVAE) to model the spectral features of a speech waveform and the AR WaveNet vocoder with additional fine-tuning. By comparing with the baseline systems, we confirmed that the seq2seq modeling can improve the conversion similarity and that the use of AR vocoders can improve the naturalness of the converted speech.
summary: In this paper, we present the voice conversion (VC) systems developed at Nagoya University (NU) for the Voice Conversion Challenge 2020 (VCC2020). We aim to determine the effectiveness of two recent significant technologies in VC: sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) models and autoregressive (AR) neural vocoders. Two respective systems were developed for the two tasks in the challenge: for task 1, we adopted the Voice Transformer Network, a Transformer-based seq2seq VC model, and extended it with synthetic parallel data to tackle nonparallel data; for task 2, we used the frame-based cyclic variational autoencoder (CycleVAE) to model the spectral features of a speech waveform and the AR WaveNet vocoder with additional fine-tuning. By comparing with the baseline systems, we confirmed that the seq2seq modeling can improve the conversion similarity and that the use of AR vocoders can improve the naturalness of the converted speech.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了名古屋大学 (NU) 为 2020 年语音转换挑战赛 (VCC2020) 开发的语音转换 (VC) 系统。我们的目标是确定 VC 中最近两项重要技术的有效性：序列到序列 (seq2seq) 模型和自回归 (AR) 神经声码器。针对挑战中的两项任务开发了两个各自的系统：对于任务 1，我们采用了 Voice Transformer Network，这是一种基于 Transformer 的 seq2seq VC 模型，并使用合成并行数据对其进行了扩展以处理非并行数据；对于任务 2，我们使用基于帧的循环变分自动编码器 (CycleVAE) 来对语音波形的频谱特征进行建模，并使用 AR WaveNet 声码器进行额外的微调。通过与基线系统进行比较，我们证实了 seq2seq 建模可以提高转换相似度，并且使用 AR 声码器可以提高转换后语音的自然度。

AI.motivation: 本文旨在验证序列到序列模型和自回归神经声码器在语音转换任务中的有效性，并探索它们在非平行数据处理中的应用。
AI.method: 对于任务1，采用基于Transformer的序列到序列模型Voice Transformer Network，并使用合成并行数据处理非平行数据；对于任务2，使用基于帧的循环变分自编码器（CycleVAE）建模语音波形的频谱特征，并结合自回归WaveNet声码器进行额外微调。

AI.conclusion: 序列到序列模型和自回归神经声码器在语音转换任务中表现出良好的性能，能够有效提升语音转换的质量和自然度。

search_text: The NU Voice Conversion System for the Voice Conversion Challenge 2020: On the Effectiveness of Sequence-to-sequence Models and Autoregressive Neural Vocoders 应对 2020 年语音转换挑战赛的 NU 语音转换系统：论序列到序列模型和自回归神经声码器的有效性 In this paper, we present the voice conversion (VC) systems developed at Nagoya University (NU) for the Voice Conversion Challenge 2020 (VCC2020). We aim to determine the effectiveness of two recent significant technologies in VC: sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) models and autoregressive (AR) neural vocoders. Two respective systems were developed for the two tasks in the challenge: for task 1, we adopted the Voice Transformer Network, a Transformer-based seq2seq VC model, and extended it with synthetic parallel data to tackle nonparallel data; for task 2, we used the frame-based cyclic variational autoencoder (CycleVAE) to model the spectral features of a speech waveform and the AR WaveNet vocoder with additional fine-tuning. By comparing with the baseline systems, we confirmed that the seq2seq modeling can improve the conversion similarity and that the use of AR vocoders can improve the naturalness of the converted speech. 在本文中，我们介绍了名古屋大学 (NU) 为 2020 年语音转换挑战赛 (VCC2020) 开发的语音转换 (VC) 系统。我们的目标是确定 VC 中最近两项重要技术的有效性：序列到序列 (seq2seq) 模型和自回归 (AR) 神经声码器。针对挑战中的两项任务开发了两个各自的系统：对于任务 1，我们采用了 Voice Transformer Network，这是一种基于 Transformer 的 seq2seq VC 模型，并使用合成并行数据对其进行了扩展以处理非并行数据；对于任务 2，我们使用基于帧的循环变分自动编码器 (CycleVAE) 来对语音波形的频谱特征进行建模，并使用 AR WaveNet 声码器进行额外的微调。通过与基线系统进行比较，我们证实了 seq2seq 建模可以提高转换相似度，并且使用 AR 声码器可以提高转换后语音的自然度。 本文介绍了名古屋大学为2020年语音转换挑战赛开发的语音转换系统，旨在评估序列到序列模型和自回归神经声码器在语音转换中的有效性。 Wen-Chin Huang,Patrick Lumban Tobing,Yi-Chiao Wu,Kazuhiro Kobayashi,Tomoki Toda eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

title: Investigating Constraint Relationship in Evolutionary Many-Constraint Optimization
title_zh: 研究进化多约束优化中的约束关系
abstract: This paper contributes to the treatment of extensive constraints in evolutionary many-constraint optimization through consideration of the relationships between pair-wise constraints. In a conflicting relationship, the functional value of one constraint increases as the value in another constraint decreases. In a harmonious relationship, the improvement in one constraint is rewarded with simultaneous improvement in the other constraint. In an independent relationship, the adjustment to one constraint never affects the adjustment to the other. Based on the different features, methods for identifying constraint relationships are discussed, helping to simplify many-constraint optimization problems (MCOPs). Additionally, the transitivity of the relationships is further discussed at the aim of determining the relationship in a new pair of constraints.
summary: This paper contributes to the treatment of extensive constraints in evolutionary many-constraint optimization through consideration of the relationships between pair-wise constraints. In a conflicting relationship, the functional value of one constraint increases as the value in another constraint decreases. In a harmonious relationship, the improvement in one constraint is rewarded with simultaneous improvement in the other constraint. In an independent relationship, the adjustment to one constraint never affects the adjustment to the other. Based on the different features, methods for identifying constraint relationships are discussed, helping to simplify many-constraint optimization problems (MCOPs). Additionally, the transitivity of the relationships is further discussed at the aim of determining the relationship in a new pair of constraints.
abstract_zh: 本文通过考虑成对约束之间的关系，有助于处理演化多约束优化中的广泛约束。在冲突关系中，一个约束的功能值随着另一约束的值减小而增加。在和谐的关系中，一个约束条件的改善会随着另一个约束条件的同时改善而得到回报。在独立关系中，对一个约束的调整永远不会影响对另一个约束的调整。基于不同的特征，讨论了识别约束关系的方法，有助于简化多约束优化问题（MCOP）。此外，还进一步讨论了关系的传递性，以确定一对新约束中的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了进化多约束优化中约束间的关系，通过分析约束对之间的冲突、和谐与独立关系，提出简化多约束优化问题的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多约束优化问题时难以有效应对大量约束间的复杂关系，需通过分析约束间相互作用提升优化效率。
AI.method: 基于约束对的相互作用特征（冲突、和谐、独立），提出关系识别方法，并探讨关系的传递性以推断新约束对的关系。
AI.result: 建立了约束关系分类框架，通过关系识别简化多约束优化问题，为后续优化算法设计提供理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 约束关系分析能有效提升多约束优化问题的求解效率，关系传递性研究为复杂约束场景提供了扩展分析工具。

authors_text: Paul J. Pritz,Liang Ma,Kin K. Leung
title: Jointly-Learned State-Action Embedding for Efficient Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于高效强化学习的联合学习状态动作嵌入
abstract: While reinforcement learning has achieved considerable successes in recent years, state-of-the-art models are often still limited by the size of state and action spaces. Model-free reinforcement learning approaches use some form of state representations and the latest work has explored embedding techniques for actions, both with the aim of achieving better generalization and applicability. However, these approaches consider only states or actions, ignoring the interaction between them when generating embedded representations. In this work, we establish the theoretical foundations for the validity of training a reinforcement learning agent using embedded states and actions. We then propose a new approach for jointly learning embeddings for states and actions that combines aspects of model-free and model-based reinforcement learning, which can be applied in both discrete and continuous domains. Specifically, we use a model of the environment to obtain embeddings for states and actions and present a generic architecture that leverages these to learn a policy. In this way, the embedded representations obtained via our approach enable better generalization over both states and actions by capturing similarities in the embedding spaces. Evaluations of our approach on several gaming, robotic control, and recommender systems show it significantly outperforms state-of-the-art models in both discrete/continuous domains with large state/action spaces, thus confirming its efficacy.
summary: While reinforcement learning has achieved considerable successes in recent years, state-of-the-art models are often still limited by the size of state and action spaces. Model-free reinforcement learning approaches use some form of state representations and the latest work has explored embedding techniques for actions, both with the aim of achieving better generalization and applicability. However, these approaches consider only states or actions, ignoring the interaction between them when generating embedded representations. In this work, we establish the theoretical foundations for the validity of training a reinforcement learning agent using embedded states and actions. We then propose a new approach for jointly learning embeddings for states and actions that combines aspects of model-free and model-based reinforcement learning, which can be applied in both discrete and continuous domains. Specifically, we use a model of the environment to obtain embeddings for states and actions and present a generic architecture that leverages these to learn a policy. In this way, the embedded representations obtained via our approach enable better generalization over both states and actions by capturing similarities in the embedding spaces. Evaluations of our approach on several gaming, robotic control, and recommender systems show it significantly outperforms state-of-the-art models in both discrete/continuous domains with large state/action spaces, thus confirming its efficacy.
abstract_zh: 尽管强化学习近年来取得了相当大的成功，但最先进的模型通常仍然受到状态和动作空间大小的限制。无模型强化学习方法使用某种形式的状态表示，最新的工作探索了动作的嵌入技术，两者的目的都是为了实现更好的泛化性和适用性。然而，这些方法只考虑状态或动作，在生成嵌入表示时忽略它们之间的交互。在这项工作中，我们为使用嵌入状态和动作训练强化学习代理的有效性奠定了理论基础。然后，我们提出了一种联合学习状态和动作嵌入的新方法，该方法结合了无模型和基于模型的强化学习的各个方面，可以应用于离散和连续领域。具体来说，我们使用环境模型来获取状态和操作的嵌入，并提出一个利用这些来学习策略的通用架构。通过这种方式，通过我们的方法获得的嵌入表示可以通过捕获嵌入空间中的相似性来更好地概括状态和动作。对我们的方法在多个游戏、机器人控制和推荐系统上的评估表明，它在具有大状态/动作空间的离散/连续域中显着优于最先进的模型，从而证实了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合学习状态-动作嵌入的强化学习方法，以解决大规模状态和动作空间的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法单独处理状态或动作嵌入，忽视了状态与动作间的交互关系，限制了在大空间场景下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 结合模型自由与模型基于方法，通过环境模型生成状态-动作嵌入，并设计通用架构利用嵌入空间相似性学习策略。
AI.result: 在游戏、机器人控制和推荐系统任务中，该方法在离散/连续域均显著优于现有先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 联合嵌入方法通过捕捉状态-动作关联性，有效提升了强化学习在大规模空间中的性能。
