search_text: Jointly-Learned State-Action Embedding for Efficient Reinforcement Learning 用于高效强化学习的联合学习状态动作嵌入 While reinforcement learning has achieved considerable successes in recent years, state-of-the-art models are often still limited by the size of state and action spaces. Model-free reinforcement learning approaches use some form of state representations and the latest work has explored embedding techniques for actions, both with the aim of achieving better generalization and applicability. However, these approaches consider only states or actions, ignoring the interaction between them when generating embedded representations. In this work, we establish the theoretical foundations for the validity of training a reinforcement learning agent using embedded states and actions. We then propose a new approach for jointly learning embeddings for states and actions that combines aspects of model-free and model-based reinforcement learning, which can be applied in both discrete and continuous domains. Specifically, we use a model of the environment to obtain embeddings for states and actions and present a generic architecture that leverages these to learn a policy. In this way, the embedded representations obtained via our approach enable better generalization over both states and actions by capturing similarities in the embedding spaces. Evaluations of our approach on several gaming, robotic control, and recommender systems show it significantly outperforms state-of-the-art models in both discrete/continuous domains with large state/action spaces, thus confirming its efficacy. 尽管强化学习近年来取得了相当大的成功，但最先进的模型通常仍然受到状态和动作空间大小的限制。无模型强化学习方法使用某种形式的状态表示，最新的工作探索了动作的嵌入技术，两者的目的都是为了实现更好的泛化性和适用性。然而，这些方法只考虑状态或动作，在生成嵌入表示时忽略它们之间的交互。在这项工作中，我们为使用嵌入状态和动作训练强化学习代理的有效性奠定了理论基础。然后，我们提出了一种联合学习状态和动作嵌入的新方法，该方法结合了无模型和基于模型的强化学习的各个方面，可以应用于离散和连续领域。具体来说，我们使用环境模型来获取状态和操作的嵌入，并提出一个利用这些来学习策略的通用架构。通过这种方式，通过我们的方法获得的嵌入表示可以通过捕获嵌入空间中的相似性来更好地概括状态和动作。对我们的方法在多个游戏、机器人控制和推荐系统上的评估表明，它在具有大状态/动作空间的离散/连续域中显着优于最先进的模型，从而证实了其有效性。 本文提出一种联合学习状态-动作嵌入的强化学习方法，以解决大规模状态和动作空间的效率问题。 Paul J. Pritz,Liang Ma,Kin K. Leung cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Learning Value Functions in Deep Policy Gradients using Residual Variance
title_zh: 使用残差学习深度策略梯度中的价值函数
abstract: Policy gradient algorithms have proven to be successful in diverse decision making and control tasks. However, these methods suffer from high sample complexity and instability issues. In this paper, we address these challenges by providing a different approach for training the critic in the actor-critic framework. Our work builds on recent studies indicating that traditional actor-critic algorithms do not succeed in fitting the true value function, calling for the need to identify a better objective for the critic. In our method, the critic uses a new state-value (resp. state-action-value) function approximation that learns the value of the states (resp. state-action pairs) relative to their mean value rather than the absolute value as in conventional actor-critic. We prove the theoretical consistency of the new gradient estimator and observe dramatic empirical improvement across a variety of continuous control tasks and algorithms. Furthermore, we validate our method in tasks with sparse rewards, where we provide experimental evidence and theoretical insights.
summary: Policy gradient algorithms have proven to be successful in diverse decision making and control tasks. However, these methods suffer from high sample complexity and instability issues. In this paper, we address these challenges by providing a different approach for training the critic in the actor-critic framework. Our work builds on recent studies indicating that traditional actor-critic algorithms do not succeed in fitting the true value function, calling for the need to identify a better objective for the critic. In our method, the critic uses a new state-value (resp. state-action-value) function approximation that learns the value of the states (resp. state-action pairs) relative to their mean value rather than the absolute value as in conventional actor-critic. We prove the theoretical consistency of the new gradient estimator and observe dramatic empirical improvement across a variety of continuous control tasks and algorithms. Furthermore, we validate our method in tasks with sparse rewards, where we provide experimental evidence and theoretical insights.
abstract_zh: 策略梯度算法已被证明在各种决策和控制任务中都是成功的。然而，这些方法存在样本复杂度高和不稳定的问题。在本文中，我们通过提供一种不同的方法来在演员批评家框架中培训批评家来应对这些挑战。我们的工作建立在最近的研究基础上，该研究表明传统的演员批评家算法无法成功拟合真实的价值函数，因此需要为批评家确定更好的目标。在我们的方法中，批评者使用一种新的状态值（或状态动作值）函数近似来学习状态（或状态动作对）相对于其平均值的值，而不是像传统的演员批评者那样使用绝对值。我们证明了新梯度估计器的理论一致性，并观察到各种连续控制任务和算法的显着经验改进。此外，我们在奖励稀疏的任务中验证了我们的方法，并提供了实验证据和理论见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于残差方差的新方法，用于改进深度策略梯度中价值函数的学习，以解决传统actor-critic框架的样本复杂度高和不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 传统actor-critic算法难以准确拟合真实价值函数，导致高样本复杂度和训练不稳定性，需寻找更优的critic目标函数。
AI.method: 设计新的状态价值/状态-动作价值函数近似方法，通过学习状态/动作对相对于其均值的残差方差，而非传统绝对值目标。
AI.result: 理论证明新梯度估计器的一致性，并在多个连续控制任务及稀疏奖励场景中实现显著性能提升，同时提供实验与理论验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统算法的缺陷，在多种任务中表现出更优的稳定性和样本效率，具有理论与实践价值。

title: Tuning Convolutional Spiking Neural Network with Biologically-plausible Reward Propagation
title_zh: 用生物学上合理的奖励传播来调整卷积尖峰神经网络
comment: Final Version. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: Final Version. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) contain more biologically realistic structures and biologically-inspired learning principles than those in standard Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). SNNs are considered the third generation of ANNs, powerful on the robust computation with a low computational cost. The neurons in SNNs are non-differential, containing decayed historical states and generating event-based spikes after their states reaching the firing threshold. These dynamic characteristics of SNNs make it difficult to be directly trained with the standard backpropagation (BP), which is also considered not biologically plausible. In this paper, a Biologically-plausible Reward Propagation (BRP) algorithm is proposed and applied to the SNN architecture with both spiking-convolution (with both 1D and 2D convolutional kernels) and full-connection layers. Unlike the standard BP that propagates error signals from post to presynaptic neurons layer by layer, the BRP propagates target labels instead of errors directly from the output layer to all pre-hidden layers. This effort is more consistent with the top-down reward-guiding learning in cortical columns of the neocortex. Synaptic modifications with only local gradient differences are induced with pseudo-BP that might also be replaced with the Spike-Timing Dependent Plasticity (STDP). The performance of the proposed BRP-SNN is further verified on the spatial (including MNIST and Cifar-10) and temporal (including TIDigits and DvsGesture) tasks, where the SNN using BRP has reached a similar accuracy compared to other state-of-the-art BP-based SNNs and saved 50% more computational cost than ANNs. We think the introduction of biologically plausible learning rules to the training procedure of biologically realistic SNNs will give us more hints and inspirations toward a better understanding of the biological system's intelligent nature.

The performance of the proposed BRP-SNN is further verified on the spatial (including MNIST and Cifar-10) and temporal (including TIDigits and DvsGesture) tasks, where the SNN using BRP has reached a similar accuracy compared to other state-of-the-art BP-based SNNs and saved 50% more computational cost than ANNs. abstract_zh: 与标准人工神经网络 (ANN) 相比，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 包含更多的生物学现实结构和受生物学启发的学习原理。 SNN 被认为是第三代 ANN，具有强大的鲁棒计算能力和较低的计算成本。 SNN 中的神经元是非差分的，包含衰退的历史状态，并在其状态达到触发阈值后生成基于事件的尖峰。 SNN 的这些动态特性使得很难用标准反向传播 (BP) 直接进行训练，这在生物学上也被认为是不合理的。本文提出了一种生物学上合理的奖励传播 (BRP) 算法，并将其应用于具有尖峰卷积（具有 1D 和 2D 卷积核）和全连接层的 SNN 架构。与将误差信号从后神经元逐层传播到突触前神经元的标准 BP 不同，BRP 直接将目标标签而不是误差从输出层传播到所有预隐藏层。这种努力与新皮质的皮质柱中自上而下的奖励引导学习更加一致。仅具有局部梯度差异的突触修饰是用伪 BP 诱导的，也可以用尖峰时序依赖性可塑性 (STDP) 代替。所提出的 BRP-SNN 的性能在空间（包括 MNIST 和 Cifar-10）和时间（包括 TIDigits 和 DvsGesture）任务上得到进一步验证，其中使用 BRP 的 SNN 与其他最先进的基于 BP 的 SNN 相比达到了相似的精度，并且比 ANN 节省了 50% 的计算成本。我们认为，将生物学上合理的学习规则引入到生物学上真实的 SNN 的训练过程中，将为我们更好地理解生物系统的智能本质提供更多的提示和启发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物可解释奖励传播（BRP）算法的卷积脉冲神经网络（SNN）训练方法，通过直接传播目标标签而非误差信号，提升SNN的训练效率与生物合理性。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播（BP）算法因非生物合理性且难以直接应用于非微分特性的SNN而受限，需探索更符合生物学习机制的训练方法以提升SNN性能。
AI.method: 设计BRP算法，通过输出层向所有前层直接传播目标标签，结合伪BP或脉冲时序依赖可塑性（STDP）实现局部梯度调整，并应用于含1D/2D卷积核与全连接层的SNN架构。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Cifar-10、TIDigits和DvsGesture数据集上，BRP-SNN达到与现有BP-SNN相当的精度，同时计算成本较ANN降低50%。
AI.conclusion: 引入生物可解释学习规则可为理解生物系统的智能本质提供新思路，BRP算法为SNN的高效训练提供了可行方案。

Synaptic modifications with only local gradient differences are induced with pseudo-BP that might also be replaced with the Spike-Timing Dependent Plasticity (STDP). The performance of the proposed BRP-SNN is further verified on the spatial (including MNIST and Cifar-10) and temporal (including TIDigits and DvsGesture) tasks, where the SNN using BRP has reached a similar accuracy compared to other state-of-the-art BP-based SNNs and saved 50% more computational cost than ANNs. We think the introduction of biologically plausible learning rules to the training procedure of biologically realistic SNNs will give us more hints and inspirations toward a better understanding of the biological system's intelligent nature. 与标准人工神经网络 (ANN) 相比，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 包含更多的生物学现实结构和受生物学启发的学习原理。 SNN 被认为是第三代 ANN，具有强大的鲁棒计算能力和较低的计算成本。 SNN 中的神经元是非差分的，包含衰退的历史状态，并在其状态达到触发阈值后生成基于事件的尖峰。 SNN 的这些动态特性使得很难用标准反向传播 (BP) 直接进行训练，这在生物学上也被认为是不合理的。本文提出了一种生物学上合理的奖励传播 (BRP) 算法，并将其应用于具有尖峰卷积（具有 1D 和 2D 卷积核）和全连接层的 SNN 架构。与将误差信号从后神经元逐层传播到突触前神经元的标准 BP 不同，BRP 直接将目标标签而不是误差从输出层传播到所有预隐藏层。这种努力与新皮质的皮质柱中自上而下的奖励引导学习更加一致。仅具有局部梯度差异的突触修饰是用伪 BP 诱导的，也可以用尖峰时序依赖性可塑性 (STDP) 代替。所提出的 BRP-SNN 的性能在空间（包括 MNIST 和 Cifar-10）和时间（包括 TIDigits 和 DvsGesture）任务上得到进一步验证，其中使用 BRP 的 SNN 与其他最先进的基于 BP 的 SNN 相比达到了相似的精度，并且比 ANN 节省了 50% 的计算成本。我们认为，将生物学上合理的学习规则引入到生物学上真实的 SNN 的训练过程中，将为我们更好地理解生物系统的智能本质提供更多的提示和启发。 本文提出一种基于生物可解释奖励传播（BRP）算法的卷积脉冲神经网络（SNN）训练方法，通过直接传播目标标签而非误差信号，提升SNN的训练效率与生物合理性。 Tielin Zhang,Shuncheng Jia,Xiang Cheng,Bo Xu cs.NE,cs.AI

title: Large-scale randomized experiment reveals machine learning helps people learn and remember more effectively
title_zh: 大规模随机实验表明机器学习可以帮助人们更有效地学习和记忆
abstract: Machine learning has typically focused on developing models and algorithms that would ultimately replace humans at tasks where intelligence is required. In this work, rather than replacing humans, we focus on unveiling the potential of machine learning to improve how people learn and remember factual material. To this end, we perform a large-scale randomized controlled trial with thousands of learners from a popular learning app in the area of mobility. After controlling for the length and frequency of study, we find that learners whose study sessions are optimized using machine learning remember the content over $\sim$67% longer than those whose study sessions are generated using two alternative heuristics. Our randomized controlled trial also reveals that the learners whose study sessions are optimized using machine learning are $\sim$50% more likely to return to the app within 4-7 days.
summary: Machine learning has typically focused on developing models and algorithms that would ultimately replace humans at tasks where intelligence is required. In this work, rather than replacing humans, we focus on unveiling the potential of machine learning to improve how people learn and remember factual material. To this end, we perform a large-scale randomized controlled trial with thousands of learners from a popular learning app in the area of mobility. After controlling for the length and frequency of study, we find that learners whose study sessions are optimized using machine learning remember the content over $\sim$67% longer than those whose study sessions are generated using two alternative heuristics. Our randomized controlled trial also reveals that the learners whose study sessions are optimized using machine learning are $\sim$50% more likely to return to the app within 4-7 days.
abstract_zh: 机器学习通常专注于开发模型和算法，最终在需要智能的任务中取代人类。在这项工作中，我们不是要取代人类，而是专注于揭示机器学习的潜力，以改善人们学习和记忆事实材料的方式。为此，我们对来自移动领域流行学习应用程序的数千名学习者进行了大规模随机对照试验。在控制学习的长度和频率后，我们发现使用机器学习优化学习课程的学习者比使用两种替代启发式生成学习课程的学习者记住内容的时间长 $\sim$67% 以上。我们的随机对照试验还表明，使用机器学习优化学习课程的学习者在 4-7 天内返回应用程序的可能性增加 $\sim$50%。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过大规模随机对照实验验证机器学习在优化学习过程和提升记忆效果方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习侧重于替代人类完成智能任务，而本文旨在探索机器学习如何辅助人类更高效地学习和记忆知识。
AI.method: 在一款流行的学习应用中，对数千名学习者进行随机对照试验，比较机器学习优化的学习计划与两种启发式方法在学习时长、频率控制下的效果差异。
AI.result: 使用机器学习优化的学习者记忆内容的时间延长约67%，且在4-7天内返回应用的概率提高约50%。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习能够有效优化学习过程，显著提升知识留存率和用户参与度，为教育科技应用提供实证支持。

title: Baseline System of Voice Conversion Challenge 2020 with Cyclic Variational Autoencoder and Parallel WaveGAN
title_zh: 使用循环变分自动编码器和并行 WaveGAN 的 2020 年语音转换挑战赛的基线系统
abstract: In this paper, we present a description of the baseline system of Voice Conversion Challenge (VCC) 2020 with a cyclic variational autoencoder (CycleVAE) and Parallel WaveGAN (PWG), i.e., CycleVAEPWG. CycleVAE is a nonparallel VAE-based voice conversion that utilizes converted acoustic features to consider cyclically reconstructed spectra during optimization. On the other hand, PWG is a non-autoregressive neural vocoder that is based on a generative adversarial network for a high-quality and fast waveform generator. In practice, the CycleVAEPWG system can be straightforwardly developed with the VCC 2020 dataset using a unified model for both Task 1 (intralingual) and Task 2 (cross-lingual), where our open-source implementation is available at https://github.com/bigpon/vcc20_baseline_cyclevae. The results of VCC 2020 have demonstrated that the CycleVAEPWG baseline achieves the following: 1) a mean opinion score (MOS) of 2.87 in naturalness and a speaker similarity percentage (Sim) of 75.37% for Task 1, and 2) a MOS of 2.56 and a Sim of 56.46% for Task 2, showing an approximately or nearly average score for naturalness and an above average score for speaker similarity.
summary: In this paper, we present a description of the baseline system of Voice Conversion Challenge (VCC) 2020 with a cyclic variational autoencoder (CycleVAE) and Parallel WaveGAN (PWG), i.e., CycleVAEPWG. CycleVAE is a nonparallel VAE-based voice conversion that utilizes converted acoustic features to consider cyclically reconstructed spectra during optimization. On the other hand, PWG is a non-autoregressive neural vocoder that is based on a generative adversarial network for a high-quality and fast waveform generator. In practice, the CycleVAEPWG system can be straightforwardly developed with the VCC 2020 dataset using a unified model for both Task 1 (intralingual) and Task 2 (cross-lingual), where our open-source implementation is available at https://github.com/bigpon/vcc20_baseline_cyclevae. The results of VCC 2020 have demonstrated that the CycleVAEPWG baseline achieves the following: 1) a mean opinion score (MOS) of 2.87 in naturalness and a speaker similarity percentage (Sim) of 75.37% for Task 1, and 2) a MOS of 2.56 and a Sim of 56.46% for Task 2, showing an approximately or nearly average score for naturalness and an above average score for speaker similarity.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了 2020 年语音转换挑战赛 (VCC) 的基线系统，其中包含循环变分自动编码器 (CycleVAE) 和并行 WaveGAN (PWG)，即 CycleVAEPWG。 CycleVAE 是一种基于 VAE 的非并行语音转换，它利用转换后的声学特征在优化过程中考虑循环重建频谱。另一方面，PWG 是一种非自回归神经声码器，基于生成对抗网络，可实现高质量和快速的波形生成器。在实践中，CycleVAEPWG 系统可以使用 VCC 2020 数据集使用任务 1（语言内）和任务 2（跨语言）的统一模型直接开发，我们的开源实现可在 https://github.com/bigpon/vcc20_baseline_cyclevae 上找到。 VCC 2020 的结果表明，CycleVAEPWG 基线实现了以下目标：1) 任务 1 的自然度平均意见得分 (MOS) 为 2.87，说话者相似度百分比 (Sim) 为 75.37%；2) 任务 2 的 MOS 为 2.56，Sim 为 56.46%，显示自然度近似或接近平均得分，说话人相似度高于平均得分。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了基于循环变分自编码器（CycleVAE）和并行WaveGAN（PWG）的语音转换挑战赛2020基线系统CycleVAEPWG。
AI.motivation: 为语音转换任务提供一个简单有效的基线系统，支持跨语言和同语言任务，并通过开源实现促进研究。
AI.method: 结合CycleVAE（非平行语音转换模型）与PWG（非自回归神经声码器），使用统一模型处理VCC 2020的两个任务。
AI.result: Task 1自然度MOS 2.87，说话人相似度75.37%；Task 2自然度MOS 2.56，相似度56.46%，整体表现接近或优于平均水平。
AI.conclusion: CycleVAEPWG系统在语音转换任务中展现出有效性，开源实现为后续研究提供了参考基准。

authors_text: Yicheng Wu,Chengwei Pan,Shuqi Wang,Ming Zhang,Yong Xia,Yizhou Yu
title: Rethinking the Extraction and Interaction of Multi-Scale Features for Vessel Segmentation
title_zh: 重新思考血管分割的多尺度特征的提取和交互
abstract: Analyzing the morphological attributes of blood vessels plays a critical role in the computer-aided diagnosis of many cardiovascular and ophthalmologic diseases. Although being extensively studied, segmentation of blood vessels, particularly thin vessels and capillaries, remains challenging mainly due to the lack of an effective interaction between local and global features. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning model called PC-Net to segment retinal vessels and major arteries in 2D fundus image and 3D computed tomography angiography (CTA) scans, respectively. In PC-Net, the pyramid squeeze-and-excitation (PSE) module introduces spatial information to each convolutional block, boosting its ability to extract more effective multi-scale features, and the coarse-to-fine (CF) module replaces the conventional decoder to enhance the details of thin vessels and process hard-to-classify pixels again. We evaluated our PC-Net on the Digital Retinal Images for Vessel Extraction (DRIVE) database and an in-house 3D major artery (3MA) database against several recent methods. Our results not only demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed PSE module and CF module, but also suggest that our proposed PC-Net sets new state of the art in the segmentation of retinal vessels (AUC: 98.31%) and major arteries (AUC: 98.35%) on both databases, respectively.
summary: Analyzing the morphological attributes of blood vessels plays a critical role in the computer-aided diagnosis of many cardiovascular and ophthalmologic diseases. Although being extensively studied, segmentation of blood vessels, particularly thin vessels and capillaries, remains challenging mainly due to the lack of an effective interaction between local and global features. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning model called PC-Net to segment retinal vessels and major arteries in 2D fundus image and 3D computed tomography angiography (CTA) scans, respectively. In PC-Net, the pyramid squeeze-and-excitation (PSE) module introduces spatial information to each convolutional block, boosting its ability to extract more effective multi-scale features, and the coarse-to-fine (CF) module replaces the conventional decoder to enhance the details of thin vessels and process hard-to-classify pixels again. We evaluated our PC-Net on the Digital Retinal Images for Vessel Extraction (DRIVE) database and an in-house 3D major artery (3MA) database against several recent methods. Our results not only demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed PSE module and CF module, but also suggest that our proposed PC-Net sets new state of the art in the segmentation of retinal vessels (AUC: 98.31%) and major arteries (AUC: 98.35%) on both databases, respectively.
abstract_zh: 分析血管的形态属性在许多心血管和眼科疾病的计算机辅助诊断中起着至关重要的作用。尽管已被广泛研究，但血管（特别是细血管和毛细血管）的分割仍然具有挑战性，主要是由于局部特征和全局特征之间缺乏有效的相互作用。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 PC-Net 的新型深度学习模型，用于分别在 2D 眼底图像和 3D 计算机断层扫描血管造影 (CTA) 扫描中分割视网膜血管和主要动脉。在PC-Net中，金字塔挤压和激励（PSE）模块向每个卷积块引入空间信息，增强其提取更有效的多尺度特征的能力，粗到细（CF）模块取代传统解码器以增强细血管的细节并再次处理难以分类的像素。我们根据几种最新方法在用于血管提取的数字视网膜图像 (DRIVE) 数据库和内部 3D 大动脉 (3MA) 数据库上评估了我们的 PC-Net。我们的结果不仅证明了所提出的 PSE 模块和 CF 模块的有效性，而且还表明我们提出的 PC-Net 在两个数据库上分别在视网膜血管（AUC：98.31％）和主要动脉（AUC：98.35％）的分割方面树立了新的技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PC-Net的深度学习模型，用于分割视网膜血管和主要动脉，分别在2D眼底图像和3D CTA扫描中实现高精度分割。
AI.motivation: 尽管血管分割已被广泛研究，但薄血管和毛细血管的分割仍因局部与全局特征交互不足而面临挑战，需改进多尺度特征提取与交互机制。
AI.method: PC-Net包含两个核心模块：金字塔挤压激励（PSE）模块增强多尺度特征提取能力，粗到细（CF）模块优化薄血管细节并重新处理难分类像素。
AI.result: 在DRIVE和3MA数据集上，PC-Net分别达到视网膜血管（AUC:98.31%）和主要动脉（AUC:98.35%）分割的新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: PSE和CF模块的有效性得到验证，PC-Net在多尺度特征交互与细节优化方面显著提升了血管分割精度。

search_text: Rethinking the Extraction and Interaction of Multi-Scale Features for Vessel Segmentation 重新思考血管分割的多尺度特征的提取和交互 Analyzing the morphological attributes of blood vessels plays a critical role in the computer-aided diagnosis of many cardiovascular and ophthalmologic diseases. Although being extensively studied, segmentation of blood vessels, particularly thin vessels and capillaries, remains challenging mainly due to the lack of an effective interaction between local and global features. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning model called PC-Net to segment retinal vessels and major arteries in 2D fundus image and 3D computed tomography angiography (CTA) scans, respectively. In PC-Net, the pyramid squeeze-and-excitation (PSE) module introduces spatial information to each convolutional block, boosting its ability to extract more effective multi-scale features, and the coarse-to-fine (CF) module replaces the conventional decoder to enhance the details of thin vessels and process hard-to-classify pixels again. We evaluated our PC-Net on the Digital Retinal Images for Vessel Extraction (DRIVE) database and an in-house 3D major artery (3MA) database against several recent methods. Our results not only demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed PSE module and CF module, but also suggest that our proposed PC-Net sets new state of the art in the segmentation of retinal vessels (AUC: 98.31%) and major arteries (AUC: 98.35%) on both databases, respectively. 分析血管的形态属性在许多心血管和眼科疾病的计算机辅助诊断中起着至关重要的作用。尽管已被广泛研究，但血管（特别是细血管和毛细血管）的分割仍然具有挑战性，主要是由于局部特征和全局特征之间缺乏有效的相互作用。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 PC-Net 的新型深度学习模型，用于分别在 2D 眼底图像和 3D 计算机断层扫描血管造影 (CTA) 扫描中分割视网膜血管和主要动脉。在PC-Net中，金字塔挤压和激励（PSE）模块向每个卷积块引入空间信息，增强其提取更有效的多尺度特征的能力，粗到细（CF）模块取代传统解码器以增强细血管的细节并再次处理难以分类的像素。我们根据几种最新方法在用于血管提取的数字视网膜图像 (DRIVE) 数据库和内部 3D 大动脉 (3MA) 数据库上评估了我们的 PC-Net。我们的结果不仅证明了所提出的 PSE 模块和 CF 模块的有效性，而且还表明我们提出的 PC-Net 在两个数据库上分别在视网膜血管（AUC：98.31％）和主要动脉（AUC：98.35％）的分割方面树立了新的技术水平。 本文提出了一种名为PC-Net的深度学习模型，用于分割视网膜血管和主要动脉，分别在2D眼底图像和3D CTA扫描中实现高精度分割。 Yicheng Wu,Chengwei Pan,Shuqi Wang,Ming Zhang,Yong Xia,Yizhou Yu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Keondo Park,Wonyoung Jang,Woochul Lee,Kisung Nam,Kihong Seong,Kyuwook Chai,Wen-Syan Li
title: Real-time Mask Detection on Google Edge TPU
title_zh: Google Edge TPU 上的实时掩模检测
abstract: After the COVID-19 outbreak, it has become important to automatically detect whether people are wearing masks in order to reduce risk of front-line workers. In addition, processing user data locally is a great way to address both privacy and network bandwidth issues. In this paper, we present a light-weighted model for detecting whether people in a particular area wear masks, which can also be deployed on Coral Dev Board, a commercially available development board containing Google Edge TPU. Our approach combines the object detecting network based on MobileNetV2 plus SSD and the quantization scheme for integer-only hardware. As a result, the lighter model in the Edge TPU has a significantly lower latency which is more appropriate for real-time execution while maintaining accuracy comparable to a floating point device.
summary: After the COVID-19 outbreak, it has become important to automatically detect whether people are wearing masks in order to reduce risk of front-line workers. In addition, processing user data locally is a great way to address both privacy and network bandwidth issues. In this paper, we present a light-weighted model for detecting whether people in a particular area wear masks, which can also be deployed on Coral Dev Board, a commercially available development board containing Google Edge TPU. Our approach combines the object detecting network based on MobileNetV2 plus SSD and the quantization scheme for integer-only hardware. As a result, the lighter model in the Edge TPU has a significantly lower latency which is more appropriate for real-time execution while maintaining accuracy comparable to a floating point device.
abstract_zh: COVID-19爆发后，自动检测人们是否佩戴口罩以降低一线工作人员的风险变得非常重要。此外，在本地处理用户数据是解决隐私和网络带宽问题的好方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级模型，用于检测特定区域的人们是否佩戴口罩，该模型也可以部署在 Coral Dev Board（一种包含 Google Edge TPU 的商用开发板）上。我们的方法结合了基于 MobileNetV2 加 SSD 的目标检测网络和纯整数硬件的量化方案。因此，Edge TPU 中的较轻模型具有显着较低的延迟，更适合实时执行，同时保持与浮点设备相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 开发一种轻量级口罩检测模型，可在Google Edge TPU上实现实时部署。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情需要自动检测口罩佩戴情况以保护前线人员，同时本地数据处理可保障隐私并减少网络带宽压力。
AI.method: 结合基于MobileNetV2的SSD目标检测网络与整数型硬件量化方案，优化模型以适配Edge TPU。
AI.result: 模型在Edge TPU上实现显著降低的延迟，保持与浮点设备相近的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在边缘设备上有效平衡了实时性与检测精度，适用于需要低延迟的口罩检测场景。

authors_text: Sebastian R. van der Voort,Fatih Incekara,Maarten M. J. Wijnenga,Georgios Kapsas,Renske Gahrmann,Joost W. Schouten,Rishi Nandoe Tewarie,Geert J. Lycklama,Philip C. De Witt Hamer,Roelant S. Eijgelaar,Pim J. French,Hendrikus J. Dubbink,Arnaud J. P. E. Vincent,Wiro J. Niessen,Martin J. van den Bent,Marion Smits,Stefan Klein
title: WHO 2016 subtyping and automated segmentation of glioma using multi-task deep learning
title_zh: WHO 2016 使用多任务深度学习对神经胶质瘤进行亚型和自动分割
abstract: Accurate characterization of glioma is crucial for clinical decision making. A delineation of the tumor is also desirable in the initial decision stages but is a time-consuming task. Leveraging the latest GPU capabilities, we developed a single multi-task convolutional neural network that uses the full 3D, structural, pre-operative MRI scans to can predict the IDH mutation status, the 1p/19q co-deletion status, and the grade of a tumor, while simultaneously segmenting the tumor. We trained our method using the largest, most diverse patient cohort to date containing 1508 glioma patients from 16 institutes. We tested our method on an independent dataset of 240 patients from 13 different institutes, and achieved an IDH-AUC of 0.90, 1p/19q-AUC of 0.85, grade-AUC of 0.81, and a mean whole tumor DICE score of 0.84. Thus, our method non-invasively predicts multiple, clinically relevant parameters and generalizes well to the broader clinical population.
summary: Accurate characterization of glioma is crucial for clinical decision making. A delineation of the tumor is also desirable in the initial decision stages but is a time-consuming task. Leveraging the latest GPU capabilities, we developed a single multi-task convolutional neural network that uses the full 3D, structural, pre-operative MRI scans to can predict the IDH mutation status, the 1p/19q co-deletion status, and the grade of a tumor, while simultaneously segmenting the tumor. We trained our method using the largest, most diverse patient cohort to date containing 1508 glioma patients from 16 institutes. We tested our method on an independent dataset of 240 patients from 13 different institutes, and achieved an IDH-AUC of 0.90, 1p/19q-AUC of 0.85, grade-AUC of 0.81, and a mean whole tumor DICE score of 0.84. Thus, our method non-invasively predicts multiple, clinically relevant parameters and generalizes well to the broader clinical population.
abstract_zh: 神经胶质瘤的准确表征对于临床决策至关重要。在最初的决策阶段也需要勾画肿瘤，但这是一项耗时的任务。利用最新的 GPU 功能，我们开发了一个单一的多任务卷积神经网络，该网络使用完整的 3D、结构、术前 MRI 扫描来预测 IDH 突变状态、1p/19q 共缺失状态和肿瘤分级，同时对肿瘤进行分割。我们使用迄今为止最大、最多样化的患者队列来训练我们的方法，该队列包含来自 16 个研究所的 1508 名神经胶质瘤患者。我们在来自 13 个不同机构的 240 名患者的独立数据集上测试了我们的方法，并获得了 0.90 的 IDH-AUC、0.85 的 1p/19q-AUC、0.81 的 Grade-AUC 和 0.84 的平均整个肿瘤 DICE 评分。因此，我们的方法可非侵入性地预测多个临床相关参数，并能很好地推广到更广泛的临床人群。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多任务深度学习的胶质瘤亚型分类和自动分割方法，利用术前3D MRI扫描预测IDH突变状态、1p/19q共缺失状态、肿瘤分级并分割肿瘤。
AI.motivation: 胶质瘤的准确表征对临床决策至关重要，但手动分割肿瘤耗时且费力，亟需自动化解决方案以提高诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 开发了一个多任务卷积神经网络，整合3D结构MRI数据，同时预测分子分型（IDH、1p/19q）、肿瘤分级及分割肿瘤区域，并在1508例患者数据集上训练验证。
AI.result: 在独立测试集上达到IDH-AUC 0.90、1p/19q-AUC 0.85、分级-AUC 0.81，肿瘤分割DICE得分为0.84，显示方法具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该非侵入性方法可同时预测多维度临床参数，显著提升胶质瘤诊疗效率，为临床广泛适用提供了可靠的技术支持。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多任务深度学习的胶质瘤亚型分类和自动分割方法，利用术前3D MRI扫描预测IDH突变状态、1p/19q共缺失状态、肿瘤分级并分割肿瘤。
motivation: 胶质瘤的准确表征对临床决策至关重要，但手动分割肿瘤耗时且费力，亟需自动化解决方案以提高诊断效率和准确性。
method: 开发了一个多任务卷积神经网络，整合3D结构MRI数据，同时预测分子分型（IDH、1p/19q）、肿瘤分级及分割肿瘤区域，并在1508例患者数据集上训练验证。

conclusion: 该非侵入性方法可同时预测多维度临床参数，显著提升胶质瘤诊疗效率，为临床广泛适用提供了可靠的技术支持。
search_text: WHO 2016 subtyping and automated segmentation of glioma using multi-task deep learning WHO 2016 使用多任务深度学习对神经胶质瘤进行亚型和自动分割 Accurate characterization of glioma is crucial for clinical decision making. A delineation of the tumor is also desirable in the initial decision stages but is a time-consuming task. Leveraging the latest GPU capabilities, we developed a single multi-task convolutional neural network that uses the full 3D, structural, pre-operative MRI scans to can predict the IDH mutation status, the 1p/19q co-deletion status, and the grade of a tumor, while simultaneously segmenting the tumor. We trained our method using the largest, most diverse patient cohort to date containing 1508 glioma patients from 16 institutes. We tested our method on an independent dataset of 240 patients from 13 different institutes, and achieved an IDH-AUC of 0.90, 1p/19q-AUC of 0.85, grade-AUC of 0.81, and a mean whole tumor DICE score of 0.84. Thus, our method non-invasively predicts multiple, clinically relevant parameters and generalizes well to the broader clinical population. 神经胶质瘤的准确表征对于临床决策至关重要。在最初的决策阶段也需要勾画肿瘤，但这是一项耗时的任务。利用最新的 GPU 功能，我们开发了一个单一的多任务卷积神经网络，该网络使用完整的 3D、结构、术前 MRI 扫描来预测 IDH 突变状态、1p/19q 共缺失状态和肿瘤分级，同时对肿瘤进行分割。我们使用迄今为止最大、最多样化的患者队列来训练我们的方法，该队列包含来自 16 个研究所的 1508 名神经胶质瘤患者。我们在来自 13 个不同机构的 240 名患者的独立数据集上测试了我们的方法，并获得了 0.90 的 IDH-AUC、0.85 的 1p/19q-AUC、0.81 的 Grade-AUC 和 0.84 的平均整个肿瘤 DICE 评分。因此，我们的方法可非侵入性地预测多个临床相关参数，并能很好地推广到更广泛的临床人群。 本文提出了一种基于多任务深度学习的胶质瘤亚型分类和自动分割方法，利用术前3D MRI扫描预测IDH突变状态、1p/19q共缺失状态、肿瘤分级并分割肿瘤。 Sebastian R. van der Voort,Fatih Incekara,Maarten M. J. Wijnenga,Georgios Kapsas,Renske Gahrmann,Joost W. Schouten,Rishi Nandoe Tewarie,Geert J. Lycklama,Philip C. De Witt Hamer,Roelant S. Eijgelaar,Pim J. French,Hendrikus J. Dubbink,Arnaud J. P. E. Vincent,Wiro J. Niessen,Martin J. van den Bent,Marion Smits,Stefan Klein eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jia-Yi Chang,Yan-Feng Lu,Ya-Jun Liu,Bo Zhou,Hong Qiao
title: Long-distance tiny face detection based on enhanced YOLOv3 for unmanned system
title_zh: 基于增强型YOLOv3的无人系统远距离微小人脸检测
abstract: Remote tiny face detection applied in unmanned system is a challeng-ing work. The detector cannot obtain sufficient context semantic information due to the relatively long distance. The received poor fine-grained features make the face detection less accurate and robust. To solve the problem of long-distance detection of tiny faces, we propose an enhanced network model (YOLOv3-C) based on the YOLOv3 algorithm for unmanned platform. In this model, we bring in multi-scale features from feature pyramid networks and make the features fu-sion to adjust prediction feature map of the output, which improves the sensitivity of the entire algorithm for tiny target faces. The enhanced model improves the accuracy of tiny face detection in the cases of long-distance and high-density crowds. The experimental evaluation results demonstrated the superior perfor-mance of the proposed YOLOv3-C in comparison with other relevant detectors in remote tiny face detection. It is worth mentioning that our proposed method achieves comparable performance with the state of the art YOLOv4[1] in the tiny face detection tasks.
summary: Remote tiny face detection applied in unmanned system is a challeng-ing work. The detector cannot obtain sufficient context semantic information due to the relatively long distance. The received poor fine-grained features make the face detection less accurate and robust. To solve the problem of long-distance detection of tiny faces, we propose an enhanced network model (YOLOv3-C) based on the YOLOv3 algorithm for unmanned platform. In this model, we bring in multi-scale features from feature pyramid networks and make the features fu-sion to adjust prediction feature map of the output, which improves the sensitivity of the entire algorithm for tiny target faces. The enhanced model improves the accuracy of tiny face detection in the cases of long-distance and high-density crowds. The experimental evaluation results demonstrated the superior perfor-mance of the proposed YOLOv3-C in comparison with other relevant detectors in remote tiny face detection. It is worth mentioning that our proposed method achieves comparable performance with the state of the art YOLOv4[1] in the tiny face detection tasks.
abstract_zh: 应用于无人系统的远程微小人脸检测是一项具有挑战性的工作。由于距离相对较长，检测器无法获得足够的上下文语义信息。接收到的细粒度特征较差，使得人脸检测不太准确和鲁棒。为了解决远距离微小人脸检测问题，我们提出了一种基于无人平台YOLOv3算法的增强网络模型（YOLOv3-C）。在该模型中，我们从特征金字塔网络中引入多尺度特征，并进行特征融合来调整输出的预测特征图，从而提高了整个算法对微小目标人脸的灵敏度。增强后的模型提高了远距离、高密度人群情况下微小人脸检测的准确性。实验评估结果表明，与其他相关检测器相比，所提出的YOLOv3-C在远程微小人脸检测中具有优越的性能。值得一提的是，我们提出的方法在微小人脸检测任务中实现了与最先进的 YOLOv4[1] 相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进YOLOv3算法的远程微小人脸检测方法，用于无人机系统。
AI.motivation: 远程微小人脸检测在无人机系统中具有挑战性，由于距离较远，检测器无法获取足够的上下文语义信息，导致检测精度和鲁棒性降低。
AI.method: 本文引入了特征金字塔网络的多尺度特征，并通过特征融合调整输出预测特征图，以提高算法对微小目标人脸的敏感性。
AI.result: 实验评估结果表明，所提出的YOLOv3-C模型在远程微小人脸检测任务中优于其他相关检测器，并且性能与最先进的YOLOv4相当。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的改进方法在长距离和高密度人群场景下显著提升了微小人脸检测的准确性。

authors_text: Yao Li,Xianggang Yu,Xiaoguang Han,Nianjuan Jiang,Kui Jia,Jiangbo Lu
title: A deep learning based interactive sketching system for fashion images design
title_zh: 基于深度学习的时装图像设计交互式草图系统
abstract: In this work, we propose an interactive system to design diverse high-quality garment images from fashion sketches and the texture information. The major challenge behind this system is to generate high-quality and detailed texture according to the user-provided texture information. Prior works mainly use the texture patch representation and try to map a small texture patch to a whole garment image, hence unable to generate high-quality details. In contrast, inspired by intrinsic image decomposition, we decompose this task into texture synthesis and shading enhancement. In particular, we propose a novel bi-colored edge texture representation to synthesize textured garment images and a shading enhancer to render shading based on the grayscale edges. The bi-colored edge representation provides simple but effective texture cues and color constraints, so that the details can be better reconstructed. Moreover, with the rendered shading, the synthesized garment image becomes more vivid.
summary: In this work, we propose an interactive system to design diverse high-quality garment images from fashion sketches and the texture information. The major challenge behind this system is to generate high-quality and detailed texture according to the user-provided texture information. Prior works mainly use the texture patch representation and try to map a small texture patch to a whole garment image, hence unable to generate high-quality details. In contrast, inspired by intrinsic image decomposition, we decompose this task into texture synthesis and shading enhancement. In particular, we propose a novel bi-colored edge texture representation to synthesize textured garment images and a shading enhancer to render shading based on the grayscale edges. The bi-colored edge representation provides simple but effective texture cues and color constraints, so that the details can be better reconstructed. Moreover, with the rendered shading, the synthesized garment image becomes more vivid.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个交互式系统，可以根据时装草图和纹理信息设计各种高质量的服装图像。该系统背后的主要挑战是根据用户提供的纹理信息生成高质量且详细的纹理。先前的工作主要使用纹理块表示并尝试将小的纹理块映射到整个服装图像，因此无法生成高质量的细节。相反，受内在图像分解的启发，我们将此任务分解为纹理合成和阴影增强。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的双色边缘纹理表示来合成纹理服装图像，并提出了一种着色增强器来基于灰度边缘渲染着色。双色边缘表示提供了简单但有效的纹理线索和颜色约束，以便可以更好地重建细节。而且，通过渲染的阴影，合成的服装图像变得更加生动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的交互式系统，用于从时尚草图和纹理信息生成高质量的服装图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过纹理块映射生成服装图像，难以生成高质量细节，需改进纹理合成与阴影渲染技术以提升图像真实感。
AI.method: 受内在图像分解启发，将任务分解为纹理合成与阴影增强，提出双色边纹理表示法和基于灰度边缘的阴影增强器。
AI.result: 生成的服装图像细节更丰富，视觉效果更生动，优于传统纹理块映射方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过双色边表示与阴影增强有效提升了服装图像生成的质量与细节表现力。

title: Fair and Representative Subset Selection from Data Streams
title_zh: 从数据流中公平且有代表性的子集选择
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, to appear in the Web conference 2021 (WWW '21)
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, to appear in the Web conference 2021 (WWW '21)
abstract: We study the problem of extracting a small subset of representative items from a large data stream. In many data mining and machine learning applications such as social network analysis and recommender systems, this problem can be formulated as maximizing a monotone submodular function subject to a cardinality constraint $k$. In this work, we consider the setting where data items in the stream belong to one of several disjoint groups and investigate the optimization problem with an additional \emph{fairness} constraint that limits selection to a given number of items from each group. We then propose efficient algorithms for the fairness-aware variant of the streaming submodular maximization problem. In particular, we first give a $ (\frac{1}{2}-\varepsilon) $-approximation algorithm that requires $ O(\frac{1}{\varepsilon} \log \frac{k}{\varepsilon}) $ passes over the stream for any constant $ \varepsilon>0 $. Moreover, we give a single-pass streaming algorithm that has the same approximation ratio of $(\frac{1}{2}-\varepsilon)$ when unlimited buffer sizes and post-processing time are permitted, and discuss how to adapt it to more practical settings where the buffer sizes are bounded. Finally, we demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our proposed algorithms on two real-world applications, namely \emph{maximum coverage on large graphs} and \emph{personalized recommendation}.
summary: We study the problem of extracting a small subset of representative items from a large data stream. In many data mining and machine learning applications such as social network analysis and recommender systems, this problem can be formulated as maximizing a monotone submodular function subject to a cardinality constraint $k$. In this work, we consider the setting where data items in the stream belong to one of several disjoint groups and investigate the optimization problem with an additional \emph{fairness} constraint that limits selection to a given number of items from each group. We then propose efficient algorithms for the fairness-aware variant of the streaming submodular maximization problem. In particular, we first give a $ (\frac{1}{2}-\varepsilon) $-approximation algorithm that requires $ O(\frac{1}{\varepsilon} \log \frac{k}{\varepsilon}) $ passes over the stream for any constant $ \varepsilon>0 $. Moreover, we give a single-pass streaming algorithm that has the same approximation ratio of $(\frac{1}{2}-\varepsilon)$ when unlimited buffer sizes and post-processing time are permitted, and discuss how to adapt it to more practical settings where the buffer sizes are bounded. Finally, we demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our proposed algorithms on two real-world applications, namely \emph{maximum coverage on large graphs} and \emph{personalized recommendation}.
abstract_zh: 我们研究从大数据流中提取一小部分代表性项目的问题。在许多数据挖掘和机器学习应用（例如社交网络分析和推荐系统）中，这个问题可以表述为最大化受基数约束 $k$ 影响的单调子模函数。在这项工作中，我们考虑流中的数据项属于几个不相交组之一的设置，并使用附加的 \emph{fairness} 约束来研究优化问题，该约束将选择限制为每个组中给定数量的项目。然后，我们为流子模最大化问题的公平感知变体提出了有效的算法。特别地，我们首先给出一个 $ (\frac{1}{2}-\varepsilon) $ 近似算法，该算法需要 $ O(\frac{1}{\varepsilon} \log \frac{k}{\varepsilon}) $ 对于任何常量 $ \varepsilon>0 $ 传递流。此外，我们给出了一种单通道流算法，当允许无限的缓冲区大小和后处理时间时，该算法具有相同的近似率 $(\frac{1}{2}-\varepsilon)$，并讨论如何使其适应缓冲区大小有限的更实际的设置。最后，我们在两个实际应用中证明了我们提出的算法的效率和有效性，即\emph{大图上的最大覆盖}和\emph{个性化推荐}。

AI.motivation: 在社交网络分析和推荐系统等应用中，需要从大规模数据流中选择代表性样本，但传统方法可能忽视群体间的公平性，导致选择偏差。

AI.result: 在最大覆盖图和个性化推荐两个实际场景中验证了算法的高效性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为流式子模函数最大化问题提供了兼顾公平性与效率的解决方案，适用于实际应用场景。

title: Generating Novel Glyph without Human Data by Learning to Communicate
title_zh: 通过学习交流生成新颖的字形，无需人类数据
comment: To appear at 4th Workshop on Machine Learning for Creativity and Design at NeurIPS 2020; 6 pages with 4 figures and 1 table
comments: To appear at 4th Workshop on Machine Learning for Creativity and Design at NeurIPS 2020; 6 pages with 4 figures and 1 table
abstract: In this paper, we present Neural Glyph, a system that generates novel glyph without any training data. The generator and the classifier are trained to communicate via visual symbols as a medium, which enforces the generator to come up with a set of distinctive symbols. Our method results in glyphs that resemble the human-made glyphs, which may imply that the visual appearances of existing glyphs can be attributed to constraints of communication via writing. Important tricks that enable this framework are described and the code is made available.
summary: In this paper, we present Neural Glyph, a system that generates novel glyph without any training data. The generator and the classifier are trained to communicate via visual symbols as a medium, which enforces the generator to come up with a set of distinctive symbols. Our method results in glyphs that resemble the human-made glyphs, which may imply that the visual appearances of existing glyphs can be attributed to constraints of communication via writing. Important tricks that enable this framework are described and the code is made available.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Neural Glyph，一个无需任何训练数据即可生成新颖字形的系统。生成器和分类器经过训练，通过视觉符号作为媒介进行通信，这迫使生成器提出一组独特的符号。我们的方法产生的字形类似于人造字形，这可能意味着现有字形的视觉外观可以归因于通过书写进行通信的限制。描述了启用该框架的重要技巧并提供了代码。

AI.motivation: 传统符号生成依赖人类数据，且现有符号可能受交流约束影响，因此尝试无需人类数据生成符号并验证交流约束的影响
AI.method: 采用生成器与分类器对抗训练，通过视觉符号交流生成独特符号，无需人类数据
AI.result: 生成的符号与人类设计的符号相似，验证了交流约束对符号设计的影响
AI.conclusion: 符号的视觉特征可能源于交流约束，无需人类数据即可生成有效符号

authors_text: Mehdi Benallegue,Rafael Cisneros,Abdelaziz Benallegue,Yacine Chitour,Mitsuharu Morisawa,Fumio Kanehiro
title: Lyapunov-Stable Orientation Estimator for Humanoid Robots
title_zh: 仿人机器人的李亚普诺夫稳定方向估计器
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, IEEE 2020, 5 (4), pp.6371-6378
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, IEEE 2020, 5 (4), pp.6371-6378
abstract: In this paper, we present an observation scheme, with proven Lyapunov stability, for estimating a humanoid's floating base orientation. The idea is to use velocity aided attitude estimation, which requires to know the velocity of the system. This velocity can be obtained by taking into account the kinematic data provided by contact information with the environment and using the IMU and joint encoders. We demonstrate how this operation can be used in the case of a fixed or a moving contact, allowing it to be employed for locomotion. We show how to use this velocity estimation within a selected two-stage state tilt estimator: (i) the first which has a global and quick convergence (ii) and the second which has smooth and robust dynamics. We provide new specific proofs of almost global Lyapunov asymptotic stability and local exponential convergence for this observer. Finally, we assess its performance by employing a comparative simulation and by using it within a closed-loop stabilization scheme for HRP-5P and HRP-2KAI robots performing whole-body kinematic tasks and locomotion.
summary: In this paper, we present an observation scheme, with proven Lyapunov stability, for estimating a humanoid's floating base orientation. The idea is to use velocity aided attitude estimation, which requires to know the velocity of the system. This velocity can be obtained by taking into account the kinematic data provided by contact information with the environment and using the IMU and joint encoders. We demonstrate how this operation can be used in the case of a fixed or a moving contact, allowing it to be employed for locomotion. We show how to use this velocity estimation within a selected two-stage state tilt estimator: (i) the first which has a global and quick convergence (ii) and the second which has smooth and robust dynamics. We provide new specific proofs of almost global Lyapunov asymptotic stability and local exponential convergence for this observer. Finally, we assess its performance by employing a comparative simulation and by using it within a closed-loop stabilization scheme for HRP-5P and HRP-2KAI robots performing whole-body kinematic tasks and locomotion.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种观察方案，具有经过验证的李亚普诺夫稳定性，用于估计人形机器人的浮动基础方向。这个想法是使用速度辅助姿态估计，这需要知道系统的速度。该速度可以通过考虑与环境的接触信息提供的运动学数据并使用 IMU 和关节编码器来获得。我们演示了如何在固定或移动触点的情况下使用此操作，从而使其能够用于移动。我们展示了如何在选定的两级状态倾斜估计器中使用这种速度估计：（i）第一个具有全局和快速收敛（ii），第二个具有平滑和鲁棒的动力学。我们为该观察者提供了几乎全局李雅普诺夫渐近稳定性和局部指数收敛的新具体证明。最后，我们通过比较模拟并将其用于执行全身运动任务和运动的 HRP-5P 和 HRP-2KAI 机器人的闭环稳定方案来评估其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于李雅普诺夫稳定性的双阶段姿态估计方法，用于人形机器人浮动基座的定向估计。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在动态运动中需要高精度的定向估计，传统方法在复杂接触场景下存在稳定性不足的问题。
AI.method: 结合IMU、关节编码器和接触信息进行速度估计，设计包含快速全局收敛阶段和光滑鲁棒阶段的双阶段观测器，并提供稳定性证明。
AI.result: 通过仿真实验和HRP-5P/HRP-2KAI机器人闭环控制验证，证明方法在全身运动和行走任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该观测器实现了几乎全局渐近稳定性和局部指数收敛，为复杂地形下的机器人运动控制提供了可靠解决方案。

We show how to use this velocity estimation within a selected two-stage state tilt estimator: (i) the first which has a global and quick convergence (ii) and the second which has smooth and robust dynamics. We provide new specific proofs of almost global Lyapunov asymptotic stability and local exponential convergence for this observer. Finally, we assess its performance by employing a comparative simulation and by using it within a closed-loop stabilization scheme for HRP-5P and HRP-2KAI robots performing whole-body kinematic tasks and locomotion. 在本文中，我们提出了一种观察方案，具有经过验证的李亚普诺夫稳定性，用于估计人形机器人的浮动基础方向。这个想法是使用速度辅助姿态估计，这需要知道系统的速度。该速度可以通过考虑与环境的接触信息提供的运动学数据并使用 IMU 和关节编码器来获得。我们演示了如何在固定或移动触点的情况下使用此操作，从而使其能够用于移动。我们展示了如何在选定的两级状态倾斜估计器中使用这种速度估计：（i）第一个具有全局和快速收敛（ii），第二个具有平滑和鲁棒的动力学。我们为该观察者提供了几乎全局李雅普诺夫渐近稳定性和局部指数收敛的新具体证明。最后，我们通过比较模拟并将其用于执行全身运动任务和运动的 HRP-5P 和 HRP-2KAI 机器人的闭环稳定方案来评估其性能。 本文提出了一种基于李雅普诺夫稳定性的双阶段姿态估计方法，用于人形机器人浮动基座的定向估计。 Mehdi Benallegue,Rafael Cisneros,Abdelaziz Benallegue,Yacine Chitour,Mitsuharu Morisawa,Fumio Kanehiro cs.RO

title: Stand Up Indulgent Rendezvous
title_zh: 站起来放纵的约会
abstract: We consider two mobile oblivious robots that evolve in a continuous Euclidean space. We require the two robots to solve the rendezvous problem (meeting in finite time at the same location, not known beforehand) despite the possibility that one of those robots crashes unpredictably. The rendezvous is stand up indulgent in the sense that when a crash occurs, the correct robot must still meet the crashed robot on its last position. We characterize the system assumptions that enable problem solvability, and present a series of algorithms that solve the problem for the possible cases.
summary: We consider two mobile oblivious robots that evolve in a continuous Euclidean space. We require the two robots to solve the rendezvous problem (meeting in finite time at the same location, not known beforehand) despite the possibility that one of those robots crashes unpredictably. The rendezvous is stand up indulgent in the sense that when a crash occurs, the correct robot must still meet the crashed robot on its last position. We characterize the system assumptions that enable problem solvability, and present a series of algorithms that solve the problem for the possible cases.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑两个在连续欧几里得空间中进化的移动遗忘机器人。我们要求两个机器人解决交会问题（在有限时间内在同一地点会面，事先未知），尽管其中一个机器人可能会意外崩溃。交会是站立式的，当发生碰撞时，正确的机器人仍然必须在其最后位置与碰撞的机器人会合。我们描述了能够解决问题的系统假设，并提出了一系列算法来解决可能情况下的问题。

AI.tldr: 研究两个移动机器人如何在其中一个可能崩溃的情况下实现会面，要求正确机器人必须前往崩溃机器人的最后位置。
AI.motivation: 解决移动机器人系统中因不可预测的崩溃导致的会面问题，确保任务可靠性。
AI.method: 通过分析系统假设，设计适用于不同情况的算法，确保在崩溃情况下正确机器人能到达故障机器人的最后位置。
AI.result: 提出并验证了多种算法，证明在特定系统假设下问题可解，确保正确机器人能与崩溃机器人会面。
AI.conclusion: 系统假设是问题可解的关键，提出的算法有效解决了崩溃情况下的会面问题。

authors_text: Wenhao Yu,Chenguang Zhu,Zaitang Li,Zhiting Hu,Qingyun Wang,Heng Ji,Meng Jiang
title: A Survey of Knowledge-Enhanced Text Generation
title_zh: 知识增强文本生成调查
comment: Accepted by ACM Computing Survey (CSUR) in Jan 2022
comments: Accepted by ACM Computing Survey (CSUR) in Jan 2022
abstract: The goal of text generation is to make machines express in human language. It is one of the most important yet challenging tasks in natural language processing (NLP). Since 2014, various neural encoder-decoder models pioneered by Seq2Seq have been proposed to achieve the goal by learning to map input text to output text. However, the input text alone often provides limited knowledge to generate the desired output, so the performance of text generation is still far from satisfaction in many real-world scenarios. To address this issue, researchers have considered incorporating various forms of knowledge beyond the input text into the generation models. This research direction is known as knowledge-enhanced text generation. In this survey, we present a comprehensive review of the research on knowledge enhanced text generation over the past five years. The main content includes two parts: (i) general methods and architectures for integrating knowledge into text generation; (ii) specific techniques and applications according to different forms of knowledge data. This survey can have broad audiences, researchers and practitioners, in academia and industry.
summary: The goal of text generation is to make machines express in human language. It is one of the most important yet challenging tasks in natural language processing (NLP). Since 2014, various neural encoder-decoder models pioneered by Seq2Seq have been proposed to achieve the goal by learning to map input text to output text. However, the input text alone often provides limited knowledge to generate the desired output, so the performance of text generation is still far from satisfaction in many real-world scenarios. To address this issue, researchers have considered incorporating various forms of knowledge beyond the input text into the generation models. This research direction is known as knowledge-enhanced text generation. In this survey, we present a comprehensive review of the research on knowledge enhanced text generation over the past five years. The main content includes two parts: (i) general methods and architectures for integrating knowledge into text generation; (ii) specific techniques and applications according to different forms of knowledge data. This survey can have broad audiences, researchers and practitioners, in academia and industry.
abstract_zh: 文本生成的目标是让机器用人类语言表达。它是自然语言处理（NLP）中最重要但最具挑战性的任务之一。自 2014 年以来，由 Seq2Seq 开创的各种神经编码器-解码器模型被提出，通过学习将输入文本映射到输出文本来实现这一目标。然而，输入文本本身通常只能提供有限的知识来生成所需的输出，因此在许多现实场景中文本生成的性能仍然远远不能令人满意。为了解决这个问题，研究人员考虑将输入文本之外的各种形式的知识纳入生成模型中。这个研究方向被称为知识增强文本生成。在本次调查中，我们对过去五年来知识增强文本生成的研究进行了全面回顾。主要内容包括两部分：（i）将知识集成到文本生成中的通用方法和架构； (ii) 根据不同形式的知识数据的具体技术和应用。这项调查可以吸引学术界和工业界的广泛受众、研究人员和从业者。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去五年知识增强文本生成领域的研究进展，重点探讨了如何将外部知识整合到文本生成模型中。
AI.motivation: 传统文本生成模型仅依赖输入文本知识，难以满足实际场景需求，需引入外部知识提升生成质量与准确性。
AI.method: 论文从两个维度展开：(i) 通用知识融合方法与架构；(ii) 针对不同知识形式（如结构化数据、常识知识等）的具体技术与应用场景。
AI.result: 系统梳理了知识增强文本生成的技术路线与应用案例，为学术界与工业界提供了研究方向与实践参考。
AI.conclusion: 知识增强是提升文本生成能力的有效途径，未来需解决知识冲突、动态更新等挑战以推动技术落地。
